name: Fake Fishing I
description: Thomas is actually terrible at fishing but wants everybody to think he isn't.  So if you give him some fish, he'll give you some materials you can use to craft things.

name: Hot Peppers
description: Rosalie is looking for peppers for a special meal.

name: Salad Mix
description: Beatrix is looking for carrots and peas for a salad.

name: Gone Fishing
description: Thomas is looking for some bait so that he can go fishing.  He doesn't have any silver so he'll give you some seeds for the bait.

name: Leaky Roof
description: Holger is trying to make a bucket to catch the water from his leaky roof.  He is looking for the materials and will pay Silver.

name: Egg Hunt
description: Rosalie needs eggs to make a number of cakes for a large event. In return she will give you 1200 Silver.

name: Hungry Holger I
description: Holger is hungry and needs some peas to go with his meal.  He's really hungry so he wants a lot of peas.  Bring him peas.

name: Mystery Contraption I
itemsRequired: 50x Board; 5x Wooden Plank; 10x Iron; 25x Nails; 2x Iron Ring; 3x Glass Orb
description: Cecil is building something and needs some resources.  He won't say what it is yet, but will pay in gold.

name: Wedding Feast
description: Rosalie is preparing the wedding feast for the mayor's daughter. She needs Blue Sea Bass for the entrees and Small Prawn for the appetizers. It's going to be a lot of food. Please help!

name: Squirrel Problems I
description: Cecil is dealing with a squirrel problem and needs some acorns to try to lure and trap the squirrels.  200 should be enough.  Some boxes would be helpful too.

name: Observation Logs
itemsRequired: 1x Green Diary; 1x Leather Diary; 1x Purple Diary
description: Cecil is keeping a log of strange phenomena occurring in local areas. He would like to have a separate diary for each of the areas he is investigating. Please bring him a green diary for his forest observations, a leather diary for the hills and mountains, and a purple diary for the small cave.

name: Thirst for Exploring
description: Holger is going exploring. He's looking for something to carry with him that can hold drinking water, but won't add a lot of weight. It would be great if it was also sturdy, in case he runs into trouble. Holger is also looking for a durable bag to take on his journey.

name: Big Boom I
description: Beatrix needs 10 Barrels. The barrels should be large enough to hold at least 10 explosives each.

name: Big Boom II
description: Beatrix is ready to fill her barrels with explosives.

name: Unique Fish I
description: Thomas would like some unique fish to show his friends.

name: A Real Gem I
rewardItems: 1x Coin Purse; 2x Glass Orb; 1x Iron Cup; 1x Sturdy Box; 1x Wooden Shield; 2x Arrowhead; 2x Old Boot; 2x Hide
description: Beatrix is looking for real, blue gems. She wants to replace the fake gems in a pair of earrings she recently received, and she'd like a matching ring. In exchange, she would be glad to trade some items left behind by someone no longer welcome in her life.

name: Lost at Sea?
description:
Thomas is looking for news about his brother, Norris. Norris works fishing charters and Thomas hasn't seen him in days. The charter Norris was working was scheduled to return after 2 days, but the big storm a few days ago may have delayed them. 

Thomas will exchange an old book that belonged to his parents for news about the charter.

name: Spellbound
itemsRequired: 1x Leek; 1x Iron Ring; 1x Black Powder; 1x Eggplant; 1x Ruby; 1x Orange
description: Rosalie found a book in her basement. She can't open the book or remove it from the shelf it's on. At first, she was curious about this strange book, but now she just wants it gone. If you can get it out of the basement, the book is yours.

name: Wolf of Main Street
rewardItems: 1x Book of Flora; 10x Ancient Coin; 4x Sturdy Shield
description: Holger wants to start investing in the steak market, but he doesn't have enough silver. He'll trade some valuables for a steak in the market.

name: Hungry Holger II
description: Once again, Holger is hungry, but he'd like something a little more filling. He recently discovered his love for seafood, could you bring him some delicious fish?

name: Fabled Sailor
description: Cecil is investigating tales of a famous sailor from long ago, and is looking for artifacts for research purposes. If you can bring him some pieces of history, he will be most grateful.

name: Shimmering Masterpiece
itemsRequired: 50x Shimmer Quartz; 20x Shimmer Stone; 5x Glass Orb
rewardItems: 3x Lemonade; 1x Ruby Ring; 50x Board; 3x Orange Juice
description: Beatrix is in need of some shiny stones to make her latest art piece. She only wants the highest quality rocks, so it will be the shiniest object in the room.

name: Mystery Contraption II
itemsRequired: 20x Mushroom Paste; 10x Green Parchment; 12x Hide; 24x Feathers
description: Cecil is continuing to work on his secret project, and is in need of more materials. He still won't tell you what he's working on though...

name: Bling Things
itemsRequired: 5x Amethyst; 5x Aquamarine; 5x Lemon Quartz; 10x Iron; 5x Leather
rewardItems: 1x Amethyst Necklace; 1x Aquamarine Ring; 1x Lemon Quartz Ring; 3x Iron Ring
description: Rosalie needs pretty gems for the jewelry she is making, along with some other materials. She's willing to give you some of the jewelry as a reward.

name: Big Boom III
description: Beatrix needs a few more things to finish setting up. This could get messy.

name: Experimental Bait I
description: Thomas heard from a friend that radishes make excellent bait, so he wants to try it for himself.

name: Cecil's New Steed
description: Cecil recently purchased a new horse, but he needs healthy food to feed it. Can you spare some of your harvest?

name: Experimental Bait II
description: Thomas' friend lied to him. However, he heard from his brother who heard from a friend that Sweet Roots worked better as bait, and wants to try it out.

name: Cowboy Cecil I
description: Cecil needs some equipment for his fine stallion if he wants to be a real cowpoke. Could you retrieve some gear for him?

name: Coveted Canine
description: Thomas' beloved pooch has disappeared, but Thomas has hatched a plan to lure him home. Can you provide the bait?

name: Coin Connoisseur
description: Cecil recently started collecting coins. He's willing to pay you handsomely if you help expand his collection.

name: Summer Festival
itemsRequired: 70x Blue Shell; 25x Aquamarine; 30x Iron Cup; 125x Small Prawn; 35x Blue Catfish; 35x Tomato
rewardItems: 50x Glass Orb; 20x Watermelon Seeds; 1x Grape Juice
description: Rosalie is preparing to throw a festival celebrating the arrival of summer in the land. She needs a lot of materials to start preparing. Get to it farmer!

name: Hungry Holger III
description: Holger's appetite is insatiable, and he needs more snacks. Bring him something to chew on that will satisfy his stomach.

name: She Sells Sea Shells
itemsRequired: 20x Conch Shell; 30x Blue Shell; 25x Clam Shell
description: Rosalie wants some sea shells to decorate her sandcastle with, can you go sift through the sand for some?

name: Exotic Omelette
description: Holger wants to try a recipe he found in his mother's cookbook, but it calls for a specific type of eggs that he can't purchase in town. Can you bring Holger the ingredients?

name: Sweet Dreams
description: Rosalie has had trouble sleeping lately, and she thinks her old pillow is to blame. She has heard that Blue Feathers are softer than normal feathers, and wants to try making a pillow out of them to remedy her lack of sleep.

name: Fishin' in the Dark
description: Thomas wants you to get nitty gritty and catch some fish for him to cook for Holger.

name: Interior Design I
description: Cecil is looking for some trophies to hang on his walls to make him look like a great outdoorsman. Can he "borrow" some from you?

name: Hungry Holger IV
description: Holger is a hungry man, and needs more nutritional value in his belly. Can you prepare a meal for him?

name: Dog Days of Summer
description: It is crazy hot and humid lately.  Rosalie will make you some lemonade if you can bring her a Lemon.

name: Fruit Mix
itemsRequired: 2x Feathers; 1x Iron; 2x Mushroom; 3x Nails; 2x Worms; 5x Stone
description: Cecil has some extra fruit from his orchard that he could give you if you can get him what he needs.

name: Putting Down Roots I
description: George wants to start a garden. Before he plants anything, he would like to get some training from you. If you could put all the information in a journal, that would be the most helpful. His memory isn't what it used to be.

name: 10,000 Players!
description: Rosalie has seen the population of this place skyrocket lately and wants to do what she can to help all the new farmers get out there and explore the world.  She has some things to help you on your way and only needs a small payment in return.

name: Silo Duo I
description: Jill is trying to fill a big order of carrots. Unfortunately, rabbits wiped out several rows of carrots in one of her fields. She needs 40 carrots as quick as possible.

name: Silo Duo II
description: The big storm several days ago flooded one of Jill's fields and washed away a big crop of wheat. Now she's going to be short for another order. She'll pay big for your help.

name: Fellow Farmer I
description: Jill is short on some things she needs to keep her farm running smoothly.  Can you help out and provide what she needs?

name: Fly Fishing Lures
itemsRequired: 3x Gold Feather; 10x Blue Feathers; 20x Feathers; 20x Twine; 10x Iron
description: Thomas would like some materials to try making some new fly fishing lures. Can you supply him with the needed items?

name: Lucky Clover
description: Beatrix has a lucky rabbit. To help it be luckier, she wants to feed it some lucky 3 and 4 leaf clovers. Can you pick some up for her?

name: Cat Food
description: George would like to make some stew to feed his cats. If you can bring him some leftover fishbone, he will trade it for a pile of rocks he has collected out back.

name: Recycling Project
description: After all of these festivals that Rosalie has thrown, Jill has noticed that there is some cleanup needed. Help Jill collect some junk to be recycled, and materials to help reuse them.

name: Lunar Telescope
description: Beatrix would like to create a new kind of telescope, using lenses crafted from moonstone. Do you know where to find these rare rocks?

name: Super Calamari
description: Holger is in the mood for some Calamari. But, not regular Calamari. He wants SUPER Calamari, which can only be made from a Giant Squid. Can you help him catch these delicious monsters?

name: Egg Drop Contest
description: Beatrix is teaching the local school kids how to build a box that protects an egg when dropped off a roof. Holger came to help, chopped up all the wood, made a fire, and scrambled all the eggs for a big breakfast to feed the kids. Now, there are not enough materials to build the boxes or eggs to put in them. Can you help save the school project?

name: Fancy Dinner
description: Cecil wants to have a fancy dinner with an important guest tonight. He needs some gourmet food. Can you help with the wine and steak?

name: Cowboy Cecil II
description: While Cecil was riding his fine Stallion, he lost his favorite cowpoke boots in the river. There are a lot of them in there, can you find the specific ones he is looking for?

name: Thomas' Tea Party
description: Thomas's niece and friends are coming to visit him for a fancy tea party. His fishing luck hasn't been great this week though, and now he needs help to get everything set. Thomas can make the tea if you can get the rest together.

name: An Apple a Day...
description: ... Keeps the Doctor Away, or so the saying goes. Cecil would like to prove this out but he needs a good stockpile of apples to do so. Are you up for this fruity task?

name: Big Finale
description: Rosalie is preparing a holiday fireworks display. For the Big Finale, she needs a lot of bottle rockets. Can you help procure some of those whiz-poppers?

name: A Ring for Every Finger
itemsRequired: 2x Aquamarine Ring; 2x Emerald Ring; 2x Lemon Quartz Ring; 2x Ruby Ring; 2x Mystic Ring
description: Jill would like a ring for each finger. Unlike some lesser-skilled or unlucky farmers, she has all 10 fingers, and toes. She has plenty of spare wheat seeds to offer as payment if you can come up with pairs of assorted rings.

name: A Taste for Gold
itemsRequired: 5x Gold Carrot; 5x Gold Cucumber; 5x Gold Peas; 5x Gold Peppers
description:
Holger is hungry, but this time he would like a nice selection of golden crops to make an extra shiny salad. It takes real skill as a farmer to grow these crops. Do you have the talent to pull it together?

TIP: Golden crops are rare drops from the regular version of the crop.

name: Archery Practice
description: Beatrix would like to do some archery but needs materials to build a bow, arrows, and a target. Can you find what Beatrix is looking for?

name: Big Boom IV
description: Beatrix needs one final component to make sure she's not in the blast radius, and maybe a shield.

name: Punkin Chunkin Trebuchet
rewardItems: 1x Iced Tea; 1x Lemonade; 1x Orange Juice; 1x Grape Juice
description: George may not be a soldier anymore, but he loves heavy artillery. Nothing would scratch that itch like building a giant Pumpkin Chunking Trebuchet. Can you help an old soldier relive his glory days?

name: Themed Crop Labels
description: George needs some signs to label his different crops. He would like something to fit the theme of his past occupation as a soldier. Can you round up some shields that would do the job?

name: Watermelon Eating Contest
description: Rosalie has asked you to help get the needed melons together for the annual Watermelon eating contest. She bought seeds to grow the melons herself, but didn't get them planted in time.

name: Fire Brigade
description: George is in charge of making sure that the fire brigade is ready to put out any fires that this year's firework show might cause by accident. He needs a few more buckets to be ready to go. Can you help him out?

name: Mushroom Stew
description: They say all mushrooms are good. Some are only good once though. Holger trusts you know which ones are safe to eat though, and can be used to make enough mushroom stew for him to feed a large number of guests for his upcoming family reunion. He needs a few veggies for the stew too.

name: Stinky Bait
description: Thomas read in a local newspaper article about puppy care that they like to eat stinky things. Fish probably like the same stuff as dogs, and if you camouflage it with the color green, they might think it is their normal food. He wants to try this out, convinced it is the secret bait he has been looking for.

name: Invasive Fish
itemsRequired: 10x Octopus; 30x Fluorifish; 50x Mackerel; 20x Seahorse; 50x Red Starfish; 50x Globber
description: Strange new fish have been spotted in the Ocean, at the Beach, and in Crystal River. Thomas thinks they might have been attracted to all of his experimental bait. He would like you to bring him a bunch of these new fish so that he can study what types of bait attract them the most. (Or maybe, so he can pretend that he caught them)

name: Cosplay Costume
itemsRequired: 20x Bone; 2x Antler; 10x Hide; 2x Rope; 1x Sturdy Box; 1x Emberstone; 6x Prism Shard; 1x Wizard Hat
description: Jill would like to Cosplay as her D&D character, a Necromancer, at their next gaming session. Most of the materials she needs are pretty cheap, but she wants the prism shard earrings and emberstone at the top of her staff to be authentic. She also wants a sturdy box to store all of it in.

name: Flux Capacitor
description: Beatrix recently rewatched the classic "Back to the Future" films and had an epiphany. She thinks she might actually be able to build a real-life Flux Capacitor! But, doing so will require some very rare, rumored to be magical stones. Can you find what she is looking for?

name: Big Boom V
description: Beatrix finally launched the greatest fireworks display this town has ever seen, but now she has a big mess to clean up. If you can give her a hand one more time, she'd like to give you a big reward for all of your help.

name: Dice for a Fireball
description: Jill's Cosplay Costume was a huge success at her last D&D session. However, when she went to cast a fireball spell, she found that she didn't have enough six-sided dice in her collection to roll them all at once for the spell. She would like you to find some fashionable dice that match her costume's theme. She would also like a nice new bag to carry them in, so that she doesn't lose any by mistake.

name: Grill Party
description: George has a party planned, but his grill wasn't properly maintained, and he wasn't able to cook up any of his fancy kabobs to feed his guests. Can you help him out in a pinch? (Hint: Visit the Steak Market in town)

name: A Cog In The Wheel
description:
Beatrix has a water wheel power generator that has lost a few cogs. Can you round up some spare parts for her, while she cleans out the muck caught in the stationary wheel?
Hint: The missing Cogwheels may have washed downstream into the small pond. It has a drop rate of 1/1000, so will take some time to get, but keep trying!

name: A Study of Color IV
itemsRequired: 1x Blue Catfish; 1x Blue Crab; 1x Blue Feathers; 1x Blue Shell; 1x Blue Tiger Fish; 1x Bluegill; 1x Aquamarine Ring
description: There was so much green stuff, that George has a ton of paint and dye left over. Some of it could be yours if you help him stage his next work of art. Blue is the color of the day. Can you round up a few blue-ish objects for him to paint?

name: A Study of Color I
itemsRequired: 1x Purple Diary; 1x Purple Flower; 1x Purple Parchment; 1x Grapes; 1x Eggplant
description: George is now relaxing after his long career as a soldier. He would like to take up painting and would love some help collecting objects to paint for inspiration. He would like to focus on one color at a time. Can you help him round up some Purple objects to paint?

name: A Study of Color II
itemsRequired: 1x Tomato; 1x Peppers; 1x Clownfish; 1x Red Starfish; 1x Sunfish; 1x Apple; 1x Ruby
description: George was really happy with his first painting and now wants to work on another color. Red is next on his list. Can you round up a slew of red objects to stage for his next masterpiece?

name: Masked Delivery
description:
Rosalie is planning to host a fancy ball as a fundraiser charity event. She would like to have a pair of fancy masks to give away as a prize for one of the raffles. The masks she ordered, unfortunately, were lost during shipping, and now she hopes you can find something suitable to use in a pinch. Do you know where any masks might be found?
Hint: An ex-pirate hiding out in a small cave might have a few laying around. It has a drop rate of 1/1000, so will take some time to get, but keep trying!

name: A Study of Color III
itemsRequired: 1x Cabbage; 1x Cucumber; 1x Peas; 1x Green Dye; 1x Green Diary; 1x Green Chromis; 1x 4-leaf Clover; 1x Shimmer Quartz
description: Red was great, but George was after a new color now. Something very different than his last two paintings. Green is the color of the day! Can you help gather several green objects for George to paint next?

name: 20,000 Players!
itemsRequired: 20x White Parchment; 20x Eggs; 20x Nails; 20x Trout; 20x Yellow Perch
rewardItems: 20x Bottle Rocket; 20x Onion Seeds; 20x Orange Juice; 20x Minnows; 20x Fishing Net; 20x Lemonade
description: Rosalie is planning the town's big celebration in honor of the incredible population growth this year. The town now has over 20 thousand residents. Rosalie wants to throw a huge party, but in order to make that happen she needs everyone to help. Bring all the items on your list and Rosalie has a big reward for your help.

name: A New Town Hall
itemsRequired: 200x Board; 200x Steel; 200x Glass Orb; 200x Nails; 200x Sandstone; 50x Leather
description: A new Mayor has been elected! Mayor-elect Pedro has asked Rosalie to head up the committee to build a new town hall. A lot of building supplies are needed, so everyone is being asked to pitch in.

name: A Peg Leg
description: Buddy lost his peg leg. Can you find something he can use as a replacement?

name: Welcome to your Farm
description:
Now that you have named your farm, and planted your first seeds, a friendly Neighbor comes to say hello. "Hello, new friend! I'll trade you one of those peppers for a handful of seeds.

After that, when you come back here, you will find that there are lots of people in town who could use your help and help teach you the ropes of running your old farm. Once these seeds grow, come back, and I'll have some more advice for you."

name: Lorn's Advice I
description: Lorn has come to check up on your progress. "Seems like you have the basics of planting down. You know where to buy seeds in town, and you can always sell your crops at the Farmer's Market. You can take this OJ to drink, and try exploring that small cave nearby. You might find something there to bring back to me?"

name: Lorn's Advice II
description: Did you find a Mushroom in the small cave? If so, Lorn has some more work for you. "You might have found some stone in that cave. You can use it, along with some Iron you can buy from the Country Store to make Iron Cups. That will help your crafting skill grow fast. Before you can craft, you need to build a Workshop on your farm. I'll loan you this silver to help with that. Here are some materials you can practice with. Bring me back the cups you make, and we will call it even."

name: Lorn's Advice IV
description: With a yellow Perch in hand, Lorn is ready to get cooking! "Thanks for bringing me my dinner! I'll check in on you from time to time. You will find that many other townsfolk will show up as well, as your skills grow, with requests for help too. Being a good neighboor is important!"

name: Lorn's Advice III
description:
10 fancy iron cups are just what Lorn is looking for! "I'll take the cups, and call your debt paid. Next, have some bait, and then you can try your hand at fishing. How does that sound? Think you can catch a Yellow Perch for my dinner?

There are a few types of bait here that you can 'swap' between. Later, when you get your own trout farm, you can raise your own minnows and grubs. To fish, when you see a shadow, click on it. Then, click on the moving blue dot to reel it in. Some say it is best to wait for the dot to come to you."

name: Shark Week I
rewardItems: 1x Ancient Coin; 5x Stone; 1x Bone; 5x Grubs; 10x Worms; 1x Nails; 1x Sweet Root; 1x Shovel
description: Thomas wants to catch a shark. He's going  to try something different for bait. Will you bring him a shovel so he can dig up some new and different worms? He'll gladly give you all of the useless stuff he digs up as payment, and he'll return the shovel when he's done.

name: Shark Week II
rewardItems: 2x Clam Shell; 3x Conch Shell; 2x Glass Bottle; 1x Ancient Coin
description: Thomas did not catch a shark using worms. So, he would like to try something a little bigger for bait. He'll give you some stuff he found on the beach in exchange for some largemouth bass.

name: Of Planks and Cannonballs
description: Buddy would like some real cannonballs, instead of all these stones he has piled up. Stones sometimes fall apart in the cannon and make a real mess. He also needs a new plank, to make unwanted guests walk off of. If you can round up some iron to make real cannonballs, and bring him a plank, you can take home his pile of rocks.

name: A Study of Color V
itemsRequired: 1x Wood; 1x Wooden Plank; 1x Board; 1x Wooden Barrel; 1x Wooden Box; 1x Wooden Shield; 1x Wooden Mask; 1x Sturdy Box; 1x Sturdy Shield; 1x Straw; 1x Rope; 1x Steak Kabob; 1x Sandstone; 1x Leather; 1x Leather Bag; 1x Leather Diary; 1x Leather Waterskin; 1x Potato
description: George would like to do some painting now of something many might see as mundane color. Brown is the next color for his new masterpiece. Can you round up a bunch of brown objects?

name: Shark Week III
description: Thomas still hasn't caught a shark, but he's not giving up. He decided to use something really different as bait. If you'll bring him a couple of bluegill and some mushroom paste, he'll give you a shark tooth he found on the beach.

name: A Study of Color VI
itemsRequired: 1x Lemon; 1x Orange; 1x Lemon Quartz Ring; 1x Corn; 1x Pumpkin; 1x Carrot; 1x Seahorse; 1x Yellow Perch; 1x Gold Feather
description: Next, George is working on two similar colors, instead of just one. He needs lots of Yellow and Orange objects. Think you can round up enough to fill up a painting? There is lots of leftover rope from the Brown painting as a reward. George also promises that this maybe, might possibly be the last color he studies. But he isn't 100% sure yet.

name: Shark Week IV
itemsRequired: 4x Bone; 20x Feathers; 3x Mushroom Paste; 4x Fish Bones
description: Thomas found 2 more shark teeth while he was trying out the new bait you helped him create. He is now convinced that he is on the trail of a massive shark. If you'll bring him more mushroom paste, bones, and feathers, you can have the shark teeth he found.

name: Guest Ledger
description: Buddy would like to keep a list of all of his victims.... erhem.. guests! He gets a lot of guests though, so needs a big pile of books for his records. In exchange, he can hand over this useless old book, already filled with non-important facts, maps and details.

name: An Exchange of Prisoners
description: Buddy is finding it hard to read and write the entries in his guest ledger. He could use a pair of nice shiny spectacles. In exchange, he will hand over his old eye patch, which isn't helping him get the job done anymore.

name: Warning Shots
description: With everything getting organized, Buddy found that his stock of black powder got wet, and has been ruined. How is he supposed to fire his cannons now, to ward off any unwanted trespassers into his cave? If you can resupply his black powder, he has a nifty flag you can have in exchange.

name: Time is of the Essence
description: Vincent is in a hurry today. He is sure he is late getting somewhere, but how can he be sure? He lost his watch. A terrible thing for a mercenary to admit. If you can replace his pocket watch for him, he will share some of his most delicious breakfast with you.

name: Treasure Chests for Plunder
description: Lots of people come to the Small Cave looking for treasure. Buddy would hate for them to leave being disappointed. So, he wants to bury lots of treasure chests around for people to find. Can you bring him some spare chests to use? He will give you some spare junk he found in return.

name: Foraging for Food
itemsRequired: 2x Axe; 6x Horn Canteen; 2x Leather Bag; 2x Leather Diary
description: A mercenary is always traveling, and knowing how to forage for food is very important. If you can bring Vincent some tools, and a diary to keep notes in, he will show you how to find something yummy to spread on your toast.

name: Milk Chugging
description: Holger has heard of the legendary Milk Chugging challenge. Drink a gallon of milk in under an hour? Sounds like child's play to Holger. He would like you to provide a much larger quantity of milk to show how this challenge should be done. He will pay you fair market value for the milk, and even throw in a shiny  feather.

It is hot and this place keeps growing!  Rosalie has some drinks for you to help you cool off in all this heat.  Just give her a couple glass orbs for the trouble. Thanks for being a part of the community!

name: Strange Stones I
description: Beatrix has heard rumors about stones with unique properties. Specifically, she heard about a unique stone somewhere on Mount Banon. Unfortunately, she's never been able to find it. Will you help her find this unique stone?

name: Strange Stones II
description: Beatrix heard about another strange stone from Lorn. He said it's somewhere in the Ember Lagoon area. Beatrix tried to get Lorn to help her find the stone, but he's too busy helping all of the new folks that have come to town. Will you help Beatrix find another strange stone?

name: 200 Patrons!
description: Rosalie was out exploring the small cave and came across a treasure chest full of Gold!  She doesn't need all of this Gold, so she wants to share it with you and everybody else around town.  If you can bring her some eggplants she'll pay you 20 Gold for the trouble.

name: Strange Stones III
rewardItems: 1x Runestone 09; 20x Ancient Coin; 20x Shimmer Quartz; 10x Horn; 20x Coal; 50x Sandstone
description: Beatrix is still searching for strange stones. Recently, she caught a promising lead from Holger, after emptying her pantry to feed him. Holger said that he found 2 strange stones in Black Rock Canyon, but he doesn't remember where, although he did remember eating beef jerky when he found the stone with 4 runes on it. After searching for several days, Beatrix found the stone with 4 runes on it, but it doesn't react with the other stones you found for her. Can you find the other stone?

name: Strange Stones IV
rewardItems: 200x Wood; 200x Antler; 100x Twine; 100x Rope; 20x Fishing Net
description: While Beatrix was experimenting with the strange stones yesterday, Thomas stopped by to talk about shark bait ideas. Thomas recognized the stones and said that his parents used to search for a runestone, like the ones Beatrix has, on the Highland Hills. His parents never found it, but they were sure it was out there. Beatrix wants that runestone.

name: Strange Stones V
description: Beatrix got another clue about runestones. Jill said that her family found a few runestones when they grew certain crops when she was a kid. She said that they found one stone among eggplants and another in their cornfield. Beatrix would like you to try harvesting eggplants to see if Jill's tale is true.

name: Strange Stones VI
description: Jill was right! Beatrix would like you to try to get a runestone from harvesting corn now.

name: Strange Stones VII
rewardItems: 20x Green Jellyfish; 20x Skipjack; 200x Crappie; 25x Fishing Net
description: Beatrix got another clue. It's secondhand and unverified, but Vincent really believes it. So it should be as good as the clues for the other stones. Vincent heard from a brewer, sometime during his travels, he wouldn't say where, that the secret to his incredible ale was a stone that he found in a bag of hops. Vincent said the ale was easily the best he ever had. Beatrix would like you to try harvesting some hops.

name: Strange Stones VIII
description: A few weeks ago, Beatrix hired a fishing charter for Lake Tempest. She asked the crew about strange stones before they left. A couple of the older hands said that they found a few strange stones on a variety of fishing trips. After a lot of disagreement, Captain Logan suggested the best strategy would be to follow the flow of the water and search the lake, the river, and the ocean. Since then, Beatrix has fished and hired charters every day with no success. Will you try the lake?

name: Strange Stones IX
rewardItems: 10x Gold Pepper Seeds; 10x Gold Cucumber Seeds; 10x Gold Carrot Seeds; 10x Gold Pea Seeds; 20x Fishing Net
description: With the addition of that 8th runestone, something strange happened. The runestones started glowing. Beatrix really wants to see if there are any more runestones. Will you try the river?

name: Strange Stones X
description: Nothing changed with the addition of the 9th runestone. Beatrix expected something more to happen, but the stones are just glowing. Beatrix thinks there must be another runestone. Will you try the ocean?

name: Strange Stones Exigent
description: Beatrix is missing. Lorn went to meet her for tea, but she wasn't home. She wasn't home for tea the next day either. He asked around town and searched all her favorite places, but no one has seen her. For the third time, Lorn went to meet Beatrix for tea, but she still wasn't home. So, Lorn searched her house. He found a cracked lava sphere. Lorn thinks Beatrix is now trapped at Lake Minerva. Will you help repair the lava sphere and help find Beatrix?

name: Not-So-Strange Stones
itemsRequired: 100x Emberstone; 100x Carbon Sphere; 100x Sandstone; 100x Unpolished Emerald; 100x Arrowhead
description: Buddy is a little jealous of all the strange stones that Beatrix has been gathering. He would like you to help him grow his own rock collection. He doesn't want those really strange stones though, just lots of the ones he can't find in his cave.

name: You Must Build A Boat V
description: For finishing touches, Vincent suggests a cabin for sleeping and shelter if the weather gets rough.  The bed he's suggesting looks to be extremely soft! Hopefully you're almost done.

name: Set Sail for Pirate's Cove
itemsRequired: 1x Wooden Barrel; 5x Dice; 2x Wooden Box; 10x 4-leaf Clover
description: Finally, you set sail, Vincent stares darkly at the horizon, which strikes you as odd.  Noticing you noticing him, he suggests you play a game of dice while time is on your side...

name: You Must Build A Boat IV
itemsRequired: 1x Cogwheel; 2x Looking Glass; 1x Pocket Watch; 10x Wooden Plank; 10x Iron
description: With the basics out of the way, Vincent explains that you're going to want a way to steer, and maybe see where you're going.  The logic of the situation doesn't escape you either, so you set off to find a few more items.  Building a boat is a lot of work...

name: You Must Build A Boat III
description: With the anchor and nets in place, Vincent suggests you may want some things that will keep the boat clean - and some extra storage for supplies.  Vincent reminds you that having a clean ship will give you a sense of pride and accomplishment, which is its own reward.

name: You Must Build A Boat II
description: The boat is taking shape, but you're going to need an anchor, and what boat doesn't look good with nets hanging off the side? Vincent looks tired but determined, and he's much more skilled at crafting than you expected!

name: Pirate's Cove II
itemsRequired: 10x Bird Egg; 10x Rope; 50x Wood; 50x Stone; 2x Iron Cup; 1x Shovel; 1x Axe; 1x Hammer; 5x Black Powder; 2x Horn Canteen
description: Vincent, with a gleam in his eye, offers you the opportunity to join him in his adventure.  He suggests you bring along some basic items of survival, and he'll provide the rest, for now...

name: You Must Build A Boat I
itemsRequired: 100x Wooden Plank; 200x Fern Leaf; 100x Rope; 100x Mushroom Paste
description: After eating, Vincent tells you that he lost his boat.  If you help with materials, he'll help you with building it.  You're not quite sure why he didn't mention this first...

name: Pirate's Cove I
description: Vincent, ever the opportunist, tells you he's looking for the Pirate's Cove.  He offers you money and promises for riches in exchange for a rune that he thinks may guide him to the cove he seeks.

name: Lost Family Heirloom
description: Buddy claims a family heirloom was recently lost or stolen. He thinks it is a picture of his great-great-great-grandmother trice removed. In any case, it may show up sometime in the flea market for sale. If you can find it for him, he will gladly cover your costs and then some. (Flea Market inventory changes every hour)

name: Bling Things II
description: Rosalie has heard that your Quarry may have found some very rare Jade in it. She would love to add a Jade Charm to her collection of Bling Things. She can hand you some silver, and aged cheese wrapped in a fancy bandana as a reward.

name: Return Our Lost Friend I
description: Lorn appreciates your efforts to try to find Beatrix, but he found a passage in The Book of Places that leads him to believe she's not at Lake Minerva. Instead of endlessly searching that fiery place, Lorn would like your help gathering a few items that he believes will help return our lost friend.

name: Return Our Lost Friend II
description: Lorn needs some steel to continue constructing his rescue apparatus. He also needs a new hammer.

name: Return Our Lost Friend III
description: Lorn is still working on the rescue device, but he wants to go ahead and have the materials ready for the gravitational array. Will you gather the items he needs?

name: Shipwrecked!
description: After an evening of dice, Vincent suggests you take first watch, while he gets some rest.  After Vincent lays down, you realize you have absolutely no idea how to steer the boat, or what being on lookout means.  You stand at the wheel, when suddenly the boat gives a mighty heave, and you are thrown into the sea.  In the chaos, Vincent cries out and suggests you find a barrel and some rope, and search for land!

name: Pirate's Cove III
itemsRequired: 2x Looking Glass; 2x Magnifying Glass; 1x Leather Bag; 1x Ladder; 1x Spectacles
rewardItems: 20x Potato Seeds; 2x Iced Tea; 1x Strange Letter
description: The water crashing around you in the morning light, you see land ahead.  As you look around, Vincent is nowhere in sight.  The boat seems quite damaged, it looks like you ran into a giant rock, oops.  With no other choice, you paddle towards the shore, and notice some footprints and an oddly broken branch farther up the shore.  You resolve to find Vincent and repair the boat, in that order.

name: Pirate's Cove IV
itemsRequired: 4x Wine; 4x Steak; 10x Bacon; 4x Gold Eggplant; 8x Gold Carrot; 4x Gold Cucumber; 5x Gold Peas; 20x Gold Peppers
rewardItems: 1x Skull Coin; 2x Grape Juice; 20x Lemonade; 10x Unpolished Jade
description: After following some marks in trees and subtly scuffed moss, you stumble upon a Small Cave, it seems oddly familiar.  A voice greets you.  “Hi, my name is Buddy!  Let’s be friends and have dinner!” He requests you bring food for dinner “Because that’s what new friends do!”.  His face looks happy, but his demeanor seems demanding, so you set out to help make dinner for your new ‘friend’.  He offers you one of his pirate coins on loan if you’ll help him make new friends after you eat.

name: Pirate's Cove V
itemsRequired: 5x Wizard Hat; 3x Moonstone; 20x Magicite; 10x Gold Feather
description: During dinner, you hear faint bird chirps from deeper in the cave. They’re distracting, but you try to focus while Buddy explains that he just really wants to make new friends, but every time he sees someone, they keep walking without giving him a second thought.  He’s devised a new idea to get friends, using magic!  He asks for your help in obtaining these items in hope that he can cast a spell that will make people want to be his friend.

name: Pirate's Cove VI
itemsRequired: 100x Amethyst Necklace; 50x Ancient Coin; 100x Emerald Ring; 100x Pearl Necklace; 25x Ruby Fish; 50x Shimmer Ring; 75x Lemon Quartz Ring; 50x Mystic Ring; 100x Aquamarine Ring; 40x Jade Charm; 100x Ruby Ring
description: Buddy looks downtrodden, his ‘magic spells’ did not make him any friends.  An owl hoots and his eyes flash angrily for a moment before softening somewhat.  Buddy has heard that wealth is a great way to make friends, and he demands you bring him things that will make his cave flaunt his wealth and people will surely want to be his friend!  You get the nagging sensation you’re forgetting something right now…

name: Pirate's Cove VII
description: As you watch Buddy decorate his cave, the sounds of birds echo louder and you decide to investigate.  While Buddy is distracted, you take a quick peek and discover Vincent in a cage!  It turns out that Vincent and Buddy are clearly not friends, though Vincent doesn’t seem willing to discuss why at the moment.  Buddy, realizing you know Vincent, demands his pirate coin back, and tells you to leave at once!

name: Pirate's Cove VIII
description: You take a look at the cage, you can see areas where Vincent tried to break out, but the cage was cleverly made.  Hesitant to leave Vincent alone, you devise a plan to break Vincent out using bottle rockets placed in the cave as a distraction, and some minor explosives to break open the cage.

name: Pirate's Cove IX
itemsRequired: 5x Wooden Mask; 200x Iron; 100x Steel; 10x Moonstone; 30x Wood; 20x Leather
description: As Vincent hurls insults at Buddy, you run back towards the ship, an incensed Buddy seems close behind.  Vincent suggests some kind of extra distraction while you repair the ship.

name: You Must Repair A Boat
itemsRequired: 100x Wooden Plank; 150x Mushroom Paste; 100x Leather; 200x Nails; 120x Steel; 25x Lemonade
description: Buddy has been distracted on the shoreline and has lost sight of you thanks to Vincent’s quick thinking.  Vincent lays out the damage to the ship and suggests you watch where you’re going in the future.  Suddenly, you hear a cannon in the distance and decide not to argue and get to work.

name: Escape from Pirate's Cove
rewardItems: 1x Skull Coin; 1x Wooden Pipe; 1x Pirate Bandana
description: The boat, looking worse for the wear, but still seaworthy (you hope!) sets off, cannons in the background.  You catch Buddy and Vincent glaring angrily at each other, no love lost there it seems.   Vincent turns to you and offers you the pirate bandana as proof of your piratical adventure, and with a sly smile, palms you a coin and rare-looking pipe he swiped from the cave during the escape.  Perhaps they will be useful later on a new adventure…

name: Gold Mine
itemsRequired: 1x Shovel; 20x Nails; 20x Iron; 5x Board; 3x Apple; 2x Iron Cup
description: Jill hear rumors of a Gold Mine way off in the hills.  She would like to try to go explore it, but needs some items before she can go.  She will give you a portion of any Gold she finds in the mine.

name: Return Our Lost Friend IV
rewardItems: 1x Mackerel; 1x Apple; 1x Globber; 1x Iced Tea; 1x Cucumber
description: Lorn needs Rosalie’s mystic ring. He’s not sure how it happened, but Rosalie’s mystic ring is holding the magic spark needed to activate his machine and return Beatrix. Hopefully, Rosalie will trade you for it.

name: Conjure Up A New Recipe I
itemsRequired: 1x Mackerel; 1x Apple; 1x Globber; 1x Iced Tea; 1x Cucumber
description: Rosalie wants to test her culinary skills by making a new recipe from arbitrary ingredients. Will you bring her some challenging items to try?

name: Return Our Lost Friend V
description: The time has come. Now Lorn needs the Lava Sphere Beatrix crafted. While the machine is working he wants you to get as far away as you can, in case something goes wrong. He would also like you to to hold on to a letter for him. If everything goes well, you can return it to him, otherwise Lorn would like it delivered to Rosalie.

name: Lost and Found
rewardItems: 2x Runestone 11; 2x Runestone 12; 2x Runestone 13; 2x Runestone 14; 2x Runestone 15; 2x Runestone 16; 2x Runestone 17; 2x Runestone 18; 2x Runestone 19; 2x Runestone 20
description: Lorn is ready to get his letter back. Despite the damage to his workshop, the machine was a success. Beatrix was safely returned, and Lorn already took her home to rest. The bad news is that the machine is a pile of ash and the Lava Sphere is gone. However, in the ash, Lorn found the strangest thing: two of each of the runestones Beatrix used to craft the Lava Sphere. Lorn thinks you should take them and keep them safe.

name: The Neighs Have It
description: Neigh…

name: Rat Trap!
rewardItems: 10x Gold Carrot Seeds; 10x Gold Cucumber Seeds; 10x Gold Pepper Seeds; 10x Gold Pea Seeds
description:
A dirty rat has been sneaking into your barn, and stealing your seeds! If you lace a trap with some cheese, you can probably catch the little beggar, and get some of your seeds back.
(Cheese is given as a reward from some quests, can be found occasionally in the Flea Market, and in the Post Office Passwords. Also note, this quest gives SEEDS as a reward, that you will have to plant to grow golden crops)

name: His Mane Quest I
description: Neigh?

name: His Mane Quest II
description: Neigh!!

name: To Ride A Horse
description: Buddy has seen a fancy new horse in town and would like to ride it.  Having never ridden a horse, Buddy has requested some items with which to aid him in his goal.

name: Consequences and Defenses I
itemsRequired: 200x Wood; 50x Carbon Sphere; 200x Emberstone; 100x Steel; 250x Stone
description: Beatrix is always freezing since Lorn brought her back. She’s using every blanket she has, but she’s still so cold. She doesn’t have a fever, but she’s clearly not well. Will you help her build a more significant heater?

name: Bug Life I
description: Cecil is interested in studying the insect life of the Misty Forest. Will you bring him some bugs?

name: Let's Play Pirates I
itemsRequired: 1x Eye Patch; 2x Old Boot; 1x Pirate Bandana; 1x Pirate Flag; 1x Looking Glass; 1x Wooden Sword; 1x Wooden Shield
description: Buddy really wants someone to play pirates with.  He’d like you to bring the best pirate garb you can find, and he will bring an authentic pirate chest.  He promises you can have everything back when you're done.

name: Escargot
description: Holger is pretty hungry but wants to try something a little more European. Escargot! There are rumored to be small snails around the Small Spring. Can you bring enough to Holger to make a meal? He has a new wooden carving he can give you as a reward.

name: An Owl's Best Friend
description: Holger really misses the Carved Owl he gave you earlier. If you bring it back, along with some wood, he will make a new one for you, and something extra as well.

name: Not From Around Here
rewardItems: 24x Hops Seeds; 1x Ancient Coin; 1x Wizard Hat
description: A mysterious figure approaches you while you are in your fields.  He tips his hat which you could have sworn wasn’t there a second ago and says he's not from around here.  He asks for some food and good conversation, and some extra supplies, as he's traveling the world for a spell.  He offers to recompense you for your time and effort.

name: Let's Play Pirates III
rewardItems: 1x Wooden Sword; 1x Wooden Shield; 20x Broccoli Seeds
description: Buddy has taken townsfolk hostage in his cave to “play pirate prisoner” with you.  Alarmingly, none of them seem to have agreed or known about this.  Buddy challenges you to a duel with the townsfolk’s freedom as the prize!

name: We Carrot a Lot!
description: Holger has a bunch of new friends that really need some food. Everyone knows that rabbits love carrots, but do you think Holger really wants these carrots for his carved rabbits, or is he going to eat them all himself? Maybe you can take one home and find out for yourself if they really would eat!

name: Let's Play Pirates II
itemsRequired: 1x Diamond; 10x Amethyst Necklace; 10x Aquamarine Ring; 10x Emerald Ring; 10x Jade Charm; 10x Lemon Quartz Ring; 10x Shimmer Ring; 10x Ruby Ring; 10x Pearl Necklace; 10x Mystic Ring
description: Buddy has asked you to fill a treasure chest with all sorts of shiny things to use as your pirate treasure.  Buddy believes friendship is its own reward, and he promises again that you can have everything back when you're done.

name: Acorns A Callin
description: Did your carved rabbit eat a carrot? Well, probably not. But today, Holger makes no pretense about what he wants the acorns for. They will make great decorations around the new carved squirrel army he has on display in front of his farmhouse.

name: Let's Play Pirates IV
description: Buddy is impressed with your fighting skill, and happy that you have spent some time with him.  You have rescued the townspeople, and sent them back home. Buddy wants to know if you will be his best friend.  He would like to have the sword you bested him with, in exchange for some coins he found.

name: A Bear Skin Rug
description: George would like to make some bear skin rugs. Bring him some hide, and he will be happy as can be. He will even give you a wooden carving Holger made for him earlier.

name: Let's Play Pirates V
rewardItems: 1x Treasure Chest; 1x Diamond; 1x Eye Patch; 1x Pirate Bandana; 1x Pirate Flag; 2x Old Boot; 1x Looking Glass; 1x Wooden Shield; 1x Wooden Sword; 1x Buddystone
description: Buddy asks if you will come play pirates again with him sometime.  He gives you back your pirate garb, and some of your shiny treasure.  He also hands you a strange looking rock.  He seems to have kept the rings…

name: Moose Horns
description: Holger is working on something really big! It needs some antlers. Holger knows you really want to use those antlers to make nets though, so he will help you out to make sure you are even.

name: Hakuna Matata
itemsRequired: 20x Fire Ant; 20x Horned Beetle; 20x Shiny Beetle
description: Hakuna Matata, what a wonderful phrase! Hakuna Matata, makes you want to eat bugs for days! At least if you are a warthog. Did you know Holger has carved up something new in tribute to these wonderful animals? Bring him a handful of their favorite foods, and Holger will send you on your way with your own special friend.

name: Last but not least...
description: Holger has one last woodcarving masterpiece to share with you. He wants some horns in return. You are sure he isn't going to eat those, right? Oh, for canteens? Ok, this is probably safe to do then.

name: Consequences and Defenses II
itemsRequired: 2x Gold Leaf; 100x Hops; 100x Peppers; 100x Leek; 5x Gold Peppers; 10x Cabbage; 1x Teapot
description: Vincent gave Beatrix some ideas for a few teas to try, to help her recover from whatever is ailing her. He also gave her a recipe for a tea that is supposed to help her sleep. Unfortunately, Beatrix is too exhausted to go and find all of the ingredients for the teas. Will you help her? She also needs a new teapot.

name: His Mane Quest III
description: Neigh neigh neigh!

name: Consequences and Defenses III
description: Lorn went to check on Beatrix this morning, but she was still sleeping. He waited and waited for her to wake up well into the afternoon, until it was time for him to meet with Rosalie. Beatrix was still in a deep sleep when Lorn finally left. Will you check on Beatrix this evening and bring her some dinner?

name: Fire Alarm
itemsRequired: 250x Sandstone; 250x Tomato; 250x Orange; 250x Purple Flower; 250x Fern Leaf; 250x Iron; 250x Radish; 250x Eggs; 100x Bucket
rewardItems: 10x Grape Juice; 100x Emerald; 20x Iced Tea; 200x Steel; 250x Twine
description:
George saw the dragon that destroyed the Pale Moon Inn. He says it flew over his house as quick as a shooting star, slammed into the second floor of the inn, and burst back into the air with an explosion of flames behind it.
George thinks the inn might have survived, if not for that fire. Water couldn’t stop it. The building didn’t stand a chance, and the only thing that saved the occupants of the inn was George’s shouting.
In case the dragon returns, will you help George make buckets of dragon fire extinguisher?

name: The Collector
rewardItems: 1x Eye Patch; 1x Pirate Bandana; 1x Pirate Flag
description: Cecil, known for collecting oddities, has heard your plight! You may want to 'Play Pirates', but can't find, or somehow lost the hard-to-find costume pieces needed to do so? Never fear, an exchange can be made, for the right price of course! Just remember, this deal can only be made once. Please don't sell off your needed pirate costume pieces in the future!

name: His Mane Quest IV
description: …sigh…neigh…neigh…

name: Consequences and Defenses IV
itemsRequired: 20x Broccoli; 20x Apple; 20x Corn; 5x Orange Juice; 20x Bacon; 20x Peppers; 5x Flamejack; 5x Torch Fish
rewardItems: 100x Wheat Seeds; 20x Moonstone; 250x Eggplant Seeds; 100x Tomato Seeds; 20x Jade; 20x Pearl; 20x Steel
description: Beatrix didn’t hear you knocking or calling out to her when you dropped off dinner yesterday, but she’s grateful you left the food for her. She was ravenous when she woke this morning. Actually, Beatrix is still very hungry. Will you bring her some lunch?

name: Fire in the Field
description:
A loud boom shook Jill’s windows and woke her up just after midnight. She ran to her bedroom window to see what happened and discovered a fire in her wheat field. It only lasted about half an hour, but it burned the entire field of wheat right down to the dirt. Jill tried to put out the fire, but nothing could extinguish it.
After the field cooled down, she discovered an enormous crater, but there were no remnants of whatever fell there.
Will you help Jill get caught up on her wheat?

name: Consequences and Defenses V
description: Beatrix is extremely hungry again today, and she has an almost painful craving for steak. Specifically, Beatrix wants her steak really, really well done. If you’ll get the steak and coal for her, she’ll cook it to her liking.

name: The Collector - Goldfish
description: You are an experienced enough farmer now, that you have gathered quite a few rarities during your days. Cecil is looking to add to his collection of very hard-to-find fish. Some are so rare, that only pets can find them. Can you help Cecil finish his collection by providing some Goldfish? He will pay handsomely.

name: The Collector - Large Clam Shell
description: You are an experienced enough farmer now, that you have gathered quite a few rarities during your days. Cecil is looking to add to his collection of very hard-to-find fish. Some are so rare, that only pets can find them. Can you help Cecil finish his collection by providing some Large Clam Shells? He will pay handsomely.

name: The Collector - Shinefish
description: You are an experienced enough farmer now, that you have gathered quite a few rarities during your days. Cecil is looking to add to his collection of very hard-to-find fish. Some are so rare, that only pets can find them. Can you help Cecil finish his collection by providing some Shinefish? He will pay handsomely.

name: The Collector - Gold Crab
description: You are an experienced enough farmer now, that you have gathered quite a few rarities during your days. Cecil is looking to add to his collection of very hard-to-find fish. Some are so rare, that only pets can find them. Can you help Cecil finish his collection by providing some Gold Crabs? He will pay handsomely.

name: Fire Unstable
itemsRequired: 250x Board; 2x Hammer; 250x Nails; 250x Wooden Plank; 20x Apple; 20x Carrot; 4x Horseshoe; 50x White Parchment; 1x Looking Glass
description:
Cecil’s horse is missing, and the stable is burned to the ground. After searching his estate, Cecil found some signs that the horse may be injured, or worse. He also found a horseshoe hanging from a branch at least 4 meters above his head.
Will you gather some supplies to help Cecil find his horse and rebuild his stable?

name: Consequences and Defenses VI
rewardItems: 10x Grape Juice; 125x Orange Juice; 250x Apple; 250x Lemonade
description:
Lorn appreciates all of your hard work to help Beatrix. He was very busy over the past few days helping Rosalie, and your assistance took a great weight off his shoulders.
Also, knowing that you are watching out for Beatrix has allowed Lorn time to do research. He thinks that he’s close to discovering what is ailing our returned friend.
Now, Lorn would like to borrow your copy of the Book of Schemas for his research. In the meantime, he needs you to refresh and prepare yourself. Something strange is happening around town.

name: Not From Around Here II
description: The mysterious man thanks you for the food but mentions that your conversation was a bit… lacking.  A sparkle in his eye, he suggests you meet him in town and asks that you introduce him to some of the townsfolk!  He mentions that he believes in giving a gift to each person he meets, and asks you bring him a gift for Rosalie…

name: Not From Around Here III
description: Still wondering how he knew who Rosalie is, you see the mysterious man approach Rosalie and engage her in conversation.  You overhear them discuss both the beauty of the town and something about luck.  It’s an odd conversation, but he’s an odd fellow in your experience. The mysterious man tips another hat to Rosalie and rejoins you saying he’s met everyone he’d like to but could use an extra pair of shoes and some repair material for the journey home.

name: Now You See It
description:
On the walk back towards your farm, you realize you have no idea where “home” is, and get the sinking feeling your home might be his home now. As you walk towards your farm, he stops and thanks you for the companionship with a flourish of another hat.

“By the way, my name is ‘Star Meerif,’ and my home is just over that way a bit. You know, I could use a few feathers, if you have any to spare? They’re for my favorite spell.” He points off in the distance and suddenly a tower shimmers into your view. You cry out in surprise, only to turn around and see that Star has disappeared with your feathers and only a Wizard Hat with items inside is left behind...

name: Now You Don't
description: As you tend your farm one evening, Rosalie approaches you and asks if you know where to find Star Meerif.  You give her a look of utter confusion and turn around and point, only to see nothing on the horizon.  You struggle to find words but find her looking quite disappointed.  She asks if you have anything to cheer her up when you remember what Star left for you.

name: Fire in the Belly I
itemsRequired: 20x Board; 100x Nails; 50x Steel; 20x Blue Catfish; 20x Catfish; 20x Mackerel; 10x Marlin; 20x Blue Sea Bass; 50x Mussel; 20x Trout
description:
Holger heard a noise outside near his smokehouse. It was loud enough that it woke him. By the time he put his prosthetic leg on, grabbed his axe, and got to the smokehouse, all of his smoked fish were gone. He saw something big flying away in the moonlight, but he could only make out a silhouette. Whatever it was, it blasted the door to ashes before it took all his fish.
Will you help Holger restock and repair his smokehouse?

name: 50,000 Players!
itemsRequired: 10x Carrot; 5x Iron Cup; 15x Mushroom Paste; 10x Peas; 7x Apple
description: Rosalie can't keep up with the amount of new farmers around town.  She needs to cater an event with over 50,000 people!  Can you help her with some items she needs for the event?  She will pay well for the assistance.

name: His Mane Quest V
rewardItems: 1x Coin Purse; 5x Horned Beetle; 5x Shiny Beetle
description: …Snort.

name:
Make Life Take
The Lemons Back!
description:
*poof*
In a shower of feathers, Star appears in your home both unannounced and uninvited and tips his hat to you. He looks as usual, just slightly more aggravated than you remember.
"Lemons! Lemons! LEMONS! They're so tart and tart and... tart and... UNINTERESTING! I can't stand them! When life gives you lemons, make life take the lemons back! We should get oranges instead! Don't you agree? Well, no matter, because I do. Let me show you this spell I've been working on..."
Star holds his hands out to you expectantly.

name: Orange Justice
rewardItems: 40x Orange Juice; 1x Wizard Hat; 1x Iced Tea
description:
Star gives you a wild smile, and motions for you to step away.
"One more thing, could you bring me some feathers? They're for my favorite spell! I can't quite remember the name of it right now, but it's delightful! Hurry up now, I should be done when you get back!"
After you've gathered the feathers, you look inside your home to see a strange glow coming from the windows. The orange glow strikes you as odd, when suddenly the glow becomes as intense as the sun followed by a giant popping noise! You rush inside to see Star chuckling to himself. When he sees you he makes a grand gesture with his hat and says:
"Oh, you've brought the feathers? Thanks friend! Look what I've accomplished in your absence! There was a small mistake on one though..."
You look to see a table full of orange juice where your lemons had been! By the time you turn around, you realize once again, Star is gone without so much as a goodbye.

name: Consequences and Defenses VII
description: Beatrix appreciates your help. Lorn told her at tea today all that you did to assist him in bringing her back. On top of all that, Beatrix appreciates all your support through her current troubles. She would like you to bring some honey and join her for an after dinner hops tea. She also has a gift for you.

name: Fire in the Belly II
itemsRequired: 250x Drum; 250x Yellow Perch; 250x Trout; 250x Largemouth Bass; 250x Bone Fish; 250x Sunfish
description:
Holger is not happy.

He didn’t hear anything this time, but something broke into his smokehouse and emptied it again. Whatever is stealing Holger’s food destroyed the door again too. All that’s left of the door is the steel reinforcements he added, but they were warped and bent away.

After talking it over with Thomas, they came up with an idea, and they want you to help. They want to rebuild the door, and then fill the smokehouse from floor to ceiling with fish. They don’t need anything fancy or delicious just lots of fish. They’re hoping whatever is breaking in will return and start in on the fish. Then, when it’s really, really full they can get the drop on it.

name: Fire in the Forest
itemsRequired: 1x Axe; 1x Looking Glass; 30x Apple; 20x Rope; 1x Magnifying Glass; 1x Sturdy Shield
description:
Vincent could see the fire burning the birch forest near Mount Banon, all the way from his campsite. The glare made it harder for him to sleep than usual. It also reminded him of something that happened a long time ago when he was working in a land far away from here. There were random fires and destruction, and animals went missing. A few people were hurt and killed too.

That disaster from long ago was caused by a dragon. The destruction didn’t stop until a trio of dragon hunters arrived and hunted down the dragon. They killed it, but the dragon got one of the hunters and injured the other two.

Vincent would like to see a little less destruction this time. Will you help Vincent find the dragon and figure out a way to stop it? He’ll need some tools and resources.

name: Consequences and Defenses VIII
itemsRequired: 100x Pine Cone; 100x Green Dye; 100x Mushroom Paste
description:
Lorn likes the idea that Holger and Thomas cooked up, except the part about attacking the dragon. After his latest round of research, he has a better idea. Instead of attacking it, Lorn wants to mark the dragon with green dye and let it escape. Lorn hopes the dye will allow him to find the beast and help it when it’s in a more peaceful state.

Lorn discussed this idea at length with Holger and Thomas. Holger didn’t like it. Thomas was supportive, because he thought it sounded like a strategy he could use for fishing. Nevertheless, both men agreed to do it Lorn’s way this time.

If you’ll gather the resources they need, Lorn will compensate you for your time and materials. He’s also finished with your book and would like to return it to you.

name: His Mane Quest VI
description: Neigh…neigh?

name: Lorn's Advice V
description:
"Hey, I know you have a lot of work to do, and sometimes these help requests can take a while to complete," Lorn tells you. "If you click that button there, yup, the one that says 'Track Items', I'll track your progress for you!

Of course, if you have everything needed, only 'Collect and Complete' will show up. Oh, and if you hand over a few worms and some stones, I have a treat for you too. It is never too early to get a good breakfast!"

name: Islands Are Hard To Catch I
itemsRequired: 250x Flarefin; 250x Fluorifish; 250x Blue Tiger Fish; 250x Globber; 250x Mackerel; 250x Flier; 250x Bluegill; 250x Yellow Perch; 250x Catfish
description:
Thomas wants to ride with a fishing charter out to the vast ocean. He’s searching for a hidden island. Unfortunately, he doesn’t have any gold to pay for the charter. So, he made a deal with Captain Logan. Thomas is supposed to provide a variety of fish to make up for the lost fishing opportunities the captain will experience while hauling Thomas around, and a little extra.

Will you help Thomas catch the fish he needs? He can’t pay much, but he promises to also share anything exciting he finds on the hidden island.

name: Islands Are Hard To Catch II
itemsRequired: 250x Grubs; 250x Gummy Worms; 250x Minnows; 250x Worms; 100x Shiny Beetle; 50x Horned Beetle; 20x Wooden Barrel
description:
Thomas needs your help again. During his ride with the charter to search for the hidden island, Thomas had a small accident. Although he could see the hidden island through the mask he found, he couldn’t step onto it. The boat passed right through the island too, as if it wasn’t really there.
In his frustration, Thomas quickly built a tower out of the barrels on the boat and climbed on top of it. He was trying to get a better view of the hidden island through his mask. Unfortunately, he stepped a little too close to the edge of his tower while he was trying to touch a palm tree. The tower leaned with the shift in weight and then tipped over, and Thomas and the barrels fell into the water. A few of the barrels smashed open and the bait went everywhere.
Thomas needs to replace a few barrels of bait. Will you help him gather the bait? He can’t pay much, but he promises that he will figure out how to get to that island, and he will also share everything fantastic he finds with you.

name: Islands Are Hard To Catch III
description: Thomas isn’t giving up on getting to that island. He showed the mask to Lorn and explained what happened on his boat trip. Lorn was intrigued and offered to help Thomas find a way onto the island, but Lorn told Thomas that he’s missing a book that could speed up his research. Will you help Thomas find a copy of the Book of Ancients for Lorn to borrow?

name: Islands Are Hard To Catch IV
itemsRequired: 20x Wooden Plank; 250x Board; 250x Nails; 250x Mushroom Paste
description: Lorn is still researching the island and the mask, but he told Thomas that getting onto the island may require diligent and repeated experimentation. To that end, Lorn encouraged Thomas to build a boat to eliminate the expense of hiring a vessel for the experiments. Thomas has no clue where to start. Will you help him build a small boat? He can’t pay much, but Thomas promises that you will get to join him on the island, as soon as Lorn figures out how to get there.

name: Islands Are Hard To Catch V
itemsRequired: 4x Glass Orb; 10x Carbon Sphere; 4x Iron Ring; 10x Rope; 10x Steel
description: Thomas wants to try diving at the site where the island appears. He thinks there may be some clues about the island underwater. Will you help him with the dive?

name: Islands Are Hard To Catch VI
description:
Thomas found nothing useful during his dive. While he was underwater, he could still see the island through the mask, but without the mask, there was only ocean.
Thomas is tired of waiting and he’s out of ideas. So, he went to get answers from Lorn today, but Lorn wasn’t home. While Thomas was trying to find Lorn, he accidentally stumbled in through the window to Lorn’s lab. As he was trying to get back outside, Thomas saw the plans for something called a gravitational array on Lorn’s desk. Thomas thinks it must be what Lorn was working on to get to the island.
Will you help Thomas gather the resources to build a gravitational array? As usual, Thomas can’t pay much, but he promises that you will get a share of all the treasures he finds.

name: Islands Are Hard To Catch VII
itemsRequired: 250x Shimmer Quartz; 250x Acorn; 250x Nails; 250x Drum; 250x Broccoli; 250x Apple; 2x Grape Juice; 250x Sandstone
description:
Thomas accidentally lost the gravitational array. He paddled out to the site of the hidden island and tried to use it with the mask. The gravitational array started glowing when Thomas got close to the island. So, he held it out to make contact with the shore. At that same moment, a fish jumped out of the water right near his face. In surprise, Thomas dropped the array. It sank very quickly. Worst of all, the island was not fazed by the sinking gravitational array.
Thomas wants you to come up with an idea to try. He's open to almost anything at this point.

name: Islands Are Hard To Catch VIII
description: Lorn has the answer. If you'll help Thomas gather a variety of feathers, Lorn thinks the mask can be fixed.

name: Islands Are Hard To Catch IX
description:
Lorn used a few of the feathers you found to repair the broken feathers on the mask, but the rest are meant for Star Meerif. Lorn invited Star to come help repair the mask, and Lorn always likes to give Star a gift of feathers.
Now, Star needs a few more items to complete the repair spell on the mask. Lorn would like you to help Thomas find everything Star needs.

name: Islands Are Hard To Catch X
itemsRequired: 25x Fishing Net; 250x Minnows; 250x Grubs; 250x Gummy Worms; 250x Worms; 2x Wood; 20x Twine; 20x Rope; 20x Steel
description:
The mask is repaired!
Star vanished in mid-sentence after the spell was complete. Thomas heard something about "praying mantis DNA", but he didn't understand what Star was talking about.
Now, Thomas would like you to help him get everything he needs for exploring and fishing from the island. He can't pay you much, but he promises that you are welcome to keep anything you find when you come with him to the island.

name: Islands Are Hard To Catch XI
description:
Thomas didn't find anything exciting on the island, but he caught an enormous swordfish from its shores! He says that's even better than a shark. If you'll help Thomas immortalize his catch, he would like to give you his mask. He's sorry that you didn't find or catch anything, but maybe the mask will give you the luck needed to be great at fishing like Thomas.
Before you take the mask, Thomas wants you to be aware that sometimes the mask gets really cold to the touch. It hasn’t happened since Star fixed it, but Thomas didn’t want it to surprise you like it did him.

name: A Tower Divided
itemsRequired: 300x Sandstone; 300x Steel; 300x Stone; 50x Moonstone; 300x Mushroom Paste; 300x Leather; 300x Wood; 1x Bucket
description:
*poof*
Star appears again before you quite suddenly, a shower of feathers coming down around him and you.
“Why, good day! Have you noticed anything odd lately? Has Rosalie been snoring again? You see, my tower has been having some issues lately…” He points in the distance and you’re surprised to see a giant tower where there was nothing yesterday!
Upon closer inspection, it looks like the tower has been split in half!
“You see my good fellow, I was enjoying a good rumination on the theory of orchid blooming patterns in non-standard aethereal weather patterns when Geist so rudely slammed into my tower, which for some reason is entirely visible again! Confound it all, I want some tea in peace! I need some help with repairs, and I know you’d be happy to help!”
Star hands you a list of items he needs and disappears without a trace.

name: A Tower Divided II
itemsRequired: 200x Amethyst; 200x Ruby; 200x Emerald; 100x Shimmer Quartz; 200x Aquamarine; 50x Black Powder; 25x Giant Centipede; 20x Wood; 100x Fire Ant; 50x Shiny Beetle; 30x Gold Leaf; 5x Gold Peas; 1x Bucket; 50x Magicite
description:
As you gather the last item, Star appears before you in a shower of feathers yet again. He really loves that spell.
“Oh! Excellent, you’ve gotten the base materials! I knew you were the right person for the job. Now, I need to make a new staff, you know, for bigger magic. Big magic requires a lot of gems, could you fetch me some materials so I can make something worthy of my station? I don't want any Lemon Quartz though.”
Star hands you a second list, and all the previous materials (and Star) disappear without a trace. Except a lot of feathers and one wizard hat.

name: A Tower Divided III
rewardItems: 1x Strange Letter; 1x Wizard Hat; 25x Ancient Coin
description:
*poof*
As you put the last piece of Magicite down, Star again appears as if he has been watching you the whole time. Very strange, and he really does love that spell. Feathers, feathers everywhere.
“I’m out of feathers, would you mind collecting some more for me while I get to work on this staff? I can’t teleport anymore!” Star begins to walk, stops, looks at you and laughs, then teleports away in a shower of feathers.
“Just kidding! But seriously, running low on feather juice!” Star’s voice floats in the air in a very odd and melodic way.
Well, you’ve done this much, hopefully the reward is worth it, time to get some feathers.

name: A Tower Redecorated
itemsRequired: 50x Antler; 300x Purple Flower; 100x Prism Shard; 10x Treasure Chest; 50x Ancient Coin; 50x Green Shield; 42x Fancy Pipe; 65x Cotton; 100x Wooden Plank; 2x Nails; 100x Purple Diary; 100x Leather Diary; 100x Green Diary
description:
You put all the feathers in the bucket and wait expectantly for Star to arrive, but nothing happens.

Turning away, you hear a muffled scream from behind, and suddenly flashes of gold and white feathers encircle the room.

“WHY WOULD YOU PUT FEATHERS IN A BUCKET TODAY?!”

You see him one leg in the bucket, feathers in his hair, scrambling to regain his balance. Oops.

After a few moments, Star composes himself, mumbling under his breath about the paradoxical nature of feathers and their location in the timestream’s quantum blue spectrum relative to Wednesdays.

“Anyways…I was thinking, I should probably redecorate. The damage was severe enough that things look awfully messy in there. Mind helping me out, friend? I need to run another quick errand while you’re doing that.” Star hands you ANOTHER list and poofs away in a shower of feathers.

Bedroom, Living Room, Study
-Antlers to adorn the living room
-Flowers for various plants and spells
-Prism Shards to adorn the ceiling
-Treasure Chests filled with coins
-Shields for inside protection
-Pipes one for each multiverse day of the week
-A new bed
-A desk
-Books to write his thoughts and spells in

name: A Tower Redecorated II
itemsRequired: 5x Gold Eggplant; 10x Gold Cucumber; 15x Gold Peas; 25x Gold Carrot; 30x Gold Peppers; 250x Milk; 200x Eggs; 200x Bird Egg; 10x Bacon; 300x Flour; 10x Wine; 100x Steak; 50x Honey; 1x Cheese; 1x Lemon; 42x Orange; 200x Steak Kabob
description:
You know the drill at this point, feathers, sudden appearances, strange jokes…the usual.

Star looks gleefully at the things you’ve collected and mutters under his breath something about giving a mile, and hands you another piece of parchment.

“You’ve been quite helpful, the damage Geist has done should mostly be repaired at this point, but my kitchen and cellar were damaged by fire also! Could you help me restoc- I mean restore these too?”

Star looks thoughtful for a moment and takes the parchment back and scribbles something at the bottom of the list.

He hands the list back which reads:

Shopping List:
Golden Veggies - a variety of nutritious foods
Oranges - delicious and fight scurvy!
Milk - does a body good
Eggs - part of a nutritious breakfast
Bacon - it’s so hard to find right now!
Flour - For baking and making bread
Honey - For baking and bread
Wine - for those lazy nights reading magical theory
Cheese - for the wine
Steak - the market’s probably stable right now
Kabobs - perfect for grilling after Friday
Scribbled at the bottom:
ABSOLUTELY NO LEMONS!

name: Lemon, Interrupted
description: Did you just give me a lemon when I explicitly said not to?  Did I not write “No lemons!” in all capital letters on my list?  You’ve violated one of my most inviolable rules – don’t bring me things I don’t want! Especially lemons! So, you get nothing! You lose! Good day!

name: A Tower Remade
description:
Star returns early, seemingly quite impatient about something…

Once you’ve collected all of the things for his moat, they instantly disappear, and he focuses his attention on Rosalie.

“So, you’ve had time to consider what I’ve written, would you like to see where this can lead?” Rosalie seems anxious and unsure of what to do. After a few moments, she begins pacing around, for a split second you get the impression she might leave without saying anything. Finally she stops pacing, straightens up and gives Star a firm look and replies, “I am ready to see…”

Star gives her a reassuring smile and looks to you.

“Friend, one last request, can you bring me a wizard hat, for Rosalie?”

name: A Tower Redecorated III
itemsRequired: 300x Puffer; 250x Clownfish; 200x Giant Squid; 150x Mussel; 150x Octopus; 100x Wooden Plank; 200x Rope; 100x Twine; 50x Steel; 26x Cogwheel; 100x Iron; 2x Nails
description:
As you realize you’ve finished restocking Star’s food stores, you notice Rosalie walking up to your farm. She greets you and asks you for the letter Star said you had for her.

At the mention of Star’s name, he immediately poofs beside you and extends his hand to Rosalie.

“Oh, I’m sure that letter’s been long lost at this point, I made an extra one just for you!”

He hands Rosalie the letter and turns around to hand you some parchment.

You set to work on what you hope to be the final task, and notice Rosalie deep in thought, and of course Star is nowhere to be seen, again.

The Coolest Moat In The History Of Moats
Puffer – look cool in a gang to attract attention
Clownfish – disarm your foe with cuteness
Giant Squid – eat your foe
Octopus - If the squids don't scare you...
Mussel – they look kinda intimidating?
A drawbridge - obviously

That’s… a big moat.

name: A Tower Remade II
description:
Star produces a staff from inside his robes and offers it to Rosalie along with the hat and a strange ring.
“We will use these to help focus your talent,” he says solemnly.
Star motions for you to step backwards and whispers a few things in Rosalie’s ear you can’t hear, but one thing you can.
“…it’s only my favorite tower, after all."
Rosalie gulps visibly and lifts the staff with a determined look on her face. She begins to close her eyes and mumbles something incoherently. Stars’ attention is now riveted on the tower.
A minute passes and nothing seems to be happening, and as you look to the tower, you can’t help but feel a little disappointed for Rosalie.
After another minute, Star takes an appraising look at Rosalie and adjusts her stance slightly. Rosalie is so deeply in a trance; she doesn’t seem to notice at all. Star whispers something in Rosalie’s ear again, and her eyes open wide as she cries out:

“LIBERO!!!!!!!”
A rush of wind follows her words, and with a sound like peeling thunder and a giant flash, the tower is suddenly whole again!
Rosalie cries out in surprise, while Star exclaims “I KNEW IT!” and dances excitedly beside you both.
After a few minutes of celebration, Star gently takes the staff back from a stunned Rosalie and offers it to you.
"This, this will stay with you. Hopefully, no one has need of it, but if they do, I know where to come. Keep it secret, keep it safe."
Star hands Rosalie a second letter, and with a flourish and a thank you, he disappears without a trace (except feathers). Rosalie, still in a bit of a daze, says her goodbyes and walks quietly from your farm, while you are left to clean up the mess of feathers everywhere.

name: His Mane Quest VII
rewardItems: 1x Amethyst Necklace; 1x Sturdy Sword; 2x Sturdy Shield; 1x Gold Leaf; 4x 4-leaf Clover
description:
She isn’t sure how she knows, but Rosalie is absolutely certain that the horse standing shyly by her porch wants a haircut.
