name: Blizzard Warning III - D
description: Jill needs your help. With the blizzard coming, she needs some extra crops to turn into feed for her animals. She would like to get a variety of crops so her animals get all the nutrients they need to stay healthy. Unfortunately, there isn’t enough time remaining for her to do it alone. Will you help her get a few more varieties of crops to turn into feed?

name: Blizzard Warning IV - A
rewardItems: 10x Fishing Net; 2x Grab Bag 01; 2x Grab Bag 02; 2x Gift Basket 01
description:
Vincent is certain that Lorn is right about a terrible blizzard coming. He has seen the signs in the sky of an approaching storm, and the wildlife around his camp are behaving like they know a severe storm is coming.

Normally, Vincent would get a room in an inn to weather the worst of the storm, but all of the inns are full right now. Will you rent a room out to Vincent, just until the worst of the storm passes?

name: Blizzard Warning IV - B
rewardItems: 10x Orange Juice; 2x Small Key; 1x Small Chest 01; 1x Small Chest 02
description: Neigh neigh!!! Neigh!?

name: Blizzard Warning IV - C
rewardItems: 25x Ancient Coin; 5x Honey; 1x Grab Bag 02; 1x Grab Bag 01; 2x Gift Basket 01
description: Thomas doesn’t need any necessities to prepare for the blizzard, but he would like to be ready to try ice fishing after the storm passes. Will you bring him a few things he can use to go fishing in the ice?

name: Blizzard Warning IV - D
rewardItems: 25x Ancient Coin; 10x Orange Juice; 1x Treasure Key; 1x Large Chest 02
description: Vincent would also like to rent some space in your barn to store his wagon. Unfortunately, he also needs a few new wheels for his wagon to get it over to your barn. Will you rent him the space and help him get some wagon wheels?

name: Blizzard Warning IV - E
itemsRequired: 20x Leek; 20x Onion; 20x Potato; 20x Tomato; 20x Corn; 6x Blue Catfish; 20x Trout; 20x Small Prawn; 10x Largemouth Bass
rewardItems: 20x Fishing Net; 20x Lemonade; 20x Orange Juice; 20x Ancient Coin
description: Holger is still not sure he has enough food to make it through the blizzard. Will you bring him a little more food?

name: Blizzard Warning IV - F
description: Jill needs a little more feed for her animals, to feel completely prepared for the blizzard, but her feed mill is already running at full capacity. Will you bring her a few more bags of feed from your mill?

name: Blizzard Warning IV - G
itemsRequired: 2x Gold Leaf; 10x Herbs; 10x Honey; 10x Apple; 20x Sweet Root
description: Beatrix thought she was completely prepared for the blizzard, but as she was preparing tea for Lorn today, she realized that her tea supplies are running awfully low. Will you help her gather a few things to ensure she has tea for the duration of the storm?

name: Blizzard Warning IV - H
rewardItems: 2x Treasure Key; 1x Large Chest 01; 1x Large Chest 02; 20x Lemonade; 20x Orange Juice; 10x Garnet
description: George expects to have a bit of quiet time on his hands during the blizzard. He thinks it will be a good opportunity to challenge himself musically. He would like to try playing a left-handed guitar. Will you bring him a left-handed guitar?

name: Shoveling Snow I - A
description: Neigh…

name: Shoveling Snow I - B
description: Buddy would like to help his many friends by shoveling the snow off the path to his cave. Will you bring him a shovel?

name: Shoveling Snow I - C
description:
Borgen needs a shovel to clear the snow from his usual site. He doesn’t want any paying customers slipping and falling when they come to check out his wares.

Will you sell Borgen a shovel?

name: Shoveling Snow I - D
description:
Beatrix has a very strange patch of ground on the eastern side of her house. The blizzard piled up snow everywhere on that side of the house, except this one spot. All around this spot the snow slopes quickly up past her knees, but at this strange patch the ground is completely dry and has not a lick of snow.

Beatrix is going to excavate this patch of ground. The area is about a meter by two meters. Will you bring her a shovel?

name: Shoveling Snow I - F
description: frank needs a shovel for the snow. Will you bring the shovel and not ask any more questions?

name: Shoveling Snow I - E
description: Will you bring George a shovel? He would like to clear the snow from his walkways.

name: Shoveling Snow I - G
itemsRequired: 1x Shovel; 300x Emberstone; 300x Salt Rock; 10x Wooden Barrel
rewardItems: 10x Snowball; 12x Treasure Key; 5x Large Chest 02; 5x Large Chest 01
description: Thomas wants to do something nice for the whole town, or as much of it as he can. Will you bring him a load of emberstone and salt rock to help clear the main road?

name: Shoveling Snow I - H
itemsRequired: 10x Wooden Barrel; 300x Salt Rock; 300x Emberstone; 1x Shovel
description: Captain Thomas saw Thomas trying to clear the snow from the main road. Thomas looked like he could use some help. Will you bring Captain Thomas some emberstone and salt rock so he can help?

name: Shoveling Snow I - I
description: Jill needs snowballs and lots of them. She’s going to war with George in exactly one hour. Will you help her prepare?

name: Shoveling Snow I - J
description: George is going to war with Jill. He needs snowballs and loads of snowballs. Will you give him a hand gathering snowballs?

name: Shoveling Snow I - K
description: Rosalie needs some snowballs. Someone threw one and hit her in the back while she was shoveling her front walkway. She will be ready next time.

name: Shoveling Snow II - A
rewardItems: 2x Snowball; 10x Apple; 1x Grab Bag 01; 1x Grab Bag 02; 10x Orange Juice
description:
Borgen was trying to hit Holger with a snowball yesterday and accidentally hit Rosalie. He immediately hid himself. So he doesn’t think Rosalie knows it was him, but he is still very afraid now. He expects Holger to rat him out at any moment.

Will you help Borgen build a proper snow fort to prepare? He will gather the snow if you bring the other necessities.

name: Shoveling Snow II - B
description: Holger told Rosalie that Borgen hit her with a snowball as quickly as he could yesterday, but Borgen vanished before they could ambush him. So, they’re planning their attack for this evening, just before the sun goes down. They’re prepared with snowballs, but they could use a few other items to overcome Borgen’s defenses. Will you give them a hand?

name: Shoveling Snow II - C
itemsRequired: 100x Ancient Coin; 10x Steak Kabob; 10x Milk; 10x Blue Crab; 10x Apple; 10x Potato
description:
Rosalie feels a little bad about the ambush on Borgen. Rosalie and Holger overwhelmed Borgen pretty quickly, and then as Borgen retreated Rosalie nailed him right in the back.

Will you bring Rosalie some of Borgen’s favorite things so she can make him a gift basket?

name: Shoveling Snow III - A
description: Beatrix excavated the strange area of ground without snow on the side of her house. You’ll never believe what she found! It’s something big and metal and there’s a hatch big enough for a person to enter. Unfortunately, Beatrix can’t get the hatch open. Also, the handle for the hatch is extremely hot. Will you bring something to help cool the handle off?

name: Shoveling Snow III - B
description: Beatrix also noticed a keyhole on the hatch. Will you bring Beatrix some keys to try?

name: Shoveling Snow III - C
description: Beatrix still can’t get the hatch open and the entire thing is still very hot. She has an unconventional idea to try, if you’ll give her a hand. Will you bring her some explosives?

name: Shoveling Snow IV - A
description: Beatrix asked Lorn to come take a look at the hatch since all of her efforts to open it were fruitless, so far. Lorn has seen some strong bunkers before, but this one seems to be magically sealed. The first thing Lorn would like to try on the hatch is water. Will you bring him several buckets of water and a cup to use to dip and pour?

name: Shoveling Snow IV - B
description:
Lorn was surprised by the effect the water had on the hatch. The heat coming from the hatch increased until the water boiled away, and then the hatch returned to its normal very hot temperature.

Lorn would like to conduct another experiment. Will you bring him some seaweed?

name: Shoveling Snow IV - C
rewardItems: 5x Treasure Key; 2x Large Chest 01; 2x Large Chest 02; 100x Antler; 50x Orange Juice
description: After the seaweed burst into flames instantly upon contact with the hatch, Lorn decided that this magical seal may be a bit beyond his abilities. Nevertheless, he has  one more experiment in mind, if you bring him some magna quartz and steel.

name: Shoveling Snow V - A
description:
Cecil is glad that Beatrix and Lorn asked him to come take a look at the hatch before anyone got hurt. However, he is surprised to see this hatch. Cecil thought that he mapped all of the underground structures in this area several years ago. He did not detect this one during that search, but now that the structure is exposed, Cecil thinks it is a good idea if he takes a look.

Cecil has a device, called a fachetek, that he can use to disable the magic guarding the hatch. Then, he can safely open the hatch and take a brief look down in the structure, to make sure that there is no danger for the townsfolk.

Cecil would appreciate your help in building a support rig that he can attach his climbing system to, so that he can descend safely down through the hatch.

name: Shoveling Snow V - B
description: Cecil will not be needing the magna quartz and steel wire that Lorn left on the hatch. If you will bring Cecil a few iron rings, he should be able to clean all the magna quartz up.

name: Shoveling Snow VI
description:
Cecil successfully disabled the magic seal that was guarding the hatch. The hatch then opened very easily. Unfortunately, the magic seal was a bit stronger than Cecil expected. The seal almost depleted his fuel supply.

The fuel source for Cecil’s fachetek is aquamarine and his supply is running low. Will you bring him some aquamarines in ring form, so that they are easier to load in the fachetek?

name: Shoveling Snow VII
rewardItems: 2x Grab Bag 01; 2x Grab Bag 02; 50x Lemonade; 50x Orange Juice
description: Before Cecil descends through the hatch, will you also bring him some lemon quartz in ring form to use with his fachetek. Cecil can swap the lemon quartz into the fachetek to use it like a torch in case there are no lights in the underground structure.

name: Shoveling Snow VIII
description:
Cecil appreciates your help getting back up through the hatch. His exploration wore him out, but it revealed that the structure is actually an enormous instacrafting facility. He also found that the facility was completely sealed up, and it looked like it was abandoned. Unfortunately, Cecil found nothing of interest in the whole building. He did bring up one little bauble to examine in his lab, but he doesn’t expect it to be worth anything.

Cecil would like to reset the magic seal with his fachetek and bury the hatch again. He thinks that there may be an opportunity to use the facility in the future, but he thinks it could be dangerous to leave it exposed like it is now. Will you handle the burying work while he informs Beatrix and Lorn about his findings?

name: Shoveling Snow IX
description: Cecil would like to thank you for the help you provided with investigating that underground facility. He was right about the bauble he found not having much value, but it does have a little bit of magic to it. Cecil would like you to have it, for a small, reasonable price.

name: 12 Days of Christmas
description:
On the first day of Christmas,
the townsfolk asked of me
10 from my orchard fruit trees

name: 12 Days of Christmas II
description:
On the second day of Christmas, the townsfolk asked of me
20 mushrooms
And 10 from my orchard fruit trees

name: Do You Want to Build A Snowman? I
questline: Do You Want to Build A Snowman?
description:
Buddy enters the town. He looks mischievous, and you feel as though it’s your duty to see what he’s up to. After a few moments, you recognize the house Buddy is approaching is Vincent’s. This seems…bad. You brace yourself for what comes next, but after pounding on the door, Buddy calls out -

“Vincent?
Do you want to build a snowman?
C’mon let’s go and play
I never see you anymore
Come out the door
It’s like you’ve gone away

We could have been best buddies
And yet we’re not
I wish you would tell me why…
Do you wanna build a snowman?”

Vincent opens the door suddenly and shouts, “GO AWAY BUDDY!” He turns and slams the door, and Buddy stands outside looking dejected.
After a moment you hear him call out, “OK, bye.”
Buddy looks to you dejectedly for a moment before he perks up. “Maybe if I start building a giant snowman, Vincent will want to play? Will you help?”

You can’t help yourself.

name: Do You Want to Build A Snowman? II
questline: Do You Want to Build A Snowman?
description:
The snowman begins to take shape and Buddy, spurred on by your good deed and a seemingly unending well of optimism knocks on Vincent’s door again.

“Vincent?
Do you wanna build a snowman?
Or decorate some Christmas cards
I think some company is overdue
I’ve started making a giant snowman in your yard
Hang in there, buddy

It gets a little lonely
With only one snowman
Just watching the hours tick by”

Vincent opens the door cautiously and his eyes grow wide at the giant snowman that has begun to form in his front yard. He looks at Buddy for a moment before shaking his head and closing the door without a word.

Buddy looks sadly at the door and you can hear a muffled, “OK, bye”

Your heart cannot take the sadness in Buddy’s eyes and you begin gathering more snowballs to help complete his project.

name: Do You Want to Build A Snowman? III
questline: Do You Want to Build A Snowman?
description:
The snow portion of the snowman is nearing completion, and Buddy again knocks on Vincent’s door.

“Vincent?
Please, I know you’re in there
People have been asking where you’ve been
They tell me “have courage” and I’m trying to
I’ve built a snowman right here for you,
Just let me in!

We could friend each other
Just you and me
What else could we do?
Do you wanna build a snowman?
(It doesn’t have to be a snowman!)”

Suddenly the door swings open and Vincent shoves something in Buddy’s hand and closes the door immediately.

Buddy looks dejectedly on, “OK, bye.”

You look at Buddy’s hand and notice coal and a carrot.

Buddy suddenly notices what he has and his eyes brighten immediately as he looks towards you. “All we need is a giant scarf!”
He glances down again and adds, "Maybe some more coal too."

name: Do You Want to Build A Snowman? IV
questline: Do You Want to Build A Snowman?
description: After you bring back a scarf, Vincent comes outside bearing hot chocolate for you and buddy, and a grin on his face.  “Buddy, this is one of the biggest and best snowmen I’ve ever seen, maybe next year we can build one together.  It can be a sequel and we’ll sing a duet into the unknown sky about it!”

name: Covert Santa I
itemsRequired: 20x Apple; 100x Drum; 100x Carrot; 100x Yellow Perch; 100x Peppers
rewardItems: 20x Orange Juice; 20x Fishing Net; 20x Candy Roll
description:
One of the traditions that Lorn loves most this time of year is doing Covert Santa with his friends. They all pull names from a Santa hat and get a gift for the person whose name they pulled. They also put a secret gift in a password protected mailbox at the post office. That gift is for any clever individual that figures out each of the pairings for Covert Santa.

Lorn could use a hand getting a gift for the friend whose name he pulled this year. He won’t tell you who it is, but Lorn would like to gift his friend a fairly substantial load of food. Will you help Lorn?

name: Covert Santa II
rewardItems: 20x Lemonade; 20x Orange Juice; 20x Fishing Net; 20x Candy Cane
description: Covert Santa.  Weird.  I like it.  I don't necessarily get it, but I got it.  frank needs carrots.  You grow carrots still, right?  Apples too.

name: Covert Santa III
description: Neigh neigh neigh neigh.  Neigh neigh.  Neigh.  Neigh, neigh neigh neigh?

name: A Lot Of Trees I
rewardItems: 2x Grab Bag 01; 2x Grab Bag 02; 20x Ancient Coin
description: Vincent wants to sell Christmas trees in town, but he needs some help gathering the trees. Will you lend him a hand?

name: A Lot Of Trees II
description: Vincent wants to upgrade his Christmas tree lot by selling fully decorated trees alongside the plain Christmas trees. Will you help him get a few more trees and decorate them?

name: A Lot Of Trees III
rewardItems: 50x Pine Seeds; 10x Candy Cane; 50x Orange Juice
description: Vincent wants to add a gift shop to his lot. He plans to sell a variety of things in addition to the Christmas trees. He envisioned a one-stop shop for all the holiday needs. Will you give him a hand?

name: A Lot Of Trees IV
itemsRequired: 100x Blue Ornament; 100x Red Ornament; 100x Orange Ornament
description: Vincent needs a few more items for his shop, if you’re willing to help.

name: A Lot Of Trees V
description: Vincent needs more plain trees. Will you bring him a fresh supply?

name: Covert Santa IV
rewardItems: 10x Christmas Sweater; 10x Teddy Bear; 30x Orange Juice
description: Buddy is glad to be part of the Covert Santa.  Buddy isn't quite sure what to get, but he likes this person and thinks Apples and Cucumbers might do the trick.  His friend likes things that start with those letters.

name: Low On Coal II
rewardItems: 10x Candy Cane; 20x Apple; 10x Candy Roll; 20x Orange Juice; 10x Christmas Sweater
description: Santa thinks that making coal from wood is making a depressing task even more loathsome. Will you bring him some coal instead?

name: Low On Coal III
description: :( Santa needs more coal. :(

name: Low On Coal IV
description: Santa expects this to be the last batch, at least he hopes it will be. He doesn’t want to need anymore coal.

name: Low On Coal I
description: Santa needs some coal. His workshop is completely out of it, and, unfortunately, there are a few people that will be receiving coal in their stockings instead of presents this year. Will you help Santa gather wood to make some coal?

name: A Lot Of Trees VI
description: There was a huge rush on fully decorated Christmas trees. Will you help Vincent replenish his supplies?

name: A Lot Of Trees VII
itemsRequired: 100x Yellow Ornament; 100x Green Ornament; 100x Purple Ornament
description: Vincent needs more color choices for tree decorations. Will you bring him some different colored decorations?

name: A Lot Of Trees VIII
rewardItems: 2x Medium Chest 01; 2x Medium Chest 02; 6x Square Key; 50x Orange Juice
description: Vincent wants to sell treats in his gift shop. Will you bring him a load of candy?

name: A Lot Of Trees IX
rewardItems: 5x Gingerbread Man; 25x Fishing Net; 5x Hot Cocoa; 25x Lemonade; 100x Pine Seeds
description: Business is really taking off for Vincent. Now he needs more plain trees! Will you bring him a large supply?

name: A Lot Of Trees X
rewardItems: 3x Large Chest 01; 3x Large Chest 02; 7x Treasure Key; 100x Pine Seeds; 1x Christmas Stocking
description: Vincent is completely out of fully decorated Christmas trees. They are selling quicker than he can keep up on his own. Will you bring him a big load of fully decorated trees to help him catch up?

name: A Lot Of Trees XI
rewardItems: 50x Lemonade; 50x Orange Juice; 50x Pine Seeds; 10x Mittens
description: Vincent has an amazing idea for his gift shop. He’s going to sell green scarves! They can be used as scarves or as tree skirts. Will you help him prepare a large inventory?

name: A Lot Of Trees XII
rewardItems: 200x Pine Seeds; 100x Orange Juice; 5x Gingerbread Man; 5x Christmas Sweater
description: Vincent needs more trees. He can barely keep up with the demand right now. Will you bring him a ridiculously large load of plain trees?

name: A Lot Of Trees XIII
rewardItems: 100x Lemonade; 5x Hot Cocoa; 200x Pine Seeds; 3x Gold Leaf
description: The fully decorated trees are gone, completely wiped out. Please help Vincent build up a bigger stock of fully decorated trees.

name: A Lot Of Trees XIV
itemsRequired: 200x Blue Ornament; 200x Green Ornament; 200x Orange Ornament; 200x Purple Ornament; 200x Red Ornament; 200x Yellow Ornament
description: Vincent needs more ornaments to sell in his gift shop. Please bring him a large load of all the colors.

name: A Lot Of Trees XV
description: Vincent has a new idea for the gift shop. He wants to try selling teddy bears. Will you bring him a few to test the market?

name: Covert Santa V
description: Jill needs something strange for the recipient of her Covert Santa gift. She has racked her brain, but can’t think of anything strange enough. Will you help her find something really strange?

name: Covert Santa VI
itemsRequired: 10x Apple; 5x Green Diary; 10x White Parchment; 10x Feathers; 2x Gingerbread Man
description: George isn’t sure what the wise gift would be for the person whose name he has for Covert Santa. He suspects that this person is more concerned with helping everyone else than longing for possessions. Speaking of helping, will you give George a hand finding the right gift?

name: Covert Santa VII
itemsRequired: 1x Corn; 10x Trout; 10x Yellow Perch; 10x Drum; 3x Globber
rewardItems: 20x Fishing Net; 5x Hot Cocoa; 1x Goldfish; 1x Green Scarf
description: Thomas loves Covert Santa. He thinks it’s a great opportunity to show off his fishing skills. He’s not sure if his person loves fish as much as he does, but maybe if the fish are caught using corn for bait she will. Will you help Thomas with the fish?

name: Covert Santa VIII
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Bottle; 1x Bucket; 1x Wooden Barrel; 10x Candy Cane; 10x Candy Roll; 10x Hops
rewardItems: 20x Orange Juice; 20x Lemonade; 5x Gingerbread Man; 5x Honey; 4x Mittens; 4x Wine
description: Rosalie is so excited to get a Covert Santa gift ready. She is hopeful that her mind is in harmony with the lyrical person whose name she pulled. Will you help her get the things she needs for the gift?

name: Covert Santa IX
rewardItems: 20x Ancient Coin; 100x Coal; 10x Hot Cocoa; 10x Orange Juice
description: ROOMBA does not fully understand this Covert Santa, but ROOMBA finds the idea of getting a gift for a drago... ERROR. ROOMBA needs your help to get a gift ready.

name: Covert Santa X
itemsRequired: 1x Mittens; 1x Green Scarf; 10x Pine Tree; 10x Christmas Tree
description: Geist wants to get Covert Santa right. She’s never celebrated the holidays like this before. She also hopes that the snow has trapped her person so he doesn’t wander off in search of new jobs. Will you help her find the perfect gift?

name: Covert Santa XI
rewardItems: 1x Paper Receipt; 10x Christmas Sweater; 1x Christmas Stocking
description: Borgen is happy to participate in Covert Santa this year, but he dislikes his recipient.  However, in the spirit of the season, he will still do his best.  He'd like for you to bring him something to help remind this person that there can be consequences for actions.

name: Covert Santa XII
description:
Captain Thomas has been invited to Covert Santa in the town. He knows it by a different name where he’s from, but it’s heartwarming to know traditions can be anywhere.

While getting to know townspeople, Thomas has noticed his Covert Santa is very bad at expressing themselves to others directly. Lucky for his Covert Santa, Captain Thomas is always looking to help out a townsfolk in need. He has also noticed a tradition in this world his Covert Santa follows that he’d like to support, but was thinking a tradition from his world could help his Covert Santa express themselves to a certain someone better too.

name: Covert Santa XIII
description:
Vincent rarely participates in Covert Santa, because he isn’t very good at connecting with others, but in the spirit of the holidays he tells you he wanted to give it another shot, much to his obvious chagrin.

Unfortunately, his Covert Santa and he have a long history and haven't been the best of pals, but Vincent learned earlier this winter that maybe fences can be mended and is warming up to them. Vincent is heating up some cocoa and asked if you could bring him some yarn to make a warm scarf for his Covert Santa, it might be cold for them later.

name: Covert Santa XIV
description:
Ric Ryph was humbled being invited to do the Covert Santa this year. He tells you about how much it means to him that the town has adopted him as a mayor and as one of their own.

His Covert Santa is someone he really admires and wants to give them a gift that will really make an impression! Will you help Ric Ryph?

name: Covert Santa XV
description: Beatrix can't believe it's time for Covert Santa already.  She thinks some fish might be exactly the right thing to get her Covert Santa partner.  Will you bring a variety of fish so she can make this the best holiday for her recipient?

name: Covert Santa XVI
description: Holger is very excited for Covert Santa this year.  He's hoping to get some yummy food.  He's glad that his match for Covert Santa isn't likely to want any of his food.  Can you help Holger get some fishing supplies for his surprise gift for this year's Covert Santa?

name: Covert Santa XVII
description: Cecil is happy to be part of this common-folk tradition of Covert Santa.  He thinks he has the perfect gift in mind this year.  Will you bring some corn to Cecil so he can become the best Covert Santa ever?

name: Covert Santa XVIII
rewardItems: 10x Teddy Bear; 1x Blitzen; 10x Wizard Hat; 1x Santa Hat
description:
Star loves that the town invited him to be a part of Covert Santa this year. He mentions to you that it’s been a long time since he felt like he belonged anywhere and it warms his heart. The tradition of giving part of the gift now, and part of the gift through the mailbox passwords sounds fun and mischevious.

Star could use a little help with his gift though, he’s very nervous about getting his Covert Santa the right thing. It’s important because giving less than three of anything is not how he normally expresses himself. He mentions three things, and asks if you'll help him.

name: Lost Reindeer II
description: Santa suspects that Dasher may be the hardest to find. Dasher is quick and cunning. You may need help from the whole community to find Dasher.

name: Lost Reindeer I
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 100x Lemonade; 5x Christmas Sweater; 5x Gingerbread Man; 5x Teddy Bear; 5x Hot Cocoa
description:
Santa needs your help. Someone disabled the security magic that sealed and protected his local present crafting facility, #815. The spell was disabled just long enough for Santa’s reindeer to get out of one of the side entrances that manifest around town and around the countryside. When Santa went to check on the reindeer they were all gone. The magic seal was also set back in place. So, the reindeer couldn’t get back in, even if they returned.

Will you help Santa find his reindeer? Santa thinks Rudolph might be the easiest to spot. So start your search with Rudolph.

name: Lost Reindeer III
rewardItems: 200x Mushroom; 1x Skull Coin; 10x Small Chest 01; 100x Apple
description: Santa thinks he may have some tips that can help you find Dancer. Dancer is the most wise of the reindeer. Dancer loves to be clean.  He is also known to seek out fresh well water.

name: Lost Reindeer IV
rewardItems: 1x Runestone 01; 100x Carrot Seeds; 100x Carrot; 100x Corn; 100x Corn Seeds
description: Santa is willing to trade you a Prancer for a Rudolph, if you're lucky.  Try giving Santa some Rudolphs at his mailbox.

name: Lost Reindeer V
description: Santa doesn’t have any great clues to help you locate Vixen. A temporary market, of some sort, might attract Vixen’s attention, but Santa isn’t completely sure about that.

name: Lost Reindeer VI
rewardItems: 200x Lemon Quartz; 200x Unpolished Shimmer Stone; 200x Mushroom; 50x Horned Beetle
description: It's going to be an adventure to find Comet, isn't it?

name: Lost Reindeer VII
description: Cupid will be really tough to find. Santa thinks you’ll need your friends to help find Cupid.

name: Lost Reindeer VIII
description: Santa wants you to find some stockings. If you find stockings, you’ll find Donner. Donner loves stockings.

name: Lost Reindeer IX
description: Blitzen is a little backwards sometimes. Santa thinks Blitzen might be hanging around the post office. That reindeer loves mailboxes.

name: Lost Reindeer X
description:
Santa was correct. You were just the person to help him find his reindeer. He appreciates all your hard work.

Will you bring Santa some milk for the road?

name: A Lot Of Trees XVI
rewardItems: 10x Gingerbread Man; 25x Fishing Net; 25x Lemonade; 200x Pine Seeds
description: Vincent is ready to make a final push into the holidays. Will you bring him 2 loads of plain trees?

name: A Lot Of Trees XVII
rewardItems: 10x Gingerbread Man; 25x Fishing Net; 25x Lemonade; 200x Pine Seeds
description: Vincent is ready for the second load of plain trees.

name: A Lot Of Trees XVIII
description: Now, Vincent wants 2 last loads of decorated trees. After he sells out his inventory, Vincent is going to close up his tree lot and enjoy the holidays. He hopes you will too!

name: A Lot Of Trees XIX
description: Vincent appreciates all your help with his tree lot. He’s ready for the last load now.

name: A Small Gift I
description: Buddy wants to make a gift for one of his dearest friends in the whole wide world. Will you help him?

name: A Small Gift II
description: Buddy still needs your help with the gift he’s making. Will you bring him some milk?

name: A Small Gift III
description: Buddy only needs a few more things to finish his gift. He thinks his friend will be so surprised.

name: A Small Gift IV
description: Buddy needs one last ingredient for his gift to be complete. Please help!

name: A Small Gift V
description: Buddy wants you to have this gift that he made! Did you bring him a gift?

name: Hay Holidays I
description: Neeeeiiigh!

name: Hay Holidays II
description: Neigh! Neigh! Neigh!

name: Hay Holidays III
description: Neigh. Neigh? Neigh!

name: Hay Holidays IV
description: Charles is so grateful for your help with getting a gift together for his girlfriend. He needs one more thing to really make it great. Will you give him a hand?

rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 100x Lemonade; 100x Fishing Net; 100x Ancient Coin; 100x Apple
description: Wow!  Can you believe there's over 100,000 folk around here now!  Rosalie was able to get some extra supplies to give out to everybody to celebrate.

name: A New Year I
description: Rosalie is preparing for a large party to celebrate the new year. Will you help her gather some things she needs for the celebration?

name: A New Year II
description: Rosalie needs a few more things for her party. Will you bring her some more seaweed for the appetizers she’s making?

name: A New Year III
description: Rosalie wants to end the party with an enormous fireworks display. Will you help her get a load of  fireworks?

name: A New Year IV
description: Rosalie needs drinks for the toast to the new year. Will you help her?

name: A New Year Extra
description: Beatrix isn’t sure that Rosalie will have the right fireworks to celebrate the new year. Will you help her find something really spectacular to bring to Rosalie’s party?

name: There’s A Way I
description:
Captain Thomas suspects that you have seen someone that looks like him before. George had the same expression yesterday when Captain Thomas first arrived in town. Apparently there is a Thomas in town that looks almost identical to Captain Thomas. Captain Thomas wants to assure you that he is a different person, and not Thomas playing an out-of-season fool’s joke.

Being new in town, Captain Thomas could use some help getting established. George is renting a room to him, but Captain Thomas would like to start earning some money and getting a more permanent residence. Will you help Captain Thomas gather some bait so he can start catching and selling fish?

name: There’s A Way II
itemsRequired: 1x Axe; 1x Bucket; 1x Hammer; 1x Shovel; 1x Looking Glass
rewardItems: 2x Grab Bag 01; 2x Square Key; 2x Small Key
description: Captain Thomas caught a solid load of fish and put quite a bit of money away. Now, he’s ready to keep expanding his business. Will you help him get some tools so he can collect his own bait, gather resources, and improve his fishing?

name: There’s A Way III
description: Business is booming for Captain Thomas, but he still needs to expand. He would like to build some traps to add variety to what he can catch. Will you help him gather the resources he needs to build the traps?

name: There’s A Way IV
description: The next thing Captain Thomas needs for his fishing business is to increase his supply and decrease his time spent fishing. Will you help him get the materials to make some nets?

name: There’s A Way V
description:
It’s a big day for Captain Thomas. He bought a house and some land!

The house is perfect for Captain Thomas, but it needs some repairs. Will you bring him some wood and nails so he can start his renovations?

name: There’s A Way VI
itemsRequired: 10x Apple; 12x Eggs; 10x Milk; 10x Corn; 20x Potato; 10x Leek; 10x Onion; 10x Tomato; 10x Carrot; 10x Cucumber; 24x Peas; 10x Peppers
description: Captain Thomas is ready to move into his house. Will you help him stock his pantry?

name: There’s A Way VII
description: Captain Thomas moved into his house and his business is still doing well. Now, he wants to invest some of his money. Will you help him find some good investments?

name: There’s A Way VIII
rewardItems: 50x Ancient Coin; 1x Gold Drum; 1x Gold Flier
description:
Captain Thomas would like to thank you for helping him to get settled in to his new home.

Captain Thomas comes from a town exactly like this one, but in another universe. He realizes that his story is hard to believe, but he hopes to prove it to you someday. He also hopes to make it back to his world.

name: Fine Fishing I
description: Thomas needs a hand. He’s supposed to catch some very elusive fish for a client, but he’s not having any luck finding these rare fish. Would you be willing to catch the fish and sell them to Thomas?

name: Fine Fishing II
description: Thomas needs more golden fish. His client purred over the gold drums you caught. Will you check the forest pond for a different golden fish?

name: Fine Fishing III
description: The client Thomas is working for loves the fish you’re catching, and by extension his client likes Thomas even more. Will you check Lake Tempest for a new golden fish?

name: Fine Fishing IV
description: Will you check the small island for golden fish? Thomas thinks the more variety he provides the more likely his client will keep coming back for more.

name: Fine Fishing V
description: Thomas tried fishing for golden fish in the Crystal River, but he didn’t catch anything. Will you try the river?

name: Fine Fishing VI
description: Thomas’s client is very finicky and never satisfied. So, he needs a new golden fish. Will you try the Emerald Beach? Thomas would join you, but he’s currently trying to find a golden fish in the pond near Holger’s house.

name: Fine Fishing VII
description: Thomas still hasn’t caught a single golden fish. Clearly he needs your help now, more than ever. Plus, his client’s appetite for golden fish is growing. His client won’t eat anything else now. Will you try your luck with the ocean?

name: Fine Fishing VIII
description: Thomas isn’t sure if the legendary Lake Minerva actually exists, but if you know a way to fish there, Thomas would love to offer his client an exotic golden fish from Lake Minerva.

name: Fine Fishing IX
description: Thomas has a new idea to make his client happy. What if he brings his client some golden coral! Then, his client will be constantly reminded of Thomas and the delicious fish he provides. Will you bring Thomas some gold coral?

name: Find A Way I
description:
Captain Thomas has a new plan for finding a way back to his homeworld!

On his homeworld, there is a large island out in the open ocean. He has often gone there to catch fish. In your world, the same island doesn’t exist.

Last night, Captain Thomas was visiting Captain Logan, one of the charter boat captains. Captain Logan told him about your world’s Thomas finding a hidden island. Captain Logan also mentioned that Thomas gave you access to the island.

If you would be willing to take Captain Thomas to this strange island, he would gladly pay you for the time. He’ll also equip you to catch loads of fish while you’re there. Will you take Captain Thomas to the large island?

name: Find A Way II
description:
Captain Thomas can’t believe this. After exploring and fishing for hours, he is certain that this island is exactly like the large island of his homeworld. He doesn’t understand why it doesn’t fully exist in your world, but he thinks it may hold a clue to help him to get back home.

Captain Thomas needs to stay on the island on a little longer. Will you help him find a way to stay, even when you leave?

name: Find A Way III
itemsRequired: 300x Board; 300x Nails; 2x Hammer; 300x Stone; 100x Glass Orb; 2x Shovel; 2x Axe; 300x Wooden Plank; 300x Steel
description: Captain Thomas is going to stay on the island a little longer. He can’t leave until he finds something to help him. Will you help him set up a permanent place to stay?

name: Find A Way IV
description: Captain Thomas almost has a decent shack built. Will you bring him some more building supplies?

name: Find A Way V
itemsRequired: 100x Apple; 300x Bacon; 300x Carrot; 300x Potato; 300x Flour; 6x Bucket; 10x Wooden Barrel; 100x Eggs; 300x Corn; 300x Onion; 300x Sweet Root; 300x Salt
description: Captain Thomas wants to stock his shack with food for his time on the island. Will you help him get a supply of food to last him several weeks? He'll catch his own fish, but he'll need a variety of other food items.

name: Find A Way VI
description: Captain Thomas wants to do some exploring all over the island at night. Will you bring him a load of lanterns he can place all over the island?

name: Find A Way VII
description: This request will sound very odd, but Captain Thomas needs two hourglasses and some sand from the mainland.

name: Find A Way VIII
itemsRequired: 300x Leather; 1x Horn; 50x Board; 10x Glass Orb; 300x Emberstone; 300x Coal; 300x Oak; 300x Stone; 300x Straw; 300x Mushroom Paste; 300x Blue Gel
rewardItems: 50x Orange Juice; 50x Fishing Net; 2x Gold Flier; 10x Honey
description:
Captain Thomas discovered something very strange.

One day he was digging through the sand as the sun was about to set. Right as the sun set, Captain Thomas dropped the sand that was in his hand. Instead of falling straight down, the sand remained in the air for several seconds. It was at least long enough for Captain Thomas to get down on his knees and pinch a grain of sand out of the air.

That's why Captain Thomas needed the hourglasses and the sand from the mainland. He wanted to experiment to see if it would happen again, and he wanted to see if it would happen to sand from the mainland.

The sand from the mainland behaved completely normally in all of Captain Thomas' experiments. The sand from the island behaved completely abnormally at sunset, even inside the hourglass.

Now, Captain Thomas wants to try making some glass from the island's sand. Will you help him get the resources for building and using a kiln and a bellows? He'll also need some additional materials to help him make the glass.

name: Find A Way IX
rewardItems: 50x Orange Juice; 50x Lemonade; 5x Gold Coral; 50x Fishing Net
description:
Captain Thomas successfully made glass. He also successfully tested the glass. It behaves just like the sand right after sunset.

Captain Thomas also made a new discovery. One day he was walking around the island with an orb of the glass that he made. He was looking to see if there were any reactions to the glass from other things on the island. Captain Thomas reached the eastern edge of the island a few minutes before the sun came up. As he was walking along the beach he reached down and pulled up a handful of sand. The excess sand falling from his hand stopped falling and remained in the air until the sun appeared. Then, the sand fell to the ground like normal.

Captain Thomas brought some of the western shore sand back to his shack and started experimenting. He discovered that this sand behaved very much like the sand near Thomas' shack, but only right before dawn. He also discovered that the two sands don't mix. They repel each other.

With this new knowledge, Captain Thomas went to explore the middle of the island. Just as he expected, Captain Thomas found that there is a line across the center of the island that is completely devoid of sand.

Captain Thomas would like to make some more glass using sand from both sides of the island. Will you help him get more resources for making glass?

name: Find A Way X
description:
Captain Thomas didn't have much luck trying to combine the glass from the different sands together. It was like trying to combine oil and water, very hot water and very hot oil. Nevertheless, he did craft a neat hourglass filled with sand from both sides of the island. The hourglass doesn't keep time at all because the sands just stay suspended against the top and bottom, but it‘s fascinating to look at.

Now, Captain Thomas is out of ideas. The mystery of the island is fascinating, but Captain Thomas doesn't feel like he's making any progress toward getting home. He's going back to his fishing business for a while. He appreciates your help again and he's very sorry for wasting your time.

name: Find A Way XI
itemsRequired: 20x Goldray; 20x Gold Flier; 20x Gold Trout; 20x Gold Sea Bass; 20x Gold Catfish
description:
Captain Thomas would like for you to come fishing with him. He finds that catching fish and enjoying the quiet and peace of nature with a friend helps him clear his head.

Also, in appreciation for your friendship, Captain Thomas wants you to have the hourglass he made. Hopefully, it will be a memento for you to remember him by when he finally makes it home.

name: Hoptimistic I
description: frank is feeling down after his series of pranks didn't go as planned. “Guess I caused all that rabble for nothin’, huh?”. He chomps down on a couple carrots. You tell him it’s not a big deal, but he doesn't seem convinced. He sulks in your chair, and a pile of carrot shavings starts to form below him. There has to be something you can do to cheer him up.

name: Strange Companions III
itemsRequired: 250x Herbs; 200x Honey; 100x Seaweed; 20x Sea Dragon; 400x Salt; 400x Sour Root; 400x Hops; 20x Apple Cider
description:
A few days later, your home remains quiet and noticeably uninterrupted. Trips into town have felt tense and you have intentionally avoided speaking to Beatrix and Rosalie except in passing. After gathering the items for tea, you arrive at Rosalie’s home, ready to discuss the letter and what has her so anxious with Beatrix.

When you arrive, you’re surprised to find a third person sitting in a chair near Rosalie’s fireplace. Lorn greets you warmly and motions for you to join the group. Rosalie looks pensive, and Beatrix seems quiet and unreadable as ever. After sitting, the tense mood of the room becomes too much to bear, and Rosalie breaks the tension by suggesting tea.

The group prepare their tea, Beatrix adding some very odd ingredients to her tea in the process. After some time of small talk, the tension in the room again reaches palpable levels, and Lorn quietly draws the letter out of his pocket and says, “So, a peculiar gem?” Beatrix looks intently at Lorn, and for a moment, the fire seems to pulse in intensity, almost exactly at her pace of breathing, but you shake the feeling off as your imagination as Lorn continues, “I’ve heard many things about many various gems, but what do you all know about the power of gems?”

Rosalie blinks and gives Lorn an odd look, “Star hasn’t mentioned many things about gems, he seems to dislike a certain type, but I’ve never taken much notice to be honest.”

Before Lorn can reply, Beatrix in a crisp accent cuts him off, “Gems can hold many powers, they attune to the aether of the world, and some types have affinities towards elements and types of magic. For example, many of the elements attune to basic gems like rubies for fire, or emerald for earth. Using gems for magical enhancement is not a common art in the world any longer.”

Rosalie leans back looking surprised in her chair as what you now recognize as the voice of Geist speaks. Lorn takes a moment to process this information before continuing, “Indeed, I’ve heard similar stories about gems and magic, but there are some gems, some very peculiar, that seem to do things that defy a normal explanation.”

The fire in the room suddenly burns bright as Beatrix straightens and says, “I remember…fragments. A war! A gem! Pain! Loss…”

Suddenly, Beatrix crumples to the ground as the fireplace loses intensity. Lorn and Rosalie rush to Beatrix’s aid. Her eyes open slightly, she looks directly at you and says, “I need rest…and the Flame Orb.”

Beatrix closes her eyes, and Lorn asks you to gather some items to help Beatrix regain her strength.

name: Strange Companions IV
itemsRequired: 100x Orange Juice; 50x Orange Gecko; 20x Apple Cider; 400x Garnet; 400x Unpolished Garnet; 400x Pumpkin; 400x Carrot; 400x Flarefin; 400x Garnet Ring; 400x Lantern
description:
The town is quiet as you gather the materials as quickly as you can, an even harsher reminder of how many townsfolk no longer call the town their home. On the trip back to Rosalie’s house, several times you notice certain oddities around town. A home door ajar, blinds closed with windows open - at one point you swear you saw shadows that seemed to move even when you stood still. Hairs standing on end, you attempt to look casual as you head towards your destination. The sense of unease does not lift when you enter the house, instead worry and uncertainty are etched upon the faces of your friends.

Lorn explains, “Beatrix needs more time to recover, but we’re worried that her instability could cause serious consequences if she were to transform in town. I suggest we bring her to your farm house before we give her the flame orb. Rosalie has volunteered to cast a spell of illusion on a cart that we can use to transport Beatrix back to your home with little suspicion.”

Rosalie looks at you strangely, “Did you know orange is a great color for illusions? The more it moves the more it stops the illusion from distorting my aether matrix. That said, Beatrix has a very unique aura owing to her unique circumstances, I’m going to need a lot more orange things than I normally would to make sure this spell works.”

name: Strange Companions V
itemsRequired: 35x Frog; 50x Orange Gecko; 400x Salt; 200x Herbs; 20x Sea Dragon; 450x Feathers; 250x Gold Feather; 400x Gold Peas; 400x Gold Peppers; 100x Green Cloak; 400x Sunflower; 400x Garnet
description:
Under the cover of darkness, the four of you trek back to your farmhouse, Rosalie’s face scrunched in concentration, muttering something incomprehensible under her breath, while you and Lorn attempt to talk casually while keeping lookout.

After arriving at the farmhouse, you still can’t shake the feeling that you’re being watched, but you have no proof to bring to the group.

The next morning, Beatrix seems to have recovered from collapsing, she thanks you all for your care and assures you that she is fine. After a moment, a tear streaks down her face, “It feels so good to be among people that care, and to not be an outcast. If you’d allow me this morning to recover, I will tell you a story.”

Lorn pulls you aside and suggests you all spend your morning going about your normal tasks and you can reconvene at lunch. As it happens, he was hoping you could pick up some items for him and a friend while you’re in town. It’s a rather odd list.

name: Strange Companions VI
itemsRequired: 500x Steak; 500x Steak Kabob; 500x Bacon; 500x Shrimp; 500x Mussel; 500x Giant Squid; 50x Salt; 35x Crab Claw; 500x Milk; 400x Flour
rewardItems: 500x Antler; 500x Fishing Net; 5x Iced Tea; 5x Gold Flier; 5x Goldray
description:
When you get back to the farmhouse, Beatrix is resting comfortably, and Rosalie continues to pace while pensive and impatient. Lorn arrives and begins smoking a pipe, his presence of calm and serenity have an immediate soothing impact to your frayed nerves. Rosalie steps out of the other room, and upon seeing Lorn mentions how thankful she is to him for helping restock some of her other magic supplies.

“On the contrary, our dear friend here found most of the goods for you, but I did add a little something special for you myself.” Lorn replies. He winks slyly to Rosalie before settling into a chair.

After putting some tea on, Beatrix sits down and invites you all to listen to her tale. She puts a hand on the flame orb and the orb emits a searing light and the words seem to rush out of Beatrix.

“Many years ago, dragons and humans lived in relative peace. Magic was abundant in the land, and tribes grew up around different wizarding traditions. I grew up in such a tribe, but I was not born with any magical talent myself. Our family was well known, and one day, a man came to our tribe asking for help from wizards. Only later did they find out that there was a war between humans and dragons, and before we knew it, the war descended upon our tribe too.
The wrath of the dragons was terrible, and despite my pleading with father, the wizarding tribes were upset at the slaughter of humans and fought back. Many, many dragons died, and many of my friends and family died too. During the worst of the fighting, a dragon soared overhead, pleading with everyone to stop fighting and I was caught up in their words. I followed the dragon many miles and found her pleading with her brethren to stop the fighting. Her words fell on deaf ears, but I was so encouraged that I revealed myself to her and that is how Geist and I became comrades. We rushed to another battlefield to plead to stop the fighting, but it fell on deaf ears. In the fighting, Geist was wounded by a mage who held strange powers, and in my grief I screamed and shouted for the fighting to stop, but it never did… they wouldn’t stop fighting. They wouldn’t listen! In that moment, I lost all hope for humanity and dragonkind and laid beside Geist, waiting for the death of the battlefield I knew was inevitable.”


Beatrix is now openly crying and Lorn puts a hand on her shoulder to comfort her.

Lorn suggests you take a few minutes to let Beatrix regain her composure, and through tears, Beatrix suggests Geist tell you the rest of the story. She asks for some surf and turf, because she’ll likely be hungry anyways, and asks you all to step outside.

name: Hoptimistic II
description: The extra carrots seemed to help, at least for a few moments. frank hops to the floor to vacuum the carrot shavings up with his mouth. He tells you, between his chomps of dirty-floor-carrot bits, about how he’s never won anything before. “I just have rotten luck. Doesn’t matter how many ladders I walk under, how many mirrors I break, or how much salt I spill. Nothing helps.” You begin to wonder where frank learned about superstitions. He returns to self-loathing on your chair, upside down so his belly is shown. “uuUuUUUugghhhHHhhhhh”, he groans. His pale blue glow looks a bit duller than usual. Maybe something lucky will help frank. You leave some snacks behind, and set off to find some things that might bring frank some luck.

name: Hoptimistic III
description: frank is disappointed in what you brought. “You think a lousy 10 clovers is gonna fix ME? Have you SEEN ME? I AM A MESS!” frank sinks to the floor, flattening out like a pancake. He slinks to your pantry. “You’re out of carrots? OF COURSE YOU ARE.” You get the feeling that frank is being dramatic. He’s rolling around on the floor, mumbling to himself. You hesitantly leave him again to go ask someone for help on how to bring frank some good luck.

name: Hoptimistic IV
description: You’re not sure where to even start looking, so you go to Lorn for some help. Lorn seems pretty knowledgeable. You explain the situation, and he shakes his head. He explains that if frank’s luck is truly that bad, you’ll need some extremely lucky items to help. He suggests you invest in a quarry, if you haven’t yet, as Jade may help your cause. He thumbs through his vast collection of books and pulls out a leather bound diary. He scribbles some things down on a blank page, and sends you on your way.

name: Hoptimistic V
itemsRequired: 5x Dice; 5x Spectacles; 50x Aquamarine; 10x Snail; 1x Small Chest 01
description: One of the things on Lorn’s list was Jade, but your quarry just isn’t producing it fast enough. You heard a rumor that the small spring has some hidden treasure chests that might be filled with precious gems.

name: Hoptimistic VI
itemsRequired: 77x 4-leaf Clover; 77x Acorn; 7x Horned Beetle; 7x Shiny Beetle; 77x Horseshoe; 77x Mushroom; 77x Peppers; 77x Carp; 7x Gold Flier
description: You heed Lorn’s advice, and gather everything on his list. You go back home, and decide to just sort of pour everything on top of frank, who is now asleep in a puddle of his own drool on your floor.

name: Hoptimistic VII
description: At first, nothing seems to happen. frank is snoring, and his drool puddle is getting to be a bit obnoxious. You go to look for something to clean his mess, and hear a loud whirring sound. You head back to the room frank was sleeping in, and all the items are gone, aside from the mushrooms. “Mushrooms aren’t very good for me. Too much fungus.” He looks like he’s back to normal, as he’s found another bundle of carrots to munch on. “Mind if I stay here for a while? You grow the best carrots, pal.” He doesn’t wait for an answer, and pulls a giant suitcase from your cupboard. You can tell something in his life has changed, but don’t want to press him right now. You don’t have the heart to tell him he can’t stay, and he’s already unpacking his things anyways. Who knew rabbits owned so much stuff?

name: Hoptimistic VIII
description: After frank settles in, he comes over to you with a red, fluffy item. “This was my great-great uncle billy’s. He always had the best luck.” frank pauses. “Or was it great-great uncle peter who had good luck...Well. Either way. I won’t be needing this anymore, since I’m cured, and by the looks of this place you could use it.” You can tell frank is trying to be nice, so you take the red rabbit’s foot. “Hey uh. If I need that back, you’ll still have it, right? It’s kind of a family heirloom, so please don't sell it.”

name: Love Is For The Horses I
description: Neigh! Neigh neigh neigh? Neigh neigh neigh neigh.

name: Love Is For The Horses II
description: Neigh! Neigh! Neigh?!

name: Love Is For The Horses III
description: Neigh neigh. Neigh?

name: Be Mine I
rewardItems: 100x Apple; 1x Gold Flier; 1x Gold Drum; 5x Honey
description: Holger needs some help. Making valentines for all of his friends and family is going to take more time than he has remaining before the day of love. Will you help him make some cards?

name: Be Mine II
rewardItems: 4x Grab Bag 01; 30x Ancient Coin; 3x Small Chest 01; 5x Small Key; 1x Gold Catfish
description: Borgen was so busy this week that he completely forgot to make cards for the day of love. Will you make some cards for him to give out?

name: Be Mine III
rewardItems: 2x Apple Cider; 1x Gold Catfish; 5x Grab Bag 01; 2x Medium Chest 02; 2x Medium Chest 01; 5x Square Key; 50x Orange Juice
description: Rosalie is trying to make valentines for as many people in town as she possibly can. She has made several thousand cards, so far. Now, she’s hoping she can enlist some of her friends to help make even more cards. Will you join Rosalie in making valentines?

name: Be Mine V
itemsRequired: 1x Aquamarine Ring; 1x Amethyst Necklace; 1x Looking Glass; 1x Lemon Quartz Ring; 1x Pocket Watch
description: Vincent is looking for a gift for someone special, but he won’t say who his special person is. Will you bring him some fancy items he could give to his special friend?

name: Be Mine IV
description: Rosalie could still use some more help, if you’re interested.

name: Be Mine VI
description: Jill wants to make some treats for her friends on Valentine’s Day. Will you help her get some additional ingredients?

name: Be Mine VII
rewardItems: 5x Apple Cider; 50x Lemonade; 100x Apple; 50x Ancient Coin; 1x Gold Sea Bass; 50x Fishing Net
description:
Thomas ordered an enormous shipment of heart-shaped necklaces. He was hoping to give them out for Valentine’s Day. Unfortunately, the boat carrying the shipment sank off the coast, near the small island.

A replacement shipment is already on its way, overland this time. Thomas hopes it will arrive quickly, but to be safe Thomas would like some cards to give out. Will you bring him some valentines?

name: Be Mine VIII
rewardItems: 50x Fishing Net; 2x Medium Chest 02; 2x Medium Chest 01; 5x Square Key; 2x Gold Drum; 50x Orange Juice
description: Rosalie needs another load of cards. Also, she would appreciate it if you could keep them coming. She is fairly certain she’ll need a few more loads.

name: Be Mine IX
rewardItems: 150x Fishing Net; 150x Orange Juice; 10x Apple Cider; 2x Large Chest 01; 2x Large Chest 02; 5x Treasure Key; 1x Goldray; 10x Honey; 2x Orange Gecko; 150x Lemonade; 1x Grab Bag 04
description:
The replacement shipment Thomas was expecting ran into some trouble. The wagon driver said that he accidentally ran the wagon a little too close to the edge of a cliff along Cane Pole Ridge. Thomas was told that the shipment tumbled and threw its contents all long the floor of the ridge.

Will you help Thomas recover some of his lost necklaces?

name: Be Mine X
rewardItems: 100x Fishing Net; 100x Lemonade; 100x Orange Juice; 100x Ancient Coin; 1x Box of Chocolate 01; 2x Frog
description: If you’ll bring Rosalie one more big load of cards, she thinks she’ll be able to handle the rest.

name: Be Mine XI
rewardItems: 1x Pink Ribbon; 200x Ancient Coin; 50x Apple Cider; 1x Goldjack; 1x Goldgill; 1x Goldfin; 200x Fishing Net; 200x Orange Juice; 200x Lemonade; 10x Honey; 2x Sea Dragon; 1x Grab Bag 05; 200x Apple; 5x Gold Feather; 5x Gold Leaf
description: Will you help Thomas recover some more necklaces? He has a prized possession that he was saving for his cat, but he will gladly give it to you, if you can help him.

name: TRU3 70V3 I
description: ROOMBA cleaned up most of the wreckage in Cane Pole Ridge. If you will provide ROOMBA some corn he should be able to sort all of the heart necklaces out for you.

name: TRU3 70V3 II
description: ROOMBA cleaned up the shipwreck near the small island. If you will provide him with some corn, he should be able to sort out the heart necklaces for you.

name: Better Late Than Never I
rewardItems: 100x Fishing Net; 100x Glass Orb; 2x Gold Trout; 100x Orange Juice; 5x Bouquet of Roses
description: Beatrix had a pretty rough week and forgot to get her valentines. Will you get her some cards to send out? She’d rather be late than to make anyone feel she forgot them entirely.

name: Better Late Than Never II
itemsRequired: 200x Valentines Card; 100x Feathers; 1x Amethyst Necklace; 1x Bouquet of Roses
rewardItems: 1x Wizard Hat; 5x Small Key; 5x Square Key; 5x Treasure Key; 50x Ancient Coin; 1x Bell; 2x Small Screw; 2x Crab Claw; 100x Lemonade; 100x Fishing Net
description: Star tried with all his power to get back in time for Valentine’s Day, but a dark force kept him rather entangled longer than he expected. And honestly, he thought he had 2 more days. Now, Star is going to need a hand to get caught up. Will you help him with a few things?

name: Better Late Than Never III
rewardItems: 1x Box of Chocolate 01; 5x Bouquet of Roses; 1x Grab Bag 07
description: Thomas still ended up being short on heart necklaces for Valentine’s Day. Is there any chance you could hunt down a few more? He would still like to give them all out, even if it is a bit late.

name: Better Late Than Never IV
rewardItems: 5x Bouquet of Roses; 1x Box of Chocolate 01; 1x Grab Bag 07
description: George would like to send everyone a bottle of wine that sent him a valentine. Will you help him get a couple hundred bottles?

name: A Way Back I
description: Captain Thomas has decided to take another shot at exploring the large island to try to find some way home. Will you help him get set back up to live on the island for a while?

name: A Way Back II
itemsRequired: 500x Apple; 500x Bacon; 500x Beet; 500x Broccoli; 500x Cabbage; 500x Carrot; 200x Cheese; 500x Herbs; 500x Honey; 500x Leek; 500x Lemon; 500x Onion; 500x Orange; 500x Peas; 500x Peppers; 500x Potato; 500x Salt; 500x Tomato; 500x Flour; 100x Wine
rewardItems: 500x Fishing Net; 500x Orange Juice; 10x Gold Coral; 500x Ancient Coin; 10x Grab Bag 07
description: The shack that you helped Captain Thomas build seems to be untouched. Actually, Captain Thomas is extremely surprised at how undisturbed the shack is. The good news is that the shack is move-in ready. The only thing Captain Thomas will need is some food supplies. Will you help him get a supply of food for his stay?

name: A Way Back III
itemsRequired: 1000x Gummy Worms; 1000x Grubs; 1000x Minnows; 1000x Worms; 25x Wooden Barrel; 10x Bucket; 1000x Chum
description: Captain Thomas would also like to have a substantial supply of bait for fishing. Will you help him get the bait and containers?

name: A Way Back IV
itemsRequired: 25x Wine; 200x Eggs; 200x Watermelon; 200x Sweet Root; 200x Steak; 200x Pumpkin
description:
Captain Thomas hasn’t found anything new.

Will you bring Captain Thomas a few more supplies?

name: A Way Back V
description:
Captain Thomas is finding nothing. He has no new insights. Everything on the island is the same as when he left. Captain Thomas isn’t sure how much longer he can do this.

Captain Thomas would appreciate some more supplies, if you don’t mind helping him.

name: A Way Back VI
description: Captain Thomas has discovered something. He needs more supplies to keep pursuing this new possibility.

name: A Way Back VII
description: Captain Thomas just needs more supplies.

name: A Way Back VIII
description: Captain Thomas appreciates your concern, but all he needs is more supplies and more time on the island. He’s going to FIND A WAY!!!

name: A Way Back IX
description: Captain Thomas can’t do it. He’s lost. Life is too hard. How did this happen? Why can’t he go home?

name: A Way Back X
description: What’s the point…

name: A Towering Investment I
description:
Cecil is looking for an investor to help with an archaeological excavation he is working on. He discovered an ancient tower buried deep underground several kilometers north of town. If his research is correct, this tower is filled with priceless treasure. If you will help him fund this project, he will give you a fair share of the treasure.

Will you invest in Cecil’s excavation project?

name: A Towering Investment II
itemsRequired: 600x Apple; 600x Broccoli; 600x Cabbage; 600x Eggs; 600x Flour; 600x Herbs; 600x Leek; 600x Milk; 600x Mushroom; 600x Onion; 600x Peas; 600x Peppers; 600x Potato; 600x Radish; 600x Steak
description:
To help speed the excavation project, Cecil would like you to help provide food for the workers. The value of all the food you provide will go toward increasing your share of the treasure.

Will you help provide food for the workers?

name: A Towering Investment III
itemsRequired: 600x Lemon; 600x Orange; 600x Cucumber; 600x Carrot; 600x Corn; 600x Catfish; 600x Honey; 600x Eggplant; 600x Mackerel; 600x Pumpkin; 600x Salt; 600x Shrimp; 600x Small Prawn; 600x Watermelon; 600x Tomato
description: Cecil would like you to provide additional nutritional variety for the workers. As before, this will add to your share of the treasure.

name: A Towering Investment IV
itemsRequired: 600x Mussel; 600x Beet; 600x Bacon; 100x Crab Claw; 600x Seaweed; 600x Sea Catfish; 600x Giant Squid; 600x Puffer; 600x Flarefin; 600x Sweet Root; 600x Sour Root; 600x Swordfish; 600x Red Berries; 600x Cheese; 200x Wine
description: Cecil thinks the food supply needs a few more things.

name: A Towering Investment V
description: Several workers were injured while excavating a section of the tower yesterday. Cecil would like you to increase your monetary investment to provide care for those injured, and to help hire additional workers. Will you invest more silver in Cecil’s project?

name: A Towering Investment VII
description: The tower is larger than Cecil’s initial analysis showed. The excavation is going to cost significantly more than Cecil planned. Will you increase your investment again?

name: A Towering Investment VI
itemsRequired: 600x Board; 600x Bucket; 600x Hammer; 600x Iron; 600x Lantern; 600x Nails; 600x Shovel; 600x Axe; 600x Steel; 600x Rope; 600x Wagon Wheel; 600x Wooden Plank; 600x Wooden Barrel; 600x Pine Tree
description:
To help reduce costs, Cecil would like you to supply tools and materials for the workers to continue the excavation process. The value will be added as before to your share of the treasure.

Will you provide tools and materials?

name: A Towering Investment VIII
itemsRequired: 600x Oak; 600x Wood; 600x Wooden Plank; 600x Straw; 600x Sand; 600x Stone; 600x Steel; 600x Board; 600x Broom; 600x Emberstone; 600x Hammer; 600x Shovel; 600x Ladder; 600x Coal
description: The excavation project needs more tools and materials. Will you provide more supplies?

name: A Towering Investment IX
itemsRequired: 700x Apple; 700x Bacon; 700x Lemon; 700x Orange; 700x Beet; 700x Cabbage; 700x Broccoli; 700x Carrot; 700x Corn; 700x Eggs; 700x Flour; 700x Leek; 700x Grapes; 700x Flamejack; 700x Largemouth Bass; 700x Ruby Fish; 700x Iced Tea
description: Cecil noticed that the workers need more food supplies. Will you continue to supply food for the workers?

name: Bons Temps I
description: Jill is trying to make some beaded necklaces to toss out at the parade today. Will you help her gather the supplies to make the necklaces?

name: Bons Temps II
description: Jill is ready to start making beads for the necklaces. Will you bring her some glass orbs?

name: Bons Temps III
description: Jill is ready to string up these beads. Will you bring her some twine?

name: Bons Temps IV
description: The necklaces are looking great. Jill added feathers to a few strands to fancy them up. She would like to make a few necklaces that are really fancy. Will you bring her some gems and some iron rings to attach the gems?

name: Bons Temps V
description:
Jill appreciates your assistance! The necklaces look really great.

Jill made a little something for you to wear to the parade today in appreciation for all your help.

name: Bons Temps VI
rewardItems: 1x 100 Gold; 500x Ancient Coin; 10x Wine; 10x Honey; 5x Crab Claw
description: George would like to make some beaded necklaces for Jill to wear in the parade today. This will seem like a strange request, but instead of beads, George wants to make the necklaces out of corn. He wants the strings to be made from the silk and husks and the beads to be kernels of corn, and maybe a few whole cobs mixed into the strands. Will you give him a hand?

name: A Way Back XI
description:
Thomas doesn’t feel quite right. He first noticed it after using the broken mask when he was trying to get to the large island. His body felt strange, and every now and then he would just drop something he was holding. Hoping it was a simple cold, Thomas waited for his body to return to feeling normal, but he hasn’t gotten better.

Now, Thomas feels less normal than before. He drops things constantly, food loses its normal taste periodically, smells flash between normal and weird, and he’s started seeing things. At first, it was just flashes, but now he sees things that aren’t there, some normal things and some strange things.

Thomas has decided to take matters into his own hands and find a treatment that will help him get well. Will you help him with his first treatment idea? He’s going to take a slime bath.

name: A Way Back XII
description: Thomas has another treatment idea. He needs a lot of tomato juice and herbs for this one. Will you give him a hand getting the tomatoes and herbs?

name: A Way Back XIII
rewardItems: 25x Orange Gecko; 25x Sea Dragon; 100x Gold Pea Seeds
description: Thomas thinks beet juice may be the answer, mixed with lemons and hops. Will you get him some beets, lemons, and hops?

name: A Way Back XV
rewardItems: 100x Gold Carrot Seeds; 100x Gold Cucumber Seeds; 100x Gold Eggplant Seeds; 100x Gold Pepper Seeds
description:
None of the treatments worked. Actually, most of them made Thomas feel a little worse. Now, he thinks it might be a bad idea to consume so much juice in such a short time.

Thomas still feels strange, and now he’s seeing things for longer periods of time. He heard that eating carrots and other vegetables is good for the eyes. Maybe he can eat more vegetables and at least fix his vision.

Will you bring Thomas some vegetables?

name: A Way Back XIV
rewardItems: 100x Ancient Coin; 5x Gold Coral; 5x Goldray; 10x Small Screw
description: Will you help Thomas get a load of apple cider? It’s his latest treatment idea. Nothing else has helped yet, but Thomas has a good feeling about this one.

name: A Towering Investment X
itemsRequired: 150x Gold Catfish; 150x Gold Drum; 150x Gold Flier; 150x Gold Sea Bass; 150x Gold Trout; 150x Goldfin; 150x Goldgill; 150x Goldjack; 150x Goldray
description: Cecil wants to add a little something extra to the workers’ diet. He thinks the magical properties of golden fish could really boost the speed of the excavation project. Will you bring a supply of different golden fish?

name: A Towering Investment XI
description:
The excavation team has reached the tower’s foundation! The excavation work is finished!

Unfortunately, there’s no way to open the doors to the tower. However, Cecil has an idea that should get the doors open.

On each level of the tower, the workers discovered an intricate and linked series of mechanisms. Cecil thinks that this machinery can be cleaned and repaired and set to working order. The unfortunate part of this plan is that it will require one more investment of silver to fund the repair work.

Will you invest in repairing the tower’s external mechanisms?

name: A Towering Investment XII
itemsRequired: 700x Small Screw; 700x Small Spring; 700x Cogwheel; 700x Steel Wire; 700x Steel; 100x Magna Quartz; 100x Small Gear; 100x Flywheel
description: Cecil would like your help with another cost-saving measure for the tower project. If you will help supply parts for repairing the tower machinery, it will be a huge reduction in expenditure and time lost. As usual, your contributions will go toward your shares in the treasure.

name: A Towering Investment XIV
itemsRequired: 4x Runestone 01; 4x Runestone 02; 4x Runestone 03; 4x Runestone 04; 4x Runestone 05; 4x Runestone 06; 4x Runestone 07; 4x Runestone 08; 4x Runestone 09; 4x Runestone 10; 700x Amethyst; 700x Aquamarine; 700x Carbon Sphere; 700x Emerald; 700x Ruby
description: Some of the tower mechanisms require different stones and gems to function. Will you help Cecil gather the required resources?

name: A Towering Investment XV
itemsRequired: 4x Runestone 11; 4x Runestone 12; 4x Runestone 13; 4x Runestone 14; 4x Runestone 15; 4x Runestone 16; 4x Runestone 17; 4x Runestone 18; 4x Runestone 19; 4x Runestone 20; 700x Garnet; 700x Jade; 700x Lemon Quartz; 700x Moonstone; 700x Pearl; 700x Magicite; 700x Shimmer Topaz
description: Cecil found that more stones and gems are needed for the tower mechanisms. Will you bring the stones and gems needed?

name: A Towering Investment XVI
itemsRequired: 700x Arrowhead; 700x Blue Gel; 700x Bone Fish; 400x Dragonfly; 100x Frog; 100x Orange Gecko; 300x Gold Leaf; 300x Gold Feather; 150x Gold Coral; 500x Gold Peppers; 400x Grasshopper; 700x Purple Flower; 700x Thorns; 300x Water Lily; 100x Spiked Shell; 700x Cotton; 700x Globber; 700x Ruby Scorpion; 100x Sea Dragon
description: Cecil thinks the tower machinery is ready to be activated. Before attempting to activate the tower, Cecil would like to have an assortment of items available in case the mechanisms need some additional magical energy. Will you provide the needed items for an additional share in the tower treasure?

name: A Towering Investment XVII
description:
The doors to the tower are open!

Cecil has enlisted ROOMBA to do an initial exploration and cleaning of the tower. Will you bring corn to help power ROOMBA’s work?

name: A Towering Investment XVIII
description:
ROOMBA’s inspection of the tower is complete! The tower looks to be functional and safe, and surprisingly well preserved on the inside.

Cecil also went ahead and performed his own inspection of the tower, and gathered his share of the treasure. He hopes you do not mind him proceeding without you.

Cecil thinks the tower is now ready for your use. In fact, as thanks for your enormous and incredible investment, Cecil would like to turn over the stewardship of the tower to you. He will retain a small role in the management of the tower, but he will leave its normal use, exploration, and operations to you.

name: A Towering Investment XIII
description: The repairs are a little more difficult than expected. Will you invest more silver to help find and fund experts in machine repairs?

name: Irrational Numbers I
description: Holger is making a pie today. Will you help him gather some of the ingredients?

name: Irrational Numbers II
description: Will you bring Holger some apples to use in his pie? He also needs some iron to make a custom pie pan.

name: Irrational Numbers III
description: Holger grossly miscalculated how many apples he needs. Will you bring him some more apples? He also needs a few lemons.

name: Irrational Numbers III.14
description: Holger’s pie turned out great! He appreciates all your help. Happy Pi Day!

name: Green Initiative I
description: frank heard a rumor once about the luckiest carrots that come from soaking in green water. He’s determined to test this theory using the town’s river. He asks you to fetch him some water lilies and other supplies.

name: Green Initiative II
rewardItems: 40x Apple; 20x Orange Juice; 1x Pot of Gold (Small)
description: frank is getting hungry from watching all of your hard work. He’s only thinking in “green”, so he needs a green snack. He also asks you to make him some strong, sturdy boxes near the river, so he can oversee your progress and ensure everything is organized. He needs two boxes to be stacked, so he can watch everything “at an optimal height”. He hops away to go find some of his friends to watch his experiment.

name: Green Initiative III
itemsRequired: 50x Hops; 20x Tea Leaves; 100x Shimmer Stone; 50x Green Chromis
rewardItems: 25x Fishing Net; 25x Lemonade; 2x Grab Bag 01; 1x Grab Bag 07
description: frank watches as you gather the various items he requested, and you place them in piles along the riverside. You hear a very soft rumble, and it’s heading your way. You look over, and at least 100 bunnies are hopping towards the river. frank hops down from his watchtower, and greets them. “Glad you could make it!” You feel a bit uneasy with so many beady eyes staring at you.

name: Green Initiative IV
rewardItems: 25x Fishing Net; 1x Gold Shamrock; 25x Orange Juice
description: As you finish gathering all of the things frank has asked for, you watch as his friends start taking everything. They’re more organized than you’d have thought. Impressed, you watch them meticulously place each item around and in the river. Once they are finished, the river does seem to be sparkling with a greener tint than usual.

name: Green Initiative V
rewardItems: 1x Pot of Gold (Medium); 25x Fishing Net; 50x Apple; 25x Lemonade; 1x Grab Bag 07; 2x Grab Bag 02
description: frank doesn’t seem satisfied, as he hasn’t noticed his carrots tasting differently after soaking them in the river. “Must not be green enough.” He sends you off to fetch another batch of green materials, and another snack for him.

name: Green Initiative VI
itemsRequired: 30x Puffer; 5x Shimmer Topaz; 100x Pine Tree; 60x Rope; 30x Wooden Plank
rewardItems: 1x Grab Bag 06; 50x Orange Juice; 50x Fishing Net; 1x Grab Bag 03; 1x Pot of Gold (Small)
description: You’ve been curious as to how frank intends to move some of these larger items, since he has not asked you to help with that. As you return with another bucket full of emeralds, you see 50 rabbits pulling a rope, attached to a pine tree tied to a plank of wood. You can’t understand them, because they’re rabbits, but one of them must have said something frank didn’t like. You overhear frank calling one of them “lazy”. You shake your head and get back to gathering things.

name: Green Initiative VII
rewardItems: 1x Pot of Gold (Medium); 50x Lemonade; 50x Fishing Net; 1x Grab Bag 07
description: “It’s gotta be the water itself. It’s not green water, so that has to be why it isn’t working.” frank demands green dye, and assures you it’s safe. “I used to drink that stuff all the time, in my youth.”

name: Green Initiative VIII
itemsRequired: 120x Green Cloak; 10x Herbs; 100x Essence of Slime; 100x Thorns; 10x Frog
rewardItems: 1x Pot of Gold (Medium); 50x Fishing Net; 50x Orange Juice; 1x Green Top Hat
description: The river is slowly becoming greener. frank seems a little crazed at this point, and he’s saying everyone needs to be wearing green for this to work. You can’t stop now.

name: Green Initiative IX
itemsRequired: 1000x Green Dye; 140x Grasshopper; 400x Unpolished Jade; 300x Tea Leaves; 50x Runestone 20
rewardItems: 200x Gold Carrot; 200x Gold Peppers; 200x Gold Cucumber; 200x Gold Eggplant; 200x Gold Peas; 10x Gold Leaf; 10x Grab Bag 07; 1x Mug of Beer
description: frank asks you to pour in the last of the green dyes, while his friends scurry to place everything else around. As the last drop of dye hits the water, a huge gust of wind blows by. A few bunnies tumble over. The green water shimmers, and frank dips his carrots in for the final test.

name: Green Initiative X
description: The green water is glowing, and frank dips his carrots in for the final test. His carrots come out, and they’re a shimmering gold! You notice a bubbling spot, right in the center of the river. frank’s friends notice it as well, and retrieve it. It looks like a cauldron, and it’s filled with gold! “Gold? What am I going to do with gold? I can’t eat that.” He offers it to you, though he’s confused about what you would use it for. “If you can’t eat it, sleep on it, or play with it, what’s it good for?”

name: Ends Of The Rainbow
description: Leafy has a pot of gold for you, if you can prove you have found both ends of his rainbow.

name: A Way Back XVI
itemsRequired: 2x Green Cloak; 100x Grapes; 2x Horn Canteen; 2x Lantern; 2x Looking Glass; 20x Orange; 10x Rope; 25x Apple; 35x Carrot; 10x Onion; 35x Potato; 50x Mushroom
description:
Thomas feels a little more healthy after all of those vegetables, but his symptoms have not diminished. He sees things that aren’t actually there all the time now. There’s one especially unsettling thing that he always sees on the eastern horizon. It looks like a second sun that is rising, but it never actually rises. It just sits there glowing.
