description: Jill asks you for some broccoli. This isn’t the first time she’s asked for things a well off farmer like herself shouldn’t need help with. You decide to deliver the broccoli to her doorstep, instead of meeting up like you usually do. Her farm looks magnificent from a distance, but up close you notice some things. Her crops are wilted, soil doesn’t look properly taken care of, and there are weeds everywhere. Jill hears you calling for her and rushes out of her barn. Her face is covered in soot. She thanks you and hurries you on your way. Strange, right?

name: Hard At Work II
description: Jill has again asked you for some basic farming goods, and a list of other materials that seem a bit unusual. You focus on the crops for now, and bring them to her house. You feel compelled to check on Jill’s wellbeing after your last interaction.

name: Hard At Work III
description: Jill’s door has been left ajar, and curiosity gets the better of you. You enter her home, and there are…strange tools everywhere. You have no idea what any of them are for, or where Jill is. You hear some clanging metal and a strange whirring noise, coming from somewhere below. You leave the tools on her list at the door, and continue on with the rest of the items she’s asked for.

name: Hard At Work IV
rewardItems: 200x Apple; 25x Orange Juice; 5x Grab Bag 07; 2x Medium Chest 02; 2x Medium Chest 01; 6x Square Key; 2x Treasure Key
description: You search for the source of the mysterious sounds, and find a door leading to a basement. The walls of this stairwell are adorned with costumes, including the one you helped Jill make. There’s a basket at the top of the stairs with space for some of the other things she’s asked for, so you leave them and descend. The steps are a sleek material you don't recognize, and as you get closer to Jill’s basement, you smell…Burning? It’s not any kind of fire you recognize. How strange.

name: Hard At Work V
description:
You’re met with another door, once you reach the bottom of the stairs. It’s very shiny, and much sturdier than your doors at home. You open the door, and are met with a plume of smoke. You cough, and wave away the fumes, and search for Jill. Her basement is filled with half built gizmos, tools, and… Corn. Her corn silo feeds directly into a huge barrel in her basement.

You maneuver through piles of gadgets and gizmos, and find Jill, mumbling to herself. Her back is to you, and she’s hammering away at some device. “Why won’t you WORK?” You accidentally kick a bucket of nails, and they scatter. She hears you, and whips a handful of nails in your direction. Luckily, she’s not very good at aiming. “WHAT ARE YOU DOING HERE?!?!?!” Jill grabs you by the arm and drags you upstairs.

name: Hard At Work VI
rewardItems: 5x Apple Cider; 5x Arnold Palmer; 1x Popcorn; 1x Large Chest 02; 2x Treasure Key
description: “You can’t tell anyone about this.” Jill hangs her head in shame. “I come from a long bloodline of farmers, and I came here to continue their legacy. I just… I really hate farming, and farming really hates me.” She gestures vaguely to a window planter with very sad, wilted crops. “I tried, for years even. But eventually, I realized I’m better at making things. Once you moved to town, I admired your flourishing farmland. I was hoping if I had help with my crops from you, nobody would notice how lackluster my land was.” She laughs uncomfortably, and offers you some extra supplies, hoping you will keep her secret safe.

name: Unlikely Pair II
description:
You arrive at Jill's property with her requested corn. Her barn doors are open, which is unusual. You head that way. Once inside, you’re greeted by Jill. “Oh my, thank you. Where is the rest? Is it outside?” Your lack of response answers her questions. She takes what you’ve brought and sets it down.

Looking around, you notice this barn is 1/3 filled with machinery you’ve never seen before, and 2/3 filled with corn. “Bring as much as you can, you can just leave it outside the barn and my associate will collect it. Your payments will be at the drop off spot when you return.” She waves you off.

name: Unlikely Pair I
description: A letter from Jill has been delivered. After your last encounter with Jill, you’re wary of what she may say. You open the letter, and…She’s requesting corn. The word “URGENT” is written at least 4 times, so you’d better bring some fast.

name: Unlikely Pair V
description: CORN FACT: Sweet corn is what people purchase fresh, frozen or canned for eating. It’s consumed as a vegetable. Unlike “Field Corn”, which is harvested when the kernels are dry and fully mature, sweet corn is picked when immature.

name: Unlikely Pair IV
description: CORN FACT: While a small portion of “Field Corn” is processed for use as corn cereal, corn starch, corn oil and corn syrup for human consumption, it is primarily used for livestock feed, ethanol production and manufactured goods. It’s considered a grain.

name: Unlikely Pair III
description:
CORN FACT: Only one percent of corn planted in Redbrook is sweet corn. The other 99 percent of corn grown in Redbrook is “Field Corn”. Not the delicious sweet corn you might enjoy on the cob or in a can.

Field corn is the classic big ears of yellow dented corn you see dried and harvested in the fall. It’s called “dent corn” because of the distinctive dent that forms on the kernel as the corn dries.

name: Unlikely Pair IX
rewardItems: 1x Popcorn; 10x Arnold Palmer; 50x Tea Leaves; 400x Corn Seeds
description: CORN FACT: Popcorn is a type of maize (or corn), a member of the grass family, and is scientifically known as Zea mays everta.

name: Unlikely Pair VIII
description: CORN FACT: There is one silk for every kernel that grows in an ear of corn.

name: Unlikely Pair VII
description: CORN FACT: The number of kernels per ear can vary from 500 to about 1200, but a typical ear would have 800 kernels in 16 rows.

name: Unlikely Pair VI
description: CORN FACT:  Corn can be produced in various colors including blackish, bluish-gray, purple, green, red and white but the most common color grown is yellow.

name: Unlikely Pair XII
description: CORN FACT: Corn is an ingredient in fireworks.

name: Unlikely Pair XIII
description: As you unload the last of the corn, you notice one of the giant stacks inside the barn is rumbling. You go to inspect, and a piece of corn is hurled your way. It misses, and this sentient corn pile is rumbling even harder. You should probably come back with some protective gear.

name: Unlikely Pair XI
description: CORN FACT: Popcorn pops in two basic shapes, butterfly and mushroom. Butterfly popcorn has a very irregular shape with large bumps. It has a light crispy texture but can break easily. Mushroom-shaped popcorn has a spherical center with a rough surface. This shape makes it sturdy enough to stir when adding flavorings or coatings.

name: Unlikely Pair X
rewardItems: 5x Treasure Key; 2x Large Chest 01; 2x Large Chest 02
description: CORN FACT: Popcorn differs from other types of maize/corn in that it has a thicker pericarp/hull. The hull allows pressure from the heated water to build and eventually bursts open. The inside starch becomes gelatinous while being heated; when the hull bursts, the gelatinized starch spills out and cools, giving it its familiar popcorn shape.

name: Unlikely Pair XIV
itemsRequired: 50x Sturdy Bow; 100x Green Shield; 50x Sturdy Sword
rewardItems: 1x Peach Juice; 1x Large Chest 02; 3x Treasure Key
description: Now that you’re armed, you approach the corn beast again. Again, a cob is forcefully thrown in your general direction. You block it successfully, and continue on. As you get closer, you hear beeping, and can just make out a glowing light coming from deep within the corn mass. You poke at it with your sword, and the rumbling stops. A few cobs tumble to the ground. You start to dig, and the light disappears. You continue to dig through this corn, determined to find the source.

name: Unlikely Pair XV
description:
At last, you see something shiny buried deep within the corn. You manage to pull out ROOMBA, who appears to be powered down. Just as you pull him free, Jill returns. She looks at you, ROOMBA, and the once-organized-but-no-longer-organized corn. Your continued efforts have made quite a mess in Jill’s barn.

“Do you have ANY idea how long it took to organize each cob by kernel size? ROOMBA was going through to toss imperfections my eyes missed, and now he’s powered himself down? I told him he would be undisturbed.” Jill seems upset. “Just get these imperfections and take them out of my sight. I still need your help, so report back when you’re finished, and bring some buckets with you.”

name: Unlikely Pair XVI
description: You return after disposing of the bad corn, even though it all seemed just fine to you. ROOMBA has re-reorganized the corn, so now it’s the once-organized-but-then-not-organized-but-now-is-re-organized corn. “GREETINGS. I WAS INFORMED YOUR PRESENCE WOULD BE NECESSARY. I REQUIRE…” ROOMBA pauses, and hands you a list. “THESE ITEMS TO CONTINUE.”

name: Unlikely Pair XVIII
itemsRequired: 20x Magna Quartz; 150x Wrench; 100x Salt; 250x Essence of Slime; 200x Steel Wire; 50x Scissors; 20x Pocket Watch
rewardItems: 400x Orange Juice; 50x Iced Tea; 400x Fishing Net
description:
“Finally! I mean, thank you, but I’m not sure if I stressed the urgency of what I’m trying to do here.” Jill has you place the items on a large, metal table in the center of the barn. All sorts of metal shapes surround you.

“I’m trying to optimize corn oil to be longer lasting and more efficient. ROOMBA has been helping me, and also is my test subject. I almost had it figured out, but i’ve been missing something that I can’t quite figure out. ROOMBA made a list of calculated statistical matches, which we can try out now.” Jill starts tinkering with some machinery, and has ROOMBA test the oil.

“PROCESSING… ANALYZING… PROOFREADING… THEORIZING… CONTEMPLATING…” He does this for several minutes. Jill offers you some iced tea while you wait together.

name: Unlikely Pair XIX
description:
“ANALYSIS COMPLETE.” Jill looks at ROOMBA, and he doesn’t continue. “And the results were…?” ROOMBA takes a step back.

“INCONCLUSIVE. INSUFFICIENT MATERIALS.” Jill seems just a little too calm when she turns to you, and asks you to bring more of those materials, and a few other things as well.

name: Unlikely Pair XX
itemsRequired: 1x Corn; 300x Wrench; 50x Spectacles; 10x Small Gear; 10x Spiked Shell; 200x Blue Gel; 100x Wooden Barrel
rewardItems: 50x Arnold Palmer; 1x Corn Prize Bag; 10x Grab Bag 07; 50x Large Net
description:
ROOMBA is ready to process the corn oil again. “PROCESSING… ANALYZING… PROOFREADING… THEORIZING… CONTEMPLATING… CALCULATING…”. Again, this takes several minutes.

“CALCULATIONS COMPLETE.”. ROOMBA begins listing off each sample that was run, and corresponding efficiency levels. “SAMPLE 001 EFFICIENCY: 0.32%... SAMPLE 142 EFFICIENCY: 24.25%...”. This again, continues for several minutes. “...CURRENT SAMPLE COMPARISON COMPLETE. SAMPLE 974 EFFICIENCY: 99.98%. THIS COMBINATION HAS BEEN RECORDED. SUCCESSFUL EFFICACY IMPROVEMENT.”

Jill lets out a sigh of relief. “This was only the first step, there’s much more we have to get done. But that’s for another day. Thank you.” She’ll be in touch soon.

name: Unexpected Visitor I
itemsRequired: 400x Iron Cup; 400x Grapes; 400x Watermelon; 100x Apple; 3x Peach
description: Another letter from Jill arrives, inviting you over for dinner. She asks that you bring a few things if it’s not too much trouble.

name: Unexpected Visitor II
description:
Jill and ROOMBA greet you at the door. She’s prepared a platter of savory meats and cheeses and makes a fruit salad with what you’ve brought. She offers you a selection of drinks, and asks you to prepare some corn so she can have corn oil for ROOMBA to enjoy.

As you’re about to take a bite of some crispy bacon, a loud thud can be heard at the front door. ROOMBA goes to investigate. About 2 minutes go by, when ROOMBA returns with a pile of metal pieces, and drops them on the table. Your heart sinks as you watch your dinner covered by dirty, metal pieces.

“ROOMBA! Take this to the barn!”

Jill looks like she’s 50% furious and 50% excited, and the three of you head to the barn.

name: Unexpected Visitor III
itemsRequired: 400x Steel Wire; 400x Hammer; 50x Small Screw; 50x Magna Quartz
description: ROOMBA arranges the pile of pieces, stops, and rearranges them again. “REPAIR NECESSARY FOR THIS UNIT. MATERIALS REQUIRED.” A few tools and supplies are scattered around the barn, but ROOMBA asks that you retrieve anything else that you think may be useful.

name: Unexpected Visitor IV
itemsRequired: 400x Emberstone; 75x Moonstone; 200x Sturdy Box; 400x Rope; 50x Scissors
description:
You return with the requested items. ROOMBA gets to work, and you go back inside with Jill.

As the two of you are cleaning up the dinner mess, she thanks you again. “It’s a strange feeling, having another person here with all of this going on. I apologize if I’ve been short with you. Having ROOMBA as my only company for a while has been, well, challenging. Don’t get me wrong, his usefulness is unparalleled. As far as conversations though, you have to be very direct with robots.”

A few hours pass, and the two of you go to check on ROOMBA. It looks like your robot friend has been assembling another automaton, though several parts are still missing or disconnected.

name: Unexpected Visitor V
itemsRequired: 50x Magna Quartz; 400x Steel; 30x Cogwheel; 50x Magnifying Glass
description:
“RESTORATIONS 23.11% COMPLETE. ADDITIONAL MATERIAL REQUIRED TO CONTINUE.” ROOMBA has pieced together a very makeshift torso, with one arm and two legs. The head has been placed on a separate, smaller worktable, as it looks more damaged than the rest of the parts.
  • “DATABANK SCANS SHOW MINIMAL NON-CORRUPTED INFORMATION."
  • “LOCATION ORIGIN: 46% DATA CORRUPTION. JUNzqaD hwSEbT”
  • “PRIMARY FUNCTION: 100% DATA CORRUPTION. dQw4w9WgXcQ”
  • “TIME SINCE LAST ACTIVITY: 10 HOURS.”
ROOMBA can’t make further progress without some more materials. He hands you a list of items to retrieve while he tries to process through the data corruption.

name: Unexpected Visitor VI
itemsRequired: 500x Leather Waterskin; 100x Green Cloak; 10x Cutlass; 25x Pocket Watch; 500x Blue Gel; 25x Spectacles
description:
You return with the list of items, and ROOMBA returns to the semi-formed robot. “LOCATION ORIGIN DECORRUPTION COMPLETE. LOCATION ORIGIN: JUNDLAND DESERT.” Jill gasps. “From everything I’ve read about it, that’s a very dangerous place. Not to mention the heat.” ROOMBA interjects.
  • “JUNDLAND DESERT. DATA COLLECTION COMPLETE.
  • SAFETY CONCERNS: SANDSTORMS - CHANCE TO AVOID: 13.46%.
  • HUMAN CONSUMABLE RESOURCES - MINIMAL.
  • NAVIGATION - BARREN WASTELAND WITH FEW LANDMARKS. VERY FEW OPTIONS FOR SHELTER AGAINST ELEMENTS.
  • RESOURCE MATERIALS - ABUNDANT. NECESSARY MATERIALS FOR REPAIR LOCATED IN JUNDLAND DESERT.
  • NAVIGATION DEVICE REQUIRED FOR HUMANS.
  • END OF REPORT.”
“RECOMMENDED ACTION: PREPARE FOR A DANGEROUS JOURNEY. ADDITIONAL HUMAN REQUIRED FOR OPTIMAL CHANCE OF SURVIVAL.” Jill writes letters to Vincent and Borgen, hoping at least one of them is willing to join your group.

name: Unexpected Visitor VII
itemsRequired: 500x Cabbage; 500x Watermelon; 500x Corn; 50x Honey; 50x Cheese; 500x Sweet Root; 500x Sour Root; 175x Gold Cucumber; 5x Mug of Beer; 500x Broccoli
description:
Jill’s letters reach both Vincent and Borgen, explaining the journey ahead. Vincent politely declined, saying he had some other obligations. Borgen, however, has agreed. He arrives at Jill’s farm and thanks you all for the invitation. “I’ve always wanted to go out that way, never had a reason to before that seemed worth the risk.” “RISK ASSESSMENT COMPLETE: SURVIVABILITY PERCENTA-”

Borgen interrupts ROOMBA. “Maybe for the best you keep that number to yourself.”

“CURRENT GROUP IS OPTIMAL WITH ALL GIVEN PARAMETERS.”

And with that, you finish packing for the trip, and head south.

name: Unexpected Visitor VIII
itemsRequired: 15x Orange Gecko; 400x Horn Canteen; 450x Salt Rock; 4x Runestone 09; 4x Runestone 13
description:
Your party easily traverses Black Rock Canyon, as you’ve done many times before. Borgen happily pockets some hidden stashes of Ancient Coins. “You should pick up some supplies and interesting items you find here. Could come in handy.” Continuing on, you cross the bridge that allows passage over Crystal River. The sun will set soon. You look across the bridge, and discuss where to set up camp.

“Misty forest is eerie.” Jill states. “No raptors there, though.” Borgen chimes in. You ask ROOMBA to decide, as it’s been a long day and you just want to rest somewhere.

“CALCULATING. MISTY FOREST WILL ADD 7.2 HOURS OF TRAVEL DUE TO LIMITED VISIBILITY AND DISTANCE FROM DESTINATION.” The group decides to rest for the evening at Whispering Creek.

name: Unexpected Visitor IX
itemsRequired: 1x Raptor Claw; 50x Herbs; 300x Blue Gel; 400x Thorns; 400x Red Berries
description:
You think back fondly about your first venture to Whispering Creek. You never would be able to navigate this place without a compass. The group continues on, again, picking up anything useful along the way.

“RAPTOR DETECTED. COURSE OF ACTION: LOCATE SHELTER IMMEDIATELY.” You’ve been here often enough to know all the safe spots from raptors. You lead your friends to safety. There’s a cliff that reaches out above you, and trees and bushes provide plenty of cover should the raptor pass by. Jill seems rather worried, as you hear a screech approaching from your right. You let her hold your compass, which seems to help her relax.

You and Borgen watch the raptor spring after something. Whatever it was must have run off, and the raptor quickly pursues. You see something fall from the raptor’s foot as it disappears further into the forest. “Whatever that thing dropped, I want it.”, Borgen says confidently. “Once we get that, we can keep moving.”

name: Unexpected Visitor X
itemsRequired: 500x Sand; 35x Spectacles; 150x Scrap Metal; 150x Scrap Wire
description:
The party continues south, and soon you arrive at the entrance to the Jundland Desert. There are a few signs placed along the edges of the desert.
    “DANGER!”

    “DO NOT ENTER!”

    “NO TRESPASSING”

    “Ahead: Sand”
Borgen fashions some interesting layering, in an attempt to keep sand from his boots. Jill covers her head in a scarf, and double checks her water supply. You’ve done all the preparations you can, it’s time to move on.

The Jundland Desert is beautiful, if not blindingly bright. The sand looks almost golden, and a gentle wisp of wind carries a few golden specks to new dunes. Aside from that though, there’s nothing else to see. It’s not quite as hot here as Ember Lagoon, but it’s a close second while the sun is out. The group walks until the greenery is no longer visible. There are small bits and pieces of things hidden within the sand, but otherwise, there are no landmarks you can find. Each dune looks the same. You hold your compass, thinking maybe it will be useful here. The arrow just spins around and around. “I WILL GUIDE. FOLLOW.” ROOMBA marches towards, well, more sand.

name: Unexpected Visitor XI
itemsRequired: 500x Sand; 25x Copper Wire; 200x Scrap Metal; 200x Scrap Wire; 5x Monster Skull; 25x Broken Pipe; 10x Pulley; 20x Corn Oil
description: The sun hangs low in the sky, and you, Jill, and Borgen are moving significantly slower than you were a few hours ago. ROOMBA doesn’t seem to be affected. “WALKING THROUGH SAND TAKES MORE STAMINA FOR HUMANS. AT THE CURRENT PACE, WE ARE APPROXIMATELY 3.1 HOURS FROM DESTINATION. IF WE REFUEL AND REST FOR A SHORT WHILE, IT WILL TAKE 1.2 HOURS TO ARRIVE WHEN WE DEPART.”

name: Unexpected Visitor XII
itemsRequired: 500x Sand; 300x Scrap Metal; 300x Scrap Wire; 10x Onyx Scorpion; 30x Prickly Pear; 20x Small Bolt; 30x Copper Wire
description:
ROOMBA continues to guide you, Jill, and Borgen. The sun has set, and you notice the temperature drop. The desert is even more beautiful at night. The stars shine bright. Borgen points out a few constellations, and Jill asks Borgen how he knows about them. “Well, that’s how I do most of my traveling when I don’t know the way. The stars point me where I need to go, especially on the open sea.” While the three of you are walking and looking up, ROOMBA stops. First Jill, then you, then Borgen, all bump, and end up falling down. The three of you start laughing.

ROOMBA turns to face you. “QUIET. DO NOT MOVE.” ROOMBA dims his eye-light and crouches down to join you. A few minutes pass, and nothing happens. Borgen starts to get restless, and ROOMBA places his cold, metal hand on Borgen’s shoulder. Another minute goes by, and a very soft rumbling deep in the sand passes by. Sand shifts, and your eyes follow the direction of the rumbling. Dunes rise and fall. You stay there, waiting. ROOMBA fixes his light, and stands up. “WE WILL CONTINUE NOW.”

name: Unexpected Visitor XIII
itemsRequired: 500x Sand; 500x Scrap Metal; 500x Scrap Wire; 50x Small Bolt; 70x Pulley; 70x Broken Pipe; 25x Onyx Scorpion
description:
“What WAS that?” Jill asks. “And how did you know where it was?”

“DATA DESCRAMBLE COMPLETE. DEFENSE MECHANISM. DETECTS UNNATURAL MOVEMENT FROM ABOVE AND BELOW. I HAVE UPGRADED MY RADAR USING INFORMATION FROM DAMAGED AUTOMATON. PROBABILITY OF SUCCESS WAS LOW. WE HAVE ARRIVED AT THE LOCATION.”

You look at a small, crumbling building. During the day, this would have easily been missed. The outside walls are caked in sand, and the blinding light of the sun would hide this place from anyone who came looking. The closer you look, the more you think there’s more of the building below the sand than above. You all walk the perimeter, looking for a way in. “Got something!” You hear Jill around the corner. You all gather in front of a door. There’s no knob, knocker, or anything on it. A small, shiny orb is near the top. You, Jill, and even Borgen all press the glass orb. Nothing happens. Pushing on the door does nothing. ROOMBA looks at the door, and it swings open. “WE ARE HERE.”

name: Unexpected Visitor XIV
itemsRequired: 25x Pocket Watch; 3x Rubber Duckie; 2x Teapot; 3x Strange Ring; 200x Unpolished Jade; 100x Sunflower; 100x MIAB; 10x Cyclops Spider; 1x Model Ship; 1x Carved Squirrel; 400x Tea Leaves; 25x Fancy Guitar
description:
The interior of this building is nothing like you would expect. It’s nearly spotless inside, and dimly lit by tiny orbs strung across the walls. You, Jill, and Borgen begin to explore this room. “ONLY PERMITTED TO RETRIEVE ITEMS FOR REPAIRING UNIT.” ROOMBA points to a screen on the wall filled with 0’s and 1’s. “DO NOT REMOVE UNNECESSARY ITEMS FROM PREMESIS.”

“Well, how do we know what we’re looking for?” Jill asks. The screen on the wall changes to a different arrangement of 0’s and 1’s. “I WILL RETRIEVE THE ITEMS. YOU CHOOSE ITEMS OF CULTURAL SIGNIFICANCE AND VALUE TO LEAVE AS EXCHANGE.” ROOMBA ventures further into the building, and is soon out of sight.

The three of you look at each other, then start digging through your bags. You leave a pile of non-essential items in the center of the room. ROOMBA returns. “EXCHANGE COMPLETE. WE WILL DEPART AT SUNRISE.”

name: Unexpected Visitor XV
itemsRequired: 500x Sand; 150x Copper Wire; 150x Pulley; 100x Small Bolt; 50x Monster Skull; 50x Broken Pipe; 100x Prickly Pear; 100x Transistor
description: You depart this building after resting for a while. Your eyes have a hard time adjusting to the blinding sun, but your group is soon on track to head home. You pick up some things along the way, and the journey home is fairly uneventful.

name: Unexpected Visitor XVI
rewardItems: 1x Clubs; 1x Hearts; 1x Diamonds; 1x Spades; 100x Large Net
description: You’re finally back at Jill’s farm. Jill and ROOMBA head to the barn. You thank Borgen again for joining on the trip, and offer him some Ancient Coins as payment. “It was my pleasure! Always on the hunt for more unique items to sell at the shop.” You chat for a few minutes, and wave him off.

name: Unexpected Visitor XVII
itemsRequired: 500x Wrench; 50x Transistor; 100x Machine Part; 30x Steel Plate
description: Back at the barn, Jill and ROOMBA are arguing about which parts go where, what order to replace them in, and the best tools to use. Jill asks you to craft her some upgraded tools and gather materials she overlooked.

name: Unexpected Visitor XVIII
itemsRequired: 25x Small Gear; 500x Hammer; 25x Steel Plate; 30x Corn Oil
description: Minutes turn to hours, and Jill and ROOMBA work together in perfect harmony. Your main role is to run items back and forth across the barn, and refill ROOMBA’s corn oil supply occasionally.

name: Unexpected Visitor XIX
itemsRequired: 50x Flywheel; 10x Steel Plate; 1x Magna Core; 2x Machine Press
description: The final part is ready to be placed in the heart of this robot. Jill and ROOMBA allow you to do the honors. It clicks right into place, and almost immediately you can hear a quiet hum emanate from this new robot. It sits up and looks around. “Greetings. I am Friendly Robot 4: Now Kinder. It is recommended to refer to me as FR4NK for optimized communication. As the beings who repaired me, you are deserving of a reward. What is it that you seek?”

name: Unexpected Visitor XX
description:
ROOMBA continues to run diagnostic testing on FR4NK while Jill hurls questions at your new acquaintance. “Why did you show up at my house? How did you break? What was that building in the desert? What do you know about the monster in the desert? Can you help us continue to research the desert?”

FR4NK's manner of speaking is eerily human like. If you closed your eyes you wouldn't think this was an automaton. “My memory core is not fully restored. I will share the information I have available. The guardian of the sands protects the remaining inhabitants of Jundland in tandem with the legacy of Castrum Romuska. Avoiding certain death is impressive for humans."

Suddenly, FR4NK's tone shifts from friendly to monotone. "Per your request, I will provide a device blueprint to aid safe navigation through Jundland if you release the Langstaff Crest into my possession."

"If you choose to return to Jundland after building the device, please do not disturb the inhabitants. It would not be wise of you.”

name: Befriending Buddy I
description:
Your daily ventures have you traveling near the small cave, and you hear an odd sound coming from within. You peer inside to see Buddy, holding his pirate costume. As soon as he hears you calling to him, the sound stops. “Oh! What are you doing here?” Buddy does not face you. You offer him some flowers to see if that cheers him up.

He seems unsure of what to do with the flowers, and leaves them on the ground. He stands, and comes over to you. You notice his eyes are red and he looks like he's angry. “I just wanted to play pirates. I saw Ric earlier and asked if he would play with me. He called me some really bad words that weren’t my name, and broke my peg leg. I just wanted to play pirates with him.”

name: Befriending Buddy II
description: Buddy looks absolutely defeated, drops the broken toy, and retreats back into his cave. You’re determined to help fix this peg leg. You gather the necessary materials, and get to work.

name: Befriending Buddy III
description:
You return a while later, and Buddy is laying face-down on the floor. “I don’t want to play any more.” he mumbles through the dirt. You poke him with the peg leg. Buddy peeks over at you. “You fixed it? I thought you didn't like playing pirates with me.” Buddy hugs his peg leg.

“Some people don’t want to play with me because I am different from them. You play with me just to make me happy. Is it okay to call you my best friend?”

name: Artistic Rosalie III
description:
Rosalie is thrilled, and thanks you for your help.

The next day, you walk by her house and see a small, green tapestry sitting in front of her garden. A painting of the wishing well is pinned to it. It waves delicately with the breeze.

name: Artistic Rosalie II
description: Lorn is happy to give you some safety pins in exchange for some boxes.

name: Artistic Rosalie I
description: Rosalie is working on some special paintings, and needs some safety pins and green dye to display them properly. She tells you that Lorn may have some pins.

name: Artistic Rosalie IV
description: Rosalie wants to add to her collection, and asks you to bring some yarn. She will need more safety pins and a variety of dyes as well.

name: Artistic Rosalie V
description: Lorn is willing to part with the rest of his pins for some orange geckos and essence of slime. He explains that they’re great for keeping pests away.

name: Artistic Rosalie VI
itemsRequired: 15x Safety Pin; 5x Blue Dye; 5x Red Dye; 5x Purple Dye
description:
Rosalie gives you a big hug, and pays you for your time.

The next day, again, you walk by and her garden is adorned with colorful tapestries. Each one displays a painting. There’s even a painting of the two of you.

name: Schoolhouse Rocks I
rewardItems: 5x Orange Juice; 5x Fishing Net; 20x Iron; 20x Pea Seeds
description:
In all of his travels, the greatest endeavor that Vincent has seen any town embark upon is educating its citizens. Truly great towns not only educate their children, but they also provide opportunities for learning for everyone. Everyone shares what they know.

To encourage such an endeavor in Redbrook, Vincent is gathering signatures to petition the mayor to allow Vincent to lead the building of a schoolhouse. The building will be constructed on the grounds adjacent to the library. Everyone will be welcomed to help with the building process. When the schoolhouse is finished, everyone will be welcome to come and learn and share their knowledge.

Will you join Vincent by signing his petition? He could also use some more parchment for signatures, if you have it handy.

name: Schoolhouse Rocks II
rewardItems: 15x Orange Juice; 15x Fishing Net; 5x Grab Bag 02
description:
Vincent’s petition got an incredible number of signatures. When the mayor saw the stacks and stacks of signatures, he immediately agreed to Vincent’s plan. The mayor’s only demand in exchange for granting the permit was that the schoolhouse be named after him.

Vincent is ready to start construction on the Tridly Von Dritfeld School! He is inviting everyone to gather and bring building materials. Will you bring some wood and stone to help start the foundation?

name: Schoolhouse Rocks III
rewardItems: 25x Lemonade; 24x Radish Seeds; 2x Small Chest 01; 3x Small Key
description: The foundation for the schoolhouse needs more stone, and Vincent would also like to get started on collecting boards for the building frame. Will you bring more stone and a load of boards?

name: Schoolhouse Rocks IV
rewardItems: 30x Lemonade; 96x Hops Seeds; 30x Orange Juice; 30x Fishing Net; 5x Steak Kabob
description: Vincent’s crew is ready to work on the upper structures and the roof. They need more boards and a load of nails and hammers. Will you help gather the tools and building materials?

name: Schoolhouse Rocks V
description: The schoolhouse needs windows now. Will you bring some glass for Vincent and the work crew to make and fit some windows?

name: Schoolhouse Rocks VI
description: The schoolhouse is now ready for some hardware, desks, chairs, and tables. Will you bring some materials for Vincent and his crew to build these schoolhouse necessities?

name: Schoolhouse Rocks VII
description: Vincent would like to stock the schoolhouse with supplies. Will you help gather some of the items?

name: Schoolhouse Rocks VIII
description: Vincent would like to add some color to the supplies. Will you find some colorful parchment?

name: Schoolhouse Rocks IX
description: Vincent thinks the school is almost ready. Will you help him gather a few more supplies?

name: Schoolhouse Rocks X
rewardItems: 100x Ancient Coin; 5x Grab Bag 01; 5x Pencil; 2x Notebook
description: There is one last thing that Vincent would love to have for the school. A hungry stomach  makes a tired brain. Will you bring some apples for these learners and instructors to snack on?

name: Schoolhouse Rocks XI
description: Vincent appreciates all of your contributions to making the school a reality. He would also like to invite you to use the schoolhouse to learn something new. To help with your learning, Vincent would like you to have a copy of the schoolbook that he worked with Lorn to create, for the school.

name: Befriending Buddy IV
itemsRequired: 2000x Diamond; 4000x Seaweed; 4000x Watermelon; 5000x Catfish; 300x Pirate Hook; 500x Toilet Paper; 500x Milk Carton
rewardItems: 50x Grab Bag 03; 2000x Arnold Palmer; 2x Spades; 2x Hearts; 2x Diamonds; 2x Clubs; 2000x Large Net; 1x Backpack; 5000x Orange Juice; 1000x Grab Bag 04; 1000x Grab Bag 05; 1x Box of Chocolate 01; 1000x Grab Bag 07
description:
Buddy has been so happy since you repaired his peg leg. A few days have passed, and he knocks on your door.

"Hi best friend! Best friends give each other things, right? I have some things I want to give you! Do you have any things for me?"

:D BEST FRIENDS FOREVER :D

name: Donation For Education I
description: Cecil believes very strongly in the power of knowledge. Accordingly, Cecil would like to help the new school by contributing some of the necessities it uses daily. He will gladly pay you to produce and deliver individually packaged servings of milk for use during the school’s lunch breaks.

name: Donation For Education II
description: Cecil thought of another daily necessity for the school that he would like you to produce and deliver to the school. He will pay you handsomely for your continued efforts.

name: Donation For Education III
description: Cecil would like you to keep the deliveries coming for the school. He will continue to compensate you at a generous rate.

name: Donation For Education IV
description: Cecil appreciates your efforts thus far and he would like for you to continue the deliveries.

name: Donation For Education V
rewardItems: 100x Treasure Key; 5x Gold Jelly; 100x Lemonade; 1x Spades; 1x Clubs
description: Cecil thinks the school could use another large delivery. Please fulfill this larger order.

name: Donation For Education VI
rewardItems: 300x Arnold Palmer; 300x Large Net; 1x Diamonds; 1x Hearts; 1000x Orange Juice; 1x Buddystone; 5x Popcorn; 1000x Ancient Coin; 10x Grab Bag 06; 1x Raptor Egg; 2x Notebook
description: Cecil is almost satisfied with the inventory that you have built up at the new school. Will you make an additional delivery to ensure a lasting supply for the school?

name: Donation For Education VII
rewardItems: 1000x Apple; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Large Net; 1000x Orange Juice; 100x Pencil; 100x Peach Juice; 1x Backpack; 100x Mega Beet Seeds; 100x Mega Sunflower Seeds
description: Cecil appreciates all of your efforts. He expects this will be the last delivery... for now...

name: A Better Understanding I
rewardItems: 100x Apple Cider; 100x Arnold Palmer; 6x Treasure Key; 5x Large Chest 01
description: “Many of the parts we found in the desert are fascinating. I can’t wait to put them to use. Now I wish I had more fully functioning pieces of Romuskan technology to study. To that end, if you’ll let me borrow your compass to analyze and study, I would be glad to compensate you for loaning it to me.”

name: A Better Understanding II
rewardItems: 4x Small Screw; 2x Wood; 1x Aquamarine; 1x Glass Orb; 1x Ruby; 1x Iron Ring; 1x Twine; 1x Magna Core; 6x Treasure Key; 5x Large Chest 02; 100x Orange Juice
description: “I have some bad news. I ran out of time to put your compass back together, and now I’m behind on a million other things. To reduce your time waiting on me, I’m giving you the compass parts back, if that’s ok with you. Also, please accept this gift as token of my thanks and my sincerest apology.”

name: Far Away I
description:
Ragvin arrived in town yesterday with an empty ship and a hungry crew. He’s ready to fill his cargo holds with all manner of goods to trade throughout the isles of the Vast Ocean.

It’s been many years since Ragvin has returned to these parts. He barely recognizes Redbrook now. Ragvin could use an experienced guide to navigate these unfamiliar waters. Would you be willing to help him get reacquainted with Redbrook and fill his ship to the brim with goods to trade?

Ragvin would like to start with a sizable load of cotton.

name: Far Away II
description: Before moving onto the less robust goods Ragvin wants to fill his ship with, will you bring him tools and supplies for carrying cargo safely across the seas?

name: Far Away III
itemsRequired: 2000x Small Screw; 2000x Machine Part; 2000x Pulley; 2000x Small Bolt; 2000x Steel Plate; 2000x Wrench; 2000x Oak
description: Ragvin could also use some supplies to do maintenance and repairs on his ship before filling it to the gills with goods. Will you bring him this list of items?

name: Far Away IV
description: Now, Ragvin would like a few large loads each of salt, flour, and sweet root.

name: Far Away V
description: Ragvin is ready for the next load of flour, salt, and sweet root.

name: Far Away VI
description: Ragvin is well pleased with the goods you’ve found for him so far. He’d like to keep working with you to fill his boat. Will you bring him a large load of rice and a large load of potatoes?

name: Far Away VII
description: There’s still plenty of room! Ragvin would like another load of rice and potatoes, if you please.

name: Far Away VIII
itemsRequired: 2000x Watermelon; 2000x Apple; 2000x Carrot; 2000x Onion; 2000x Corn; 2000x Pumpkin; 2000x Beet
description: Now for some variety! Ragvin would like you to bring a large load of each of these items.

name: Far Away IX
rewardItems: 100x Skull Coin; 1x Opposition Hourglass; 1000x Ancient Coin; 50x Diamond; 1x Diamonds; 1x Clubs; 1x Hearts; 1x Spades
description: Ragvin has decided that he has found in you a competent guide to help with his business here in Redbrook. If you’ll help him fill the last of his hold, he and his crew will be on their way. If their trades are successful across the isles, Ragvin will return and call on you again for assistance.

name: Far Away X
itemsRequired: 2000x Marlin; 2000x Shrimp; 2000x Stingray; 2000x Giant Squid; 2000x Octopus; 1000x Sea Dragon
rewardItems: 100x Peach Juice; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 100x Corn Oil; 100x Rubber Duckie; 2000x Orange Juice
description:
Lorn thinks you were right to come to him with your suspicions. It is very strange that Ragvin had the treasures you sent with Thomas and Captain Thomas on their voyage. Nevertheless, Lorn would like to proceed diplomatically and discuss the matter directly with Ragvin, should he return to Redbrook.

For now, Lorn has asked Captain Logan to search for any sign of the Sarafina or its crew. Lorn also sent out a request to all the ships working the coast to keep an eye out for Ragvin’s ship and anything out of the ordinary.

To help Captain Logan and his crew with the search, will you help fill their orders for fish?

name: Far Away XI
itemsRequired: 2000x Marlin; 2000x Puffer; 2000x Ruby Fish; 2000x Seahorse; 2000x Red Starfish; 1000x Spiked Shell
rewardItems: 2000x Leather; 2000x Canoe; 500x Popcorn; 10x Buddystone; 100x Treasure Key; 1000x Arnold Palmer
description: Captain Logan’s crew hasn’t found anything, but they are continuing their efforts. Lorn would like your help to continue to fill their orders.

name: Far Away XII
itemsRequired: 2000x Small Prawn; 2000x Mussel; 2000x Blue Sea Bass; 2000x Mackerel; 2000x Blue Crab; 2000x Seaweed
rewardItems: 2000x Mushroom Paste; 100x Cutlass; 100x Grab Bag 06; 500x Grab Bag 04; 500x Grab Bag 05; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 100x Skeleton Key
description: Lorn doesn’t have any more information for you, but he could use your help getting more fish to keep Captain Logan’s orders filled.

name: Far Away XIII
itemsRequired: 2000x Minnows; 2000x Globber; 2000x Bone Fish; 2000x Sunfish; 2000x Flier; 2000x Crappie; 2000x Fluorifish; 2000x Catfish; 200x Anglerfish
rewardItems: 2000x Crossbow; 2000x Ancient Coin; 2000x Bacon; 2000x Unpolished Jade; 100x Mug of Beer; 2000x Coin Purse; 500x Machine Press; 2000x Corn; 1000x Arnold Palmer
description: Lorn would like to get ahead of some of Captain Logan’s regular orders. Will you give Lorn a hand?

name: Far Away XIV
itemsRequired: 500x Gold Catfish; 500x Gold Sea Bass; 500x Gold Trout; 500x Gold Crab; 500x Goldjack; 500x Goldray; 500x Gold Drum; 500x Goldfin; 500x Gold Flier
rewardItems: 2000x Arnold Palmer; 2000x Mega Beet Seeds; 100x Raptor Claw; 100x Pocket Watch; 2000x Red Dye; 2000x Blue Dye; 2000x Purple Dye; 100x Square Key; 100x Small Key; 2000x Orange Juice; 1x 25 Gold; 1000x Gold Feather
description:
Captain Logan took his ship to some of the more distant, populated islands to search for Thomas and Captain Thomas. Unfortunately, no one has seen the Sarafina or the Thomases. However, everyone that Captain Logan’s crew talked to knew Ragvin. They said he and his crew were fair traders and often gave goods away to the less fortunate. Some folks also wondered how Ragvin could stay in business at his prices. The people of the islands that Captain Logan visited expected Ragvin to return within the next few months.

Lorn suspects Ragvin and crew may return to Redbrook after they return to the distant islands Captain Logan visited. He thinks it may be time to wait to talk to Ragvin. Sometimes when we’re lost it’s best to stand still and wait for opportunity to come to us.

Lorn appreciates all of your help supporting Captain Logan and his crew. He couldn’t have done it without you. Now, to show thanks to Captain Logan and his crew for their efforts, will you help Lorn gather another load of fish?

name: Our Patron of Refreshment I
description:
Do you realize the time?! We have an approaching merger of two streams. Like two refreshing beverages coming together to form one refreshing beverage, the time stream of our universe is merged with another for a single refreshing second. Can you imagine the possibilities that could emerge from such a union?

I’ll need feathers!

You have my gratitude, as always.

name: Our Patron of Refreshment II
description:
Ugh!! I didn’t realize that the alternate time stream would be so…so lemony…

We’re going to need some amethyst, and more feathers of course.

name: Our Patron of Refreshment III
description:
There’s only one way to make this work, and I absolutely hate it…

I can’t even say it. Please bring me more feathers…and some quartz that is yellow like a citrus fruit that I loathe to the next epoch and beyond. Ugh….

name: Our Patron of Refreshment IV
description:
It was unbearable, but I did it. I distilled a single vial of magic from the other time stream. Who knows what amazing developments may come from this! Coronal mass ejections may soon be our playthings! You deserve all my thanks.

Could you spare a few more feathers?

name: The Otipeg Line I
description:
Thomas helped a lovely couple move into their farmhouse yesterday afternoon. When the last crate was unloaded from the wagon, Thomas bid his new friends farewell and began to make his way to the edge of town. He was on a mission to update the town population sign along the main road. The mayor said this update was long overdue, and that 175 thousand is a number to celebrate.

Before Thomas made it more than a few dozen steps along the road, something strange happened. Thomas thought he saw a fairy. So, he followed it. A small, floating glimmer continued to stay just out of his reach for nearly a kilometer, until he arrived at an old stone wall.

As Thomas got close to the wall, the fairy vanished. Thomas continued to search for the vanished glimmer, but eventually gave up after several fruitless minutes. Instead, he turned his attention, reluctantly, to examining the wall.

The wall was about knee high and made of intricately locked stones. The stones were worn and smooth and showed no sign of decoration, except at the top of what appeared to be a post. On the top of the stone at the top of the post, Thomas found these words engraved.

“Otipeg Line”

Thomas has no idea what Otipeg Line means, but he would love to learn more about it. He’s going to ask Lorn if he knows anything. Thomas is going to catch some fish to bring as a gift to Lorn, in exchange for Lorn helping Thomas figure this mystery out. Will you help Thomas catch a few extra fish to really impress Lorn?

name: The Otipeg Line II
description:
Lorn told Thomas that an Otipeg Line is a wall constructed to keep certain magical creatures away from a farmer’s crops. After Thomas told Lorn about the fairy he saw, Lorn said that there must be a break in the Otipeg Line that Thomas found.

Thomas is curious now to find the break in the wall. Will you help him gather some stone and mushrooms to repair the wall, if Thomas finds the break?

name: The Otipeg Line III
rewardItems: 175x Ancient Coin; 1x Bell; 7x Apple Cider; 5x Arnold Palmer; 5x Grab Bag 01; 7x Grab Bag 07; 1x Grab Bag 05
description:
Thomas found the break in the wall.
The rift was surprisingly small.
He started to repair the stony breach,
but then he saw a glimmer just out of reach.
He wondered how bad it could be
to let such a creature roam free.
Thomas decided to go home
and left the broken wall alone.
For all of your help today,
Thomas found gifts on his way.
One more small request
would be for his best.
Will you restore his will power?
Please bring him a purple flower.

name: The Otipeg Line IV
rewardItems: 175x Blue Feathers; 175x Leather; 175x Potato; 1x Clubs; 7x Shark Tooth; 1x 5 Gold
description: Thomas isn’t sure what happened, but he’s not going back to that wall. He appreciates you breaking whatever curse was upon him. Please accept these tokens of his appreciation.

name: New Neighbor I
description: You notice a young woman pushing a cart past your farm. It hits a hole, and tips over. You walk over to offer some help, and hear an exasperated sigh. Several planks are splintered, and the cart is immovable. “Oh, thank you for the offer but it’s alright. I can’t offer any payment for services right now. I’ll just carry what’s usable and come back to dispose of the rest. If you could help me move this off the road though,  that would be greatly appreciated.” The two of you clear the road, and she gathers what she can carry, she thanks you, and walks off.

name: New Neighbor III
itemsRequired: 200x Wooden Plank; 25x Steel; 100x Mushroom Paste; 100x Twine; 100x Hide
description: You hammer together some wooden planks, gather some other materials, and pack them in her cart.

name: New Neighbor II
description: After she’s out of sight, you head to your workbench to repair the broken pieces of the cart.

name: New Neighbor IV
description: She returns a few hours later with some tools. When she realizes what you’ve done, she’s nearly speechless. “You…How did you…” She begins to get teary-eyed, but quickly clears her throat and reaches out a hand. “Thank you, neighbor. Come see me in a few weeks once I’m settled in here, and I’ll make this up to you. I’m Mariya, by the way.” You shake her hand, and she takes the supplies down the road.

name: Neighborly Gesture
itemsRequired: 25x Shovel; 25x Axe; 20x Ladder; 100x Rope; 25x White Parchment
description:
A few days after you repaired Mariya’s cart, you decide to venture down the road to pay her a visit with some more building materials and some other things she may need.

You spot her house fairly easily, as it’s still being built. Mariya is on the roof, hammering away and does not seem to notice you. You decide it’s probably best not to surprise her, so you leave the items you brought and head home.

name: Help Kneaded II
description:
“That sack of flour was the last one. I can not seem to win today. Do you know anywhere else that may have some?” You nod, and lead her towards your home.

You open your storage compartment, and tell her to take what she needs. “I will repay your kindness in full.” She shakes your hand again, takes some flour, and heads home.

name: Help Kneaded
description: You’re at the town square to run some errands, and you see Mariya. As you approach, you notice her clothes are covered in powder. At her feet is a torn sack of flour. When she sees you, she lets out a soft laugh. “We need to stop meeting like this.” She dusts herself off, and kicks the sack of flour. This, of course, makes a huge mess. You grab some brooms so the two of you can clean up.

name: Strange Companions XV
itemsRequired: 400x Potato; 220x Honey; 400x Marlin; 30x Gold Trout; 25x Apple Cider
rewardItems: 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Large Net; 10x Skeleton Key
description:
Your vision fades. Stars streak by. Time changes. An eternity passes before the blink of an eye.

The shadow.
A picture.


Lives lived. Lives lost. Love. Hate. Regret.

“Are…you okay?” Focus again brings you back to reality where Thomas is peering at you in a peculiar fashion.
Shaking your head as if from a long dream, you put on a brave smile, and give Thomas a pat on the shoulder. You request a trout dinner to celebrate his catch at a later time and bid a distracted farewell. As you look to your left, you glimpse a shadow disappearing down a side street. The glimmer from an object catches your eye, but you’ve no idea what it is. How peculiar, the thought enters your head, and exits just as briefly. The urge to give chase is quickly overwhelmed by the memory of the experience before Thomas arrived. Maybe the sideroads are even less safe…
As Thomas steps away, you brace yourself for the feeling of being watched to return, but after a few moments, the sky is still clear and shining. It takes you a few moments of deliberate steps forward to remember your goals, but bolstered by the shining sky your pace quickens, hoping to run into Holger.
As luck would have it, you run into Holger not 10 minutes later on the east side of town. He looks deep in thought as he stares towards the horizon, a whittling project seems to have been forgotten to his left, a half finished drink on his right.
Holger motions to you to sit down on the blanket he has spread out, and you join him. Before you forget, you remember your purpose from Rosalie, and hand him a gift basket.

name: Strange Companions XVI
rewardItems: 25x Gold Flier; 100x Gold Cucumber Seeds; 100x Gold Eggplant Seeds; 25x Grab Bag 07; 50x Arnold Palmer
description:
Holger looks at you with sunken eyes that seem half-focused on the past and present. When no words come, you sit, taking in the view and the odd moment, hoping the silence breaks eventually.
“These days are long and full of sorrows." He pauses, "We both know you've seen many of those. Townsfolk gone missing, some sent to work camps, Ric demanding more of us, and me, keeping a secret I don't even understand." Holger sighs, "The town is barely recognizable with these confounded dragon walls and the pervasive scent of fear and expectation. Soon we won’t even call this place home. I don’t recognize it, and I don’t like it. Almost makes you wish you could just leave and never come back."
You sit silent, waiting for more to come, something hopeful or helpful, but he offers no other words for nearly ten minutes.
“This gift, it wasn’t necessary, but it lightened my heart. Tell Rosalie thank you.”
Nodding, you realize there is nothing to do but leave and head back to Beatrix’s home empty-handed.

A flash of inspiration strikes you, and you turn around to give Holger one last gift.

name: Strange Companions XVII
itemsRequired: 400x Feathers; 400x Yarn; 300x Blue Catfish; 300x Globber; 10x Sturdy Bow; 200x Salt
rewardItems: 2x Large Chest 01; 4x Large Chest 02; 5x Mushroom Stew; 5x Onion Soup; 1x Pirate Bandana; 10x Treasure Key
description:
Holger marvels at the beauty of the golden potato. “I’ve no idea how you’ve come by this, but it is truly a majestic and unique piece.” He gives you a grand smile, "Probably don't tell Cecil about this though."
Holger’s smile is enough to brighten even the clearest sky. He pauses for a moment before offering you a single phrase. “Find Buddy.”
As you leave, you are reminded of all the good in this town, the people and the community. The smiles of the townsfolk and others you've met in your journey, those memories bring you hope, and your resolve to figure out the mystery of Star is renewed.
And yet, wending your way through the streets and alleys, the trauma of the unsettling shadow again begins to grip you, the sense of someone following you gnaws at your mind. A sound, the scuff of feet comes from behind you and impulsively you glance backwards and the world rushes to greet your face.

Fear seizes your gut and despair overwhelms as a shadow looms over you. This is the end.

name: Buddy Found
itemsRequired: 1x Skull Coin; 1x Model Ship; 1x Pirate Bandana
rewardItems: 5x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 200x Orange Juice; 25x Arnold Palmer; 25x Apple Cider
description:
“I didn’t see you there!” A familiar voice squeaks quietly from above. You blink and the face of Buddy looms over you, a giant blob of smile that blots out the sun above. After reorienting yourself, you reach out your hand and Buddy pulls you upright in one impressive motion. You begin to talk but Buddy reaches out a hand and puts a finger to your mouth.

“Quiet, I’m hunting something evil.”

name: Strange Companions XVIII
itemsRequired: 100x Orange Gecko; 400x Tea Leaves; 400x Iced Tea; 400x Flarefin; 300x Bacon; 400x Milk
rewardItems: 300x Orange Juice; 500x Mushroom Paste; 250x Steel; 200x Fishing Net
description:
You look up baffled and Buddy's smile fades briefly before Buddy moves to follow you, his footsteps quiet, eyes alert.
“A shadow has fallen over our town, and I’m going to stop it. I saw it attacking you earlier but I couldn’t get there in time to attack it. But, with us together, we’ll be unstoppable!” His enthusiasm is infectious as he casts an imposing figure in the daylight, you briefly consider his proposal before your better judgment takes over, and you suggest talking to the rest of the Golden Leaf before he does anything rash.
On your walk back Holger’s words ring through your ears “find Buddy…”
Peculiarly, no more episodes of shadow occur on your trip back. Sometimes, you get the sense of being watched, and even catch a glimpse of a (the?) shadow in the window and a glint of light, but before you can react it’s gone from your vision.
Buddy notices your nerves and puts a hand on your shoulder, “Nothing will hurt you while I’m here, friend.”
You trudge back to Beatrix’s home, feeling strangely comforted on the journey. Arriving back at Beatrix’s you find you’re the first to arrive in her home. Rosalie is nowhere in sight, and neither is Lorn. Nothing to do but drink tea and wait for Buddy’s story when the rest of the golden leaf arrive.

name: Strange Companions XIX
itemsRequired: 400x Tea Leaves; 400x Iced Tea; 400x Jade; 400x Jade Charm; 250x Honey; 200x Herbs
rewardItems: 100x Arnold Palmer; 500x Mushroom Paste; 200x Hammer; 5x Bone Broth; 2x Sea Pincher Special
description:
The tea helps to calm your nerves, and Rosalie’s presence radiates a serenity that belies the discomfort on her face. Beatrix is the picture of radiant intensity. Lorn seems to be resting peacefully in a chair nearby quietly. The entire combination is at once discomforting and soothing. Peculiar. It takes a moment before you realize that Cecil is not there.
“Well,” Beatrix breaks the silence with an irascible look, “Tell us why you’re here, Buddy.”
Buddy looks at the assembled group, a smile on his face. “A few weeks ago, I noticed a weird blob of black moving around the town. It was really creepy and unfriendly, so I started tracking it, and when I started tracking it, it would simply...go away.”
“This happened several more times over the next few days, and I saw several townsfolk touched by this…thing…for a moment, but then it would leave quickly. Obviously, it knew I was there and I was coming to protect them.”
The assembled group is nonplussed by this revelation and ask for a few moments to gather their thoughts.

name: Strange Companions XX
rewardItems: 500x Glass Orb; 5x Cat's Meow; 5x Neigh; 1x Popcorn; 400x Mushroom Paste
description:
After the assembled Golden Leaf members have had a chance to compose themselves, Lorn stands up and confronts Buddy. “Buddy you insensitive clod, there’s no way you did that, and there’s no way some semi-intelligent blob of,” Lorn stumbles over his words momentarily, “whatever, is going around attacking townspeople. Don’t jest. Are you making up children’s tales? This is serious.”
Buddy gives the assembled group a hurt look, and spurred by your own experiences, you quickly speak up, recounting your encounter from earlier that day. Looking at you, Buddy nods enthusiastically along with your recounting, but his expression quickly becomes baffled.
“Well, I wasn’t there for that, I was on the other side of town eating tacos.”
Rosalie seems startled out of her intense thought by this peculiar admission from Buddy.
“Then, it must be someone or something else dealing with this situation, and we’ve got to figure it out. Let’s go do some digging Buddy, we’ll all meet back in a week.”
Buddy begins to protest but Rosalie heads towards the door before anyone else can speak and Buddy rushes to follow her.
Those two are strange companions, you think to yourself as you walk home.

name: Neighs Of Our Lives I
itemsRequired: 600x Apple; 200x Apple Cider; 600x Ancient Coin; 600x Magicite
rewardItems: 500x Horseshoe; 20x 4-leaf Clover; 500x Twine; 250x Antler; 200x Orange Juice
description:
On your walk home, Charles clip-clops up next to you. Golden Leaf proudly displayed on his mane, he gently steers you in a direction that is decidedly not your home. It completely slipped your mind that he was a part of your little group.
"Neigh, neigh, neigh neigh." (Good day it is I, Charles Horsington the Third, we require your presence immediately at the manor. I am in dire need of your assistance. Bring apples, ancient coins, and that trusty translation ring with you.”)
After a brief moment of shock, you remember the Ring of Renthisj on your finger and follow Charles.

name: As The Horse Clops II
itemsRequired: 600x Wooden Plank; 600x Apple; 600x Mushroom Paste; 600x Board; 600x Steel; 600x Hammer; 600x Iron; 600x Nails; 600x Stone; 600x Straw
rewardItems: 4x Horseshoe; 300x Red Dye; 300x Green Dye; 300x Yarn; 300x Wooden Shield; 300x Old Boot; 300x Gold Carrot Seeds; 300x Arrowhead
description:
You step into a field and look around for Charles’ home.
"Neigh neigh." (As you can see, I need a stable. The last one I had was destroyed by a dragon and I need a new one anyways, for my future family.)
Charles indicates a list of construction materials for a stable for at least two horses. You see some basic items and some rarer items and start with the easier things.
"Neigh." (I don't have much, but I promise to make it worth your while in the long run.)

name: Mane Hospital III
description:
As you turn around to leave, Charles also follows you. Going down your list, you realize you’ll need to also talk to some townsfolk for ideas on some of the rarer materials on this list. First on your list would be seeing Rosalie about getting some orange geckos and garnet.

On the walk back, Charles glances around in a way that could be described as skittish, but seems generally pleasant to be around, and he has a rapport you didn't realize with most townsfolk.

You get the feeling Charles may have forgotten you’re wearing the ring as you walk through town.
“Neigh!” (Good day Borgen, hope you find that extra special potato someday!)
“Neigh!” (Ric you're a jerk and really scary, but misunderstood all the same.)
“Neigh neigh!” (Buddy, I swear if you try to put a saddle on my back again)
“Neigh neigh!” (Cecil, you scamp, I know what you have in that house!)
“Neigh neigh, neigh! Neigh!” (Jill smells like metal again.)
“Neigh.” (A pleasant day to you frank old chap, hope that you find what you’re looking for, and you realize your self-worth isn’t tied up into that silly wizard.)

Nearing Rosalie’s home, you see her talking with Buddy in hushed whispers.
“The Shadow, it seems to wait until no one is around… but it avoids certain people entirely. Beatrix has never seen it,” you hear Rosalie say.

Buddy responds quietly, “Maybe if she left her home ever.”

As you clear your throat, they turn to you. After a moment of describing what you need, Rosalie smiles, and says she can gladly get you what you need.

name: Gossip Gelding IV
itemsRequired: 500x Acorn; 500x 4-leaf Clover; 500x Gold Peas; 50x Spiked Shell; 300x Catfish; 300x Octopus
rewardItems: 100x Cotton; 100x Small Screw; 100x Grasshopper; 1x Teapot; 100x Grab Bag 07
description:
Geckos and garnets in hand, Charles gently steers you towards your next objective.

"Neigh! Neigh. Neigh, neigh neigh neigh" (Lorn is a good one, I know he’ll help us.) Charles whinnies.
After a short walk, you find Lorn quietly sitting on his porch with Thomas on the outskirts of town. Tea in hand, they see you approaching and nod at you.

“My good fellow, I’m telling you, it’s all in the cast.”
Thomas rolls his eyes at Lorn, “Well, it may be all in the wrist, but I hear you’ve been keeping a secret from me all these years you old geezer.”

Charles immediately stops moving, while Lorn responds, “I couldn’t possibly know what you mean, Thomas.”

Thomas laughs and looks conspiratorially at all of you, “Pirate’s Cove, the greatest fishing hole of them all!”
Charles lets out a derisive snort. (Thomas will believe any old fairytale!)
Lorn laughs as he turns to you, “It probably doesn’t exist. Anyways, what can we do for you?”
Charles flashes his golden leaf at Lorn, and you explain to Lorn what you need.

name: One Hoof to Live V
rewardItems: 10x Large Chest 02; 12x Treasure Key; 100x Grab Bag 04; 100x Grab Bag 05
description:
Leaving, Charles directs you towards Beatrix’s home.

"Neigh." (Two more stops old chap. You’ve been quite helpful so far.)
Beatrix opens the door after two knocks.
“Oh, hello there, what can I do for you?”
You explain that you’re helping Charles build his stable, and she gives you a look of disbelief. “How would you know what Charles is looking for?”

Charles whinnies, (don’t tell her!) but you wink at Charles and explain to Beatrix about the Ring of Renthisj.

“Oh wow, I'd completely forgotten Rosalie had made this ring, I haven't had the opportunity to truly use one in a thousand years!" Beatrix gives the ring a look of wonderment, "I'm impressed that it is still working so well for a first time magical enchantment, Rosalie is a natural. Could I borrow it, just for a bit? This reminds us of better times. Perhaps we could make some new friends...I’ll trade some time with it to you for some of the things on your list!”

Charles suddenly seems impatient as he responds, “Neigh! Neigh neigh, neigh.” (Well, we just need to take all these back and build the stable, I’m sure we won’t need the ring for a few days.)
Charles gives what you interpret as an impatient nod of assent, and you trade the ring over.

name: Bright Horseshoe VI
itemsRequired: 300x Lemonade; 300x Orange Juice; 3x Bucket; 350x Orange Gecko; 300x Garnet; 250x Cotton
rewardItems: 100x Butter; 200x Milk; 100x Grasshopper; 300x Iced Tea; 350x Shiny Beetle; 350x Horned Beetle
description:
Whistling happily to yourself , you head back towards the meadow that Charles indicated earlier in the day.

In the meadow, you take another look at the plans and begin to realize this project is bigger than you realized at first. Lucky for you, Vincent and Holger were out on patrol and stop by, volunteering to help in their spare time.

You expect this project might take less than a week after all. After some light refreshments and some more of the materials Charles requested, you get to work.

name: The Young and the Mareless VII
itemsRequired: 1x Green Cloak; 1x 4-leaf Clover; 1x Eye Patch; 1x Cotton; 1x Moonstone
description:
The shape of the stable comes together much more quickly than you realized and as night begins to fall on the third day, you pack up your tools and realize Charles is nowhere to be seen. Curious, you see some fresh hoof prints and follow them. What could a horse possibly be doing at nighttime, you think to yourself.

As you step quietly, the distinctive hoof prints of Charles lead you directly to Cecil’s home. Following further, you continue towards a stable you remember helping Cecil rebuild for his horse, Lucky Lady.
Before you can go further, a familiar gruff, clipped voice emerges from ahead. Ric Ryph! You quickly seek a hiding place in the hedgerow near the stable.
“Well, that’s not enough. A thousand years and weird self-referential pronouns? That could mean anything.”

A second, unfamiliar accented voice emerges from the stables.
“You said this was it, that if I figured out what they were up to, and if we found the dragon, I could go back to the way life was going to be…”
“Maybe that’s true, but the deal has changed. If you want your love to live, you’ll get more concrete proof that Beatrix is more than what she claims. Or else. You have two days. Now wizard, shut this fleabag up.”

A flash of light emerges from the stable, and you see Ric Ryph and Cecil emerge.
“And wizard,” Ric spits the word out derisively, “Don’t forget our deal. I know your secrets too…” he trails off as he stops in his tracks and stares straight towards you in the bushes next to the fenceline.
Your heart pounds louder and louder.
Sweat breaks out on your forehead.
You can feel Ric’s scheming eyes on you.
One second turns into five seconds.
No one's here, you find yourself thinking over and over again.
Cecil looks in your direction and coughs, Ric shakes his head as if returning from a reverie and mutters to himself unintelligibly before continuing more loudly, “... secrets I know a certain few people in Bahltruvia would be very interested to hear about.”
You continue to hold your breath as Cecil leans on a staff you’ve never seen before. The staff is adorned with a hauntingly peculiar sparkle that catches your eye. Cecil spends a few moments gazing out into the darkness, as Ric strides off in the distance.
Sensing this is your moment to get away unseen, you race back to your home. Moonlight illuminates your path. When you arrive, a single dagger is stuck in your door.

name: frank's pranks I
rewardItems: 10x Treat Bag 01; 10x Treat Bag 02; 25x Candy Corn
description: frank has been waiting all year for his chance to pull the most epic pranks on everyone. Naturally, he needs you to help him gather supplies. He assures you he probably won’t prank you, as a payment for your services. First on his list is a bunch of eggs.

name: frank's pranks II
description:
With the eggs delivered, he instructs you to place them all over the town square. “don’t step on any, it’ll ruin the immersion.”

He cackles, and pulls out his list. “alright, from here, we need some bugs. a lot of ‘em. let’s start with spiders. and some bottles to keep ‘em in.”

name: frank's pranks V
description: “alright alright, stop making that face. the last bugs i need are grasshoppers.”

name: frank's pranks IV
itemsRequired: 2500x Shiny Beetle; 2500x Horned Beetle; 5000x Glass Bottle
description: You repeat the process, and frank reassures you these will not be used on you. “you’d already know what’s coming. wouldn’t be any fun in that. we need some of those leggy fellas now. i forget what they’re called. you know the ones. go get ‘em.”

name: frank's pranks III
description: frank casts some spell on the bottles to ensure the bugs can breathe properly. You gingerly capture one spider for each bottle. “great start, lets go for those beetles now.”

name: frank's pranks VI
description: You hope you never have to touch another bug again, after this evening’s activities. frank informs you these bug jars will live hidden on your property, for now. “it’s not time to deliver these guys just yet. i’ll let you know. for NOW though…lets start setting up my next prank with some red dye.”

name: frank's pranks VII
description: “that’s not nearly enough. do you have any idea what i’m trying to accomplish here? this has to be the biggest prank this town has ever seen. if you’re no longer interested in helping, let me know and i’ll find some other two legged person to help.” You don’t want to feel frank’s pranking wrath, so you hurriedly gather more red dye.

name: frank's pranks VIII
description:
You return, and frank is talking with Charles Horsington III. Seems they’ve just finished conducting some business. They see you, and promptly end their discussion. Charles greets you, and trots off. “Neigh!”

”man, that horse is one funny -blam!-. totally on board, loved my idea. anyways, glad to see you’re back on board. lets get these loaded up. you cart them, and i’ll supervise.”

“next up for preparation is uh…” He scans his list. “oh! toilet paper! as much as you can carry. i’ve got to survey the areas to plan when we’re pulling this off. just meet me back here when you’ve got it.”

name: frank's pranks IX
description: frank can be seen sniffing the air, seemingly tracking something. “this is great. almost enough. could use some extra feathers, too, if you wouldn’t mind.”

name: frank's pranks X
description: You begin to question your complicity, but after a brief moment of weighing your options, you decide to continue helping frank. He knows where you live, and you don’t want to make things awkward. You go back to the town square, towing a cart of toilet paper. frank is nowhere to be found, but he left a literal trail of crumbs for you to follow.

name: frank's pranks XI
description:
As you follow this trail, a piece of parchment flies into your face. You look at it, and an oddly familiar sense comes over you.

”Tread Carefully.”

You find frank north of town, and show him the note. “UGH! how did he figure it out? i mean, a silly little note won’t stop us. but it’ll just mean more hard work for yo– for us. i need some lemonade.”

name: frank's pranks XII
description: Lemonade in hand, you return to find frank. “he’s not here. perfect. i’ve gotta start setting up, you got those pictures?” You stare blankly at frank. “oh. did i not... ok. yeah you know those super freaky pictures of that lady? i need about 20 of ‘em. go toss some stuff into the wishing well.” He shoos you off. You look back, and catch just a glimpse of the materials you brought levitating.

name: frank's pranks XIII
description: When you return, the materials you brought previously are gone, as is frank. All you can find is a piece of parchment, which reads, “stack the pictures exactly where this letter was sitting, and meet me back at the town hall. if you could bring me a snack too, that would be great.”

ribbetribbetribbetribbet ribbet ribbetcroakribbetribbet
ribbetcroakcroakribbet croakcroak ribbet ribbetribbet

ribbitcroakcroak ribbitribbitribbitribbit ribbitribbit croakribbitcroakribbit ribbitribbitribbitribbit ribbitcroakcroak ribbitribbit croak croakribbitcroakribbit ribbitribbitribbitribbit croakribbitribbitribbit ribbit croakribbitcroakribbit croakcroakcroak croakcroak ribbit ribbitribbitribbit ribbitcroak ribbitribbitcroakribbit ribbitcroakribbit croakcroakcroak croakcroakribbit

ribbetribbetribbetribbet ribbet ribbetcroakribbetribbet
ribbetcroakcroakribbet croakcroak ribbet
ribbetribbet ribbetribbet

name: Fear or Treat I
description:
Thomas oath – only worm and rods
Invisible strings

name: Fear or Treat II
description: Searching academic amazed, fisher enviously decided

name: Treat or Fear III
rewardItems: 200x Orange Juice; 200x Fishing Net; 1x Candy Corn
description:
Unto fish
Few only remember, mens struggles.

name: frank's pranks XIV
description: frank sits by the town hall, ready to hoist Charles. They’re about to begin, when he has an amazing idea, and turns to Charles to discuss it. “hey what if we covered you in bat wings?” Charles whinnies excitedly, and they both look at you. “oh also i need some feathers while you’re out and about.”

name: frank's pranks XV
description: Now that Charles has been spookified, frank instructs you to meet him near Jill’s corn field with another snack for him.

name: frank's pranks XVII
description:
Back at the town square, you can see Charles Horsington III in the distance, his stoic posture now a frightening silhouette. frank motions for you to hide with him. “someone's coming this way, lets watch the chaos.”

Buddy, in full pirate attire, is skipping down the road. He lands on an egg, and abruptly stops. “Hello? Did somebody drop these?” When no response is given, he looks around, and jumps on each egg. “This is better than crunching leaves!” He laughs to himself. His non-peg leg shoe flies off his foot, in your general direction. It's drenched in raw egg, dirt, and a horrid stench.

Buddy walks over to retrieve it, and sees you. Of course, frank is nowhere to be seen. “Hi friend! That shoe is kind of ruined now. Would you mind picking up another one at the post office for me? I ordered it, and was actually on my way to go pick it up, but they won’t let me in without shoes! You’ll know it’s mine because my face is on it!”

name: frank's pranks XVI
description:
Somehow, both frank and the red dye you gathered earlier are both already here and waiting. “hey go pour this into that.” He gestures to Jill’s water irrigation system. “don’t worry, this stuff is safe, it won’t hurt her precious cobs.” He senses your hesitation, and takes a swig of the dye. “see? i’m fine.”

Feeling more confident that no crops will be harmed in the process, you agree to help out. Once frank sees you begin, he hops away, mumbling something about more snacks and the town square.

name: frank's pranks XVIII
description:
You return with the shoe, and Buddy is delighted. He leaves an absolute mess in the town square, and skips further down the road.

”that did not go as planned.” frank reappears, conveniently as soon as Buddy is out of sight. “we’re almost done, need some more foodstuff though. meet me back in the clearing.”

name: frank's pranks XIX
description:
The clearing is no longer empty. Star’s castle sits before you; a truly spectacular sight to see. frank, the toilet paper and lemonade are waiting for you when you arrive. “now this is important. he’s not home, so you have to go inside and replace everything in the fridge with the lemonade. i’ve got to do some stuff out here. we only have a few minutes, so chop chop.”

You’re not sure if Star left the door unlocked, or if frank did something to unlock it, but you enter the castle. You don’t dare to look around, and beeline straight for the fridge. You quickly replace the items inside with lemonade, and return to frank.

Once you shut the door, the ground rumbles. frank is out of sight, and the castle is wrapped entirely in toilet paper. The rumbling stops, and frank hops out from behind the castle. “okay, we’re done. get outta here, you do NOT want to be around when star gets back.”

As you're leaving, frank calls out, "thanks for all the help. left you a little something special at home."

name: frank's pranks XX
description: Back home, you realize there’s one set of items frank never used. Sitting in your house are thousands of jars with bugs in them. Maybe frank did prank you, after all.

name: Let’s Do The Time Warp I
rewardItems: 5x Magna Quartz; 10x Candy Corn; 5x Treat Bag 01
description:
Something is not right. Something has changed. Star has discovered an aberration in the flow of time. The events of exactly one year ago are leaking into the present. Ghosts of the past are interacting with us here and now. Visions of what was are mingling with the moments before our eyes. They seem harmless, so far, but some things have changed.

Will you help Star get to the bottom of this chronological conundrum before anything truly devastating happens to the present or our future? If you’ll bring him a cogwheel, he should be able to get pointed to the cause of this temporal overflow.

name: Let’s Do The Time Warp II
description:
Star has a memory hiding somewhere in his mind that is key to explaining what is happening, at least that’s what his Detector Of Overflowing Time indicates. Unfortunately, the DOOT didn’t show him what memory it was.

Will you bring him some carrots so he can conjur an ocular replay spell?

name: Let’s Do The Time Warp III
rewardItems: 1x Witch's Brew; 1x Witch's Broom; 1x Witch Hat; 25x Orange Juice; 25x Fishing Net
description: The ocular replay spell is working, but there are a lot of memories to sift through. Will you bring Star some dice so he can focus the spell to a specific date?

name: Let’s Do The Time Warp IV
rewardItems: 5x Garlic; 5x Bat Wing; 5x Treat Bag 03; 25x Orange Juice; 20x Candy; 5x Jack-o-lantern; 5x Chattering Teeth; 5x Taffy; 5x Orange Gecko; 1x Spooky Cookies
description: Star found it! He suspects you may not remember this, but you were there! Star was searching for a strange blip in aethereal energy, but he got distracted by a certain lovely young lady and the fashion accessory of choice for witches. In his distraction, Star left his Detector Of Aethereal Blips And Inconsequential Runestones running. The DOABAIR must’ve shorted out and created a tiny temporal leak, only visible in the ultraultraviolet spectrum. If you’ll bring Star some feathers, he should be able to patch it right up.

name: Let’s Do The Time Warp V
description: Star discovered a significant change that shifted in our time due to the time leak. The lock for the door of the Haunted House was changed…by someone…or perhaps, some thing. Star is quite certain this change wasn’t his doing, but while he was investigating the new lock, he found that he already had a key that unlocked the door. His investigation of the Haunted House’s interior revealed no changes of major significance, even at a subatomic level. Nevertheless, Star is unsettled by the change to the lock. For now, will you keep the new key to the Haunted House? Ensure it is kept safe and secret until Star calls for it.

name: Tell-Tale Beat I
rewardItems: 5x Arnold Palmer; 5x Treat Bag 01; 5x Garlic; 5x Jack-o-lantern; 200x Mushroom
description: Drum. Tricky letters at indexes…

name: Tell-Tale Beat II
rewardItems: 5x Magna Quartz; 5x Frog; 2x Breakfast Boost; 5x Arnold Palmer; 5x Large Net
description: …done correctly reveal password additions. Stop.

name: Tell-Tale Beat III
description: Syllables each move pointer next step.

name: Which Wizard Hats And Which Witch Hats I
rewardItems: 5x Treat Bag 03; 5x Treat Bag 02; 5x Treat Bag 01
questline: Which Wizard Hats And Which Witch Hats
description:
The festivities in full swing, you walk the streets. Déjà vu strikes you as you stumble upon Rosalie in a witches hat.

“These hats, they’re magical, the bring me such joy and connection! Perhaps you could bring me a few? The Haunted House gives me some weird vibes, or I’d do it myself.”

Shrugging, you set off. What Halloween is this again?

name: Which Wizard Hats And Which Witch Hats II
itemsRequired: 100x Witch Hat; 100x Bat Wing; 50x Wizard Hat
questline: Which Wizard Hats And Which Witch Hats
description:
In a flash of feathers in Rosalie’s home, Star Meerif appears in full wizard garb. He bows in a strange fashion you’re not familiar with, and extends a hand towards Rosalie.

“Witch Hats, they’re so hot right now. Did you notice how when you have them in proximity to…you…that the solar ley lines shift subtly towards the past?”
