Rosalie takes Star’s hand with a big smile and replies, "You know what? Not only that, but if you hang a bat wing from it, it makes for an excellent fashion statement.”

Sensing you’re going to need more hats, you dutifully leave the two of them to their chatter.

name: Which Wizard Hats And Which Witch Hats III
questline: Which Wizard Hats And Which Witch Hats
description: Leaving the Haunted House, you approach the town to find a dejected Star sitting on a log.  You could swear you hear something approaching a sniffle from his direction.  Approaching, he takes the hats and bat wings from you and shuffles sadly in the direction of his tower.  He mutters something about solar ley lines and candy corn.  Maybe Rosalie can help explain…?

name: Which Wizard Hats And Which Witch Hats IV
rewardItems: 20x Treat Bag 01; 20x Treat Bag 02; 20x Treat Bag 03
questline: Which Wizard Hats And Which Witch Hats
description:
Rosalie sits on her porch, a single Wizard Hat in her hand. The sad look on her face, and the context clues from earlier make you think something has gone terribly wrong.

She looks at you and takes the delivery. Her soft voice barely reaches you over the sounds of the festivities around you.

"Trick -"

name: Which Wizard Hats And Which Witch Hats V
rewardItems: 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Witch's Broom; 1x Witch's Brew
questline: Which Wizard Hats And Which Witch Hats
description:
Flowers suddenly appear around you, Rosalie’s home seems to make the sound like the popping of a cork, and witch hats with bat wings appear lining her roof and porch.

“or treat!”


Star appears next to you, “Oh, you should have seen the look on your face! Solar ley lines? What even are those?”

Rosalie and Star burst out in laughter, much to your amusement. Halloween is truly a magical time.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) I
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: The town is desperately in need of more decoration, and Rosalie knows the perfect person to ask... surprise, it's you!

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) II
rewardItems: 100x Grasshopper; 100x Horned Beetle; 100x Shiny Beetle; 200x Large Net; 2x Spooky Cookies
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Jack-o-lanterns placed, you realize that these barely cover Rosalie's home and you're going to need a lot more. Rosalie agrees and thinks that the town could go...bigger.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) III
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: You begin lining the streets of the town, and Rosalie looks lost in thought before she suggests bundles of twine and broomsticks would be great additions to the decorations.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) IV
rewardItems: 1x Wizard Hat; 1000x Steel Wire; 2000x Leek; 500x Rice
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: The town begins to take shape under Rosalie's discerning eye.  At this point, other townsfolk drop by with suggestions.  In a shower of feathers, Star suggests a few cauldrons of Witch's Brew he read about in a book once, and suggests some, for atmosphere.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) V
rewardItems: 100x Grab Bag 08; 100x Grab Bag 07; 100x Mega Sunflower Seeds
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: The town feels transformed, with an aura of Halloween around every bend, but Rosalie gets the sense that the town needs more pizazz, and sets you on a task for more!

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) VI
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Holger, intrigued by the growing commotion and decorating drops by and makes the agreeable suggestion that you double the number cauldrons in the area.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) VII
rewardItems: 100x Corn Oil; 10x Quandary Chowder; 2x Spooky Cookies
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Jill, on her way to the store, admires the decorating, as it reminds her of simpler times.  She suggests hanging bat wings across the town like she saw when she was younger.  Feeling inspired, you set to work.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) VIII
rewardItems: 2000x Flarefin; 10x Mug of Beer; 200x Arnold Palmer
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: George, strolling through town really likes the brooms.  He pauses and after a brief moment suggests more brooms but this time adorning each one with candy corn!

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) IX
rewardItems: 2000x Orange Juice; 25x Bone Broth; 2000x Large Net
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Borgen watches as you busily help with decorations and haughtily suggests that your ratio of jack-o-lanterns to other decoration ratio is now off.  Not wanting to upset him, you set out to get more for the streets.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) X
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Thomas thinks you've put down too many jack-o-lanterns and suggests you balance it out with more bubbling Witch's Brew.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) XI
itemsRequired: 100x Witch's Broom; 400x Bat Wing; 400x Coal; 400x Lantern; 400x Black Powder; 400x Explosive
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Beatrix stops by and really likes the broom and bat wing aesthetic and wants her house to stand out with an added component of fire.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) XII
rewardItems: 100x Raptor Claw; 2x Spooky Cookies; 1000x Toilet Paper; 2000x Unpolished Jade
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Lorn is alarmed at the town's sudden fire hazard and suggests some countermeasures.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) XIII
rewardItems: 2000x Old Boot; 10x Buddystone; 1x Diamonds; 500x Arnold Palmer
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Neigh!

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) XIV
rewardItems: 100x Mega Beet Seeds; 20x Cutlass; 50x Popcorn; 1x Hearts
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Captain Thomas loves all the decorations that are now placed around town, but he also misses some of the unique decorations of his homeworld. He humbly requests your assistance in finding enough candy to make strings of garland to hang around town. This may take awhile.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) XV
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Captain Thomas is hard at work stringing the candy you brought, but he grossly underestimated how much yarn he would need. He would greatly appreciate your assistance in finding some additional yarn.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) XVI
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Captain Thomas is really feeling festive now! The last thing he needs for the garland is a load of coin purses to attach here and there. The purses will let folks take a little of the candy from the garland and save it for later.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) XVII
rewardItems: 50x Steel Plate; 50x Machine Press; 10x Over The Moon
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: ROOMBA does not want to feel left out in the festivities, and requests some scrap wire to hang around Jill's Barn. Hopefully she won't mind.

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) XVIII
itemsRequired: 1000x Green Dye; 500x Essence of Slime; 500x Tea Leaves; 2000x Emerald; 1000x Cabbage
rewardItems: 1000x Gold Carrot Seeds; 1000x Gold Pepper Seeds; 1000x Gold Pea Seeds; 1000x Gold Eggplant Seeds; 1000x Gold Cucumber Seeds
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: frank cackles at the absurdity happening around town, and desperately wants to participate in the mischief. "hey lets turn the river green again for old time's sake."

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) XX
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description:
Despite the growing chaos, Rosalie thinks this was the best Halloween yet.  All the townsfolk agree.

Happy Halloween everyone!

name: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns) XIX
itemsRequired: 800x Spiked Shell; 1x Teapot; 300x Gold Jelly; 1000x Pumpkin; 1000x Apple; 1000x Wheat; 1000x Cotton
rewardItems: 1x Pie; 1x Hot Potato; 10x Raptor Egg; 2000x Bacon; 2000x Cheese; 2000x Tomato; 200x Arnold Palmer
questline: Deck The Town (With Bats And Lanterns)
description: Mariya doesn't really understand why everyone is decorating the town with such strange displays, and would like to showcase her home in a more pleasant fashion.

name: Happy Halloween I
rewardItems: 25x Fishing Net; 25x Orange Juice; 25x Lemonade; 25x Candy
description: Ghorgen (no relation to Borgen) would like to wish you a Happy Halloween full of costumes, candy, chocolate, monsters, ghosts, spooky stuff and more!  All he asks of you is a single Ancient Coin.

name: Happy Halloween II
rewardItems: 100x Candy; 10x Treat Bag 01; 100x Taffy; 10x Treat Bag 02; 1x Neigh; 50x Orange Juice
description: Mummy loves Halloween so much and hopes you have a great time trick-or-treating.  Here's some extra candy and treat bags you can have.  Just bring him 1 roll of TP.

name: Happy Halloween III
rewardItems: 10x Jack-o-lantern; 100x Large Net; 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Apple Cider; 1x Breakfast Boost; 500x Mushroom Paste
description: From everybody in Redbrook, we hope you had a great time celebrating Halloween with us!  Hope these items are useful to you.

name: Excuuuse me, Farmer I
description:
Poof! Star appears in your home, stereotypical mess of feathers in tow.

"I'm looking for some rare relics. Langstaff Crests, ya heard of 'em? They're special to me - I'm hoping to use them for a ritual later."

The look of indignation on your face seems to offend Star, "Well, excuuuse me, farmer, I can give you something nice as a reward. These were in my tower after the great watermelon surplus a few years ago, maybe we can trade?"

name: Excuuuse me, Farmer II
rewardItems: 1x Piece of Heart; 1x Wizard Hat; 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Apple Cider; 2000x Orange Juice
description:
Covered in coarse, rough sand that seems to have gotten everywhere, you return home to find a note pinned to your door.

I keep losing these things, something about their residual Romuskan energy makes them hard to find. There's another rare item in it for your trouble.

Rolling your eyes and dusting yourself off, you head back out.

name: Excuuuse me, Farmer III
rewardItems: 1x Piece of Heart; 1x Wizard Hat; 750x Arnold Palmer; 750x Apple Cider; 2500x Orange Juice
description:
You return back from your second grueling trip to the Wastes. As you sit down for a nice cup of tea, feathers appear yet again. POOF! Star appears before you, looking ragged and tired.

"Hey, listen! You wouldn't believe how hard these things are to keep track of. I hate losing! I'm going to need a few more before the uh, spell evaporates due to ley line dissonance, stat!"

You roll your eyes at Star and you hear his voice echo as he disappears.

"Well, excuuuuse me, farmer!"

Nothing to be done but help, you think begrudgingly.

name: Excuuuse me, Farmer IV
rewardItems: 1x Piece of Heart; 1x Wizard Hat; 2500x Arnold Palmer; 2500x Apple Cider; 3000x Orange Juice; 1x Spades; 1x Clubs
description:
You return home. Surely, this must have been the last journey to the wastes.

Poof! The inevitable shower of feathers and a very exhausted Star appears before you.

"I. Won't! Lose!" he mutters under his breath before looking up to see you. "Oh? Back so soon? Great! I need one more shipment. The autumnal equinox and Romuskan ionic positivity do NOT mix and I'm gonna need a little more. Promise to make it worth your while!"

name: Excuuuse me, Farmer V
rewardItems: 1x Wizard Hat; 5000x Arnold Palmer; 1x Star's Treasure Map; 5000x Apple Cider; 5000x Orange Juice; 5000x Apple; 1x Hearts; 1x Diamonds
description:
Star appears one last time in your home.

"Thanks to you, that was the the most epic game of capture the flag this universe has ever seen, I'm quite sure." A twinkle in his eye as he disappears, you can't stop wondering exactly who Star might have been playing with. A single mysteriously labelled map is left under the hat he left behind.

name: Flu Away I
description: Buddy isn’t feeling well today. He suspects it’s either the night vapors or an infection of infusoria from some bad water he drank recently. If it’s the night vapors, there’s no cure but plenty of rest. If it’s an infection of infusoria, Buddy needs some bone broth and onion soup quickly. Will you cook for Buddy’s health?

name: Far Away XV
description:
Ragvin found some friends of yours. They were stranded out in the open ocean with their engine malfunctioning and their sails shredded by a storm. Other than the troubles with their boat, and the one lad looking pale as a sheet, Ragvin thought they were in high spirits. Ragvin offered to tow them to the nearest port so they could repair their boat and make for home, but the boys wouldn’t hear of it. Instead, they asked for some materials to repair their engine and sails, so they could continue on to some glowing island…

Ragvin has more of the story to tell you, but he could use a drink before continuing. Will you bring him something refreshing?

name: Far Away XVI
description:
After helping the boys get back up and running, Ragvin intended to continue on his route, but curiosity got the better of him and his crew. Your friends seemed so eager and sincere. So, Ragvin offered to accompany Thomas and Thomas on their search for the glowing island for a few days.

Just before sundown the following day, an island was spotted and the pale Thomas got really excited. Ragvin called for a halt of both ships. He loaded a dinghy with the Thomases, himself, and a couple of his crew, and they launched for the shore. As soon as the pale Thomas set foot on the island, he passed out…

Ragvin is feeling a bit parched again. Will you get him something else to drink? The cider didn’t quite refresh him.

name: Far Away XVII
description:
When the pale Thomas finally woke, he was no longer pale. He also said the glow was gone, or at least he couldn’t see it anymore. Ragvin left the no-longer-pale Thomas with his two crewmen to recover himself while Ragvin and the healthy Thomas took a short look around the island.

Ragvin and the healthy Thomas didn’t find anything particularly noteworthy as they searched the island, but your friend looked surprised anyway. When Ragvin addressed the surprised look, Thomas said that the island they were exploring was exactly the same as an island he and the other Thomas set sail from, rock for rock and tree for tree.

Ragvin found that claim extremely curious, but with a pressing need to continue his trade route, Ragvin couldn’t remain on the island for much longer. The next day, Ragvin brought more of his crew to the island to help explore. Like the night before, they couldn’t find anything valuable…

Ragvin could use another drink. The telling of this story is really drying out his throat.

name: Far Away XVIII
description:
Ragvin informed the Thomases that he would be leaving at sunrise the next morning. He also invited the boys to join his crew and leave the island. As if they had already discussed the prospect, both Thomases said no at the same time. They decided to remain on the island and continue exploring, but they expressed their gratitude for Ragvin’s kindness.

The next morning, Ragvin and his crew left behind some supplies for the Thomases and then left the island for their ship. They continued on their trade route until they were nearly to Redbrook. As they approached the coast, they met Captain Logan and his crew. Captain Logan informed Ragvin of the missing Thomases and requested that Ragvin find you or Lorn if he had any information on their fate.

Unfortunately, that’s all Ragvin can tell you of the fate of your friends.

However, if you’ll bring Ragvin one more drink, he’d be happy to discuss what he and his crew can do to help check on the Thomases as they continue on their trade route.

name: Gourd Intentions I
description:
There’s a knock at your front door. Much to your surprise, Mariya is standing there. She’s grinning from ear to ear, and holding a gigantic pumpkin.

“Hope I didn’t catch you at a bad time, friend. I need an extra set of hands to prepare a very special dessert.” You agree to help out, and she seems elated. This is the most excited you’ve seen Mariya.

“Great! Bring over some cooking pots when you’re ready and we’ll get started!”

name: Gourd Intentions II
rewardItems: 300x Pumpkin Seeds; 10x Grab Bag 08; 10x Grab Bag 04; 10x Grab Bag 05; 10x Grab Bag 06; 50x Large Net
description:
Mariya’s kitchen is very chaotic, but she seems to know exactly where everything is. “Hey, when you ask a pumpkin how it’s feeling, what does it say?”

”I’m vine, thanks for asking.” She busts out laughing for a moment, composes herself, and remembers the task at hand.

”Oh, right. I need a LOT of butter, so please churn some while I carve out this pumpkin!”

name: Gourd Intentions III
description:
Exhausted from churning for what felt like ages, you return to the kitchen. Mariya is humming to herself. She’s moving so efficiently, handling food so skillfully, and for a moment you imagine what she could do with a larger space.

”Perfect timing! Hey, what do you get when you drop a pumpkin? A squash!” She laughs, and again, quickly recomposes herself. She puts the finishing touches on her desserts, and sticks them in the oven. “Now, we wait.”

Mariya offers some refreshments and the two of you talk to pass the time. “My sister and I would bake these every year, and we would always think up the best puns. I’m thankful that you came today.” She takes a sip of her drink. “I miss her, and keeping up our traditions just warms my heart.”

Another hour passes, and the aroma is unlike anything you’ve smelled before. Mariya removes the desserts, and quickly chills one. She wraps it up for you to take home. “I hope you enjoy this as much as I’ve enjoyed making it with you!”

rewardItems: 25x Orange Juice; 3x Large Net; 25x Lemonade; 25x Grapes; 25x Mushroom Paste; 25x Apple; 3x Apple Cider; 1x Onion Soup
description: Wow!  Over 200,000 people have tried their hand at farming around Redbrook.  To celebrate, here are some items that you might find useful.  Thanks for being a part of Farm RPG!

name: 200,000 II
rewardItems: 10x Gold Flier; 25x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Net; 25x Corn; 100x Orange Juice; 3x Cat's Meow; 5x Crab Claw; 5x Orange Gecko; 10x Salt
description: Amazing!  Over 200,000 people have tried their hand at farming around Redbrook.  To celebrate, here are some items that you might find useful.  Thanks for being a part of Farm RPG!

name: 200,000 III
itemsRequired: 7x Leek; 7x Watermelon; 7x Corn; 7x Cabbage; 7x Pine Tree
rewardItems: 500x Ancient Coin; 50x Cotton; 50x Beet; 50x Yarn; 3x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 10x Butter; 50x Arnold Palmer; 10x Fruit Punch; 2x Raptor Claw
description: Incredible!  Over 200,000 people have tried their hand at farming around Redbrook.  To celebrate, here are some items that you might find useful.  Thanks for being a part of Farm RPG!

name: Far Away XIX
rewardItems: 10x Large Chest 01; 10x Large Chest 02; 10x Large Chest 03; 50x Treasure Key
description:
Ragvin would be glad to go and check up on your friends. The only thing he asks is that you’ll help him refill his boat so he can feed his crew and keep them from hardship on the long voyage to that remote island. He’ll still pay you for the goods you supply. Once Ragvin and his crew reach the island and check on the Thomases, they will immediately turn back for Redbrook with an update, or if your friends are ready to make for home, Ragvin will escort them the whole way.

If you’re inclined to agree with his plan, Ragvin will get his ship loaded as quickly as you can bring the goods he needs.

name: Remember To Be Thankful II
rewardItems: 25x Arnold Palmer; 50x Large Net; 10x Grab Bag 07; 200x Apple; 2x Cooked Turkey; 2x Magna Quartz
description:
Cecil does not typically share stories from his past, but he feels a great nostalgia today. If you do not mind listening, he would love to reminisce for a moment. There is a strange power in telling a memory to an audience.

The place where Cecil grew up was very different from Redbrook. It was a place where dreams seemed to spring to life, almost as if by magic, and the people were so densely packed into the city that they had to start constructing enormously tall buildings, including underground.

Nevertheless, many of the customs of the rural areas were brought into the city and stirred into the amalgamation of the city’s own customs. So, they still celebrated a harvest festival even though one would have to travel many kilometers to actually see a field being harvested.

Because of Cecil’s family’s position within the city, Cecil’s mother would invite seemingly random families to join their harvest feast. The family joining them could be extremely wealthy, extremely poor, from a far off land, from a few blocks away, a small family, or a large family. This exposure to such a variety of different people and conversations during the meal taught Cecil much about the world and its people. He quickly began to recognize, despite the obvious differences, the many similarities between all people, for better and worse.

At one of theses harvest feasts, a fisherman and his family brought a small gift for young Cecil. No one had ever done that before. Many brought gifts for his parents and many brought gifts for the entire family, but no one had ever brought something just for Cecil. Not only that, but the gift was something Cecil had not seen before. It was a beautiful spiked shell. The fisherman told Cecil it was very rare and was used for magical spells long ago. It was amazing to young Cecil.

Unfortunately, that shell was lost in a terrible disaster many years ago. Cecil would love to have another spiked shell, as fine as that one from his youth. If you could find a spiked shell for Cecil, he would be very grateful.

name: Remember To Be Thankful I
rewardItems: 1x Cooked Turkey; 2x Grape Juice; 1x Arnold Palmer; 1x Large Net; 10x Apple
description:
Holger loves this time of year. He and Borgen grew up with lots of friends and family gathering for the harvest feast. Holger’s dad was a fisherman and always exchanged fresh fish for a variety of harvest produce. Because of these exchanges the harvest feast always showcased a wide variety of delicious dishes.

One year, when Holger was thirteen, the fishing haul was abnormally meager. Holger’s dad wasn’t sure if they would have enough food to get through the winter, much less trade for the harvest feast. Holger prepared himself for the worst. The day of the feast came and friends and family gathered. One by one all of Holger’s favorite dishes appeared, and in more abundance than usual. Somehow, that harvest feast tasted better than any before.

Holger isn’t sure if his friends and family knew that Holger’s family was in need, but he’s never forgotten their kindness.

Will you help Holger gather some harvest produce to share with others?

name: Remember To Be Thankful III
itemsRequired: 10x Broccoli; 10x Corn; 10x Wheat; 10x Eggplant; 10x Grapes; 10x Onion; 10x Leek; 10x Pumpkin
rewardItems: 50x Arnold Palmer; 100x Apple Cider; 100x Cotton; 10x Large Chest 02; 12x Treasure Key; 5x Cooked Turkey
description: Jill wants your help and tells you a small story in the process. When she was young, her parents had a tradition.  Every year around this time, they would take some gathered crops from the year’s harvest and offer thanks to the farmers in the surrounding area and try to give back to those who had helped them.  Will you help gather some of the crops her family used to gather to give to others around town?

name: Rapturous Thanksgiving I
itemsRequired: 10x Bacon; 1x Bone Broth; 5x Potato; 5x Carrot; 1x Pumpkin; 5x Sweet Root; 1x Cooked Turkey; 5x Onion; 5x Flour; 5x Salt; 10x Peas; 10x Apple; 2x Cheese
rewardItems: 10x Large Chest 01; 10x Grab Bag 07; 20x Grab Bag 08; 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Large Net; 10x Popcorn; 5x Sea Dragon
description:
In the evening before dinner, you see a lantern lighting your path to your home.  Captain Thomas’ familiar frame is illuminated in the early evening hours by a beautiful sunset.  
“Friend, I miss home and you have been so good to me in the past year.  Let me tell you about how we celebrate Thanksgiving where I’m from.”
You invite Captain Thomas into your home and offer to share a meal with him.

name: Rapturous Thanksgiving II
description:
After a delicious turkey and side, Captain Thomas puts a foot up by your fireplace and lights a fancy pipe.  
“In my world, Sarafina and I would join in the glorious celebration of cooking raptors for Thanksgiving.  Each year we would find the time to raise raptors and help repopulate the raptor population, but one, that raptor would always be given the tenderest of care.  They weren’t bred for fighting and hunting, like your barbaric Redbrook traditions, but they were for eating.  We gave thanks each year by giving some of that raptor to our closest friends.” 
Captain Thomas wipes a tear from his eye and continues, “And Sarafina, she always cooked the best…”
Captain Thomas stops abruptly and smiles at you.  “Thank you for entertaining my story.  I found this egg, and while I don’t agree with your traditions, I’ll gladly give this one to your care.  Have a happy Thanksgiving.”

name: Remember To Be Thankful IV
itemsRequired: 3000x Potato; 300x Butter; 500x Milk; 300x Salt; 10x Machine Press
rewardItems: 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Ancient Coin; 1000x Large Net; 1x Langstaff Crest; 25x Cooked Turkey
description:
Borgen just wants mashed potatoes. Unfortunately, just like when they were kids, Holger keeps eating the entire bowl. It is maddening.

Will you help Borgen get enough mashed potatoes to finally fill Holger?

name: Far Away XX
itemsRequired: 1x Cutlass; 1x Lantern; 3x Leather Bag; 10x Feathers; 4x Leather Diary; 10x Leather Waterskin; 10x Horn Canteen; 1x Looking Glass; 2x Old Boot; 4x Pirate Bandana; 1x Red Shield
description:
Lorn agrees with your suspicions, but he doesn’t understand why Ragvin paid you with items you clearly gave to Thomas and Captain Thomas during his last visit, and then said that he met them after that last visit to Redbrook. Ragvin has to know that you know he’s lying. But why?

Lorn has a plan. If you’re willing to help, Lorn is going to ask Ragvin if he can join his crew for the trip to check on Thomas and Captain Thomas. Will you help him prepare for the voyage?

name: Far Away XXI
itemsRequired: 100x Wooden Box; 2000x Straw; 2000x Pear Grease; 2000x Small Bolt; 1000x Belt Drive; 2000x Essence of Slime; 2000x Spool of Copper
rewardItems: 1000x Grab Bag 08; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 200x Grab Bag 07; 25x Large Chest 01; 25x Large Chest 02; 60x Treasure Key
description: Ragvin is ready for another load. His crew is working as quickly as possible to load the ship and make sail.

name: Letters To Sarafina
description:
Captain Thomas dearly misses his Sarafina. Even though he has no way to reach her here and now, he is keeping a collection of letters that he has written her during his time on this world.

For the winter holiday, Sarafina’s favorite, Captain Thomas would like to write Sarafina a letter enclosed in a nice holiday card. Will you accept the challenge of acquiring a perfect holiday card for Captain Thomas?

name: Far Away XXII
rewardItems: 500x Gold Carrot Seeds; 500x Gold Cucumber Seeds; 500x Gold Eggplant Seeds; 500x Gold Pea Seeds; 500x Gold Pepper Seeds
description:
Ragvin did not agree to let Lorn join his crew. He did, however, offer to guide another ship to the island, if Lorn could find one willing to make the long journey.

Captain Logan is willing to lease out one of his ships, and some of the crew that work the ship are willing to work the vessel for this voyage. However, the ship will require a few extra hands to fully function. Lorn has volunteered to go and he asked George and Mariya to also come along. If you would be willing to join the crew, Lorn would be very grateful and he would feel more confident that this crew can handle any chaos that may come blowing on the wind.

name: Shoveling Snow X
description: Instead of sneaking into his workshop, Santa would like to officially invite you to come and go and explore the workshop as you please. You are on his nice list, with a list of helpful good deeds filling several pages. If you will bring him a Snow Globe and a Small Key, he'll craft you an official key to enter his workshop.

name: A Wall In The Way I
itemsRequired: 500x Cabbage; 500x Corn; 500x Rice; 500x Steak; 500x Orcafish; 150x Gold Drum; 5x Lima Bean; 2x Sunflower; 100x Sea Dragon; 100x Spiked Shell; 300x Honey
description:
Dark clouds on the horizon, you check your mailbox and find a letter.

I hope this letter finds you well. It burdens my heart to write you this, but I think our dear friend Thomas is not well. He has seemed distant of late, and complained of various ailments that my books cannot identify. Would you be so kind as to join me for dinner tomorrow night with our esteemed friend? Since you’ll be in the area, could you help me restock my stores as well?

A list of ingredients and fish follow.

name: A Wall In The Way II
itemsRequired: 200x MIAB; 600x Purple Butterfly Fish; 600x Jumbo Fish; 1x Model Ship
description:
The evening approaches and you head to Lorn’s home. The sky is peaceful, almost serene after looking dark previously. Your steps feel light and you take a deep breath of the evening air. Lorn is on his porch, chatting amiably with Thomas when you arrive. You catch the tail end of their conversation.

“…estimated! I just have to prove to you I can be better.”

Lorn chuckles as you walk up his porch steps, “Hello there! Won’t you join us for dinner? The supplies can all be stocked later tonight.” As Lorn stands, he seems older, more frail than you remember. Maybe it’s a trick of the evening light, you think to yourself.

At dinnertime, you all enjoy a well prepared meal out of some of the ingredients you brought, and some strange fish you don’t recognize. Thomas and Lorn again begin to talk spiritedly. Lorn’s eyes positively gleam the entire time, returning the youthful countenance you view in him, despite his advancing age.

“You just gotta let me prove to you that I’ve gotten better! Our friend here has seen it firsthand! Look at the haul we’ve made at Pirate’s Cove! I was a part of that, you know…” Before Thomas continues, you notice a slight hitch in Thomas’s arm as he winces, spearing a piece of fish. “What is this fish anyways?”

“It’s extremely rare. In fact, no one I know could find or identify it, but the trader called it a Glassback, it’s not native to our oceans or lakes, so I’ve no idea how they came across it, but I paid a pretty penny for the privilege. I bought it a few months ago but never had the right time to share it, but now seems as good as any, eh?”

You mention how good the fish is, and Thomas agrees. Lorn suggests you reconvene on the deck.

“Would you like to hear about a lake encircled in ice?”

name: A Wall In The Way III
itemsRequired: 600x Green Scarf; 10x Cutlass; 250x Green Cloak; 600x Sturdy Shield; 600x Sturdy Bow; 600x Sturdy Sword
rewardItems: 50x Arnold Palmer; 200x Cotton Seeds; 600x Mushroom Paste; 100x Ancient Coin; 500x Gold Cucumber Seeds
description:
Thomas can hardly contain himself as you sit on the porch, he squirms uncomfortably and impatiently, between odd winces. Lorn looks at the sunset and smiles, seeming unhurried by the circumstances he has created.

You take a sip of tea, knowing that good things come to those who wait.

“Before Thomas wears a hole in my porch, let me tell you what I know…” Thomas stares at Lorn with rapt attention.

“In the days before, legend tells us the guardians of the world were sent forth to oversee the land, to give it a final shape and form. To walk amongst the people and care for them as one might care for a flock. Among them was Zho, though you might know them as Zholice or perhaps Shva, their ancient name is written in books I have read. Zho was the guardian of water and sapphire and they made their home among the people. There are legends of an unending cold known as Shva’s Playground, and within it lies Zho’s Lake. The lake is as clear as day, and it’s said you can walk on the lake and ice will form under your feet as you walk.” Lorn guffaws, “Fairy tales, I tell you…” After another pause, he continues “Other legends say that there is but one stream that leaves the lake, and that is how a fish from that mythical place could be found in the ocean. These fish are so rare, their value would be greater than anything you’ve seen so far. I didn’t believe it myself until I discovered the one from tonight a few months back.”

Thomas, leaning over the balcony, looks back to you both. “I’m gonna find that Lake, and I’m gonna fish up the best fish you’ve ever had Lorn, on my honor!” He looks to you and says, “Pack your things, we’re going north!” As he strides away, Lorn carries a wistful but knowing smile as he turns back to his house. “But I haven’t finished my story…”

You wonder if Lorn hadn’t planned this all along, but in the meantime, you realize you need to prepare for a trek to the north.

name: A Wall In The Way IV
itemsRequired: 100x Energy Coil; 100x Pear Grease; 100x Spool of Copper; 500x Metal Spool; 500x Belt Drive; 100x Corn Oil
rewardItems: 5x Onion Soup; 5x Neigh; 5x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 100x Grab Bag 08; 1x Langstaff Crest
description:
You wake up the next morning to a loud banging at your door. Groggily, you find Thomas, looking full of energy and excitement standing in front of you.

“We can’t leave today, I know, you need to make plans, so I have an idea too. Maybe we should use some parts from the rest of your journeys to make our current journey easier. I’ve asked Jill for a little help in the designs…”

name: A Wall In The Way V
itemsRequired: 600x Green Cloak; 600x Fern Leaf; 600x Yarn; 600x Green Scarf
description:
After delivering the requested items to Jill, you gather a few more things before setting forth. Of extreme importance is food, clothing, and general traveling supplies.

The day of the trip you agreed on with Thomas comes and Thomas is nowhere to be found. You find him later in his cabin, collapsed on the floor.

Lorn looks to you, “He seems to have taken a nasty spill. I noticed him acting oddly lately, but didn’t expect anything like this. I suggested the trip because I suspected a goal might help with whatever ails him, but it doesn’t seem to have made much difference.”

After a moment of consideration, you suggest that it has in fact invigorated him, as you noticed in his interactions less of the odd behavior. Between the two of you, you decide not to talk to Thomas more about this incident and proceed as planned after Thomas awakens.

name: A Wall In The Way VI
description:
The trek north is slow but steady progress. The carts carrying your snow machines are well prepared thanks to the weight balancing steel plates and large tyres with treads Jill added. They also work off a strange system of wheel propulsion you nor Thomas understand, but they lighten your trek significantly and make obstructions significantly easier to navigate.

A week of traveling, past Cane Pole Ridge and farther north, you’re surprised to find rolling hills that never seem to break into a flatland or a mountain range. On the break of the ninth day, you see in the distance a bright gleam of sun, dazzling your eyes, you realize this might be the direction you seek. You change tack to the northwest and the temperature begins to drop precipitously. Ice begins to take over the landscape, and yet to the east and west, you see nothing but clear skies and green fields.

“This feels right,” Thomas says excitedly, “We’re gonna find this place and I’m gonna be the greatest fisherman slash explorer in Redbrook!”

You both make camp for the night and prepare for a journey into frozen lands in the morning.

Thomas seems somehow brighter through this experience, and you haven’t noticed any of the odd ticks from the previous days. Maybe Lorn was right, you think to yourself.

You both spend the better part of the morning trying to figure out exactly how Jill got these contraptions *on* the cart to begin with. While looking over the machines more thoroughly, you spy a big red button labeled “Start”.

Exhausted, you hop on and when you press the start button, the snow machine comes whirring to life. Gears begin turning and before you know it the treads on the backs of the machine start spinning slowly and you begin inching forward.

Thomas laughs triumphantly and yells, “It’s working! It’s working! Well, at least I think that’s what Jill might say.”

After a moment of revelry, you press the button again and the machine abruptly stops. You notice at that point a letter from Jill taped to the side of the machine with specific unloading instructions as well as operating instructions.

“Friends,

Here are my new creations, schematics I had only dreamed of until I heard of the parts you’d found in the Jundland Wastes – please take care of them, I’d be ever so sad never to see them again.

Your friend, Jill

(not a farmer)”

name: A Wall In The Way VIII
description:
Thomas is cold and lifeless as you approach him. He seems to have faded in some ways. Frost creeps up his fingers unnaturally. It seems slow, almost imperceptible, but after a quick check he is breathing. You pick up Thomas as gingerly as possible, the cold seems to emanate from his body, penetrating all the layers of covering you’re wearing. Gingerly, you put Thomas in front of you on the snow machine and rush back the way you came.

Lorn will know what to do, the thought crosses your mind.

You return to the edge of the phenomenon and quickly fashion a makeshift cart for Thomas. Jill's going to be very mad at me as well, you think to yourself as you leave the snow machine behind. You grab the cart, make sure Thomas is safe, and rush back to Redbrook. The trip takes less time, as you skip breaks, traveling on minimal sleep, you travel recklessly to get back sooner. Each time you check on Thomas, you see the frost has crawled farther up his arms and legs.

Exhausted, you reach Redbrook after seven days of hard, almost ceaseless travel and caring for Thomas the best you can, you find yourself collapsing on Lorn’s doorstep.

Lorn opens his door as you weakly gesture towards the cart and even though you are pointing towards the cart, you don’t understand why Lorn is trying to help you to a chair.

“You fools. You bloody fools!” The words come from Lorn's mouth, but you hear Star Meerif's voice.

name: A Wall In The Way IX
itemsRequired: 600x Feathers; 250x Gold Feather; 600x Shimmer Ring; 5x Dragon Skull; 300x Honey
description:
You feel something tickle your nose and startle you back to consciousness, but your eyes won’t open despite your best efforts. “YOU SENT THEM TO SHVA’S PLAYGROUND!? In the name of Tvas, why would you do that, Lorn?”

“Sometimes, people need a push. You, of all people should respect this given your long history. It was not my choice, but theirs. I just… gave them a little nudge out the door. It was for his own good.”

“…It’s enchanted, and powerfully so. Every book and being I’ve ever spoken with, including text from the Golden Leaf tell us to stay away! Even I am not stupid enough to try and penetrate Shva’s Wall.”

“Be that as it may, you’re obligated to help these two now, you’ve heard Thomas’ plight, it is beyond their abilities.”

“I am obligated to do no such thing. You think I'm a fool? Yes, and before you say it, that business before was different. Shva is not to be trifled with and I…am not knowledgeable enough, not by half in some of those realms to do what you seek.”

A pause.

“Cecil, then?”

A long, uncomfortable pause follows.

“If you must continue this folly.”

You feel another tickle on your nose.

“He won’t get better if we avoid the problem, Star.”

There is no response, and you lose consciousness again.

name: A Wall In The Way X
itemsRequired: 250x Orange Juice; 250x Lemonade; 50x Arnold Palmer; 500x Steak; 500x Steak Kabob; 500x Iced Tea; 500x Rice; 500x Salt
rewardItems: 500x Gold Carrot Seeds; 100x Grab Bag 04; 100x Grab Bag 05; 20x Fruit Punch; 500x Antler
description:
You awaken the next morning, and Lorn gives you some more medicine, with orders to take things slow and try not to overdo it over the next few days. You are quickly escorted out of the room and as you leave, you catch a glimpse of Thomas, pale but no longer covered in frost.

“He needs rest, but you and Star saved his life, no thanks to me.” He says softly. A look of remorse passes his features quickly.

After a week of taking things easy, returning to your normal routine has helped your recovery immensely. A balanced diet of orange juice, lemonade, tea, and occasionally lemonade and tea mixed have helped re-hydrate you, and a balanced meal has restored your strength.

name: A Wall In The Way XI
description:
Each day during this week, you have checked on Thomas and his health has returned much more quickly than you or Lorn have anticipated. Lorn has spent much time researching the effects of the item Star requested for healing, but he seems to refuse to want to ask for more information, content to find old parchments in his basement and mutter to himself from beside Thomas’ bed. Thomas on the other hand has been pressing Lorn for as much information on Shva and Shva’s Wall. On one occasion, Lorn let slip that Star or Cecil might know more about it.

After two weeks, despite both you and Lorn’s protests to the contrary, Thomas’ inquiries into Shva’s Wall have only grown more persistent and with begrudging consent from Lorn, and Thomas’ insistence that he would pursue this with or without you, you’ve found yourself joining Thomas on a trip to Cecil’s manor.

Before the third knock, the door opens, and Cecil appears before you both. His clothes are different from what you remember, more like robes than his typical business attire and he seems quite irate. “What do you want? I’m very busy.”

Thomas shuffles his feet, clearly not expecting this rough welcome. He mumbles through a greeting before clearly stating, “I want to get through Shva’s Wall.”

Cecil was clearly not expecting this forward statement from Thomas and his face breaks out into a broad smile. “My dear fellow, why didn’t you say that sooner? Come in, come in.”

You step inside Cecil's home. Somehow, the opulence of his home continues to amaze you, the large hall, filled with baubles, gems and other devices always takes your breath away. You recall the room you visited with the energy core, but Cecil instead takes you to his dining room, where three sets of cups, a tea kettle, milk, and sugar are in the middle of the table. Before you can ask how Cecil had these ready, he begins speaking as you sit down.

“I heard rumors that hooligan Star wouldn’t help you out, so I’ve been doing a little research of my own and found I might already have something to help you with your journey, if you’re willing to pay the price.”

Thomas looks intensely at Cecil, “I’ll pay any price.”

Cecil looks to you both, “Great, let’s have some tea and discuss the…tea.” Cecil laughs to himself, but you don’t quite understand why.

name: A Wall In The Way XII
itemsRequired: 1x Gold Potato; 2x Gold Boot; 200x Gold Coral; 200x Gold Jelly; 200x Goldray; 200x Gold Flier
description:
“Zho was the guardian of water in our world. Their Playground is where they experimented with their Power and where their followers gathered in tribute and followed Zho’s teachings. As the years went on, Zho shared what they learned of Power with others, and the Playground eventually grew into a temple. Zho explored the world, and many knew of their name, until one day Zho returned to their Playground, only to find their temple destroyed and their followers murdered. It was at that moment Zho’s Wall was born, Zho poured their sorrow and pain into this Wall, and then disappeared.”

Cecil pauses for a moment before pulling a plain case out from underneath his robes. The case has writing on it you don’t recognize and a golden leaf adorns the latch. Considering the splendor of Cecil’s home, the box seems positively ordinary in comparison.

“We know this story thanks to ancient wizards of the Golden Leaf who traveled to the Playground – few survived, but this – this is the only relic we have from that time.”

Cecil opens the case and before you can see what’s inside, a powerful shock wave unlike anything you’ve ever experienced hits you. The sound of the ocean, the roar of the wind, the frigidness of snow, and the scalding heat of boiling water overwhelms your senses. You fall off your chair and see Thomas sitting, staring rapturously at the box. Cecil abruptly closes the box and the sensation is immediately gone. “I should have warned you, this is an item of immense Power. I call it Zho’s Dagger, and it most certainly is the item that killed Zho.”

A quietness covers the room as the enormity of Cecil’s words wash over you.

“I gather now, you understand the enormity of what I am about to suggest. I want you to revisit Zho’s Playground, bring this dagger with you and use its power to counteract the Power of Zho’s Wall and go inside and understand what happened, and bring me back something.”

Thomas blinks, “And fish.”

Cecil smiles, “Yes, and fish.”

Thomas looks at you and without hesitation blurts out, “We’ll do it! What do you want in return?”

Cecil shakes his head and looks away for a moment, “A safer world for us all, and some information I’ve long pondered. Consider this journey the favor I ask of you…and maybe a few rare things I’ve misplaced. But mostly the first thing.”

Cecil hands the box to Thomas. “Keep it secret, keep it safe, and when you approach the wall open the box and hold onto that dagger with all your will. Now, I have important things to be doing.” Cecil looks expectantly at you both and you get the impression it’s your time to leave.

name: A Wall In The Way XIII
itemsRequired: 600x Skipjack; 600x Broccoli; 50x Grape Juice; 200x Canoe; 500x Rice
rewardItems: 50x Large Chest 01; 55x Treasure Key; 500x Gold Pea Seeds; 50x Popcorn
description:
You both leave Cecil’s house in a rushed fog. Thomas has the plain case close to him.

“Well, that was…interesting. I’m not so worried about all the high-falutin god stuff, but think of the riches! The fame! The prestige! Lucky for you, I happen to have a backup store, in case I need to get out of town a second time in a hurry. Let’s go tomorrow! Skip town before Lorn and anyone else realize we’ve gone. They’ll only try to stop us anyways…”

You cautiously agree, remembering the argument between Lorn and Star. You put your misgivings aside for your friend, and you prepare yourself for another long trek north in the morning.

name: A Wall In The Way XIV
itemsRequired: 600x Chum; 250x Gold Feather; 250x Gold Leaf; 600x Blue Feathers; 500x Herbs
description:
As you prepare for sleep, a knock at the door interrupts your evening routine. You quickly stash your cookies and your accounting books in the drawer and answer the door.

Lorn swings the door wide open, followed by Star who immediately begins speaking to you animatedly, “Good sir, I must protest. I cannot in good conscience allow you to go forth with this journey. Whatever Cecil has told you, I’m sure it is well intentioned, but you are messing with powers you cannot possibly understand. He has sent you to your death. How very Langstaffian of him, to send others to do his bidding.”

Lorn rolls his eyes towards you, “Star, why are you here, exactly? You refuse to help, you refuse to not help, and you refuse to keep to yourself. Are you not the town mage…”

“Wizard.” Star mumbles absentmindedly.

“...that we have trusted all these long years? Either speak plainly, or kindly stop speaking at all.”

Star looks to Lorn for a moment, and you can see his internal struggle before he smooths his robes and takes a deep breath.

“There are powers in this world even I do not dare trifle with, but if I cannot convince you to change your mind, I shall share with you the only helpful legend I know regarding Zho. His followers were known to be extraordinarily kind, and when in his domain you had but to ‘speak the ancient word for friend’. What happens beyond that is something only the gods know now.” Star pauses for a moment before practically pleading with you. “Consider once last time staying home and safe - ignore this fools errand.”

You shake your head, intent on ensuring Thomas’ safety.

Star looks quietly to Lorn and disappears in a cloud of feathers but words echo, “Friendship. More enriches life, less offers nothing.”

Lorn looks quietly to you, “Whatever ails Thomas, he seems inextricably bound in all this, in ways I don’t understand and no one will explain to me, for better or worse. I…don’t want either of you to go. I’m a fool - I believed Thomas having a goal would help heal him, instead I’ve put you both in terrible, terrible danger.” Lorn pauses a moment, and a single tear runs down his left cheek. “Even now, I realize I’m not too old to have new regrets, new follies. Be safe. Bring my friend back safely.”

Lorn lingers a moment longer, seemingly wanting to say more but he turns slowly and steps out of the house and you are left alone, feeling as though you’re on the precipice of something bigger than you understand.

name: A Wall In The Way XV
rewardItems: 600x Coal; 600x Black Powder; 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Gold Pepper Seeds
description:
The morning is clear, and you wake up to finish your final chores before Thomas arrives. Thomas’ enthusiasm is apparent, he practically runs and skips as you depart. With no cart and the food in your packs, you expect to make excellent time.

With no significant rain, and having recently traveled this way, you are able to pick your way back north faster than you expected. After a few days on the journey, Thomas seems quieter than usual. You reflect, for a moment before realizing he seems almost unrecognizable from the man you met when you moved to Redbrook. His drive, confidence, intensity and joy for adventure are far removed from the nervous, novice fisherman you met all that time ago.

As you approach the snowy phenomenon, you find Jill’s snow machine waiting for you, looking worn and covered in a few weeks of outdoor weather, but otherwise in good working order.

“What luck! This will cut down our snow travel considerably!” You press the big red start button and the machine sputters and whirs to life briefly before it dies.

“Must be out of corn oil.” Thomas quips.

Luckily, you brought some spare.

name: The Fall of Water I
description:
The machine whirs and hums, brought to life again and you both hop on, there’s just enough room if you shed the non essential items from your packs.

The trail you both left on your first trip up the phenomenon is crystal clear in the snow and ice. Knowing what to expect, you push forward faster than you did originally, the snow and wind pick up as you approach the Wall.

You both agree to leave the machine outside the Wall and step off, buffeted by the wind and snow, Thomas steps forward, you see the plain case in one hand and he motions to you with the other.

“STAY CLOSE!” The wind is deafening at this point. Thomas kneels to the ground and sets the box on the snow. He grabs your hand and opens the box. Immediately, the shockwave erupts from the box, but mysteriously, you are unaffected. The unnatural sensations of the sound of the ocean, the roar of the wind, the frigidness of snow, the steam heat of boiled water are present, but encapsulate you both in an aura of comfort, instead of pushing you away. You feel a serenity in the midst of this otherworldly sensation.

Thomas looks at you, wide eyed. “Here goes nothing.” He picks up the dagger and you see a glow emit from his eyes. His voice grows deeper, more resonant. It’s Thomas, but there is something more there. “Take the box, the wizard would not appreciate losing it.” he states matter-of-factly. There is an edge to his words and you look to him unsure how to hold onto his hand and pick up the box with the other. Releasing your hand, Thomas’s voice is even less natural than before. “Have no fear, I shall keep you safe.”

You put the box in your bag and step forward with Thomas. The Wall looms before you, and as you near it, there is an intensity you can’t quite put your finger on, but the aura extends forward and the Wall parts as you move closer. You move forward slowly, until you are completely surrounded by the wall. A storm rages around you, but the dagger, or Thomas, or both, keep you safe from the raging forces around you. All around, a deep scream echoes. Pain and weariness intermixed with bitter rage. You shut your eyes and put your hands over your ears to stop the assault on your senses until Thomas puts a hand on your shoulder, and the screams subside. You both press on, there is an odd gleam in Thomas’ eyes, somewhere between determination you get the sense that he is having fun.

name: The Fall of Water II
description:
Suddenly, as quickly as the wall began, you see clear skies pierce the horrors of the Wall around you. The Wall recedes as you move forward together and the pressure and noise surrounding you ceases immediately.

What you see before you is unlike any majesty you’ve ever witnessed. Sun glistens off patches of ice, vibrant green grass grows in between patches of pristine white snow. A tree blossoms in a small frozen pond, purple and red hues accenting the light green leaves leaving you dazzled. Moments later, you realize water is continually falling from various branches, as though a fountain. Far away, a wall of ice seems to climb higher and higher out of the ground and water falls from its peak into a waterfall, glistening in the sun. The sound of the massive waterfall is at once tumultuous and calming. The water falls into a lake that you now see is the centerpiece of this area. The lake is surrounded by ice and a massive ice formation with one small stream running east towards the ocean.

After a moment of appreciating the splendor surrounded by Shva’s Wall, you gather yourself and offer the plain box to Thomas, but he looks at it suspiciously. “Perhaps I should keep the dagger…close.” He clenches the dagger tightly in one hand and steps towards the lake. “I’m being called. What you are seeing, is…my home.” Thomas winces at these words and without another word, he begins to move towards the lake.

Calling out, Thomas completely ignores you as he takes step after step forward. Reaching the lake, he steps onto it and ice spreads out beneath his feet. He looks back to you, expectantly, but as you gingerly step on a shallow pool of water your foot plunges directly through.

“Ah yes. Hm. You’re going to need a boat. Or well, an approximation of one.”

name: The Fall of Water III
itemsRequired: 600x Lantern; 600x Coal; 600x Twine; 600x Board; 600x Blue Gel; 600x Black Powder
description:
You present the ships and rings to Thomas and wordlessly, he draws the dagger from his belt and with both hands grasping the hilt, a sensation of power overwhelms you. The boats gently rise up into the air and drift towards the lake, and the rings disappear, strangely. You blink, and before you is a small boat fashioned out of ice.

“It’s entirely safe, let’s be off.” The being known as Thomas smiles with satisfaction, and you feel a breeze in the air and a sound like a gentle sigh crosses your ears.

Thomas grasps the side of your ice boat and you begin to travel inward. The lake seems limitless. Fish flit in mesmerizing chaotic patterns, the sun cascades off the fish and the ripples of the lake, highlighting the brilliant oddity of the situation. All around you, a chaotic wall of rage and raw elemental energy swirls, but in this moment, you feel calm.

The northernmost part of the lake is where the ice grows highest, and Thomas propels himself and your boat towards it. The majesty of the moment strikes you, and you lose all sense of time taking in your surroundings. As you approach, you realize there is a small landing, and a doorway in a shaded alcove. The closer you get, the more it seems something is very wrong. The alcove has a large gash, and the doorway is agape - a large door of ice lays on the entryway. The quiet calm gives way to a sense of unease.

“You’ll need a torch.” The echo of Thomas says. Looking at your companion, he seems faded, as though his energy is being withered away, even faster than before you began your journey.

name: The Fall of Water IV
description:
Your torch alight, you step inside. There is a small chamber with a large stone pedestal. It is flanked by 6 small statues made of ice that look vaguely human, each with a symbol in front of it.
The Echo signals and you hold your torch high and with a spark of magic from the dagger, your torch turns blue and strange symbols appear on the wall. Their script is unfamiliar to you, it seems almost alive, telling a story of its own, but the meaning is made clear in your mind.

Where once was six, there now are but five
What fun, new games, with stories come alive!
The first was water, so dull and boring,
Can you make the next one more fun exploring?
Guess the next story, we’ll go together,
Whirling, swirling, breezy forever.
Rys, come play I’ve made more delightful games
Without you, the pictures are plain dull frames.
-V

There is a small echo in the chamber and a shadow covers the words, laughter, terrible, horrible, powerful laughter fills the room and you look over to see Thomas begin to shiver uncontrollably, the dagger falls, the point of the dagger hits the floor and the sound pierces the chamber and the laughter overwhelms the moment. You rush to your friend and he points to the shadow. “It’s not real, it’s not real, but I…no…not me…the dagger…needs to go…there!” He points towards the raised stone. You grab the dagger and race towards the pedestal.

name: The Fall of Water V
description:
Belatedly, you recognize that the pedestal is in fact a tomb, and on top is the figure that looks vaguely human, arms crossed but one hand held open. As you inspect the figure, you feel the dagger pull itself towards the figure and in a moment of instinct, you take the dagger and place it in the carved hand.

“Child, I was Zho, Guardian of Water. You have returned the dagger Vail betrayed Zho with, and in doing so have righted a terrible wrong in the world. Here is our memory, the Golden Leaf stands with Rys. Take it and learn of our terrible past and the burden you now carry.”

name: The Fall of Water VI
itemsRequired: 250x Large Net; 250x Worms; 250x Gummy Worms; 250x Minnows; 250x Chum; 500x Fishing Net; 250x Mealworms
description:
The orb shines brightly, reflecting the light coming from outside. As you take the orb and put it in your pocket, Thomas falls to the ground, no longer shaking. The shadow immediately recedes, and again, you feel your head clear from the horrors of the moment. Taking a deep breath you feel a gentle wind rush through the chamber carrying a sound that could only be described as contentment.

Thomas is prone on the floor and you rush to his side. He is unresponsive at first but after a moment he looks at you with a lopsided smile.

“Was…it all a dream? I was me, but I was more. Or, I was someone or maybe something else?” He pauses momentarily, “Either way, it was so cool! I wish I could remember more.” he seems lost in thought, and you notice Thomas winces again as he uses his arms to stand up off the ground. For a brief moment, you swear you could see his hand disappear entirely.

A gentle snow falls in the room, the single opening in the chamber illuminates the Tomb of Zho, Guardian of Water, and for a moment, you close your eyes, the enormity of the moment giving you pause. You motion quietly to Thomas, not ready to disturb the serenity of the tomb. You both step outside the cavern and quickly realize that Zho’s Wall is gone, but the majesty of Zho’s Playground remains.

“Oh man, Glacier Lake is so cool! Let’s go fishing!” Thomas exclaims. You both laugh, and Thomas seems to be back to his old (new?) self, and after reflection you realize you might also like to take a moment to explore the lake. You both get into the ice boat and cast off, worries forgotten for the moment, the joy of discovery, fishing, and friendship are the only things you see on the horizon.

name: A Wall In The Way VII
description:
After half an hour, you both feel comfortable enough with the machinery to start traveling with it, so you set off. The machines are not very noisy, but the occasional clang and ping is quite jarring in the quiet intensity of the growing cold and snow as you travel further north. For each minute that passes, you grow more and more unsettled. Distinctly to the east and west you can still see green. The area slowly grows more forested in all directions but only in the small swathe of land you travel is there snow as it slopes gently upwards. Slowly over the next hour the snow-covered land expands on both sides, greenery becoming overtaken by white, making you believe you started near the point of this mysterious phenomenon.

Thomas seems determined to trek onward, and his determination is met suddenly by a fierce blowing wind. Snow begins falling from the sky at a rapid pace, though no clouds appear overhead. The effect of wind, snow, and bright sun are disorienting, the light glinting off the snow crystals creating beautiful fleeting patterns of reflected light all around you.

You both lean forward, almost willing your machines to traverse the snow faster as the winds intensify until suddenly, you reach a barrier of snow, ice, and wind. “It’s too dangerous!” you shout to Thomas. The roaring maelstrom in front of you fills you with terror and a hint of sorrow. “We must go back!”

Thomas looks to you, a mad gleam in his eye, “No!”

You try to call out again, but Thomas lurches forward. His machine begins to enter the maelstrom and as he enters you hear an unearthly roar from all around you as Thomas and the snow contraption are both lifted into the air. Ice covers the machine and Thomas is thrown viciously backwards. He crumples to the ground unnaturally and the storm subsides as you run towards Thomas.

name: Buddy's Christmas Adventure I
description:
It’s Christmas-time, Buddy’s favorite time of year. Santa gave him a task, to find someone on the naughty list and help them believe in Santa again.

First, Buddy and Santa searched through many, many books to find all the names of people in Redbrook when he was shocked to find his very good friend, Vincent, on the naughty list!

Buddy and Santa parted ways and Buddy claims he rode an iceberg pushed by a narwhal who was sad to see him leave. “Bye Buddy, hope you find your friend!”

name: Buddy's Christmas Adventure II
itemsRequired: 3000x Candy Roll; 3000x Candy Cane; 3000x Apple; 3000x Broccoli; 3000x Wheat; 1000x Grape Juice; 100x Onion Soup
rewardItems: 10x Teddy Bear; 1000x Lemonade; 500x Grab Bag 07; 500x Gold Eggplant Seeds; 500x Mega Beet Seeds
description: Buddy loves eating candy, candy corn, candy cane and syrup!  Maybe you could help him gather some of his favorite candy (and some healthier stuff too) to help him have the energy to find his very good friend when he returns to Redbrook?

name: Buddy's Christmas Adventure III
rewardItems: 500x Apple Cider; 5x Gingerbread Man; 5x Gingerbread House; 100x Corn Prize Bag; 1x Spades; 1000x Arnold Palmer
description:
Buddy loves exploring the streets of Redbrook, there’s so many colorful objects! He briefly remember’s Santa’s advice.

“I’ve been to Redbrook tons of times, but there are some things you should know. If you see gum on the streets, leave it there, it’s not candy. Second, there are, like thirty, Jill’s Corn, but the original is on the outside of town. And finally, if you see an advertisement for free gold, it’s probably a rick roll.”

name: Buddy's Christmas Adventure IV
itemsRequired: 3000x Christmas Tree; 3000x Holiday Wreath; 3000x Red Ornament; 3000x Yellow Ornament; 3000x Green Ornament; 3000x Blue Ornament; 3000x Purple Ornament; 1000x Snow Globe; 1000x Snowman; 1500x Star; 25x Milk and Cookies
rewardItems: 2000x Arnold Palmer; 500x Grab Bag 03; 1x Clubs; 1000x Peach
description:
As Buddy wanders the streets, he realizes the perfect way to convince his friend Vincent to reform his ways is with a gift that he picks out, to really give him some Christmas spirit. Buddy spent so long in the store and was so intent on looking for a gift that the store closed with him inside it!

Buddy saw a sign near the front that says “Santa Tomorrow” and in excitement, he decides to decorate the whole store overnight.

name: Buddy's Christmas Adventure VI
rewardItems: 500x Large Net; 10x Mittens; 10x Christmas Sweater; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1x Hearts
description:
After a few hours Buddy is visited by none other than Vincent, just the person Buddy was looking for! Vincent offers to take Buddy home to make sure he doesn’t cause anymore trouble.

On the way home, Buddy tells Vincent about Santa Claus, but Vincent shakes his head. “Santa isn’t real, Buddy!” Before Buddy can reply, a snowball zings by the two of them, and before long, Vincent and Buddy are in the snowball fight of their life against a bunch of the town children!

name: Buddy's Christmas Adventure V
itemsRequired: 3000x Christmas Tree; 3000x Holiday Wreath; 3000x Red Ornament; 3000x Yellow Ornament; 3000x Green Ornament; 3000x Blue Ornament; 3000x Purple Ornament; 1000x Snow Globe; 1000x Snowman; 1500x Star; 25x Milk and Cookies
rewardItems: 1x Steak; 1x Cheese; 250x Apple Cider; 3x Happy Cookies; 2000x Arnold Palmer; 1x Diamonds
description:
In the morning, the store opens and Buddy is very excited to see Santa! In moments, the store is full of excited parents and children when who should arrive but someone that looks suspiciously not like Santa.

Buddy jumps in front of the line and confronts Santa-Lorn, “Who the heck are you?”
Santa-Lorn gives Buddy an odd look, “What are you talkin’ about? I’m Santa Claus!”
“No, you’re not.”

“Uh, why of course I am! Ho, ho, ho, ho, ho.”
“Well, if you're Santa, what song did I sing for you on your birthday this year? “
“Um, Happy Birthday of course.”
Buddy gives a momentary look of frustration.
“You sit on a throne of lies! You’re a fake!”
Santa-Lorn gives Buddy a look of confusion and scorn. “I’m a fake?”
“Yes! You stink! You smell like beef and cheese, you don’t smell like Santa!”
As the commotion grows louder, some of the store security drag Buddy away, and put him in the town jail.

name: Buddy's Christmas Adventure VII
rewardItems: 1000x Large Net; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 3000x Emberstone; 3000x Bone; 100x Large Chest 01; 200x Grab Bag 08
description: It was a really epic snowball fight!

name: Buddy's Christmas Adventure VIII
description:
After a victorious battle, Buddy and Vincent complete their journey home. Buddy again implores Vincent to reconsider his belief in Santa and get off the naughty list. This time, before Vincent can respond a knock comes at the door but Buddy, quick as lightning, answers. “Buddy the Thumb, what’s your favorite color?”

It’s a package of letters, but no one’s at the door. It says “To” but the rest of the address is completely illegible. Buddy decides that the best way to spread Christmas cheer is to go to the post office and figure out who this Christmas letters are for!

name: Buddy's Christmas Adventure IX
rewardItems: 20x Hot Cocoa; 20x Mug of Beer; 500x Grab Bag 04; 500x Grab Bag 05; 2000x Arnold Palmer; 3000x Milk; 3000x Orange Juice; 100x Medium Chest 01; 50x Mystical Chest 01; 300x Grab Bag 08
description:
At the post office, Buddy is shocked to find the most efficient post office he’s ever seen! One particularly knowledgeable individual offers him a cup of coffee and puts some syrup in it. “Syrup in coffee? Why didn’t I think of that!” Buddy exclaims.

It turns out Buddy is extremely good at sorting mail, and spends most of the rest of the day helping the post office catch up from the extreme volume of mail (along with a few dance breaks) in Redbrook before Buddy realizes the time and shows his friend the letter.

“Oh, these letters are for Vincent, what a grinch!”

Buddy is saddened by his new friend’s opinion of Vincent, but a sound from the other room distracts Buddy, by the time he looks back, his friend has disappeared.

name: Buddy's Christmas Adventure X
itemsRequired: 2000x Belt Drive; 2000x Energy Coil; 2000x Machine Part; 200x Flywheel
rewardItems: 1x Santa Hat; 50x Teapot; 1000x Orange Juice; 1x Bag of Presents 02; 100x Fruit Punch; 500x Gold Pea Seeds; 3000x Large Net
description:
Buddy heads back to Vincent’s house, when along the way he sees a streak, a sparkle, and suddenly Santa’s sleigh colliding in a snowbank north of town! He gasps and sprints towards the explosion of snow. When he arrives he finds Vincent already on the scene, swords at the ready.

“Whoa Vincent, this is SANTA!” Buddy cries out.

“Ho ho ho, it is me, the real Santa!” the real Santa bellylaughs!

“If you’re the real Santa, then why are Ric Ryph’s Redbrook Rangers after you?” Vincent replies skeptically.

“I put them on the naughty list and they never forgave me.” Santa looks to Vincent. “Can you both help me fix my sleigh tonight, before they find me?”

name: The Light Continues I
itemsRequired: 100x Candy Cane; 100x Candy Roll; 100x Star; 100x Twine; 200x Red Ornament; 100x Pine Tree; 100x Carbon Sphere
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 10x Gingerbread Man; 5x Fireworks
description:
As the old year passes and a new year begins, Mariya looks forward to enjoying the tradition of passing the light. This tradition originated with Mithar sharing the light of power with the guardians at the dawn of creation. To celebrate, a burning candle lit in the old year is used to light a new candle at the rising of the sun on the first day of the new year. In this way, the light of the old year is brought into the new year to help all see more clearly.

Mariya wants to make some very special candles for passing the light this year. She wants to bring in the holiday traditions of Redbrook and make them a part of the candles. Will you help her gather some traditional Redbrook holiday items to use in making her candles?

name: Buddy's Christmas Adventure XI
description:
Repairs finished, Buddy and Vincent watch Santa and his reindeer take off. Vincent looks to Buddy as you walk back into town. “The best way to spread Christmas cheer is singing loud for all to hear!”

Buddy and Vincent enter the town singing “Santa Claus is Coming to Town” at their loudest volume, and one by one, the rest of the townsfolk (minus Ric) join them.

End.

name: The Light Continues II
description: Mariya’s candles turned out perfectly. If you’re interested in celebrating passing the light with Mariya, she would love to share some of her candles with you.

name: Glacier Lake Effect I
itemsRequired: 1x Frozen Peas; 1x Frozen Cabbage; 1x Frozen Pine
rewardItems: 10x Grab Bag 07; 10x Fireworks; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Breakfast Boost
description:
A strange cold front came through recently from the north. It appeared and vanished within a few hours. After it passed, the temperature dropped swiftly and then bounced back up. The next morning, Beatrix was checking her garden and found that some of her crops froze completely solid. She gathered the crops and attempted to thaw them, but these frozen crops refused to cooperate. Beatrix tried everything she could think of to thaw them, but nothing worked. She even tried some mild explosives.

Now, the frozen crops are gone, but Beatrix is still curious about them. She needs to find more that she can examine. Will you check your fields to see if you have any?

Note: You can get some frozen crops by growing the regular version of the crop and they will drop randomly. You can also get them via Frozen Chest 01 or Frozen Chest 02, which can be obtained from trading with other players (Open at the Locksmith)

name: Glacier Lake Effect II
itemsRequired: 50x Frozen Peas; 10x Frozen Cabbage; 10x Frozen Pine
rewardItems: 2x Happy Cookies; 50x Popcorn; 10x Fruit Punch; 10x Arnold Palmer
description:
These frozen crops do not hold up well to extreme methods of heating. Will you bring Beatrix some more frozen crops, if you can find them?

Note: You can get some frozen crops by growing the regular version of the crop and they will drop randomly. You can also get them via the Winter Basket, which can be obtained from trading with other players, the 28-day Daily Chores reward, or the January Starter Pack (Open Frozen Chest 02 at the Locksmith)

name: Glacier Lake Effect III
itemsRequired: 100x Frozen Peas; 20x Frozen Cabbage; 20x Frozen Pine
rewardItems: 500x Leather; 500x Mushroom Paste; 500x Bone; 500x Corn; 100x Honey; 100x Cheese; 500x Steel Wire; 500x Green Dye; 500x Purple Dye; 500x Red Dye; 500x Blue Dye; 500x Grapes; 50x Large Chest 02; 100x Grab Bag 08; 10x Sea Pincher Special; 10x Breakfast Boost; 10x Quandary Chowder
description:
Beatrix is still experimenting with thawing the frozen crops. Nothing has worked so far. Either the crop stays frozen or it is destroyed. It’s very discouraging.

Will you find some more frozen crops for her to test?

name: Glacier Lake Effect IV
itemsRequired: 400x Frozen Peas; 40x Frozen Cabbage; 40x Frozen Pine
rewardItems: 10x Raptor Claw; 5x Langstaff Crest; 500x Large Net; 500x Arnold Palmer; 10x Corn Prize Bag; 5x Happy Cookies
description:
Beatrix has discovered a process for thawing the frozen crops without destroying them! She’s pretty sure. It only worked on the last one she tried, and there were a couple of additional variables in play. However, if you’ll help her one more time by bringing her a large load of frozen crops, she can make sure that her method works.

Beatrix appreciates your continued efforts to help with her curiosities.

name: Glacier Lake Effect V
rewardItems: 200x Frozen Peas; 20x Frozen Cabbage; 20x Frozen Pine
description: Thanks to all of your help, Beatrix figured out how to thaw the frozen crops! It was pepper juice! Anyway, she’s finished experimenting and has quite a few frozen crops left. She doesn’t want them to go to waste. Will you take them?

name: Flexible Spending I
description: You meet Cecil on a walk near the Bank of Redbrook.  His expression is ineffable as he approaches you and joins you in lockstep. “I have a proposition.  I have the ability to acquire some extremely rare artifacts, but I am a little short of liquid assets right now, how about a trade for two of the rarest?  You will have to give me half up front to make sure I know you are good for the rest.”

name: A Fool And Their Money II
description:
At his home, Cecil raises his eyebrows at you. “You really came through for me! Well, half down and I will come through on my end, I'm a cheap who keeps his promises.” Cecil immediately grabs the silver with both hands and puts it in a stash. He begins to rummage around in a bag near his belt that seems to envelop his whole arm. “Now, where was that…” Cecil looks up to see you standing there. “You are still here? I will be back, now off with you!”

As you leave, a faint sound emits from behind you, glancing quickly, you see nothing but swear you hear a ka-ching reminiscent of a cash register.

name: Money For Nothing III
description:
A knock sounds on your door. As you open the door, you find a package with what looks like a simple note on top. You pick up the note and notice nothing written on the front or the back. When you open it, Cecil’s voice emits from the very paper itself.

“I am sorry I could not deliver this in person but – HEY! PUT THAT DOWN! – I’ve been busy. You will never – NOT THE DRAPES! – find anything else quite like them.” A crash emits from the card and it suddenly bursts into flame. You throw the card as it incinerates and take the artifacts in your house. Maybe you should check on Cecil, after you display these precious artifacts of course.

name: Far Away XXIII
itemsRequired: 2000x Beet; 2000x Wheat; 2000x Acorn; 2000x Watermelon; 2000x Prickly Pear; 2000x Herbs; 2000x Tea Leaves; 2000x Corn
description: Ragvin is ready for the next load to fill his boat. He thinks three more loads should fill it after this one.

name: Far Away XXIV
itemsRequired: 1000x Belt Drive; 2000x Pear Grease; 2000x Essence of Slime; 2000x Blue Gel; 2000x Steel Plate; 500x Magna Quartz; 2000x Energy Coil; 1000x Power Monitor; 1000x Kill Switch
rewardItems: 100x Grab Bag 04; 100x Grab Bag 05; 100x Runestone 20; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 10x Fruit Punch; 10x Raptor Claw; 100x Grape Juice; 1x Langstaff Crest
description: Ragvin’s crew is working quickly. They’re ready for another load.

name: Friday the 13th I
description: Unlucky, unlucky, unlucky. frank needs your help to ward off the onslaught of bad luck from Friday the 13th. Collect all the ladders in town so he won’t accidentally walk under them, and he heard some friends say trout scales are lucky.

name: Friday the 13th II
description: frank is still worried about all the bad luck out there. Help him with some more lucky charms. Some horseshoes and clovers should keep most of it at bay, and bring a few scarabs just in case.

name: Friday the 13th III
description: Salt, frank needs salt to throw over his shoulder. And more clovers too, there’s no taking any chances on such an unlucky day.

name: Bad Dirt I
rewardItems: 1x Grape Juice; 1x Breakfast Boost; 3x Frozen Pine; 20x Pepper Seeds; 20x Cucumber Seeds; 20x Carrot Seeds; 20x Pea Seeds; 20x Eggplant Seeds
description:
Lorn acquired some special dirt that was supposed to maximize growth for planted crops. He thought he could surprise you with a small experiment on your farm. Turns out, the special dirt simply dissolves anything planted in it!

He feels really bad about it and would like to give you some items to try to make it right. Here take these!

name: Bad Dirt II
rewardItems: 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Spooky Cookies; 3x Frozen Cabbage; 1x Breakfast Boost; 10x Frozen Peas; 40x Wheat Seeds; 40x Mushroom Spores; 40x Broccoli Seeds
description: Lorn still regrets what happened and found a few more items you might find useful.

name: Bad Dirt III
rewardItems: 25x Mega Beet Seeds; 25x Mega Sunflower Seeds; 25x Orange Juice; 25x Arnold Palmer; 1x Breakfast Boost
description: Regret lingers like a bad cold. Lorn just can't seem to shake what happened and just wants you to know he's really sorry.  Maybe these items will help.

name: Far Away XXV
itemsRequired: 2000x Apple; 2000x Orange; 2000x Lemon; 2000x Grapes; 100x Peach; 2000x Watermelon; 2000x Butter; 2000x Cheese; 2000x Sweet Root; 2000x Eggs; 2000x Flour
rewardItems: 100x Large Chest 02; 200x Treasure Key; 50x Grab Bag 07
description: Ragvin’s crew is ready for the next load.

name: Far Away XXVI
itemsRequired: 2000x Large Net; 2000x Mealworms; 2000x Grubs; 2000x Gummy Worms; 2000x Minnows; 2000x Chum
description:
After talking more with Lorn, Captain Logan has decided to command the ship that Lorn leased. He wants to make sure that you all make it safely home after you find Thomas and Captain Thomas.
