Also, he doesn’t trust this Ragvin. There’s something off about his story, specifically the route he claimed to take.

Captain Logan has prepared his crews to continue their fishing operations in his absence, but he would like to make sure they have more resources than they need to keep things running smoothly while he’s gone. Will you sell Captain Logan some additional supplies for his crews?

name: Far Away XXVII
itemsRequired: 100x Dragon Skull; 25x Carved Owl; 2000x Magicite; 25x Small Flute; 2000x Moonstone; 100x Magic Conch Shell; 1000x Gold Eggplant; 1000x Gold Carrot; 1000x Gold Cucumber; 1000x Gold Peas; 1000x Gold Peppers; 100x Gold Sea Crest; 100x Frost Snapper Shell
rewardItems: 50x Grab Bag 06; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 100x Large Chest 02; 200x Treasure Key; 10x Breakfast Boost; 2000x Mushroom Paste; 50x Rubber Duckie
description: Ragvin is ready for the final load. Some of these items may seem strange, but he has a buyer looking for these very specific items. So, he will need all of them.

name: Far Away XXVIII
rewardItems: 1x Cid's Stone Ale; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Spooky Cookies
description: Once again, Ragvin thanks you for your help. You have become an absolute boon to his business. And that’s why he’d like to request that you not embark on this voyage you’ve signed onto. He’d prefer that such a valuable partner would not endanger themself on such a perilous journey. Ragvin hopes that you’ll accept this special gift and stay home.

name: Strange Companions XXI
itemsRequired: 1x Leek; 1x Amber; 50x Tea Leaves; 600x Garnet Ring; 600x Emerald Ring; 600x Shimmer Ring; 600x Wooden Plank; 600x Treasure Chest; 600x Sturdy Box
rewardItems: 500x Mystic Ring; 100x Orange Gecko; 250x Arnold Palmer; 500x Onion
description:
The night of observing Ric and Cecil, your fitful sleep is interrupted by peculiar dreams. Far off lands that look familiar but feel foreign. Always a shadow and a glint haunt your steps as you explore. A man who follows you but does not speak. A hooded figure in the distance, lights flashing before they disappear.

When you wake, the dawn has already passed and given way to a beautiful clear morning. As you open your door, a familiar figure stands up, hand on their side. Buddy gives you a lopsided smile, “Rosalie told me you were in danger before she sprinted off, she muttered something about magical infetterance and transformational diagetic conventions…something or other. Anyways, I came here as fast as I could. She kind of sounds like Star sometimes now.”

For a moment, you’re taken aback by Buddy’s tone of caring before he continues, “Anyways, Rosalie and I had a few leads and good conversations. I’m really good at getting townsfolk to talk, on account of me being so friendly! We talked to a few more townsfolk who asked to stay anonymous and we think we can identify where the shadow is going to show up next. So later today, we are gonna find that thing and win! Rosalie needs a little help with the spell she’s preparing, so meet us later today in town with this stuff!”

Before you can explain what you saw last night, Buddy bounds off.

name: Strange Companions XXII
itemsRequired: 1x Leek; 1x Amber; 50x Tea Leaves; 600x Garnet Ring; 600x Emerald Ring; 600x Shimmer Ring; 600x Wooden Plank; 600x Treasure Chest; 600x Sturdy Box
description:
You’ve brought what Buddy requests into town. Halfway to town, Charles joins you whinnying persistently, but seems to have forgotten you don’t have the ring you normally have. You’ve no idea what he is trying to communicate with you, but it’s probably not important. Rosalie’s home is empty when you get into town as Charles stamps impatiently behind you. There’s no note or markings outside her home, so you decide it might be best to keep searching around town. On your way towards Beatrix’s house, you stumble across Ric Ryph, who is inspecting some of the town's defenses.

“Ah yes, good to see you!” Ric’s cheer is evident from behind his helmet, “I want to thank you for some of your donations during these trying times, and remind you that we’re all doing our part to make Redbrook safer than it has ever been, and you’re a big part of that!” He lowers his voice so only you can hear, “Just don’t get too involved in things you have no business being a part of, alright? I like you well enough but any friend of a dragon is not a friend of mine…” As Ric stands back up again, you can see his attention move towards the items you planned on giving to Rosalie, “And these items, thank you for the donation to the town, you continue to be one of my greatest supporters!”

Right before you can respond, you notice a peculiar glimmer and a shadow around the next corner and you excuse yourself quickly as Ric hands you a paper receipt.

name: Strange Companions XXIII
itemsRequired: 500x Orange Gecko; 5x Carved Rhino; 600x Garnet Ring; 5x Dragon Skull; 500x Blue Feathers; 500x 4-leaf Clover; 500x Cyclops Spider
description:
You race down the sidestreet, the strange glimmer stuck in your mind’s eye. Cecil? The connections run through your brain in an instant, connecting the two images. You come to a back alley but something feels very wrong about this situation. You step forward only to find your foot mired in a substance black as the night. The shadow is here. The thought enters your mind as despair courses through your entire body. You’re not prepared. You’re not ready.

The shadow begins to creep up your legs and your mind is filled with images of spite and hatred. Dragons dying. Spells you don’t understand explode around you, and hideous laughter, a smile you can’t quite place.

“VENTAS LUX PROVIA!”


A cascade of light envelops you and the Shadow recoils immediately.

You recognize the familiar faces of Rosalie, Beatrix, and Buddy momentarily before taking in your surroundings. Rising to your feet, you turn towards the Shadow. To your left, Buddy draws his sword looking past you and Beatrix widens her stance slightly, her eyes dilating in a strange pattern.

Glancing to your right, a wide-eyed Rosalie looks to you, one hand reaching out to you, in the other a staff gleaming bright white, yet emitting the colors of the rainbow.

“Quick! The materials!”

name: Strange Companions XXIV
itemsRequired: 50x Cutlass; 1x Mystical Staff; 600x Lemon Quartz Ring; 500x Wooden Shield; 500x Sturdy Sword
description:
As Rosalie stands, another silhouette appears from behind the Shadow. The staff you recognize from last night appears from underneath the cloaked figure’s robe as a voice calls out.

“Put your staff away, Rosalie. Do you not realize who you face? Senca the Meticulous. Skugga the Inexorable. Yes, I know who you are, Trickster.”

Cecil steps forward, his cloak billowing out behind him as he slams his staff to the ground. The impact of his staff echoes like a thunderclap in a spring storm. The sound stuns you, and the crystal on the staff emits an iridescent white light that focuses into a tight beam aimed at the center of the Shadow.

"Ah, lowly mage, come back for another tussle with gifts undeserved and changed? You delay…nothing…"
The words echo in your mind unlike anything you’ve ever experienced. As the voice speaks, the Shadow grows and coalesces, a barrier of pure black meets the light from Cecil.

Determination evident on Cecil’s face, he levels his staff at the shadow and the beam of light grows more intense. Pressure builds in the area around you, power beyond what you can see but rather feel gathers between the two figures, the light intensifies and shadows play across Cecil's face in a dizzying array of color. The air crackles around the two as cracks appear on the barrier of black and light begins to pierce the Shadow itself. Moments later, the Shadow disperses in a brilliant explosion of color. Silence reigns.

Before anyone can speak, Cecil sweeps his staff in a circle and as Rosalie tries to speak, no words come out of her mouth. Buddy crosses his eyes in confusion as his mouth moves for a moment with no discernable sound before Cecil addresses the assembled members of the Golden Leaf.

“You have meddled far too much in something you do not understand, fools! Only a student of Meerif would do something so reckless and foolish. From this moment forward, you will put your heads down and ensure this town’s safety. I know your secrets, and I won’t let you interfere any longer.” He pauses, looking at each of you for a moment with unnerving intensity. “Were I a dragon, or a sorceress out of her league, or even a wanted pirate, I certainly would not wish to let my secrets be known to a certain town mayor. I trust we can all agree? Now, leave these pathetic weapons behind, you have no need of them anymore.”

name: Strange Companions XXV
itemsRequired: 50x Apple Cider; 500x Eggs; 500x Sour Root; 50x Orange Juice; 500x Milk; 50x Butter; 500x Wheat; 500x Sunflower; 5x Carved Warthog
description:
“As an added gesture, I forbid you from discussing this matter further until I deem it so.”

Cecil waves his staff, muttering something incoherent and instantly, you feel the inability to grasp thoughts about this evening or the…incident? Was it food you came on this trip for? You can’t quite remember what it was you were doing.

“All of you go home and have a nice rest, all will be better in the morning. Charles, I expect you won’t be at my home seeing your…friend later?”

All of you part ways in a daze, the events of the past few days feel hazier and hazier. Maybe Cecil is right and a good night’s sleep will clear you right up. You head back to your home in a fog.

When you arrive a note is already on your door. You are a little tired of getting notes on your door, but can’t remember why.

“I summon the Golden Leaf to my home tomorrow morning.

Beatrix”

name: Strange Companions XXVI
itemsRequired: 50x Orange Juice; 500x Sunflower; 500x Iced Tea; 500x Lemonade
description:
Morning comes, and once you’ve accomplished your morning chores, you run into Charles on the way to Beatrix’s home. He gives you a polite neigh and you realize you don’t have your Ring of Renthisj. How peculiar, you think to yourself. You don’t remember leaving it at home.

The walk to Beatrix’s house takes almost no time at all. You can’t quite remember the last time you were there, but it’s a lovely house. Charles whinnies at you as you stop to admire her home and briefly wonder what he’s on about.

Beatrix welcomes you to her home, and she indicates Charles can walk around to the back. Stepping through Beatrix’s home, its precisely placed ornamentation sticks out to you like never before. The precision is both jarring and peaceful. Relics you didn’t know exist line her walls, but as you’re ready to ask about them, you find yourself on the porch, Lorn and Rosalie already sitting in chairs. No Cecil though, how peculiar. You think to yourself.

Rosalie gives you an odd look as Beatrix speaks to the assembled group, “Refreshments, anyone?”

name: Strange Companions XXVII
itemsRequired: 500x Explosive; 500x Amethyst Necklace; 500x Steak; 600x Crab Claw; 500x Steak Kabob; 500x Spoon; 500x Tea Leaves; 500x Iced Tea; 50x Bell
rewardItems: 500x Gold Cucumber Seeds; 500x Gold Eggplant Seeds; 500x Large Net; 5x Cat's Meow
description:
Lorn and Rosalie engage in a lively debate about water speeds of various fish during the first parts of their refreshments, but Beatrix looks at the group with a growing intensity. Charles has taken up a position right off the porch and has been very quiet.

“My dear Rosalie, there is simply no way a pond trout could outswim a river trout. Clearly you’re unfamiliar with the patterns of the northern fjord trout…in my younger days I even - “

At this moment, Beatrix slams her drink on the table, a disgusted look on her face. All drinks go flying as everyone looks at Beatrix in bewilderment. “Beatrix! Explain yourself!” Lorn’s face is twisted up in an angry look you’re confident is typically reserved for particularly bad Buddy pranks.

“Golden Leaf! Are you content to whittle the days of your life away knowing what we know of Cecil? The shadow? Are you all content to move on with life knowing something is *out there* threatening our lives? To say nothing of Cecil threatening to expose Geist to Ric?” You can feel the heat in the air as Beatrix’s indignation rises. “We must act!!”

Beatrix seems ready to burst before she sees the clear confusion on the faces of the rest of the group. She pauses a moment, “Oh? Oh. He didn’t. Yes, this is beyond me, if we must. For the Leaf.”

Beatrix calmly steps away from the group, “We will need you all to go inside for a moment, come back outside in about 5 minutes. Charles, please keep watch at the front of the house. We’ll be hungry when you get back.”

name: Strange Companions XXVIII
itemsRequired: 500x Lemon Quartz Ring; 500x Lemon Quartz; 1x Lantern
description:
Before long, you all step back outside and before you is what you can only believe to be a dragon. Geist dwarfs her home, more majestic than a mountain. As she lowers her head to address you, flame crackles from her nose and a different fire burns in her eyes that can only be described as sheer intelligent determination. A single ring hangs off a chain on her neck. As Charles steps back, you see his ears pin back, a wild terror gleams in his eyes and for a moment, he stands still, before bolting past Geist and towards the town proper.

“It is clear by your countenance that you do not remember the events of the past few days. Let me remind you. Do not worry about Charles, I should have considered seeing a dragon might affect him, he will return soon, I’m sure.”

You all stand for a moment, struck by Geist’s majesty. She first meets Rosalie’s gaze, then Lorn, and finally her eyes rest on you. For a moment, you are dumbfounded, transfixed by the sheer otherworldly nature of a dragon in the flesh. You feel yourself get lost in Geist’s eyes, a swirling vortex of fire, time and yet something deep in her eyes hypnotizes you when suddenly like a shattered mirror, your memory of the past few days snaps into focus, like a bad dream made reality you stumble backwards only to see your comrades all gasping for air.

“Cecil’s magic is strong, but he is simply a novice. Please, step inside again for a few moments and we will decide what course of action is appropriate.”

name: Strange Companions XXIX
itemsRequired: 500x Green Cloak; 500x Old Boot; 500x Sturdy Bow; 500x Wooden Shield; 500x Wooden Sword; 500x Sturdy Sword
rewardItems: 50x Large Chest 03; 50x Large Chest 02; 50x Small Chest 02
description:
“First, I’m sorry I wasn’t able to recognize and stop Cecil’s mind wipe. I do not have the…aptitude Geist has for recognizing magical influences. Perhaps our first order of business is discussing with Cecil why he would use magic on members of the Golden Leaf?”

You all agree this is a good first step, and set out towards Cecil’s home together.

Buddy suggests you cut through the middle of town, so he can stop and grab lunch at Mariya’s. As you round the corner, you all realize that there has been no one on the streets to greet you. In the town square, a figure in armor stands addressing a sizable crowd.

“Our town will not be safe until this dragon is brought to heel. Your families, your friends, your livestock, they can never feel true security! We must bring Beatrix to justice for the terror she has reigned upon this town! Are you with me?”

Beatrix quickly moves, wide-eyed behind Buddy attempting to hide herself, but it’s too late. You hear cries of “There she is! The evil dragon!”

Ric turns abruptly towards you and your friends and realizing there’s no quick way out of this, you all set yourself up for a confrontation with Ric Ryph.

name: Strange Companions XXX
itemsRequired: 50x Cutlass; 500x Cotton; 500x Green Cloak; 500x Old Boot; 2x Backstabbing Dagger; 500x Sturdy Bow; 500x Wooden Bow
description:
Ric slowly removes his helmet, and for the first time, you see more than his scheming eyes. A wicked smile spreads across his face, a host of townspeople gathered behind him in anticipation. Beatrix stands before the assembled crowd - "He's fooled you! He killed the mayor! He sent many of you to work camps! He’s the enemy! A Shadow has sent him against us!"

Ric lets out a laugh, it echoes through the streets, a hollow laugh that never touches his eyes. "Oh my dear, but you forget, you are the monster here, and the town, they want revenge. And safety. Safety only a dragon hunter can provide.”

As he is speaking, Ric takes slow deliberate steps towards Beatrix, and before you can blink, Ric darts forward, a glint of steel as a dagger appears in his hand as he stabs Beatrix in the stomach.

The townsfolk break into a raucous cheer.

Time slows.

Beatrix crumples.

Lorn gasps.

Rosalie cries out.

Buddy draws his sword.

The mob spills towards you.

A shadow grows in the window.

One word echoes above all the others.

“RUN!”

name: Breaking The Ice I
description: Captain Logan heard a tale about your experience at Glacier Lake. He also heard about the fish you have caught there. All of it sounds amazing, and he would love to start fishing there too. The market for these exotic fish could be incredible! Unfortunately, Captain Logan doesn’t have a great way of getting a ship into those waters. For now, could you provide him some of the fish from your hauls to help get the market for these fish going, while he works on getting his operation set up?

name: Breaking The Ice II
rewardItems: 5x Sea Pincher Special; 50x Gold Eggplant Seeds
description: Captain Logan would love to get two more loads of the fish you caught for him, and then he’d like for you to bring him two loads of any new fish you can find. There is a lot of interest building for these Glacier Lake fish.

name: Banana Stand II
rewardItems: 4000x Gold Feather; 4000x Arnold Palmer; 10x Borgen Bag 01; 2x 100 Gold
description: Holger wants in on the banana stand.  He found some strange bags in the walls he'll trade you.

name: Breaking The Ice III
description: Captain Logan is ready for the next load at your earliest convenience.

name: Breaking The Ice IV
itemsRequired: 500x Sea Crest; 500x Seeker; 500x Stone Jelly; 500x Ice Shark
description: If you’ve found any new and exciting fish in your nets, Captain Logan is ready to bring them to market.

name: Breaking The Ice V
itemsRequired: 500x Sea Crest; 500x Seeker; 500x Stone Jelly; 500x Ice Shark
description: Captain Logan would love another load of the more rare fish that you caught. Everyone is fascinated by these strange fish.

name: Breaking The Ice VI
description:
The market is loving Glacier Lake fish! Your help was absolutely essential to getting this market growing and it was very much appreciated.

Now, Captain Logan’s crew is making good progress at fishing Glacier Lake on their own. Unfortunately, there is a strange shell that continues to elude their nets. The crew has encountered these shells several times, but they can’t haul one in.

Will you try your nets at hauling in a load of these shells for Captain Logan?

name: Breaking The Ice Even Icier IV
description: Captain Logan would love to get his hands on a huge load of Gold Sea Crests. If you’re interested, he’s willing to pay handsomely for them.

name: Breaking The Ice Even Icier I
itemsRequired: 100x Large Net; 1000x Chum; 1000x Grubs; 1000x Gummy Worms; 1000x Mealworms; 1000x Minnows; 1000x Worms
rewardItems: 25x Grab Bag 07; 25x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Mushroom Paste
description: Many of Captain Logan’s regular net suppliers are still nervous about traveling up to Glacier Lake, even though he assured them that it’s perfectly safe now. Will you help Captain Logan supply his crew with nets?

name: Breaking The Ice Even Icier II
itemsRequired: 3000x Large Net; 3000x Chum; 3000x Grubs; 3000x Mealworms; 3000x Gummy Worms; 3000x Minnows; 3000x Worms
rewardItems: 50x Grab Bag 07; 100x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Rice; 1000x Peas
description: The fish of Glacier Lake are a tough lot, and Captain Logan is still struggling to get a reliable supplier of nets and bait. Will you help him out again with supplying his crew?

name: Breaking The Ice Even Icier III
itemsRequired: 4400x Large Net; 4400x Chum; 4400x Grubs; 4400x Gummy Worms; 4400x Mealworms; 4400x Minnows; 4400x Worms
rewardItems: 100x Grab Bag 07; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 2000x Onion; 2000x Carrot; 4400x Fish Bones
description: Captain Logan has found a permanent net and bait supplier, but they are just starting production. Will you bring Captain Logan’s crew a huge load of supplies to hold them over while the new supplier gets moving?

name: A Study of Color VII
itemsRequired: 150x Aquamarine; 3x Moonstone; 75x Glass Orb; 50x Blue Catfish; 30x Blue Sea Bass; 20x Jellyfish; 30x Stingray
description:
George has learned so much about colors thanks to the various items you brought him.  However, as an artist, there is always more to study and learn.  This time, he needs quite a few of each item in the same series of color to compare the slight difference between them.  This will help him understand color shades and palettes.

The first color he would like to study is Blue.  Can you bring him the items?

name: A Study of Color VIII
itemsRequired: 25x Amethyst Necklace; 250x Grapes; 20x Purple Diary; 75x Purple Flower; 25x Purple Parchment; 2x Spiked Shell; 10x Wizard Hat; 10x Octopus; 100x Eggplant
description: George thanks you for the items and feels that he has learned so much.  However, he would like to start learning more about the color Purple.  Can you bring the items?

name: A Study of Color IX
itemsRequired: 10x Cheese; 25x Gold Feather; 25x Gold Leaf; 25x Honey; 100x Lemon; 250x Lemon Quartz; 50x Seahorse; 250x Yellow Perch; 100x Corn; 5x Gold Peppers; 25x Wheat
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 100x Lemonade; 100x Carbon Sphere; 100x Mushroom Paste
description: Thank you for continuing to help George understand color.  The next color is Yellow.  If you can bring the items listed, George will be very appreciative.

name: A Study of Color X
itemsRequired: 250x 3-leaf Clover; 100x 4-leaf Clover; 200x Emerald; 250x Fern Leaf; 10x Frog; 50x Green Scarf; 150x Jade; 150x Shimmer Topaz; 150x Green Chromis; 50x Broccoli; 50x Cabbage; 250x Cucumber; 250x Peas; 25x Pine Tree; 25x Watermelon
rewardItems: 250x Milk; 10x Orange Gecko; 10x Spiked Shell; 10x Large Net; 3x Magna Quartz; 100x Lemonade
description: The next color is a doozy.  Green!   Being farmers and all, George assumes you've got a lot of Green objects he could study closely.  Could you help him again?

name: BFF <3 I
rewardItems: 5x Arnold Palmer; 1x Bouquet of Roses; 1x Lovely Cookies
description: Roses are red…

name: BFF <3 II
description: Violets are blue…

name: BFF <3 III
description: Somebody loves you…

name: BFF <3 IV
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 10x Grab Bag 07; 1x Bouquet of Roses; 1x Lovely Cookies
description: You’ll never guess who!

name: Guess Who I
description: Did you figure it out?

name: Guess Who II
description: Do you need a clue?

name: Guess Who III
description: Fine. Here comes a clue…

name: Guess Who IV
rewardItems: 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Large Net; 10x Fruit Punch; 5x Lovely Cookies
description: It’s me! Buddy! I love you, {player}!

name: A Study of Color XI
itemsRequired: 100x Apple; 10x Pirate Bandana; 250x Ruby; 250x Ruby Scorpion; 50x Giant Squid; 250x Peppers; 250x Tomato; 100x Striped Feather
rewardItems: 50x Flywheel; 10x Unpolished Jade; 100x Mushroom Paste; 100x Apple Cider
description: George thanks you again for all the help you have provided.  As you know, there are many colors left, so once again he is asking for help.  The next color is Red, can you bring the following items?

name: A Study of Color XII
itemsRequired: 500x Acorn; 500x Antler; 500x Board; 500x Wood; 500x Bottle Rocket; 500x Broom; 500x Coin Purse; 500x Explosive; 500x Hide; 500x Leather; 500x Mushroom Paste
rewardItems: 99x Arnold Palmer; 99x Apple Cider; 99x Large Net
description: Yes!  George is excited because he feels like his color skills have reached a new level.  He would like to study the color Brown now.  Can you bring the items?

name: A Study of Color XIII
itemsRequired: 100x Wooden Barrel; 100x Board; 500x Blue Catfish; 500x Blue Crab; 500x Blue Dye; 500x Blue Feathers; 500x Blue Gel; 500x Aquamarine
description:
George feels very confident in his color skills and artistic ability. Perhaps there's an opportunity here to use his new found knowledge to make a little side hustle. George would like to try to mix up his own new paint brand to sell to the other townsfolk. Can you help him?

George is going to focus on one color again at a time for the paints as well as a few items to help him mix the paints to be sold. The first color is Blue.

name: A Study of Color XIV
itemsRequired: 100x Wooden Barrel; 100x Board; 1000x Purple Bag; 1000x Purple Butterfly Fish; 1000x Purple Diary; 1000x Purple Flower; 1000x Grapes
rewardItems: 100x Large Net; 100x Apple Cider; 10x Orange Gecko; 10x Gold Flier
description: The first batch of paint has been mixed and stored in the barrels you brought George.  George is hopeful they will be popular and sell well.  He would like to get another paint color ready now.  The color is Purple.  Can you bring the items?

name: Strange Companions XXXI
itemsRequired: 600x Sturdy Sword; 600x Wooden Sword; 600x Sturdy Shield; 10x Raptor Claw
description:
The sound of steel striking steel rings above the riotous chorus of the crowd and Vincent stands, sword crossed with Ric’s dagger, glinting in the sun. Ric’s face is a mix of rapturous glee and determination as the two begin to fight in earnest, trading blows in a display of skill you can’t help but admire for a moment.

Vincent, sweat appearing on his brow looks to you, “What are you doing {player}, get out of here! Buddy, keep them safe!”

Gathering your wits, you see the mob descend upon the rest of the Golden Leaf. Helplessly, you heed the words of Vincent and make your way through the pack as Buddy flanks you with a sword drawn.

name: Strange Companions XXXII
itemsRequired: 600x Green Cloak; 10x Carved Owl; 600x Wizard Hat; 600x Ruby Scorpion
rewardItems: 200x Arnold Palmer; 200x Small Screw; 50x Grape Juice
description:
“This. Is. My. Friend.” Each word punctuated by a swing of his sword, the steely warning in his voice and actions seem to hold back the crowd. As the mob parts, you glance behind to see all of your friends kneeling before Ric Ryph, restrained.

“The dragon is wounded, her compatriots are captured and will be sent to camp to serve the town until they have shown their contrition! A victory for Redbrook! Our town will be safe once again!”

Inching towards the back of the crowd, you can feel the nerves and frenzy building. As you break past the edge of the crowd, Buddy grabs you by the shirt and shoves you into an alleyway.

A figure stands, cloaked and imposing in front of you both, and you prepare for them to call out for the mob. A moment passes with no noise and you take a second harder look at the figure. Cecil stands before you both, leaning heavily on his staff, worry creases his features, which turn to relief as he sees you and Buddy.

The cheers of the crowd echo down the alleyway, a stark reminder of the events of the morning as you make haste out of the town into the wilderness beyond, Buddy and Cecil flanking you.

name: Strange Companions XXXIII
itemsRequired: 600x Gold Feather; 600x Gold Catfish; 600x Gold Peppers; 600x Corn; 150x Corn Oil
description:
Panting, legs burning, feet weary, you stop in the forest outcropping near your farm, furtively glancing around you for any sign of followers. Cecil pulls his staff from underneath his cloak and as he strikes the ground you hear his voice utter something unintelligible and the peculiar gem lights the area, a pulsating glow that casts away shadows.

“We are safe for the moment, but I fear the citizens of the town may be too far under Ric’s influence that they might come for us any moment. We need to get Beatrix some healing, and we need a safe place to gather our thoughts and move forward.”

Buddy spins around, sword pointed at Cecil, “You are not our friend, you wiped our memories! Very un-friend-like. Why should we trust you?”

Cecil, ignoring Buddy's aggressive stance gives a weary sigh, “You’re right Buddy, I’ve made some mistakes, and I'm sorry for that. Right now, you and I are the only ones who can save the Golden Leaf, so you’re just going to have to trust in me for now. All will become clear in due time.”

Buddy nods thoughtfully, “You sound like Star, but less confusing silly words, still mysterious though. Like I always say, 'Better to have too many friends than too few.'" Buddy pauses and gives you a look, "Guess we'll have to trust Cecil for now. And the best place for friends and trust is my house."

Cecil nods to you and Buddy. “Well, we could walk there, or there are…faster ways. Got any gold feathers?”

Wizards. Wizards never change, it seems.

name: Strange Companions XXXIV
itemsRequired: 600x Rope; 15x Carved Warthog; 5x Strange Ring; 600x 4-leaf Clover; 600x Gold Feather
description:
Cecil gathers the materials before himself and there’s an odd hum in the air as he raises his staff. Gold glows around him and the world begins to shimmer. A moment of discomfort and flashing lights later, you arrive in a familiar cave. Adorned with treasure chests and pirate coins, Buddy’s home seems a welcome respite from the chaos of the moment.

“Beatrix will need a piece of heart. I’ve not seen a wound like that in a while, but with a spell, we can make sure she will survive. Ric will want to make a grand gesture of it all, so we will have a day before he does anything too rash with her or the others, I hope.”

I’m going to need to save all my energy for teleportation, so I’ll need both your help with some of the more - “ Cecil looks to you tiredly, “- logistical and tangible details. Buddy, could you find out where Vincent and the others were taken?” Buddy looks eagerly at Cecil, “A chance to find another friend? Consider it done. I’ll just need a few…things.”

name: Strange Companions XXXV
itemsRequired: 600x Bottle Rocket; 600x Explosive; 600x Eggs; 600x Bird Egg; 600x Watermelon; 600x Eggplant; 600x Beet; 600x Trout; 60x Orange Gecko
rewardItems: 600x Lemonade; 600x Carbon Sphere; 300x Apple Cider; 10x Peach Juice
description:
A few hours later, you return to hear echoes of a conversation further into Buddy’s cave.

“...and that wasn’t even the first time he’d gotten himself in trouble! Ragvin was a great first mate, but he ran his mouth one too many times in a Sinoan port. Had to organize a jailbreak and everything. Of course, by the time we got there, he’d already nearly won his freedom playing cards with the guards! What a friend and mate…”

“...was this the prison in Celtrica?”

“Yeah! How would you know that?”

“Well, funny story, you see, before I settled here in Redbrook, I did a shameful stint as a court wizard and jester for Jamire.”

“Wait, that was you who did the fireworks in 1342?”

“Well, I had some help…”

You step into the room and see the two smiling and conversing, before you can ask them to keep going Cecil turns to you as if he knew you were in the room.

“It’s time to start this then. Buddy quickly found that our friends are being held in a newly made jail cell just off of the Town Hall. Luckily, our friend here seems to have some experience with jailbreaks. We’ll have to be quick about it though.”

Cecil details a plan involving explosives, fireworks, and some ideas that seem very Buddy inspired.

“I have everything I need to teleport our friends to safety when the moment comes, but the setup will all be on you two. We should all rest, we begin at nightfall.”

“And it will be called, operation nightfall!” Buddy chimes in.

name: Strange Companions XXXVI
itemsRequired: 600x Rope; 600x Power Monitor; 600x Explosive; 600x Bottle Rocket; 600x Grapes; 600x Green Cloak
rewardItems: 10x Sea Pincher Special; 600x Ancient Coin; 1x Fancy Pipe; 50x Large Chest 02
description:
As a chilly night falls, you follow Buddy into town. It’s a circuitous path, through areas you haven't considered as a way to get into town. The walls Ric constructed seem particularly ineffective, when considering some of the gaps and areas of weakness Buddy seems to have naturally exploited.

Buddy quickly and efficiently distributes the various distraction tools and sets timers for the morning hours. You follow behind closely, amazed at his deft movements and quick thinking - he’s clearly done this before, and you make a personal note to talk to Buddy more about his adventures later.

About halfway through placing the eggs, Buddy’s hand goes up and you both stop immediately. In the distance, you see a figure holding a torch in one hand, a lantern clipped to their hip, light glinting off their steel armor as they walk slowly and methodically. You watch Ric Ryph slowly patrolling towards the bush you and Buddy are both hidden behind.

name: King of Cakes I
itemsRequired: 1000x Flour; 1000x Sweet Root; 1000x Honey; 1000x Salt; 1000x Butter; 1000x Milk; 1000x Eggs
rewardItems: 1000x Grapes; 1000x Green Dye; 1000x Gold Carrot Seeds; 100x Grab Bag 07
description: Mariya wants to make a table filled with very special cakes for the end of the parade. She has most of the ingredients that she needs to get started, but she’s going to need much more than what she has on hand to make enough for everyone. Will you help gather what she needs?

name: King of Cakes II
rewardItems: 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Large Net; 2x Lovely Cookies; 10x Fruit Punch; 100x Popcorn
description: Mariya is ready to make icing for all of the cakes she made. She has all the ingredients she needs, except for some items to make natural dyes. Will you help bring her these items so she can color the icing?

name: King of Cakes III
description: In appreciation for all your help, Mariya made one of the cakes just for you!

name: Far Away XXIX
itemsRequired: 2000x Blue Sea Bass; 2000x Fluorifish; 2000x Green Jellyfish; 2000x Jellyfish; 2000x Marlin; 2000x Mackerel; 2000x Ruby Fish; 2000x Shrimp; 2000x Skipjack; 2000x Stingray; 2000x Octopus; 2000x Giant Squid
rewardItems: 1x Breakfast Boost; 1x Sea Pincher Special; 1x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 25x Arnold Palmer
description:
The Voyage Log for the Captain of the Two Fishers
Day 144 of Leaf 84 of Branch 1342

I, Captain Logan, have taken command of the Two Fishers to lead a chartered voyage to a remote island far to the east. The Two Fishers regular commander, Lieutenant Lizotte, will be commanding the Zefurea in my absence.

In addition to the Two Fishers’ regular crew, we have aboard the following passengers.

Lorn, of Redbrook
George, of Redbrook
Mariya, of Redbrook
{player}, of Redbrook

I have requested that each passenger volunteer to assist with the labors associated with such a long voyage. For the first leg of the trip, Lorn will be assisting with keeping our vessel tidy, George and {player} have volunteered to help with fishing, and Mariya volunteered to assist with meals. With this additional help, we should be able to comfortably make this voyage and still keep up with the vessel guiding us, a merchant ship called Balstar, commanded by Captain Ragvin.

Evening update:
Mariya is a welcome addition to our regular cook. We enjoyed three hearty and delicious meals today. The crew was quite pleased.

George and {player} helped catch a record haul for this vessel! That farmer sure can fish!

Lorn is doing a fine job of keeping the ship tidy, but some of the crew have complained already that he is a bit too zealous. I’ll encourage Lorn to go a little easier on them.

name: Blooming Thaw Already I
description: Borgen is looking for an assortment of wildflowers for a customer. Unfortunately, the cold weather seems to be delaying the normal blooms he finds this time of year. If you happen to find any flowers, especially blue flowers, Borgen would be happy to trade you for some useful goods.

name: Blooming Thaw Already II
description: The blue flowers were perfect! If you find any more, Borgen is looking for white flowers now.

name: Blooming Thaw Already III
description: If you happen to find any orange flowers, Borgen is ready to trade for them.

name: Blooming Thaw Already IV
description: Since the weather is still too cold for the flowers to bloom in the wild, Borgen sent off for some flower seeds to grow on his own. They arrived today. However, Borgen doesn’t want to wait for the flowers to grow now. It will be much quicker if you continue to help him. Will you go ahead and bring more flowers? Borgen is ready for yellow flowers now.

name: Blooming Thaw Already V
description: Perfect! Borgen only needs red flowers to complete the order. Will you bring him red flowers?

name: Blooming Thaw Already VI
description: Borgen appreciates your help finishing the flower order up so quickly. As a token of his gratitude, he’d like to give you the seeds he ordered. He also wouldn’t mind if you kept a few flowers ready to go for future orders, if it’s not too much trouble.

name: Friends With Charles I
description: Neigh! Neigh. Neigh neigh neigh.

name: Strange Companions XXXVII
rewardItems: 20x Teapot; 1x Control Box; 1x Transistor; 50x Large Chest 01
description:
Ric’s methodical pace gives you the impression that it’s an inevitability that he will find your hiding place. Looking at Buddy, he shoots you back a look of mixed concern and confidence. Suddenly, he shrugs his shoulders and whispers, “Sorry, not sorry, {player}.”

Buddy reveals a diamond the size of a small coin in his other hand and with a quick graceful gesture he throws the diamond and it strikes Ric’s torch, knocking it from his hand. Darkness envelops the area as Ric exclaims, “Hey! Who dares!?”

Buddy pulls you to your feet and gestures to you to run towards the middle of town. He straightens up and emits a booming laugh followed by a sing-song taunt. “Whoever it is, I’m not your frieeeeend!”

As you take off towards the town center, you look behind you to glimpse Buddy in full stride heading the opposite direction he pointed you in, a figure in metallic armor chasing after him.

name: Quarter Million I
rewardItems: 10x Orange Juice; 10x Fishing Net; 10x Lemonade; 2x Apple Cider; 1x Breakfast Boost
description:
Holy smokes! Redbrook just continues to grow. A recent census survey was completed and it looks like the population has surpassed 250,000 residents! That's a lot of farmers.

To celebrate, we are giving out some useful items and resources to everybody! So here, take these!

name: Quarter Million II
rewardItems: 50x Orange Juice; 5x Apple Cider; 3x Onion Soup; 3x Large Net; 3x Arnold Palmer
description: Here are some more goodies for you since you've been a resident of Redbrook for a bit.

name: Quarter Million III
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 10x Apple Cider; 10x Large Net; 2x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 2x Mushroom Stew
description: And here are even more things for our experienced farmers!  Thank you for all you do around here!

name: Quarter Million IV
rewardItems: 5x Quandary Chowder; 5x Sea Pincher Special; 1x Lovely Cookies; 3x Breakfast Boost
description: So you've made it to the Tower?  Well, maybe these items will be useful as you continue to climb it.

name: Quarter Million V
rewardItems: 10x Honey; 1x Raptor Claw; 15x Gold Sea Crest; 100x Salt; 10x Cheese
description: Wow, you are way up there!  Maybe these items will be of some use.

name: Quarter Million VI
rewardItems: 1x Buddystone; 5x Popcorn; 10x Unpolished Jade; 1x Langstaff Crest; 1x Diamonds
description: We are blown away at your progress and what you've done for the community of Redbrook.  As a token of thanks, take these items!

name: Tales From The Great Logs I
description:
“I APPRECIATE YOUR FRIENDSHIP. IF YOU LIKE, I WILL TELL YOU A STORY FROM THE GREAT LOGS OF ROMUSKA TO IMPROVE OUR FRIENDSHIP. SWITCHING TO STORY TELLING MODE…”

“Moonstones are not entirely of this planet. The Great Logs tell of several legends, collected from different parts of T’rah, that claims that the majority of their composition originated on the moon. The legends state that during a moon in the first quarter phase, many, many years ago, a vast rainstorm created a series of puddles of great size and scope. When the clouds cleared and the moon reached its zenith in the sky, a gateway was opened that transferred huge heaps of moon matter to the planet. This matter reacted with the rainwater and soil and stones to create enormous mounds of moonstones.

Scientists from Romuska attempted to observe and verify this phenomena over many years. Only once did a moonstone appear in an observed puddle during a first quarter moon after a rainstorm. No abnormalities were discovered that differentiated that night or that puddle. The claim of these legends was left unverified with the collapse of Romuska.”

name: Far Away XXX
itemsRequired: 2000x Blue Sea Bass; 2000x Fluorifish; 2000x Green Jellyfish; 2000x Jellyfish; 2000x Marlin; 2000x Mackerel; 2000x Ruby Fish; 2000x Shrimp; 2000x Skipjack; 2000x Stingray; 2000x Octopus; 2000x Giant Squid; 1000x Sea Dragon
rewardItems: 1x Breakfast Boost; 1x Over The Moon; 1x Mushroom Stew; 25x Apple Cider; 10x Mega Cotton Seeds
description:
The Voyage Log for the Captain of the Two Fishers
Day 145 of Leaf 84 of Branch 1342

Overnight update:
The night crew reported that everything ran smoothly and the Balstar kept their lights glowing throughout the dark hours. Navigation was easy and all systems functioned properly. Then, the rest, and the bulk, of their report focused on appreciation for Mariya’s thoughtful, and apparently quite delicious, meals. The food was a significant step up from the usual leftovers of the day. I need to thank Mariya at breakfast this morning.

Midday update:
We are still following the Balstar closely, and we’re on schedule to reach Nonir Island within four days. Our passengers have expressed their hopes that they might get to see some of the famous turtles of Nonir, but I reminded them that the turtles typically inhabit the opposite side of the island from where we’ll be docking. Nevertheless, if we have time I would like to try to get them within sight of the turtles.

Evening update:
Once again, George and {player} have pulled in an incredible haul! It is a sight to behold these two pulling in net after net brimming with fish. It is tempting to offer them both a job when we return home. If the fishing continues at this pace, our preservation hold will be completely full well in advance of our arrival at Nonir Island.

name: Far Away XXXI
itemsRequired: 2000x Blue Sea Bass; 2000x Fluorifish; 2000x Green Jellyfish; 2000x Jellyfish; 2000x Marlin; 2000x Mackerel; 2000x Ruby Fish; 2000x Shrimp; 2000x Skipjack; 2000x Stingray; 2000x Octopus; 2000x Giant Squid; 1000x Sea Dragon; 500x Goldjack
rewardItems: 10x Carved Bear; 100x Arnold Palmer; 1x Hearts; 1x Clubs
description:
The Voyage Log for the Captain of the Two Fishers
Day 146 of Leaf 84 of Branch 1342

Overnight update:
Mariya’s meals for the overnight crew were once again the main topic of their report. When I reported this praise and gave my thanks to Mariya, she seemed surprised, but she graciously accepted the praise and gratitude. She then shooed me out of the galley so she and Mr. Ecsil could get back to work.

The overnight crew also mentioned that their regular chores are easier than usual with Lorn still leading the cleaning efforts. I may need to speak to Lorn about easing up a little more.

Midday update:
Our fishing efforts are still exceeding my expectations. I don’t know how George and {player} are doing it. Maybe it’s just a case of really good fortune.

Evening update:
Another day is done. We are still keeping up with the Balstar and making swift progress.

name: Far Away XXXII
itemsRequired: 2000x Blue Sea Bass; 2000x Fluorifish; 2000x Green Jellyfish; 2000x Jellyfish; 2000x Marlin; 2000x Mackerel; 2000x Ruby Fish; 2000x Shrimp; 2000x Skipjack; 2000x Stingray; 2000x Octopus; 2000x Giant Squid; 1000x Sea Dragon; 500x Goldjack
rewardItems: 1000x Orange Juice; 100x Large Chest 03; 1x Spades; 1x Diamonds
description:
The Voyage Log for the Captain of the Two Fishers
Day 147 of Leaf 84 of Branch 1342

Overnight update:
After more praise of Mariya’s meals, the overnight crew reported that all the lights on the Balstar went out for 20 to 30 seconds and then came back on. We’ll signal to them this morning to check if they’re having issues with their lightworks.

Midday update:
The Balstar reported that they had a temporary issue with their lights caused by a minor maintenance task on their lightworks system. Everything looks to be in working order now.

Evening update:
If every voyage could run this smoothly and with such magnificent fishing hauls, not to mention the near perfect weather, I would have more money than Cecil. Ha! Just imagine!

name: Far Away XXXIII
itemsRequired: 2000x Blue Sea Bass; 2000x Fluorifish; 2000x Green Jellyfish; 2000x Jellyfish; 2000x Marlin; 2000x Mackerel; 2000x Ruby Fish; 2000x Shrimp; 2000x Skipjack; 2000x Stingray; 2000x Octopus; 2000x Giant Squid; 1000x Sea Dragon; 500x Goldjack
description:
The Voyage Log for the Captain of the Two Fishers
Day 148 of Leaf 84 of Branch 1342

Overnight update:
The Balstar had a lightworks outage overnight again. This time it lasted closer to a minute, according to the night crew’s best estimate. They weren’t as sure about the duration this time because they were at their ease after another grand meal.

We’ll check in with the Balstar again today about their lightworks issues.

Midday update:
The reply from the Balstar was that the outage overnight was caused by the maintenance on the lightworks of the previous night. They have made some temporary repairs, but they will need to spend extra time on Nonir Island making more permanent changes. It is an unfortunate delay, but it should give us time to take our passengers to see the Nonir turtles.

Evening update:
I have an uneasy feeling, without any clouds around to cause it. It feels like the calm before a big storm.

We arrive at Nonir Island tomorrow afternoon, if all goes well. I will advise my crew and passengers to be extra cautious the next few days. I will also be rotating the work assignments for everyone after we finish our time at Nonir. New jobs will help everyone to stay watchful. I will miss Mariya’s meals, Lorn’s immaculate cleaning, and the best fishing hauls I’ve ever seen, but perhaps fortune will continue to favor us.

name: Strange Companions XXXVIII
itemsRequired: 700x Twine; 700x Green Cloak; 700x Acorn; 700x Rope; 700x Belt Drive; 25x Carved Squirrel; 50x Over The Moon; 10x Engine; 700x Cotton
description:
The town is eerily quiet as you tread quietly away from the din that Buddy is making in the distance. The sense of being utterly alone is both terrifying and comforting, no Shadowy presence haunts the back of your mind.

The center of the town is ringed by lit torches and poles with lanterns hung around them. A makeshift lean-to has been constructed in the town center where your friends are being kept under guard. A small fence has been erected and some barbed wire runs across the top. It occurs to you that Geist would not be bothered by these circumstances even in the worst of times.

There are two townsfolk you don’t recognize sitting in makeshift chairs chatting idly.

“Imagine - being a dragon and thinking Ric wouldn’t find you,” the first seems to spit out the word dragon like a bad piece of food.

“Yeah, and imagine being friends with a dragon. Filthy people, more interested in dragons than the town's well-being!” the other seems to feed off the first, uncomfortably so.

After taking a moment, you gather yourself and try to come up with a good distraction when you notice Vincent staring directly at you. You lock eyes for a moment and he motions for you to back away.

A plan forms in your mind and you slink off to gather the materials you will need.

name: A Study of Color XV
itemsRequired: 100x Wooden Barrel; 100x Board; 1000x Yellow Perch; 1000x Gold Leaf; 1000x Gold Feather; 1000x Lemon; 1000x Corn; 1000x Lemon Quartz Ring
rewardItems: 25x Gold Sea Crest; 1000x Antler; 25x Mystical Chest 02; 100x Arnold Palmer; 1x Hearts
description: George is really excited!  Demand for his paint is really starting to take off and now he is being asked for more colors!  It is time to make yellow paint, can you help?

name: A Study of Color XVI
itemsRequired: 100x Wooden Barrel; 100x Board; 1500x Green Barracuda; 1500x Green Jellyfish; 1500x Green Shield; 1500x 3-leaf Clover; 1500x Cabbage; 1500x Jade Charm
rewardItems: 5x Breakfast Boost; 50x Honey; 10x Over The Moon; 200x Orange Juice
description: Green.  Yes, green is the next color that is being requested.  Can you bring the items?

name: Irrationally Hungry I
rewardItems: 1x Carved Owl; 1x Carved Squirrel; 1x Carved Moose; 1x Carved Bear; 1x Carved Rabbit; 1x Carved Camel; 1x Carved Rhino; 1x Carved Warthog
description: Holger enjoyed his pie, but…he’s still hungry. Will you bring him something else to eat, perhaps more pie?

name: Irrationally Hungry II
description: Holger enjoyed the pies you brought him, but…he’s still very, very hungry. Will you bring him  more pie? Please!

name: Just A Pinch I
itemsRequired: 1000x Salt; 1000x Crab Claw; 1000x Crab; 1000x Blue Crab; 1000x Corn; 100x Corn Oil; 1000x Onion; 1000x Potato; 1000x Carrot; 100x Flour; 500x Leek; 1000x Milk; 500x Bacon; 1000x Herbs; 500x Seaweed
rewardItems: 500x Large Net; 1x Diamonds; 10x Spring Seeds; 1x Lovely Cookies
description: Ragvin is celebrating with his crew today. For their dinner feast, the crew requested that their captain make his famous Bounteous Bay Stew. Will you give him a hand landing all the ingredients?

name: Just A Pinch II
rewardItems: 10x Spring Seeds; 1x Hearts; 100x Grab Bag 07; 1x Gold Boot; 100x Gold Eggplant Seeds; 100x Gold Pea Seeds; 1x Lovely Cookies
description:
The stew turned out perfectly! Ragvin appreciates your hard work and assistance.

Now, he needs just a tiny bit of additional help. Will you bring a load of spoons for the celebration? Some of the lads and lasses on the crew invited a few friends to join the feast.

name: Just A Pinch III
itemsRequired: 500x Apple Cider; 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Grape Juice; 500x Lemonade; 100x Mug of Beer; 100x Wine; 500x Orange Juice
rewardItems: 1x Spades; 10x Spring Seeds; 1000x Cabbage; 100x Gold Carrot Seeds; 100x Gold Pepper Seeds; 100x Gold Cucumber Seeds; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Gold Potato
description: Ragvin needs more drinks for the feast! More folks showed up than expected. Would you lend a hand one more time?

name: Strange Companions XXXIX
itemsRequired: 700x Green Cloak; 700x Purple Dye; 700x Twine; 500x Cogwheel; 20x Mushroom Stew
rewardItems: 250x Arnold Palmer; 250x Cooking Pot; 10x Bone Broth
description:
Stepping back into the town in the dead of night, you approach the center and find Ric Ryph, out of breath talking to the two guards heatedly.

“The clumsy thumb was here, I know his remaining compatriot will be here too. {player} can’t help being far behind riding the coattails of the so-called Golden Leaf…” he trails off for a moment before pointing at the guards. “You and you! Double the guards! Rally the militia! Tomorrow morning, we will rid Redbrook once and for all of this dragon and my…our…town will be rid of this menace and we can move towards our glorious future!”

At this, the guards give a poor imitation of a salute and head towards the north of town.

“And you friends…”, Ric kicks some dust and sand at the makeshift prison of your compatriots. “This town,” Ric raises his hands and spins around slowly proclaiming to the group and the air, “is mine now. The Golden Leaf is finished, and this dragon will meet her end in the morning. There is no one left to oppose me. I’ve beaten your mayor, your wizard, your soldier, your dragon, your sorceress and your erstwhile pirate.” His laugh echoes across the square, “And I barely had to lift a hand to do it. Trusting folk, the lot of you.” He stops again, his chuckle turning malicious. “I’ve killed many dragons before, and I’ll kill more yet this branch. And someday, maybe even with your help Beatrix, Alghavaz will be in my grasp.”

name: Strange Companions XL
itemsRequired: 700x Gold Leaf; 700x Gold Feather; 700x Gold Peas; 700x Unpolished Garnet
description:
You clench your fists, ready to enact your plan, when in the distance, you hear a faint whistle. And another. And another. Suddenly, a cacophony of whistles and explosions wash across the town. Fireworks begin to encircle the whole town when suddenly explosions shake your feet. Buddy did it!

Ric looks to the sky, a moment of confusion as townsfolk begin to light their homes and look through their windows.

In the sky, a symbol appears in the fireworks. A giant golden leaf.

“We are more than the sum of our parts, Ric,” Beatrix's voice can be heard clear as day through the chaos. She stands, blood on her shirt, clearly wounded.

“We are one. I am Beatrix but I am also no mere dragon…” A golden light emits from Beatrix’s eyes and the night glows as bright as noon, followed by a blinding flash, before you all, Geist in all her glory radiates energy and hope.

Ric stands, a stunned look in his eyes and seems unable to move.

“...I am also Geist, and your time in Redbrook terrorizing its citizens will meet its end soon enough.”

Geist lowers her wing and your companions clamber on her back before she leaps in the air and flies away into the crackling darkness, backlit by the flashing fireworks and chaos around the town.

name: Peculiar Endings I
description:
Ric Ryph watches Geist fly in the air. He seems fixed in place, eyes to the heavens for a moment before snapping out of his reverie. A cruel smile crosses his face before he puts his helmet back on and walks away from the town center unfazed.

The town is in a state of panic, fireworks continue to launch from all different points in the city, each punctuating the night with flashes of light, always in a cascade of color followed by a crack that sounds like thunder. Using the flashes of fireworks as your guide, you sneak to the edge of the city, and through the gap Buddy showed you earlier to make your way back to Buddy’s Cave.

At the entrance, you reach your hand out and find a cutlass across your neck.

“Password?” A voice calls out.

You slowly move your hands into your pockets and pull out some skull coins.

name: Peculiar Endings II
itemsRequired: 700x Wheat; 700x Cotton; 700x White Parchment; 700x Green Parchment; 700x Purple Parchment; 700x Feathers; 700x Wooden Table; 5x Model Ship
description:
Buddy steps forward revealing himself smiling broadly, “You bring the best gifts! Welcome back, {player}!”

You both enter the cave to find Cecil sleeping on a makeshift bed. Buddy motions you quietly towards a separate bedroom that he has made up, decorated with various coins and exotic trinkets you don’t recognize and you collapse into sleep after a long evening.

name: Peculiar Endings III
itemsRequired: 800x Gold Feather; 800x Orange Gecko; 800x Unpolished Jade; 800x Giant Squid; 800x Seahorse; 800x Wizard Hat; 800x Sunflower; 800x Cotton; 800x Fancy Chair; 800x Fancy Pan Flute
rewardItems: 1x Thank You Card; 1000x Purple Bag; 20x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 1000x Lemonade
description:
The following morning, you wake to the smell of a breakfast of peculiar foods. Cecil is nowhere to be seen, and after some idle chatter, you agree to handle your business at your farm, Buddy seems to think that Ric has no proof other than instinct that you’re involved with the Golden Leaf, and suggests you go on with your day and wait until you hear from the rest of the Golden Leaf before you move forward with how to handle Ric and the various situations that have unfolded.

At your home, a letter awaits you, this time not held by a dagger, but by a small golden pin. As you pull off the pin, a shower of golden light envelops the note, and the script glimmers before you.

{player},

I’ve made many mistakes, and I’m ready to make amends. Let us all gather at your home in two days to clear the air and plan for the reckoning of our erstwhile mayor. This madness has gone on long enough.

Cecil Langstaff
Protector of Redbrook, Keeper of Aelingos

PS: I’ve got a doozy of a spell lined up, could you help with a few things?


Wizards.

name: A Way to Say Thanks
description:
Greetings {player}, have you had the pleasure of meeting any of our local farmers yet? It's possible that some kind-hearted souls have already left some items for you in your mailbox. In Redbrook, we pride ourselves on the kindness of our wonderful community, and it's our generosity that allows us to thrive.

To make it easy for you to share your appreciation, here are some 'Thank You' cards. These cards can be placed in the mailboxes of fellow players as a token of your gratitude. You can buy more in town and you might even get a few for helping out other townsfolk.

name: Eggstremely Magical I
itemsRequired: 1x Egg 01; 1x Egg 02; 1x Egg 03; 1x Egg 04; 1x Egg 05; 1x Egg 06; 1x Egg 07; 1x Egg 08; 1x Egg 09; 1x Egg 10; 1x Egg 11; 1x Egg 12; 1x Gold Egg
rewardItems: 5x Congratulations Card; 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Apple Cider; 20x Spring Seeds; 20x Mega Cotton Seeds; 100x Large Net; 1x Diamonds; 1x Chocolate Bunny
description:
Rosalie heard a strange tale from Vincent about magical eggs that the two of you found last year. Rosalie must have looked a bit skeptical during the description of the hunt, because Vincent immediately encouraged Rosalie to come to you to hear your side of the tale too.

Would you be willing to show Rosalie the eggs you found?

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers I
description:
Thomas heard a saying once, “April trout brings May flowers.” He would like to deliver trout to all of his friends in the village but is worried he won’t be able to get enough trout in time and has asked for your help.

First up is Lorn!

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers II
description:
Lorn gave Thomas a strange look. Oh well.

Off to visit Jill!

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers III
description:
You're pretty sure you saw Jill throw the trout in the trash as you were leaving, but Thomas seems pretty pleased with himself.

Next up is Vincent!

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers IV
description:
Vincent seems less than pleased by your delivery, but gives Thomas a big forced smile.

Thomas seems unfazed and heads towards Rosalie's home.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers V
description:
Rosalie mutters something about trout not being good for spellcasting but thanks Thomas all the same.

Thomas seems particularly mirthful as he heads towards Cecil's house.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers VI
description:
Cecil asks you to take the trout out back to his feeder pond.

Thomas is already off to Borgen's camp by the time you're done.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XIII
description:
"I am unsure what to do with this organic lifeform. Programming indicates it is either for sustenance or slapping. As I am still a fan of ethanol snacks, I accept your gifts in the spirit they were given." ROOMBA also seems very confused.

Thomas has a quiet smile and suggests you visit George, but ROOMBA interrupts as you leave. "If gifts are appropriate, the Sandwyrm would probably enjoy this organic lifeform as sustenance, FR4NK and I both worry it is not getting enough in recent times."

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers VII
description:
Borgen seems entirely too excited by this development.

Thomas grins and mentions it's time to head to Beatrix's home.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers VIII
description:
Geist eats all the trout and seems content.

Thomas mumbles something about starting to get hungry, but heads towards Mariya's home next.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers IX
description:
Mariya is delighted, and immediately starts planning a meal for the townsfolk and rolling the trout in flour.

Thomas continues to look joyful, but you swear you hear his stomach rumble as he suggests you pay a visit to frank next.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers X
description:
"oh yes slapping people with trout certainly brings may flowers," frank says with a toothy grin.

"We'll, that was the point!" Thomas laughs as he suggests you head to Star's tower.

"well, I could always...deliver them for you?" frank suggests.

Thomas is glad for saving the trip and frank asks for a few barrels too.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XI
description: You hear a "frank!!!!!!!!!" echoing across the town, and Thomas figures that your trout were delivered successfully and you should visit FR4NK now.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XII
description:
"Does not process. This is not compatible with my programming. Transistors bring my circuits a feeling of warmth, though." FR4NK's confusion seems evident.

Thomas shrugs and suggests it's time to visit ROOMBA.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XIV
description:
You follow ROOMBA and FR4NK to the edge of Jundland and set down the items they suggested on a specific area of the desert. The ground opens up and your items disappear in a flash.

Everyone seems quite happy, and Thomas suggests stopping by Charles' stable on the way back.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XV
description:
"Neigh!"

Yes, good has been done here this day. Thomas suggests heading to port, he remembers seeing Ragvin's ship docked.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XVI
itemsRequired: 3000x Trout; 3000x Gold Feather; 3000x Gummy Worms; 3000x Chum; 3000x Worms; 300x Grab Bag 07
description:
Ragvin seems extremely grateful for the supplies.

Thomas notices that Captain Thomas is nearby and suggests you could deliver some trout to him too!

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XVII
itemsRequired: 3000x Trout; 3000x Black Powder; 3000x Fishing Net; 3000x Bucket; 3000x Mystic Ring
description:
Captain Thomas seems extremely perplexed, but grateful nonetheless.

Thomas notes that Captain Logan is nearby as well, and a resupply of his fishing boats with trout could be pretty amusing.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XVIII
itemsRequired: 3000x Trout; 3000x Gold Feather; 3000x Rice; 3000x Green Dye; 3000x Blue Feathers; 3000x Purple Dye; 3000x Beet
description:
Captain Logan looks over your gift and smiles at you both.

Thomas excitedly notes that you're nearly done visiting all the townsfolk and suggests visiting George.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XIX
itemsRequired: 3000x Trout; 3000x Potato; 3000x Bacon; 3000x Broccoli; 3000x Grasshopper; 3000x Salt; 3000x Sweet Root
description:
George is delighted by all the art and music supplies and doesn't seem to even notice the trout at all.

Thomas mumbles something about starving artists but turns and speeds off towards Holger's home.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XX
description:
Holger is positively delighted by what you've brought and Thomas beams with happiness.

Your final stop is your good friend Buddy.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XXI
itemsRequired: 3000x Anglerfish; 3000x Barracuda; 3000x Blue Catfish; 3000x Blue Crab; 3000x Blue Sea Bass; 3000x Blue Shell; 3000x Blue Tiger Fish; 3000x Bluegill; 3000x Bone Fish; 3000x Bullfish; 3000x Carp; 3000x Catfish; 3000x Clam Shell; 3000x Clownfish; 3000x Conch Shell; 3000x Crab; 3000x Crappie; 3000x Crowfish; 3000x Drum; 3000x Fish Bones; 3000x Flamejack; 3000x Flarefin; 3000x Flier; 3000x Fluorifish; 3000x Frosteye; 3000x Giant Squid; 3000x Glassback; 3000x Globber; 3000x Green Barracuda; 3000x Green Chromis; 3000x Green Jellyfish; 3000x Ice Shark; 3000x Jellyfish; 3000x Jumbo Fish; 3000x Large Clam Shell; 3000x Largemouth Bass; 3000x Mackerel; 300x Magic Conch Shell; 3000x Marlin; 3000x Mulberry Snapper; 3000x Mussel; 3000x Octopus; 3000x Orcafish; 3000x Pearl; 3000x Plumbfish; 3000x Puffer; 3000x Purple Butterfly Fish; 3000x Red Starfish; 3000x Redgill; 3000x Ruby Coral; 3000x Ruby Fish; 3000x Sea Catfish; 3000x Sea Crest; 3000x Seahorse; 3000x Seeker; 3000x Serpent Eel; 3000x Shrimp; 3000x Skipjack; 3000x Small Prawn; 3000x Speckled Grouper; 3000x Spiral Shell; 3000x Starfish; 3000x Stingray; 3000x Stone Jelly; 3000x Sunfish; 3000x Swordfish; 3000x Torch Fish; 3000x Trout; 3000x Yellow Perch
description:
Buddy looks from you, to the trout, to Thomas. "Weren't we meeting at your place, Thomas?" Buddy asks.

Thomas gives Buddy a sidelong glance and mumbles something about getting dinner and Buddy helpfully pipes up that he has an idea to get Thomas some good dinner food and hands you a list of fish.

"See you at Thomas's house!" He says cheerily.

It's a very long list.

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XXII
description:
At Thomas's house, Buddy prepares a smorgasbord of fish, and you all feel your stomachs growl.

Suddenly, Buddy runs to your side.

"I need one gold trout. Also, can you sit in that chair over there?"

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XXIII
rewardItems: 3000x Anglerfish; 3000x Barracuda; 3000x Blue Catfish; 3000x Blue Crab; 3000x Blue Sea Bass; 3000x Blue Shell; 3000x Blue Tiger Fish; 3000x Bluegill; 3000x Bone Fish; 3000x Bullfish; 3000x Carp; 3000x Catfish; 3000x Clam Shell; 3000x Clownfish; 3000x Conch Shell; 3000x Crab; 3000x Crappie; 3000x Crowfish; 3000x Drum; 3000x Fish Bones; 3000x Flamejack; 3000x Flarefin; 3000x Flier; 3000x Fluorifish; 3000x Frosteye; 3000x Giant Squid; 3000x Glassback; 3000x Globber; 3000x Green Barracuda; 3000x Green Chromis; 3000x Green Jellyfish; 3000x Ice Shark; 3000x Jellyfish; 3000x Jumbo Fish; 3000x Large Clam Shell; 3000x Largemouth Bass; 3000x Mackerel; 300x Magic Conch Shell; 3000x Marlin; 3000x Mulberry Snapper; 3000x Mussel; 3000x Octopus; 3000x Orcafish; 3000x Pearl; 3000x Plumbfish; 3000x Puffer; 3000x Purple Butterfly Fish; 3000x Red Starfish; 3000x Redgill; 3000x Ruby Coral; 3000x Ruby Fish; 3000x Sea Catfish; 3000x Sea Crest; 3000x Seahorse; 3000x Seeker; 3000x Serpent Eel; 3000x Shrimp; 3000x Skipjack; 3000x Small Prawn; 3000x Speckled Grouper; 3000x Spiral Shell; 3000x Starfish; 3000x Stingray; 3000x Stone Jelly; 3000x Sunfish; 3000x Swordfish; 3000x Torch Fish; 3000x Trout; 3000x Yellow Perch
description:
After grabbing the trout, you sit on your seat and a very boisterous and flatulent sound erupts from beneath you.

Thomas and Buddy crack up instantly and they yell, "APRIL FOOLS!"

name: April Trout Brings May Flowers XXIV
description: Thomas and Buddy then show you that the smorgasbord was all fake, and that they ate dinner before you came back with the fish.   But hey, you got a free new way to prank your friends later.

name: Eggstremely Magical II
itemsRequired: 500x Sandstone; 500x Emberstone; 500x Blue Feathers; 500x Water Lily
rewardItems: 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Apple Cider; 20x Spring Seeds; 100x Large Net; 1x Clubs; 2x Good Luck Card; 25x Grab Bag 07; 1x Chocolate Bunny
description:
If you don’t mind, Rosalie would like to attempt a magical investigation of the eggs. Star calls it ethereal delving, and he claims that it’s completely safe, but it is still poking and prodding at the magical matter and energy of a thing. You never know what may happen when you poke and prod things.

Nevertheless, if you are comfortable with it, and if you don’t mind bringing Rosalie a few things to help with the ethereal delving, maybe Rosalie will find more information about these strange eggs.

name: Eggstremely Magical III
itemsRequired: 2x Egg 01; 2x Egg 02; 2x Egg 03; 2x Egg 04; 2x Egg 05; 2x Egg 06; 2x Egg 07; 2x Egg 08; 2x Egg 09; 2x Egg 10; 2x Egg 11; 2x Egg 12
rewardItems: 200x Arnold Palmer; 20x Spring Seeds; 200x Large Net; 1x Spades; 1x Buddystone; 1x Drink Bundle; 500x Corn; 25x Teapot; 25x Mushroom Stew; 2x Clawed Card; 2x Raptor Egg; 1x Chocolate Bunny
description:
These eggs are so strange! They are pushing to be aligned in a particular direction, but they are also pulling for balancing forces. Rosalie thinks that the magic feels a bit like a puzzle, as if, with more pieces, some greater whole might take shape.

Additionally, since Rosalie began the delving, the shape of a triangle was imprinted on her mind’s eye and refuses to clear. Actually, it’s three triangles joined at a central point. Rosalie isn’t certain what it means, but it’s intense and distracting.

Since the triangular pattern refuses to leave her brain, Rosalie has an idea that she would like to try. Are you willing to gather more of these strange eggs?

name: Eggstremely Magical IV
itemsRequired: 24x Blue Flowers; 24x Red Flowers; 24x Yellow Flowers
rewardItems: 200x Arnold Palmer; 20x Spring Seeds; 200x Large Net; 1x Hearts; 5x Thank You Card; 50x Runestone 10; 50x Runestone 20; 1x Chocolate Bunny
description:
The image of the triangles is still filling Rosalie’s mind, but it’s different and shifted now.

She arranged all of the eggs into three neat triangles with each triangular group of twelve eggs evenly spaced from the other groups, and with each group pointed toward the golden egg in the middle. As soon as the shape was properly aligned, Rosalie could feel the magic of the eggs settle and shift. That’s when the image in her mind shifted too.

The best way that she can describe it now is three triangles like the eggs, but with a similar pattern repeating within the triangles. It reminds her so much of flowers. Yes! Like petals on a flower.

Rosalie has another idea if you are willing to continue helping. Will you bring her some flowers in primary colors?

name: Eggstremely Magical VI
description:
Rosalie saw something…a flash and then a vision…she must tell Star…

But first, you deserve an explanation. Rosalie placed each of the inferno spheres at the edge of each triangular group. Then, she moved to the center of the hexagon and held the lava sphere just touching the tip of the golden egg. Nothing happened at first, but then she pulled energy from the inferno spheres into the lava sphere. It started as a trickle and then the energy slipped from her grasp and became a wild torrent. Before she could try to slow it again, a brilliant flash blinded her and she saw a vision. When she could see again, the flowers were gone. The eggs were also gone, except the golden egg, and a strange egg that replaced the lava sphere in her hand.

Rosalie isn’t sure what happened, and she’s very sorry for losing all your eggs and flowers. She…needs to see Star…

Again…she’s so sorry…

name: Eggstremely Magical V
rewardItems: 200x Arnold Palmer; 20x Spring Seeds; 200x Large Net; 50x Grab Bag 04; 50x Grab Bag 05; 50x Small Screw; 10x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 1x Chocolate Bunny
description:
Rosalie arranged all the flowers in three triangles filling the empty spaces between the egg group triangles. As soon she finished, the image in Rosalie’s mind vanished and the magic settled in a new way, although it still feels like it is expectantly waiting.

Rosalie isn’t sure what to do next, but she would like to try something, a little spark of energy perhaps. Will you bring her six inferno spheres and one lava sphere?

name: Corn of Interest Part 01
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 100x Corn Oil; 100x Engine; 100x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
description:
You are being watched,
Farm RPG has a secret system
A machine that spies on you every hour of every day
I know because I built it
I designed the machine to see acts of growing corn
but it sees everything
Grindy quests involving ordinary farmers, farmers like you
Quest requirements the writers considered irrelevant
They wouldn't act, so I decided I would

name: Eggstremely Delicious I
itemsRequired: 1x Egg 02; 1x Egg 05; 1x Potato; 1x Apple; 1x Orange; 1x Cucumber; 1x Milk
description:
Mariya's famous Hickory Omelette has been perfected, but a good cook never rests on her laurels! She wants to try to capture a seasonal flavor with her omelet now.

Could you bring her a few ingredients to try out as variations?

name: Eggstremely Delicious II
description: Based on taste tests, Mariya found that everyone loved one of the eggs she added, shell and all.  She said everyone suggested it tasted like happiness and petting a bunny, so she's decided to serve them up for a limited time and wanted to share the recipe with you too!

name: Corn of Interest Part 02
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 100x Corn Oil; 100x Engine; 100x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
rewardItems: 1x Corn Prize Bag; 1x Diamonds; 1x Peafowl Feather
description:
But I needed a partner, someone with the skills to spam grape juice,
Hunted by Firestream, we work in secret,
You'll never find us but farming or questing,
If your notification comes up, we'll find you.

name: Corn of Interest Part 03
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 100x Corn Oil; 100x Engine; 100x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
rewardItems: 2x Corn Prize Bag; 1x Spades; 1000x Ancient Coin; 1000x Fishing Net
description:
"John Cobb is my compatriot. He’s spent a long time dealing with criminals of the underworld and we need your help. We know a townsfolk is in danger. We can’t tell you how or why, but they will be involved in a violent crime sometime in the future and we need your help to stop it.

Our machine runs on ethanol and if you could contribute to our supply, we can forward our plans to save a fellow citizen of Redbrook."

name: Corn of Interest Part 04
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 100x Corn Oil; 100x Engine; 100x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
rewardItems: 3x Corn Prize Bag; 1x Clubs; 100x Grab Bag 07
description: “My name is Harold Crow, and I’m telling you this because we believe you have the right connections to help us save a citizen of Redbrook.  Please, help John and I do the right thing.”

name: Corn of Interest Part 05
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 100x Corn Oil; 100x Engine; 100x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
description: “John and I have found our person of interest.  It’s a councilwoman named Diane Stalk and she is in trouble.  She’s surrounded herself with very bad people, possibly even corrupt citizens of Redbrook to forward their own evil machinations.  A machine that would make corn growth impossible in this area.  We must stop them.  Please, {player}, help us, for the future of Redbrook!”

name: Corn of Interest Part 06
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 100x Corn Oil; 100x Engine; 100x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
description: “John has found someone on the inside, someone he can use to help stop the corrupt townsfolk from furthering their goals of building the Corn Desolator.  Whatever it takes to keep Redbrook safe, right?”

name: Corn of Interest Part 07
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 100x Corn Oil; 100x Engine; 100x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
description: “The Corn Desolator is still nearing completion and we’re now learning that Decimal Cornolgies is the mastermind behind this technology.  We don’t yet know what they want to do with the Corn Desolator, but we must do whatever it takes to stop them!  But first, we have to save Diane.”

name: Corn of Interest Part 08
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 100x Corn Oil; 100x Engine; 100x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
rewardItems: 7x Corn Prize Bag; 50x Mug of Beer; 1000x Emberstone; 500x Gold Feather
description:
“John and his informant Detective Husko believe they know where Diane will be next, they’re headed there now. Wait, something’s gone wrong. My cornio has gone silent. John? JOHN!?

…

{player}!!!!! John’s gone missing. We have to find him!”

name: Corn of Interest Part 09
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 100x Corn Oil; 100x Engine; 100x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
rewardItems: 8x Corn Prize Bag; 50x Mega Cotton Seeds
description: “{player}, the machine’s last known location of John and Husko was at the north side of town in a warehouse known to be owned by Decimal.  I’ve sent one of our other resources, Jess Husker to meet you in the field, be careful out there.  The machine will do what it can to provide you both with the support you need.”

name: Corn of Interest Part 10
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 125x Corn Oil; 110x Engine; 150x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
rewardItems: 9x Corn Prize Bag; 10x Hickory Omelette; 1x Borgen Buck
description: “Jess met some resistance in the field, but John and I have been reunited.  He has information on their cornputer, the Corn Devastator and Diane Stalk is their leader!  They don’t want to destroy corn, they want to control it!  With all the corn of Redbrook at their command, they can ruin someone named Jill’s inventions and control the very town itself and unfortunately our next number is…ROOMBA. “

name: Corn of Interest Part 11
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 150x Corn Oil; 120x Engine; 200x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
description: “I don’t know this ROOMBA but clearly someone has it out for them.  We have to act quickly.  I’ve brought in another expert from our team, Sally Shuck to help us with finding and protecting ROOMBA.  I’m going to start upgrading the machine to help us with the threat of this new cornputer.”

name: Corn of Interest Part 12
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 175x Corn Oil; 130x Engine; 250x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
description: “Sally reports that ROOMBA has been working on a new project, a way to store electricity and the prototype needs testing.  I think I could use this for the machine if you could help me gather the ingredients while John, Husko, and Jess do some investigating on Decimal Cornologies.”

name: Corn of Interest Part 13
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 200x Corn Oil; 140x Engine; 300x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
description: “John and I have identified the threat to ROOMBA, his friend Jill has unknowingly been tricked by Decimal Cornologies into reactivating NEST, a mobile cornputer that houses secret schematics needed to finish the Corn Devastator and monitors the environment for the super cornputer.   NEST sees ROOMBA as a threat and we need to get him to safety!”

name: Eggsellent Plan I
rewardItems: 2x Arnold Palmer; 2x Large Net; 2x Thank You Card
description:
Neigh! Neigh neigh neigh. Neigh neigh.

Neigh neigh neigh neigh neigh. Neigh neigh neigh?

name: Eggsellent Plan II
rewardItems: 16x Arnold Palmer; 16x Large Net; 16x Orange Juice
description:
Neigh neigh. Neigh neigh neigh, neigh…

Neigh neigh neigh neigh. Neigh neigh neigh. Neigh neigh?

name: Eggsellent Plan III
description:
Neigh neigh. Neigh neigh neigh neigh neigh neigh neigh.

Neigh neigh?

name: Eggsellent Plan IV
description:
Neigh. Neigh.

Neigh neigh? Neigh?

name: Eggsellent Plan V
description:
Your horse friend is really funny…really, very funny…

I caught him this morning stealing one of my huggable eggs and replacing it with a stack of omelettes. He also filled the entire room with regular eggs painted like my huggable eggs. Apparently Horsey McCharles has been replacing my eggs with his hoof painted fakes for a while now. He’d have gotten away with it today too, if it weren’t for those kids laughing as they passed by my window.

You can’t trust anybody these days.

Anyway, if you bring me a handful of carrots, I’ll give you the password to funny-horse’s mailbox with my eggs in it.

name: Eggsellent Plan VI
description:
The password is something about a spring with pep in its step…
or something with a number greater than 0, but less than 2 to the 8th power…
and that’s it, or it…

name: Corn of Interest Part 14
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 225x Corn Oil; 150x Engine; 350x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery

name: Corn of Interest Part 15
itemsRequired: 1000x Corn; 250x Corn Oil; 160x Engine; 400x Salt; 1000x Potato Battery
description:
“{player}, we don’t have much time. NEST figured out our plan. The machine is in trouble. We have to save it. Please. We need more batteries. More processing power. We need…”

-static-

name: Corn of Interest Part 16
