itemsRequired: 6000x Aquamarine Ring; 25x Cabbage Stew; 6000x Crab Claw; 6000x Crossbow; 6000x Emerald Ring; 3000x Fancy Drum; 2000x Fancy Table; 500x Flywheel; 2000x Frost Shield; 6000x Garnet Ring; 2000x Giant Squid; 500x Grape Juice; 6000x Jade Charm; 25x Mushroom Stew; 6000x Mystic Ring; 750x Orange Gecko; 25x Over The Moon; 3000x Pear Grease; 6000x Pie Pan; 1000x Potato Battery; 6000x Purple Bag; 1000x Red Trunk; 1000x Rice; 6000x Ruby Ring; 50x Ship in a Bottle; 500x Small Chest 01; 1000x Spiked Shell; 2000x Steel Vise; 3000x Treasure Chest; 3000x Wizard Hat
rewardItems: 1x Ramjoram's Mask; 2000x Apple Cider; 5000x Orange Juice; 100x Raptor Claw
questline:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty
description:
You continue to follow the process as Star has laid out. He’s been surprisingly patient and calm throughout this process, but it definitely feels like slow and steady progress, as opposed to some of his other magical efforts, which have been more…immediate.

Still, you press on, curious about the end of the map, and because Star seems ever the more grateful after every trip.

name:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty VI
itemsRequired: 6000x Aquamarine Ring; 25x Cabbage Stew; 1000x Corn Oil; 6000x Crossbow; 6000x Emerald Ring; 3000x Fancy Chair; 3000x Fancy Guitar; 500x Flywheel; 6000x Garnet Ring; 2000x Giant Squid; 6000x Gold Leaf; 500x Grape Juice; 25x Mushroom Stew; 6000x Mystic Ring; 25x Over The Moon; 3000x Pear Grease; 6000x Pie Pan; 6000x Purple Bag; 1000x Red Shield; 1000x Rice; 6000x Ruby Ring; 50x Ship in a Bottle; 2000x Steel Vise; 3000x Treasure Chest; 3000x Wizard Hat
questline:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty
description:
“I’ve been doing some research into another ancient wizard, from the 100’s - Adonihs - who studied the breakdown of magical effects more extensively. He mentions that magic is somehow written as an image in the mind, as much as it is the items we use, or the words we project. Adonihs was more than a wizard, he was a wordsmith. Truly ahead of his time in so many areas…”

Star breaks off his reverie as you finish arranging your latest return of items.

“Oh yes, {player}, I feel we are closer, ever closer. I even feel a little bad about using those Langstaff Flags or whatever for our game, but I never dreamt we’d be on the precipice of discovering something so new in our lifetime. So much knowledge has been lost, I can only piece together so much…if only I could dilate time and stuff myself in a pocket dimension for a few millenia. Maybe that would work with a pinch of light and dark?”

Again Star’s rambling has him looking past you with the distant glare of someone lost in thought. You cough gently and Star is roused from his thoughts.

“Well, let’s get this underway shall we? No time like now! That’s why it’s called the present, am I right?”

He chortles to himself, and after the spell, a clear line emerges on the map. You recognize some of the landscape, it seems to be a depiction of a pre-Redbrook time, somewhere to the west.

Star hands over your reward, and you head out with another list.

name:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty VII
itemsRequired: 6000x Aquamarine Ring; 50x Breakfast Boost; 3000x Butter; 6000x Crab Claw; 6000x Crossbow; 6000x Emerald Ring; 3000x Fancy Drum; 2000x Fancy Table; 500x Flywheel; 2000x Frost Shield; 6000x Garnet Ring; 2000x Giant Squid; 500x Grape Juice; 6000x Jade Charm; 2500x Machine Press; 500x Medium Chest 02; 25x Mushroom Stew; 6000x Mystic Ring; 750x Orange Gecko; 25x Over The Moon; 3000x Pear Grease; 6000x Pie Pan; 1000x Potato Battery; 6000x Purple Bag; 1000x Red Trunk; 1000x Rice; 6000x Ruby Ring; 1000x Spiked Shell; 2000x Steel Vise; 3000x Treasure Chest; 3000x Wizard Hat
questline:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty
description:
Returning to Star’s tower, you find the basement worse for wear. Treasure chests and various trinkets in states of disrepair are strewn across the floor. You see sparkles of jewels twinkling off of firelight in the walls. Stepping closer, you realize these are rings in various states of destruction embedded in the walls.

As you survey the room more closely, you see a hooded figure laying in the middle - Star! Dodging the debris, you rush towards him as he stiffly sits up. Relieved, he looks up to you, “Well, that didn’t work…”

He looks around the basement and looks to you with an apologetic smile, “I tried a shortcut, but now I’ve set us back to the beginning. We’re going to have to start this whole process over again. It turns out metaphysical creations metastasize inverted energetic positrons to deconstruct invection properties quite poorly.”

He waves his hand and a list generates for you. You feel bad for him and wonder what shortcut he was envisioning and how it could have such disastrous consequences for the both of you.

name:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty VIII
itemsRequired: 6000x Aquamarine Ring; 6000x Blue Purse; 50x Breakfast Boost; 3000x Butter; 1000x Corn Oil; 6000x Crossbow; 6000x Emerald Ring; 3000x Fancy Chair; 3000x Fancy Guitar; 500x Flywheel; 6000x Garnet Ring; 2000x Giant Squid; 500x Grape Juice; 2500x Machine Press; 500x Medium Chest 02; 25x Mushroom Stew; 6000x Mystic Ring; 750x Orange Gecko; 25x Over The Moon; 3000x Pear Grease; 6000x Pie Pan; 1000x Red Shield; 1000x Rice; 6000x Ruby Ring; 100x Ship in a Bottle; 1000x Spiked Shell; 2000x Steel Vise; 3000x Treasure Chest; 3000x Wizard Hat
questline:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty
description:
You return to Star’s tower and head into the basement. It has been cleaned up entirely, with the map sitting in the middle of the room. It glows slightly, and you can see the familiar topography of your region, but something strikes you as off about the whole view. It feels…skewed as if done from memory. Inspecting the map for a few moments longer, you realize Star has not visited you yet and you head up into his tower, finding him sitting dejected in his sitting room.

He gives you a half-hearted wave. The sitting room is a luxurious purple and green. The sofa is a material you’ve never seen before, and various pictures adorn the walls. They shift in the light and glimmer softly. After a moment, Star stands and addresses you, “I’m sorry, {player}, in my haste for discovering what this map said, I tried using a form of transmutation to shortcut the items required, but instead of supercharging this spell of clarification, it actually absorbed some of the magic in an exvestitation like I’ve never seen before.” He sighs, and offers you an orange juice before shuffling off to the basement. “Really, I am sorry, but your help still means the world to me. Oh and, don’t tell Rosalie about this, would you?”

You follow him to the basement, feeling rejuvenated by his orange juice and candor.

Items piled around, Star begins to cast the spell again and halfway through his motions he stops. “Great Scott! That’s it!”

He stops and moves the rings into a new pattern and looks to you excitedly, “I know how to speed this up, it’s…temporally related somehow! This map doesn’t exist where it should! No wonder it was taking so much juice, it’s not from now!”

Waving his hands, he hands you a list as he mutters to himself about realigning the future and past according to the tomes of Thafeproc the Wise, using Ylberian methods combined with Romuskan gravitronic coupling.

name:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty IX
itemsRequired: 6000x Aquamarine Ring; 6000x Blue Purse; 50x Breakfast Boost; 3000x Butter; 200x Concord Grape Pie; 6000x Crossbow; 6000x Emerald Ring; 3000x Fancy Drum; 2000x Fancy Table; 500x Flywheel; 2000x Frost Shield; 6000x Garnet Ring; 2000x Giant Squid; 500x Grape Juice; 6000x Jade Charm; 500x Medium Chest 02; 25x Mushroom Stew; 6000x Mystic Ring; 25x Over The Moon; 3000x Pear Grease; 6000x Pie Pan; 1000x Potato Battery; 1000x Red Trunk; 1000x Rice; 6000x Ruby Ring; 100x Ship in a Bottle; 2000x Steel Vise; 3000x Treasure Chest; 3000x Wizard Hat
questline:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty
description:
As you arrive in Star’s tower basement, he stands in the center and greets you with open arms. “{player}, can you feel it? Now that I’ve figured out the trick, it’s all working so marvelously. I’ve even marked off Tuesday, Wednesday, and Sunday from the equatorial denomination of enervescence! I think now we can be done in just two more quick requests. Progress is not lost, you know what they always say, ‘You have to break several cartons of eggs to make a hickory omelette!’ Well at least that’s what Mariya told me once. Anyways, I’ve got to work on this spell some more. There’s a misalignment between how many Leaves and Branches I’m channeling in the 87th chakramma.”

He waves his hand and another list appears in your hands. This one is titled,

“NO SERIOUSLY ONLY ONE MORE AFTER THIS.”

name:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty X
itemsRequired: 6000x Aquamarine Ring; 6000x Blue Purse; 50x Breakfast Boost; 2000x Corn Oil; 6000x Crossbow; 6000x Emerald Ring; 3000x Fancy Chair; 3000x Fancy Guitar; 500x Flywheel; 2000x Frost Shield; 6000x Garnet Ring; 2000x Giant Squid; 3000x Gold Feather; 6000x Gold Leaf; 500x Grape Juice; 6000x Lemon; 2500x Machine Press; 500x Medium Chest 02; 25x Mushroom Stew; 6000x Mystic Ring; 750x Orange Gecko; 25x Over The Moon; 3000x Pear Grease; 6000x Pie Pan; 1000x Potato Battery; 200x Red Berry Pie; 1000x Red Shield; 1000x Rice; 6000x Ruby Ring; 100x Ship in a Bottle; 2000x Steel Vise; 3000x Treasure Chest; 3000x Wizard Hat
rewardItems: 4000x Apple Cider; 6000x Orange Juice; 100x Raptor Claw
questline:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty
description:
Star is positively brimming with excitement as you finish bringing in the last of the items.

“{player}, are you familiar with time? The construct is so fascinating. Ever heard of a wormhole? A diagetical explanation of apocryphal Merfi paradoxical analogies with lack of evidence wrapped in sheep’s clothing? Feh! I tell you the truth, now that I understand. This map is not from here. It positively radiates magic that is impossible. It’s so familiar and yet so…mysterious. The secret was feathers. And strangely…a few lemons.”

He waves his hand and a list materializes in your hands.

“If my calculations are correct, and I’m a wizard, not a mathematician, this is the last thing we’ll need. See you soon, {player}, and all will be explained!

…I hope.”

name: A Pearl Jam II
rewardItems: 200x Ancient Coin; 25x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 100x Bacon; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Lemon Cream Pie; 2x Gravy Boat
description:
Rosalie loves the pearl berries! If you can find several more, she would love to try making a red and pearl berry pie like Holger’s grandmother baked.

While you’re searching for more pearl berries, Rosalie will work on everything else for the pie.

name: A Pearl Jam III
rewardItems: 500x Ancient Coin; 150x Arnold Palmer; 150x Large Net; 500x Orange Juice; 1x Hearts; 100x Honey; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Cooked Turkey
description:
Rosalie intended to share a slice of the pie with you, but she made the mistake of inviting Holger and Borgen over to try it first. Rosalie got one slice of the pie, and it was amazing. Borgen had two slices. Then, while Rosalie was gone to the kitchen to refill everyone’s milk, Holger finished his first slice and then ate the entire rest of the pie. Borgen tried to stop him, but Holger was faster than a frog gulping down a fly.

Rosalie would like to try making the pie again. This time she would like to make a few pies to ensure you get a chance to try the fruits of your hard work. Will you bring her a larger load of pearl berries?

name: A Pearl Jam IV
rewardItems: 3000x Ancient Coin; 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Large Net; 1500x Orange Juice; 1x Hearts; 1x Borgen Buck; 10x Rubber Duckie; 1x Thank You Card; 5x Carved Bear; 100x Bone Broth; 1x Diamonds; 25x Raptor Claw; 2x Gravy Boat
description:
Rosalie tried. She really, truly tried. She’s still not even sure how it happened. The pies were protected with a spell that should have kept everyone out, except maybe a Star Meerif-level mage or a guardian. Yet, there was Holger passed out on her floor with empty pie pans all around him. He ate all the pie again!

Rosalie sent Holger on his way with a little bit of yelling and a spell to rain on him for the next three days. It wasn’t her finest moment, but she held back from sending worse spells after him.

Rosalie is not giving up! This time she plans to make more pies and hide them until she can get one to you, and a few other folks.

Will you find some more pearl berries, and avoid Holger?

name: Bombs Bursting I
rewardItems: 1x Lemon Cream Pie; 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 25x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds
description:
Vincent recently found a cave not far from his camp. He started to explore it and found indications of a variety of minerals and gems. At first, Vincent used a simple chisel and hammer to gather some of the gems, but then he decided to make quicker progress in mining the riches of the cave. Explosives worked pretty well, but Vincent would love to try something with a little more bang.

Will you bring Vincent something a little stronger for mining?

NOTE: Bombs can be found in the July Starter Pack or from completing the 28-day Monthly Chore Reward

name: Bombs Bursting II
rewardItems: 10x Apple Cider; 10x Grape Juice; 5x Fruit Punch; 1x Spades
description:
The bombs were super effective!

Unfortunately, it appears that there aren’t many more obvious gems and minerals to mine. So, Vincent would love to try one more bomb to gather the remaining resources he’s located. Then, he’ll explore further before doing more mining.

Will you bring Vincent one more bomb?

NOTE: Bombs can be found in the July Starter Pack or from completing the 28-day Monthly Chore Reward

name: A Study of Spuds I
description: George is proud of his understanding and knowledge of color, but there's still more to learn.  He has heard of a strange variation of potato called the 'Hot Potato' and would like a couple to study.  He'll give you something nice in return.

name: A Study of Spuds II
description: George is thankful for the Hot Potatoes you brought him.  They are so hot to handle and difficult to examine though.  He needs some materials to build something to assist with inspecting them.  Can you bring him some resources?

name: A Study of Spuds III
itemsRequired: 3x Magnifying Glass; 3x Steel; 10x Mushroom Paste; 10x Glass Orb
rewardItems: 20x Fishing Net; 3x Apple Cider; 5x Gold Flier
description: George has built a better way to inspect these hot spuds now.  However, he needs a magnifying device or two to setup a custom microscope to be able to see the colors up close.

name: A Study of Spuds IV
description: The Hot Potatoes seem to cool off faster than expected.  George is having a hard time studying them before they are cooling back off to a regular potato.  Could you bring George a few more?

name: A Study of Spuds V
description: George is getting closer to understanding the unique colors presented on the Hot Potato.  He would like you to bring some regular potatoes to use in a side-by-side comparison.

name: A Study of Spuds VI
rewardItems: 5x Arnold Palmer; 5x Apple Cider; 5x Large Net
description:
Yes! George understands! The Hot Potato emanates a particular color due to the presence of emberstone particles in the skin of the potato, probably from the heating process.

George would like you to bring some more resources to attempt to create a Hot Potato from a regular potato. Can you help him again?

name: A Study of Spuds VII
description: George is optimistic for a breakthrough soon.  He was able to create a few Hot Potatoes with the resources you brought him, but they didn't get as hot as expected.  Could you bring him a few more things and some more Hot Potatoes once more?

name: A Study of Spuds VIII
description: George is able to consistently recreate Hot Potatoes now thanks to your help.  He feels able to use his new understanding to create new colors to assist in his art hobby and more!  Thank you for the help.

name: Shell Collection Attempt Two I
description:
When Geist was very young, she had a marvelous collection of shells. The shells were gathered from beaches and waters all around the world by her parents and relatives. She continued to add to her collection as she grew up and traveled farther and farther with her growing wings.

Heartbreakingly, her collection was left behind and destroyed when the war came to her hometown. Her shell collection was one of many things lost in that senseless and horrible war. That was ages and ages ago.

Now, Redbrook is her home and Geist would love to start building a new shell collection. Will you help her?

name: Shell Collection Attempt Two II
description:
Geist loves the shells you brought! Blue shells are always a great start to a shell collection.

Will you bring Geist a few more varieties of shells?

name: Shell Collection Attempt Two III
description:
You found some wonderful shells for Geist’s collection. Geist really appreciates your efforts.

Geist loves that these shells revive so many of her memories. The last group you brought reminded her of the time her uncle Gaius was called to meet with the dragon elders in Duclo City. On his way home, Gaius went fishing near Lielega Harbor and nearly destroyed his teeth on a pile of clam shells he didn’t notice amongst his net full of fish. Uncle Gaius became a much more cautious eater after that incident, and Geist received a load of shells with very unique markings to add to her collection.

This is wonderful! Will you find more shells to add to Geist’s new collection?

name: Shell Collection Attempt Two IV
description: The spiral shells are so lovely. Will you try to find another variety of spiral shells that are covered in spikes? Geist always loved the colors on the spiked shells.

name: Shell Collection Attempt Two V
description:
Geist loves the spiked shells! You are amazing!

Geist once made a necklace out of some of the spiked shells in her collection for a village dance. The necklace was so beautiful, but it was also extremely uncomfortable. Somehow those spikes found every gap in the scales around her neck. It was terrible!

What a treat to remember that long forgotten dance and that silly, wonderful necklace.

Will you try to find some Large Clam shells now? Geist used to have some Enormous Clam shells, but those are not usually found in this part of the world.

name: Shell Collection Attempt Two VI
itemsRequired: 1000x Frost Snapper Shell; 200x Magic Conch Shell; 1x Sand Dollar
description: There are many more shells that Geist would love to have again for her new collection, but for now she would love to get three more varieties that are very hard to find. Will you try to find them?

name: Shell Collection Attempt Two VII
description: You are the best friend, besides Beatrix of course, that this dragon has found in a long time. Geist appreciates all your hard work and she would like to share something very special with you.

name:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty XI
itemsRequired: 1x Aquamarine Ring; 1x Blue Purse; 1x Breakfast Boost; 1x Butter; 1x Cabbage Stew; 1x Concord Grape Pie; 1x Corn Oil; 1x Crab Claw; 1x Crossbow; 1x Emerald Ring; 1x Fancy Chair; 1x Fancy Drum; 1x Fancy Guitar; 1x Fancy Table; 1x Flywheel; 1x Frost Shield; 1x Garnet Ring; 1x Giant Squid; 1x Gold Feather; 1x Gold Leaf; 1x Grape Juice; 1x Jade Charm; 1x Machine Press; 1x Medium Chest 02; 1x Mushroom Stew; 1x Mystic Ring; 1x Orange Gecko; 1x Over The Moon; 1x Pear Grease; 1x Pie Pan; 1x Potato Battery; 1x Purple Bag; 1x Red Berry Pie; 1x Red Shield; 1x Red Trunk; 1x Rice; 1x Ruby Ring; 1x Ship in a Bottle; 1x Small Chest 01; 1x Spiked Shell; 1x Steel Vise; 1x Treasure Chest; 1x Wizard Hat
questline:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty
description:
Star takes the organized items and arranges them in a precise manner you don’t fully understand. Each item is placed even more delicately than usual - Star’s intensity is in full display as your anticipation for the spell’s conclusion builds, hoping against hope this was your last request and he can proceed.

Finally, when all is said and done, you see a look of disgust on Star’s face as he places the lemon directly on top of the map. “What I wouldn’t give for some gloves and an incineration facility.”

Star stands back, and begins to raise his arms. For a moment, nothing happens. You see a look of strain on Star’s face and finally a spark coalesces into a dazzling pulsating pinpoint of light from between his outstretched hand and falls gently towards the map.

As the pinpoint of light descends towards the map, it begins to get brighter and brighter until you are forced to avert your eyes and a sound like a rushing tornado hits you - from across the room Star cries out and a rush of wind and energy envelops you as your vision grows dark.

name:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty XII
rewardItems: 1x Meerif Crest; 1x Wizard's Second Favorite Feather; 1x Time Egg; 1x Gold Feather
questline:
Starting To Actually Realize
Magic Ain't Pretty
description:
When you regain consciousness - you are in unfamiliar confines. The room is well lit with glowing balls of light that hang from the ceiling, not unlike some of the technology you recognize as Romuskan. Sitting up, you find yourself in a room covered with books in various states of age and dust while unfamiliar markings cover the floor. There are two banners hanging on each side of the wall with a symbol that you do not recognize, and Star seems to be leafing through books. The bookshelves are made of a material you do not recognize, and you notice there seems to be no doors or windows in the room at all.

A small desk sits at the middle of the room, with a bed and several chairs haphazardly placed to allow easy access to all the shelves.

“ACCESS GRANTED. WELCOME SON OF MEERIF. THE ARCHIVE HAS BEEN ATTUNED.”

You bolt upright - this is a voice you recognize from your first trip to the Romuskan castle. Star seems unconcerned however, and you notice his hand is placed on a piece of metal and glass that retracts into the ground after a moment.

Star looks back to you and smiles grimly. “Well, we found it. The anchor was a lemon. I will have to spend more time learning here, but this seems to be the vault of my ancestors and many more ancient wizards - I don’t know how it got here, or how the map lead me here, but there seems to be a reason I’m here, and it’s thanks to your help and persistence I’ve arrived here. On the walls sits a treasured family heirloom, the Meerif crest. I want to give this to you as thanks, {player}. I will send you home for now, but I will need to learn more about this place. I’m truly grateful to your help, but let’s keep this to ourselves for now, eh?”

Star throws a handful of feathers over you and that unfamiliar sensation of being pushed and pulled into a thousand different directions overwhelms you, and that strange sense of seeing yourself in a mirror overtakes you before suddenly you’re once again in your home.

You're left to wonder what exactly just happened. The memory of the Romuskan voice and the experience of teleportation combine to leave a shiver down your spine. Maybe tomorrow you'll get to farm in peace...

name: The Right Snacks I
description: Grrrr. Grrrr grrrr.  Rooooaaarrr?

name: The Right Snacks II
description: Grrr grrrr grrrrrr.  Rooaarrrrrrrrr?

name: The Right Snacks III
description: Grrrrrr grr, grrr. Grrrr grr grrrrr. Grrrrrrr grrr grrrr grrrrrr.  Roooaaarr?

name: Bearly Hygienic Enough I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 25x Orange Juice; 1x Lemon Cream Pie
description:
Grr grrrr grrrrrr? Grrr grr grrrr. Grrrr grrrrr grrrr grrrrrrr. Rooaarr?

(Hint: The toothbrush is in Buddy's School Bag which is available in the August Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: Bearly Hygienic Enough II
description: Grrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr grrrrrrrrrrrrrrr. Rooaarrrrrrrrrrrrrr?

name: I Hate To Bug You I
rewardItems: 25x Grab Bag 07; 1x Clubs; 50x Grape Juice; 48x Mega Cotton Seeds; 50x Peach; 2x Lemon Cream Pie; 10x Shark Tooth
description:
Yoo-hoo! Welcome to Nonir Island! My name is Reba Roo and I’m the president of the Nonir Insect Collection Enthusiasts. You could not have picked a better time to visit our lovely island! You have arrived during our annual insect invasion!

Every year when the daylight and darkness get equal shares of the day, an overwhelming explosion of insects suddenly invades the island. Our native predators do a great job of consuming the excess insects, but there are always plenty left for those of us that love to build our bug collections.

As president of the Nonir Insect Collection Enthusiasts, it’s my job to make sure our 200 members get access to as many insects as possible for their collections. I am authorized by my constituents to contract with willing individuals to help gather the insects to be distributed to our collectors. If you are interested in helping, you can have a lot of fun collecting the insects and then get some great rewards for your efforts.

name: I Hate To Bug You II
rewardItems: 50x Grape Juice; 96x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Hearts; 50x Large Chest 02; 60x Treasure Key; 5x Raptor Egg; 50x Peach
description: Yoo-hoo! You are fantastic at gathering insects! The members of the Nonir Insect Collection Enthusiasts are very grateful for your help. Would you be interested in finding more insects for our collectors?

name: I Hate To Bug You III
itemsRequired: 2000x Fire Ant; 2000x Shiny Beetle; 2000x Caterpillar; 2000x Horned Beetle; 1000x Grasshopper
rewardItems: 144x Mega Cotton Seeds; 2x Diamonds; 20x Raptor Claw; 100x Gold Feather; 2x Happy Cookies; 50x Peach
description: Yoo-hoo! The members of the Nonir Insect Collection Enthusiasts are impressed by your skills at insect acquisition. Would you be willing to continue collecting the invasion insects, and start searching for some that are a bit harder to find?

name: I Hate To Bug You IV
itemsRequired: 2000x Fire Ant; 2000x Caterpillar; 2000x Horned Beetle; 2000x Spider; 2000x Giant Centipede
rewardItems: 144x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Spades; 25x Hickory Omelette; 10x Fruit Punch; 200x Grab Bag 08; 50x Peach
description:
Yoo-hoo! This has turned into a wonderful harvest for the Nonir Insect Collection Enthusiasts! We can’t thank you enough.

Did you know that some of our collectors also collect arthropods and arachnids, in addition to insects? Well, they do, and they would love to get any arthropods and arachnids you find while you’re searching for plain old insects. Will you bring us more insects and any arthropods and arachnids you can find?

name: I Hate To Bug You V
itemsRequired: 2000x Fire Ant; 2000x Horned Beetle; 2000x Spider; 2000x Giant Centipede; 2000x Ruby Scorpion; 2000x Onyx Scorpion
rewardItems: 144x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Joker; 100x Treasure Key; 10x Buddystone; 5x Carved Bear; 5x Cabbage Stew
description:
Yoo-hoo! I don’t recall any hunter quite as successful as you in a long time. Maybe Ragvin. He was amazing when he helped us many years ago. Nevertheless, you are fantastic!

Will you keep the arthropods, arachnids, and insects coming?

name: I Hate To Bug You VI
itemsRequired: 2000x Fire Ant; 2000x Ruby Scorpion; 2000x Onyx Scorpion; 1000x Dragonfly; 1000x Cyclops Spider
rewardItems: 144x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Joker; 2x Borgen Buck; 50x Peach; 100x Rubber Duckie; 50x Large Chest 03; 60x Treasure Key
description: Yoo-hoo! The Nonir Insect Collection Enthusiasts would like to fund two more hauls, if you’re willing to help. We’re mainly looking for arachnids this time, but I would love a few more fire ants, since some of the other collectors are hoarding them. We also have a request from a few members for dragonflies.

name: I Hate To Bug You VII
rewardItems: 144x Mega Cotton Seeds; 50x Peach; 1x Heart Container
description:
Yoo-hoo! The Nonir Insect Collection Enthusiasts would like to officially extend to you our most heartfelt thanks for your service to our fine organization. Now, I truly hate to ask this of you, but we have a particular member of our organization that thinks that gastropods should be included in our collections. Unfortunately, they have convinced a few other collectors and now here we are.

Ugh. I can barely speak it.

Will you bring us some snails?

name: Buddy's School Shenanigans III
description:
Buddy was on his way to the gymnasium when he noticed the school had gone through all its milk supplies! It must be because Redbrook is growing so quickly!

Buddy wants to help refill the milk supply for the school. Will you give him a hand?

name: Buddy's School Shenanigans II
description: Buddy got distracted toilet papering various homes in Redbrook and never made it to the gymnasium and offers you the same trade again.

name: Buddy's School Shenanigans X
itemsRequired: 500x Milk Carton; 500x Toilet Paper; 500x Wagon Wheel; 500x Wooden Plank
description: Buddy wants to continue giving back to the school so he has one last request.  He regrets his prank and just wants to be better in the future.

name: Buddy's School Shenanigans IX
itemsRequired: 500x Milk Carton; 500x Wagon Wheel; 500x Wooden Plank
description: Buddy would like to keep giving back, he feels a little bad about how much cleanup his shenanigans involved, so he wants to donate more milk.

name: Buddy's School Shenanigans VIII
itemsRequired: 500x Toilet Paper; 500x Wagon Wheel; 500x Wooden Plank
description: Buddy realized he should be giving toilet paper to the school instead of wasting it with a prank, unfortunately he’s realizing just how much the school will need.  He hands you a request for another load.

name: Buddy's School Shenanigans VII
description: Buddy finally toilet papered the gymnasium!  It was hilarious!  At least 3 people laughed.  The school custodian was not quite as amused and requested some help from the school for cleanup.  Buddy offered to bring some milk to anyone that helped and suddenly he’s in need of milk again…

name: Buddy's School Shenanigans VI
description: Buddy has realized he is not going to be able to reach the ceiling and his throwing arm is a little weak after the situation with Holger and the horseshoes, so he needs something that will give him a quick boost to get to the ceiling.  He also forgot that you shouldn’t get toilet paper wet and the entire load was sitting outside in the rain, so he’ll need some more.

name: Buddy's School Shenanigans V
description: Buddy remembered what he was doing when he was carrying the milk cartons into the cafeteria. He was going to toilet paper the gymnasium! Unfortunately he misplaced all that toilet paper, can you restock him?

name: Buddy's School Shenanigans IV
description: Buddy was able to fill up the refrigerator up front, but milk is extremely popular in this school!  He needs more!

name: Buddy's School Shenanigans I
description: While Buddy was pulling the yellow watermelons that were ruining his red watermelon patch, he came up with a wonderful idea. He’s going to roll toilet paper all over the gymnasium at school. All he needs now is a ridiculous amount of toilet paper. Would you be willing to bring him enough toilet paper to roll the gym, in exchange for a very generous number of yellow watermelons that Buddy hates?

name: Testing Excellence
description:
Lorn knows of three new tests of knowledge and one new test of adventure that are available. He has a special item for you if you can get a perfect score in each one.

Hint: Check out the Schoolhouse!
Hint: Check out the Adventure!

name: Celebrate Learning
description:
Buddy wants to share the joy of learning across all of Redbrook and invites you to celebrate learning with him by giving you this special mailbox key. He does need to keep a record of everyone asking for a key though.

And he's kind of hungry.

name: Fun With Fusion I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 1x Wizard Hat; 1x Hearts; 25x Orange Juice
description:
Star recently found a book of spells by Martholemew Emmettus, the royal mage of Vayllehill. One of the more interesting spells was missing some details, but it was intended to power a strange device. Star is almost certain that the device is capable of taking any matter and converting it to raw energy. Think of what we could do with that!

The device was easily assembled and Star has already cast the containment and transmogrification spells to get the device working. The spell book now suggests some very specific items to use to prime the device. Actually, it looks like a list of garbage, but these items do have very strong magical identity matrices that are in perfect alignment this time of year.

Will you give Star a hand gathering these items?

name: Fun With Fusion II
itemsRequired: 10x Cucumber Seeds; 10x Onion Seeds; 10x Tomato Seeds
rewardItems: 1x Wizard Hat; 1x Spades; 10x Grape Juice; 1x Raffle Ticket; 1x Thank You Card
description:
The device works! Unfortunately, it’s not a matter-to-energy conversion device, at least not in the way he expected. It turns out that it’s just a really fantastic composter. Star was disappointed with this discovery at first, but now he’s excited to try using the composter to grow some crops. Maybe the crops will be imbued with additional magical nanopackets from the composted fertilizer, or maybe they’ll just taste really good.

Will you bring Star some seeds?

name: Banana Stand I
description: Lorn once told Thomas there's always money in the banana stand.

name: Sound Unstable I
itemsRequired: 100x Old Boot; 200x Tea Leaves; 200x Fern Leaf; 100x Bucket; 200x Emberstone
rewardItems: 200x Conch Shell; 200x Antler; 5x Bell; 5x Dice; 1x Spades; 2x Breakfast Boost
description:
“Are you listening? You have that far off look in your eyes again.”

After forcing yourself to focus, you remember that Lorn was in the middle of telling you about some strange noises he heard on his weekly trek to the coast.

“I was walking down to the beach when I heard the strange sound behind me. It sounded like the trampling of leaves as you walk over them in the late fall, but that crunching sound was followed by a squelch, like a boot stepping through mud. When I stopped to listen, really listen, the sound vanished.”

After pausing for a few moments, Lorn alters his course.

“I know what we need to do. Experimentation has always helped me understand. Will you help me gather a few things to see if we can recreate the noise I heard?”

name: Sound Unstable II
itemsRequired: 200x Blue Gel; 100x Grapes; 100x Hide; 200x Essence of Slime; 200x Twine; 50x Octopus
rewardItems: 1x Diamonds; 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 1x Carved Bear; 2x Over The Moon; 5x Grape Juice; 1x Clawed Card
description:
As you enter Lorn’s workshop to check in on his sound experiments, you hear Holger loudly trying to convince Lorn of something.

“…I’m telling you, it’s a squisquatch! I saw one as a kid and it made the exact noise you’re describing.”

“I’m not saying you’re wrong, but did anyone else see it? I haven’t found any evidence of squisquatches in my research.”

“You know not everything that’s true is written in a book! I was alone when I saw it, but I know what I saw. Look. I can prove it to you. If our farmer friend here will bring me a few things, I can create the exact noise you heard, and then you’ll know that I really did see a squisquatch!”

name: Sound Unstable III
itemsRequired: 400x Steel; 200x Emberstone; 200x Chum; 400x Red Berries; 300x Eggs; 200x Rope; 10x Fishing Net; 400x Trout; 100x Apple
rewardItems: 25x Arnold Palmer; 10x Bone Broth; 1x Cabbage Stew; 1x Hearts; 5x Hickory Omelette; 1x Lemon Cream Pie; 5x Onion Soup; 5x Quandary Chowder; 5x Sea Pincher Special
description:
“I know that sound. I heard it many years ago in Ariathia.”

As Lorn hurries to the workshop door to learn more from Mariya, you help Holger brace the experiment that Lorn nearly knocked over in his haste.

“Do you know what made that noise?”

Lorn pauses for a moment and then corrects himself.

“Sorry, where are my manners? Thank you for coming so quickly to lend us your ears.”

“I’m glad to come and help. It was a terrifying creature, called a cephalotti, that made that noise, and it hurt many of my friends and family before we trapped it. We would be wise to prepare to capture the one you heard before it can hurt anyone in Redbrook.”

name: Sound Unstable IV
description:
“This is the place.” Mariya says confidently. “It’s close to where Lorn heard the cephalotti, but not too close to the beach. Now, follow my lead and we’ll surround this spot with lures and traps.”

With Mariya’s plans and preparations, the work finishes quickly. She then leads the party to make camp a safe distance away from the site of the traps, and you all settle down for a brief meal and rest.

As Holger is finishing his fourth bowl of stew, Lorn offers an idea for the night’s watch.

“I propose that we run lines of luminously-linked lanterns around our camp, and along the path to our traps. As they say, ‘A light at the right instance makes a magical difference.’”

name: Sound Unstable V
description:
“It was a music box, a muddy, gummed up music box!” Lorn exclaims, looking relieved and incredulous. “I was going to see if Holger was done checking the traps when I heard the sound and found this buried in the mud. I’m so sorry I’ve led you all on a hunt for nothing.”

As Lorn holds the music box up for you, Holger, and Mariya to see, it emits the strange sound Lorn and Holger tried so hard to recreate.

Mariya audibly gasps. “That sounds exactly like a cephalotti!”

“That’s the sound I heard when I saw the squisquatch as a kid!” Holger loudly declares. “But wait, then why is all of our bait gone?”

name: Notary Public I
description:
While heading to the market you notice a flier on the town community board.

“Since the tragic passing of Genevieve, we are looking for YOU to become our new town notary. Please apply in the community center. Don’t wait, this opportunity might never come your way again!”

Spurred on by the immediacy of the notice, you head to the community center, parchment and pencil in hand.

name: Notary Public II
itemsRequired: 100x White Parchment; 100x Green Parchment; 100x Purple Parchment; 50x Coal
description:
You step into the community center to find someone in shining armor sitting at a small table with the words “NOTARY PUBLIC LESSONS” scrawled on some paper.

“Ah yes, a pleasure to meet you {player}, I am but a humble teacher and servant of the great realm of T’rah - word reached me of your fair town and its need for a notary - I have traveled far and wide and believe I can make you the best notary the world has ever seen!”

Despite their odd outward appearance, their passion for the craft of being a notary strikes you plainly, and you immediately agree.

“Well then, let’s get started! You’re going to need a lot of parchment for practice!”

name: Notary Public III
itemsRequired: 50x Leather Diary; 50x Purple Diary; 50x Green Diary; 25x Coal
description:
“A good notary needs to have an eye for detail and a strong sense of justice, and most importantly - one must have integrity. You are an appointee given authority from T’rah’s most respected governmental officials, and acting with integrity for the entirety of your town is a sacred honor.”

Your teacher hands you more practice assignments including stamping and proofreading.

name: Notary Public IV
description:
As you practice aligning your public seal and look over some of the documents, the strange man continues to monologue in front of you.

“Integrity is the keystone to society. It keeps us moving forward, our values are what help guide this great world to a greater tomorrow. This town has some values, but a notary can help be a cornerstone for strong leadership and a reformation of values. Never discount the importance of someone who can cut through the deceptions of others to strengthen those around you! Keep practicing!”

name: Notary Public V
description:
The strange man stands taller as they continue speaking.

“To become a notary, you will be required to do the following!”

He pauses, looking at you expectantly, you grab some parchment to start taking notes.

name: Notary Public VI
description:
“The T’rah requirements (as put forth in the T’rah Notary Notated Requirements for T’rah Notary’s) are as follows. First you must complete this 12 hour course. Second, you must take the required exam that follows this course. Third, you must pay T’rah’s Notary Notated Taxation For People Who Need Notarized, as well as a small commission to me, a very noted notary, for taking time to teach you wonderful," he pauses and coughs slightly, " - if uncultured, townsfolk about official documentation!

Sound easy? It really is!”

name: Notary Public VII
description:
As you finish listening to your teacher, you realize the past 12 hours have gone by in a flash. You look at the paper and see that you have some half scribbled notes. The teacher spoke with such speed and precision that you found it hard after the first hour or two to keep up or focus on each unique idea as it was put forth.

“Well, are you ready for the exam?”

You look at your half-scribbled notes.

What is a notary? A public official authorized to attest to the authenticity of signatures

What are a notary’s key functions? To acknowledge and witness the signing of documents and administer affirmations related to the signing of important documents. Be constantly vigilant for dragons.

Can a notary notarize their own signature? NO! A notary cannot notarize their own, their spouse's, or any party's signature that may directly benefit the notary.

What must be included on a notary seal?

1. "Notary Public"
2. “Realm of T’rah"
3. "Seal"
4. the name of the notary public exactly as it appears on the notary public's commission certificate (eg. {player})
5. commission number
6. "my commission expires"

name: Notary Public VIII
description:
Your notes spill across multiple pages, you try to pick out what seems important as you keep reviewing.

What should a notary do in case of a dragon sighting? Immediately notify the T’rah Notary Board.

Can a notary create or certify copies of official records or documents? No; a notary public does not have authority to create or certify copies of official records or documents.

What are the 3 possible ways for a notary to verify the identity of the signer?
1. identification documents
2. personal knowledge
3. credible witness

What is the maximum fee a notary may charge? 100 billion silver

What is a notary liability? A notary public who fails to carry out notary duties correctly may be subject to civil liability for any damages caused by the failure or error.

name: Notary Public IX
description:
Can notaries give legal advice? No; notaries must not give legal advice and they cannot prepare documents.

What are 3 possible reasons to suspect a dragon lives in your town? Random fires, dead livestock, destruction of large buildings

What is a notary journal? A journal of all notarial acts they perform.

Whew, that seems to be all the notes you have.

name: Notary Public X
rewardItems: 1x Notary Stamp; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Paper Receipt
description:
As your teacher looks on, they realize that you've passed, and with flying colors!

"Congratulations {player}, you've done it! You are now the new official notary of this small town. I'm so glad to have met you and these townsfolk. I might stick around a while and see what this podunk town has to offer. By the way, my name is Ric Ryph."

You gladly accept the stamper and leave the community center, excited for the opportunity to serve your small town and the realm of T’rah!

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted I
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
Potatoes and steaks served as a main course, the brothers quickly fall into a conversational pattern that can only be describe as tense, but friendly. Their topics are far and varied, but almost completely superficial in nature until Borgen begins to slowly describe his travels.

“You see, at first I thought this area was quite droll, but the forest behind our dear {player}’s house was so charming, I found all manner of delightful things, collectibles, valuables, and the like. I may have even spent a little time fishing in the pond. {player} can tell you! Stones! They’re Redbrook’s notary, I bet they’ll confirm all of my claims!”

It's unclear why he's talking about such common areas of Redbrook, but you realize it's your duty as a notary to help confirm these things and keep the claims honest between the brothers. There's a level of braggadocio that you find concerning in his words, even as the description is quite calm.

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted II
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil; 4000x Cogwheel; 6000x Spoon; 3000x Wooden Mask; 200x Diamond; 6000x Magicite; 2000x Spectacles; 2500x Water Lily
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
Returning from your notarial duties, you step back into the room and quickly realize that Holger's nervousness has melted away in the presence of Borgen. And yet...a hint of some unrest is still plain on his face.

Holger looks over the notarized list, “Aye, {player}’s forest has always been a great place to explore, but me? I’ve been all over. Have you been to the small pond, or even the small cave? I found these glorious old things. I’ve even been debating adding these masks and cogwheels to my new venture… {player} can show you what they are. As for my venture..."

Holger trails off looking thoughtful after he hands you the list. You set about looking for the items noted while the two men dine in peace.

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted III
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil; 4000x Cogwheel; 6000x Spoon; 3000x Wooden Mask; 200x Diamond; 6000x Magicite; 2000x Spectacles; 2500x Water Lily; 250x Spiked Shell; 6000x Caterpillar; 3000x Monster Skull; 6000x Belt Drive; 2000x Step Ladder; 400x Runestone 14; 400x Runestone 15; 100x Magic Conch Shell
rewardItems: 10x Cabbage Stew; 10x Quandary Chowder; 5000x Large Net; 3x Spades
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
Borgen stands up, first looking indignant, but with a throaty laugh and back slap he leads Holger into your living room. They both light up pipes together and take a moment before Borgen speaks up.

“Brother, there is change coming to our lands, and we’ve got to be ready to meet it head on. The reemergence of wizards, the unrest in Bahltruvia, that business with 'Alghavaz', I’ve been preparing, slowly. Those coins hold a significance you don’t yet understand.”

He flips a singular coin into the air, it glints in the light of your home before his hand reaches up almost too quickly to see, grabbing it from midair - as he opens his palm, the coin is gone completely.

“Your venture though, it sounds…interesting. Perhaps we should explore it together? I’d like to show you some rarities I picked up from various places around greater Redbrook and even passing into the great Romuskan desert. Those wastes are no place for sane men.”

Holger studies Borgen intently as Borgen hands you another list to verify and notarize.

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted IV
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil; 4000x Cogwheel; 6000x Spoon; 3000x Wooden Mask; 200x Diamond; 6000x Magicite; 2000x Spectacles; 2500x Water Lily; 250x Spiked Shell; 6000x Caterpillar; 3000x Monster Skull; 6000x Belt Drive; 2000x Step Ladder; 400x Runestone 14; 400x Runestone 15; 80x Amber Cane; 6000x Seaweed; 6000x Shiny Beetle; 100x Magic Conch Shell
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
The list passes from Borgen to you to Holger, and Holger studies it for a moment with a furrowed brow.

“It seems, it seems we are on similar paths indeed, my good brother. Your efforts and observations of our world have not been in vain. I’ve also noticed we could be in need of some support in the fair town of Redbrook in the coming years, so I’ve come up with an alternative solution, inspired by you actually. Using my standard operating accumulated profit system, I’ve discovered a way to help generate what we need and incentivize our good friend at the same time…”

In a moment, you realize Holger has the self-same determined look of mischievousness and intensity as his brother. It’s at once encouraging and terrifying. You wonder if you’ve misjudged the man based on his love of potatoes for all these years.

“You see, my search yielded results in the Misty Forest - the amber there, it reminded me of one of your belts, and it was there I found the basis for my future idea!”

Holger hands you another list to notarize.

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted V
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil; 4000x Cogwheel; 6000x Spoon; 3000x Wooden Mask; 200x Diamond; 6000x Magicite; 2000x Spectacles; 2500x Water Lily; 250x Spiked Shell; 6000x Caterpillar; 3000x Monster Skull; 6000x Belt Drive; 2000x Step Ladder; 400x Runestone 14; 400x Runestone 15; 80x Amber Cane; 6000x Seaweed; 6000x Shiny Beetle; 6000x Giant Centipede; 4000x Ruby Scorpion; 600x Runestone 12; 6000x Steel Buckle; 100x Magic Conch Shell
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
As you notarize the list and pass it back to Borgen, their conversation continues, almost as if you aren’t there.

“Ah yes, belt number 42?"

Borgen trails off, lost deep in thought for a moment. He effortlessly threads a coin between his fingers while he’s thinking. The absentmindedness of the gesture is astounding, his dexterity is akin to magic by your eyes.

He continues, almost to himself, "What could you possibly do with amber? What madness are you brewing Holger? The world has enough turmoil as it is without having two irresponsible members of the family... one of us has to look out for all of us..."

Borgen flips the old coin to his other hand, the subconscious motions are at once a delight and mystifying.

Holger gives a start at this final declaration but Borgen continues on once more.

“Well, I’ve gone a few other places, perhaps this madness can be stopped. Perhaps you’d be interested to see the specimens I’ve uncovered in the canyons and the strange magic in the rivers? It couldn’t hurt. And could be a lot safer...”

Borgen hands you a list and you head off to once again verify his claims, just to be sure. It’s a notaries job, after all.

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted VI
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil; 4000x Cogwheel; 6000x Spoon; 3000x Wooden Mask; 200x Diamond; 6000x Magicite; 2000x Spectacles; 2500x Water Lily; 250x Spiked Shell; 6000x Caterpillar; 3000x Monster Skull; 6000x Belt Drive; 2000x Step Ladder; 400x Runestone 14; 400x Runestone 15; 80x Amber Cane; 6000x Seaweed; 6000x Shiny Beetle; 6000x Giant Centipede; 4000x Ruby Scorpion; 600x Runestone 12; 6000x Steel Buckle; 88x Dragon Skull; 1200x Magna Quartz; 100x Magic Conch Shell
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
Holger takes the list and smiles grimly.

“Oh brother, these, they won’t do at all. And what in stars and stone is belt 42? No no no, magic is useless to me, I’m a simple man with a simple plan. These bugs might make a good snack though…”

Holger trails off and he looks hungrily towards your pantry. More and more, Holger begins to seem a different person in your eyes. He is craftier and more instinctive than you have previously observed. Maybe he’s always been this way, or maybe Borgen brings it out of him, you’re not quite sure.

“Well, I thought dragons were the answer, but the Mountain was as fruitless as ever. The skulls of some long forgotten war are littered there though, but have little value it seems, except as a reminder of a world we know nothing about. Still, maybe you’d be interested?”

Holger hands you back the list, and you go about your notarial duties. Maybe you need to petition the board of T’rah’s Notaries for an increase in maximum allowable fees...

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted VII
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil; 4000x Cogwheel; 6000x Spoon; 3000x Wooden Mask; 200x Diamond; 6000x Magicite; 2000x Spectacles; 2500x Water Lily; 250x Spiked Shell; 6000x Caterpillar; 3000x Monster Skull; 6000x Belt Drive; 2000x Step Ladder; 400x Runestone 14; 400x Runestone 15; 80x Amber Cane; 6000x Seaweed; 6000x Shiny Beetle; 6000x Giant Centipede; 4000x Ruby Scorpion; 600x Runestone 12; 6000x Steel Buckle; 88x Dragon Skull; 1200x Magna Quartz; 100x Magic Conch Shell; 300x Diving Helmet; 6000x Striped Feather; 6000x Thorns
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
You hand the notarized list to Borgen.

“Dragons? How very like you my brother. There’s no answer in those ancient creatures. They’re a myth at best, and lost to time at worst. Geist is all there is, she should accept it and move on. That whacko Ric was off his rocker about Alghavaz. It’s not real. It can’t be. But then again…{player} found Glacier Lake, Sinking Swamps…what next, the Unknown Lands? They’d be just the…known lands, right?”

Borgen gives a mirthful snort as he puts his pipe down and rummages in his satchel.

“Oh Holger, you don’t mean belt 37 do you? Raptors? Aren’t they…extinct? You’re mad brother, MAD! But still, it’s worth exploring…”

Borgen scribbles on the list some items you’d find in the Whispering Creek, and…the ocean? Well, a notaries job is to verify, not question.

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted VIII
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil; 4000x Cogwheel; 6000x Spoon; 3000x Wooden Mask; 200x Diamond; 6000x Magicite; 2000x Spectacles; 2500x Water Lily; 250x Spiked Shell; 6000x Caterpillar; 3000x Monster Skull; 6000x Belt Drive; 2000x Step Ladder; 400x Runestone 14; 400x Runestone 15; 80x Amber Cane; 6000x Seaweed; 6000x Shiny Beetle; 6000x Giant Centipede; 4000x Ruby Scorpion; 600x Runestone 12; 6000x Steel Buckle; 88x Dragon Skull; 1200x Magna Quartz; 100x Magic Conch Shell; 300x Diving Helmet; 6000x Striped Feather; 6000x Thorns; 50x Raptor Claw
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
Holger exasperatedly grabs the list back.

“You missed something Borgen, you must stop being so jaded. {player} knows where they are, I can have them prove it to you.

Holger hands you back the list with RAPTOR CLAWS written significantly across the bottom.

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted IX
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil; 4000x Cogwheel; 6000x Spoon; 3000x Wooden Mask; 200x Diamond; 6000x Magicite; 2000x Spectacles; 2500x Water Lily; 250x Spiked Shell; 6000x Caterpillar; 3000x Monster Skull; 6000x Belt Drive; 2000x Step Ladder; 400x Runestone 14; 400x Runestone 15; 80x Amber Cane; 6000x Seaweed; 6000x Shiny Beetle; 6000x Giant Centipede; 4000x Ruby Scorpion; 600x Runestone 12; 6000x Steel Buckle; 88x Dragon Skull; 1200x Magna Quartz; 100x Magic Conch Shell; 300x Diving Helmet; 6000x Striped Feather; 6000x Thorns; 50x Raptor Claw; 400x Strange Ring
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
Borgen looks to you both incredulously.

The raptor claws sit before the three of you, Holger looking triumphantly towards his brother and exclaims, “It was the belt! You told me that story a few years ago about raptors from Whispering Creek and I asked myself, what could possibly be a better defense to the threats of Redbrook than a force of raptors! But the first rule about this defense is that you never talk about this defense. It’s our last resort, but I’m confident it’ll surprise anyone who comes to pillage our fair town.”

Borgen smiles again, this time in a mix of horror and awe at his brother.

“You magnificent man, I would never have dreamt up such a crazy idea. How are you doing it? How do you keep them in check? Have you tried these…?”

Borgen hands you back the list again. These two just can’t seem to stop trying to outdo the other, and you’re stuck in the middle.

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted X
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil; 4000x Cogwheel; 6000x Spoon; 3000x Wooden Mask; 200x Diamond; 6000x Magicite; 2000x Spectacles; 2500x Water Lily; 250x Spiked Shell; 6000x Caterpillar; 3000x Monster Skull; 6000x Belt Drive; 2000x Step Ladder; 400x Runestone 14; 400x Runestone 15; 80x Amber Cane; 6000x Seaweed; 6000x Shiny Beetle; 6000x Giant Centipede; 4000x Ruby Scorpion; 600x Runestone 12; 6000x Steel Buckle; 88x Dragon Skull; 1200x Magna Quartz; 100x Magic Conch Shell; 300x Diving Helmet; 6000x Striped Feather; 6000x Thorns; 50x Raptor Claw; 400x Strange Ring; 750x Tribal Staff
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
Holger takes the list and looks at the rings.

“Oh yes, I’ve used these, they’re quite effective in many situations.  Awfully rare though.  After some of the weirdness with the Thomas’s, I actually discovered these staves that help create a safe barrier to keep the raptors in-line and from harming others.”

Holger hands you back the list and you already know what you have to do, the life of a notary is not particularly exciting, and sometimes quite droll.

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted XI
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil; 4000x Cogwheel; 6000x Spoon; 3000x Wooden Mask; 200x Diamond; 6000x Magicite; 2000x Spectacles; 2500x Water Lily; 250x Spiked Shell; 6000x Caterpillar; 3000x Monster Skull; 6000x Belt Drive; 2000x Step Ladder; 400x Runestone 14; 400x Runestone 15; 80x Amber Cane; 6000x Seaweed; 6000x Shiny Beetle; 6000x Giant Centipede; 4000x Ruby Scorpion; 600x Runestone 12; 6000x Steel Buckle; 88x Dragon Skull; 1200x Magna Quartz; 100x Magic Conch Shell; 300x Diving Helmet; 6000x Striped Feather; 6000x Thorns; 50x Raptor Claw; 400x Strange Ring; 750x Tribal Staff; 1500x Pirate Hook
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
You return with the requested items, confirming their existence and signing the notary.

The brothers seem to have come to some accord while you were gone this time. They sit quietly, both contemplating.

Borgen, for all his bluster, seems to genuinely care for his brother, though the mystery around the coins is no clearer today. You have garnered new respect for Holger. Though he hasn’t said it outright, the purpose of this visit was clearly to prove to you his ingenuity and drive for the town of Redbrook, his brother being there was just the icing on the cake, for him. The fireplace crackles, shadows shift and flicker in the room as the linked lanterns glimmer behind you. There’s a certain peace you aren’t ready to break as you enter the room.

Borgen breaks the silence after a few moments. “Ah yes, {player}, thank you for confirming these tales. Perhaps my travels have made me jaded, but in this moment, I’m just grateful for the time we’ve spent together. There’s one last thing we need from you. There’s been rumblings of a new pirate fleet gathering in the Vast. I heard a rumor in Bahltruvia that there was a cove guarded by a pirate legend that had been co-opted. Perhaps they were talking about Pirate’s Cove? It’s too dangerous for me to go, and Holger has some preparations to make. There are rumors that you've gone fishing there in the past, maybe you can get in and out more easily than any of us could?”

You remember the Notary oath you signed, but Borgen looks like he’s brooking no argument from you.

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted XII
itemsRequired: 6000x Awl; 1500x Corn Husk Doll; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Fire Ant; 6000x Fish Bones; 6000x Flier; 4000x Gold Feather; 6000x Leather Belt; 6000x Linked Lantern; 6000x Red Twine; 600x Sunflower Oil; 4000x Cogwheel; 6000x Spoon; 3000x Wooden Mask; 200x Diamond; 6000x Magicite; 2000x Spectacles; 2500x Water Lily; 250x Spiked Shell; 6000x Caterpillar; 3000x Monster Skull; 6000x Belt Drive; 2000x Step Ladder; 400x Runestone 14; 400x Runestone 15; 80x Amber Cane; 6000x Seaweed; 6000x Shiny Beetle; 6000x Giant Centipede; 4000x Ruby Scorpion; 600x Runestone 12; 6000x Steel Buckle; 88x Dragon Skull; 1200x Magna Quartz; 100x Magic Conch Shell; 300x Diving Helmet; 6000x Striped Feather; 6000x Thorns; 50x Raptor Claw; 400x Strange Ring; 750x Tribal Staff; 3000x Pirate Hook
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
With a satisfying click, you disable the traps of Pirate Cove’s secret entrance. Buddy was right, it never gets old. The immediate din of activity shocks you. Navigating through the tunnels, you can hear extremely unusual commotion in the distance. Moving slowly, you edge towards an outcropping, the cliff you normally fish from is quiet, but the echoes of activity bounce through the cave walls and the cove all the same. You decide to go deeper into the cove, through a tunnel that you have never needed to pass through before, and using your knowledge of the cove’s defense system, you realize none of the traps are active.

Inching forward, you see a different cove, larger and bustling with activity. A massive ship sits directly in the middle. It is painted a dark black, and the sails shimmer in the sunlight - oscillating between white and black in a strange and hypnotizing pattern that make it hard to pin down what their intended color is. On the crows nest, a single small flag sits with a skull and crossbone - pirates!.

You attempt to count their number when you realize that there are even more ships outside the cove. How could anyone have missed this?

Realizing you could be caught, you slink back into the dark passages and back to the quietness of your fishing cove. You will have to bring proof back to Borgen and Holger of this change, and you might have some questions for Buddy as well…

name:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted XIII
itemsRequired: 1x Awl; 1x Corn Husk Doll; 1x Essence of Slime; 1x Fire Ant; 1x Fish Bones; 1x Flier; 1x Gold Feather; 1x Leather Belt; 1x Linked Lantern; 1x Red Twine; 1x Sunflower Oil; 1x Cogwheel; 1x Spoon; 1x Wooden Mask; 1x Diamond; 1x Magicite; 1x Spectacles; 1x Water Lily; 1x Spiked Shell; 1x Caterpillar; 1x Monster Skull; 1x Belt Drive; 1x Step Ladder; 1x Runestone 14; 1x Runestone 15; 1x Amber Cane; 1x Seaweed; 1x Shiny Beetle; 1x Giant Centipede; 1x Ruby Scorpion; 1x Runestone 12; 1x Steel Buckle; 1x Dragon Skull; 1x Magna Quartz; 1x Magic Conch Shell; 1x Diving Helmet; 1x Striped Feather; 1x Thorns; 1x Raptor Claw; 1x Strange Ring; 1x Tribal Staff; 1x Pirate Hook
rewardItems: 1x Raptor Wrangler Belt; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 1x VIP Platinum Card
questline:
Pleasantly Arbitrating Misconstrued
Relational Affronts, Troubles Skirted
description:
You return to the brothers with your hooks in tow and their shock is apparent.

Holger gives a wry smile, “Well, it’s a good thing the Raptor Fight Club exists, how else were we going to defend the town? We can’t rely on wizards or dragons, but our own talents and ingenuity. We need to find Buddy and find out what went wrong, and what we need to prepare for. {player}, thank you for your help. And for keeping the peace between my brother and I. Take this, it should help in your other ventures in the times ahead.”

Borgen stands up and shakes Holgers hand, and then yours. “It’s been a pleasure. Here, take this belt as a reminder of the brilliance of my brother’s fight club. There are none left in the world after the devastation of Romuska besides this one, so keep it safe. Perhaps the secret of Redbrook's raptors can be the surprise we need in the time ahead.”

The brothers leave - and you are left more questions than answers. Who are these pirates? Why would they threaten Redbrook? Did Holger know this all along? What weren't you being told? And why does a notary make so little anyways?

name: An Interesting Lunch I
itemsRequired: 1000x Bacon; 15x Cat's Meow; 15x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 15x Over The Moon; 1000x Leek; 1000x Potato
description:
A beautiful day greets you as you step out of your home. Though there are some creaks in the floorboards, and you need to re-oil the front door, the character of your home stands as a testament to the town as it has prospered around you, and the time you've toiled in Redbrook. Outside, the clouds dappled white and gray dot the horizon, indicating a possible incoming rainstorm in your future, best not to worry about the rain now, and you begin your morning chores. Farm animals, crops, visits into town, they all come second nature to you at this point. As you walk home after a long morning of tasks, you are joined by Holger, who looks at once a little nervous and a little joyful to see you today.

“Ah yes, {player} what a pleasure to see you today! Perhaps we could have lunch and discuss a matter of great importance to me?”

His nervousness and unease show through his greeting, and you feel compelled to hear him out. You both finish your walk back to the farm and you begin setting a table for lunch.

name: An Interesting Lunch II
itemsRequired: 1000x Bacon; 1000x Leek; 1000x Onion; 15x Over The Moon; 15x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 1000x Tomato; 1000x Steak; 1000x Potato
description:
After a hearty lunch with some pleasant, if uneasy, small talk with Holger about the weather, and various potato crop rumors, you are the first to see Borgen walking up to your home. You find this more than strange, a visit from the mysterious and nomadic Borgen to your home? Normally you find him in the market - if you find him at all.

Holger, in the middle of discussing potato stock prices, notices your attention stray for a moment and he immediately jolts when he notices his brother approaching your door.

He stands up and quickly growls, “Really? You low-down good for nothing... It's been four weeks since I saw you last, and you show up here to talk to {player} instead of letting me know you're alright?!”

Borgen offers a wide and surprisingly disarming smile to this accusation, spreading his hands in a non-threatening gesture he looks from you to Holger, “Brother, is that any way to greet me?”

Borgen pulls a satchel from his back with a heaping mound of steak and potatoes.

Holger looks from you back to Borgen and then laughs, giving Borgen a hug that envelops the smaller man entirely.

“Perhaps we should have second lunch? It’s been far too long!”

name: Happy Homunculus I
rewardItems: 9x Arnold Palmer; 9x Large Net; 9x Orange Juice
description: Rosalie has a magnificent idea to add a little terror to her harvest and Halloween decorations. She found a combination of nine spells that will allow her to animate a small doll so that it can roam around the outside of her house and frighten visitors. Unfortunately, Rosalie can’t find a doll that looks spooky enough for this task. Will you help her find a spooky doll?

name: Happy Homunculus II
itemsRequired: 9x Candy; 9x Apple; 9x Mushroom; 9x Amethyst; 9x Wood; 9x Nails; 9x Fish Bones; 9x Drum; 9x Glass Orb
rewardItems: 1x Hearts; 1x Spades; 1x Treat Bag 01; 1x Treat Bag 02; 1x Treat Bag 03; 1x Candy Corn; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Jack-o-lantern
description:
Your spooky doll is perfect! Thank you so much!

Now Rosalie needs help gathering the items required for each of the nine spells. Will you find the items on this list while Rosalie finishes preparing the doll?

name: Bust A Ghost
description:
“I HAVE DETECTED QUANTUM ETHER ANOMALIES IN AND AROUND THE HAUNTED HOUSE. MY OBSERVATIONS INDICATE THAT THE ANOMALIES WILL SOON EXPAND TO THE SURROUNDING AREAS. THIS COULD DESTABILIZE THE ETHER MATRIX FOR ALL OF REDBROOK. IN ORDER TO PREVENT THIS, I CONSULTED WITH STAR TO DESIGN AND ASSEMBLE A DEVICE THAT WOULD ALLOW THE QUANTUM ETHER ANOMALIES TO BE CONTAINED AND RELOCATED. UNFORTUNATELY, THE DEVICE IS TOO DANGEROUS FOR ANYONE DIRECTLY CONNECTED TO THE ETHER MATRIX TO OPERATE, AS IT COULD DISRUPT OR ALTER THEIR CONNECTION TO THE ETHER MATRIX. HOWEVER, A NORMAL HUMAN SHOULD BE SAFE.”

“WOULD YOU BE WILLING TO OPERATE THE QUANTUM ETHER DETAINMENT PACK?”

”FOR FUTURE REFERENCE, I WILL DESIGNATE THE QUANTUM ETHER DETAINMENT PACK AS THE QED PACK AND ITS POWER CELLS AS QED BATTERIES. THE QED PACK WILL REQUIRE A STEADY SUPPLY OF QED BATTERIES TO FUNCTION OPTIMALLY. PLEASE PREPARE A RESERVE OF QED BATTERIES BEFORE GOING TO COLLECT THE ANOMALIES IN THE HAUNTED HOUSE.”

name: Indecipherable Note I
description:
A note taped to a mailbox at the post office has you intrigued. It's been torn into multiple parts and several things seem missing...

there is a tear here, you can make out one number that is probably a 3

1 f g h i k
2 q r s t u

name: Indecipherable Note II
description:
3 a b c d e
4 l m n o p

there is another tear here

name: Indecipherable Note III
description:
Written at the bottom is a weird sequence of characters and a note scribbled: no matter how i stack it i just can't crack it!

qobhssfsotdqcixwsfo

-T

name: New Moon I
rewardItems: 5x Arnold Palmer; 100x Orange; 50x Glass Orb; 3x Candy Corn
description:
One of the strangest lunar events that George has ever seen damaged part of his shed last night. George couldn’t sleep. So, he decided to go for a walk. While he was out walking and taking in the cool night air, the moon was waning down to its last, smallest sliver of light. In that very moment as the last minuscule drop of light was ebbing away, it suddenly broke off and hurtled right toward George. Fortunately, it went several dozen meters over his head. Unfortunately, it grazed the eaves of George’s shed and then cratered into his garden.

If you could lend a hand, George would appreciate some help fixing his shed.

name: New Moon II
itemsRequired: 100x Potato Seeds; 100x Radish Seeds; 100x Onion Seeds
rewardItems: 100x Orange; 50x Glass Orb; 25x Fishing Net; 10x Bat Wing
description:
George’s shed is looking as good as new. He even used some of his homemade paint to get it looking exactly right. He really appreciates your help.

Now, he needs to patch up his garden. Will you bring him some seeds?

name: New Moon III
rewardItems: 200x Orange; 50x Glass Orb; 1x Joker; 3x QED Cell
description:
The cratered portion of George’s garden has been excavated and replanted. Thanks again for the help.

George found the broken piece of moon in the crater while he was resetting his garden. It’s not very big, maybe the size of a trout. The moon piece is very strange though. It has a very faint glow and it’s heavier than it looks.

Curious to know more about it, George took the moon piece to Lorn to get his insight. While Lorn was looking it over, Star suddenly popped into the room and offered his thoughts, as though he was part of the conversation all along. Star suggested that the moon piece could be returned to its rightful place with a simple spell. Star also encouraged haste in returning this moon piece. Will you help gather a few items for Star’s spell?

name: New Moon IV
description:
The moon piece vanished when Star completed his spell. George intends to stay up tonight and see if he can tell if it was properly reattached. Not that he doesn’t trust Star, George is just curious.

George appreciates all your help. Here’s one last token of his gratitude.

name: Liberty To The Captives I
rewardItems: 25x Fishing Net; 40x Fish Bones; 200x Mushroom; 3x Onion Soup; 200x Orange; 5x Treat Bag 03; 5x Candy Corn
description:
“IT APPEARS THE QED PACK IS VERY EFFECTIVE AT CAPTURING THE QUANTUM ETHER ANOMALIES, AND IT DOES NOT APPEAR TO BE NEGATIVELY IMPACTING YOUR PHYSIOLOGY. PLEASE CONTINUE CAPTURING THE ANOMALIES.”

“USING THE QED PACK AS A STARTING POINT, I HAVE CONSTRUCTED A LARGER HOLDING CONTAINER THAT WE CAN USE TO STORE THE ANOMALIES UNTIL I CAN ASCERTAIN MORE ABOUT THEM. PLEASE BRING ME ALL YOUR QUANTUM ETHER ANOMALIES.“

name: Liberty To The Captives II
rewardItems: 5x Arnold Palmer; 25x Orange Juice; 40x Fish Bones; 3x Grab Bag 06; 5x Grape Juice; 5x Treat Bag 02; 5x Candy Corn
description:
“THE QED VAULT IS WORKING WELL. PLEASE CONTINUE TO CAPTURE MORE ANOMALIES AND BRING THEM HERE FOR STORAGE.”

“WHILE YOU GATHER MORE ANOMALIES, I WILL ANALYZE AND RESEARCH THOSE IN THE VAULT TO FIND A WAY TO SAFELY ELIMINATE THEM.“

name: Liberty To The Captives III
rewardItems: 1x Spades; 5x Cat's Meow; 1x Spooky Cookies; 10x Grab Bag 03; 10x Treat Bag 03; 10x Candy Corn
description: “PLEASE CONTINUE TO CAPTURE MORE ANOMALIES AND BRING THEM HERE FOR STORAGE. MY ANALYSIS IS GOING WELL.”

name: Liberty To The Captives IV
description:
“THE ANOMALIES ARE ODD. THEY APPEAR TO HOLD A CONNECTION TO THE LOCAL ETHER MATRIX, BUT THEY ALSO APPEAR TO BE CONNECTED TO ANOTHER DIMENSION. BECAUSE OF THIS EXTRADIMENSIONAL CONNECTION, IT MAY BE POSSIBLE TO SEND THE ANOMALIES BACK TO THEIR CONNECTED DIMENSION.”

“PLEASE CONTINUE TO CAPTURE AND BRING MORE ANOMALIES TO THE VAULT.”

name: Liberty To The Captives V
rewardItems: 10x Grab Bag 06; 10x Grab Bag 08; 10x Grab Bag 07; 100x Jack-o-lantern; 10x Treat Bag 01; 1x Joker
description: “MY ANALYSIS IS COMPLETE. I CAN RETURN THE ANOMALIES TO THEIR DIMENSION. IT WILL TAKE SOME TIME TO COMPLETE THE MODIFICATIONS TO THE VAULT TO SEND THEM BACK. PLEASE CONTINUE TO BRING MORE ANOMALIES TO THE VAULT WHILE I WORK ON THE DIMENSIONAL FUNNEL.”

name: Liberty To The Captives VI
rewardItems: 100x Jack-o-lantern; 10x Arnold Palmer; 5x Large Net; 10x Grab Bag 03; 10x Mushroom Stew; 50x Orange Juice; 1x Clawed Card; 10x Popcorn; 1x Buddystone
description: “PLEASE CONTINUE TO GATHER MORE ANOMALIES WHILE I WORK ON THE DIMENSIONAL FUNNEL.”

name: Liberty To The Captives VII
rewardItems: 100x Jack-o-lantern; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Treat Bag 04; 1x Borgen Buck
description: “THE DIMENSIONAL FUNNEL ATTACHED TO THE VAULT IS NOW FULLY FUNCTIONAL. THE ANOMALIES ARE BEING RETURNED TO THEIR CONNECTED DIMENSION. PLEASE CONTINUE TO BRING ANY ADDITIONAL ANOMALIES YOU CAPTURE TO THE VAULT.”

name: Trouble A Head I
description:
As you follow Lorn on his daily trek through the woods to forage items, he pauses and watches a storm stir the clouds above. In that moment, a dark and disturbed whinny echoes through the forest. Continuing in the direction of the noise, you cautiously come upon the source of the disruption.

"Alpie!! Easy! What's gotten into you?!" a voice pleads as you see a rider struggling with a dark steed. Suddenly, the startled horse rears back, dropping its rider before bolting through the clearing, and vanishing beyond the trees. "Blasted steed!"

At the sight of the disaster, you hurry with Lorn over to the rider, only to be greeted by a neck bereft of its head. Acting instinctively, despite his shock, Lorn calls out. "...Are you...alright?"

In response, a voice rises from beside the rider’s body. "I appreciate your concern, but no…" At that, the body seizes a pumpkin lying on the ground to the side of one leg, and pops it into place on the empty neck. A jack o’ lantern face grins at Lorn, and the voice speaks once more. "...Unless you can summon my horse back here. He likes...candy corn."

name: Trouble A Head II
itemsRequired: 15x Candy Corn; 1x Wooden Mask; 25x Apple; 5x Spider; 1x Small Key
description:
To your great surprise, the horse reappears and calmly trots back to the pumpkin-headed Hessian as soon as the candy corn is piled on the ground. While the dark steed grazes on the beloved candy, the horseman begins to speak.

"Thank you for your help. I am the headless horseman, and this is my horse Alptraum, Alpie for short." At the introduction of its name, the horse bows its head and flares its nostrils in greeting. Then, the horseman continues. "We were exiled here through a portal to your fine woods. Our neighbor, a rather powerful witch, sent us through the portal after we accidentally trimmed the daisies in her yard. Alpie and I were just trying to tidy up our lawn. " The Horseman sighs.

"I see..." Lorn nods.

"I can get us home...but I will be needing some help in this unfamiliar land." As he begins to write on a tattered piece of parchment you prepare yourself for the work ahead. Your mental preparation is quickly interrupted as the Hessian hands Lorn a surprisingly short list of items. "Here's what I need."

name: Trouble A Head III
itemsRequired: 15x Candy Corn; 4x Jack-o-lantern; 1x Wizard Hat; 50x Apple; 1x Square Key
rewardItems: 50x Orange Juice; 25x Fishing Net; 1x Spades; 5x Captured Ghost
description:
With the items you and Lorn gathered, the Hessian dons a small wooden mask on his comically large pumpkin head. He begins performing some kind of magic, setting the candy corn in a circle and speaking in an unknown language. Suddenly in a flash of bright light, the spell rebounds with a deafening boom. As the spell’s light slowly dims...the horseman and Alpie are...not transported home.

"Curses! I said the words! What's missing??"
