The Hessian turns to look at the circle and his lantern eyes dim a little in disappointment.

"Ah! It appears I've forgotten a few items."

Filled with new hope, the Hessian turns his great pumpkin head in your direction and speaks. "I hate to ask again, but, would the two of you help me once more?"

name: Trouble A Head IV
rewardItems: 10x Grape Juice; 200x Orange; 200x Lemon; 1x Get Well Soon Card; 25x Fishing Net; 2x Breakfast Boost
description:
Once more, you and Lorn bring the items requested by the horseman. This time, he begins by putting on a wizard hat and setting the candy corn and pumpkins in a circle. As he starts to speak the unknown magic, the pumpkins start glowing. Then, they start growing around each other, forming a solid ring of fused pumpkins and candy corn. The ground starts to rumble. The bright light appears again and…there is Alpie munching on the candy corn set in the circle.

The Hessian cries out, "Alpie! No!!!"

Unfortunately, the warning comes too late, and a vine from the now-enormous pumpkin ring lashes out, knocking the Hessian clear of the spell’s circle. With the horseman’s control now broken, the pumpkin circle shrivels and collapses with the spell's fading light.

You quickly follow Lorn over to assist the downed horseman, and offer a hand to help him up. Lorn extends a hand in front of the horseman's eyes and asks, "How many fingers am I holding up?"

The Hessian, dazed by the powerful blow from the vine, looks at Lorn's hand and replies. "...Thirteen?"

Looking to you and clearly concerned, Lorn says, "Oh dear...We’re going to need some things to help him recover."

name: Trouble A Head V
itemsRequired: 15x Candy Corn; 1x Wooden Mask; 1x Wizard Hat; 50x Apple; 4x Jack-o-lantern; 1x Small Key; 1x Square Key; 4x Witch Hat; 5x Spider; 8x Bat Wing
rewardItems: 5x Arnold Palmer; 50x Orange Juice; 25x Fishing Net; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Spades
description:
After Lorn’s efforts to help him recover, the Hessian sits and rests against a tree while Alpie stands sentinel over him. The lantern light coming from the Hessian’s great pumpkin head dims to nearly complete darkness. For several minutes all is calm. Then suddenly, flames burst from the Hessian’s pumpkin head and he cries out.

“I REMEMBER!”

The horseman then begins to desperately dig through his pockets until he finds one last torn slip of parchment and his pencil. He furiously scribbles a list and then extends it to Lorn.

"This is it! It’s all I need. I’m sure of it!" As the horseman speaks, the flame-like light in his eyes relaxes to a soothing, joyful glow.

Once again Lorn accepts the horseman’s list and then offers his own assurance. "Very well. We’ll find what you need."

name: Trouble A Head VI
description:
With all of the items gathered from his list, the horseman sets the circle once more and begins to chant his spell. This time, the magic works smoothly and Alpie resists the urge to snack. A bright purple light sprouts from the ground and a portal opens to the Hessian's home. The horseman’s carved grin looks somehow happier than usual and his inner flame roars in excitement. He turns to face you and Lorn, and then bows gratefully.

"Thank you so much for your help."

"It was our pleasure. We both love a good adventure. Now don’t forget to mind those daisies?" Lorn chuckles.

The Hessian nods, and then gracefully swings into Alpie’s saddle.

"Excellent advice, my friend." the horseman says around his own chuckles and Alptraum’s whinny.

“Alpie, take us home.”

The horseman and his dark steed trot into the portal. As soon as they’re through, the gateway vanishes, the light extinguishes, and the remnants of the circle turn to dust. In the center of the circle where the Hessian stood, you now see a dark axe with a slip of parchment pinned between its blade and the ground. You pull the axe from the ground and Lorn picks up the parchment.

“It’s a note from the horseman.” Lorn says before reading it aloud. “Thanks again for all the help. I’ve never met any better or more helpful people than the two of you. I hope if you ever find yourself neck deep in trouble, or even just more adventure, this axe can be my way of lending you a hand.”

name: Masks Aren’t Scary, Kids I
rewardItems: 1x Spooky Cookies; 100x Large Net; 10x Captured Ghost; 2x Raptor Egg
description: Ragvin wants to export some of this Halloween fun to the islands of the Vast Ocean. He would be happy to pay you handsomely for a large supply of masks. Are you interested?

name: Masks Aren’t Scary, Kids II
rewardItems: 1x Protein Bar; 200x Arnold Palmer; 50x Grab Bag 06; 1x Diamonds; 10x Captured Ghost; 2x Raptor Egg
description: After stacking all the masks, Ragvin still has loads of room. Will you bring him another large supply of masks?

name: Masks Aren’t Scary, Kids III
rewardItems: 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Large Net; 100x Grab Bag 07; 100x Grab Bag 08; 500x Jack-o-lantern; 1x Borgen Buck; 5x Lemon Cream Pie; 10x Captured Ghost; 1x Apple Pie; 1x Joker; 2x Raptor Egg
description: Ragvin made more room for more masks, but he’s afraid that this will be the last bundle of masks he can squeeze into his hold safely. Will you kindly bring him a final enormous load of masks?

name: A Game Of Thanks I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice
description:
Would you like to join Jill and your friends for an evening of games? Jill has planned a Caves & Crawyrms campaign, and she also got three new games in the mail that she ordered six months ago. She hopes everyone is as excited as she is to try Pioneers of Gerstunv and Nova Kingdoms. The third game is a surprise for everyone, but especially for Lorn.

One more thing, Jill has a small game she made up in honor of the season. In order to play it, she would like everyone to bring several notes with things they are thankful for written on them. Then, Jill will mix them up and read them one at a time and everyone gets to guess who is grateful for whatever is on that note.

Sounds great, right? Will you come to game night?

TIP: Thankful Notes can be found in Cornucopia 02, which is part of the November Starter Pack and also obtained by completing 28 days of daily chores.

name: A Game Of Thanks II
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 10x Grape Juice; 1x Diamonds; 3x Grab Bag 03; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Cooked Turkey
description: Jill almost forgot. There is one more thing she needs for game night. Will you bring a refreshment to share with everyone?

name: Spooky Exchanges I
rewardItems: 10x Jack-o-lantern; 50x Orange Juice; 10x QED Cell; 10x Grab Bag 03
description: What could be better than loads of candy? Ancient coins and loads of candy! If you’ll bring Ghorgen some of both, he’ll trade you some great items.

name: Spooky Exchanges II
rewardItems: 100x Jack-o-lantern; 100x Orange Juice; 25x Large Net; 50x QED Cell; 10x Grab Bag 04
description: What does Ghorgen love more than candy corn? Ancient coins and candy corn! If you’ll bring Ghorgen some of both, he’ll trade you some great items.

name: Spooky Exchanges III
itemsRequired: 600x Ancient Coin; 600x Witch Hat; 600x Bat Wing
rewardItems: 100x Jack-o-lantern; 100x Orange Juice; 100x Large Net; 100x Arnold Palmer; 10x Popcorn; 1x Clubs; 1x Spades; 100x QED Cell; 10x Grab Bag 05
description: What does Ghorgen love more than bat wings and witch hats? Ancient coins and bat wings and witch hats! If you’ll bring Ghorgen some of all, he’ll trade you some great items.

name: Spooky Exchanges IV
rewardItems: 500x Jack-o-lantern; 500x Orange Juice; 500x Large Net; 500x Arnold Palmer; 100x QED Cell; 1x Diamonds; 1x Hearts; 25x Large Chest 02; 30x Treasure Key; 1x Protein Bar
description: What does Ghorgen love more than chattering teeth and spiders? Ancient coins and chattering teeth and spiders! If you’ll bring Ghorgen some of all, he’ll trade you some great items.

name: Spooky Exchanges V
rewardItems: 500x Orange Juice; 500x Large Net; 500x Arnold Palmer; 1x Horseman's Belt; 1x Joker
description: What does Ghorgen love more than hockey masks? Ancient coins and hockey masks! If you’ll bring Ghorgen some of both, he’ll trade you some great items.

name: Peculiar Endings VII
itemsRequired: 800x Wooden Bow; 800x Sturdy Sword; 800x Sturdy Bow; 800x Red Shield; 800x Green Shield; 800x Corn; 800x Corn Oil; 800x Linked Lantern
rewardItems: 200x Caterpillar; 50x Mega Cotton Seeds; 200x Small Chest 02; 50x Mega Beet Seeds; 50x Mega Sunflower Seeds
description:
Rosalie trips over the final phrase as she recites the glowing note out loud, but Cecil looks thoughtfully at the group. “Well then, I guess we’re going to have to recruit ROOMBA for the next phase of this plan.” The wizard slowly lifts and sets his staff down, the peculiar gem on top pulsing softly, he mutters some words underneath his breath that you can’t quite catch and in a brief moment, his eyes lose focus and Cecil goes completely still.

“Could have gone better,” Cecil’s eyes snap into focus again. The rest of the group has finally recovered from this sudden turn of events and begin to look at each other uneasily.

“We’re going to need a group of people to reckon with Ric, I think, and I’m going to need a group to help me deal with Star’s problem. Perhaps we should split up?”

Buddy mumbles, “Never split the party,” so quietly you don’t think anyone else heard. The assembled members of the Golden Leaf deliberate before coming to the conclusion that a division of labor could be most welcome in this scenario. Rosalie, Cecil, and Beatrix decide to head up that group, while Buddy, Lorn, and Charles decide to head up Team Ric. Both groups decide that you are best used as a link between both and Buddy immediately suggests recruiting Vincent to your cause which seems entirely plausible, so your first order of business is finding both Vincent and ROOMBA.

In the spirit of cooperation, Rosalie suggests a gift bag for Vincent with lots of weapons and useful survival tools. And for ROOMBA, extra corn for his strange power needs, which you gladly agree to help collect.

name: The Great Hunt I
itemsRequired: 5x Looking Glass; 1x Pocket Watch; 25x Apple; 4x Orange Juice; 2x Iced Tea; 2x Leather Bag; 2x Leather Waterskin
description:
“A golden turkey as big as a cabin! Just imagine it, Vincent!” Holger almost squeals with delight.

“How do you know it’s real? It seems like something that big and bright would be easy to spot.” Vincent says, trying with all his might not to crush Holger’s excitement.

“It is real! I’ve seen it! You can ask Borgen too. He saw it! We were out hunting pearl berries for my Gramma. We were on top of Cane Pole Ridge. That turkey was down in the canyon eating horned beetles. It must’ve been five or ten minutes that we watched it.”

Barely pausing to catch a breath, Holger continues. “I’m just asking you and our friend to come along and help me find it again. I’ll take care of everything else.”

Taking a deep breath, Vincent gives you the look. It’s the look of another adventure that will definitely not end as expected, perhaps even with the wrong person in a cage again, but it’s also the look of acceptance.

“Let us get a few things for the journey, and we’ll come with you.” Vincent says, accepting the adventure on your behalf.

name: The Great Hunt II
description:
As the party makes their way to Cane Pole Ridge, Holger calls to make camp near Buddy’s cave.

“Let’s go ahead and stop here for the day. I’m so hungry. Is anyone else hungry?”

“We still have a few hours of sunlight. I think we could make it to the woods near Cane Pole Ridge, if we press on.” Vincent responds.

Holger, looking desperate, pleads. “I haven’t eaten anything in at least an hour. My food bag is empty. I need something!”

“How about we all work together to make a quick meal, and then continue on a little further?” Vincent offers.

“Fine” Holger says, drawing out the middle of the word.

name: The Great Hunt III
itemsRequired: 1x Pocket Watch; 2x Leather Bag; 2x Leather Waterskin; 1x Bucket; 20x Small Prawn; 10x Mussel
description:
As the quick meal gets underway, Holger gets comfortable against a large boulder. He then begins to share his dreams for what may come of the giant golden turkey.

“I’ll have to roast that giant turkey in parts. It’s too big for my oven. Maybe I’ll fry some of it too! Wait! Can you imagine how much gravy I can make from such a beast?! It’ll be glorious!”

“I love a good turkey sandwich with friends.” A new voice adds to Holger’s musings.

“Me too. Although, I don’t mind eating alone…”

Holger, realizing an unexpected voice has interrupted his monologue, looks up to see Buddy peering down at him from atop the enormous rock.

“Buddy! I didn’t hear you join us. Would you like to help us catch a turkey?”

“I would love to go on an adventure with my friends! Where are we hunting turkeys? The forest surrounding Mount Banon?”

Excited to share his plan, Holger tells Buddy all about the giant golden turkey of Cane Pole Ridge. As Holger talks, Buddy’s smile fades bit by bit. Barely pausing to breathe, Holger continues to muse about all the wonderful turkey dishes he will be eating soon until Buddy suddenly interrupts him.

“I’ll come along, but I won’t let you kill that turkey.” Then, looking at you and Vincent, Buddy asks, “Will you help me prepare a few things for the journey?”

name: The Great Hunt IV
rewardItems: 10x Cooked Turkey; 4x Grape Juice; 1x Happy Cookies; 25x Orange Juice
description:
Buddy and Holger argued the entire rest of the way to Cane Pole Ridge. Even when the party stopped to make camp for the night, they argued. They argued around bites of stew that Vincent prepared. They argued as they were drifting off to sleep. The only break from the bickering was when they both finally and strangely simultaneously fell asleep. Then, as soon as Holger woke, Buddy instantly woke too, and the debate raged anew. Finally, as Cane Pole Ridge came into view, both parties fell silent, deep in thought: one plotting the demise of the great bird, the other its salvation.

After a few moments, Holger finishes his plotting first and breaks the silence. Looking to you and Vincent, he asks, “Will you help me gather some things to lure the turkey?”

name: The Great Hunt V
rewardItems: 5x Cooked Turkey; 5x Grab Bag 01; 5x Grab Bag 02; 5x Grab Bag 03; 1x Joker
description:
As soon as Holger finishes his request, Buddy takes a deep breath and begins his own.

“Friends, I am filled with sorrow because of the two opposing causes you are being called upon to adjudicate and assist. We have put you in the middle of a mighty conflict. However, I cannot ask you to choose a side in this war. Instead, I will simply implore you to provide supplies to both sides, and then let the two of us war over the welfare of this benevolent beast. Now, should you decide that one cause is more just, and more beneficial to the whole of T’rah, and not to one solitary digester, I would welcome you to throw your whole self into the support of that cause. I would hold no grudge against one that chose to do so.”

Buddy pauses for a moment, and then concludes.

“Here’s what I need. Will you help me?”

name: The Great Hunt VI
itemsRequired: 1x Awl; 1x Axe; 1x Hammer; 1x Square Key; 1x Small Key
rewardItems: 5x Cooked Turkey; 5x Grab Bag 06; 1x Cranberry Juice
description:
“I’m going to end up in that cage. I can feel it coming.” Vincent says in resignation as the two of you watch Buddy building a man-sized cage.

“This reminds me of an ambush I once walked into. I knew it was coming, but there was no other way around it. I guess it’s time to do the same thing I did that day. It’s time to prepare. Will you help me find a few things to free myself, for when I inevitably end up in the cage?”

name: The Great Hunt VII
description:
As predicted, Vincent ended up in the cage.

Holger asked Vincent to assist him with cornering the giant golden turkey while you gave them both signals of its position from atop the ridge. Everything was going smoothly, and the team effort had trapped the turkey within a fifty meter break in the ridge. Just as Holger was lining up a shot with his sturdy bow, a sudden “Huzzah!” rang out from above him and a man-sized cage came hurtling down out of nowhere. Vincent shoved Holger out of the cage’s path just in time to save Holger from imprisonment. Unfortunately, that shove put Vincent right in position to be caged.

As the cage clanged into place and trapped Vincent, three loud horn blasts came from above. Then, before Holger could get back to his feet, the golden turkey charged toward the cage, leapt over it, and vanished back into the canyons of Cane Pole Ridge.

“Huzzah! Huzzah! Huzzah!” Buddy called again from atop the ridge.

Because of your help and his preparations, Vincent was out of the cage in a few moments, and he and Holger charged after the great bird. Unfortunately, your attempts to help spy the turkey out from above were fruitless, and Vincent’s and Holger’s swift pursuit found nothing but a few golden feathers.

Holger continued to try to find the golden turkey for another full day. He tried to lure it out with horned beetles and corn, spread from one end of Cane Pole Ridge to the other, but nothing came for his bait.

Meanwhile, Buddy vanished and didn’t reappear until a few moments before the party was about to begin the trek home.

“I’m sorry I ruined your great hunt.” Buddy says as he hands each of you a large sack, with an especially large one for Holger. “I hope this can make up for it and we can still be friends.”

“I don’t know, Buddy…” Holger begins as he looks in the sack. “Wait…that’s a lot of turkeys! Buddy! It’s wonderful!”

name: Than-key-ful For Sales
description:
Borgen sidles up to you with a twinkle in his eye. “Hey {player}, this key has been burning a hole in my pocket for ages, and I've got no idea what it's used for! I’d be truly thankful if you could take it off my hands. I'll even give you a discount since it's right after a major holiday!"

Borgen hands you a small note with the following written on it:

5,000,000 Coins

200 Totally Worthless Ancient Coins! What a steal!

name: Free To Fly I
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 5x Onion Soup; 5x Sea Pincher Special; 5x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 5x Quandary Chowder
description:
Geist wants to fly! Unfortunately, if she flies locally she runs the risk of being seen and stirring up a panic. So, Geist is looking for a snowy day where the lighting and snow are just right for her to blend in with the storm. Then, she can fly without being seen and no one will end up in a panic.

The next time it snows, will you bring Geist some snowflakes she can test against her scales?

Tip: Find Snowflakes in the December Starter Pack's Fancy Present or grab some by doing 25 days of chores in December.

name: Free To Fly II
rewardItems: 10x Grape Juice; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Spades; 1x Protein Bar
description:
Geist had a wonderful time flying during that last snowstorm! Nobody panicked!

Would you be willing to help her find another good snowstorm to fly in?

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare I
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 100x Grab Bag 08; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds; 4000x Emberstone
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: Neigh! Neigh neigh neigh neigh, neigh! Neigh neigh!

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare II
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 100x Grab Bag 08; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1000x Teddy Bear
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description:
“Did Charles ask you for help making snowballs? I knew it! I knew that horse was getting assistance somewhere!”

“Well, to level the battlefield, will you help me get double what you gave him? Oh, and maybe some shields. Yes. Loads of shields.”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare III
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 100x Grab Bag 08; 100x Grab Bag 03; 1x Diamonds; 500x Arnold Palmer
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: “This is perfect. Charles will be so surprised when he sees how many snowballs I have now!”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare IV
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 100x Grab Bag 08; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Buddystone
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: Grrrrrrr grrr grrrr grr. Grrrr grrrrrrrrrr. Grrr.

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare V
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 100x Grab Bag 08; 1000x Large Net; 100x Corn Prize Bag
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: Grrr. Grrrr grrr.

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare VI
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 100x Grab Bag 08; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Spades; 1x Diamonds
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: Grrrrrrrrrrr.

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare VII
itemsRequired: 4000x Snowball; 1000x Wooden Barrel; 2000x Red Shield; 200x Snowman
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 100x Grab Bag 08; 100x Grab Bag 03; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 100x Popcorn
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description:
“My snowballs!”

“Charles and Gary are killing us out there! If we don’t get more snowballs and better defenses soon, we’ll be overrun! Will you help us?”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare VIII
itemsRequired: 4000x Snowball; 1000x Wooden Barrel; 2000x Red Shield; 200x Snowman
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 100x Grab Bag 08; 1x Joker; 4000x Orange Juice; 4000x Apple; 100x Grape Juice; 1x Clawed Card; 1x Borgen Bag 01
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description:
“My snowballs!”

“You are as great a snowball supplier as you are a cabbage supplier!”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare IX
itemsRequired: 4000x Snowball; 1000x Wooden Barrel; 2000x Red Shield; 200x Snowman
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 100x Grab Bag 08; 2000x Moonstone; 100x Cabbage Stew; 1x Cranberry Juice
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description:
“My snowballs!”

“Thanks for the help. Captain Logan and I may just be able to turn things around now.”

name: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone? I
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Bag 01; 10x Bag of Presents 01; 1x Gingerbread House
questline: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone?
description:
Jill may have gotten herself into a spot of difficulty. She decided to organize a small gathering and share some of her family’s beloved cookies. It was going to be a small affair.

Unfortunately, when she asked Roomba to handle the invitations she said to invite all of their friends, because she assumed that Roomba would have a smaller set of friends than her own. Roomba did not. Roomba has an enormous group of friends. So many friends.

Now, Jill needs more cookies and milk than she planned on, by a very large margin. Roomba is baking as quickly as possible to help too, but it still won’t be enough. Will you lend a hand?

name: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone? II
rewardItems: 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Large Net; 1x Spades; 1x Christmas Stocking; 1x Gingerbread House
questline: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone?
description: Things are looking better, but Jill still needs more cookies and milk. Roomba has sooooo many friends.

name: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone? III
rewardItems: 100x Grab Bag 07; 100x Grab Bag 03; 100x Grab Bag 05; 100x Rubber Duckie; 1x Bag of Presents 02; 1x Gingerbread House
questline: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone?
description: Isn’t it usually the case that only half of those invited show up for a party? How many people did Roomba actually invite? Jill is going to be making cookies all night if this keeps up. Will you keep bringing more milk and cookies to help?

name: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone? IV
rewardItems: 1x Bag of Presents 02; 1000x Apple Cider; 5x Lemon Cream Pie; 500x Teddy Bear; 3000x Orange Juice; 1x Gingerbread House
questline: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone?
description: More milk and cookies, please! And thank you!

name: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone? V
rewardItems: 1x Bag of Presents 02; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Large Net; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Spades; 1x Gingerbread House; 1x Santa's Travel Belt
questline: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone?
description: We’ve done it! Everyone has milk and cookies, and no new guests have shown up in the last half hour. Jill is going to make one last batch to be safe. Will you bring one more batch too, to be extra safe?

name: Shiny Object
description:
George noticed something shiny sticking out from a snow drift. He went over to see what's up and found a Cranberry Juice! He doesn't need it, so it's all yours if you want it.

(This is to say sorry and oops about the missing stamina that happened around 5:15pm game time on Dec 13th) (Note: Stamina was restored to all players that were affected, but just to help make it right, take this free item)

name: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone? VI
questline: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone?
description:
Jill didn’t invite everyone over just to have milk and cookies and celebrate the holidays. This is also a surprise celebration of Roomba’s birthday!

Several months back, Roomba told Jill a story that included a lengthy account of the first time that Roomba’s control core was powered on. That first log in Roomba’s memory occurred on this day, a long, long time ago. So, this is Roomba’s birthday!

Jill planned to have Roomba’s favorite fuel ingredient as a birthday treat for all of the party guests, but she doesn’t have enough for all of Roomba’s friends that showed up. Will you bring more corn for everyone and a little more corn oil for Roomba?

name: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone? VII
questline: Could One Occasion Kindly Involve Everyone?
description: Jill really appreciates all your help. You made Roomba’s special day perfect.

name: Ice Collections I
itemsRequired: 50x Frozen Spyfish; 50x Frozen Bones; 50x Frozen Catfish
description: Cecil approaches you seeming quite desperate for some frozen specimens that have been appearing recently in various local ponds.  He offers to pay you back with some Frozen Large Nets he has collected.

name: Ice Collections II
itemsRequired: 50x Frozen Biter; 50x Frozen Boot; 5x Frozen Skull; 5x Frozen Lobster
description: Cecil would like some frozen specimens from other areas like the Small Island and the Crystal River before it's too late!

name: Ice Collections III
itemsRequired: 50x Frozen Lobster; 50x Frozen Shell; 50x Frozen Manta Ray; 5x Frozen Starfish; 5x Frozen Book
description: Cecil has one final request.  Could you go to the Emerald Beach and the Vast Ocean to find some other rare frozen specimens?

name: Ice Covers Everything I
description:
“Have you ever gone ice fishing? It’s very much like regular fishing, but you usually have to cut through a thick layer of ice to get to the water and the fish. For your efforts, you can often find many new varieties of fish to catch.”

“Unfortunately, it rarely gets cold enough to freeze all the bodies of liquid around the Redbrook area. So I haven’t gotten to go ice fishing in years, and it doesn’t look like it will get cold enough this winter either.”

“However, I have an idea that could work to make it possible for us to have an opportunity to go ice fishing very soon. It may take a little magic and some tech, but I think it could work. Will you help me gather a few items to try an experiment?”

name: Ice Covers Everything II
description:
“It’s working! It’s working!”

“With a lot of help from several of our friends, I have found a way that we can lower the temperature of a large body of liquid using ice enhanced nets. Now, it will take a lot of us working together, but with a little time we should get to do some true ice fishing very soon! I can’t wait!”

“One more thing about these ice enhanced nets: they can catch different varieties of fish that only show up in very frigid waters. So, use them wisely and enjoy a small taste of ice fishing as we freeze everything up.”

“Thanks again for your help! ”

name: Crafting Is Easy I
description: Roomba has a plan to make use of all of the frozen fish bones that are available from everyone joining in the ice fishing efforts. If you catch any, please bring them and Roomba will exchange for them.

name: Crafting Is Easy II
itemsRequired: 25x Frozen Bones; 10x Board; 10x Carbon Sphere; 10x Blue Ornament; 10x Green Ornament; 10x Orange Ornament; 10x Purple Ornament; 10x Red Ornament; 10x Yellow Ornament; 100x Nails
description: Roomba would appreciate your continued patronage of his frozen fish bones exchange, but he also needs a few more items. Will you bring these items?

name: Crafting Is Easy III
description: Roomba has almost completed this crafting project, but still needs your help with a few last items. Will you bring Roomba some more frozen bones and few other things?

name: Crafting Is Easy IV
description:
Santa will be very pleased that Roomba was able to return Dasher from the incandescent collected ether that accumulated atop Mount Banon. Dasher got stuck there after wandering off from Santa’s workshop.

Roomba appreciates your help and contributions. Crafting the collector of incandescent ether was easy with your assistance.

Now, will you take Dasher back to Santa?

name: Exquisite Cuisine, Iced I
description:
Mariya heard about the wild idea that Beatrix had to freeze the lakes and ponds and rivers, enough to go ice fishing. If the plan works and you happen to catch any frozen spyfish, Mariya would love to have some. There is an absolutely wonderful dish she would like to prepare, that she had as a child. It can only be made with frozen spyfish.”

Will you bring Mariya some frozen spyfish?

name: Exquisite Cuisine, Iced II
description:
The spyfish was delicious! Mariya is so grateful for your help.

If you find any more frozen spyfish, Mariya would love to have some to put on ice for later. :)

name: A Cold Start I
itemsRequired: 10x Frozen Tomato; 1x Frozen Bouquet; 1x Frozen Corn
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Borgen Buck; 10x Grape Juice
description:
Borgen has decided to start the new year somewhere warm. He’s going to travel south past the Sinking Swamp, possibly to the Southern Reaches. He expects to find some good business ventures while he’s traveling.

Borgen would like to bring a few things to sell from Redbrook. To ensure the items last the long journey and stay fresh he would like everything to be frozen. Will you help him find some frozen items to take on his trip?

Note: The Frozen items requested come from Frozen Chest 01, which can be obtained from trading with other players, the 28-day Daily Chores reward, or the January Starter Pack (Open Frozen Chest 01 at the Locksmith)

name: A Cold Start II
itemsRequired: 3x Frozen Cabbage; 20x Frozen Peas; 2x Frozen Pine
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 5x Grab Bag 03; 5x Grab Bag 07; 5x Frozen Large Net; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Event Key
description: Borgen would like a few more frozen items to take on his trip, if you can find anything else for him.

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare X
itemsRequired: 4000x Snowball; 1000x Wooden Barrel; 2000x Green Shield; 200x Snowman; 10x Frozen Pine; 10x Flying Machine

rewardItems: 100x Grab Bag 08; 1000x Apple Cider; 1x Spooky Pie; 1x Diamonds; 1000x Frozen Coin; 1000x Frozen Book
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: ”we’ve gottem on the run! ha ha ha ha ha!”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare XIII
itemsRequired: 4000x Snowball; 200x Snowman; 20x Frozen Corn; 4000x Wooden Plank; 1000x Shovel; 1000x Pulley; 1000x Rope; 1000x Metal Spool
rewardItems: 1000x Pie Pan; 500x Bone Broth; 5x Lemon Cream Pie; 10x Cabbage Stew; 4000x Orange Juice; 25x Breakfast Boost; 1000x Frozen Boot
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: ”Charles, Gary, and frank have taken to the sky! We’re going to need some enhanced frozen projectiles to bring them back down. I have an idea that could save the day. Will you help us?”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare XIV
rewardItems: 1000x Pie Pan; 500x Bone Broth; 5x Lemon Cream Pie; 5x Cabbage Stew; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Borgen Buck
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description:
”It’s working, but they keep coming with new flying machines every time we take one down. Where did they get all of those flying machines?!”

“If you don’t mind helping, we could use some more resources for our enhanced projectiles.”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare XV
rewardItems: 1000x Pie Pan; 500x Bone Broth; 1000x Frozen Dagger; 1000x Large Net; 500x Ruby Scorpion; 1x Apple Pie
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: ”They’re still taking to the air, but we’re dropping them immediately after takeoff. I think one more load of ammunition resources should ground them permanently, if you don’t mind helping.”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare XVI
itemsRequired: 4000x Snowball; 20x Frozen Cabbage; 4000x Blue Gel; 100x Emberstone; 1000x Essence of Slime
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 1000x Caterpillar; 1000x Frozen Wheel; 1000x Apple Cider; 1000x Arnold Palmer
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: “I HAVE RECEIVED REQUESTS FROM BOTH SIDES OF THIS SNOWBALL CONFRONTATION FOR A MORE EFFICIENT SNOWBALL DISPERSAL SYSTEM. MY DESIGN IS SIMPLE AND EFFICIENT, BUT IT REQUIRES A UNIQUE LIST OF RESOURCES. WILL YOU HELP ME ACQUIRE THESE ITEMS?”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare XVII
itemsRequired: 4000x Snowball; 30x Frozen Cabbage; 4000x Blue Gel; 100x Emberstone; 1000x Essence of Slime
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 1000x Wooden Mask; 2x Buddystone; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Clubs
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: “I HAVE RECEIVED MORE REQUESTS. WILL YOU HELP ME ACQUIRE MORE RESOURCES?”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare XVIII
itemsRequired: 4000x Snowball; 50x Frozen Cabbage; 4000x Blue Gel; 100x Emberstone; 1000x Essence of Slime
rewardItems: 1x Hearts; 1x Clawed Card; 1x Thank You Card; 500x Large Chest 01; 600x Treasure Key; 1x You Rock Card
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: “YOUR HELP IS MOST APPRECIATED AND NECESSARY. WILL YOU HELP ME ACQUIRE RESOURCES ONE MORE TIME?”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare XIX
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: “This snowball fight seems to have escalated into a rather bizarre war. Will you join me in schooling these folks in the proper way to conduct a snowball fight?”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare XX
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description: “Let’s restock our ammunition and get back into the fray!”

name: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare XXI
questline: It’s Beginning To Look A Lot Like Warfare
description:
“That was amazing! Did you see frank get buried? Everyone will be recovering from this snowball fight for a week.”

“We couldn’t have done this without you. And to thank you for all of your help to everyone in this great snowball war, we got together and made a little something special for you.”

name: Best Served Thawed I
rewardItems: 10x Mushroom Stew; 5x Cabbage Stew; 5x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Spooky Pie; 1x Borgen Buck
description: Mariya is in the process of making tomato sauce for a variety of different dishes. Yesterday, she heard from Beatrix that frozen tomatoes, when thawed with pepper juice, make the most flavorful sauce. Mariya would love to compare a frozen tomato based sauce with her regular tomato sauce recipe. Will you help her find some frozen tomatoes and loads of peppers?

name: Best Served Thawed II
rewardItems: 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Spooky Cookies; 100x Apple Cider; 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Large Net; 1x Thank You Card; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds
description: The sauce is amazing! However, Mariya wants to try one more experiment. Will you bring her some more frozen tomatoes and gold peppers instead of red peppers? Mariya thinks a gold pepper sauce may thaw the frozen tomatoes and impart a bit of magic.

name: Best Served Thawed III
rewardItems: 1x Thank You Card; 1x Apple Pie; 1x Buddystone
description:
It worked! This sauce is even better! Thank you so much for all the help.

Now, Mariya is ready to make a serious pot of sauce. Will you bring her a serious load of frozen tomatoes and gold peppers?

name: Half a Million I
description: Rosalie isn't sure that Redbrook can be considered a town anymore, by definition.  Can you believe there are 500,000 farmers around this place now?  Here's a little something to celebrate the occasion...

name: Half a Million II
description: Since you've been here a bit, here's something else for you.  Thanks for being a part of our wonderful community!

name: Half a Million III
description: You have been here long enough to see some of the growth we've had.  It's no wonder some of the roads around here are so congested.  Here, maybe these will be of some use to you.

name: Half a Million IV
description: Looks like you are really well established here, but have a lot of work ahead of you!  Maybe these items will come in handy for you.

name: Half a Million V
description: Rosalie still has stuff laying around that isn't needed, will you take this stuff please?

name: Half a Million VI
description: Rosalie is really impressed with your efforts and the size of your farm.  Keep going!

name: Half a Million VII
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Piece of Heart; 1x Crunchy Omelette; 1x Thank You Card
description: Wow, you are really at the top!  Still, maybe these items would be of some use?

name: The Void and You I
itemsRequired: 200x Wood; 200x Steel; 200x Iron; 200x Nails; 200x Board; 200x Stone; 200x Straw; 200x Mushroom; 200x 3-leaf Clover; 200x Feathers
description:
Have you ever wondered where items go when they don't have a home? I've been wondering that myself. Is it nothingness? Is it everythingness?

I'd like to cast a spell to see. Would you bring me a few very common items as a part of the spell composition?

name: The Void and You II
itemsRequired: 200x Rice; 200x Cotton; 200x Monster Skull; 200x Runestone 01; 200x Gold Carrot; 200x Treasure Key; 200x Gold Drum; 200x Fire Ant; 200x Steel Wire; 200x Oak
description: Now that I've got these common items, I will need to juice up the spell with some rarer items to translocate the common ones.  I promise, this won't take long!

name: The Void and You III
description: Everything seems to be coming together nicely.  I'll just need some much rarer items to anchor the spell and we will have a nice co-location of where these things are going!  I think...

name: The Void and You IV
description:
POP!

"Well, that was unexpected." Rosalie finishes the spell and holds a strange purple bag in her hands.

"I have no idea what just happened, but here's some crystallized void in a bag for you. I have no idea what could be inside though..."

name: Best Stored Frozen I
itemsRequired: 100x Frozen Peas; 10x Frozen Tomato; 10x Frozen Corn; 10x Frozen Cabbage
rewardItems: 100x Large Chest 01; 120x Treasure Key; 5x Void Bag 01
description:
Vincent heard about frozen crops from Beatrix, and he thinks they would be perfect for use at the school. The school uses loads of foodstuffs everyday, and anything that is healthy and that can be stored easily is going to make food preparation significantly easier.

Will you get a nice load of frozen crops together that the school can try out?

name: Best Stored Frozen II
itemsRequired: 300x Frozen Peas; 30x Frozen Tomato; 30x Frozen Corn; 30x Frozen Cabbage
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 100x Large Net; 50x Grab Bag 03; 100x Peach; 10x Fruit Punch; 5x Void Bag 01; 1x Spades
description: These frozen crops are perfect for storing and then using for meal preparation at the school. Will you help fill the school’s pantry? If you are willing to help, Vincent would like to break your deliveries into five individual loads to make it easier to get everything properly stowed in the pantry.

name: Best Stored Frozen III
itemsRequired: 300x Frozen Peas; 30x Frozen Tomato; 30x Frozen Corn; 30x Frozen Cabbage
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 5x Void Bag 01; 100x Arnold Palmer; 1x Buddystone; 1x Clawed Card; 100x Grab Bag 07; 1x Hearts
description: Vincent is ready for the second load.

name: Best Stored Frozen IV
itemsRequired: 300x Frozen Peas; 30x Frozen Tomato; 30x Frozen Corn; 30x Frozen Cabbage
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Clawed Card; 100x Gold Pepper Seeds; 100x Pocket Watch; 100x Apple Cider; 500x Orange Juice; 1x Clubs
description: Vincent is ready for the third load of frozen crops.

name: Best Stored Frozen V
itemsRequired: 300x Frozen Peas; 30x Frozen Tomato; 30x Frozen Corn; 30x Frozen Cabbage
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Clawed Card; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Diamonds
description: Vincent is ready for the fourth load of frozen crops.

name: Best Stored Frozen VI
itemsRequired: 300x Frozen Peas; 30x Frozen Tomato; 30x Frozen Corn; 30x Frozen Cabbage
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Clawed Card; 1x Protein Bar; 1x Joker
description: Vincent is ready for the final load of frozen crops.

name: Best Stored Frozen VII
rewardItems: 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Bananas; 5x Borgen Buck; 1x Spades
description: Vincent appreciates all of your help. He just needs one more thing to make this plan work well. Will you bring a large load of peppers?

name: Love At First Bite I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 1x Hearts
description:
Do you think you could find a love potion? All the talk about love at this time of year got Thomas thinking. Maybe a little love potion poured in the water could help him catch more fish. If you manage to find a love potion, will you bring it to Thomas?

Note: The item requested can be found in the Heart-shaped Box 01, which can be obtained from trading with other players, the 25-day Daily Chores reward, or the February Starter Pack (Open Heart-shaped Box 01 at the Locksmith)

name: Love At First Bite II
rewardItems: 5x Cat's Meow; 5x Sea Pincher Special; 5x Heart Necklace; 5x Valentines Card
description: This is great! Thomas can’t wait to try the love potion you found to catch some fish. Unfortunately, he’s all out of bait. Will you bring him an assortment of bait to use with the love potion?

name: New Year New Moon I
description: Let’s celebrate the beginning on a new lunisolar year! Before the new year begins, FR4NK would like to tidy up. Will you help?

name: New Year New Moon II
description: Every celebration deserves fireworks! Will you help FR4NK gather some pyrotechnic items?

name: New Year New Moon III
description: Let’s add some color to our celebration! If you bring FR4NK some red dye and red berries, FR4NK will make some lively red decorations.

name: New Year New Moon IV
itemsRequired: 10x Red Dye; 10x White Parchment; 10x Wax Candle; 10x Gold Leaf
description: Let’s add some light! If you bring FR4NK some materials to make paper lanterns, FR4NK will assemble and decorate the lanterns. These lanterns will look great all over town.

name: New Year New Moon V
itemsRequired: 10x Goldfish; 10x Gold Sea Crest; 10x Goldfin; 10x Gold Drum; 10x Gold Flier; 10x Gold Sea Bass
description: Let’s add some good fortune! Will you bring FR4NK some golden fish?

name: Belt out of Shape I
description: Holger has always been a bit envious of his brother's belt collection. Do you think you could bring him a few specfic belts so that he can start his own collection?

name: Belt out of Shape II
itemsRequired: 1x Belt of Menace; 100x Board; 10x Steel; 100x Nailed Board; 100x Pine Board; 100x Spool of Copper
description: Holger appreciates the belt you gave him.  He would like another belt and some other materials.  He is going to build a wall in his house to showcase each of the belts you bring him.

name: Belt out of Shape III
itemsRequired: 100x Glass Orb; 50x Energy Coil; 1x Control Box; 1x Kill Switch; 1x Mushroom Stew; 100x Steak; 500x Pine Shelf
description:
Holger has completed a really nice display, except now he needs some glass and some other materials to add some lighting to really make the belt collection impress.

Also... Holger is hungry.  Could you bring a mushroom stew and some steak?

name: Belt out of Shape IV
itemsRequired: 1x Bessi Gan Belt; 100x Linked Lantern; 1000x Steel Wire
description: The next belt is a bit tricky to get, but would be a wonderful addition to the collection.  Holger plans to put some extra lighting around this one to stand out.

name: Belt out of Shape V
description: Holger almost forgot about the next belt he needs for the collection...

name: Belt out of Shape VI
description:
Holger is very excited to have a belt collection now and is thankful for your help. However, there is one belt left that he would really really like for his collection. Can you find it?  Holger says it's as easy as 123. 

He's sure there will be other belts to add to his collection down the road, but for now if you can bring this belt, he will give you something special he found.

name: Far Away XXXV
itemsRequired: 50x Breakfast Boost; 50x Onion Soup; 50x Quandary Chowder; 50x Apple; 50x Orange; 200x Flour; 200x Honey; 100x Butter; 50x Peach Juice; 200x Salt
rewardItems: 200x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Lovely Cookies; 200x Arnold Palmer; 200x Apple Cider; 2000x Corn; 10x Carved Bear; 100x Frog; 1x Borgen Buck
description:
The Voyage Log for the Captain of the Two Fishers
Day 159 of Leaf 84 of Branch 1342

Overnight update:
Everything was quiet overnight, and the Balstar’s lightworks continued to function properly. The only item noted by the crew was that, after her long day of fishing, Mariya still made some snacks that were very much appreciated.

Midday update:
All signs point to bad weather coming soon. We’re making good progress right now, but a big storm is going to slow us down for a day or two. I signaled to the Balstar to make sure their captain was aware of the weather coming. They signaled back that they were already preparing the ship for a wild ride. My crew will also be spending the rest of the day making the Two Fishers storm ready.

Evening update:
Despite our interruptions for storm preparations, Mariya and Lorn made another excellent haul. They’re inching, fish by fish, toward being as good as my own crews.

{player} and Mr. Ecsil provided excellent meals throughout the day, but sadly we’re all still spoiled from Mariya’s amazing cooking. I even found myself craving a slice of Mariya’s banana cream pie after lunch.

George was amazing today! He lead the crew in weather preparations as if he’d been sailing his whole life. He noticed and addressed things that were even missed by our most senior crew members. None of it was ship threatening, but all of it will make for a smoother cruise through the storm.

name: Far Away XXXIV
itemsRequired: 50x Over The Moon; 50x Mushroom Stew; 50x Apple; 50x Orange; 50x Grape Juice; 200x Flour; 200x Honey; 100x Butter; 200x Salt
rewardItems: 1x Piece of Heart; 1000x Small Screw; 2000x Leather
description:
The Voyage Log for the Captain of the Two Fishers
Day 158 of Leaf 84 of Branch 1342

Overnight update:
We left Nonir’s main port yesterday evening, after the final repairs were completed on the Balstar’s lightworks. The night crew reported that the Balstar’s lights functioned properly all through the nighttime hours, and that all was quiet.

The crew members assigned to the night shift for the new rotation seem to be doing quite well after our long break on Nonir Island. Everyone else will start their new jobs for this rotation after breakfast.

Midday update:
Lorn joined me at lunch today to express his thanks, as well as the thanks of his friends, for the turtle sightseeing tour that I and some of the crew led on the day before we left Nonir. We saw more turtles than any of my previous visits. Maybe it was somehow related to the insect migration that was also more excessive than usual. Whatever it was, the abundance of turtles was quite a treat for all of us.

{player} joined Mr. Ecsil in handling meals for this rotation. They started with a hearty meal for lunch today and set the bar quite high for this leg of the voyage. Mariya’s cooking will be dearly missed, but so far {player}’s efforts look very promising. We’re getting a bit spoiled for life after this voyage.

Evening update:
Mariya and Lorn made quite the haul today with our fishing crew. It wasn’t anywhere near the loads that George and {player} pulled in, but it was a successful day by any other measurements.

George’s training as a soldier is shining brightly in his efforts to keep the ship clean and orderly. Additionally, the crew seems to have a natural respect for George and they follow his commands as if I was standing there beside him.

Everything ran smoothly today despite the rotation of jobs. I expect to maintain this duty rotation until we reach the main island of Ginkow.

name: Far Away XXXVI
itemsRequired: 50x Hickory Omelette; 50x Sea Pincher Special; 50x Neigh; 1000x Red Berries; 50x Orange; 200x Flour; 200x Honey; 100x Butter; 200x Salt; 50x Apple Cider
rewardItems: 1x Gold Seed Bag 01; 2000x Leather; 2000x Unpolished Jade; 1x Spades; 2x Pet Treat; 2x Fish and Chips
description:
The Voyage Log for the Captain of the Two Fishers
Day 160 of Leaf 84 of Branch 1342

Overnight update:
I couldn’t get any sleep. The threat of trouble coming soon nagged and nagged every time I closed my eyes. Eventually, I gave up on sleep and joined the night crew.

Apparently, George couldn’t sleep either. He came up on deck a few minutes after I gave up on sleep and joined the night crew. George brought his guitar with him and played a few songs to try and cheer the group. Unfortunately, the sense of dread seemed to be infecting all of us and the songs were barely able to cut the tension.

George must have felt it too. Instead of trying to fight the dread, he leaned another direction and played a dreary ballad of lost loves and lost homes. Just when all hope was lost, the song changed and became more hopeful. Like a small break in the clouds letting the sun peek through, this song managed to stir all of us and relieve us for a moment from our feelings of unease.

Midday update:
The Balstar signaled for us to pull alongside first thing this morning. Then, Captain Ragvin called over for a brief consultation. We discussed preparations for the storm, which had already begun to show signs of its arrival, and then we agreed upon a location to reunite the ships in case we were separated by the storm. Before returning to his ship, Captain Ragvin asked if he could tie a rope to the prow of our ship with a small storm totem at the end that hangs down to float on the water. He explained that it was for good fortune through the storm. I took a quick poll of the crew’s thoughts and all were happy for any extra luck. With that, Captain Ragvin secured the totem and returned to the Balstar.

The rest of the morning consisted of the storm growing more ferocious and Lorn losing his battle with seasickness. The increased rocking from the storm pushed him past his tolerance. Fortunately, we’re not doing much fishing today and he can try all of the crews’ ideas for managing seasickness. Hopefully something helps the poor guy.

Evening update:
We are weathering the worst of the storm now. The waves have grown mountainous and the wind is coming from everywhere. The crew is doing their best, but we are at the mercy of the sea.

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow I
itemsRequired: 100x Pirate Hook; 100x Pirate Bandana; 100x Pirate Flag; 100x Cutlass; 100x Captains Log; 100x Pair of Boots; 100x Eye Patch
rewardItems: 1x Clubs; 1x Hearts; 1x Borgen Buck; 200x Large Net; 25x Lemon Cream Pie
description:
“Do you remember when you first moved here? I do. I bought some of the first peppers you ever grew, and I gave you some orange juice to help you get started exploring. You were so new to everything back then. I hope I helped you become the farmer, fisher, explorer, and crafter that you are today. You have come so far! I think by now you’ve helped everyone in town.”

“And how many adventures and conflicts have we weathered? Hmmm. I’ve lost track of how many times you’ve saved your friends and everyone else. Where would we be without you? I don’t even want to think about it.”

“Well, I have a new adventure for us, and an opportunity to dig into the past. This time we’ll need to start by trying to find our friend Buddy. Hopefully, he’s not in trouble, but if he’s gone after what I think he’s after, there may be trouble aplenty.”

“If you’re up for joining me on another adventure, we’ll need to look like pirates. Will you find us a few things to make disguises?”

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow II
itemsRequired: 1000x Amethyst Necklace; 1000x Aquamarine Ring; 1000x Diamond; 1000x Emerald Ring; 1000x Jade Charm; 1000x Mystic Ring; 1000x Pearl Necklace; 1000x Ruby Ring
rewardItems: 1x Diamonds; 1x Spades; 25x Cabbage Stew; 50x Breakfast Boost; 100x Apple Cider; 50x Quandary Chowder; 25x Void Bag 01; 1x Buddy Doll
description: “It looks like I was right. Buddy has gone to see the Wodutrown brothers. Nevertheless, my plan should still work. We’re going to pose as pirates, fresh off a sizable pillage of a merchant ship. Will you bring us some treasure to throw around at the Brindle Pub?”

name: Sunblock I
rewardItems: 100x Lemon; 1x Beach Umbrella; 1x Thank You Card
description:
Before Jill and Roomba go on their trip to the beach, Jill would like to find a way to protect her skin from sunburns. She usually wears a hat and clothing that covers most, if not all, of her skin while working in her fields to avoid over exposure to the sun. Jill had some severe sunburns as a child and doesn’t want to ever repeat that.

Through a lot of research Jill found a substance that should be just the thing to protect her skin. Now, she needs to come up with a suspension that will evenly distribute the substance, adhere to the skin, resist washing off in the water, and hopefully be safe for her skin. Jill would like it to smell nice too.

Will you give Jill a hand gathering the ingredients for the suspension?

name: Sunblock II
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 1x Clubs; 10x Peach; 5x Void Bag 01; 1x Thank You Card
description:
Those flowers smell wonderful!

Now, according to her research, Jill should be able to harvest a particular oil from sunfish to use for the suspension. Will you bring her a load of sunfish to try?

name: Sunblock III
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 200x Orange Juice; 10x Grape Juice; 5x Bug Bag 01; 1x Diamonds; 1x Thank You Card
description:
The sunfish oil seems like a good addition, but Jill’s concoction needs something more.

To find the best solution, Jill is now working on a few different mixtures. Will you bring her a few more items to try?

name: Sunblock IV
itemsRequired: 200x Green Jellyfish; 200x Jellyfish; 25x Sunflower Oil; 10x Acorn Butter
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 10x Grape Juice; 5x Bug Bag 01; 25x Apple Cider; 25x Arnold Palmer; 25x Grab Bag 07; 1x Spades; 10x Void Bag 01; 10x Grab Bag 03; 1x Thank You Card
description:
Corn and mushroom paste both made interesting additions to the mixtures. The mushroom paste seems to have better potential though.

Will you bring Jill a few more items to try?

name: Sunblock V
itemsRequired: 50x Butter; 50x Pear Grease; 400x Blue Gel; 400x Essence of Slime
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 5x Bug Bag 01; 50x Arnold Palmer; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Hearts; 50x Large Net; 50x Large Chest 01; 50x Grab Bag 08; 1x Thank You Card
description: Jill has made a few different mixtures that seem to hold some potential. Will you bring her a few more items to test?

name: Sunblock VI
itemsRequired: 1000x Green Jellyfish; 200x Sunflower Oil; 100x Acorn Butter
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 5x Bug Bag 01; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Happy Cookies; 50x Fruit Punch; 1x Thank You Card
description: Jill thinks she’s found a perfect suspension to use to protect her skin from sunburn at the beach. Now, she needs more of the ingredients to make enough for her trip. Will you help her?

name: Sunblock VII
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 1x Happy Cookies; 2x Borgen Buck; 1x Protein Bar; 1x Joker; 1x Thank You Card
description: That last load was a perfect base. Now, Jill needs a few more ingredients, if you don’t mind.

name: Sunblock VIII
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 1x Clawed Card; 1x Apple Pie; 1x Thank You Card
description: It’s almost perfect! Jill needs to do some extensive testing now and she’ll need some materials to help with the test. Will you bring her the things she needs?

name: Sunblock IX
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 5x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Heart Container; 1000x Large Net; 1x Cranberry Juice; 100x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Thank You Card
description:
It’s working! It’s working!

There’s one more test Jill wants to do. Will you help her?

name: Freedom Universally I
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 100x Apple; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Thank You Card
description:
Back home, Captain Thomas loved the Day of Freedom Festival. There were parades, games, food, and lots of dancing. It was the one day each year that even the most serious folks took a break and enjoyed the flow of life.

Captain Thomas would like to throw a little party to celebrate the Day of Freedom, a little like he did back home. Will you give him a hand with the preparations?

name: Freedom Universally II
itemsRequired: 200x Steak Kabob; 200x Potato; 200x Red Berries; 200x Tomato; 200x Peppers; 200x Onion
rewardItems: 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Thank You Card
description:
The games are looking good. Captain Thomas appreciates your help setting up the horseshoe pits.

Will you help Captain Thomas with a few food items?

name: Freedom Universally III
itemsRequired: 25x Concord Grape Pie; 50x Peach; 100x Orange; 1000x Watermelon
rewardItems: 100x Fruit Punch; 100x Grab Bag 06; 1x Spooky Pie; 5x Bug Bag 01; 1x Thank You Card
description:
The food smells fantastic. This is going to be great. Captain Thomas appreciates your help.

Now, Captain Thomas wants to have some treats for the celebration. Will you bring some pies and fruit?

name: Freedom Universally IV
description: Captain Thomas is feeling a lot of nostalgia now, but there’s one last thing he would love to have for the celebration. Sarafina always made a Lemon Cream Pie. Captain Thomas misses Sarafina more than anything. Can you find a Lemon Cream Pie for the party?

name: Have A Ball
description: “Hello! I found this beach ball bouncing along the sand. I have checked with 247 people currently enjoying this one kilometer stretch of beach to find its owner. No one has claimed it. Unfortunately, I must now leave the beach with my friends Jill and Roomba. Will you accept the care of this beach ball in my absence?”

name: Explosively Grand Offer I
rewardItems: 15x Arnold Palmer; 15x Large Net; 150x Orange Juice; 5x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 5x Grab Bag 03; 2x Lemon Cream Pie
description:
Cecil wants to contribute to the fireworks celebrations in a big way, but he has not found a grand enough firework to purchase yet. It needs to be something more than just an explosion and bright lights. It has to be different and better, artistic even. Cecil wants something that the eyes of Redbrook will never forget.

If you happen upon something unbelievable, will you bring a couple for Cecil? He would gladly compensate you handsomely.

name: Booms, Our Other Monetary System I
rewardItems: 50x Orange Juice; 1x Grape Juice; 5x Onion Soup
description:
Beatrix is loving this Bottle Rocket Brawl! It’s so much fun, and she just loves light explosives, especially handled in a safe way.

To thank everyone for participating and making this so fun for her, she has some rewards for your continued deployment of explosive rockets. Keep up the good work!

name: Explosively Grand Offer II
rewardItems: 1x Clubs; 5x Crunchy Omelette; 1x Borgen Buck; 10x Void Bag 01; 5x Mushroom Stew; 5x Onion Soup; 2x Breakfast Boost
description:
The fireworks you brought were perfect. Everyone was extremely impressed by the Green Torpedoes. Cecil appreciates your diligent efforts.

Now, Cecil wants to have some fun. Will you bring him a pack of bottle rockets?

name: Booms Open Opportunities, Mark Successes I
rewardItems: 1x Supply Bag 01; 200x Bottle Rocket; 200x Wooden Shield
description: Beatrix appreciates everyone making this Bottle Rocket Brawl so much fun. As a token of her appreciation, she would like to help you out in your exploring efforts.

name: Booms, Our Other Monetary System II
description:
Did you see when Beatrix fired 100 bottle rockets at once? She didn’t hit anyone, but it was a wonderful cacophony of explosions.

Thanks for keeping the brawl going!

name: Booms, Our Other Monetary System III
description: Beatrix is hopeful that everyone is having as much fun as she is. This may be her favorite fireworks celebration ever!

name: Booms, Our Other Monetary System IV
rewardItems: 400x Orange Juice; 10x Grape Juice; 1x Carved Dragon; 1x Popcorn; 1x Buddystone; 10x Neigh
description: You’re really getting into this. You must love bottle rockets as much as Beatrix.

name: What The Heart Wants VII
rewardItems: 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Large Net; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 2x Borgen Buck; 25x Void Bag 01; 5x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Clubs; 1x Diamonds; 1x Hearts; 1x Spades; 1x Joker; 1x Clawed Card; 2x Five Point Mace
description: “Oh! You have extra receipts? I suppose the treasury could handle a few more rewards dispensed to such a loyal follower of Ric Ryph.”

name: What The Heart Wants VI
rewardItems: 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Large Net; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 5x Borgen Buck; 25x Void Bag 01; 5x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Clubs; 1x Diamonds; 1x Hearts; 1x Spades; 1x Joker; 1x Apple Pie; 1x Buddystone; 1x Clawed Card
description:
“Farmer, you’ve done yourself and your town a great service. Most importantly, you’ve shown your love and commitment to me. Now, I’m sure you feel Redbrook’s gratitude for your service, and you surely don’t need any thanks from me, but I would like to reward your service with a few things from the town treasury.”

“You did save your receipts? I’ll need those to verify your work before dispensing your rewards.”

name: What The Heart Wants V
description: “One more load may be just enough to make sure everyone gets a token of their love for me.”

name: What The Heart Wants IV
description: ”This is wonderful! We’re going to make so many people so happy, and Redbrook will love me even more!”

name: What The Heart Wants III
description: “You’re doing great, but I need you to increase the speed of your crafting output. Otherwise, the residents of Redbrook may think that I wasn’t prepared to thoughtfully celebrate them. That would be most unfortunate for both of us.”

name: What The Heart Wants II
description: “You’ve come up with the perfect gift for the residents of Redbrook, but I’m going to need a lot more of these beautiful necklaces. Keep them coming and you might just become Redbrook Citizen of the Week!”

name: What The Heart Wants I
description:
“When I think of love, I think of how much the residents of Redbrook love me. That thought makes me want to show my love for them in a big tangible way. But after making Redbrook greater than it’s ever been, what more could I do for my fellow residents? It has to be something that can stick with them and remind them everyday of my love for them.”

“That’s why I’ve come to you. I need you to craft something that I can give to the people of Redbrook that says, ‘Ric loves you!’”

name: Booms Open Opportunities, Mark Successes II
description: Beatrix really can’t get over how much fun she’s having. As another token of her appreciation, she would like to help you out in your fishing efforts.

name: Booms Open Opportunities, Mark Successes III
rewardItems: 1x Supply Crate 01; 500x Bottle Rocket; 500x Red Shield
description: Beatrix has another reward for your excellent pyrotechnics in the Bottle Rocket Brawl. It should be useful for exploring.

name: Booms Open Opportunities, Mark Successes IV
description: All right. Beatrix has one final reward for you. It should be useful for fishing.

name: The Mystery Triangle I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 2x Quandary Chowder; 2x Mushroom Stew; 2x Onion Soup; 1x Diamonds
description:
Baba seems to have misplaced his yo-yo. It’s a beautiful green one, the color of fresh cabbages glistening in the morning dew. So, he won’t be able to show you how to do some of his favorite tricks today. However, if you can find a replacement yo-yo for him, he could probably still show you some of the more basic tricks he knows, including walk the capybara and the mystery triangle.

(Hint: The yo-yo is in Baba's Snack Pack which is available in the August Starter Pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: The Mystery Triangle II
rewardItems: 1x YoYo; 2x Cabbage Stew; 1x Spades; 5x Void Bag 01; 1x Bug Bag 01; 1x Event Key; 5x Safety Pin
description:
Thanks for letting Baba use your yo-yo. He also hopes you enjoyed seeing his yo-yo tricks.

There are many more amazing tricks Baba has learned to do, but he doesn’t feel confident enough to try them without his yo-yo. Baba’s yo-yo is just the best! The string is perfect. The axle and bearings are perfect. Everything is just perfect.

Where could it be?

Will you bring Baba some apples to boost his energy and clear his head so he can find his yo-yo?

name: Summer Lessons in Science I
itemsRequired: 500x Watermelon; 50x Yellow Watermelon; 10x Large Net; 100x Apple; 100x Grapes
rewardItems: 100x Grab Bag 07; 1x Spades; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Schoolbook; 1x Notebook; 1x Pencil; 1x Water Bottle; 1x Thank You Card
description:
Vincent worked with the teachers at the school to put together a curriculum for some summer science lessons. He wanted these lessons to be fun and engaging, and to have a common theme running through all of them. Vincent decided on the humble watermelon, a most noble summer fruit as his common theme.

For the first lesson, they are going to help the kids learn about buoyancy by testing if watermelons float. The kids will also test other fruits to see which fruits float and which fruits sink in water. The teachers will then help the kids understand what makes some things float and some things sink.

If you would be willing to help, Vincent has some items he could trade you for the supplies needed for this lesson.

name: Summer Lessons in Science II
itemsRequired: 900x Watermelon; 90x Yellow Watermelon; 900x Green Diary; 900x Spoon; 900x Blue Feathers; 900x Blue Dye; 900x Magnifying Glass
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Clubs; 1x Happy Cookies; 100x Orange Gecko; 20x Void Bag 01; 1x Schoolbook; 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Notebook; 1x Pencil; 1x Water Bottle; 1x Buddy Loves You Card
description:
The first lesson was a big hit! Vincent appreciates your help.

For the next lesson, the teachers will open the watermelons up and then the kids will use spoons to dig out different parts of the watermelon (and eat some watermelon while they’re at it). Then, they will examine the different parts of the watermelon through magnification. The kids will draw and label the structures they find in their science journals.

Will you help Vincent get the supplies together for this science lesson?

name: Summer Lessons in Science III
itemsRequired: 1000x Watermelon; 100x Yellow Watermelon; 900x Green Diary; 900x Blue Feathers; 900x Blue Dye; 1000x Rope; 1000x Twine; 1000x Awl; 1000x Red Dye; 1000x Board
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Diamonds; 1x Schoolbook; 1x Spooky Pie; 1x Notebook; 1x Pencil; 1x Water Bottle; 1x Clawed Card
description:
The kids really loved digging into the watermelons. It was a lot of fun and a lot of mess. Ha!

The next lesson focuses on taking measurements. Specifically, the teachers will be helping the kids learn how to estimate measurements, and then to take more accurate measurements using different methods and tools. They’ll use the watermelons to measure mass, weight, length (the long diameter), width (the smaller diameter), and circumferences at various points. This lesson shouldn’t be too messy, but there’s still some good potential for things to go haywire.

Once again, Vincent could use a hand with some supplies for the lesson, if you can help.

name: Summer Lessons in Science IV
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Hearts; 3000x Peach; 2x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Schoolbook; 1x Notebook; 1x Pencil; 1x Water Bottle; 1x Get Well Soon Card
description:
You should have seen those brilliant minds at work! They were sharp at measuring those watermelons.

Vincent worked with George for this next lesson. They built several trebuchets and several targets. The goal will be to launch watermelons and hit the targets. This lesson could get extremely messy!

Now, the teachers and students will work together to launch the watermelons. They’ll compete to be the most accurate and precise in hitting their assigned target. They’ll need to find the right angle for launch and account for the different watermelon shapes and sizes.

All Vincent needs this time is more watermelons.

name: Summer Lessons in Science V
itemsRequired: 4000x Watermelon; 400x Yellow Watermelon; 4000x Awl; 4000x Wooden Plank; 800x Steel Vise; 4000x Iron; 4000x Stone
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Joker; 2x Prune Juice; 1000x Large Net; 1x Schoolbook; 100x Dragon Skull; 1x Notebook; 1x Pencil; 1x Water Bottle; 1x You Rock Card
description:
The kids loved the trebuchets!

This next lesson will help the kids learn about force, pressure, and surface area. The teachers will guide the students in applying different forces spread in different ways over the surface of the watermelons. It could be another messy one.

If you can help, Vincent will need a lot of weight for this one, as well as a few tools, and more watermelons.

name: Summer Lessons in Science VI
itemsRequired: 5000x Watermelon; 500x Yellow Watermelon; 4000x Salt; 4000x Sour Root; 4000x Apple; 4000x Onion; 4000x Orange; 4000x Carrot; 4000x Herbs; 4000x Peppers; 4000x Milk; 4000x Red Berries
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Schoolbook; 1x Apple Pie; 25x Lemon Cream Pie; 25x Cabbage Stew; 1000x Bacon; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1x Notebook; 1x Pencil; 1x Water Bottle; 1x Capy Birthday Card
description:
The surface area and force lesson was a big smash…ha!

This next lesson should be pretty interesting and fun for the kids. The teachers will be guiding the students in learning about nutrition, taste, and smell. The kids will take a variety of different ingredients and smell and taste them with the watermelons, and then eventually make a dish or drink using the ingredients and the watermelon. Some of these combinations will not taste good, but maybe the kids will find something new they like.

Will you bring more watermelons to the school, along with this list of other ingredients?

name: Summer Lessons in Science VII
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Schoolbook; 1x Protein Bar; 1x Mini Time Egg; 1x Bananas; 1x Coconut; 5x Bug Bag 01; 100x Lima Bean; 1x Notebook; 1x Pencil; 1x Water Bottle; 1x Congratulations Card
description:
The nutrition, taste, and smell lesson was…interesting…but the kids had fun.

This last lesson is right up your alley. The teachers and students will be harvesting seeds from the best tasting watermelons. Then, they will learn about planting seeds and growing crops in a greenhouse. This lesson will actually continue on for months.

Will you bring Vincent one last load of watermelons?

name: More A-peeling I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 5x Void Bag 01; 1x Clubs; 5x Shrimp-a-Plenty
description:
Roarr! Grrrrr, grrrr. Grrrrr grr grr grrrrr. Grrrrrrr grrr grrrrrr.  Roooaaarr?

(Hint: The Apple Slicer is in the Apple Crate 01 which is available in the September Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: More A-peeling II
rewardItems: 1x Apple Slicer; 1x Event Key; 1x Raffle Ticket; 5x Void Bag 01; 5x Mushroom Stew; 1x Buddy Loves You Card
description: Roooaaarrrrrrrr! Grr. Grrrr grrrrr grrrrrrrrr grrr.

name: The Greater Good I
description: “For a small donation to the Redbrook Relief Fund, plus a small handling fee, you can be entered in a raffle to win some prizes. All donations are non refundable. Sound exciting? Excellent! I’m happy to take that donation right now.”

name: The Greater Good II
description: “I’d be willing to let you make another small donation to the Redbrook Relief Fund, plus a small handling fee, to get two more entries into the raffle. Don’t forget that all donations are non refundable.”

name: The Greater Good III
description: “I suppose I could, for a generous donation to the Redbrook Relief Fund, plus handling fees, give you a few more raffle tickets. Don’t forget that all donations and handling fees are final and cannot be returned or exchanged under any circumstances. Nor may you hold me liable if you aren’t successful in winning a prize.”

name: The Greater Good IV
description: “You want a receipt? I can do that, for a small processing fee.”

name: Pumpkins Spiced, Apples Tart I
rewardItems: 25x Orange Juice; 50x Mealworms; 5x Onion Soup; 5x Cat's Meow; 1x Thank You Card
description: Mariya is attempting to make a few dishes that capture summer’s warmth and bounty and fall’s cooling and harvest. She could use some help gathering some ingredients, if you’re up for it.

name: Pumpkins Spiced, Apples Tart II
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Grape Juice; 2x Breakfast Boost; 1x Buddystone; 5x Void Bag 01; 5x Mushroom Stew; 1x You Rock Card; 100x Mealworms; 100x Pickaxe; 5x Bomb
description: The apples were a good start. Now, Mariya needs more ingredients to experiment with. Will you bring her a few more options?

name: Pumpkins Spiced, Apples Tart III
itemsRequired: 300x Pumpkin; 400x Sweet Root; 400x Apple; 400x Flour; 400x Honey; 50x Butter
rewardItems: 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Buddy Loves You Card; 5x Bug Bag 01; 300x Bone Pickaxe; 10x Bomb; 300x Crystal Pickaxe; 1x Spades
description:
The pumpkin and corn are wonderful ingredients. Mariya appreciates your help in this culinary experiment.

Now, Mariya needs more flour and more sweetener, along with some more pumpkins and apples. Will you bring her the items from this list?

name: Candy Cure I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Mealworms; 100x Orange Juice; 1x Clubs; 5x Bomb; 5x Void Bag 01; 5x Mushroom Stew
description:
“My focus is all flustered today and I fear frank may be formulating a fizzbang prank to flop on me when I fully unexpect it…”

“Fah! What is fueling this fiasco!?!”

“Friend, do you find yourself fully stocked with fondant or con-ffffections of some form?”

“Candy? For me? Friend, free me and have my ffffthanks!”

(Hint: Gummy Globbers are in Treat Bag 06 which is available in the October Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: Pumpkins Spiced, Apples Tart IV
itemsRequired: 600x Pumpkin; 600x Sweet Root; 600x Apple; 600x Flour; 600x Honey; 100x Butter
rewardItems: 10x Bomb; 400x Sturdy Pickaxe; 1x Protein Bar; 1x Diamonds; 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Large Net; 1x Clawed Card
description:
Mariya appreciates all of your help so far.

Now, she wants you to know where this experiment has led her. She created a delicious apple pie and also a delicious pumpkin pie. Then, the culinary muses descended upon her and invited her to keep going. At first, she struggled with what the next step could be, but as she stood in her kitchen with two different, but wonderful pies before her the idea finally came. Bring the two pies together!

If you’re up for it, Mariya will need many more supplies to figure out how to bring the two pies together.

name: Pumpkins Spiced, Apples Tart V
itemsRequired: 1000x Pumpkin; 1000x Sweet Root; 1000x Apple; 1000x Flour; 400x Honey; 600x Candy Corn; 1000x Lemon; 250x Butter
rewardItems: 20x Bomb; 1000x Steel Pickaxe; 500x Arnold Palmer; 1x Borgen Buck; 100x Large Chest 01; 1x Spooky Cookies
description:
Mariya did it! She successfully put the two pies together. The new pie is so tasty!

Will you bring her more ingredients so she can experiment with a few variations on the recipe?

name: Candy Cure II
rewardItems: 5x Treat Bag 01; 5x Treat Bag 02; 5x Treat Bag 03; 1x Spades; 5x Bug Bag 01; 5x Garlic; 5x Sea Pincher Special; 10x QED Cell; 1x Event Key
description:
“i got old star-boy pretty ffffair, wouldn’t you say? bahahaha!”

“it’s too bad he figured out the candy antidote. speaking of, might you have a little bit more candy for a furry friend?” ;)

name: Cuucoo's Awakening I
description:
BACAAWWWWWWWW

BOK BOK

BOK

BACAAWWWWWWWW

BOK

BOK BOK BOK?

name: Cuucoo's Awakening II
description:
Oh? Can you understand me? Thanks, I was quite hungry!

I don’t know how I got here. It was highly unlikely for me to find someone as empathetic as you though… I’m lost! Will you help me find my way home? I’m looking for someone with a green cap and a sword.

name: Cuucoo's Awakening III
description:
BACAAWWWWWWWWW

Close enough! Could you get me a little more food? This feed just goes right through me!

name: Cuucoo's Awakening IV
description:
BOK BOK BOK

Oh, that’s much better. Anyways. I was minding my own business when this fella wearing a green cap grabbed me. In a panic, I screeched and flapped my wings as hard as I could! The next thing I knew, I heard some kind of weird flutey song and now I’m here! BOK! Now I just need a small flute and you can play that same song and send me home!

name: Cuucoo's Awakening V
description:
Oh good, that seems like a good instrument and it’s quite flutey. Let’s give this a shot. Now um, it’s very simple, just an inverted D triad. Play it twice.

And could you bring a little extra food?

name: Cuucoo's Awakening VI
description:
Well, that was a pretty song, it made me think of time, but no matter.  I guess we’ll need to find that green guy after all.  BOK!

I’m told this fella is all about these heart collectibles, can you bring me one?  He won’t be able to resist the pull of such a find!

name: Cuucoo's Awakening VII
description: You’re such a helpful person, while I put this trap in place, could you bring me just a little more food?  I’m starving for some reason.

name: Cuucoo's Awakening VIII
description:
Gosh, I’m still not full, but you’re so good at keeping me fed, why bother with that green guy? Want to know a secret? I took this from him when he wasn’t looking, you can have it as my way of thanks!

{lafanfare}

name: Distant Illusions I
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 7500x Bacon; 7500x Blue Diary; 500x Breakfast Boost; 12500x Carrot; 500x Cat's Meow; 1000x Compass; 10000x Dice; 5000x Fancy Violin; 12500x Garnet Ring; 12500x Gold Feather; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 500x Mushroom Stew; 500x Over The Moon; 7500x Purple Diary; 500x Red Berry Pie; 10000x Rucksack; 10000x Sewing Needle; 10000x Silk; 5000x Snow Shoes; 12x Spades; 5000x Wine
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 10000x Large Net; 20x Bug Bag 01; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 1x Magna Core
description:
Snow falls softly across the land of Redbrook as you recline on your porch with a mug of hot chocolate steaming in one hand and the daily newspaper in the other.
