The evening slowly turns dark once the sun reaches the horizon and, as you move to turn your porch lanterns on to savor the wintry night, there is a brilliant flash across the sky. Dazzling lights fill the firmament and you are mesmerized by the twinkling, oscillating brilliance of the colors. The tones reflect off the clouds and snow in an otherworldly display.

You’re transfixed for what feels like an eternity until the lights slowly fade away, leaving you blind as your eyes adjust to the sudden darkness. Reaching up to turn on one of your porch lanterns, you jump, caught off guard by a crunching of snow.

“Hi friend!” you hear and stumble backward.

You collect yourself, finally light the lantern, and Buddy appears before you.

“Did ya see those lights? I’ve never seen them so far inland. Normally they’re further north and out in the ocean… now I’ve just got to see what they are! Wanna come?”

You do, in fact, want to see what they are. You pack a few things and head north, side-by-side with Buddy.

name: Distant Illusions II
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 7500x Blue Diary; 5000x Cannon; 12500x Fancy Pan Flute; 12500x Garnet Ring; 12500x Gold Leaf; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12x Hearts; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 12500x Pine Board; 7500x Purple Diary; 5000x Snow Shoes; 10000x Spiked Shell; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 2x Heart-shaped Gem; 2500x Arnold Palmer; 5x Buddy Doll
description:
You journey northeast, past Mount Banon, its snowy peaks rising into the clouds. As the terrain begins to give way to Highland Hills, Buddy suggests you’re going to need a more suitable set of gear for tomorrow’s journey. It only takes a few more plodding steps through the white fluff before you agree. You crest the next hill and set up a campfire for the evening. The clouds have dissipated after a long day, leaving a breathtaking vista of stars too numerous to count. You both settle in for the evening and Buddy throws another pine log on the campfire, its pops and crackles punctuating the space around you.

You hear a voice in the dark.

“Stories tell us that the stars once told their own tale and guided us to places we needed to be. Now, you are lost.”

The mysterious voice is raspy. You peer into the dark desperately and swear you see a form perched on a chair of inky black that shimmers and absorbs the firelight.

You blink, your body tense. You move to draw your weapon when the sky bursts into another dazzling display of lights. The flood of color draws your attention away and, when you look back, there is nothing but your friend Buddy staring into the same darkness.

“Well, that was weird.” Buddy shrugs his shoulders. “Guess we’ll just have to hope that was very normal and safe, unless you want to set up a watch?”

Bewildered but unshaken, you both decide that this weird phenomenon probably isn’t dangerous and agree to both getting a full night's sleep.

name: Distant Illusions IV
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 5000x Amber Cane; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 7500x Blue Diary; 12500x Carrot; 12x Clubs; 500x Compass; 7500x Corn Oil; 10000x Dice; 7500x Engine; 12500x Fancy Pan Flute; 12500x Garnet Ring; 12500x Gold Leaf; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 12500x Machine Press; 7500x Purple Diary; 5000x Sail Cloth; 10000x Sewing Needle; 10000x Silk; 12500x Snow Shoes; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 2000x Large Chest 02; 2x Heart-shaped Gem; 1x Magna Core
description:
Buddy sticks his face out of the tent as you put the finishing touches on breakfast.

“Hoo boy, that’s a delicious smell you got there, {player}. I hope a friend could join you for breakfast?”

You nod and smile. Over breakfast, the incident from the previous evening is wiped from your minds in favor of good food and great company. Once the last bits of food disappear from your makeshift plates, Buddy leans back and exhales, satisfied, before then rummaging through his rucksack. After fishing around, he slips a rolled up map from its quiver. The edges of the parchment are frayed and covered in wrinkles and soot. After laying down a cloth over the snow, Buddy gingerly rolls out the map, careful to not damage it.

Before you sprawls T’rah in surprising detail. Though it is missing some locations, it spans the western coast of the Vast Ocean (labeled flœðr) and is speckled with islands and inlets before abruptly ending. Buddy points to the blank area. “We need to go here, on foot, as long as possible. My pir - er - exploring senses are tingling that this is where those lights originate from!”

You set about grabbing a few extra supplies, readying yourself for a distance that seems both longer than you originally anticipated and more snow-covered.

name: Distant Illusions III
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 7500x Blue Diary; 500x Breakfast Boost; 12500x Carrot; 500x Cat's Meow; 750x Concord Grape Pie; 12500x Corn Oil; 12x Diamonds; 12500x Garnet Ring; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 750x Hickory Omelette; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 500x Mushroom Stew; 500x Over The Moon; 7500x Purple Diary; 500x Red Berry Pie; 5000x Red Brick; 10000x Rucksack; 12500x Spoon; 12500x Sunflower Oil; 5000x Wine; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 25x Borgen Bag 01; 5000x Apple Cider; 150x Mug of Beer; 150x Corn Prize Bag
description: Sunlight crests the peaks and valleys of the horizon, and the bright reflection on the pure white snow nearly blinds you as you open your tent flap to greet the morning. Tracks in the snow have been erased by what you assume was the wind and snow overnight. Buddy hasn’t woken up yet, but you think a kingly breakfast will be in order when he does, so you set about making a royal meal.

name: Distant Illusions V
itemsRequired: 12500x Carrot; 12500x Fire Ant Farm; 12500x Garnet Ring; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12x Joker; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 12500x Pine Board; 7500x Purple Diary; 10000x Rucksack; 12500x Snow Shoes; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 5000x Grab Bag 04; 1250x Black Truffle
description:
As you start walking, Buddy begins to speak, but the words seem to come in a hesitant but sudden torrent. “So, in another time, I spent a lot of effort mapping out the vast ocean around Redbrook. It was a wonderful time. I had all kinds of friends and an especially lovely parrot named Crackers. Crackers was a good bird, always knew which way was north, the cunning fellow… Anyways, me an’ my friends, we set about mapping the vast ocean. Not sure why it hadn’t been done before, but hey, someone had to do it, and me an’ my old mate had a wager about who could map more. Ragvin, that scamp, he cheated and borrowed a Bahltruvian wizard to bolster his sails. Well, in the end he won, I guess, but would never show me the map. He told me never to go there…”

Buddy’s story ended as abruptly as it began, interrupted by a gust of wind so severe you are both knocked off your feet. As you both scramble to ensure that your packs and nothing of value are lost, you look up to see a glistening on the horizon as snowflakes reflect the sunlight on the faraway ocean and back again.

name: Distant Illusions VI
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 7500x Blue Diary; 12500x Carrot; 500x Cat's Meow; 10000x Dice; 12500x Fancy Pan Flute; 12500x Garnet Ring; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12x Hearts; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 7500x Purple Diary; 5000x Red Brick; 12500x Snow Shoes; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 480x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Prune Juice; 2x Heart Container
description:
“Well, we should make for the ocean anyways. This northward journey was inevitably going to take us to the water…” Buddy sighs and begins walking toward the sea.

After a full day’s travel, the ocean looms before you both and you wonder what Buddy has planned for this next leg of the adventure. You both make camp and settle in for what tomorrow will bring.

name: Distant Illusions VII
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 7500x Blue Diary; 12500x Carrot; 500x Carved Fox; 12x Clubs; 10000x Dice; 12500x Fancy Pan Flute; 12500x Garnet Ring; 12500x Gold Feather; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 7500x Purple Diary; 12500x Silk; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 480x Mega Sunflower Seeds; 500x Void Bag 01; 5000x Block of Wood; 500x Grab Bag 03; 500x Grab Bag 06
description:
Dreams overtake you in the night and the voice from the dark echoes in your mind.

“Stories tell us that the stars once told their own tale and guided us to places we needed to be. Now, you are lost.”

Gentle waves crash on the shore. The rhythmic sound brings you awake slowly, and you notice you are suddenly alone. Buddy’s tent is completely gone.

“If water once was your home and your hope, where then is your sanctuary? Stories tell us that the stars once told their own tale and guided us to places we needed to be. Now, you are lost.”

The raspy voice comes from nowhere and everywhere. “If water once was your home and your hope, where then is your sanctuary? Stories tell us that the stars once told their own tale and guided us to places we needed to be. Now, you are lost.”

You blink again, forcing your eyes to focus on the inky figure in the dark. You can barely make out the shape of a chair and its owner. The figure begins to stand. You feel yourself drawn toward them, inch by inch. You’re being dragged along, but how? You struggle to hold your ground but slip ever closer to the voice and the dark.

name: Distant Illusions IX
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 7500x Blue Diary; 12500x Cannon; 12500x Canoe; 12500x Carrot; 500x Compass; 12x Diamonds; 10000x Dice; 12500x Fancy Pan Flute; 12500x Garnet Ring; 12500x Gold Leaf; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 12500x Machine Press; 7500x Purple Diary; 5000x Red Brick; 5000x Rucksack; 2500x Sail Cloth; 10000x Sewing Needle; 1250x Ship in a Bottle; 12500x Silk; 12500x Snow Shoes; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 3x Joker; 2x Prune Juice; 2x Pumpkin Juice; 5000x Pine Board; 1x Magna Core
description: As you bring back more and more material, you’re completely winded. Your hot breath gives way to a mist as light begins to break through the night sky. You briefly consider where Buddy’s boat might be, then push the question out of your mind. He probably lost it…again, you think to yourself.

name: Distant Illusions VIII
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 12500x Bacon; 7500x Blue Diary; 12500x Cannon; 12500x Canoe; 12500x Carrot; 7500x Corn Oil; 12500x Fire Ant Farm; 12500x Garnet Ring; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 12500x Machine Press; 12500x Pine Board; 7500x Purple Diary; 5000x Rucksack; 2500x Sail Cloth; 10000x Sewing Needle; 1250x Ship in a Bottle; 12500x Silk; 12500x Snow Shoes; 12x Spades; 10000x Spiked Shell; 12500x Spoon; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 5000x Apple Cider; 3x Spooky Cookies; 3x Happy Cookies; 3x Lovely Cookies
description:
THUNK!

You jerk awake. Only a dream. Buddy swings his axe and hits wood.

THUNK!

You yawn. It’s still dark and definitely too early.

“Well, now that you’re awake, we could really use some supplies for this sailing trip. I’ve been splitting wood all morning, sleepyhead! Maybe you could help gather some of the other things we’ll need to get this boat seaworthy."

You have flashbacks from this request. You remember building a boat for saving Vincent, chasing Buddy… A myriad of other adventures cross your mind as you begin to gather supplies for the journey. Suffice it to say, it feels like you've built a lot of boats.

name: Distant Illusions X
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 7500x Blue Diary; 12500x Carrot; 7500x Corn Oil; 7500x Engine; 12500x Garnet Ring; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 12500x Machine Press; 7500x Purple Diary; 5000x Rucksack; 12500x Snow Shoes; 12x Spades; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 25x Supply Crate 01; 25x Lemon Cream Pie; 12500x Antler; 25x Supply Crate 02
description: Your breath grows fainter as morning light stretches out across the horizon. You continue to bring materials back to the boat, piece by agonizing piece. Buddy seems blissfully ignorant of your struggles. As you’ve toiled, you have caught him more than once gingerly checking his side for the map quiver. He seems oddly possessive and secretive, even for Buddy.

name: Distant Illusions XI
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 5000x Amber Cane; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 5000x Bacon; 7500x Blue Diary; 12500x Carrot; 500x Cat's Meow; 12x Diamonds; 12500x Fancy Pan Flute; 12500x Garnet Ring; 12500x Gold Feather; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 250x Mushroom Stew; 500x Over The Moon; 7500x Purple Diary; 10000x Rucksack; 12500x Snow Shoes; 12500x Sunflower Oil; 5000x Wine; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 10000x Large Net; 1x Friendship Bag 01
description:
Some trips later, you finally see a medium-sized catamaran taking shape. It looks both too small for a long sea voyage and yet still too big to be something that was made from scratch. Buddy’s industriousness rivals your own, and his craftsmanship reinforces your perceived understanding of his experience with boats.

Buddy notices you gawking at the catamaran and offers a knowing smile.

“I’ve made her lean and mean. If we’re gonna make it through the shoals of Tierchola, past the crashing waves of the Sirran Void, and north of the Jidoran Glaciers, we’re gonna need to be nimble, quick, and, above all, hard to spot. We’ll have to come up with a name for her, but pack your bags {player}, we’re setting sail tomorrow!”

name: Distant Illusions XII
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 7500x Blue Diary; 12500x Carrot; 12500x Garnet Ring; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12x Hearts; 12500x Horn Canteen; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 12500x Pine Board; 7500x Purple Diary; 15000x Salt; 500x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 10000x Strange Ring; 12500x Sunflower Oil; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
description:
After another day of cooking, packing, and other chores completed, you are completely spent and decide to head to bed. Buddy’s stoic silence has continued along with mysterious glances toward the dancing lights in the north and the constant checking of the map quiver slung over his shoulder.

As you settle in your tent for some well-deserved rest, you can hear the fire crackle outside. It pops and purrs gently. You listen to its comforting melody and it cradles you into unconsciousness…

“Cursed to land. If water once was your home and your hope, where then is your sanctuary? Stories tell us that the stars once told their own tale and guided us to places we needed to be. Now, you are lost. Revenge.”

Your eyes pop open and you are shocked to see a chair by your bed. The mysterious figure now sits before you, turned ever so slightly away. They’re closer than before, certainly closer than you’d like, close enough that you can make out that the figure is entirely shrouded in a blue cloak lined with gold thread. Slowly, the figure's head turns in your direction. You can’t help but try to peer into the inky black beneath the hood. The gleam of a jade-green eye pierces you. You freeze as black tendrils pour out of the hood, sprawling outward. The jade eye brightens somehow and you are pulled helplessly closer and closer…

name: Distant Illusions XIII
itemsRequired: 15000x Aquamarine; 15000x Blue Gel; 15000x Bucket; 15000x Chum; 12x Clubs; 1000x Dragon Skull; 15000x Fire Ant Farm; 15000x Flour; 15000x Frost Shield; 15000x Frost Snapper Shell; 5000x Glacierstone; 15000x Glass Jar; 15000x Hourglass; 15000x Iron Cup; 15000x Leather Waterskin; 15000x Magicite; 15000x Mayonnaise; 15000x Mystic Ring; 15000x Orange Juice; 10000x Red Brick; 15000x Runestone 18; 15000x Salt; 15000x Sand; 15000x Shovel; 15000x Slimestone; 10000x Spiked Shell; 15000x Tomato; 15000x Watermelon; 5000x Wine
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 5000x Arnold Palmer; 1x Apple Pie; 2x Baba Cola
description:
The voice beckons. “Cursed to land. If water once was your home and your hope, where then is your sanctuary? Stories tell us that the stars once told their own tale and guided us to places we needed to be. Now, you are lost.”

The voice becomes a screech. “Revenge. Revenge. Revenge.” The screeching becomes louder, and you can feel your mind suddenly push outward, desperate to escape the prison of your skull.

“REVENGE. REVENGE. REVENGE. REVENGE. REVENGE. REVENGE. REVENGE. REVENGE. REVENGE. REVENGE. REVENGE.”


You smell something powerful. Smoke?

Snap. Crackle. Snap.

“REVENGE!”

You bolt upright, awakened. Your tent is ablaze.

Fire! Buddy!

You clamor out of the tent and make a mad dash for water. Your brain, it seems, is still intact.

name: Distant Illusions XIV
itemsRequired: 5000x Acorn Butter; 12500x Amethyst Necklace; 12500x Awl; 12500x Axe; 5000x Bacon; 5x Bananas; 7500x Blue Diary; 12500x Cannon; 12500x Carrot; 2000x Compass; 7500x Corn Oil; 12500x Engine; 1x Fancy Clock; 12500x Fancy Pan Flute; 5000x Fancy Violin; 12500x Garnet Ring; 1x Gary's Diary Page 36; 1x Gary's Diary Page 77; 12500x Gold Feather; 12500x Gold Leaf; 1x Grand Piano; 7500x Green Cloak; 7500x Green Diary; 12500x Green Scarf; 12500x Horn Canteen; 24x Joker; 12500x Leather; 7500x Leather Diary; 12500x Linked Lantern; 12500x Machine Press; 12500x Orange; 7500x Purple Diary; 10000x Sail Cloth; 15000x Salt; 10000x Sewing Needle; 12500x Silk; 12500x Snow Shoes; 12500x Spoon; 12500x Sunflower Oil; 5000x Wine; 12500x Wooden Box; 12500x Wooden Table
rewardItems: 2x Cranberry Juice; 5x Buddy Doll; 1x Magna Core; 1x Fungus Processing and You
description:
Eventually, you successfully snuffed out the fire, but you will need a brand-new tent and a fresh bed. Buddy seems quite disturbed by the events as you relate them: cloaked figures, flowing tendrils, revenge. He brushes off the fire as “a coal that must have gotten on your tent.” In a bit of optimism Buddy reminds you, there’s no need for a new tent, as your boat trip starts today.

He hands you a small journal and asks you very quietly to record your misadventure.

With little fanfare, you both step on the catamaran and shove off into the great wide blue.

Snow falls gently around you as Buddy fiddles with a compass to navigate northward. You look around at your new temporary home and notice a small chair in the corner that suits neither you nor Buddy, but when you look up to say something to your nautical comrade, the chair is gone.

name: Pumpkins Spiced, Apples Tart VI
itemsRequired: 1200x Pumpkin; 1200x Sweet Root; 1200x Apple; 1200x Flour; 400x Honey; 600x Candy Corn; 300x Lemon; 1000x Butter
rewardItems: 10x Bomb; 500x Steel Pickaxe; 500x Sturdy Pickaxe; 500x Crystal Pickaxe; 1x Spooky Pie; 1000x Large Net
description: The variations were pretty tasty, but now Mariya has settled on a simple, but perfect recipe. Now, she’s ready to share this treat with everyone. Will you help her get lots of the ingredients?

name: Pumpkins Spiced, Apples Tart VII
itemsRequired: 3000x Pumpkin; 3000x Sweet Root; 3000x Apple; 3000x Flour; 1000x Honey; 1500x Candy Corn; 750x Lemon; 2000x Butter
rewardItems: 10x Bomb; 1x Apple Pie; 1x Thank You Card; 1000x Apple Cider; 100x Void Bag 01
description: Everyone loves it! Mariya needs more ingredients to make more apple pumpkin hybrid pies. Will you help her?

name: Pumpkins Spiced, Apples Tart VIII
itemsRequired: 6000x Pumpkin; 6000x Sweet Root; 6000x Apple; 6000x Flour; 2000x Honey; 3000x Candy Corn; 1500x Lemon; 4000x Butter
rewardItems: 1x Thank You Card; 1x Baba Cola; 1x Prune Juice; 1x Heart-shaped Gem; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Happy Cookies
description: The whole town wants a slice! Will you bring Mariya more ingredients to make more pies for everyone?

name: Catcher of Ghosts I
description: George wants to try catching ghosts with you. He already got a QED pack, but he’s not sure where to get the QED power cells. Will you bring a few extra QED cells and show him how to catch ghosts?

name: Catcher of Ghosts II
description: George found ghost catching very exhilarating! He’s ready for some more training, if you’re willing to keep teaching him. He’s hoping to improve his aim with a little more practice too.

name: Catcher of Ghosts III
description: He’s getting the hang of it! If you’ll take George out for one more training session, he thinks he’ll be ready for a solo mission next time.

name: Catcher of Ghosts IV
description: George is ready for a solo mission to catch ghosts. Will you bring him some QED cells for this adventure?

name: Catcher of Ghosts V
description: George’s solo run went pretty well, but he feels like his aim suffered on his own. He’s going to go and do another solo practice run to work on his aim. Will you bring him more QED cells?

name: Catcher of Ghosts VI
description: George did a little better this time, but he thinks a longer practice would be beneficial. Will you bring him a load of cells to power his pack for a longer time?

name: Catcher of Ghosts VII
description:
That practice went much better!

Now, George has invited Jill to come along for a hunt. She already built a pack, but they both need some cells. Will you bring them some QED cells?

name: Catcher of Ghosts VIII
description:
Jill loved catching ghosts! She’s ready to go again!

George and Jill are going to catch more ghosts. This time they invited Vincent to come and try out ghost catching with them. Will you gather enough QED cells for the entire party?

name: Catcher of Ghosts IX
description: Vincent did well at catching ghosts, but he has declined George and Jill’s offer to go again. So, this time they invited Holger and Borgen to come along. Will you get enough QED cells for everyone?

name: Catcher of Ghosts X
description: Holger and Borgen did pretty well and they’re ready to go again. This time they want to bring along Mariya and Buddy too. George thinks they will need a pretty significant load of QED cells. Will you gather all you can for this group?

name: That Which Hat Bewitches Witches And Wizards II
rewardItems: 20x Treat Bag 01; 20x Treat Bag 02; 20x Treat Bag 03
questline: That Which Hat Bewitches Witches And Wizards
description:
You are trudging back from the Haunted House, another haul of hats for Star when Rosalie appears next to you in a shower of multi-colored feathers.

“Okay, so I was thinking, maybe I could scale back the decorations on my house this year? Bigger is better, but maybe something more subtle would work wonders? I was thinking about lining the house with something a little creepier than witch hats.”

She hands you a list that just says, “Jar of Spiders to cover 2160 linear feet.” Suddenly, Rosalie looks at you blithely, “Hey, what are those hats for, anyways?”

You quickly excuse yourself to get some jars and spiders for her before she can ask more questions.

name: That Which Hat Bewitches Witches And Wizards I
itemsRequired: 200x Wizard Hat; 200x Witch Hat; 200x Bat Wing
questline: That Which Hat Bewitches Witches And Wizards
description:
It’s been a magical year in Redbrook, but nothing tops Rosalie’s decorations during the Halloween season. You have fond memories when you look at the witch hats lining her home.

Star Meerif appears beside you in a flash of feathers.

“But, could we go,” he pauses for impact, “bigger? For Rosalie? She’s just the best. The bees knees. The star in a diamond. The ocean in a pasture. The sun in the moon. The - well, you get the idea anyway.”

name: That Which Hat Bewitches Witches And Wizards III
questline: That Which Hat Bewitches Witches And Wizards
description:
You return to Rosalie’s home with more spiders and jars than would be comfortable for even George, and find Rosalie sitting across from Star Meerif.  You’re not sure what exactly they’re saying, it sounds like a foreign language to you.  “Well, the aura of monorecidivism in the colloquial basketweaving of destined death with regards to azure eclipses in the 4th quarter of halloween distribution with a proper sigma to the sixth degree would predicate a lack of color here.”
	They turn to you, faces flush and say in unison, “We’re gonna need more…of everything!”
	Star grabs your hand and whispers in your ear, “And something special - for Rosalie!”

name: That Which Hat Bewitches Witches And Wizards IV
questline: That Which Hat Bewitches Witches And Wizards
description:
Returning to Rosalie’s house, Star sits on the front steps, and the nervousness on his face is quite apparent.

“Did you bring it?” he asks.

You nod and Star looks quite relieved.

He enters the house, the diamond and steel band held tightly between two fingers.

In a few moments that feel like eternities, you hear a quiet shuffle, a shriek, and a “Yes!” come from inside her home and Star and Rosalie burst through the entryway.

“Trick…”

name: That Which Hat Bewitches Witches And Wizards V
rewardItems: 5x Spooky Cookies; 200x Apple; 5x Hockey Mask; 25x Apple Cider
questline: That Which Hat Bewitches Witches And Wizards
description:
“OR TREAT!”  They exclaim! 

	“The diamond was for creating a new light refraction technique that we discovered in Romuska!”

	“We totally fooled you!”

name: A Game Of Thanks III
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 1x Clubs; 10x Void Bag 01
description:
Jill decided that she needs more notes from everyone to make the game a little more challenging. Otherwise, it may be too easy to guess what everyone is thankful for and the game will be over quickly. There’s a very delicate balance needed.

TIP: Thankful Notes can be found in Cornucopia 02, which is part of the November Starter Pack and also obtained by completing 28 days of daily chores.

name: A Game Of Thanks IV
rewardItems: 10x Grape Juice; 1x Diamonds; 3x Grab Bag 03; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Cooked Turkey; 1x Event Key; 10x Void Bag 01
description: Holger will absolutely need more to snack on for game night. He is inevitable. Will you help Jill by bringing a few more food items for Holger?

name: Banana Stand III
rewardItems: 10000x Arnold Palmer; 10000x Apple Cider; 2x Cranberry Juice; 10000x Orange Juice; 25x Lemon Seltzer
description: Cecil knows there's always money in the banana stand.  There's also a strange "burn in case of emergency" sign taped to the walls.

name: Effigy of Friendship
itemsRequired: 1x Adventure Buddy Doll; 1x Jester Buddy Doll; 1x Buddy Doll; 10x Buddystone; 10x Skull Coin; 1x Pirate Flag; 100x Pirate Hook; 1x Captains Log; 10x Cutlass; 100x Orange; 50x Sail Cloth
description: You've proven yourself a truer friend than the word friend encapsulates, so Buddy wants to give you this secret item he found while he was pir - err - adventuring, but only in exchange for some of his favorite pir - err - adventure-like things.  The code demands fair value, of course.

name: Fitness Friends Fit Forever I
itemsRequired: 600x Apple; 600x Broccoli; 600x Carrot; 600x Eggplant; 600x Gold Peas; 600x Herbs; 600x Iced Tea; 5x Jar of Pickles; 200x Lima Bean; 600x Milk; 600x Onion; 1x Protein Bar; 600x Radish; 600x Shrimp; 600x Trout; 600x Watermelon; 1x Bananas; 1x Coconut
description: Gary is working to continue to eat healthier foods, and to increase the variety in his diet. Will you help him build up a supply of healthy choices to keep on hand?

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow III
itemsRequired: 1000x Gold Carrot; 1000x Gold Peas; 1000x Gold Eggplant; 1000x Gold Peppers; 1000x Gold Cucumber
rewardItems: 1x Joker; 50x Fruit Punch; 1000x Grab Bag 02; 50x Orange Gecko; 100x Large Chest 01
description:
As Lorn leads the way into the Brindle Pub, you pause for a moment to admire a performance occurring right in front of your eyes. Lorn is transformed. No longer is he the careful and wise old sage. He is a charming pirate the instant he walks through the door.

After dumping a bag of jewels on the bar, he hollers over the crowd to the landlord. “Food and drinks for everyone! And keep them coming ’til we’re all full!”

In response, the crowd gives a raucous roar of approval and Lorn tips his hat to them. A few old roughs invite Lorn over to their table to share their thanks and Lorn disappears into the crowd heading their direction.

You spy an empty table in the opposite direction and make your way to it. From this edge of the excitement you can see all around the pub. The pub is fairly full, fairly dim, and fairly loud. The landlord is now quite busy taking orders and handing out food and drinks at the bar. Lorn is shaking hands with a short old man and then starts gesticulating what looks to be a wild story to everyone around him. The pub’s inhabitants love it.

Your meal is long finished by the time Lorn makes his way to your table.

“Arrrr! You’re doing great playing a suddenly-wealthy pirate. Keep up the good work.”

“Unfortunately, the Wodutrown brothers are surprisingly mum right now. However, I think, out of the two brothers, Lagerne might give us a clue to Buddy’s whereabouts, if we give him something he wants. Will you try to find something valuable to tempt him with?”

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow IV
itemsRequired: 100x Butter; 100x Acorn Butter; 100x Apple; 100x Flour; 100x Gouda; 100x Salt; 100x Honey; 100x Onion; 100x Grapes; 100x Potato; 100x Beet; 100x Corn; 100x Radish; 100x Red Berries
description:
“That was inspired! And it worked strangely well. Lagerne must be part rabbit.”

“Well, we have our heading now. Buddy was here and he was asking about relics from his ancestral homeland. I think it’s time for us to make our way to Black Rock Canyon. A lot of strange things wash up around there. That’s where Buddy will start his search.”

“Before we go, will you help me prepare some rations for our search?”

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow V
itemsRequired: 100x Apple; 100x Orange Juice; 100x Lemonade; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Spooky Cookies
description: “Don’t look back. We’re being followed. Let’s try to lose them.”

name: Shipshape Decorations I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Spades; 1x Happy Cookies
description:
Captain Logan is feeling festive. He would like to start decorating his cabin on the Zefurea for the holidays. Unfortunately, it’s a little more difficult decorating a space that sways and rocks all day. He’s going to need some decorations that can easily stay in place even when the seas get a little rough. Will you find something to help Captain Logan get started?

(Hint: The Holiday Garland is in the Shiny Present which is available in the December Starter pack or by completing 25 days of chores)

name: Shipshape Decorations II
rewardItems: 10x Grape Juice; 1x Diamonds; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Event Key; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Buddy Loves You Card; 1x Grab Bag 04; 1x Grab Bag 05; 1x Cranberry Juice
description:
That was the perfect decoration to get started! With the garland as inspiration, Captain Logan was able to find loads of other great decorations. Now, his cabin is looking very festive.

There’s one more thing that Captain Logan wants for his cabin. Will you help him find a nutcracker? He’ll probably have to nail it to his desk to keep it in place, but Captain Logan really wants one to finish off his decorations.

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow VI
description:
After less than a dozen steps into your attempt to flee from your pursuers, a shadow passes to your right and strikes Lorn, driving him to the ground. As you turn to see where the shadow came from, something strikes your head and relieves you of consciousness.

Eventually, consciousness returns, but you can’t see and you can’t move your arms or legs. It takes a few more moments for you to realize you are blindfolded and tied to a chair. You can feel the wood of the chair with your fingers, and its sturdy build with your legs and back. A fire crackles nearby. Flexing your fingers, they graze what feels like someone else’s fingers.

“Oh good. You’re awake. Are you all right?” Lorn whispers behind you.

You quietly assure Lorn you are okay and ask him what happened.

“It was the Wodutrown brothers, or at least it smelled like them. They knocked us out and carried us off somewhere. Then, they tied us up where we are now.”

“I think they may have gotten in a fight and hurt each other. I heard yelling and a struggle when I first woke up. It’s been quiet ever since.”

“Now, hold still. I’m going to try, very carefully, to cut the ropes on your wrists. Once your hands are free, get rid of your blindfold and look around. If it’s safe, take the runestone from my hand and cut us loose.”

name: Reindeer Safety Program I
description: “Ho ho ho! I think I need your help again. I’m a little worried about my reindeer. Redbrook seems to have a very large raptor population. Actually, in all my years, I’ve never seen so many raptors! All of them are on the nice list, but I’m worried that there could still be a mixup, and one of my reindeer could lose an antler. Will you help me keep my reindeer safe? Ho ho ho!”

name: Reindeer Safety Program II
rewardItems: 500x Sturdy Pickaxe; 500x Event Token; 200x Void Bag 01
description:
“Ho ho ho! I’m glad you were watching out for Rudolph. That red nose can sometimes make him an easy target. Ho ho ho!”

“Have you seen Dasher?”

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow VII
description:
With your hands free, you move to uncover your eyes. Pulling the blindfold clear from your head, you wince at the pain from a spot on the side of your head. Feeling at the source of the pain assures you that you suffered a severe hit. You decide to have Lorn check it once he’s free.

Looking around, you see a fairly plain cabin. There’s a fireplace to your right with a dwindling blaze. Straight ahead and a couple of meters away, you see a table and two overturned chairs. Partially on the table and strewn all around it, you see the supplies that you and Lorn were carrying. To your left, you see the Wodutrown brothers lying near the opened cabin door. The brothers are quite still, but appear to be breathing heavily. Behind you, you see Lorn sitting still, and a closed door beyond him.

You listen carefully for a minute and then quietly ask Lorn if he’s heard any noise coming from the closed door ahead of him.

“Nothing. It has been silence from this direction since I woke up.”

Reassured, you begin sawing at the ropes around your legs with Lorn’s runestone. The runestone cuts through the ropes surprisingly quickly, and you’re free of the chair in a few moments. You stand up and almost topple over as a wave of lightheadedness rushes over you. Fortunately, you brace your hands on the back of the chair until the wave passes. Standing fully now, you notice the soreness in your wrists and ankles. Those ropes were tight.

After pausing and listening for a few more moments, you go around to remove Lorn’s blindfold and then cut him free from his chair. He slowly gets up and you see a little of his age as he struggles.

Lorn notices the concern on your face and says, “Oh I’m all right. It just takes a little longer to recover these days. Too many leaves on the branch, as they say.”

Once he’s upright and moving around, Lorn suggests restraining the Wodutrown brothers before doing anything else, just in case they wake up.

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow VIII
itemsRequired: 1000x Blue Gel; 1000x Essence of Slime; 1000x Magicite; 1000x Seaweed; 1000x Thorns; 1000x Herbs
rewardItems: 1x Buddy Loves You Card; 1x Clawed Card; 1x Hearts; 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Grab Bag 07
description:
After you and Lorn finish tying up the Wodutrown brothers, Lorn checks outside the front door while you inspect what lies behind the closed door. Lorn finds nothing ominous outside, but he notes that Black Rock Canyon is only a few kilometers to the south. Behind the closed door you find a bedroom with two disheveled beds and an ash-filled fireplace. It appears that you are safe for the moment.

Speaking at a comfortable volume again, Lorn asks you to sit at the table so he can examine your injury. He tells you that it looks pretty rough, but that it won’t need stitches. However, he would like to get some healicite ointment on your wound and on his own.

Lorn begins rummaging through the items scattered across the table and the floor. You catch him carefully stuffing a book in his robe before continuing his search for the ingredients needed to make healicite ointment. You make a mental note to ask about the book when you have a chance. For now, you join Lorn in searching through the mess.

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow IX
rewardItems: 1x Buddy Doll; 1000x Bacon; 1x Buddystone; 5x Bug Bag 01; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Protein Bar
description: Lorn applies the ointment to your head and then asks you to press a vigorous dollop onto the swollen gash on the back of his head. He then advises that you should both rest a bit. When the two of you are ready, Lorn says you should get something to eat before resuming the search for Buddy.

name: Another Lot Of Trees I
rewardItems: 3x Happy Cookies; 100x Void Bag 01; 20x Hot Cocoa; 1x Sappy Christmas Card
description:
With the population boom Redbrook has experienced, Vincent has decided to add another lot for his Christmas tree sales. This lot is even bigger than his original tree lot. Will you help him get it quickly stocked?

The first thing he needs is a load of your finest trees.

name: Another Lot Of Trees II
itemsRequired: 4000x Wooden Box; 4000x Blue Ornament; 4000x Purple Ornament; 4000x Yellow Ornament; 4000x Red Ornament; 4000x Green Ornament; 4000x Orange Ornament
rewardItems: 25x Gingerbread Man; 25x Christmas Sweater; 200x Arnold Palmer; 25x Bomb; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Sappy Christmas Card
description: Vincent needs stacks of boxes of ornaments now. Please bring him every ornament you can find.

name: Another Lot Of Trees III
itemsRequired: 4000x Wooden Box; 4000x Blue Ornament; 4000x Purple Ornament; 4000x Yellow Ornament; 4000x Red Ornament; 4000x Green Ornament; 4000x Orange Ornament
rewardItems: 25x Gingerbread Man; 25x Christmas Sweater; 300x Apple Cider; 5x Borgen Buck; 1x Clawed Card; 1x Clubs; 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Prune Juice; 1x Sappy Christmas Card
description: On second thought, Vincent thinks he needs another load of ornaments, just to be safe.

name: Another Lot Of Trees IV
rewardItems: 1x Diamonds; 2x Protein Bar; 50x Mistletoe; 5x Bug Bag 01; 1000x Skull Coin; 1x Thank You Card; 4x Lovely Cookies; 1x Sappy Christmas Card
description: Vincent would like to offer wreaths and Yule goats for sale along with the trees and ornaments. Will you bring him a supply of holiday wreaths and Yule goats?

name: Another Lot Of Trees V
rewardItems: 1x Hearts; 2x Protein Bar; 50x Mistletoe; 5x Bug Bag 01; 1000x Skull Coin; 1x You Rock Card; 4x Spooky Cookies; 100x Void Bag 01; 1x Sappy Christmas Card
description: Vincent thinks he may need more wreaths and goats. Will you bring him more?

name: Another Lot Of Trees VI
rewardItems: 1x Clubs; 100x Teddy Bear; 500x Orange Gecko; 5x Borgen Bag 01; 100x Grab Bag 06; 1x Baba Cola; 1x Sappy Christmas Card
description: The lot is looking great. Now, Vincent wants to be fully stocked on decorated trees before he opens for business.

name: Another Lot Of Trees VII
rewardItems: 1x Joker; 100x Teddy Bear; 500x Orange Gecko; 5x Borgen Bag 01; 100x Grab Bag 06; 2x Friendship Bag 01; 4x Heart Container; 1x Sappy Christmas Card
description: One more load of decorated trees should fill the lot. Vincent appreciates all of your help!

name: Another Lot Of Trees VIII
itemsRequired: 12000x Candy Roll; 12000x Candy Cane; 150x Milk and Cookies
rewardItems: 10x Gingerbread House; 2x Cranberry Juice; 50x Cabbage Stew; 1000x Apple Cider; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1x Apple Pie; 100x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 1000x Rubber Duckie; 1000x Large Net; 500x White Truffle; 1x Sappy Christmas Card
description: Vincent has one more idea for the grand opening of the new tree lot. Will you bring him loads of treats to give away to his customers?

name: Another Lot Of Trees IX
itemsRequired: 12000x Candy Roll; 12000x Candy Cane; 200x Milk and Cookies
rewardItems: 10x Gingerbread House; 2x Cranberry Juice; 50x Cabbage Stew; 1000x Apple Cider; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1x Apple Pie; 100x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Prune Juice; 200x Fruit Punch; 1000x Large Net; 300x Black Truffle; 1x Sappy Christmas Card
description: If you’ll bring one more load of treats, Vincent will be ready to open the new tree lot. Vincent really appreciates your help. This incredible business would be unmanageable without you!

name: Bad Luck Tempering
description: “Did yeh try the wishing well today? I hope not. It’s a bad day to be wishing. Oh. You did, did you? Well, how about I’ll trade you some of your bad luck for some less bad luck?”

name: Don't Nog It Until You Try It
itemsRequired: 30x Coal; 50x Peppers; 50x Eggs; 50x Milk; 25x Sweet Root
description: For years, Mariya has made a special egg nog from memory. Everyone loves it. Now, she wants to actually write it down so she can share the recipe. If you’ll help her get ingredients, she’ll give you a copy of the recipe.

name: Another Lot Of Trees X
description: The tree lot was a huge success! Vincent appreciates all your help. He also wants to give you a share of the profits. Happy holidays!

name: Reindeer Safety Program III
rewardItems: 500x Event Token; 300x Fruit Punch; 100x Festive Eggnog
description:
“Ho ho ho! Great! Dasher is safe. Ho ho ho!”

“Now where is Comet?”

name: Reindeer Safety Program IV
rewardItems: 500x Event Token; 1x Buddy Doll; 10x Borgen Buck
description:
“Ho ho ho! Hurray! I knew Comet wouldn’t get into trouble. Ho ho ho!”

“Will you find Vixen now?”

name: Reindeer Safety Program V
description:
“Ho ho ho! Vixen! Excellent! Ho ho ho!”

“Let’s find Dancer!”

name: Reindeer Safety Program VI
rewardItems: 500x Event Token; 500x Apple Cider; 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Large Net
description:
“Ho ho ho! Dancer, my boy, you’re safe! Ho ho ho!”

“Let’s find Cupid now!”

name: Reindeer Safety Program VII
rewardItems: 500x Event Token; 5x Bug Bag 01; 500x Grab Bag 01; 500x Grab Bag 02; 500x Grab Bag 03
description:
“Ho ho ho! I love it! Cupid is safe! Ho ho ho!”

“Will you help me find Blitzen?”

name: Reindeer Safety Program VIII
rewardItems: 500x Event Token; 10x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Friendship Bag 01
description:
“Ho ho ho! Blitzen! Great to see you! Ho ho ho!”

“Last, but certainly not least, let’s find Donner!”

name: Reindeer Safety Program IX
rewardItems: 500x Event Token; 50x Lemon Cream Pie; 50x Milk and Cookies; 5x Prune Juice; 5x Happy Cookies
description:
“Ho ho ho! We did it. Thank you so much for your help! Ho ho ho!”

“Let me share some of my favorite treats with you!”

name: Reindeer Search Protocol
rewardItems: 1x Christmas Stocking; 5x Frozen Large Net; 200x Event Token
description:
"Rudolph, with your nose so bright, won’t you fill my mailbox tonight?”

Note: In addition to being a fun parody of a line of a great song, this is also a clue to help you find Santa’s other reindeer.

name: Need For Nog I
rewardItems: 200x Event Token; 1x Reindeer Headband; 100x Apple Cider; 100x Arnold Palmer
description: Captain Logan needs some eggnog for his crews. They’re having a big party to celebrate the holidays, and he volunteered to bring some drinks. He has most of the drinks ready for the party, but he could use a hand getting some eggnog. Will you help?

name: Need For Nog II
rewardItems: 500x Event Token; 1x Reindeer Headband; 250x Apple Cider; 250x Arnold Palmer
description: Captain Logan’s crews are loving the eggnog. Will you bring more?

name: Need For Nog III
rewardItems: 1000x Event Token; 1x Reindeer Headband; 500x Apple Cider; 500x Arnold Palmer
description: Captain Logan needs a little more eggnog. The party is winding down, but folks are still draining the eggnog.

name: Art Of Gaming I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Spades
description:
George is working on a painting inspired by different gaming pieces. He’s using his cards, Jill’s dice, Cecil’s miniatures, and an assortment of boards that Lorn has. Do you have anything gaming that George could borrow? Something distinctive would be great!

(Hint: Maverick Chips are in the Frozen Chest 02 which is available in the January Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: Art Of Gaming II
rewardItems: 4x Maverick Chip; 1x Clubs; 1x Event Key; 10x Grape Juice
description:
George loves the chips you brought him. They added a perfect bit of inspiration and contrast for his painting. Now the painting is coming along nicely!

Before trying to integrate the art of the chip into his painting, George decided to create an identical copy of your chip, can you tell the difference between your original chips and George’s creation?

name: Incrementally Collecting Everything I
description: Captain Thomas has a load of orders that he needs help filling. Everyone is so excited about the frozen fish and other frozen items, and they want lots of everything. He’s not sure he can meet the demand without some help. Will you help him fill his orders?

name: Incrementally Collecting Everything II
itemsRequired: 200x Frozen Catfish; 200x Frozen Bones; 200x Frozen Spyfish
description: That’s a good start. Let’s keep it going!

name: Incrementally Collecting Everything III
itemsRequired: 500x Frozen Catfish; 500x Frozen Bones; 500x Frozen Spyfish; 500x Frozen Biter; 200x Frozen Skull
description: Captain Thomas still needs a lot more. Please keep it coming!

name: Incrementally Collecting Everything IV
itemsRequired: 600x Frozen Catfish; 600x Frozen Bones; 600x Frozen Spyfish; 600x Frozen Biter; 200x Frozen Skull; 600x Frozen Boot; 200x Frozen Feather
description: There are still loads of requests waiting. Please keep up the hard work!

name: Incrementally Collecting Everything V
itemsRequired: 2500x Frozen Catfish; 2500x Frozen Bones; 2500x Frozen Biter; 500x Frozen Skull; 2500x Frozen Boot; 500x Frozen Feather; 2500x Frozen Shell; 2500x Frozen Lobster; 500x Frozen Starfish; 2500x Frozen Sheepshead; 2500x Frozen Spyfish; 2500x Frozen Manta Ray; 500x Frozen Book
description: Captain Thomas is very grateful for your help. The two of you might just fill all the requests at this rate.

name: Incrementally Collecting Everything VI
itemsRequired: 3000x Frozen Catfish; 3000x Frozen Bones; 3000x Frozen Biter; 500x Frozen Skull; 3000x Frozen Boot; 500x Frozen Feather; 3000x Frozen Shell; 3000x Frozen Lobster; 500x Frozen Starfish; 3000x Frozen Sheepshead; 3000x Frozen Manta Ray; 500x Frozen Book; 500x Frozen Coin; 3000x Frozen Spyfish
description: You’re doing great! Keep the ice fishing going!

name: Incrementally Collecting Everything VII
itemsRequired: 5000x Frozen Catfish; 5000x Frozen Bones; 5000x Frozen Biter; 500x Frozen Skull; 5000x Frozen Boot; 500x Frozen Feather; 5000x Frozen Shell; 5000x Frozen Lobster; 500x Frozen Starfish; 5000x Frozen Sheepshead; 5000x Frozen Spyfish; 5000x Frozen Manta Ray; 500x Frozen Book; 500x Frozen Coin; 5000x Frozen Squid; 500x Frozen Crab Claw; 5000x Frozen Wheel; 5000x Frozen Angelfish; 5000x Frozen Jelly; 5000x Frozen Dagger
description:
Captain Thomas knew he could count on you!

There are still some big requests left, but he’s positive now that you’ll be able to fill them all.

name: Incrementally Collecting Everything VIII
itemsRequired: 10000x Frozen Catfish; 10000x Frozen Bones; 10000x Frozen Biter; 1000x Frozen Skull; 10000x Frozen Boot; 1000x Frozen Feather; 10000x Frozen Shell; 10000x Frozen Lobster; 1000x Frozen Starfish; 10000x Frozen Sheepshead; 10000x Frozen Manta Ray; 1000x Frozen Book; 1000x Frozen Coin; 10000x Frozen Squid; 1000x Frozen Crab Claw; 10000x Frozen Wheel; 10000x Frozen Angelfish; 10000x Frozen Jelly; 10000x Frozen Dagger; 10000x Frozen Spyfish
description: This is it! Please help Captain Thomas finish the last of the orders.

name: Fitness Friends Fit Forever II
itemsRequired: 600x Steel; 600x Small Screw; 600x Small Bolt; 600x Steel Plate; 600x Pulley; 600x Steel Wire; 600x Small Spring; 600x Broken Pipe; 600x Pear Grease; 600x Iron Ring; 600x Machine Part; 600x Oak
description: In addition to eating better, Gary is looking to improve his overall health by improving his fitness regimen. Will you help him build some fitness machines in his cave?

name: Fitness Friends Fit Forever III
description: Gary appreciates all your help. He’s going to get so fit. You should join him. Here’s a key so you can use his new gym equipment or gather mushrooms from his mushroom cellar anytime you want.

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow X
description:
Lorn was right about your captivity being only a few kilometers from Black Rock Canyon. Unfortunately, the short journey takes a monumental effort in your less than optimal condition. Lorn moves slowly, staggering occasionally, but you continue to follow behind him. You keep a wary eye out for any signs that his condition is worsening. He periodically calls for a halt, but otherwise seems to be enduring the hike. As you approach Black Rock Canyon, you and Lorn both increase your pace step by step.

Pausing for a moment, Lorn looks your way and says, “I think the healicite is starting to make some progress. My head is doing less spinning and my legs feel a little more sturdy.”

The trek continues until eventually the forest gives way and the canyon opens up below you. Before finding a path down into the canyon, Lorn suggests one more break and a bite to eat.

“I saw some bees a little ways back. Will you help me look for their honey? I’ve always found it to be an excellent encourager of healicite.”

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow XI
itemsRequired: 1000x Coal; 1000x Sandstone; 1000x Salt Rock; 1000x Horn; 1000x Shimmer Quartz; 100x Ancient Coin; 25x Giant Centipede; 10x Ruby Scorpion; 1x Runestone 09; 1x Runestone 13; 5x Orange Gecko
rewardItems: 100x Large Chest 01; 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Apple Cider; 1x Spades
description:
Lorn was right about the honey. It worked extremely well with the healicite!

Feeling refreshed, you and Lorn enter Black Rock Canyon.

“Time to explore the canyon. Let’s find Buddy.”

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow XII
itemsRequired: 1000x Coal; 1000x Sandstone; 1000x Salt Rock; 1000x Horn; 1000x Shimmer Quartz; 100x Ancient Coin; 25x Giant Centipede; 10x Ruby Scorpion; 1x Runestone 09; 1x Runestone 13; 5x Orange Gecko
rewardItems: 100x Large Chest 01; 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Apple Cider; 1x Spades
description: “No sign of him yet. All we can do is keep looking.”

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow XIII
itemsRequired: 1000x Coal; 1000x Sandstone; 1000x Salt Rock; 1000x Horn; 1000x Shimmer Quartz; 100x Ancient Coin; 25x Giant Centipede; 10x Ruby Scorpion; 1x Runestone 09; 1x Runestone 13; 5x Orange Gecko
rewardItems: 100x Large Chest 01; 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Apple Cider; 1x Spades
description: “I found some purple flowers with their petals missing. That could be a sign of Buddy. Let’s keep going this way.”

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow XIV
itemsRequired: 1000x Coal; 1000x Sandstone; 1000x Salt Rock; 1000x Horn; 1000x Shimmer Quartz; 100x Ancient Coin; 25x Giant Centipede; 10x Ruby Scorpion; 1x Runestone 09; 1x Runestone 13; 5x Orange Gecko
rewardItems: 100x Large Chest 01; 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Apple Cider; 1x Spades
description: “There are some Buddy-sized boot prints and a rather worn bandana over here. I think we’ve found his trail.”

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow XV
description:
The trail ends near a break in the dark canyon wall. The seam is wide enough for a person to carefully maneuver through and it leads right down to the river.

“We don’t have much daylight left. Let’s squeeze through here as quickly as we can and check the river. Then, we’ll come back here and make camp for the night. With any luck, Buddy is close by and will find us.”

A few meters from exiting the seam, a face appears around the edge.

“Hi friends!” Buddy calls.

“For the love of Rys, why would you do that, Buddy?! You nearly startled the life right out of me!” Lorn exclaims.

“Friends love to be surprised! I am so happy to see you both, but what are you doing out here?”

After you and Lorn exit the break in the canyon wall, Lorn tells Buddy that the two of you came to find him.

“We thought you might be in trouble, Buddy. You shouldn’t go off by yourself and get mixed up with folks like the Wodutrown brothers, without letting someone know where you’re going.”

“I know, Lorn. I’m sorry I worried you…”

“We nearly got ourselves killed trying to find you! You have to think about consequences!” Lorn’s raised voice echoes back through the seam.

Buddy makes no reply. Instead, he steps between you and Lorn and continues on to make his way back into the canyon. You and Lorn hurry to follow him.

Once he’s back in the canyon, Buddy stoops down and retrieves a satchel, cleverly hidden in the base of the wall of the canyon. He quickly flips open the bag and pulls out a wide strip of leather and tosses it at Lorn. Lorn catches the strip and begins to examine it. You move closer to get a better look.

The leather strip is about the size of a sheet of parchment. One side of the strip is covered in symbols that look like they were burned into the leather. You don’t recognize any of the symbols, but one of them resembles Buddy, if he were younger and had a wild mane of hair.

Lorn clears his throat and then asks, “Did you get this from the Wodutrown brothers?”

Buddy doesn’t reply, but nods his head.

Lorn continues, “I’m sorry. I was really worried about you after we got attacked.”

You all remain quiet for a time as the sunlight ebbs away. Lorn is the first to break the silence.

“Let’s make camp for the night and have something to eat.”

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow XVI
description:
“Have you made any progress deciphering it?” Lorn asks Buddy as the three of you finish your food.

“I have. I’ve studied this style of characters for many years now. Now, I can read simple phrases and passages quickly.”

“Did you discover any clues to finding your people?”

Buddy’s normal cheery demeanor deflates before he responds to Lorn. “It’s basically worthless. It’s a listing of notes for a cleric about a ritual to reveal a rare flower. It’s a cheat sheet! They used it for spice, Lorn. I’m no closer than I ever have been…”

Buddy pauses, clearly struggling with frustration, before continuing.

“After I swiped this leather scroll from the Wodutrown brothers, I read it as soon as I got clear of their cabin. The scroll wasn’t helpful, but the Wodutrowns said they found it here. So I hoped there might be something else. I was right. There was. I found a small gem down by the river. It must’ve been wrapped in the leather and those oafs dropped it. You can see its impression on the scroll, where it should be placed on a small statue as part of the ritual. But the gem is worthless to my search…”

“Buddy!” Lorn interjects. “Let’s take it to Borgen! This might be a mineral he has seen in his travels.”

“I’ve asked Borgen before if he’s ever seen my people and he hasn’t.”

“Right, but this mineral might be from somewhere near where your people are. We might get a general area to continue the search…”

As Buddy realizes a new pathway has opened, his bubbly personality returns.

“Yes, Lorn, yes! That’s it! Let’s goooo!”

name: Archeology Requires Knowhow XVII
description:
Borgen immediately recognizes the gem’s mineral composition and matches Buddy’s growing excitement.

“It’s arihob mana! I’m sure of it Buddy! And there’s only one mine that produces it!”

“Is it out west? It has to be!”

“It is, Buddy. It is! We’re going to find where you came from!”

With a smile on his face, but seeking to keep expectations under control, Lorn breaks into the excitement.

“We have a starting point now, Buddy. It’s exciting, but we must keep in mind that there may still be more steps on the path.”

“I know. I know! It’s just so exciting! I haven’t ever had a solid lead like this. I’m going to find them! You all have to come with me! It’s going to be so fun and like you said Lorn I shouldn’t go alone and we’ll all find my family and they’ll invite us in and we’ll have a feast and they’ll want to hear all about me and my adventures and then they’ll want to come visit Redbrook and…”

“Buddy. It’s going to be great, but we have to prepare, for the trip and in case things don’t work out immediately. I think Borgen will tell you that there is a dangerous journey ahead.”

“Aye. It’s true, Buddy. We will have to prepare for this journey. It’s a beastly one. I don’t take it very often, and never alone.”

As you all look on, Buddy slowly suppresses his rolling boil of excitement, lets out a whoop, and then finally returns to his usual self.

“Ok. Yes. I can do this. Lorn, hold onto the gem and the leather scroll for me. I can’t have them around me right now or I’ll lose control and take flight like an eagle and head west. I may do it still. No. I can do this. Let’s prepare.”

Lorn takes the scroll and gem and puts the scroll in his pocket. He holds the gem up and says to Buddy, “Perhaps {player} should keep the gem for now. It’ll be one more layer of protection to keep you from temptation.”

“Yes! That’s perfect! You’ll hold it for me, won’t you, {player}?”

name: Look, A Secret Temple
itemsRequired: 1x Cursed Effigy Hair; 1x Cursed Effigy Head; 1x Cursed Effigy Body; 1x Cursed Effigy Gem
description:
With Buddy’s blessing, Lorn got approval to try to follow the ritual notes on the leather scroll.

Will you help Lorn find the other pieces to put together the statue from the notes? They could be anywhere, but if anyone can find them, you can.

name: Heart Of The Matter I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Spades
description:
Beatrix loves the little heart candies that seem to appear every year at this time. She’s not entirely sure why. Their texture and taste are not particularly notable. The colors are fun and the messages too, but is that enough to make a candy enjoyable?

This is going to require some experimentation. Will you bring Beatrix some heart candies to test?

(Hint: Heart Candies are in Heart-Shaped Box 03 which is available in the February Starter pack or by completing 25 days of chores)

name: Heart Of The Matter II
rewardItems: 10x Grape Juice; 1x Event Key; 1x Clubs; 1x Buddy Doll
description:
It’s not the candy, at least not by itself. During her testing, Beatrix realized that she always has a cup of tea while she enjoys the heart candies. It must be the combination of warm tea and the heartwarming candies that makes the whole experience enjoyable.

Speaking of tea, would you bring Beatrix some tea leaves? She appears to be all out after her experiments.

name: Heart Items Inventory Incrementally Increased I
description: Borgen would like to cash in on this celebration of love. Will you help him build a stout inventory of heart items?

name: Heart Items Inventory Incrementally Increased II
rewardItems: 8x Borgen Buck; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Friendship Bag 01
description: That’s a great start! But Borgen needs more heart items!

name: Heart Items Inventory Incrementally Increased III
rewardItems: 8x Borgen Buck; 10x Maverick Chip; 2x Clubs; 2x Spades; 2x Diamonds
description: Borgen’s inventory of heart items is looking pretty good, but he still wants more. Will you keep the hearts coming?

name: Heart Items Inventory Incrementally Increased IV
rewardItems: 10x Borgen Buck; 100x Fruit Punch; 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Friendship Bag 01
description: Borgen thinks two more loads should completely stock his inventory. Can you keep it going?

name: Heart Items Inventory Incrementally Increased V
description: You are amazing! If you bring Borgen one more load, his inventory will be full just in time for the celebration and his sale. To show his appreciation, he has a special reward for you, upon delivery of the last items, of course.

name: Humming Along Helps I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Clubs
description:
Buddy saw some beautiful hummingbirds flying around a stand of bushes near his cave. The hummingbirds seemed to be drawn to the bushes by an explosion of blossoms. There were all sorts of bugs too. Buddy saw bees and butterflies and moths sharing the flowers with the hummingbirds. It was wonderful!

Now, Buddy wants to see if he can recreate that kind of scene inside his cave. He tried digging up one of the bushes and bringing it inside, but the bush didn’t survive long and none of the hummingbirds came to visit. Will you help Buddy try to find a way to make his home more inviting to hummingbirds?

(Hint: The Hummingbird Feeder is in the Spring Basket 02 which is available in the March Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: Humming Along Helps II
rewardItems: 1x Hummingbird Feeder; 1x Event Key; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Maverick Chip
description:
Buddy appreciates your help, but the feeder didn’t quite work. He filled it with red cranberry juice, but no hummingbirds came. Even when Buddy accidentally spilled the cranberry juice everywhere, still no hummingbirds came to visit. Perhaps it’s best if Buddy just enjoys the hummingbirds outside of his cave.

Buddy would like you to have your hummingbird feeder back. He could also use a hand cleaning up the mess he made, if you don’t mind.

name: Business Is Blooming I
itemsRequired: 100x Purple Flower; 25x Orange Flowers; 25x Yellow Flowers
rewardItems: 25x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 1x Happy Cookies; 10x Spring Seeds; 1x Pie; 10x Onion Soup
description:
Vincent would like to run a fundraiser for the school, and he thinks he has a perfect idea. He’s going to sell fresh spring flowers!

Will you be Vincent’s flower supplier? He can’t give you much in the way of silver, but he will compensate you for your contributions with valuable trades.

name: Business Is Blooming II
itemsRequired: 100x Purple Flower; 50x Orange Flowers; 50x Yellow Flowers; 50x Blue Flowers
rewardItems: 15x Spring Seeds; 1x Pie; 10x Neigh; 150x Orange Juice
description: That’s a good start, but Vincent already needs more flowers and more variety. Will you keep the flowers coming?

name: Business Is Blooming III
itemsRequired: 200x Purple Flower; 120x Orange Flowers; 120x Yellow Flowers; 120x Blue Flowers; 120x White Flowers; 120x Red Flowers
rewardItems: 25x Spring Seeds; 1x Pie; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Prune Juice; 25x Mushroom Stew; 1x Cranberry Juice
description: Vincent isn’t sure what happened, but most of the flowers have gone missing. He’s going to need a larger load of flowers to catch up his supply for the fundraiser. Will you bring him more flowers?

name: Business Is Blooming IV
itemsRequired: 500x Purple Flower; 500x Orange Flowers; 500x Yellow Flowers; 500x Blue Flowers; 500x White Flowers; 500x Red Flowers; 500x Twine; 500x Essence of Slime; 25x Honeysuckle
rewardItems: 100x Spring Seeds; 1x Pie; 1x Spooky Cookies; 5x Maverick Chip; 1x Apple Pie; 50x Breakfast Boost
description: More flowers have gone missing, but Vincent found a clue. He thinks he may know who is stealing from the fundraiser. If you’ll bring another load of flowers and a few things for a trap, Vincent should be able to catch a few of the troublemakers.

name: Business Is Blooming V
itemsRequired: 600x Purple Flower; 600x Orange Flowers; 600x Yellow Flowers; 600x Blue Flowers; 600x White Flowers; 600x Red Flowers; 600x Essence of Slime; 600x Mushroom Paste; 600x Magicite; 100x Honey; 100x Herbs; 100x Seaweed; 100x 4-leaf Clover
rewardItems: 100x Spring Seeds; 1x Pie; 1x Protein Bar; 250x Apple Cider; 50x Fruit Punch; 200x Peach; 50x Hickory Omelette
description:
Vincent was right! It was a whole group of faeries stealing the flowers. He managed to catch one of them, but all the others got away. Unfortunately, they made off with several bundles of flowers too. Even more unfortunate, the faerie Vincent caught got hurt trying to escape.

Vincent hates to keep asking for more and more, but he really needs some help. He still needs more flowers for the fundraiser, and now he needs supplies to ward off the faeries and supplies to care for the injured faerie. This has turned into a bit of a mess, but with your help everything will work out just fine.

name: Business Is Blooming VI
itemsRequired: 1500x Purple Flower; 1500x Orange Flowers; 1500x Yellow Flowers; 1500x Blue Flowers; 1500x White Flowers; 1500x Red Flowers; 1500x Bouquet of Flowers
rewardItems: 200x Spring Seeds; 1x Pie; 3000x Antler; 1x Borgen Buck; 3000x Leather; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds; 50x Cabbage Stew; 1x Mini Time Egg
description:
The injured faerie seems to be ok now. It flew away this morning, rather angrily actually. Vincent suspects it didn’t enjoy being near the wards around the flowers. The other faeries seem to have given up on stealing the flowers for the fundraiser now too. Hopefully, they won’t return anytime soon.

The fundraiser is off to a good start. Please keep the flowers coming, and some bouquets too.

name: Business Is Blooming VII
itemsRequired: 2500x Purple Flower; 2500x Orange Flowers; 2500x Yellow Flowers; 2500x Blue Flowers; 2500x White Flowers; 2500x Red Flowers; 2500x Bouquet of Flowers; 50x Potted Flower
rewardItems: 200x Spring Seeds; 1x Pie; 4000x Antler; 5x Borgen Buck; 10x Bag of Spring Seeds; 250x Black Truffle; 1000x White Truffle; 100x Large Chest 01
description: Everything is going great! Please keep the flowers and bouquets coming, and it would be great to get some potted flowers too, if you can manage it.

name: Business Is Blooming VIII
itemsRequired: 5000x Purple Flower; 5000x Orange Flowers; 5000x Yellow Flowers; 5000x Blue Flowers; 5000x White Flowers; 5000x Red Flowers; 5000x Bouquet of Flowers; 100x Potted Flower
rewardItems: 500x Spring Seeds; 1x Pie; 6000x Antler; 10x Borgen Buck; 20x Bag of Spring Seeds; 2x Friendship Bag 01; 1x Pumpkin Juice
description: More of everything, please. This fundraiser is going really well. It just might fund the school for a whole year.

name: Business Is Blooming IX
itemsRequired: 7500x Purple Flower; 7500x Orange Flowers; 7500x Yellow Flowers; 7500x Blue Flowers; 7500x White Flowers; 7500x Red Flowers; 7500x Bouquet of Flowers; 100x Potted Flower; 200x Honeysuckle
rewardItems: 500x Spring Seeds; 1x Pie; 10x Borgen Buck; 50x Bag of Spring Seeds; 2x Prune Juice; 100x Orange Gecko; 100x Lima Bean; 100x Gold Leaf; 100x Dragon Skull; 100x Over The Moon; 100x Lemon Cream Pie; 1000x Small Screw; 1000x Acorn Butter; 2000x Apple Cider; 1000x Caterpillar; 1000x Spider
description: One more load should do it and all of the fundraiser orders will be filled. Vincent appreciates all of your help. Despite the issue with the faeries, this was a perfect way to help the school.

name: Monster Hunter I
itemsRequired: 5000x Monster Skull; 5000x Large Net; 5000x Sea Dragon; 5000x Pitchfork; 5000x Eggs; 5000x Twine; 5000x Corn; 5000x Pulley; 5000x Rope; 5000x Wooden Box; 5000x Board; 2500x Small Spring; 1x Peafowl Feather; 5000x Barbed Wire
rewardItems: 2x Buddy Doll; 1200x Small Screw; 10x White Truffle
description: A rumor has been circulating around town of a monster eating livestock.  Geist would like you to set some traps to see if you can catch the monster or tag it for tracking.

name: Monster Hunter II
itemsRequired: 5000x Green Dye; 5000x Large Net; 5000x Red Dye; 5000x Slimestone; 5000x Blue Dye; 5000x Monster Skull; 5000x Pulley; 1x Peafowl Feather; 5000x Barbed Wire
description: Geist points to tracks the monster left behind after hearing a trap go off in the middle of the night.  A long skid mark and talons mark the path but disappear in the foliage near Cane Pole Ridge.  Geist seems very disturbed by the trail left behind and asks you to prepare some new traps to help track the monster’s movement.

name: Monster Hunter III
itemsRequired: 5000x Orange Juice; 5000x Green Cloak; 2x Coconut; 5000x Black Powder; 5000x Mystic Ring; 1500x Sunflower Oil; 1250x Gold Feed
rewardItems: 20x Void Bag 01; 1x Piece of Heart; 5000x Corn; 500x Wine
description: Geist woke you up in a hurry.  This chicken wasn’t eaten but it was turned to stone!  There are scales on the ground near the chicken and a sprung trap indicate the monster was nearby but escaped.  Some green blood near the trap trails back into the woods.  Geist takes to the sky and suggests you give chase on the ground.

name: Monster Hunter IV
itemsRequired: 5000x Wooden Sword; 150x Cutlass; 5000x Scissors; 5000x Sturdy Sword; 5000x Red Shield; 5000x Sturdy Shield; 5000x Wooden Bow; 5000x Spiked Shell; 5000x Axe; 5000x Looking Glass; 5000x Barbed Wire; 5000x Green Shield
rewardItems: 5x Borgen Buck; 10x Over The Moon; 5x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Buddy Doll
description: The trail continues deep into a part of the woods you rarely venture.  The sun is intermittently blotted out by Geist patrolling the skies.  The stale air feels unwelcoming, and there is less wildlife here than you expected.  Geist lands in a small outcropping ahead and her unease at the area is discomfiting.  She reports that the foliage is too dense to pass without causing too much damage to the area and requests you explore deeper into the forest while she patrols overhead.

name: Monster Hunter V
itemsRequired: 5000x Broccoli; 2x Bananas; 100x Lima Bean; 5000x Cabbage; 5000x Gold Peppers; 5000x 4-leaf Clover; 5000x Watermelon; 4x Piece of Heart; 1x Heart Container; 5000x Barbed Wire; 2500x Corn Husk Doll
rewardItems: 10x Borgen Bag 01; 25x Bag of Spring Seeds; 250x Grab Bag 06; 250x Small Chest 02; 250x Small Chest 01; 2000x Unpolished Jade; 1000x Apple Cider
description: As you search deeper into the forest, you find a stone statue of a squishsquatch half destroyed.  Some distance ahead, several snakes lie dead or petrified, and a clutch of eggs has been utterly devastated.   The air grows more still as you hear an unnatural sound ahead.  The piercing screech chills you to your bones and you are unable to move.  The foliage rustles ahead and just as a shape comes into view, Geist comes crashing down from above, her roar shaking the very ground around you.  Feathers and scales intermingle in an outburst and just as suddenly, it seems the fight is over.

name: Monster Hunter VI
description: Moments later, you’ve never seen Geist look so burdened with regret. The weight of millenia of evolutionary instinct and rivalry press down on her, and all she can do is plead with the universe that she doesn’t know why she lashed out so ferociously. In the silence, a single egg, revealed from underneath camouflage during Geist’s struggle with the cockatrice sits innocently. Looking at the egg, she pushes through her remorse to ask you to take it and save it. She won’t give in to the enmity she’s been given anymore.

name: Bringing Egg-sy Back I
description: Baba Gec has a special trade for you. He thinks it will be very helpful for your egg hunt.

name: Shadow of Spring I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Hearts
description: “If you happen to find an ominous-looking magical staff lying around anywhere, please bring it to me. I made a wish during Spring Balance Day and then I saw an ominous-looking magical staff streak across the sky. I’m hopeful that it was a swamp gas induced trick of the light, but I’m deeply concerned it might have actually been a very dangerous magical artifact. So, no pressure, but please help…if anyone can find it, it’s you.”

name: Shadow of Spring II
rewardItems: 1x Event Key; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Nirumdivar; 1x Bag of Spring Seeds
description:
“Take it back! Take it back! It’s too dangerous!”

“I was researching a way to unlock the staff’s powers, but then I thought, ‘What if that’s exactly what the Shadow wants me to do?!?’ But then I wondered if that’s exactly what the Shadow wanted me to think, so I wouldn’t unlock the staff’s power. I lost three days considering both possibilities, but I can find no safe conclusion.”

“Is this the curse on the staff? Is this what happened to Coa or Miat or Galino? Did they find this staff and go mad with these mind games? Miat had so much potential and then turned himself to stone.”

“Who created this staff? How and why is it cursed? The legends claim that someone aided the Shadow in finding and destroying the Guardians. Was it the staff’s creator? Or was the staff a reward for the betrayal? Agh. My brain! It’s starting to decipher the runes…Take the staff away! You have to find someplace safe to hide it! And don’t ever let anyone near it, especially me!”

“I need some feathers, please. I have to go far from here for a while.”

name: Bringing Egg-sy Back II
description: Beatrix has a special trade for you. She thinks it will be very helpful for your egg hunt.

description: Mariya has an extra special trade for you today. Don’t worry it won’t be a tough one. If you’ll bring Mariya some eggs, just regular, plain eggs, Mariya has a special surprise for you.

rewardItems: 3x Egg Basket; 10x Void Bag 01; 2x Egg of Chaos
