description: Vincent has a special trade for you. He thinks it will be very helpful for your egg hunt.

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes I
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “have you seen these fuzzy chicks lying around everywhere? i’m cute and fuzzy, but these things make me lose my mind, they’re so fuzzy. you know that feeling where your brain won’t work right because something is too adorable? yeah. that’s the one I’m having. i must have them all, and you must help me!”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes II
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 200x Spring Seeds; 1x Buddy Doll; 10x Egg Basket
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “oh please oh please oh please oh please! find me more!”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes III
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 200x Spring Seeds; 10x Magical Egg Basket; 1x Pumpkin Juice
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “they’re so soft and fluffy! more, please.”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes IV
rewardItems: 10x Magical Egg Basket; 25x Void Bag 01; 1x Friendship Bag 01
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “they’re so soft and fluffy! more, please.”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes V
rewardItems: 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Spooky Cookies; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “i almost can’t stand it…more!!”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes VI
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “you know what i need. more!!”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes VII
rewardItems: 1x Baba Cola; 1x Apple Turnover; 1x Bananas; 5x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Clubs; 1x Coconut; 1x Congratulations Card; 1x Clawed Card; 5x Cutlass; 1x Diamonds; 100x Dragon Skull; 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Egg of Chicken
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “i need another little green one. you know i love green. just do it. you know you love them too!!”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes VIII
rewardItems: 25x White Truffle; 1x Hearts; 1x Spades; 10x Fruit Punch
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “ok. fine. i need another little yellow one too.”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes IX
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “one more pinky too, please.”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes X
rewardItems: 2x Egg of Chicken; 2x Prune Juice; 1x Protein Bar; 100x Raptor Claw; 2x Raptor Egg; 200x Arnold Palmer
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “seriously this time, just a couple more green chicks…i promise!”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes XI
rewardItems: 1x Egg of Chicken; 25x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Maverick Chip; 1x Spooky Pie
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “who am i kidding? i have to get more!”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes XII
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “you are the absolute best! if you bring me one more fuzzy chick, i will give you the most jaw-dropping, incredible fuzzy you’re likely to ever encounter, besides me of course.”

name: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes XIII
questline: A Difficult Option Requires Bravery Sometimes
description: “to show my thanks, please accept a small token of my undying gratitude for your service to the greater cause of cute fuzzy things. you could also show your appreciation with a few carrots thrown my way. you know, for the cause!”

name: Calm, Cool, Collected I
itemsRequired: 1x Egg 01; 1x Egg 02; 1x Egg 03; 1x Egg 04; 1x Egg 05; 1x Egg 06; 1x Egg 07; 1x Egg 08; 1x Egg 09; 1x Egg 10; 1x Egg 11; 1x Egg 12; 1x Egg of Ages; 1x Egg of Water; 1x Egg of Air; 1x Egg of Chaos; 1x Egg of Earth; 1x Egg of Fire; 1x Egg of Life; 1x Egg of Light; 1x Egg of Shadow; 1x Egg of Space
rewardItems: 100x Spring Seeds; 50x Arnold Palmer; 50x Large Net; 1x Spooky Pie; 1x Prune Juice
description: Buddy would like to collect all of the special eggs that everyone is finding, but he’s feeling very tired. Will you just collect them all for him, please?

name: Calm, Cool, Collected II
itemsRequired: 1x Fuzzy Egg; 1x Eggs; 1x Bird Egg; 1x Eggplant
rewardItems: 1x Fuzzy Chick 01; 1x Fuzzy Chick 02; 1x Fuzzy Chick 03; 1x Fuzzy Chick 04; 1x Fuzzy Chick 05; 1x Fuzzy Chick 06; 1x Fuzzy Chick 07; 1x Fuzzy Chick 08; 1x Fuzzy Chick 09; 1x Fuzzy Chick 10; 1x Fuzzy Chick 11; 1x Fuzzy Chick 12; 1x Buddystone
description: Buddy thinks his collection is missing some other important eggs. Will you find them, please? Buddy is just too tired.

name: Calm, Cool, Collected III
description:
Buddy would like to prominently display his egg collection. Will you build him two shelves to put the eggs on?

For all your troubles, Buddy would like to give you one of his most prized possessions.

name: Air of Celebration I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Clubs
description:
“Are you ready for the annual Founding Jubilee and the Red Diamond Run? This month is so busy with celebrations and fun things to do. You have to prepare yourself!”

“I’d like to get one of those little party horns to take to all the events. You know the ones that make a sort of honk and buzzing noise? They also have a coil of paper that unrolls and pops out when you blow the horn. Do you have one, and could I try it before I fully commit to being the old man blowing a horn at parties? As ever, I truly appreciate your assistance.”

name: Air of Celebration II
rewardItems: 1x Event Key; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Party Horn; 1x Egg of Chicken
description:
“Well, I think that’s a lot of fun. I’m going to take it with me, but I will use it sparingly. I promise.”

“Also, I realized this isn’t a good try it and return it type of item. So, I got you a replacement.”

“One more thing, if you have a moment. Will you bring me some eggs? I’m trying to make some food for all the celebrations, but I’m all out of eggs. I’ll even trade you for a special egg I found.”

name: Red Diamond High Card
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Net; 50x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds; 2x Sea Pincher Special; 5x Piñata Whop Stick; 1x 4th Birthday Card; 5x Grape Juice
description: Mariya would like to try some red diamond fish in a few recipes to see how they compare in flavor with other fish. Will you catch some red diamond fish for her?

name: Red Diamond Pair I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Net; 50x Orange Juice; 5x Piñata Whop Stick; 1x 4th Birthday Card; 5x Cat's Meow
description:
Cecil is looking to trade for some red diamond fish. He plans to serve it at a small dinner meeting next week. Unfortunately, this seemingly simple task has become quite complicated.

The chef Cecil hired to prepare the meal would like to use smoked red diamond fish to make the meal a little more fancy, but Cecil’s chef does not know how to smoke fish, nor is there enough time to figure it out. So, in order to get smoked red diamond fish, Cecil needs Holger’s help.

Holger said he would gladly smoke the fish for Cecil, but he is unwilling to catch the fish as well. He also demanded twice as much fish so that he could keep half for himself.

All of this has led Cecil to now have to seek out a fourth party to involve in this transaction. Will you catch two loads of red diamond fish, one for Cecil’s dinner meeting and one for Holger?

name: Red Diamond Pair II
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Net; 50x Orange Juice; 5x Piñata Whop Stick; 1x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Apple Turnover
description: Cecil is ready for Holger’s load of fish now, and he appreciates your assistance.

name: Fun in the Sun I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Hearts
description:
Buddy is going to the beach. It is going to be awesome. He’s going to have a whole long day of sand, water, sun, and fun.

He didn’t forget his towels. He didn’t forget his sandals. He didn’t forget his goggles or his snorkel. He didn’t forget his book to read, or his shovel and castle building tools. He didn’t forget snacks, drinks, lunch, or dinner. He didn’t forget extra towels or his sunbrella. He didn’t forget his wagon to haul everything. He didn’t forget shark and squisquatch repellent. He didn’t forget his bucket.

Unfortunately, he did forget his sunglasses and some sunscreen. Will you help Buddy out with some loaner sunglasses and a bottle of sunscreen?

(Hint: The items requested are in Buddy's Beach Bag which is available in the June Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: Fun in the Sun II
rewardItems: 1x Sunscreen; 1x Sun Shades; 1x Prune Juice; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Event Key
description:
Buddy had a great time at the beach! Unfortunately, he forgot to put on sunscreen. He’s in a lot of pain, but he wanted to return your sunglasses and your sunscreen. He really appreciates your kindness. Now, he needs to go home and rest.

Before Buddy leaves, would you be able to spare some watermelon? Buddy could really use something cool and refreshing, even if it’s just in his belly.

name: Bug Exporter Enterprise I
rewardItems: 10x Large Net; 10x Arnold Palmer; 100x Orange Juice; 5x Onion Soup; 5x Sea Pincher Special; 1x Thank You Card
description: Ragvin has a customer on Nonir Island that is interested in receiving a supply of unique bugs that aren’t native to the shores of Nonir. His customer would like to offer these imported bugs to all of the members of her bug collecting organization. Would you be willing to enter into an agreement to supply the bugs for Ragvin’s order? Ragvin and his crew will handle preserving and storing the bugs for shipment.

name: Lorn's Awakening I
description:
Lorn had an amazing dream last night! He dreamt of an island with a giant egg at the top of a great mountain. On this island, Lorn was an owl and could fly and speak to the other animals.

Lorn is trying very hard to recall the dream fully. Can you help him remember each part? He thinks if you bring him a Yoshi Buddy Doll he can remember what happened next.

Lorn promises to give you back the special items you bring him once he remembers the entire dream and also promises to make it worth your efforts. He feels like there was something very special at the end of his dream!

name: Lorn's Awakening II
description:
Lorn takes and holds the Yoshi Buddy Doll, squints his eyes, and remembers the next part of his dream.

He was flying across the island and passed over a small village where he heard a baby lizard crying. Lorn swooped down and landed gently beside the upset baby. Then, Lorn gave the shrieking child a Yoshi Buddy Doll. The baby lizard stopped crying!

Surprised by the sudden silence, the baby lizard's mother came out of a nearby house to check on her child. The baby’s mother immediately recognized Lorn as the generous gift giver and offered Lorn a beautiful Pink Ribbon in appreciation.

Will you bring Lorn a Pink Ribbon to help him remember even more of his dream?

name: Lorn's Awakening III
description:
You give Lorn the Pink Ribbon you found. He takes it and ponders for a moment. Lorn recalls that after he received the Pink Ribbon he flew to the east and saw a cat waving at him. After landing on a tree branch just above the friendly feline, the cat asked Lorn for the Pink Ribbon. She felt like it would be a nice accessory to enhance her already peak cuteness. Realizing pink was not really his color, Lorn gave the beautiful ribbon to the cat.

In exchange, the cat generously rewarded Lorn with one of her special meals. Will you bring Lorn this meal? It's nearly lunch time anyways…

name: Lorn's Awakening IV
description:
You give Lorn a Cat's Meow and before you can take a breath he has already eaten it. He was really hungry! Lorn makes eye contact with you and looks a bit crazy, but then begins to tell you the next part of his dream.

He remembers after he had the Cat's Meow on the island, he felt really sleepy and decided to take a nap. He was laying out by the beach near a banana tree. Suddenly, a bunch of bananas fell down and hit him on the head!

Will you bring Lorn some bananas? There is no guarantee he won't eat them though...

name: Lorn's Awakening V
description:
Lorn takes the bananas and begins to peel one of them.

In his dream, he started to fly to the north and saw a great castle surrounded by a moat, but the bridge to get over the moat was destroyed.

Near the bridge, Lorn saw a monkey, so he flew down to the monkey and offered the monkey a banana. The monkey was so excited and thankful that he called his friends over and they began to repair the bridge!

The bridge was nearly complete, but the monkeys needed a bit more wood to finish it.

Will you bring Lorn some wood to help him remember what happened next?

name: Lorn's Awakening VI
rewardItems: 500x Large Net; 50x Fruit Punch; 25x Void Bag 01; 100x Bacon; 1x Spades; 1x Clawed Card
description:
After you cart all of the wood to Lorn, he stacks it into a pile next to his house. All of this just to remember a dream? Anyways... Then, Lorn begins to tell you the next part of the dream.

The monkeys finished repairing the bridge to the castle, but Lorn realized he could have just flown across the moat. Oh well!

Lorn crossed the bridge and encountered a group of bears living inside the castle. After greeting Lorn, the bears asked if he had any Honeycomb. They were always looking for delicious Honeycomb.

Will you bring Lorn some Honeycomb for the bears?

name: Lorn's Awakening VII
rewardItems: 100x Gold Carrot Seeds; 2x Carved Rabbit; 1x Bunny Buddy Doll
description:
In his dream, Lorn gave the bears the Honeycomb that they asked for and they dug into the sticky, amber colored treat immediately! After that, Lorn left the castle and flew back to the west. Along the way he decided to take another break (flying is hard!) and landed near a small village.

In a clearing near the village, two young rabbits were throwing a carrot back and forth. During their game of catch they were debating whether or not pineapple on pizza is good or not. One of them said they had never tried pineapple on pizza before.

Can you bring Lorn some Pineapple and a slice of Pizza?

name: Bug Exporter Enterprise II
rewardItems: 10x Large Net; 10x Arnold Palmer; 100x Orange Juice; 5x Sea Pincher Special; 5x Cat's Meow; 25x Bait Bag 01
description: Keep them coming! Ragvin needs a lot more cicadas for this order!

name: Lorn's Awakening VIII
description:
Lorn takes the Pineapple and Pizza Slice and pulls out a knife, slices up the Pineapple into chunks and sprinkles them all over the pizza. He then scarfs it down without even offering you a bite.

Now, he remembers in his dream that the two rabbits tried the pizza with and without pineapple and still couldn't agree on whether or not pineapple should be on pizza. After that, he traveled to the shores of the strange island and stumbled across a beautiful Purple Flower.

Can you bring Lorn some Purple Flowers?

name: Lorn's Awakening IX
rewardItems: 5x Bug Bag 01; 1x Carved Owl; 1x Egg of Chicken
description:
Lorn takes the purple flowers from you and places them in front of his house in batches that look really nice in his flower beds. After a few hours of landscaping, he remembers he was supposed to continue telling you about his dream.

In his dream, after finding the purple flowers by the beach, he noticed something shiny out in the water. He waded out carefully past the shore into the ocean and found a bottle with a message inside.

Can you bring Lorn a MIAB?

name: Lorn's Awakening X
itemsRequired: 1x Broom; 50x Milk; 100x Eggs; 100x Onion; 5x Cheese; 25x Mayonnaise; 100x Radish; 100x Salt
description:
In his dream, the note in the bottle was written in a strange language Lorn could not understand. He decided to carry it to an old turtle living in a nearby village. The turtle stared at the note and then said it was a shopping list?!

Will you bring the items on the list?

name: Crush of Waves I
rewardItems: 50x Fishing Net; 25x Lemonade; 3x Onion Soup; 1x Beach Umbrella
description:
Rosalie found a young clownfish while she was at the beach. The clownfish was panicked and frightened and sad because he couldn’t find his father. While she attempted to console him, Rosalie also noticed that the little clownfish sounds like he might be a long way from home. If she can, Rosalie would like to help this little guy find his father and make it back to his home.

Will you help Rosalie find some crabs and jellyfish? They aren’t the most reliable sources of information, but they often see things other residents of the sea miss. If nothing else, they’re a good place to start asking questions.

name: Crush of Waves II
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 20x Large Net; 50x Orange Juice; 10x Grab Bag 07; 5x Grape Juice; 1x Beach Umbrella
description:
The crabs were very resistant to sharing information. Rosalie thought about threatening them, but thankfully the jellyfish were more helpful. One of the jellyfish told Rosalie that they almost ate an adult clownfish recently, but the clownfish was rescued at the last moment by some sea turtles. So now, Rosalie needs to find some sea turtles.

If you’ll help Rosalie find sea turtles, she can talk to them and get more clues about where the young clownfish might be from. Sea turtles are great sources of information about the ocean. They travel all over and they live a very long time. They’re also just really friendly. If anyone knows where this clownfish came from, it’ll be the sea turtles.

name: Lorn's Awakening XI
description:
After bringing Lorn all of the items on his shopping list, he begins to stock his ice box and pantry. You give him a questioning look, but he begins to tell you about his dream again.

In his dream, Lorn left behind the old turtle and traveled to the north again, towards a body of water known as Lake Liahy. When he reached the lake, Lorn landed on a branch hanging out over the water. Suddenly a largemouth bass jumped out of the water and spit a fishing hook at Lorn!

Will you bring Lorn a fishing hook?

name: Lorn's Awakening XII
description:
Lorn takes the fishing hook from you and begins to tie it to a line on a fishing pole. He appears to be getting ready to go fishing somewhere. As he is tying an improved clinch knot, he shares what happened next in his dream.

After the shock of having a fishing hook spit at him, Lorn grabbed the hook and carefully stowed it away. At that point, he was ready to go back to his nest for the day, but before he could make his way, he saw a mermaid sitting upon a rock waving at him.

Lorn flew over and landed next to the mermaid. Her name was Martha and she explained that she lost her most special necklace. She wondered if Lorn could fly around and see if he could find it. Martha offered Lorn one of her scales in return.

Will you find a Mermaid's Necklace and bring it to Lorn?

name: Lorn's Awakening XIII
rewardItems: 1x Mermaid's Scale; 1x Dino Buddy Doll; 1x Pink Ribbon; 1x Fishing Hook; 1x Mermaid's Necklace; 5x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Honeycomb; 8x Pizza Slice
description:
After much effort, you manage to find and deliver a Mermaid's Necklace to Lorn. He takes it from you and stares at it in surprise before placing it into a small wooden box. Then, he grabs his fishing supplies and begins to walk away from his home. Before he makes it more than a few steps, he remembers he needs to finish telling you about his dream.

After many hours of searching, Lorn saw something shiny hanging on a small tree branch near the eastern bridge over Lake Liahy. He found the necklace Martha was searching for! As quickly as he could, Lorn returned the necklace to Martha. Then, she graciously pulled out a small scale from her tail and gave it to Lorn.

To your surprise, Lorn opens his palm and shows you a small scale before handing it to you. He then expresses his gratitude for your help with his chores all week, and then explains that now he has extra time to go sit by the lake and fish.

As you start to walk away, Lorn taps your shoulder and then hands you a complete pizza! Cowabunga dude!

name: Crush of Waves III
rewardItems: 30x Arnold Palmer; 60x Large Net; 150x Orange Juice; 1x Beach Umbrella; 2x Lemon Seltzer
description: The sea turtles didn’t know anything firsthand, but they heard rumors about a wild clownfish looking for his kid. Will you find more sea turtles for Rosalie to talk to?

name: Crush of Waves IV
description:
This second group of sea turtles didn’t know much either. The only information they had was second hand from a group of vegetarian sharks. The sharks said a clownfish joined their club recently, and despite his denials that he too was a fish eater, he did admit to losing his son. They said the clownfish was searching the whole ocean to find his kid.

That second hand story doesn’t give Rosalie much to go on, but it does point to there really being a clownfish dad out there looking for the little clownfish Rosalie found.

Will you find more sea turtles for Rosalie? She needs more information!

name: Crush of Waves V
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 100x Large Net; 50x Arnold Palmer; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Spades; 1x Pizza Slice
description:
This group of sea turtles didn’t have any new information. They heard the other rumors and stories, but that was it.

Will you bring Rosalie even more sea turtles? She has to help this little clownfish!

name: Crush of Waves VI
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 1x Prune Juice; 200x Large Net; 1x Clubs; 100x Arnold Palmer
description: These sea turtles know the sea turtle that saved the clownfish’s father! Rosalie now needs your help finding that singular sea turtle. Will you help her? Odds are high that you’ll have to search through a lot of sea turtles.

name: Crush of Waves VII
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 1x Hearts; 100x Large Chest 01; 50x Dragon Skull; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Honeycomb
description: No luck! Will you keep searching?

name: Crush of Waves VIII
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 1x Friendship Bag 01; 2x Gold Boot; 1x Diamonds; 1x Pizza Slice; 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Buddy's Beach Ball
description:
We’re getting closer! These sea turtles traveled with the rescuer sea turtle!

Will you find more sea turtles?

name: Crush of Waves IX
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 1x Joker; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 3x Gold Boot
description:
We found him! The rescuer sea turtle was in the last group of sea turtles you gathered. Most importantly, he knows where the little clownfish’s father should be now. The clownfish dad is looking for his son not far from where Rosalie found the little clownfish.

To help with reuniting this father and son pair, the rescuer sea turtle suggested gathering as many sea turtles as we can to help find the dad and bring him to his son. Unleash the sea turtle network!

name: Crush of Waves X
itemsRequired: 5000x Sea Turtle; 1000x Shark Tooth; 8000x Stingray; 100x Ghost Jelly; 8000x Green Jellyfish
rewardItems: 1x Beach Umbrella; 1x Apple Pie; 1x Protein Bar; 1000x Black Truffle; 1000x White Truffle; 2x Blue Tang
description:
We found the father and the two fish are back together!

Now, will you help gather more sea turtles one last time? The sea turtle network has offered to help get the two clownfish home safely, and they said the more sea turtles that come along the better the trip will be. The sea turtle network would also like to invite some sharks, jellies, and stingrays to run security for the voyage. Will you help gather everyone?

name: Bug Exporter Enterprise III
rewardItems: 25x Large Net; 30x Arnold Palmer; 200x Orange Juice; 25x Grab Bag 07; 1x Good Luck Card; 10x Breakfast Boost; 10x Quandary Chowder; 1x Prune Juice
description: Well, that’s a start, but Ragvin needs many more cicadas to fill this order. He needs you to step it up.

name: Bug Exporter Enterprise IV
rewardItems: 100x Large Net; 100x Arnold Palmer; 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Protein Bar
description: Ragvin really needs a lot of these bugs and he needs to make for Nonir Island very soon. Will you bring the cicadas in significantly larger loads to help speed this up?

name: Bug Exporter Enterprise V
rewardItems: 200x Large Net; 200x Apple Cider; 20x Cabbage Stew; 25x Fruit Punch; 1x Clawed Card; 10x Raptor Claw; 1x Happy Cookies
description: That’s more like it! Keep them coming!

name: Bug Exporter Enterprise VI
rewardItems: 500x Large Net; 500x Apple Cider; 1x Baba Cola; 100x Large Chest 01; 500x Small Screw; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Spooky Pie
description:
My friend, if you keep this pace up, we’ll be able to get our order to Nonir right on time.

Will you bring more cicadas, and maybe some of their shells too? Ragvin’s buyer set the shells as an optional bonus in the contract.

name: Bug Exporter Enterprise VII
rewardItems: 500x Large Net; 500x Apple Cider; 5x Bug Bag 01; 1x Bananas; 25x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Lovely Cookies
description: This is perfect! Keep it up!

name: Bug Exporter Enterprise VIII
rewardItems: 500x Large Net; 500x Apple Cider; 1x Coconut; 10x Lemon Seltzer; 1x Pumpkin Juice
description: We’re almost there. Two more loads like your last one should do it.

name: Bug Exporter Enterprise IX
rewardItems: 500x Large Net; 500x Apple Cider; 100x Popcorn; 100x Rubber Duckie; 100x Skull Coin; 100x Void Bag 01; 1x Pizza Slice; 2x Egg of Chicken
description:
One last load and you’ve done it.

Would you mind grabbing a few extra shells while you’re getting the last load of cicadas? Then, Ragvin and his crew can be sure that the order is filled as well as all of the contract options.

name: Shells Hold Extraordinary Little Lives I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 25x Orange Juice; 5x Grape Juice
description: Will you find some barnacled shells for Geist’s collection? Geist found two barnacled shells yesterday and really loves them! The barnacles form different patterns on each of the shells in unique patterns. They are so fascinating!

name: Shells Hold Extraordinary Little Lives II
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 25x Orange Juice; 5x Grape Juice; 5x Onion Soup; 5x Shrimp-a-Plenty
description: These are so wonderful! Geist really appreciates your help getting more shells for her collection. They remind her so much of home. If you happen to find any more, Geist would love to have them.

name: Shells Hold Extraordinary Little Lives III
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 25x Orange Juice; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Pet Treat
description:
Geist appreciates you so much! How wonderful it is to have such a thoughtful friend like you.

If you find more barnacled shells, Geist would love to get a few more.

name: Lorn's Awakening XIV
description:
As you start to walk away, Lorn stops you.

“That’s strange.” he says. “Did you drop the mermaid scale I gave you?”

As Lorn stoops down to pick something up, you confirm the mermaid scale is still in your hand by showing it to him.

“Well, I couldn’t begin to guess where this came from then, but you certainly deserve another one.”

name: Noisy Nuisance I
itemsRequired: 1x Ancient Stone Cicada; 1x Wizard Hat; 25x Magus Hat
description: The buzz.  The incessant hum.  The chirping.  Star wants it to stop.  He is devising a spell that will attune his new hat with the resonant frequency of the cicada to counteract the noise.

name: Noisy Nuisance II
rewardItems: 1x Stone Key; 1x Ancient Stone Cicada; 1x Wizard Hat
description: Star was shocked by just how effective his spell was.  He wants to do the same spell for anyone who wants to stop hearing the cicadas, especially now that he can replicate the ancient stone cicada's natural rhythm when the apex of polarity during phase.  He found this old key he's willing to exchange to you for your help, too.  Even though he knows you'd do all of this out of the goodwill of your heart for no reward at all.

name: Moon Shot I
rewardItems: 5x Cat's Meow; 5x Mushroom Stew; 1x Good Luck Card; 5x Sea Pincher Special; 5x Hickory Omelette; 5x Onion Soup
description:
frank wants to get to the moon. That seems like something a magical bunny, such as frank, should be able to do easily. However, frank has not been able to accomplish it through his usual magical means. So, he is now turning to the one thing all woodland creatures loathe: engineering.

frank believes that a well engineered rocket could deliver him safely to the moon. Once there, frank is certain he’ll find moon carrots. He intends to be the first bunny on this planet to eat a moon carrot. Will you help frank find a large enough rocket to get him to the moon?

(Hint: The item requested is in Beatrix's Booming Brawl Box 02 which is available in the July Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: Moon Shot II
rewardItems: 1x Event Key; 1x Clubs; 5x Void Bag 01; 5x Grape Juice; 5x Fruit Punch; 1x Egg of Chicken
description:
That did not go according to plan…

frank completely understands now why his woodland friends loathe engineering. Honestly, it’s a wonder humans survive day-to-day. Engineering is a menace.

Will you bring frank some carrots to munch while he recovers from this debacle?

name: Uni-que Meals I
rewardItems: 10x Breakfast Boost; 10x Cat's Meow; 10x Mushroom Stew; 10x Onion Soup; 10x Shrimp-a-Plenty
description: Mariya is looking for sea urchins. She used them occasionally back home for different meals, and she really enjoyed them. Now, she would like to try combining them with some of the local flavors of Redbrook. Will you help her find some sea urchins?

name: Uni-que Meals II
rewardItems: 10x Fruit Punch; 10x Hickory Omelette; 10x Quandary Chowder; 10x Neigh; 10x Sea Pincher Special; 10x Over The Moon; 10x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Happy Cookies; 5x Crunchy Omelette
description:
Mariya can’t believe you found some sea urchins! They are wonderful!

She ended up preparing some comfort food from home instead of experimenting as she had planned. Will you find more sea urchins for her experiments?

name: Uni-que Meals III
rewardItems: 10x Cabbage Stew; 10x Lemon Seltzer; 1x Spooky Pie; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Apple Turnover; 1x Protein Bar
description:
Mariya appreciates your help so much!

She hasn’t found the right combination yet in her experimental dishes, but she wants to keep trying. Will you bring Mariya more sea urchins? She also needs more scissors. The sea urchins spines have already destroyed the scissors she had.

name: Patiently Baking I
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Spades; 1x Happy Cookies
description:
Mariya is completely stressed out! She thought making her own starter would be easy. It’s just flour and water mixed together and fed over time. Although, she did add a little pineapple juice to make the starter more acidic. But the yeast are supposed to love that! Her neighbor said the starter should be ready by now, but it doesn’t smell very good and it isn’t bubbling and rising like her neighbor’s does. Mariya thinks she messed something up, but she has no idea what it could be.

Mariya has never felt so defeated at something cooking related. She just wanted to start making some fresh bread everyday. Why is this so hard?

Will you bring Mariya some fresh bread to drown her failure in?

(Hint: The bread is in Thomas's Tavern Tote which is available in the August Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: Patiently Baking II
rewardItems: 1x Event Key; 1x Clubs; 5x Breakfast Boost; 5x Grape Juice; 10x Mushroom Stew; 10x Onion Soup; 1x Egg of Chicken
description:
It turns out that Mariya was wrong. Well, sort of. She didn’t do anything wrong in making and caring for the starter. She just wasn’t patient enough. It just needed one more day of growth. It’s alive and well now! Mariya hopes to make loads of bread from it.

Mariya appreciates your patience and help. Would you be willing to help her a little more? She needs more eggs and milk for some of the bread recipes she’s going to try.

name: The Heat Makes It Hotter I
rewardItems: 25x Fishing Net; 5x Small Chest 02; 5x Onion Soup; 5x Grab Bag 01; 25x Orange Juice; 5x Bait Bag 01
description: “Holger’s Hot Pepper Sauce has a nice ring to it, wouldn’t you say? Now, if I’m going to create the most delicious hot pepper sauce ever known, I’m going to need the hottest peppers grown in the hottest heat of the summer. That’s where you come into this enterprise, my fine farming friend. I’ll need lots of regular peppers for flavor, and a few exquisitely hot peppers for heat. Perhaps we could even throw in some gold peppers. Together, I think we’ll make something legendary. Can I count you in? Will you bring the heat?”

name: The Heat Makes It Hotter II
rewardItems: 5x Sea Pincher Special; 5x Breakfast Boost; 5x Medium Chest 01; 5x Medium Chest 03; 5x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 5x Grab Bag 02; 1x Grab Bag 04
description: “Holger’s Hot Pepper Sauce is coming together nicely. Unfortunately, I was only able to make a small batch. It was good, but a bit too mild. So we need more of everything, if you don’t mind continuing to help me.”

name: The Heat Makes It Hotter III
rewardItems: 5x Mushroom Stew; 25x Large Chest 01; 25x Large Chest 02; 25x Grab Bag 02; 5x Grab Bag 06; 5x Hickory Omelette; 1x You Rock Card
description: “Holger’s Hot Pepper Sauce is still not quite hot enough. It’s like a high mild to low medium now. We can do better!”

name: The Heat Makes It Hotter IV
rewardItems: 25x Grab Bag 07; 5x Corn Prize Bag; 10x Quandary Chowder; 100x Bacon; 10x Neigh; 1x Spooky Pie
description: “Holger’s Hot Pepper Sauce has reached a solid low-to-mid medium heat. We need to keep going. I don’t want to jump too high too fast, but let’s try more hot peppers.”

name: The Heat Makes It Hotter V
itemsRequired: 1000x Peppers; 20x Inferno Pepper; 50x Gold Peppers; 500x Wooden Barrel; 25x Spectacles; 25x Pirate Bandana
rewardItems: 25x Mushroom Stew; 250x Small Chest 02; 100x Gift Basket 01; 1x Prune Juice
description:
“Holger’s Hot Pepper Sauce is getting spicy!”

“I think it’s time for more heat, with a side of safety and some plans for storage.”

name: The Heat Makes It Hotter VI
itemsRequired: 2000x Peppers; 40x Inferno Pepper; 100x Gold Peppers; 500x Wooden Barrel; 25x Spectacles; 25x Pirate Bandana
description: “Holger’s Hot Pepper Sauce still needs more heat. I think it’s almost into hot territory. Let’s keep it going! And let’s stay safety conscious too!”

name: The Heat Makes It Hotter VII
itemsRequired: 2500x Peppers; 50x Inferno Pepper; 200x Gold Peppers; 500x Wooden Barrel; 25x Spectacles; 25x Pirate Bandana
rewardItems: 25x Cabbage Stew; 25x Over The Moon; 1x Friendship Bag 01; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Happy Cookies; 3x Pet Treat
description: “Holger’s Hot Pepper Sauce is really good! Let’s add just a bit more heat and it’s perfect.”

name: The Heat Makes It Hotter VIII
itemsRequired: 5000x Peppers; 100x Inferno Pepper; 500x Gold Peppers; 500x Wooden Barrel; 25x Spectacles; 25x Pirate Bandana
rewardItems: 25x Lemon Cream Pie; 100x White Truffle; 25x Void Bag 01; 5x Bug Bag 01; 25x Hickory Omelette; 5000x Steel; 5000x Unpolished Jade; 100x Popcorn; 1x Borgen Buck
description: “Holger’s Hot Pepper Sauce is great! Now, let’s make more of it!”

name: The Heat Makes It Hotter IX
itemsRequired: 5000x Peppers; 100x Inferno Pepper; 500x Gold Peppers; 500x Wooden Barrel; 25x Spectacles; 25x Pirate Bandana
rewardItems: 1x Pumpkin Juice; 10x Lemon Seltzer; 5000x Oak; 100x Peach; 100x Black Truffle
description: “Holger’s Hot Pepper Sauce is going to be loved by all who taste it. We need to make more so everyone can taste it!”

name: The Heat Makes It Hotter X
itemsRequired: 5000x Peppers; 100x Inferno Pepper; 500x Gold Peppers; 500x Wooden Barrel; 25x Spectacles; 25x Pirate Bandana
rewardItems: 1x Apple Pie; 1x Protein Bar; 10000x Caterpillar; 10000x Spider; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Coconut; 1x Pineapple; 1x Bananas
description: “Holger’s Hot Pepper Sauce is sold out, partly because I ate too much of it. Let’s make one more big batch.”

name: Horse Before The Carton I
rewardItems: 1000x Gold Carrot; 25x Neigh; 25x Fruit Punch; 1x Buddy Doll
description:
“Ho there, old chum! Might I trouble you for a moment?”

“frank has enlisted me to help with a new endeavor. He wants to start a school for the woodland creatures in this district. His plan is to make sure that they get as good an education as the human students receive at Vincent’s school. In addition to learning, frank wants to make sure that every animal attending the school receives two meals every day. As part of that effort, frank tasked me with helping the kitchen crew. For my first assignment, the kitchen crew leader, a lovely raccoon named Fritz, wants me to find milk cartons like they have at the human school.”

“Will you help me, and the new school get started in this monumental task?”

name: Horse Before The Carton II
description: “My most humble apologies. I forgot to mention that we will also require a supply of glacierstones to keep the milk fresh for the students. Would you be so kind as to bring them swiftly? I am deeply grateful for your support.”

name: Horse Before The Carton III
rewardItems: 500x White Truffle; 25x Hickory Omelette; 25x Breakfast Boost; 1x Prune Juice; 1x Clubs; 1x Apple Pie
description:
“You are a most excellent supplier. Thank you so much.”

“Now, we have more students enrolled than we expected. Would you be willing to continue to supply us with milk for the students?”

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery I
description: There's a book I've been meaning to tell you about, but I would be remiss if I didn't ask you to prove your mastery to me by donating to the temple of rewards.  Perhaps you could show me by way of a mysteriously gained certificate?

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery II
description: Well, this is certainly a surprise!  But, I think I'll need a little more proof in the pudding.

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery III
description: Thank you kindly {player}.  The book is precious to me, and I will need a bit more understanding of your farming mastery.

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery IV
description: Again!

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery V
description: Obstacles are placed in front of us to see if what we want is truly worth striving for.

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery VI
description: You've made it this far, but I believe you must go above and beyond to prove yourself in this instance.

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery VII
description: I've heard it said that if hard work is the key to success, most people would rather pick the lock, but you constantly prove me wrong, {player}.

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery VIII
description: The temple only rewards those who put in the effort.  Thank you for everything you're doing both for this town, and this world.

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery IX
description: The reward for all this work will be worth it, I guarantee it.

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery X
description: Once we're done here, perhaps you could teach old Dewstar a lesson or two?   Ha!

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery XI
description: The greater the effort, the greater the glory!  I read that somewhere once, but I'm unsure where.

name: Book of Dewstar Mastery XII
rewardItems: 1x Certificate of Broccoli Giving; 1x Certificate of Corn Giving; 1x Certificate of Cotton Giving; 1x Certificate of Cucumber Giving; 1x Certificate of Eggplant Giving; 1x Certificate of Pepper Giving; 1x Certificate of Pine Giving; 1x Certificate of Potato Giving; 1x Certificate of Rice Giving; 1x Certificate of Watermelon Giving; 1x Certificate of Wheat Giving; 1x Dewstar's Journal
description: Truly, you are deserving of this book.  I hope that what you find within is as rewarding as the work was along the way.

name: Horse Before The Carton IV
rewardItems: 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds; 500x Black Truffle; 1x Hearts
description: “frank has left us in a spot of difficulty again. He recruited an entire colony of rabbits to join the school. They’re all from the honeycomb burrows, somewhere up on Wigbig Hill. And now frank is demanding milk for these new students, even though they don’t seem particularly keen on it. Will you lend us your expert hands to meet this new demand?”

name: Horse Before The Carton V
rewardItems: 100x Corn Prize Bag; 1x Diamonds; 1x Buddy Doll; 200x Bone Broth; 10000x Transistor; 10x Lemon Seltzer; 1x Mini Time Egg
description:
“My dear friend, I am most grateful for your help, and I apologize in advance for what I must now ask of you.”

“frank has recruited farm animals from every farm in the district, likely including your own farm. The school is now well overrun, but frank insists that we feed them all. Would you be willing to continue your kindness by bringing more milk cartons and glacierstones? You are now most certainly our only hope.”

name: Watermelon Competitions Worldwide I
rewardItems: 50x Rubber Duckie; 1x Desk Calendar; 2x Fish and Chips; 1x Cranberry Juice
description: Holger is training for a watermelon eating contest happening in seven days. To prepare, he needs loads of watermelon to eat for practice. Will you bring him as many watermelons as you can? He would really like a mix of red and yellow watermelons because he isn’t sure what type the contest will be using.

name: Watermelon Competitions Worldwide II
rewardItems: 150x Raptor Claw; 1000x Soap; 1x World Globe; 1x Pumpkin Juice
description: That was a great start for training day one. Will you bring Holger more watermelon for his second day of training? Don’t forget he needs both red and yellow watermelons.

name: Watermelon Competitions Worldwide III
rewardItems: 1x Prune Juice; 25x Lemon Cream Pie; 50x Fruit Punch; 25x Void Bag 01
description: Holger is ready for day three of training. Will you bring him more watermelons, both red and yellow?

name: Watermelon Canard Woes IV
rewardItems: 1x Apple Pie; 10x Lemon Seltzer; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Buddy Doll
description:
Holger can’t go on. These lies are keeping him from enjoying the watermelon. He’s not training for a competition. There is no competition! He just wanted to eat a lot of watermelon without the judgment that comes with eating this much watermelon. He’s very sorry for his deception.

If you’ll forgive him, Holger would love to eat some more watermelon, without all of the guilt. What do you say?

name: The Hardest Apples To Reach I
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Clubs
description: Vincent has an apple tree that is full of fruit in dire need of picking. He used a ladder to gather all the apples he could reach, but there are still many apples that are too high to safely pick. As a seasoned orchardist, will you help him find a way to get the last of the apples from his tree?

name: The Hardest Apples To Reach II
rewardItems: 1x Apple Picker; 1x Event Key; 200x Apple; 10x Apple Cider; 3x Raffle Ticket; 1x Diamonds; 5x Ant Apple
description:
Thanks! That was just what Vincent needed! With the apple picker, he was finally able to get the apples way up at the top of the tree.

Now, do you have an extra barrel Vincent could have to fill with apples for the school?

name: Threads of Music I
description:
While visiting a dig site that he was funding, Cecil found many unique insects in an underground portion of the excavated structure. Most of the insects were milling about in the dirt near the newly exposed opening, but one rather odd insect kept circling a nail in a board protruding out of the ground.

Cecil continued watching this insect for some time. Then, as an experiment, Cecil tried to entice the insect away by moving it several feet from the nail. However, the strange insect always returned to the nail, no matter the distance or direction Cecil placed between the two. Cecil also tried to distract the insect with other objects and pieces of metal, but this strange insect took no notice.

Will you bring Cecil some nails? Perhaps the insect is attracted to the combination of shape and material that a nail presents, and Cecil can draw it away with another random nail.

name: Threads of Music II
description:
That did not work.

Will you bring Cecil a hammer so he can free the nail and see how the insect reacts?

name: Threads of Music III
description:
As soon as Cecil freed the nail, the insect seized it and hopped away. Cecil followed as quickly as he could, but the insect retreated into a hole in the ground before Cecil could catch it. Peering down into the hole by torchlight, Cecil found what appeared to be a large hollow nest filled with the remains of long dead insects. The strange nail-obsessed insect was nowhere to be seen.

Cecil considered digging into the nest to continue his search for the strange insect, but stopped when he sensed what felt like a very dangerous magic deeper down. For now, he’s going to close off this area to make sure nothing is further disturbed.

Will you help him build a seal over the opening to the nest?

name: Zap of the Sting I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 5x Grape Juice; 3x Raffle Ticket; 3x Apple Ant; 3x Ant Apple; 3x Onion Soup
description:
Around this time of year on Captain Thomas’ home world, there is an odd species of jellyfish that appears in the ocean near where Captain Thomas does much of his fishing. This type of jellyfish is extremely difficult to catch. It’s also extremely dangerous. These jellyfish can deliver a strong shock like lightning when they’re threatened.

If he hasn’t scared you off yet, Captain Thomas would like to enlist your help in searching this world’s ocean to see if this jellyfish also exists here. Are you interested in joining the search?

name: Zap of the Sting II
rewardItems: 20x Arnold Palmer; 20x Large Net; 200x Orange Juice; 10x Grape Juice; 3x Raffle Ticket; 5x Apple Ant; 5x Ant Apple; 5x Quandary Chowder
description:
You did it! You found the jellyfish! It’s the same here as it is on Captain Thomas’ home world. Captain Thomas even got a small jolt from accidentally touching one without his gloves.

Now that Captain Thomas knows they’re here, he would like to try to catch some for a few of his customers. Would you like to continue the hunt with him?

name: Zap of the Sting III
rewardItems: 25x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Net; 250x Orange Juice; 3x Raffle Ticket; 5x Apple Ant; 5x Ant Apple; 25x Apple Cider; 5x Fruit Punch; 5x Mushroom Stew
description: You have a real knack for jellyfishing! Would you like to keep going with Captain Thomas and see how many you can catch?

name: Zap of the Sting IV
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 5x Apple Ant; 5x Ant Apple; 100x Apple Cider; 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Spades; 5x Hickory Omelette
description: More of Captain Thomas’ customers have seen the pink jellyfish, and now they all want some. Will you help Captain Thomas fill all of these orders?

name: Zap of the Sting V
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 5x Apple Ant; 5x Ant Apple; 1x Prune Juice; 3x Fish and Chips; 25x Void Bag 01; 10x Breakfast Boost
description:
Star contacted Captain Thomas yesterday about getting a load of these pink jellyfish. He mentioned something about using them to prevent an intergalactic plankton from destroying the Crabby Nebula. Will you help Captain Thomas help Star save a nebula?

Captain Thomas thinks Star makes things up sometimes, but it’s better safe than sorry.

name: Zap of the Sting VI
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 5x Apple Ant; 5x Ant Apple; 3x Fish and Chips; 25x Void Bag 01; 100x Large Chest 02; 2x Pet Treat; 5x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Buddy Doll Bag 01
description: Well, if Star is making it up, he is really committing to the story. He asked Captain Thomas for more pink jellyfish. Will you help Captain Thomas continue to help Star wage a good fight for the Crabby Nebula?

name: Zap of the Sting VII
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 5x Apple Ant; 5x Ant Apple; 3x Fish and Chips; 25x Void Bag 01; 1x Apple Pie; 5000x Leather; 5000x Twine
description:
Star told Captain Thomas that the battle was going well, but that one final massive push was necessary to save the nebula. That intergalactic plankton is truly devious and dangerous.

Captain Thomas is certain he can’t catch all of the jellyfish Star needs on his own. Will you continue to help him supply the war effort?

name: Zap of the Sting VIII
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 5x Apple Ant; 5x Ant Apple; 3x Fish and Chips; 25x Void Bag 01; 1x Buddy Doll Bag 01; 1000x White Truffle; 500x Black Truffle; 10x Egg of Chicken; 1x Sponge
description:
Whew! That was a lot of work!

Star told Captain Thomas that the Crabby Nebula is saved and that the intergalactic plankton was vanquished, or maybe it was vanished. Either way, Star was very appreciative of all of the help. And Captain Thomas very much appreciates all of your help.

Captain Thomas has really enjoyed catching all of these jellyfish with you. What do you say to catching some more just for fun?

name: Falling Autumn Leaves Loved
description:
Rosalie loves the fall season. The relief from summer’s heat is enough reason to love fall, but Rosalie also loves the colors. All of the reds, oranges, yellows, and even some of the browns are such a wonderful contrast with the colors of spring and summer. They’re so refreshing!

To celebrate the return of fall, Rosalie would like to gather some of the best looking fall leaves she can find and use them for decorating her house. Will you help her search for really colorful fall leaves?

name: Sweet Tooth I
description: George has a secret - he loves sweets.  He divulged this information to you one day while telling you some secrets about exploring the forest.   He was hoping you'd bring him some sugar cane to help curb his sweet tooth.

name: Sweet Tooth II
description: George really appreciated the sweetness of the sugar cane.  It reminded him of the treats he was allowed to have during long campaigns in the wilderness.  He's asked you to bring a little more, in exchange for a recipe he heard about from a tracker during the campaign of Onir'emir many branches ago.

name: Sweet Tooth III
itemsRequired: 400x Acorn; 25x Butter; 25x Flour; 10x Salt; 1x Pie Pan; 5x Brown Sugar; 7x Molasses; 400x Sugar Cane
description: George heard that certain wildlife was more likely to appear in the presence of a mix of sugar and acorns, and shows you a recipe.   It's titled "Acorn Pie".  It lists several ingredients you've only recently learned how to make.

name: King of Apples I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 5x Onion Soup; 100x Mealworms; 3x Raffle Ticket
description:
“Don’t try to look directly at me when I’m talking to you. Why do all humans try to do that? Most of you can’t even see us. Even if you can, you’ll probably only see my faelight. So just stop looking around and listen up.”

“I need King Apples, and I don’t know how to get them. I usually work with peppers and easy to find crops. And before you ask, no, I don’t know why they picked me to get the King Apples, and I don’t know what Eebeeeebee wants with them. Augh. What a mess. I didn’t wake up today expecting to have to deal with a human.”

“I’m going to make this real simple for you. You go get King Apples for me and I give you some stuff that humans like. Ok? Ok. Go find ten for me so I know you understand the task.”

name: King of Apples II
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 100x Mealworms; 10x Grape Juice; 3x Raffle Ticket; 10x Neigh
description:
“Oh? You actually came back and you completed the test?”

“Well, let’s get to it. I need to fill an entire underground storage cave. Bring me as many King Apples as you can.”

name: King of Apples III
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 100x Mealworms; 3x Raffle Ticket; 1x Prune Juice; 10x Breakfast Boost
description: “That’s probably a good start for a human, but I need you to think more like a faerie. Eebeeeebee wants an entire storage cave filled with King Apples! So you have to put some magic into it.”

name: King of Apples IV
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Apple Turnover; 100x Apple Cider; 25x Void Bag 01; 10x Mushroom Stew; 10x Cat's Meow
description: “That’s a little better, but hey, did I mention it’s a storage cave? It’s not a cavity. It’s a whole cave. And I’m pretty sure I’ve said Eebeeeebee multiple times. Does that name not mean anything around here?”

name: King of Apples V
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 25x Void Bag 01; 10x Cat's Meow; 10x Hickory Omelette; 1x Cranberry Juice
description: “I’m glad you’re starting to take this seriously. Once you began helping me, you became just as much in danger of Eebeeeebee’s wrath as I am. Not that we have anything to worry about. You just keep those King Apples coming.”

name: King of Apples VI
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 10x Cat's Meow; 1x Spooky Cookies; 10x Cabbage Stew; 2500x Antler; 1x Baba Cola; 5x Fish and Chips; 25x Grab Bag 03
description: “You know, you’re not horrible for a human.”

name: King of Apples VII
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 10x Cat's Meow; 5x Pet Treat; 1x Lovely Cookies; 100x White Truffle; 10x Over The Moon; 10x Lemon Cream Pie
description: “Please go faster. I know humans usually can’t, but we really need to finish this quickly.”

name: King of Apples VIII
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 10x Cat's Meow; 1x Pumpkin Juice
description: “So far, Eebeeeebee is pleased with our progress. Actually, it’s really difficult to tell. He smiles so much, but you never know if he’s going to turn someone into a newt at any moment. Let’s just keep going as quickly as we can.”

name: King of Apples IX
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 10x Cat's Meow; 1x Apple Pie; 500x Black Truffle; 1x Buddy Doll Bag 01
description:
“All right. I’m tired. Let’s hurry this along. I still have my regular work to do. Have a little sprinkle of faerie magic to help you.”

A slight breeze blows across your face

name: King of Apples X
rewardItems: 3x Raffle Ticket; 10x Cat's Meow; 10x Lemon Seltzer; 10000x Bacon; 1x Coconut; 50x Jar of Pickles; 10x Gold Seed Bag 01; 10000x Machine Part; 25x Medium Chest 03; 1x Mini Time Egg
description: “One more load like that last one should fill the storage cave completely. I appreciate your help. Maybe you’ve earned me a day off or a bowl of milk or something. Eebeeeebee gives weird gifts.”

name: Ghosts of Candies Past I
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Spades
description: There was a candy many years ago that Baba absolutely loved. It was usually only available for a month or two in the fall. Each mystery flavored candy was wrapped in a ghost costume, and you never knew what flavor you would get. Some were fruit flavored. Some were nut and chocolate flavored. Every piece was delicious. Baba hasn’t been able to find it for a couple of years now. So, if you happen to find some, will you bring a few pieces to Baba?

name: Ghosts of Candies Past II
rewardItems: 1x Event Key; 1x Hearts; 100x Event Token; 10x QED Cell; 1x Treat Bag 01; 1x Treat Bag 02; 1x Treat Bag 03; 1x Buddy Doll
description: That was just as amazing as Baba remembered! If you happen to find some more, will you share a few more pieces with Baba?

name: Strange Currency I
rewardItems: 25x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Net; 2x Fish and Chips; 50x Orange Juice; 10x Bone Broth; 10x Ghost Candy
description:
“Eebeeeebee is currently losing it. Someone is stealing rubees from his vault every hour, like clockwork. They aren’t taking much, but Eebeeeebee knows the exact count and he has a spell that reports that exact count every ten minutes. The last count was 5,291,074,143,289,288. I know you were wondering.”

“Anyway, I have once again been stuck with a foolish task on top of my regular harvesting. I have to replace the lost rubees. Meanwhile, an entire team of faeries is working to seal the vault and capture the thief. I don’t really want to waste my time on this, but here we are. If you find any rubees, I will trade you for them.”

name: Strange Currency II
rewardItems: 25x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Net; 2x Fish and Chips; 50x Orange Juice; 50x QED Cell; 25x Void Bag 01; 25x Ghost Candy; 10x Mushroom Stew
description:
“The current count is 5,291,074,143,289,328. Listen. I know you don’t care, but if I have to suffer through this, you should too.”

“They found fur from a wolf in the vault. That’s most likely the culprit then, or something wearing a wolf pelt. It’s an easy spell to seal out a wolf. Hopefully, that means we won’t have to find too many more rubees. The trouble will be catching the wolf, if it is a wolf. Wolves are notoriously troublesome creatures. I think they have some sort of fae sense or something. What a mess.”

“I have an entire pepper harvest to haul in today. Keep after those rubees for me.”

name: Strange Currency III
rewardItems: 25x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Net; 2x Fish and Chips; 50x Orange Juice; 50x QED Cell; 25x Void Bag 01; 25x Ghost Candy; 1x Prune Juice
description:
“New count coming at you! It’s 5,291,074,143,289,368. You know what that means, right? The seal is not working. Whatever it is, it’s still getting in the vault. Ugh.”

“This is so frustrating. I just want to be with my cucumbers and carrots, harvesting in the sunshine. I don’t want to waste time on Eebeeeebee’s pride projects.”

“Anyway, if you keep the rubees coming, I’ll keep trading with you.”

name: Strange Currency IV
rewardItems: 25x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Net; 2x Fish and Chips; 50x Orange Juice; 50x QED Cell; 25x Void Bag 01; 1x Bag of Ghost Candy; 1x Protein Bar
description:
“It’s 5,291,074,143,289,420! That means it stopped! I may be able to stop visiting you every day!”

“In all seriousness, you aren’t bad for a human, but I just don’t want to be around you more than I have to be. Was that too mean to say? I don’t mean it in a bad way. It’s just most humans aren’t great, in the grander sense. You are probably an excellent human, but you can’t ever measure up to a plant, especially a good crop producer.”

“Well, thanks for all the help. If you’ll bring me 52 more rubees, we can satisfy Eebeeeebee and go our separate ways.”

name: Candy And Non Dairy Yummies I
rewardItems: 25x White Truffle; 10x Black Truffle; 2x Fish and Chips; 5x Hickory Omelette; 25x Ghost Candy; 1x Spooky Cookies
description:
Charles is starting up a candy delivery service. He intends to bring candy right to the door of anyone that orders through his service. He would like to do same day delivery eventually, but for now he’s starting with next day deliveries. At first, the candy selection he provides will be pretty basic, but it should be enough to get his business going.

Now, he needs a supplier of candy. Would you be interested in serving as his supplier? You can start with just candy, lollipops, taffy, and candy corn.

name: Candy And Non Dairy Yummies II
rewardItems: 30x White Truffle; 15x Black Truffle; 2x Fish and Chips; 25x Ghost Candy; 1x Cranberry Juice
description:
There were some hiccups and lost candies on the first day of deliveries, but overall Charles’ candy delivery service is looking to be a big hit. It doesn’t hurt that Redbrook has grown so substantially over the years.

While you are preparing the next load for Charles, will you try to think of a clever name for this candy delivery service? Charles came up with a few names, but Lucky Lady felt none of them were quite right.

name: Candy And Non Dairy Yummies III
rewardItems: 35x White Truffle; 20x Black Truffle; 2x Fish and Chips; 25x Ghost Candy; 10000x Straw; 10000x Hide; 10000x Feathers; 100x Large Chest 01; 1x Lovely Cookies
description:
What do you think of the name Horse Powered Deliveries? Or maybe Universal Pony Service? Filly-Friend Express? Hot Hooves Delivery? No. You’re right. Those aren’t quite right.

Well, maybe you can think of something better before your next drop of candy for Charles. He just can’t find the perfect name.

name: Candy And Non Dairy Yummies IV
rewardItems: 35x White Truffle; 20x Black Truffle; 2x Fish and Chips; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 1x Bag of Ghost Candy
description:
Charles likes your idea to call his delivery service Sweet Stepper Express. He’s going to run it by Lucky Lady as soon as he gets home.

Charles also really appreciates your help with supplying candy. It makes the delivery service much easier to run knowing that he has a reliable supply of candy.

name: Candy And Non Dairy Yummies V
rewardItems: 50x White Truffle; 25x Black Truffle; 2x Fish and Chips; 25x Ghost Candy; 1x Apple Pie; 1000x Gold Leaf; 5x Gold Seed Bag 01; 1x Happy Cookies
description: Lucky Lady had a good chuckle over your suggestion, but she thinks you and Charles are still circling the perfect idea. See if your next supply of candy inspires anything.

name: Candy And Non Dairy Yummies VI
rewardItems: 50x White Truffle; 25x Black Truffle; 2x Fish and Chips; 1x Bag of Ghost Candy; 1x Protein Bar; 1x Prune Juice
description:
Charles Delivers is perfect! It’s simple and it is very clear what the service is about. Charles can even use it for delivering other items besides candy. Lucky Lady said she’s also glad it doesn’t sound like an old stallion joke.

Charles appreciates all of your help and support. You are a fantastic candy supplier and a wonderful friend.

name: Grill And Thrill I
rewardItems: 25x Apple Cider; 25x Large Net; 52x Captured Ghost; 25x Ghost Candy; 25x B for Buddies; 52x Jack-o-lantern
description: Holger would like to get some raw meat to use as part of his Halloween decorations. He built a full-size werewolf statue and he wants to use the raw meat as viscera in the werewolf’s claws. It shouldn’t take too much, if you’re willing to lend him a hand.

name: Grill And Thrill II
rewardItems: 25x Apple Cider; 25x Large Net; 52x Captured Ghost; 25x Ghost Candy; 52x Jack-o-lantern; 25x Beary Squishies; 100x Orange Juice
description:
Well, Holger got distracted and hungry, and he ended up grilling the meat and eating it all with grilled corn and baked potatoes. It was a fantastic feast!

So, Holger will need another stack of meat, if you can spare it.

name: Grill And Thrill III
rewardItems: 25x Apple Cider; 25x Large Net; 52x Captured Ghost; 25x Ghost Candy; 52x Jack-o-lantern; 25x Thomas's Cup of PB; 1x Spooky Pie; 1x Protein Bar
description:
Holger messed up again. He decided to grill some shrimp before finishing his Halloween decorations. Suddenly, the idea struck him to have some surf and turf, and the raw meat was just sitting there…marinating in a lovely aromatic herb marinade. It was more temptation than he could bear. Before Holger could get a hold on himself, he finished the entire package of meat you brought him.

Once again, he is returning to beg for your assistance as he tries again to finish his werewolf statue.

name: Grill And Thrill IV
rewardItems: 25x Apple Cider; 25x Large Net; 52x Captured Ghost; 52x Jack-o-lantern; 1x Bag of Ghost Candy; 1x Mini Time Egg; 1x Spooky Cookies
description:
Holger gave up on adding the raw meat to the werewolf statue. It’s too difficult to resist grilling and eating the meat. However, he truly appreciates your efforts to help him.

Now, would you be so kind as to bring him a little more meat so he can make a consolation meal?

name: Keep Scarecrows Always Masked I
rewardItems: 2x Bag of Ghost Candy; 1000x QED Cell; 100x White Truffle; 50x Black Truffle; 3x Fish and Chips; 5000x Magicite; 200x Raptor Claw; 5x Bug Bag 01; 1x Friendship Bag 01; 1x Spooky Cookies
description:
Jill needs 500 masks for the scarecrows scattered around her fields. Her hope is that they will look festive for Halloween, but also that they will really put a scare into the crows, faeries, and burrowbarons that keep stealing her crops.

Will you bring her 200 masks to start?

name: Keep Scarecrows Always Masked II
rewardItems: 2x Bag of Ghost Candy; 1000x QED Cell; 100x White Truffle; 50x Black Truffle; 3x Fish and Chips; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Refined Corn Quartz; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 100x Captured Ghost; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds; 5000x Onion
description: Jill is ready for the next 200 masks whenever you have them.

name: Keep Scarecrows Always Masked III
rewardItems: 2x Bag of Ghost Candy; 1000x QED Cell; 100x White Truffle; 50x Black Truffle; 3x Fish and Chips; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 100x Captured Ghost; 1x Cranberry Juice
description:
The masks appear to be working quite well. Roomba and FR4NK painted many of them to make them even more terrifying. Jill appreciates all of your help.

If you will, Jill just needs 100 more masks to finish the last of the scarecrows.

name: Distant Superfan 36
rewardItems: 1x Gary's Diary Page 77; 750x Arnold Palmer; 1x Lemon Seltzer; 1x Wizard Hat
description: Psst.  I'm a Gary superfan.  I collect all his stuff.  I heard you're looking for a very specific page of his diary.  I happen to have a spare, but I won't trade it for anything less than twice it's value.  It's a pretty ok deal, if you've had some bad luck.  No pressure though, I'll always be here, hidden or unhidden.   Don't ask about the logistics, it's better not to think about how this all works sometimes.

name: Toil And Trouble I
description: There is a very dangerous concoction that can be made to enhance various magic spells. Rosalie would like to make some and learn more about it, but the recipe makes her feel a little squeamish. Will you follow the recipe for Witch’s Brew and bring her as much as you can make?

name: Distant Superfan 77
rewardItems: 1x Gary's Diary Page 36; 750x Arnold Palmer; 1x Lemon Seltzer; 1x Wizard Hat
description: Psst.  I'm a Gary superfan.  I collect all his stuff.  I heard you're looking for a very specific page of his diary.  I happen to have a spare, but I won't trade it for anything less than twice it's value.  It's a pretty ok deal, if you've had some bad luck.  No pressure though, I'll always be here, hidden or unhidden.   Don't ask about the logistics, it's better not to think about how this all works sometimes.

name: Toil And Trouble II
description:
Rosalie tried using the Witch’s Brew with a very simple levitation spell and all of it vanished. Every last drop! And the cauldrons!

Will you bring her some more so she can try again?

name: Toil And Trouble III
description:
All of the Witch’s Brew vanished again!

This time Rosalie tried the simplest spell she could think of: a candle lighting spell. As soon as she cast it, the candle incinerated into nothing and all of the brew vanished with it.

Rosalie has decided to try one more time before giving up on learning about Witch’s Brew. Will you bring her one more batch?

name: Toil And Trouble IV
description:
Rosalie did some reading before trying more magic. She found out that Witch’s Brew is just absolute chaos. It causes whatever magic it’s paired with to behave in the least expected way. So, trying to observe it in action made it vanish instead.

With her newfound knowledge, Rosalie went to run a few more experiments. This time she expected the brew to vanish when she cast a small weed killing spell. Instead the weeds all grew long thorns and sprouted tiny cubes of ice.

Rosalie also tried a spell to make a very large cloud. Instead a small puddle formed filled with tiny trout. Then, she tried a spell to dig a small hole. A large bewildered nautilus appeared on the intended dig spot, sprouted wings, and flew away.

For all of the brew you brought, that’s all Rosalie was able to try, just three spells. It goes so quickly.

Rosalie would really like to try a few more times, now that she knows what she’s doing. Would you mind whipping up some more Witch’s Brew?

name: Toil And Trouble V
description:
Rosalie saw more of the same nonsense as before from very basic spells, but this time her closet was caught in the unfortunate effects. Everything in it turned into stone and the gravity inside the closet flipped sideways. It’s going to be a real problem, but Rosalie has a plan to fix it.

Will you bring her one more batch of Witch’s Brew? If this works, Rosalie is never touching this stuff again.

name: Toil And Trouble VI
description: Well, that seems to have set everything right. All the tiny trout and the puddle vanished. The flying nautilus lost its wings, fell from the sky into the ocean, and it zipped off into the deep. The ice cube weeds lost their thorns and their ice cubes. Most importantly, Rosalie’s closet is back to normal, except for one wall that seems to be painted an impervious and immutable yellow. Oh well. Rosalie really appreciates your help.

name: So Hot Right Now I
rewardItems: 50x Steel; 50x Orange Juice; 1x Onion Soup; 25x Herbs
description: “Pumpkin Spice is so hot right now,” exclaims Star to you excitedly. “I’m only tuned into several omni-dimensions but it’s crazy that more people haven’t heard of it.  Let’s change that!  First, I’m going to need some pumpkins.”

name: So Hot Right Now II
rewardItems: 100x Pumpkin Spiced Milk; 1x Onion Soup; 1x Feathers; 1x Egg of Chicken; 25x Captured Ghost
description: We’ve got some pumpkins, and my sources in the netherworld say that everyone flavors their steamed milk with pumpkin spice!  Let’s try it.  I’ll just need a few more things to make it happen!

name: So Hot Right Now III
rewardItems: 50x Arnold Palmer; 5x Large Chest 01; 1x Bag of Ghost Candy; 25x Captured Ghost; 1000x Milk
description: “Now, let’s share this with everyone in Redbrook!  Pumpkin Spiced Milk for all!”

name: So Hot Right Now IV
rewardItems: 50x Treat Bag 01; 1x Acorn Pie; 100x Caterpillar; 100x Gold Feather; 100x Arnold Palmer; 25x Captured Ghost
description: It's a hit!  Redbrook loves Pumpkin Spiced Milk!  Now, let's grow this business. Maybe we ask Rosalie for help?

name: So Hot Right Now V
rewardItems: 1000x Large Net; 1000x Ancient Coin; 1x Buddy Doll; 50x Medium Chest 03; 25x Captured Ghost
description: Rosalie has used a combination of magic and marketing to set expectation for pumpkin spiced milk off the charts.  Even Cecil is thinking about investing at this point!  We'll need to make sure our supplies are stocked up.  Can you help?

name: So Hot Right Now VI
itemsRequired: 1500x Pumpkin Spiced Milk; 1000x Witch Hat; 250x Spooky Scarecrow; 150x Witch's Brew
rewardItems: 500x Arnold Palmer; 100x QED Cell; 500x Void Bag 01; 25x Captured Ghost; 50x Ghost Candy
description: Well, I think it's official.  We need to start a milk bar.  I'm going to need some stuff for decorations, and some more PSM.

name: So Hot Right Now VII
itemsRequired: 2000x Pumpkin Spiced Milk; 2000x Witch Hat; 500x Spooky Scarecrow; 1000x Linked Lantern; 250x Witch's Brew
rewardItems: 1x Honeycomb; 1000x White Truffle; 1x Buddy Doll Bag 01; 1000x Apple Cider; 25x Captured Ghost; 1x Egg of Chicken; 250x Mega Cotton Seeds
description: Well, that wasn't enough decorations or PSM. Can you help?

name: So Hot Right Now VIII
itemsRequired: 3000x Pumpkin Spiced Milk; 3000x Witch Hat; 1000x Spooky Scarecrow; 2000x Linked Lantern; 500x Witch's Brew; 500x Witch's Broom
rewardItems: 1x Acorn Pie; 1x Bag of Ghost Candy; 1000x Arnold Palmer; 3x Spooky Cookies; 1000x Large Net; 25x Captured Ghost
description: It turns out people want the merch as they want the PSM!

name: So Hot Right Now IX
itemsRequired: 6000x Pumpkin Spiced Milk; 6000x Witch Hat; 2000x Spooky Scarecrow; 4000x Linked Lantern; 1000x Witch's Brew; 1000x Witch's Broom
rewardItems: 5x Maverick Chip; 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 2000x Small Screw; 200x Black Truffle; 25x Captured Ghost; 1x Mini Time Egg; 1x Egg of Chicken
description: This is the last shipment for now.  October and pumpkin spiced milk, what an iconic duo!  The nether dimensions are gonna be talking about us next October instead.  Thanks for all your help, {player}!

name: Gratitude and Gravy I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 1x Clubs; 10x Void Bag 01
description:
Holger is sending out notes to everyone to share with them all of the things he is thankful for in his life. He humbly requests that you also send him a return note that lists any items you are thankful for. You can even use his note as a guide to help you prepare your reply.

“Dear friend,

I find myself at this time of year reflecting on the passing of time and what brings true meaning to life. Much of my efforts each day focus on baser things tied to mere survival. The securing of shelter, safety, and food and water occupy much of my time. With any time I have remaining, I find myself mostly focused on food.

For better or worse, food has become something that is intertwined in all I do. In some ways, my life is very much like a feast filled with delicious dishes and food is the gravy that ties it all together.

Oh gravy. Have you ever had a really fine and perfectly balanced gravy? It’s a completely fantastic thing. It can take every item in the meal and tie them all together, all while it elevates them to new heights. It adds savor and salt and fat to everything it touches. What more could anyone want?

Now, I know what you’re thinking. What about gravy on sweet dishes? Friend, I’ve already done the research. When I say gravy makes everything better and ties everything together, I’ve not forgotten desserts and sweet dishes. I mean it. I have yet to find a single entree, side item, or dessert that wasn’t made better by gravy.

…”

Holger’s thankful note continues like this for four more pages, but perhaps this is enough to whet your appetite for writing a return thankful note to Holger.

name: Top Turkey
rewardItems: 5x Bone Broth; 3x Breakfast Boost; 5x Grape Juice; 5x Mushroom Stew; 3x Quandary Chowder; 5x Cat's Meow; 5x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 1x Lovely Cookies; 2x Lemon Seltzer; 3x Hickory Omelette; 5x Onion Soup; 3x Gravy Boat; 3x Fish and Chips; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Baba Cola; 2x Maverick Chip
description:
Geist won the Turkey Trot! Three cheers for Geist!

All combined, 16,348 donors contributed 288,627,104,730,870 (288.6T) silver to support our fellow Redbrook residents! Thank you for your support!

As part of the Turkey Trot celebration, please enjoy some treats chosen by Geist.

name: Gratitude and Gravy II
rewardItems: 10x Grape Juice; 1x Diamonds; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Cooked Turkey; 1x Event Key; 1x Acorn Pie; 1x Fruit Punch; 1x Hickory Omelette; 3x Mushroom Stew; 2x Over The Moon; 2x Neigh
description: Holger is really hungry for some gravy now. Will you prepare some for him while he prepares the rest of the meal? He promises to share some of the food.

name: A Pearl Jam V
rewardItems: 5000x Ancient Coin; 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Large Net; 1500x Orange Juice; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Apple Pie; 2x Cooked Turkey
description:
Rosalie doesn’t understand how Holger is doing this. She went to Cecil’s house, to his servant’s kitchen, to make the pies. Then, she placed the pies in a pocket universe wrapped in a baker’s dozen security spells to cool. When she returned to get the pies, they were all gone and Holger was covered in a baker’s dozen maladies.

It’s maddening!

Rosalie is ready to give it one more shot, if you’re willing to bring more pearl berries.

name: A Pearl Jam VI
rewardItems: 5000x Ancient Coin; 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Large Net; 1500x Orange Juice; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Thank You Card; 5x Egg of Chicken; 2x Prune Juice; 3x Cooked Turkey
description:
None of this should be possible! Holger is like some sort of inevitable force of nature.

This time, Rosalie pulled the pies from the oven, teleported herself and the pies 100 kilometers away and 2 kilometers into the air, and then cast a spell to transfix her gaze on the pies while they cooled. The pies vanished in midair while Rosalie stared at them, and then she watched as Holger slowly drifted to the ground attached to a parachute. He immediately fell asleep when he landed, snuggled into his parachute. Rosalie watched in awe, but she couldn’t do anything.

Rosalie is done with trying to make a pie. However, will you bring her more berries? She has a plan.

name: A Pearl Jam VII
rewardItems: 5000x Ancient Coin; 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Large Net; 1500x Orange Juice; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 5x Gravy Boat
description: That’s a good start! Will you bring more pearl berries?

name: A Pearl Jam VIII
rewardItems: 5000x Ancient Coin; 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Large Net; 1500x Orange Juice; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Thank You Card; 5x Gravy Boat; 1000x Black Truffle; 2000x White Truffle
description: Rosalie is sorry for the secrecy. She really wants to tell you what she’s doing, but for now she just needs your trust and more pearl berries.

name: A Pearl Jam IX
description:
Rosalie did it!

She made one more pie as a distraction. Then, while Holger was busy, she managed to finish making some pearl berry jam. She even had enough to give you a jar!

Please be careful when you go to enjoy it. There’s no telling how Holger will react when you open that jar.

name: A Little Cheer I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 1x Hearts; 1x Buddy Doll
description:
Vincent is exhausted. The past few months were extremely busy, and there seems to be no end in sight. If he can make it to the winter break for the school, he should have a chance to catch his breath. At the very least, Vincent will only be working one job during the break. He can do this.

Will you find something to help lift Vincent’s spirit? A little treat should be enough to buoy him up and help him feel loved.

name: 12 Days of Sweet Treats I
description:
On the first day of Christmas, I wanted sweet treats.
Gimme fruit from an apple tree!

name: A Little Cheer II
rewardItems: 10x Grape Juice; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Event Key; 1x Spades; 2x Prune Juice
description:
That was perfect! Vincent loved the cake, and your thoughtfulness really lifted his spirit. Vincent appreciates you.

If you have any more of those holiday cakes, Vincent would love another one. It was delicious!

description:
Rosalie can hardly believe it, Redbrook has reached another incredible milestone! Over 1,000,000 farmers now call the Redbrook area home!

To celebrate, Rosalie is handing out special gifts. She hopes you enjoy yours!

description: At this moment, you’re truly on top of the world, and an essential part of the Redbrook community. Thank you for all the kindness and support you’ve shown.

name: Ice Cleared Everywhere I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Frozen Large Net; 1x Diamonds; 10x Void Bag 01
description:
This ice is getting so frustrating. Jill has a door handle that is constantly getting covered in it. Then, she can’t open the door until she manages to find some grip, or she discovers a random tool lying around to help her. It’s infuriating!

She has engineered several solutions to reduce or eliminate the ice, but she doesn’t like any of them. They all have some drawback. Some are too dangerous. Some use too many resources or too much energy. Some are just impractical. Will you help her come up with a simple solution that will help reduce her ice struggles?

Directive 1225 always required a heat shield that deflected all cold weather to the west - away from Castle Romuska.  Grandma Reamchisel hated the cold, so the story goes.   He suggests passing a little more cheer to someone who might have seen a few winters themself.
