description:
In the whirlwind of the past few days, various scouts have left reports on the community boards of Redbrook that no shady characters have been spotted in the general limits of Redbrook, but various wildlife has been noticeably active in moving away from the Pirate’s Cove Cane Pole Ridge and Highland Hills.

No one has heard from Ragvin after he left the city with a shipment of Redbrook Radishes in tow.

Meanwhile, in the town square, a large poster has been plastered on the announcement board.

"PROTECT OUR FAIR CITY. REDBROOK NEEDS STURDIER WALLS. LET US REPAIR THE MASONRY. WE CAN BECOME STRONGER THAN OUR ENEMIES. ALL DONATIONS WELCOME. -Holger"

name: Pirates Start Arriving XVII
itemsRequired: 50x Acorn Pie; 500x Amber Cane; 4000x Bacon; 5000x Diamond; 250x Dragon Skull; 2500x Fancy Violin; 1443x Grand Piano; 10000x Pear Grease; 10000x Rice; 500x Ship in a Bottle; 5000x Wine
rewardItems: 30x Borgen Bag 01; 5500x Apple Cider; 1x Time Egg; 10x Lemon Seltzer; 1000x Bacon; 1x Travel Voucher; 1x Cranberry Juice
description:
"We’ll need some nautical help. I’m sure he was headed towards Pirate’s Cove, but if we’re going to approach there unnoticed, we’ll need the help of someone far more experienced. Someone’s going to have to convince Ragvin to help us…” Vincent trails off slightly as he docks the skiff near Redbrook. After a moment, he tacks some parchment to the single small mast scrawled in charcoal. “Free to a good home.”
Tracking down Ragvin won’t be an easy task, you discover. You stop by one of the local watering holes and hear that he left port several weeks ago and hasn’t been seen since. Vincent suggests you take a look at the defenses, while George stays behind in the tavern, a strange look in his eye as you leave. Holger is gone quickly towards his pet project with a strange gleam in his eyes.
Of course, having been gone only a few days, a general malaise has come over the constabulary of Redbrook and some repairs will need to be fashioned, which gives you some time to think about how to find Ragvin.

name: Ice Cleared Everywhere II
rewardItems: 10x Grape Juice; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Event Key; 1x Clubs; 1x Lovely Cookies; 3x Mushroom Stew
description:
That ice scraper was a genius idea! Jill appreciates your help. She hung the scraper on a nail right by the door, and now it’s always ready to clear away the ice.

Now, Jill has a new idea. Will you bring her some corn? She has a plan for a synthetic coating derived from corn, and other things, that she can put on surfaces to prevent ice buildup. She may never have to deal with ice again!

name: Pirates Start Arriving XIX
itemsRequired: 10000x Blue Diary; 500x Brown Sugar; 10000x Butter; 10000x Cooking Pot; 10000x Fancy Chair; 10000x Fancy Clock; 1337x Flying Machine; 10x Gold Boot; 10x Heart Container; 500x Molasses; 500x Over The Moon; 1000x Pair of Boots; 10000x Pie Pan; 10000x Rice; 10000x Seashell Necklace; 250x Ship in a Bottle; 500x White Sugar; 5000x Wine
rewardItems: 30x Borgen Bag 01; 5000x Apple Cider; 3x Happy Cookies; 3x Lovely Cookies; 3x Spooky Cookies; 5000x Small Bolt; 1x Gravy Boat; 1x Travel Voucher; 5x Lemon Seltzer; 10000x Large Net
description: After a day or two of ensuring the town defenses are adequate (minus the wall project you just found out about), you pause to search for more leads on tracking down where Ragvin was going and why radishes. George suggests you try a new tack and talk to Captain Logan, who might be up to the task of getting to Pirate’s Cove speedily and stealthily.   It’s a big ask, and you know Captain Logan will need to be shmoozed if he’s going to even consider saying yes.

name: Problems Still Abound XX
itemsRequired: 10000x Corn; 10000x Corn Husk Doll; 10000x Corn Oil; 1500x Engine; 10000x Fancy Table; 10x Heart Container; 10000x Jade Charm; 10000x Leather Bag; 10000x Mayonnaise; 3x Piece of Heart
rewardItems: 30x Borgen Bag 01; 5000x Apple Cider; 10x Crunchy Omelette; 200x Mega Cotton Seeds; 500x Medium Chest 03; 1x Time Egg; 1x Apple Pie
description:
“Well, it’s an intriguing offer, I suppose, but I find very little in this situation that does anything for me or my expeditionary team. I’ve not been bothered by these so-called pirates, so perhaps you’re the instigators?”

Vincent winces in frustration at Captain Logans words. He has been growing more impatient with each passing hour since Logan declined helping.

“He’s out there without us! What if he does something foolish? What if they catch him? Even more worryingly, what if he does something useful before we’re ready?”

Your ragtag team comes up with the most odd of solutions and realize you’ll have to see if Jill could advise you on a speedy solution to your problems using her growing mechanical prowess. Thankfully, you know a few things she might like to make her more amenable to your immediate needs.

name: The Masonry Requires Action XXI
itemsRequired: 10000x Belt Drive; 10000x Black Powder; 10000x Cannon; 10000x Carbon Sphere; 10000x Explosive; 2000x Fancy Sword; 10000x Leather Helmet; 1000x Magna Quartz; 10000x Pine Board; 10000x Red Brick; 10000x Reinforced Helmet; 10000x Sturdy Bow
rewardItems: 10000x Ancient Coin; 10000x Apple; 5000x Apple Cider; 1x Baba Cola; 30x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Cranberry Juice; 2x Fish and Chips; 1x Friendship Bag 01; 500x Large Chest 02; 10000x Lemon; 1x Maverick Chip; 200x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Mini Time Egg; 10000x Orange; 1x Paper Receipt; 200x Raptor Claw; 1000x Skull Coin; 10000x Steel
description:
You see a poster.  It's no longer in the town square, but in an alleyway.  You feel compelled to help.

"PROTECT OUR FAIR CITY. REDBROOK NEEDS STURDIER WALLS. LET US REPAIR THE MASONRY.  WE CAN BECOME STRONGER THAN OUR ENEMIES.  ALL DONATIONS WELCOME. 

-Holger"

name: Problems Still Abound XXII
itemsRequired: 10000x Belt Drive; 10000x Corn Oil; 10000x Energy Coil; 1500x Engine; 10000x Flywheel; 10000x Mayonnaise; 10000x Pear Grease; 10000x Potato Battery; 10000x Power Monitor; 10000x Sail Cloth; 10000x Steel Plate; 10000x Wrench
rewardItems: 1x Refined Corn Quartz; 30x Borgen Bag 01; 5000x Apple Cider; 1000x Mystical Chest 02; 500x Large Chest 03; 1x Travel Voucher
description: Jill smiles as the last of the corn enters her silo.  She lays out a parchment on a table nearby with a picture of something titled “stealth boat.”  It uses underwater propellers and engines that utilize corn oil to create energy, not unlike ROOMBA.  “It’ll be slower than the wind, and theoretically quieter, too.”  She won’t guarantee the overall efficacy of her ship, but the design seems solid enough, and there doesn’t seem to be any more options.  You set to work and rush to get the things she’ll need to get her project underway.  She suggests you work on this in Buddy’s cave.  How she knows about his secret cave and the dock there is a mystery to you.

name: Augment Redbrook Through Masonry XXIII

-A Redbrook Citizen"

The handwritten posters have been appearing in more places. You can't help but want to help.

name: You Must Build A Stealth Boat I
itemsRequired: 10000x Corn; 10000x Corn Oil; 5000x Diamond; 10000x Diving Helmet; 10000x Energy Coil; 1500x Engine; 10000x Kill Switch; 7500x Magic Conch Shell; 10000x Pear Grease; 10000x Potato Battery; 10000x Power Monitor; 1000x Runestone 11; 10000x Steel Plate; 10000x Wrench

questline: You Must Build A Stealth Boat
description:
Returning to Buddy’s Cave with everything Jill claimed she would need, you head back. Once at the cave, you hear the distinct sounds of a hammer hitting metal and some choice words from Jill as a crash comes from another room. “ROOMBA! I told you! The system will go over here! How can a robot with such fantastical knowledge have no actual idea how this will work?!” Her exasperation is plain as you step into the drydock of Buddy’s cave.

“I AM MERELY ATTEMPTING TO RECALIBRATE YOUR RUDIMENTARY ENGINE SYSTEM TO UTILIZE A CLEANER SOURCE OF FUEL FOR A MORE SUSTAINABLE BOATING SOLUTION. THERE IS A NON-ZERO CHANCE THIS VESSEL WILL BE LOST IN THE FUTURE. PREPARATIONS MUST BE MADE.”

Jill’s resigned sigh echoes in the cavernous area. “Well, I guess we’ll need some of this clean fuel, and while you’re getting that together, ROOMBA and I will finish this contraption up, with some more modifications.”

"TATTERED MASONRY DOESN'T STAY TATTERED FOR LONG

IT GETS HELP FROM PEOPLE AS THE TATTERS GROW STRONG

-COUNCIL FOR A BETTER REDBROOK"

name: You Must Build A Stealth Boat II
itemsRequired: 10000x Corn; 10000x Cotton; 5000x Diamond; 10000x Energy Coil; 1500x Engine; 10000x Hourglass; 10000x Kill Switch; 7500x Magic Conch Shell; 10000x Steel Plate; 10000x Step Ladder; 10000x Wrench
rewardItems: 1x Travel Voucher; 25x Acorn Pie; 30x Borgen Bag 01; 3x Spooky Cookies; 3x Happy Cookies; 3x Lovely Cookies; 1x Coconut; 5000x Prickly Pear; 1x Time Egg; 10000x Sewing Needle
questline: You Must Build A Stealth Boat
description:
After some time, you see a metal abomination inexplicably floating in the water. It looks like a giant arch in the water, with the deck sitting in between the arches. While you try to make sense of this, ROOMBA continues to zip back and forth alternating between strange alterations of the boat, and cleaning up any mess Jill has made.

“Well, it’s not the cleanest, but this little guy does know his stuff. The angles of the ship should now cut the water in such a way as to keep both wind and water from making any noise as you move forward. The strange contraption underneath is an improvement on the original engine design way back from when you started exploring Jundland and brought back pieces, intended to propel the vessel forward without needing wind, and rotors push the water in such a way that keeps the need for wind at a minimum without any noise. It should work!”

Jill has taken a step back from the work to admire her boat. The satisfaction on her face is plain.

She continues, “Now that we’re nearly done, ROOMBA and I are going to need some more metal, and a few more odds and ends to help finish up the construction. We should be ready soon, and bring those companions of yours too. Hopefully Buddy has kept those pirates at bay…”

name: You Must Build A Stealth Boat III
itemsRequired: 10000x Corn; 10000x Corn Oil; 5000x Diamond; 10000x Kill Switch; 7500x Magic Conch Shell; 10000x Pear Grease; 10000x Potato Battery; 1000x Runestone 11; 10000x Step Ladder

questline: You Must Build A Stealth Boat
description:
You return, companions flanking you. Their awestruck expressions mirror yours when you originally stepped into the dock yesterday.

Jill greets everyone, and after a moment she says, “Well, we’ve got this baby as ready as she’ll ever be. Just needs a name.” ROOMBA speaks up, “MY DATABANKS INDICATE AN APPROPRIATE MONIKER FOR SUCH A FINE CRAFT SHOULD BE THE SPARROW.”

No one seems to disagree, so the SPARROW is christened.

“HUMANS, I ASSUME YOU HAVE BROUGHT SUSTENANCE AND FUEL FOR THE JOURNEY? I WILL REQUIRE SOME ADDITIONAL POWER AS WELL.”

rewardItems: 30x Borgen Bag 01; 5000x Apple Cider; 1x Travel Voucher; 1x Cranberry Juice; 5x Buddy Doll Bag 02; 10x Lemon Cream Pie; 10000x Square Key; 10000x Large Net; 5x Pet Treat; 5x Maverick Chip; 10000x Fire Ant
questline: You Must Build A Stealth Boat
description:
ROOMBA pours the last of the fuel into the tank and rolls on board. Vincent, George, and Holger step on board apprehensively, and finally you are the last one embark. ROOMBA points to a small red button on the console of the SPARROW and Vincent deftly stands at the front and presses the button. The machine whirrs to life, a soundless steady vibration under your feet.

With the gentle thrum of the deck beneath you, Vincent accelerates the SPARROW with ROOMBA giving tips behind him. Luckily, in the enclosed main cabin, there are plenty of plush chairs for the rest of the crew to relax. Vincent directs Holger to keep an eye out for vessels on the horizon, and your craft steers into the ocean, eerily silent as the waves break around you. Pirate’s Cove awaits…

name: Pirate Stealth Arrival XXVII
itemsRequired: 4000x Bacon; 10000x Beet; 500x Breakfast Boost; 75x Brown Sugar; 5000x Butter; 10000x Cabbage; 200x Cabbage Stew; 10000x Carrot; 500x Cat's Meow; 100x Clubs; 250x Concord Grape Pie; 10000x Cooking Pot; 10000x Corn; 10000x Cucumber; 100x Diamonds; 10000x Dice; 10000x Eggplant; 1x Fancy Table; 10000x Gold Carrot; 10000x Gold Cucumber; 10000x Gold Eggplant; 10000x Gold Peas; 10000x Gold Peppers; 15x Gold Potato; 10000x Hourglass; 10000x Leather Belt; 10000x Leather Waterskin; 10000x Leek; 250x Lima Bean; 50x Molasses; 400x Mushroom Stew; 400x Neigh; 10000x Onion; 400x Onion Soup; 400x Over The Moon; 500x Peach Juice; 10000x Peas; 10000x Peppers; 5000x Pie Pan; 10000x Potato; 500x Quandary Chowder; 10000x Radish; 500x Red Berry Pie; 10000x Rice; 200x Sea Pincher Special; 200x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 100x Spades; 10000x Tomato; 10000x Watermelon; 10000x Wheat; 75x White Sugar
rewardItems: 30x Borgen Bag 01; 2x Travel Voucher; 10000x Caterpillar; 10000x Spider; 5000x Apple Cider; 10000x Treasure Key; 1x Time Egg; 5x Lemon Seltzer
description: The journey is slower than expected, as the SPARROW seems to have traded speed for stealth.  Your erstwhile crew passes the time by playing various games.  Vincent is surprisingly good at dice games when he's not watching the horizon.  Holger seems to prefer card games.  The journey is slow but steady, and you begin to see the cove on the horizon.  The group decides to fill their stomachs one last time before arriving.

name: Pirate Stealth Arrival XXVIII
itemsRequired: 1x Buddy Doll; 10000x Essence of Slime; 10000x Green Cloak; 10000x Hourglass; 10000x Looking Glass; 10000x Magus Hat; 10000x Orange Gecko; 10000x Seashell Necklace; 10000x Step Ladder
rewardItems: 30x Borgen Bag 01; 5000x Apple Cider; 2x Travel Voucher; 1x Supply Voucher; 5x Prune Juice; 10000x Grab Bag 03; 1000x Large Chest 02; 5x Pet Treat; 10000x Skeleton Key
description:
Approaching the cove, aided by the cover of night, your party sees the flicker of campfires. A sprawling set of ships is arrayed around the cove - almost too many to count. The raucous din is only interrupted by loud bangs and the occasional ship to ship contact, a wooden crash and creak of boats moored too close together.

One bonfire near the center of the cove that leads out towards Highland Hills stands higher than the rest. Vincent notes that is likely where the leaders are all together, and suggests any reconnaissance is focused on that area. Remembering some of the old routes that Buddy knew of in previous adventures, you lead your companions towards a small inlet in the cove and find the boat that Buddy sailed off with several days ago docked in the same inlet. Chance, it seemed, was on your group’s side!

Stepping into the grotto, you get a closer look at Buddy’s boat and realize belatedly that several parts of the hull haves been smashed, and the entire boat is in quite significant disrepair. There is crude writing of warnings across the bow. Too late, you realize, that this area was known to the pirates. A scuffle breaks out behind you, and before you can blink, pirates have bound and gagged your companions. One looks to you and as you backpedal towards the wall, he gives a malicious laugh. You feel the wall behind you, when suddenly it melts away, and you feel a hand roughly cover your mouth.

Everything goes dark and you hear behind you, “Shhh…”

name: Pretty Abrupt Save XXIX
itemsRequired: 1x Amber Cane; 1x Dragon Skull; 10000x Emerald Ring; 1x Fancy Chair; 1x Fancy Clock; 1x Fancy Sword; 1x Fancy Table; 1x Fancy Violin; 1x Flying Machine; 10000x Garnet Ring; 1x Gold Potato; 1x Grand Piano; 1x Heart Container; 10000x Hourglass; 10000x Jade Charm; 25x Joker; 10000x Lemon Quartz Ring; 1x Lima Bean; 1x Magic Conch Shell; 1x Magna Quartz; 10000x Mystic Ring; 10000x Red Trunk; 10000x Seashell Necklace; 10000x Shimmer Ring; 1x Ship in a Bottle; 10000x Spiky Bracelet; 10000x Treasure Chest; 1000x Winged Amulet
rewardItems: 1x Pumpkin Juice; 3x Apple Pie; 3x Prune Juice; 50x Borgen Bag 01; 2x Heart-shaped Gem; 10000x Arnold Palmer; 5x Buddy Doll Bag 01; 10000x Apple Cider; 2x Giving Box 01
description:
After a moment of confusion, you spin around to see Buddy, eyepatch and bandana covering a majority of his face, but his outline is unmistakable.

“We’ll save them, don’t you worry,” he whispers. The echoes of his whispers bounce off the tunnel in strange ways, making it sound like Buddy was talking to you from many directions.

He raises a finger to his lips to signal staying quiet and motions you to follow. You grab a torch to follow him.

The tunnel is silent but for the occasional drip of water and your footsteps. After about 5 minutes, Buddy stops suddenly, and you peer around to see that you’ve exited a tunnel into a wider space. It is littered with broken boxes, rotted treasure chests, and other detritus.

“We’ll be safe here. Jayante and I used this place for storage before. That smuggler’s hatch came in handy yet again! If I know Hrakness, we're going to need some serious bribery material to get her to leave Redbrook alone..."

name: Iced Crops Examination I
description: “official woodland league: agricultural use and wetlands examination leader coming through! i hope you’re ready for your inspection. we’ve heard about the frozen crops you’re growing. they sound like a real drain on the soil and water resources of this area. I’m going to need samples of each of the frozen crops you’re growing. then, i’ll examine them with my associates and we’ll make a determination on whether you’re ruining everything. maybe, just maybe, we’ll let you keep your farm, assuming you aren’t ruining everything.”

name: Iced Crops Examination II
description: “i wouldn’t mind a snack while i’m waiting. how about a nice bucket of carrots while you get the other frozen crops?”

name: Iced Crops Examination III
description: “hold on a minute! my bucket of carrots is getting way too low. i need a free refill when you have a chance.”

name: Iced Crops Examination IV
rewardItems: 2x Pet Treat; 2x Grab Bag 07; 2x Grab Bag 02; 2x Grab Bag 03
description: “sheesh. who knew growing crops would take so long? i’m going to need my bucket filled again.”

name: Iced Crops Examination V
description: “when you bring the frozen cabbages, go ahead and drop a regular cabbage or two in the bucket to keep me busy. I think I’m good on carrots for now.”

name: Iced Crops Examination VI
rewardItems: 5x Onion Soup; 5x Bait Bag 01; 100x Orange Juice
description: “ugh. the things i suffer for these folks. i have no interest in pine. i’m going to need another free carrot refill after all.”

name: Iced Crops Examination VII
description: “you thought I forgot about the peas, didn’t you? i would never. maybe my free refill could be peas and carrots while i wait.”

name: Iced Crops Examination VIII
description:
“the boys and girls at the o.w.l. lab say you’re clean. they say everything looks good. they say i shouldn’t be bothering them with this. they say i should really get some professional help. well, i’m not buying it. i don’t trust these frozen crops any further than i can throw them! there’s something not right about this whole operation! you just wait. i’ll get to the bottom of this.”

“speaking of bottoms, i see the bottom of my bucket again. could i get another free refill?”

name: Iced Crops Extreme Examination I
itemsRequired: 10x Carrot; 10x Peas; 10x Cabbage; 3x Bucket; 200x Frozen Peas
rewardItems: 2x Fish and Chips; 25x Large Chest 01; 1x Protein Bar
description: “i’m back! and i figured it out! we have to go deeper. we need a lot more crops to get to the truth. the folks back at the lab asked me to stop, but i told them i’m not stopping until they analyze these new samples. at this point, they’ll do almost anything to get me to leave them alone. so I’ve got you right where i want you. now, i want 10 times the frozen crops as samples, and 3 free refill buckets while i wait.”

name: Iced Crops Extreme Examination II
description: “the analysis is taking too long! so i’m going to go put a hurry on the techs at o.w.l. meanwhile, i’ve enlisted Gary to collect the frozen crops samples. he’s been authorized to smash things if you cause any problems, mostly just rocks and stuff, but still. now, i need my free refills before i go, please and thank you.”

rewardItems: 1x Borgen Buck; 3x Maverick Chip; 1x Spooky Pie

name: Iced Crops Extreme Examination VI
description: “so hibernating bears aren’t the best enforcers. on behalf of o.w.l., i would like to officially apologize for bringing a less than professional level to this investigation. i promise it won’t happen again. now, let’s get back to the business at hand. i will still need a free refill while i wait though.”

name: Iced Crops Extreme Examination VII
rewardItems: 1x Pumpkin Juice; 1x Buddy Doll; 2x Friendship Bag 01
description: “all right. let’s get the last of it, and no skimping on my free refill.”

name: Iced Crops Extreme Examination Extra Extremey I
itemsRequired: 10x Carrot; 200x Frozen Corn; 200x Frozen Cabbage; 200x Frozen Hops; 200x Frozen Peas; 200x Frozen Pine; 200x Frozen Radish; 200x Frozen Tomato
rewardItems: 5x Borgen Bag 01; 3x Egg of Chicken; 2x Gold Seed Bag 01; 2x Fish and Chips; 5x Hickory Omelette; 5x Lemon Cream Pie; 100x Peach; 1000x Sugar Cane; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Prune Juice; 200x Corn Prize Bag; 1000x Small Bolt; 1x Mini Time Egg; 1x Apple Pie
questline: Iced Crops Extreme Examination Extra Extremey
description: “bah. they’ve found nothing. nothing! can you believe that? it’s like there’s nothing to find. it’s like you’re running a legit operation here. i feel so defeated, or maybe that’s bloated. i can’t tell. will you at least do me a favor and bring me one last load of all the frozen crops? i’ll analyze them myself. and maybe let’s hold the free refill down to just the carrots this time.”

name: Iced Crops Extreme Examination Extra Extremey II
questline: Iced Crops Extreme Examination Extra Extremey
description: “fine. i guess you’re clean. keep up the good work, but o.w.l. be watching you! you see what i did there?”

name: Just As Sweet I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Large Net; 1x Hearts; 10x Void Bag 01
description:
“I think I’m in love.”

“Last night I went to a dinner party with some of my crew. We had a great time and great food. Then, I ended up talking all night with an old friend of my first mate. Her name is Cass and she is wonderful. She has the most amazing smile and sense of humor, and she’s fascinating and so fun to talk with. We were literally the last two people to leave the party. I didn’t want the party to end! I could have stayed up all night talking with Cass!”

“Oh, It was amazing! I have to see her again.”

“I have to bring her a gift. Will you help me find something lovely for Cass?”

name: Just As Sweet II
rewardItems: 10x Grape Juice; 1x Event Key; 5x Valentines Card; 2x Boltonic Love Potion 4; 10x Grab Bag 07; 3x Hickory Omelette; 1x Buddy Doll
description:
“That didn’t go like I thought it would.”

“Cass just wants to be friends. I feel like a complete idiot. I got a little carried away there didn’t I?”

“I need to go fishing, I think. Have any bait handy?”

name: Happy Neigh Year I
description: Neigh! Neigh!

name: Happy Neigh Year II
description: Neigh neigh neigh. Neigh neigh neigh, neigh neigh neigh. Neigh neigh neigh neigh?

name: Happy Neigh Year VI
rewardItems: 1000x Red Envelope; 25x Void Bag 01; 1x Prune Juice; 1x Protein Bar
description: It’s coming along quite nicely. This may be the finest celebration of the Lunar New Year that Redbrook has ever seen. Perhaps we should add another dish to the celebratory feast. Will you find another dish that a group of horses could enjoy?

name: Happy Neigh Year VII
rewardItems: 1000x Red Envelope; 25x Void Bag 01; 1x Apple Pie
description: “Well, old chum, we’ve come to it. We’ve gathered a decent variety for the party, but now we need the favorite treat of horses everywhere. Will you find some sugar cubes for the party?”

name: Happy Neigh Year VIII
rewardItems: 1000x Red Envelope; 25x Void Bag 01; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Happy Cookies
description: “Excellent start! But we’ll certainly be needing more than that. Are you up for gathering more sugar cubes? I cannot stress how much horses love them.”

name: Happy Neigh Year IX
rewardItems: 1000x Red Envelope; 25x Void Bag 01; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 2x Fish and Chips
description:
“Please keep the sugar cubes coming. They’re absolutely essential.”

“We should also invest in some gold feed. Some of the horses that will be attending are even fancier than yours truly.”

name: Happy Neigh Year X
rewardItems: 2000x Red Envelope; 25x Void Bag 01; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Time Egg
description: “Now we have the makings of a world class celebration. Let’s keep going to build a little reserve. It’s always better to be over prepared.”

name: A Slime Covered Wish I
description: Gleeep... gloop gloop... SLIIIIME BUDDDDDDY DOOOOLLLLLL... sloop splorp blishhh slort... ANNNNNCIENT COOOOOOOOOIN...

name: A Slime Covered Wish II
description:
Just then, Lorn sees you talking to Goostav and wanders over. He notices the Slime Buddy Doll you just gave Goostav and sees something inside of it. He grabs a nearby water hose and begins to spray water at the Slime Buddy Doll.

A puzzle piece comes out of the doll and it turns out to just be a regular Buddy Doll covered in slime!

Goostav looks surprised and says "Gleeeeeeep... glop PIIIIEEEECE" and then hands you the Puzzle piece!

name: Stickiness of Friendship I
description:
“Goo bert goo.”

“I’m so glad that I found you, friend. While I love the swamp, it can be a lonely place. You make it not as much lonely. Together, we are like a pocket of swamp gas finding a magic spark.”

“Goo goo bert.”

“I’m also glad the swamp hasn’t hurt you. It’s a very dangerous place. When you get a little more comfortable with the swamp, maybe I can take you down the undertow road. It’s a little more dangerous than the rest of the swamp, but very mysterious.”

“Goo goo bert goo goo bert.”

name: A Little Luckier I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Large Net; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Clubs
description: Leafy needs your help. He has misplaced his hat. Now, not only is his head getting colder by the minute, but he also seems to be getting less lucky too. He’s also concerned that his fabulous good looks are waning too. Don’t look directly at him! Just find his hat as quickly as possible!

name: A Little Luckier II
rewardItems: 1x Prune Juice; 1x Event Key; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Clubs
description: You really saved the day! Leafy is feeling his luck coming back quickly. He’s also 20% warmer, and he feels at least 20% more confident. Now, Leafy just needs a little something to help restore his youthful good looks. Will you bring him some seaweed to soak on his face? A nice green mask should do the trick.

name: Green Eggs and Bacon I
rewardItems: 5x Gold Carrot Seeds; 5x Gold Cucumber Seeds; 5x Gold Eggplant Seeds; 5x Gold Pea Seeds; 5x Gold Pepper Seeds; 1x Good Luck Card
description:
“Desperately, I am shaken.
I’m begging, please,
I need green eggs and bacon!
Of course! The bacon is also green,
But also tasty and never lean.”

name: Green Eggs and Bacon II
description:
“Could you, would you, bring me more?
I ate them all,
And now I’m poor.”

name: Green Eggs and Bacon III
rewardItems: 1x Cranberry Juice; 10x Veggie Juice; 5x Void Bag 01
description:
“I really hate running out.
It makes me angry.
It makes me shout!
Will you,
Will you,
Bring me more?
Hurry!
Hurry!
Complete this chore.”

name: Green Eggs and Bacon IV
rewardItems: 1x Pot of Gold (Small); 5x Bag of Spring Seeds; 1x Baba Cola
description:
“Yes!
Yes!
They’re so yum!
Look!
Look!
I saved you some…
Oops.
Ouch.
Never mind.
Hmm.
Hmmmmm.
Bring me any more you find!”

name: Fungal Bungle I
rewardItems: 5x Grape Juice; 10x Veggie Juice; 1x Good Luck Card; 5x Bag of Spring Seeds
description:
“DON’T EAT THAT POTATO!”

“Sorry for startling you. But seriously, don’t eat that potato. Just give it to me for now and I’ll be back shortly.”

name: Fungal Bungle II
rewardItems: 1x Spooky Cookies; 5x Cat's Meow; 5x Mushroom Stew
description:
“DON’T EAT THAT CORN!”

“Sorry for barging in again, but why do you keep trying to eat things that are clearly abnormal? It’s very concerning. For now, hand me the corn. I’m going to investigate these strange crops. Please don’t try to eat anything strange while I’m gone. Please. Ok? Please just don’t.”

name: Fungal Bungle III
rewardItems: 1x Prune Juice; 5x Breakfast Boost; 5x Bug Bag 01
description: “Excellent! I’m very happy to see that you aren’t trying to eat any more strange crops. Now, I need more strange crops for my investigation. Quickly now! I have to figure out what went wrong before someone gets hurt!”

name: Fungal Bungle IV
rewardItems: 25x Bag of Spring Seeds; 50x Apple Cider; 200x Orange Juice; 50x Large Chest 01; 1x Friendship Bag 01
description:
“Need them!
Need them!
Give me more!
It hurts…
Hurts…
More!
More!”

name: Fungal Bungle V
itemsRequired: 25x Lucky Trout; 10x Lucky Corn; 10x Lucky Potato
rewardItems: 50x Large Net; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Honeycomb; 50x Veggie Juice; 5x Egg of Chicken
description:
“Please don’t feed Holger anymore!”

“Well, you can feed him. He’s Holger after all. But no more strange things.”

“I really have to hurry along with this. The alignment will close soon and I fear things are getting out of control already.”

“Ok. Hurry and find everything you can that looks green and tangled in clover. I need it all to figure this out.”

name: Fungal Bungle VI
itemsRequired: 50x Lucky Trout; 20x Lucky Corn; 20x Lucky Potato
rewardItems: 50x Large Net; 3x Fish and Chips; 5x Maverick Chip; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Borgen Buck; 10x Fruit Punch
description:
“It is my fault. I made this mess…”

“I was pulling mycelium from the unknown lands to try some new spells. One of the spells included a handful of clover. When I cast the spell, the mycelium and clover vanished from my hand. I tried a recall spell, a locator spell, a trace spell, a spell of intergalactic lost and found, and a search and rescue spell. None of them could get a lock on where the mycelium and clover went. The problem, unbeknownst to me at the time, was that the mycelium and clover fused and went everywhere.”

“Now, the fused shamcelium is starting to infect other things. This could get really bad, if I don’t stop it. I’m trying to find a cure, first for Holger, but for everything else as well. I need more greened things to experiment with to find a solution. Will you help me?”

name: Fungal Bungle VIII
itemsRequired: 200x Lucky Trout; 40x Lucky Corn; 40x Lucky Potato; 32x Lucky Eggs; 32x Lucky Bacon; 1000x Bouquet of Flowers
rewardItems: 2500x Sugar Cane; 1x Travel Voucher; 1x PHR Voucher
description:
“Excelsior! I’ve solved it! I think so anyway…”

“Spring flowers seem to be the key. To finish up I’ll need more greened things and lots of flowers to do larger scale testing.”

“Oh, and Holger is feeling much better now. He’s resting in my tower. Hopefully, he’s not eating anything…I’d better hurry back. Off with you! Go! Go!”

name: Fungal Bungle VII
itemsRequired: 100x Lucky Trout; 40x Lucky Corn; 40x Lucky Potato; 32x Lucky Eggs; 32x Lucky Bacon
rewardItems: 1x Gold Boot; 1x Apple Pie; 1x Borgen Buck; 2500x Rice
description: “Quickly, I need more of everything! I’m getting close.”

name: Fungal Bungle IX
itemsRequired: 5000x Purple Flower; 5000x Orange Flowers; 5000x Yellow Flowers; 5000x Blue Flowers; 5000x White Flowers; 5000x Red Flowers; 5000x Bouquet of Flowers; 200x Potted Flower
rewardItems: 100x Sugar Cube; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 60x Egg of Tree
description:
“The flowers work! The shamcelium isn’t completely destroyed, but it is inhibited. Also, the flowers negate the shamcelium’s ability to completely consume its host. So, you will probably still see a lot of strange green things, but it won’t spread much. Holger can even eat them now without any unusual consequences.”

“We will need more flowers to spread the inhibitor all around the Redbrook area. Will you bring loads of flowers?”

name: Fungal Bungle X
itemsRequired: 7500x Purple Flower; 7500x Orange Flowers; 7500x Yellow Flowers; 7500x Blue Flowers; 7500x White Flowers; 7500x Red Flowers; 7500x Bouquet of Flowers; 300x Potted Flower; 300x Honeysuckle
rewardItems: 1x Pumpkin Juice; 100x Bag of Spring Seeds; 100x Brown Sugar
description: “It spread a little further than I thought. We need more flowers!”

name: Fungal Bungle XI
itemsRequired: 400x Lucky Trout; 80x Lucky Corn; 80x Lucky Potato; 50x Lucky Eggs; 50x Lucky Bacon
rewardItems: 100x Bag of Spring Seeds; 50x Acorn Pie; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 1x Mini Time Egg
description:
“More!
More!
I’m just kidding. I’m fine now, but I did really like those green eggs and bacon. The green corn, potatoes, and trout look pretty good too. Will you bring me some of all the green things to eat? I’m feeling rather peckish.”

name: Fungal Bungle XII
itemsRequired: 10000x Purple Flower; 10000x Orange Flowers; 10000x Yellow Flowers; 10000x Blue Flowers; 10000x White Flowers; 10000x Red Flowers; 10000x Bouquet of Flowers; 400x Potted Flower; 400x Honeysuckle
rewardItems: 100x Bag of Spring Seeds; 1x Time Egg; 99x Egg of Tree
description: “Let’s go ahead get more flowers to cover the whole countryside. We have to go far and wide, just to be safe.”

name: A Little Gardening I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 100x Orange Juice; 10x Large Net; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Spades
description:
George is working with some seedlings for his garden. He wants to grow some broccoli and tomatoes. Unfortunately, all of his tools are rather large for this process of working with little seedlings in their own planters. Will you help him find some tools that would be a better fit for a little gardening?

(Hint: The item requested is in the Garden Crate 01 which is available in the April Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: A Little Gardening II
rewardItems: 1x Event Key; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Diamonds; 3x Egg of Tree
description: That little shovel was perfect, but George has discovered that he also needs a small rake of some sort. Will you help him find the perfect tool for the job? Remember, it needs to be small enough to be effective in tighter spaces.

name: Rumor Has It I
rewardItems: 5x Magical Egg Basket; 20x Egg Basket; 2x Fuzzy Egg; 3x Egg of Tree
description:
“Whatever we did with the eggs has sparked…something. I suppose it could also be from Rosalie or Star investigating things, but it still started right here. With us.”

“You have no idea what I’m talking about, huh? Sorry. I just heard some wild rumors and had to get over here to tell you. There are more eggs! People are claiming to see them all over the place. Someone said Borgen is selling one. Let’s find these new ones and try to figure this out. Will you join me?”

name: Rumor Has It II
rewardItems: 5x Magical Egg Basket; 20x Egg Basket; 2x Fuzzy Egg; 10x Void Bag 01; 5x Egg of Chicken
description:
“You found one! What a weird egg. It looks like a tiny planet.”

“Ok. Rumor has it that someone in town has found one of the other new eggs. Try sending items to a few of your favorite townsfolk and see if anyone sends you a new egg.”

name: Rumor Has It III
rewardItems: 5x Magical Egg Basket; 20x Egg Basket; 2x Fuzzy Egg; 10x Void Bag 01; 2500x Bird Egg; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Borgen Bag 01
description:
“Wow! It looks like the moon! Did these new eggs come from some great space nest?”

“The rumors for the next egg are just confusing. Some folks say they found it in the dark. Some say they found it in the light. Maybe try both and see if the stars align to drop one in your mailbox. I know. I thought it was weird too, but it might work.”

name: Rumor Has It IV
rewardItems: 5x Magical Egg Basket; 20x Egg Basket; 2x Fuzzy Egg; 1x Mini Time Egg
description:
“It’s so bright! Ha! It’s the sun! I better put it under a shade.”

“For this next one, you have to do your chores. That’s all I’ve heard. Well, some whispered that there is a shortcut, but I’ve never heard of a starter pack before.”

name: Rumor Has It V
rewardItems: 5x Magical Egg Basket; 20x Egg Basket; 2x Fuzzy Egg; 2x Prune Juice; 3x Day Off Voucher; 2x Fish and Chips; 1x PHR Voucher
description:
“I don’t know what this egg is, but I can feel it tugging at me. It’s very disconcerting.”

“Ok. Another weird one coming at you. Rumor has it that this next one is only available to members of a secret club. That’s all I’ve heard, and that bit of information came from a kid talking in her sleep during my class. When I asked her about it, she clammed right up like she was in deep trouble. She wouldn’t say anything after that.”

name: Rumor Has It VI
rewardItems: 5x Magical Egg Basket; 20x Egg Basket; 2x Fuzzy Egg; 50x Bag of Spring Seeds; 1x Apple Pie
description:
“This one is either a meteor, an asteroid, or just a rock. Tough call.”

“I’ve heard several folks say they saw someone leaving the temple with an odd looking egg. It seems like a legitimate lead, but the temple has a lot of weird stuff. So who knows for sure. Wanna give it a shot?”

name: Rumor Has It VII
rewardItems: 5x Magical Egg Basket; 20x Egg Basket; 2x Fuzzy Egg; 1x Pumpkin Juice
description:
“Ok. Amazing! This is the coolest one so far. This is the embodiment of the wildness of space.”

“Rumor has it that helping your friends, at their request, could reveal a new egg. Even if it doesn’t friendship is its own reward, right? Ha! Ok. Good luck out there!”

name: Rumor Has It VIII
rewardItems: 1x Astro Fuzzy Chick; 2x Sun Egg; 2x Moon Egg; 2x Planet Egg; 1x Black Hole Egg; 1x Asteroid Egg; 1x Comet Egg; 1x Nebula Egg; 1x Time Egg
description:
“This egg is crazy. It won’t stop flying around, but it always comes back to me. Ha ha! So weird.”

“Now, guess what happened?! I put all of these new eggs together just like before. I was expecting something crazy to happen. And it did! A new egg appeared in the middle of the other eggs. It looked like a rocket. It started smoking and rumbling. Then, it blasted upward, hit the ceiling, and cracked open. Out fell this little guy. As far as I can tell it doesn’t do anything, but it’s really cute. Anyway, it’s yours. Thanks for joining me for another exciting egg hunt!”

name: Borgen Builds a Nest Egg I
itemsRequired: 40x Egg 01; 40x Egg 02; 40x Egg 03; 40x Egg 04; 40x Egg 05; 40x Egg 06; 40x Egg 07; 40x Egg 08; 40x Egg 09; 40x Egg 10; 40x Egg 11; 40x Egg 12
rewardItems: 12x Chocolate Bunny; 50x Bag of Spring Seeds; 1x Protein Bar; 10x Crunchy Omelette; 1x Diamonds; 1x Cranberry Juice; 100x White Truffle
description: Borgen has found an incredible demand for fancy and strange eggs, like those found around Redbrook this time of year. He would be happy to compensate you for helping him gather a large inventory in preparation for his next trip to Poh Poh Poh. Interested?

name: Borgen Builds a Nest Egg II
itemsRequired: 20x Egg of Ages; 20x Egg of Water; 20x Egg of Air; 20x Egg of Chaos; 20x Egg of Earth; 20x Egg of Fire; 20x Egg of Life; 20x Egg of Light; 20x Egg of Shadow; 20x Egg of Space
rewardItems: 12x Chocolate Bunny; 50x Bag of Spring Seeds; 10x Crunchy Omelette; 1x Spades; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Baba Cola; 100x Fruit Punch; 3x PHR Voucher
description: That was an excellent load of eggs. Now, Borgen would like to get some of the stranger eggs. Please bring all you can find.

name: Borgen Builds a Nest Egg III
itemsRequired: 10x Fuzzy Chick 01; 10x Fuzzy Chick 02; 10x Fuzzy Chick 03; 10x Fuzzy Chick 04; 10x Fuzzy Chick 05; 10x Fuzzy Chick 06; 10x Fuzzy Chick 07; 10x Fuzzy Chick 08; 10x Fuzzy Chick 09; 10x Fuzzy Chick 10; 10x Fuzzy Chick 11; 10x Fuzzy Chick 12
rewardItems: 12x Chocolate Bunny; 50x Bag of Spring Seeds; 10x Crunchy Omelette; 1x Spades; 1x Prune Juice; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Spooky Cookies; 100x Black Truffle
description: In addition to fancy and eccentric eggs, the people of Poh Poh Poh love cute fuzzy things. Will you help Borgen fill his inventory with fuzzy chicks for his next trip?

name: Borgen Builds a Nest Egg IV
description: Borgen found an odd looking fuzzy chick among the batch you brought. He’s not sure if the good folks of Poh Poh Poh would find it as cute as the others. If you’d like to keep it, Borgen would part with it for a small fee.

name: Borgen Builds a Nest Egg V
rewardItems: 12x Chocolate Bunny; 50x Bag of Spring Seeds; 10x Crunchy Omelette; 1x Clubs; 30x Egg of Tree
description: One more thing, Borgen would like to try an offering of fuzzy trout for the good customers of Poh Poh Poh. He thinks they could really get hooked on them. Will you bring Borgen all you can catch?

name: Borgen Builds a Nest Egg VI
description: Odd. Borgen found another one of those strange looking fuzzy chicks. Same deal as the last one?

name: Borgen Builds a Nest Egg VII
rewardItems: 12x Chocolate Bunny; 50x Bag of Spring Seeds; 10x Crunchy Omelette; 1x Hearts; 3x Heart Container; 1x Heart-shaped Gem; 50x Egg Basket; 25x Magical Egg Basket; 20x Fuzzy Egg; 3x Galactic Egg Basket
description: Ok. One more batch of fuzzy trout should do it, and then Borgen is all set to hit the markets of Poh Poh Poh. You’ve been a great help. Borgen appreciates you.

name: Fuzzy Unfairness Neutralized I
rewardItems: 1x Fuzzy Trophy; 100x Magical Egg Basket; 10x Galactic Egg Basket; 100x Egg Basket; 10x Chocolate Bunny
description:
“as you no doubt recall, I love fuzzy chicks. can’t get enough of them. i hunted for them on my own this year. if i do say so myself, i’ve done a bang up job. unfortunately, there’s one that is a little more difficult to get to, especially for a land loving bunny like me.”

“your mission is as easy as can be. bring me 1,000 of those deep blue sea chicks within 3 days. if you do, you get a trophy and whatever else i dig up between now and then.”

“i’d get a move on if i were you!”

name: Super Fun Fart Goo Substance I
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 10x Void Bag 01; 3x Lemon Seltzer; 1x Diamonds
description:
"Has it really been another year, already? I can hardly keep up! Seems like just yesterday we were getting ready for last year's Founding Jubilee!"

"In getting ready for our 5th Jubilee and this year's Red Diamond Run, I have to admit, I haven't made much time for myself. I'm always so busy with these events and they're always so serious! I feel like I just need to take a breath and laugh. I need something... juvenile. Something a little low effort. Cheap giggles. You know what I mean? Do you have anything like that in mind?

(Hint: The item requested is in the May Starter Pack. It will also become available another way before the end of the month.)

name: Blue Diamond Fish I
rewardItems: 2500x Apple Cider; 5000x Large Net; 150x Grab Bag 08; 150x Grab Bag 07; 500x Diamond
description: Gary heard a rumor that there was a blue diamond fish in the run this year. Can you do some fishing and confirm if this is true?

name: Super Fun Fart Goo Substance II
rewardItems: 1x Gloorp; 1x Event Key; 1x Capy Birthday Card; 3x Waffle; 5x Sea Pincher Special
description: "Oh {player}, I haven't laughed like that since I was a little girl! Your little gloorp thing was just what I needed. Why are those so fun? They're so silly, but everybody loves a good gloorp noise! Here you go, I couldn't possibly keep this and still get anything done. Do you have anything to give me an energy boost and me get through the rest of this month?"

name: Blue Diamond Fish II
rewardItems: 2500x Arnold Palmer; 5000x Large Net; 3x Maverick Chip; 500x Diamond; 3x Fish and Chips
description:
Holger heard you were looking for a special blue diamond fish for Gary. He wants you to try to catch one for him, too. You assure him it would taste the same as the reds, if it even exists, but he won't be dissuaded.

Can you do some more fishing to really see if the rumors are true?

name: Blue Diamond Fish III
rewardItems: 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Apple Cider; 2x Cranberry Juice; 5000x Large Net; 3x Prune Juice; 500x Diamond
description:
Captain Thomas says the annual run is made exclusively with blue diamond fish in his world. If there's a chance one made it to this world, maybe it can give him insight into how to get back!

Can you throw some more nets at the river and really see if there's any merit to the rumors?

name: Blue Diamond Fish IV
description: Thomas has an idea. He says if you'll just bring him a regular red diamond fish and some blue dye, he'll make you a blue diamond fish.

name: Blue Diamond Fish V
rewardItems: 500x Large Net; 100x Void Bag 01; 1x Baba Cola; 2x Piece of Heart; 3x PHR Voucher; 5x Pet Treat
description: Well that was weird. The dye just slicked right off. It didn't stick to the red diamond fish at all. Maybe it was just a fluke. Better try with a whole batch of red diamond fish and blue dye and see if it sticks to any of them.

name: Blue Diamond Fish VI
description:
That didn't work either! It just runs right off the fish like oil trying to mix with water. Now there's just a bunch of blue dye everywhere. What a mess! Better clean it up so it doesn't run off and get on everything. And you should probably put all the fish in crates so Captain Logan can send them off to market.

On the bright side, the blue dye run off scared up a bunch of those rare caterpillars. And at least you were able to save most of the bottles! Not that you needed any more... You've been scooping them out of the river by the truckload for days, now. Why are there so many old boots and glass bottles in the river in the first place?

That's a question for another time. Right now, you have some cleanup to do.

name: Blue Diamond Fish VII
rewardItems: 1000x Diamond; 5000x Large Net; 1500x Arnold Palmer; 3000x Iced Tea; 3000x Apple Cider; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 1x Day Off Voucher; 3x Travel Voucher; 10x Spades
description: As you hand off the last crates of fish for Captain Logan, he encourages you to cast one last time into Crystal River for old time's sake. You've already been fishing the river for weeks, what's one more cast?

name: Blue Diamond Fish VIII
description:
You don't believe it...

After countless hours of tossing nets and losing faith in both the existence of a blue diamond fish and your skill as an angler, you toss one last time. You look on in amazement at a shimmer of blue scales among the writhing mass of sunfish and trout.

The blue diamond fish is yours.

Everyone gathers around to marvel at it. Well done, {player}!

name: Cake It Or Not I
description:
During his latest fishing adventure, Thomas reeled in a cookbook. He didn’t catch any fish, but that cookbook could not have come at a better time. Thomas was asked to make a cake to contribute to the big birthday celebration. Now, if Thomas can dry out the cookbook and unstick the pages, he should be able to make one of the cake recipes in the book and impress everyone.

Will you help Thomas dry out the cookbook?

name: Cake It Or Not II
itemsRequired: 200x Flour; 200x Eggs; 200x Milk; 10x Brown Sugar; 25x Butter; 2x Red Diamond Fish; 200x Mushroom Paste
description:
The cookbook seems to be in good shape now. However, the cake recipe that Thomas likes the most seems pretty strange. Unfortunately, there’s not enough time to do a test run. So he’s going to just go with it.

Will you help find some of the ingredients Thomas needs?

name: Cake It Or Not III
description:
Well, that cake is something else. It’s not bad, but it’s not…it’s just weird. Anyway, the important thing is that Thomas didn’t mess up making the recipe. It was just that some pages were still stuck together. Unfortunately, he copied the recipe down as he was making it and now has an unnecessary recipe that no one would ever want.

Do you want the recipe?

name: Emerald Walks Everyday I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 1x Spades
description:
Baba likes to take a jaunty stroll through his cabbage fields everyday. He does it first thing in the morning as the sun is rising on his leafy emeralds. As he walks through the field, the air fills with cabbagey goodness and Baba finds himself at peace with the world and refreshed for the new day.

The only thing that could make these walks better is a nice walking stick of some sort. Baba needs something that fits perfectly in the hand, that can be used to examine cabbages as he walks, and that can frighten off cabbage munching drorels when necessary. Would you mind helping Baba to find the perfect walking stick?

Note: The item requested can be found in the Green Backpack, which can be obtained from trading with other players, the 28-day Daily Chores reward, or the March Starter Pack (Open Green Backpack at the Locksmith)

name: Emerald Walks Everyday II
rewardItems: 2x Cabbage Stew; 1x Thank You Card; 5x Void Bag 01; 1x Diamonds; 5x Cat's Meow; 1x Lovely Cookies
description:
You were right! My cabbages! You were right! This shillelagh is the perfect walking stick for Baba. He may need to start carrying it with him everywhere he goes. Baba appreciates your efforts to help him make his morning walks perfect.

Now, while you’re here, Baba has one more request for you. He would like some spring flowers for his table. He heard they produce a complementary aroma that’s perfect with any cabbage dish.

name: Spirit of the Cards I
rewardItems: 500x Arnold Palmer; 5x Borgen Bag 01; 2x Lovely Cookies; 2x Piece of Heart
description:
While George was building a house of cards yesterday, a rather powerful gust of wind flung open his front door. The trespassing wind proceeded to swirl all about his front room, and then zipped back out his front door just as quickly as it came. It even slammed the door shut on its way out. George wouldn’t have believed what he saw if the wind hadn’t also swept all of his cards out the door as it left. Hoping to catch his scattering cards, George ran out the door and attempted to follow that rogue wind, but his cards quickly disappeared from view.

Normally, George wouldn’t be too concerned about a lost deck of cards, but this was the deck he used during his free hours as a soldier. These cards were a reminder of good times and lost friends. George has to get them back.

Will you help George search for his lost cards? Even if you can only find a few, he would love to have them back. Most especially, George needs to find the hearts.

name: Spirit of the Cards II
rewardItems: 100x Fruit Punch; 1x Belt of Truth; 1x Cranberry Juice
description:
George is so happy to have the hearts back! He appreciates all your hard work.

Will you try to find the clubs next?

name: Spirit of the Cards III
rewardItems: 2x Happy Cookies; 150x Mega Cotton Seeds; 5x Borgen Buck; 1x Protein Bar
description:
George has heard tales of your good fortune from others, but he’s amazed to find how very lucky you are. He can’t imagine being able to find these scattered cards without you.

Do you feel up to trying to find the diamonds?

name: Spirit of the Cards IV
rewardItems: 100x Grape Juice; 500x Rice; 500x Corn; 500x Wheat; 1x Piece 15; 1000x Large Net; 20x Void Bag 01; 2x Spooky Cookies; 500x Apple Cider
description:
All George needs now is the spades and the jokers and his deck will be complete again!

George can barely believe what you have accomplished so far, but he is extremely grateful to have these mementos of his friends back. Not that you need it, but George wishes you good luck on finding the spades, and don’t forget the four jokers.

name: Spirit of the Cards V
description:
George is so thankful for your help and friendship. It was amazing to have the deck of cards back for a while.

Unfortunately, George’s reunion with his cards was short lived. The day after you got the last of the cards back to George, something unseen yanked the entire box of cards out of George’s hands. Then, the box flew right into his fireplace and up the chimney. George ran outside and caught a brief glimpse of the box of cards streaking through the air westward.

George isn’t sure how to get the cards back, and he has no idea how to keep them safe if he does find them. For now, he’s going to cherish the memories he has until he can figure out what took his cards. He may call on you for help to solve this mystery another day.

name: Green Alchemy I
itemsRequired: 15x 4-leaf Clover; 50x Emerald Ring; 50x Hops; 50x Peas; 50x Cucumber; 50x Green Jellyfish; 50x Green Chromis
rewardItems: 100x Ancient Coin; 25x Lemonade; 25x Fishing Net; 1x Crunchy Omelette

name: Green Alchemy VI
itemsRequired: 50x Green Top Hat; 100x Green Jellyfish; 100x Frog; 100x Shimmer Quartz
rewardItems: 100x Ancient Coin; 50x Large Net; 12x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Pot of Gold (Medium)

itemsRequired: 125x Green Top Hat; 300x Essence of Slime; 300x Cabbage; 300x Grasshopper

itemsRequired: 125x Green Top Hat; 500x Cucumber; 500x Water Lily

name: Green Alchemy XI
itemsRequired: 125x Green Top Hat; 500x Peas; 500x Thorns; 500x Green Diary
rewardItems: 500x Ancient Coin; 100x Grab Bag 04; 100x Grab Bag 05
description: oh the bear thinks they can mess with fundamental truths of the universe?  more power to 'em, i say.  this whole endeavor makes no sense anyways.

name: Green Alchemy XII
itemsRequired: 125x Green Top Hat; 500x Green Shield; 500x Hops; 500x Skipjack; 500x 3-leaf Clover
description: Gary looks at frank and makes a noise that is very possibly a bear making a sarcastic comment.

name: Green Alchemy XIII
itemsRequired: 125x Green Top Hat; 500x Emerald; 500x Emerald Ring; 500x Cabbage; 500x Green Chromis; 500x Green Scarf
rewardItems: 500x Ancient Coin; 1x Protein Bar; 100x Apple Cider

itemsRequired: 125x Green Top Hat; 500x Broccoli; 500x Green Jellyfish; 500x Green Dye; 500x Frog

name: Green Alchemy XVI
itemsRequired: 1000x Green Top Hat; 1500x Green Cloak; 3000x Essence of Slime; 3000x Green Dye; 3000x Green Shield; 3000x Peas

name: Green Alchemy XVIII
itemsRequired: 1500x Green Top Hat; 3000x Cucumber; 3000x Jade Charm; 3000x Green Twine; 3000x Water Lily; 3000x Green Jellyfish

name: Green Alchemy XIX
itemsRequired: 2000x Green Top Hat; 3000x Jade; 3000x Shimmer Ring; 3000x Cabbage; 3000x Hops
rewardItems: 3000x Ancient Coin; 2x Lemon Cream Pie; 2x Cabbage Stew

name: Green Alchemy XX
itemsRequired: 6000x Green Top Hat; 6000x Essence of Slime; 6000x Broccoli; 6000x Green Cloak; 6000x Emerald Ring; 6000x Jade Charm; 3000x Grasshopper; 6000x Green Diary; 6000x Green Parchment
rewardItems: 200x Small Chest 02; 200x Square Key; 3000x Large Net
description: GRROAR! RRRAGH!  RRRRRRRRRRRRAAAAAAAA!  GRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR.  RRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR RRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR RRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR!

name: Green Alchemy XXI
description: Alchemical genius!  Green to gold?  What a brilliant bear!  It would have taken me ages to find this at the end of the rainbow anyways...

name: Lasting Impression I
description: He was a humble man with a vision.  To overcome any challenge.  To be great.

name: Lasting Impression II
description: This journey lead him to become something greater.  To show something the world would soon find iconic.

name: Lasting Impression III
description: And yet, an aversion to fame has not dulled his influence on what we see.

name: Lasting Impression IV
description:
Thank you Akira Toriyama for your contribution and impact around us in both video games and art.

Signed with a humble thanks,
FarmRPG

"Thank you for all of your art, especially the character designs in Chrono Trigger and Dragon Quest. These two series are among my favorite of all time" - Firestream

“I’ll never forget Dragon Ball Z on Cartoon Network (Toonami!) at my best friend’s house. Thanks for being a part of those wonderful memories, and thanks for sharing your amazing stories!” - Tenfoo

"Your writing and art have captured my imagination from a young age, and I'm forever grateful for your influence in my creative life." - forcepath

"Thank you for the world of Dragon Ball, where imagination knows no bounds and adventures never cease." - coderanger

“Thank you for being one of my biggest art influences and inspirations. I would not be the artist I am today without your creative works. You are a true master, rest easy!” - boobun

name: Junction Of Joyful Appreciation
rewardItems: 1x Honeycomb; 2x Pie; 6x Purple Mushroom; 6x Arnold Palmer; 6x Grape Juice; 6x Grab Bag 01; 6x Onion Soup; 6x Starfish; 10x Spring Seeds
description:
A visitor arrived at Star’s tower last night, but Star found himself rather unprepared to care for a guest, especially one that he unintentionally pulled through a cauldron of interuniversal ether. Fortunately, the purple haired visitor has a good sense of humor about the mixup, and he’s very understanding since he also happens to be a fellow aficionado of magical research.

Once his guest wakes, Star will be sending the wizard back to his proper universe, but before he does, Star would like to give the wizard a few gifts for his troubles. Will you help Star find a few things that symbolically say, “Thanks for having a good attitude about being pulled through an interuniversal cauldron mistakenly, and I hope your trip back is significantly less nauseating”?

Congrats to ConcernedApe and the whole Stardew Valley development team!

name: Questionable Cooking
description: Buddy has asked you to help him learn how to cook. Upon entering his kitchen (or a poor excuse for one), you discover Buddy cutting vegetables with an oddly large and improper knife. You quickly confiscate it from him and promise to bring him a real knife set.

name: A Great Way To Unwind I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds
description:
Jill is pretty stressed out right now. On the days that she gets to work on her mechanical projects, she feels great. On the days she has to work the fields, she has this nagging bundle of discomfort in her stomach. Today is a day in the fields.

What Jill needs is something to do in the fields when she can’t endure the crop work anymore. Then, she can take a quick break to refresh herself and relieve that stomachache.

Jill has the perfect idea! When she was young, Jill’s parents would help her fly kites during the early spring. It was so relaxing and so fun. Now, she could easily fly a kite anytime she gets overwhelmed in the fields. Will you help Jill find a decent kite?

Note: The item requested can be found in the Magical Chest 01, which can be obtained from trading with other players, the 28-day Daily Chores reward, or the April Starter Pack (Open Magical Chest 01 at the Locksmith)

name: A Great Way To Unwind II
rewardItems: 3x Grab Bag 03; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Spades; 3x Hickory Omelette; 3x Crunchy Omelette; 1x Egg Basket
description:
This kite kite is amazing! Jill loves both types of kites.

Jill needs one more favor if you’re up for it. Will you bring her some more twine so her kite can unwind even higher?

name: We're back!
description:
"DID YOU HUMANOID ORGANICS TAKE A SHORT REST? MY W0RR-Y CHIP WAS ACTIVATED WITH NO PROCESS NOTIFICATION."

You have no idea what the robot is talking about but ROOMBA seems quite insistent on handing you something.

name: We're back (again)!
description:
"DID YOU HUMANOID ORGANICS TAKE A MEDIUM LENGTH REST? MY W0RR-Y CHIP WAS ACTIVATED WITH NO PROCESS NOTIFICATION."

You have no idea what the robot is talking about but ROOMBA seems quite insistent on handing you something.

name: Uneggspected Consequences I
itemsRequired: 20x Egg of Fire; 50x Egg 03; 900x Eggs; 900x Red Dye
rewardItems: 500x Large Net; 100x Large Chest 01; 150x Treasure Key; 1x Wizard Hat
description:
“You’ve done it this time! Well, maybe Vincent shares a hand in it too. Nevertheless, I definitely expected you to know better by now than to fiddle with Ethereal Growth Guides. Do you realize what you’ve done…errr…what you and Vincent have done?”

Star looks at you quizzically, and then seems to finally notice that you don’t have a clue what he’s talking about.

“The eggs! You and Vincent brought them all together and unlocked an ethereal progress ramp. Now, the ether in this area is increasing and new ether variations are popping up everywhere. There are some variations that I haven’t seen before and some I’ve only ever read about. This could be extremely dangerous! You thought I was going to say eggstremely dangerous, didn’t you?”

No longer addressing you, Star paces across your living room, muttering under his breath and gesticulating wildly. A small floating quill follows behind the pacing mage, furiously scratching down notes on a long sheet of parchment hovering a few centimeters behind Star’s back.

“I think I have it! Yes! There will be new eggs, a new set of Ethereal Growth Guides. There has to be with all the new ether variations. We’ll find them and use them to help us get control of this process.”

“If you’re up for helping me wrangle some ether, I need you to gather every strange or magical egg you see. We’ll also need some low-level Ethereal Growth Guides and other spell enhancers. I’ll make you a list.”

name: Uneggspected Consequences II
itemsRequired: 8x Egg of Life; 20x Egg 02; 900x Eggs; 900x Green Dye
rewardItems: 1x Protein Bar; 25x Void Bag 01; 500x Arnold Palmer; 1x Wizard Hat; 5x Egg Basket; 10x Lemon Cream Pie; 1x Lovely Cookies
description:
“We’re off to an excellent…oh I can’t resist it…we’re off to an eggsellent start!”

“Now, see if you can find a new Ethereal Growth Guide that focuses life energy. I suspect we’ll need a few of them. Maybe look amongst your crops. I’m getting a strong sense of leeks. Or is that something else? It’s probably leeks. Oh, and don’t forget the other things we’ll need from the list.”

name: Uneggspected Consequences III
itemsRequired: 4x Egg of Earth; 100x Egg 05; 900x Eggs; 900x Green Dye; 900x Purple Dye
rewardItems: 25x Void Bag 01; 1x Wizard Hat; 10x Egg Basket; 1x Clawed Card; 500x Apple Cider; 1x Buddystone; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Magical Egg Basket
description:
“Eggseptional work! Through your efforts and my magic, we’re starting to get the ether progress ramp under control.”

“Now, I think what we need is earth magic to help make a solid foundation for the stabilizing spell. Look for Ethereal Growth Guides that look like dirt and grass, and of course, don’t forget the other items on the list.”

name: The Wind Beneath My Wings I
description:
Geist loves tea. This much you may already know. But did you also know that she can drink 50 liters at a single sitting? Unfortunately, that means that she goes through loads of tea leaves too, and they’re quite a bit harder to find than boiled water. Boiled water is easy to find for a dragon.

Would you be willing to help Geist by gathering some tea leaves, and just a spot of honey too? She would be happy to trade you some eggs she recently found floating amongst the clouds in exchange for your help.

name: The Wind Beneath My Wings II
description: If you’re still willing to help Geist with her tea supply, she would love some more tea leaves, honey, and a lump or two of coal.

name: The Wind Beneath My Wings III
itemsRequired: 200x Tea Leaves; 2x Honey; 200x Coal; 200x Sweet Root
description:
You are wonderful! Thank you for your help.

Geist made a few cauldrons of tea for herself and a cup for Beatrix today. Beatrix quite enjoyed her tea, but mentioned that she is inviting Lorn over tomorrow and he prefers sweet root to honey. Geist would like to make tea for all three of them. Would you be willing to continue trading tea supplies for eggs?

name: The Wind Beneath My Wings IV
itemsRequired: 200x Tea Leaves; 2x Honey; 200x Coal; 200x Sweet Root; 200x Hops
description:
Lorn loved the tea! Thanks again for the help.

If you are willing, Geist would love your help stocking up on more tea supplies.

name: The Wind Beneath My Wings V
itemsRequired: 200x Tea Leaves; 2x Honey; 200x Coal; 200x Sweet Root; 200x Hops; 200x Peppers
description: Will you do one more tea supply run for Geist?

name: The Wind Beneath My Wings VI
description:
You are a good friend and your friendship has inspired Geist.

Even though Geist isn’t a fan of iced tea, sometimes she likes to drink it with Beatrix just for the shared friendship experience. Will you bring Geist some iced tea?

name: Chums I
description:
“What about a feast? You know how people love a good feast? They’ll travel for hours to enjoy a huge meal. Holger would probably fly to the moon for a free sandwich. Maybe I can throw a feast for fish and then catch them all.”

“Will you help me get some buckets of chum together for my Fish Feast? I have a really odd reward for your help, but I think you’ll like it.”

name: Chums II
description: “It’s working really well! You’re the best! Will you help me get some more chum to keep Fish Feast going?”

name: Chums III
description: “I probably should have tried this in a smaller body of water. The ocean keeps washing my feast out before I can catch all the fish I want. Will you bring me more chum?”

name: Chums IV
description: “This is so easy! I love Fish Feast! Will you bring me more chum?”

name: Chums V
description: “I thought this would be a lot more exciting. It was at first, but now I think I may have ruined it. The fish don’t seem to be as interested. But I’m going to try one more time, if you’ll help me.”

name: Chums VI
description: “Thanks for all your help. You’re a good friend. Fish Feast was fun, but I think I like plain old regular fishing better. Will you bring me some plain old regular worms?

name: Uneggspected Consequences IV
itemsRequired: 3x Egg of Water; 30x Egg 11; 900x Eggs; 900x Blue Dye
rewardItems: 25x Void Bag 01; 1x Wizard Hat; 10x Egg Basket; 2x Magical Egg Basket; 500x Orange Juice
description:
“You are eggselling at this endeavor. I knew I came to the right person!”

“We’ll need water magic now. I have a feeling a friend has found the exact Ethereal Growth Guides we’re looking for. As usual, don’t forget the other items on the list.”

name: Uneggspected Consequences V
itemsRequired: 4x Egg of Air; 8x Egg 04; 900x Eggs; 900x Blue Dye; 900x Blue Feathers; 900x Feathers
description:
“This is eggsactly how I hoped this plan would come together. We’re doing great and the ether is stabilizing!”

“Now, let’s add my personal favorite: air magic. You will definitely need help finding the air Ethereal Growth Guides, unless you mastered aviation since last we spoke. Perhaps Geist could give you a wing. Please remember the other items on the list as well.”

name: Uneggspected Consequences VI
itemsRequired: 10x Egg of Shadow; 2x Egg 07; 900x Eggs; 900x Blue Dye; 900x Green Dye; 900x Purple Dye; 900x Red Dye
rewardItems: 1x Wizard Hat; 2x Borgen Buck; 1000x Moonstone; 75x Grab Bag 03; 200x Skull Coin; 2x Magical Egg Basket
description:
“How eggs-citing! We’re moving to the last five forms, if my calculations are correct.”

“We must be very careful now. This Ethereal Growth Guide is extremely important and quite dangerous. Cataclysms upon catastrophes! It could give the Shadow a foothold into our world if mishandled! I believe our friend Borgen may have found what we’re looking for already. Please gather the other items on the list as well.”

name: Uneggspected Consequences VII
itemsRequired: 1x Egg of Light; 2x Egg 08; 900x Eggs; 900x Blue Dye; 900x Green Dye; 900x Purple Dye; 900x Red Dye; 900x Gold Leaf
rewardItems: 1x Wizard Hat; 2x Magical Egg Basket; 10x Egg Basket; 500x Spring Seeds; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Diamonds
description:
“Eggstraordinary! I was worried about the shadow magic, but you did it. You got the eggs to me safely.”

“We need balance now, quickly. Find the Ethereal Growth Guide of light as swiftly as you can, while getting the other items on the list too, of course.”

name: Uneggspected Consequences VIII
itemsRequired: 1x Egg of Ages; 2x Egg 09; 900x Eggs; 900x Green Dye; 900x Grape Juice
rewardItems: 1x Wizard Hat; 2x Magical Egg Basket; 10x Egg Basket; 1x Cranberry Juice
description:
“Eggselsior! We have balance! I can rest 3.729% easier now.”

“The final three strains of Ethereal Growth Guides will be a little tougher to come by, but I believe you can find them, if anyone can. Start with ages, and don’t forget the rest of our ever present list.”

name: Uneggspected Consequences IX
itemsRequired: 1x Egg of Space; 2x Egg 10; 900x Eggs; 900x Blue Dye; 900x Lava Sphere; 900x Glacierstone
rewardItems: 1x Wizard Hat; 2x Magical Egg Basket; 10x Egg Basket; 1x Apple Pie
description:
“Eggsactly what we wanted! The ether progress ramp is becoming stable and almost manageable.”

“Now, I need you to find the Ethereal Growth Guide of space. This one may require the help of the entire community, but you should be able to manage the rest of our list on your own.”

name: Uneggspected Consequences X
itemsRequired: 1x Egg of Chaos; 2x Egg 12; 900x Eggs; 900x Large Clam Shell; 900x Radish; 900x Gold Coral; 900x Spool of Copper; 900x Magna Quartz
rewardItems: 1x Wizard Hat; 100x Magical Egg Basket; 100x Egg Basket; 1x Spades; 1000x Soap
description:
“You are doing wonderfully! Unfortunately, eggsasperation awaits.”

“I’ve no idea where the chaos magic could have collected. Quite fitting, wouldn’t you say? It’s the last Ethereal Growth Guide we need, but you will be left to your wits to find it. And don’t forget the other items we need. Look to the list!”

name: Uneggspected Consequences XI
description: “We did it. The ether progress ramp is completely under control now. An interesting byproduct of my spell is this shiny new egg. It seems to be the anchor for the ether progress ramp. We must keep it safe and secret. Who knows what could be unleashed if someone were to get their ill-intented hands on it. Will you secure it, as you have so many of our other urgent magical artifacts?”

name: The Smell of a Fun Guy I
itemsRequired: 1000x Gold Trout; 1000x Potato; 50x Mug of Beer
questline: The Smell of a Fun Guy
description: Mariya is looking for a new ingredient for her cooking.  The town gala is coming and she wants to showcase something truly unique and wonderful for the residents of Redbrook.  However, she is at a loss on what new ingredient she could find to really make her dish pop.  She wants to ask Holger for his advice, but would like to have a peace offering before she consults him, would you bring some of Holger's favorite things to help smooth their introduction?

name: The Smell of a Fun Guy II
questline: The Smell of a Fun Guy
description: Holger was of course, delighted by the gifts Mariya brought him.  He immediately suggested that you could try adding potatoes and radishes to your food to make them more interesting.  Mariya seemed a bit skeptical, but she soldiered on, and of course asked you to provide her with the requisite items.

name: The Smell of a Fun Guy III
questline: The Smell of a Fun Guy
description: Mariya was quite disappointed by the outcome of her radish and potato pie - it didn't at all encapsulate the richness and body that she wanted to showcase her talents with.  She suggests maybe some less traditional ingredients for her dishes, and asks if you'd be interested in helping her with her new idea.

name: The Smell of a Fun Guy VI
itemsRequired: 1000x Gold Carrot; 1000x Grasshopper; 1000x Caterpillar; 1000x Bucket; 1000x Carrot; 1000x Blue Feathers; 1000x Feathers; 1000x Blue Dye
questline: The Smell of a Fun Guy
description: Mariya seems positively delighted by your selection of items, but there's still something missing in her mind.  It will have to be something rare you guess, and you suddenly remember frank discussing some odd behavior with your pigs the other day.  You figure frank would want some really odd items so you set about finding some strange things to curry favor.

name: The Smell of a Fun Guy IV
questline: The Smell of a Fun Guy
description:
"Well, peas excuse me, but that combination didn't work either..."

Mariya seems a bit frustrated, but she was grateful that Charles and frank seemed to enjoy the conglomeration food idea (minus the fish).

You'd like to cheer Mariya up a little bit, maybe some flowers would help her feel better?

name: The Smell of a Fun Guy V
itemsRequired: 1000x Flour; 1000x Bacon; 1000x Beet; 1000x Mushroom; 20x Mushroom Stew
questline: The Smell of a Fun Guy
description:
Mariya seemed slightly cheered by your thoughtful gift, but also a little distracted as she is whipping up a new idea.

She asks if you could grab her some more items while she's perfecting the ratios in her current idea. You swear she is muttering something about how "Ariathan dishes always had such richness of flavor..."

name: The Smell of a Fun Guy VII
itemsRequired: 1000x Chum; 5x Carved Bear; 5x Carved Camel; 5x Carved Moose; 5x Carved Owl; 5x Carved Rabbit; 5x Carved Rhino; 5x Carved Warthog; 1000x Cannon; 1000x Old Boot; 25x Amber Cane; 25x Small Flute
questline: The Smell of a Fun Guy
description: "well, i could talk to them for you, but then that would be spoiling the surprise, wouldn't it?" frank seems nonplussed when you ask him for help on the pig situation.  "but, i suppose if you gave me some delightful items for...reasons i could help you out...maybe..."

name: The Smell of a Fun Guy VIII
questline: The Smell of a Fun Guy
description: You bring back a bunch of items frank needs for no obviously nefarious purpose, and in return he gives you a big grin and bunny wink.  "yeah, i can wink, you can get over yourself now.  anyways, i found this in star's basement the other day, and maybe you could take the pigs for a walk, maybe they'll find something special, if you are nice to them every day and feed them."  frank hops around the assortment of items and you hear a sound that sounds like someone yelling in surprise, you turn your head to see where it came from, and when you look back, you see a small collar where frank had been.

name: The Smell of a Fun Guy IX
questline: The Smell of a Fun Guy
description: Your pigs seem to quite enjoy the freedom of walks and the feedings, and while it looks a bit ridiculous, when you take them through the forest, sometimes they insistently stop and with some snuffling and squealing, they reveal a mushroom you're not quite familiar with.  You think Mariya might be interested, so you gather a few to bring to her.

name: The Smell of a Fun Guy X
questline: The Smell of a Fun Guy
description:
Mariya added the white truffles to her dish and was overcome with emotion after her first tasting. After a moment she begins to share how the taste took her back to her hometown, to the Emperor’s Ball. It was on the second night after Emperor Ariathes returned to his ancestral homeland for the first time since ascending the Cascading Throne. It was an amazing time. Actually, it may have started Mariya’s journey to becoming a chef. The celebration food was all so amazing and vibrant and delicious. Mariya dreamed of creating something so spectacular. As the memory washes over her, Mariya sheds a single tear, and you extend your thanks to her for sharing a little bit about her unknown past this day.

Mariya mentions she remembers a different variety of truffles now that her memory has been jogged, and would love to have some of the rarer black truffles, if you come across them.

name: Red Diamond Ruined I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds; 5x Void Bag 01
description:
To celebrate the red diamond fish run this year, one of Captain Logan’s crew members made a very festive cake. It was three layers, white vanilla, and decorated with intricate red diamonds. Unfortunately, there was only enough cake for each crew member of the Zefurea to have one slice. Even more unfortunately, one of the crew members, Mister Murvee, accidentally lost his slice of cake over the railing of the ship, right before the celebratory toast.

Mister Murvee was moved to a table at the center of the ship to prevent further incidents with the railing, but he’s still without cake. Will you find a slice of cake, as quickly as possible, that Mister Murvee could enjoy for the celebratory toast?

name: Red Diamond Ruined II
itemsRequired: 1x Lemonade; 1x Orange Juice; 1x Wine; 1x Grape Juice
rewardItems: 1x Diamonds; 1x Drink Bundle; 1x Lovely Cookies; 5x Grab Bag 01; 5x Grab Bag 02; 1x Grab Bag 03; 1x Grab Bag 04; 1x Grab Bag 05; 1x Grab Bag 06; 1x Grab Bag 07; 1x Grab Bag 08
description:
Captain Logan appreciates your help with the slice of cake. Mister Murvee still managed to have another accident with his cake, but it was after the toast and mostly salvageable.

Now, the crew would like some additional liquid refreshments. Will you bring some juices and such for the celebration?

Also, to help you celebrate, and in thanks for all your help, Captain Logan left something for you at the Post Office. You’ll need the password, celebrate, to get it.

name: Red Diamond Runathon I
rewardItems: 25x Fishing Net; 200x Grubs; 200x Mealworms; 200x Gummy Worms; 200x Minnows; 2x Cat's Meow; 5x Piñata Whop Stick
description:
“Would you be interested in a little friendly competition? My crew and I are celebrating the red diamond fish run by competing to see who can catch the most red diamond fish. Knowing of your exceptional fishing skills, I decided to see if you’d like to join the fun.”

“To enter our competition, you’ll need to first add your share of the entry fee. If you’re interested, bring 10,000 silver. Then, we’ll give you some nets and bait to get started.”

name: Red Diamond Runathon II
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Net; 50x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds; 10x Bacon; 1x You Rock Card; 2x Sea Pincher Special; 5x Piñata Whop Stick
description: “How many have you caught so far?”

name: Red Diamond Runathon III
rewardItems: 30x Arnold Palmer; 50x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds; 5x Void Bag 01; 1x Bug Bag 01; 5x Grape Juice; 1x Lovely Cookies; 3x Hickory Omelette; 5x Piñata Whop Stick
description: “You’re going to need quite a few more than that, if you want to win the prize pot.”

name: Red Diamond Runathon IV
rewardItems: 60x Arnold Palmer; 100x Large Net; 200x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds; 1x Borgen Buck; 50x Apple Cider; 10x Spring Seeds; 1x Buddystone; 1x Cranberry Juice; 10x Piñata Whop Stick
description: “I don’t want to discourage you, but several of my crew are well ahead of you.”

name: Red Diamond Runathon V
rewardItems: 100x Arnold Palmer; 200x Large Net; 400x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds; 100x Spring Seeds; 3x Bug Bag 01; 1x Clawed Card; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Protein Bar; 20x Piñata Whop Stick
description: “You’re catching up! You may pass some of my crew soon.”

name: Red Diamond Runathon VI
rewardItems: 100x Arnold Palmer; 200x Large Net; 500x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds; 100x Spring Seeds; 3x Bug Bag 01; 1x Congratulations Card; 5x Breakfast Boost; 25x Grab Bag 07; 100x Large Chest 01; 100x Grab Bag 08; 40x Piñata Whop Stick
description: “Amazing! You’ve passed all of my crew!”

name: Red Diamond Runathon VII
rewardItems: 500x Arnold Palmer; 500x Large Net; 1000x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds; 200x Spring Seeds; 3x Bug Bag 01; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 25x Lemon Cream Pie; 80x Piñata Whop Stick
description: “You passed Lorn! There are only three people ahead of you now!”

name: Red Diamond Runathon VIII
rewardItems: 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Large Net; 2000x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds; 200x Spring Seeds; 3x Bug Bag 01; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Clawed Card; 50x Cabbage Stew; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds; 160x Piñata Whop Stick
description:
“You beat me.”

“There are two more competitors remaining for you to challenge.”

name: Red Diamond Runathon IX
