rewardItems: 2000x Arnold Palmer; 2000x Large Net; 4000x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds; 200x Spring Seeds; 3x Bug Bag 01; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 100x Grab Bag 03; 100x Grab Bag 06; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Mini Time Egg; 320x Piñata Whop Stick
description:
“You beat Beatrix! And technically you beat Geist too. They were working together. You should’ve seen it!”

“There is one more competitor left for you.”

name: Red Diamond Runathon X
rewardItems: 4000x Arnold Palmer; 4000x Large Net; 8000x Orange Juice; 1x Diamonds; 200x Spring Seeds; 3x Bug Bag 01; 1x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Cranberry Juice; 1x Apple Pie; 640x Piñata Whop Stick
description:
“You are tied with Thomas right now. The two of you might be the greatest catchers of fish I’ve ever seen.”

“This is it! Are you going to beat him?”

name: Red Diamond Runathon XI
description:
“Captain Logan wanted me to do the honors and present you with the prize pot. Congratulations! You are the Red Diamond Run winner.”

“You beat me by two fish!”

name: Serious Snow Safety
description: Cid heard that some kids started a massive snowball fight and he’s afraid that somebody might get hurt.  Take these Safety Goggles if you are going to play rough in the snow.

name: Ric's Embrace Falls I
description: NEIGH!! NEIGH!! NEIGH!!

name: Candy Causes I
itemsRequired: 10x Strawberry Good Goods; 10x B for Buddies; 10x Beary Squishies; 10x Candy
rewardItems: 100x Apple; 100x Fishing Net; 5x Grape Juice; 1x Party Hat; 1x 3rd Birthday Card; 1x Piece of Cake
description: “i just need some candy. there’s no ulterior motives. maybe some interior motives. will you lend a bunny a hand finding some candy?”

name: Candy Causes II
itemsRequired: 50x Strawberry Good Goods; 50x B for Buddies; 50x Beary Squishies; 50x Candy
rewardItems: 10x Apple Cider; 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 1x Wizard Hat; 1x Grab Bag 04; 1x Get Well Soon Card; 1x Clubs; 1x Party Hat; 1x 3rd Birthday Card
description:
“I thought for sure that frank was up to something, just sitting there eating candy. I waited. I watched. I peered into the ethereal windows of time and space and optimized neural networks. There was nothing. Nothing! That hare is just eating candy!”

“I think I just need some candy too. Any chance you might have some candy available?”

name: Candy Causes III
itemsRequired: 120x Strawberry Good Goods; 120x B for Buddies; 150x Beary Squishies; 120x Candy
rewardItems: 100x Large Net; 25x Grab Bag 07; 1x Buddystone; 50x Spring Seeds; 1x Party Hat; 1x 3rd Birthday Card
description:
“Star passed me on the road today. He gave me his usual, ‘Ahoy, starboard seafarer!’, but that was it. He continued right on, munching from a bag of candy. He didn’t try to examine me for ‘multiversal disturbances and decays’ at all. It was nice.”

“Do you know where I might get some of that same candy Star had? Beary Squishies are some of my favorite candy from home.”

name: Candy Causes IV
itemsRequired: 200x Strawberry Good Goods; 200x B for Buddies; 200x Beary Squishies; 200x Candy
rewardItems: 200x Gold Pepper Seeds; 200x Gold Pea Seeds; 200x Gold Eggplant Seeds; 200x Gold Carrot Seeds; 200x Gold Cucumber Seeds; 5x Breakfast Boost; 1x Joker; 1x Party Hat; 1x 3rd Birthday Card
description: “Captain Thomas joined me for lunch today. He brought some excellent candy that he mentioned you helped procure. It was a wonderful treat. I’m not usually in the mood for candy, but that did hit the spot. Do you think you could find a ration of candy for me?”

name: Candy Causes V
itemsRequired: 300x Strawberry Good Goods; 300x B for Buddies; 300x Beary Squishies; 300x Candy
rewardItems: 1x Corn Prize Bag; 100x Large Chest 02; 100x Grab Bag 08; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Spades; 1x Party Hat; 1x 3rd Birthday Card
description: “George brought me some candy. I used most of it in making experimental cookies. The B for Buddies cookies turned out the best. Now, I’d like to enjoy some candy a little more simply. Will you bring me some?”

name: Candy Causes VI
itemsRequired: 400x Strawberry Good Goods; 400x B for Buddies; 400x Beary Squishies; 400x Candy
rewardItems: 50x Grab Bag 06; 10x Bug Bag 01; 10x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 100x Grab Bag 02; 1x Good Luck Card; 100x Mega Cotton Seeds; 1x Party Hat; 1x 3rd Birthday Card
description: “Jill brought me cookies today. It was an odd batch with those little chocolate candies mixed in instead of regular chocolate chips. They were quite excellent. Now, I think I would like to have some more candy. Will you go and find some for me? I promise to make it worth your efforts.”

name: Candy Causes VII
itemsRequired: 800x Strawberry Good Goods; 800x B for Buddies; 800x Beary Squishies; 800x Candy
rewardItems: 10x Borgen Buck; 1x Party Hat; 1x 3rd Birthday Card
description: “Cecil dropped by today to pay me for some items I found for him last week. In an attempt to get me to lower my price a bit, he offered me some candy. I’m not proud to say that I did end up eating the candy and I gave Cecil a two percent discount. To make matters worse, now I want more candy. Would you take Borgen Bucks in exchange for some candy?”

name: Candy Causes VIII
itemsRequired: 1000x Strawberry Good Goods; 1000x B for Buddies; 1000x Beary Squishies; 1000x Candy
rewardItems: 10x Borgen Buck; 2500x Ancient Coin; 1x Raptor Egg; 500x Skull Coin; 1x Party Hat; 1x 3rd Birthday Card
description: “I was going through Borgen’s stuff today and accidentally ate all of his candy. Will you help me get some replacement candy before he finds out, and some extra candy for me?”

name: Candy Causes IX
itemsRequired: 1500x Strawberry Good Goods; 1500x B for Buddies; 1500x Beary Squishies; 1500x Candy
rewardItems: 1x Party Hat; 50x Mystical Chest 01; 100x Mystical Chest 02; 100x Grab Bag 08; 1x Spooky Pie; 1x Hearts; 1x 3rd Birthday Card
description:
“I caught Holger sneaking out of Borgen’s wagon on my way home today. Holger attempted to buy my silence with candy. Can you believe him?”

“Holger also claimed that he didn’t steal the candy from Borgen. He said he bought it from you…Would you be willing to sell me some candy too?”

name: Candy Causes X
itemsRequired: 2000x Strawberry Good Goods; 2000x B for Buddies; 2000x Beary Squishies; 2000x Candy
rewardItems: 1x Party Hat; 100x Black Truffle; 200x White Truffle; 100x Dragon Skull; 1x 3rd Birthday Card; 5x Borgen Bag 01; 5x Honeycomb; 1x Apple Pie
description: “Friend, I am throwing an elaborate festival for a few of my closest equine associates, as well as a few woodland friends of my Lucky Lady. Rosalie mentioned during my haircut today that you might be able to help me with a supply of sweet treats. What do you say old chum, can I count on you?”

name: Pirates Start Arriving VI
itemsRequired: 8000x Twine; 8000x Rope; 8000x Mushroom Paste; 8000x Fishing Net; 8000x Scissors; 8000x Wooden Spear; 8000x Copper Wire; 8000x Pitchfork; 8000x Red Twine; 8000x Blue Twine; 8000x Green Twine; 8000x Purple Twine
rewardItems: 1x Pirate Bandana; 5000x Small Screw; 1000x Large Chest 03
description:
During your patrol, you notice Buddy eyeing the northeastern horizon, towards his home, a distant look in his eyes.

“Watch out!” A voice cries out from behind you. Vincent comes barreling past both of you from seemingly nowhere and charges into the nearby brush. You hear the exhale of breath and a quick cry before Vincent comes back out from the undergrowth, a rough looking man in a puffy shirt in tow.

Buddy scowls, “Drat! Pirates, again.”

name: Pirates Start Arriving VII
itemsRequired: 8000x Cannon; 8000x Pumpkin; 1000x Flying Machine; 8000x Black Powder; 8000x Watermelon; 8000x Potato Battery; 8000x Kill Switch; 8000x Sturdy Bow; 8000x Sturdy Shield; 8000x Yarn; 8000x Looking Glass; 8000x Red Shield; 4000x Orange Gecko; 8000x Ruby Scorpion; 8000x Polished Boot
rewardItems: 500x Mega Sunflower Seeds; 2500x Arnold Palmer; 250x Mug of Beer
description:
“Ey yew, yah, yew, ya big ole thumb lookin’ fella. Cap’n Hrakness is lookin’ fer yew. She said yew know wots comin’ and if yew know wots best yew’ll give this teeny tiny town up. It ain’t worf the hassle iffen yew know wot I mean.”

Vincent moves to make the pirate stop talking, but Buddy - with a swish of a cutlass - stops him.

“Oh, I know the Captain all right, but you guys can stay your hand. Redbrook is no home for pirates. Kindly show yourselves back to whatever cave you came from up north. Let her know we are not interested.”

The pirate spits at Buddy derisively. “There’s a plague comin’ mate, best figure out if youse is the contagion or the dead.”

Buddy takes a menacing step towards the pirate and the pirate immediately turns tail and runs.

“Well, now you might have an idea why Holger might be mad at me…”

Vincent suggests rigging some extra defensive measures tonight before the town council meeting.

name: Pirates Start Arriving VIII
itemsRequired: 8000x Cannon; 8000x Pumpkin; 1000x Flying Machine; 8000x Black Powder; 8000x Watermelon; 8000x Potato Battery; 8000x Kill Switch; 8000x Sturdy Bow; 8000x Sturdy Shield; 8000x Yarn; 8000x Looking Glass; 8000x Sturdy Sword; 8000x Wooden Sword; 8000x Wooden Bow; 2500x Skull Coin; 8000x Hammer; 8000x Red Shield; 8000x Ruby Scorpion; 4000x Orange Gecko
description: Back in Redbrook, Buddy and Holger look at each other with worried faces as the town council discusses the evening's events.  George, ever the siege expert, suggests you may want more than you expect and doubles the requisition of Vincent, as well as adds a few items of his own.

name: Pirates Start Arriving IX
itemsRequired: 8000x Cannon; 8000x Explosive; 8000x Bottle Rocket; 8000x Potato Battery; 4000x Engine; 8000x Ladder; 8000x Yarn; 8000x Scissors; 2000x Magna Quartz; 8000x Pitchfork; 8000x Pumpkin; 8000x Red Twine; 8000x Red Shield; 8000x Red Trunk
rewardItems: 500x Skull Coin; 128x Spring Seeds; 200x White Truffle
description: Buddy perks up at the mention of cannons, and suggests a few more defensive measures.

name: Pirates Start Arriving X
itemsRequired: 8000x Looking Glass; 8000x Magnifying Glass; 8000x Spectacles; 8000x Carrot; 8000x Gold Carrot; 250x Carved Owl; 2000x Eye Patch; 8000x Linked Lantern; 80x Over The Moon; 8000x Spider; 2500x Cyclops Spider; 8000x Acorn Butter; 8000x Glass Bottle; 8000x Green Twine
description: Preparations made, Vincent pulls you aside after the meeting and suggests that you should keep an eye on Buddy, in case he does something rash.

name: Pirates Start Arriving XI
itemsRequired: 250x Carved Bear; 250x Carved Camel; 250x Carved Moose; 250x Carved Owl; 250x Carved Rabbit; 250x Carved Squirrel; 250x Carved Warthog; 500x Amber Cane; 1000x Flying Machine; 250x Small Flute; 8000x Fancy Violin; 54x Carved Dragon; 55x Carved Mouse; 56x Carved Squisquatch; 53x Carved Fox; 8000x Block of Wood
rewardItems: 2x Protein Bar; 2500x Apple Cider; 100x Void Bag 01; 5x Bug Bag 01
description: There doesn’t seem to be much you can do but follow Buddy back to his cave.  It’s a dull walk, and after a bit, Buddy seems to have settled into his cave and you see signs of a fire near the mouth of the cave.  You decide it would be a good time to work on some carving and crafting to keep your mind occupied while you keep watch.

name: Pirates Start Arriving XII
itemsRequired: 100x Breakfast Boost; 3000x Bacon; 8000x Acorn Butter; 80x Hickory Omelette; 8000x Wheat; 80x Over The Moon; 200x Concord Grape Pie; 8000x Apple; 2000x Cheese
description: In the morning, George appears beside you, trampling leaves and sticks with all the stealth of a rampaging kraken.  He mumbles something about creativity needing more sleep before offering you some morning juice.   You offer him some food in return, and George suggests after some rest you should unpack yesterday’s events with Vincent and Holger.

name: Pirates Start Arriving XIII
itemsRequired: 8000x Pirate Bandana; 8000x Purple Flower; 8000x Snail; 8000x Giant Centipede; 8000x Gold Peppers; 5x Gold Potato; 8000x Spider; 4000x Skull Coin; 12x Buddy Loves You Card; 2500x Diamond; 8000x Explosive; 1000x Flying Machine
description:
“Pirates are bad news, all the way around.” You see Holger half-heartedly picking at some breakfast as George is speaking.

“Well, they wouldn’t be here if it wasn’t for Buddy, as far as I’m concerned,” retorts Holger. The two of them stop as they see you approach and clear their throats.

Vincent gives you an earnest but frustrated look as he addresses you frankly. “We’re just concerned, {player}, what if those pirates attack Redbrook in full force? What greater recourse do we have? By all accounts, there’s multiple crews, multiple ships! I’d rather deal with a dictator than pirates, as frustrating as that is to say out loud. Buddy has proven a stalwart ally, but I worry he is too intimately involved with this crew to be objective.”

A new voice enters the room, stern and authoritative, “He may be intimately involved, but that means he may be your best solution too. Shame on you both for ostracizing someone who has given Redbrook so much over the past few years. I had hoped cooler heads would prevail, but I find you both here stirring dissent instead of solutions.” Cecil stands before the three of you, and sufficiently cowed, you see Holger and Vincent looking apologetic.

Vincent takes a moment before standing, “You’re right, Cecil, we should be using one of the town’s most loyal resources, and I feel terrible that I let personal doubt or mistrust get in the way of a good solution.”

Holger nods, a little more sullenly and adds, “Perhaps we should bring our friend a token of our appreciation and see how he would address this pirate crew.”

name: Pirates Start Arriving XIV
itemsRequired: 4000x Skull Coin; 8000x Ancient Coin; 8000x Moonstone; 8000x Power Monitor; 8000x Treasure Key; 5x Cricket
description:
You approach Buddy’s cave/home, and George pops out from behind some dense shrubbery. “Ni!” he splutters as he trips and stumbles. After gathering himself he gives a bit of a salute and says, “Nothing to report here! Buddy has had a fire lit since last night, and I’ve just been admiring the landscape!”

Vincent quickly fills George in with the plan, and the four of you step towards Buddy’s cave, and as you enter the mouth of the cave, you see the resplendent view of coins, gems, and other various tokens and baubles that have been placed almost haphazardly. On closer inspection it could almost seem that they had been placed in such a precise and meticulous fashion to dazzle a guest with a blinding display of vibrant colors across the entire room.

Your eyes adjust to the flickering light of a well made fire that is clearly on its last legs, surrounded by some cleverly placed mirrors that seem to enhance the light of the fire to make it look much brighter and fuller than reality.

“Buddy! Where are you?!” Vincent shouts, but only the crackling of the embers of the fire and the echo of Vincent’s voice greet you.

“Stars and stones! He’s gone!” Holger says breathlessly. George takes a moment of looking absolutely befuddled before Vincent spots some tracks heading off to a wall where they end mysteriously.

“Skull coins! I should have known…” Vincent points to the various indentations. It seems you’ll need some coins to open this mysterious passage.

name: Pirates Start Arriving XV
itemsRequired: 8000x Honey; 7x Honeycomb; 8000x Mushroom Paste; 8000x Engine; 8000x Copper Wire; 8000x Potato Battery; 2500x Fruit Punch; 8000x Lantern; 8000x Linked Lantern; 8000x Steel Plate; 8000x Sunflower Oil; 8000x Corn Oil; 250x Ship in a Bottle
rewardItems: 4x Heart Container; 5x Bug Bag 01; 250x Drink Bundle
description:
The final coin inserted - the passage slides open whisper quiet - the cracks and mechanisms betray the look of stone to be a more modern contraption of some kind but camouflaged. It looks somehow familiar - Romuskan, but at the same time, not. Mysteries for another day, you hope.

The passage leads to a small dock behind a waterfall. There, you see a single boat moored. It looks like it’s seen better days, and you also see a shadow slipping through the waterfall. Buddy!

George, Vincent, and Holger pore over the boat, but it seems more like a skiff to your eyes on second inspection. It would hold all four of you, probably, with some repairs. You all get to repairs as quickly as possible, noting the shadow of Buddy’s boat slipping into the distance in a watery shimmer.

name: Pirates Start Arriving XVI
itemsRequired: 4000x Wine; 3000x Fruit Punch; 8000x Cabbage; 8000x Fishing Net; 10x Pair of Gold Boots; 1000x Red Berry Pie; 8000x Canoe; 100x Onion Soup; 100x Over The Moon; 8000x Iced Tea; 2500x Diamond; 8000x Orange Gecko; 1000x Strange Ring
description:
Boat repaired, your erstwhile crew punt into the open water. The water is strangely calm behind the waterfall, and with some of the poles you’ve made, you begin to note the water gets deeper and darker as you approach the waterfall. Shielding yourself from the falling water with your cloak, suddenly, the blue sky and sun arrive and the roar of a waterfall, water coursing from an unknown source is crashing behind you.

Buddy’s boat is barely visible, but with some looking glasses and quick thinking, Vincent steers the boat while you and George take oars and Holger deftly maneuvers the sails.

Mercifully after what seems like hours, George stops rowing, clearly winded. You stop rowing too, your arms and lungs burn ferociously. And yet, despite your efforts you are no closer to Buddy than when you started. Vincent scowls and directs the skiff towards land as he sees you’ve both stopped.

It’s clear you are going to need something with more power if you’re going to catch Buddy or head into any more open waters alone. Vincent looks towards you, “We’ll need some nautical help. I’m sure he was headed towards Pirate’s Cove, but if we’re going to approach there unnoticed, we’ll need the help of someone far more experienced. Someone’s gonna have to convince Ragvin to help us…”

name: Problems Start Arising I
description: Holger has been busy lately.  He seems less hungry and more stressed.  You’ve caught him at the Raptor Fight Club several times going over stacks of papers.  Maybe some potatoes, soap, and some claws for raptors would cheer him up?

name: Problems Start Arising II
itemsRequired: 8000x Potato; 8000x Soap; 8000x Wooden Sword; 8000x Gold Trout; 250x Raptor Claw
rewardItems: 1000x Arnold Palmer; 1000x Gold Feather; 250x Mega Cotton Seeds
description: Holger gives you a small smile and a nod before he’s back tending to various tasks.  You begin to inquire what has been bothering him when he points to Buddy who happens to be walking by and says tersely, “Ask him.”

name: Problems Start Arising III
itemsRequired: 80x Cabbage Stew; 80x Cat's Meow; 80x Onion Soup; 80x Mushroom Stew; 80x Concord Grape Pie; 80x Red Berry Pie; 800x Bone Broth; 8000x Spoon; 80x Breakfast Boost; 1250x Lima Bean; 8000x Polished Boot; 8000x Green Scarf; 8000x Green Cloak
rewardItems: 1x Mini Time Egg; 2000x Grab Bag 06; 1x Protein Bar
description: Buddy gives a wide-eyed expression of innocence but a stern glare from Holger quickly sobers Buddy up.  “Oh, all right, I guess we should talk about pirates…but first I need to finish this quick meal for the community center, oh and if you could help with some spare clothing supplies too?"

name: Problems Start Arising IV
itemsRequired: 8000x Gold Eggplant; 8000x Eggplant; 8000x Bottle Rocket; 8000x Explosive; 8000x Purple Twine
description: At the community center, the food has been prepared, ladled, and served to all who need it, Buddy sits in a chair in the corner, the various villagers swamp him with questions of his old adventures and stories about the evil mayor.  Buddy seems to entertain everyone with his easy smile and friendly personality.  He’s come a long way from when you met him early on in Redbrook.  As you inch closer, you hear him begin to recite a story about northern Bahltruvian eggplants.  He motions you closer and whispers, “Quick, I’m gonna need some special eggplants - and some special effects!"

name: Problems Start Arising V
itemsRequired: 8000x Green Cloak; 8000x Sturdy Shield; 8000x Sturdy Bow; 8000x Sturdy Sword; 8000x Lantern; 8000x Linked Lantern; 8000x Wooden Spear; 8000x Wooden Sword; 8000x Red Shield; 8000x Green Shield; 8000x Pitchfork
rewardItems: 25x Bomb; 100x Corn Prize Bag; 1500x Apple Cider; 5000x Orange Juice
description:
You return to the community center to see Buddy, sword drawn miming a swordfight, “You see, I had a secret too! I also am not left-handed!” Buddy dramatically swishes his cutlass and you toss one of the golden eggplants towards him. He throws the cutlass in the air, catches it with his right hand and deftly cleaves the eggplant in two, both sides falling to his feet dramatically. The crowd gasps and after a moment begin to clap excitedly. As a finale, all of the special effects go off and the crowd is at this point raucously cheering. He bows and smiles and steps away from the crowd.

“Nice timing! We’ve got to do a reconnoiter of the walls after the incident and then I can probably explain why Holger is so upset. “

name: Baited And Outsmarted IV
itemsRequired: 50x Frozen Pine; 100x Frozen Peas; 150x Frozen Corn; 250x Frozen Tomato
rewardItems: 2x Spooky Cookies; 1x Prune Juice; 200x Grab Bag 07; 200x Medium Chest 01; 200x Square Key
description: Perhaps your corn field has been overused, but this crop didn't seem to have much impact in Captain Logan's eyes, some strangely mangled corn cobs spill out of his sleeves unceremoniously.  He suggests something different.

name: Beaches Are Like Deserts I
rewardItems: 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 25x Grab Bag 07
description:
ROOMBA is going to the beach with Jill tomorrow. When Jill invited ROOMBA, she mentioned that she would like to build a sandcastle during their visit. Unfortunately, ROOMBA has no information on building sandcastles. Based on the data and experience ROOMBA has for castles, ROOMBA expects this to be a major undertaking. Since ROOMBA cannot provide expertise and guidance for the sandcastle architecture and construction, ROOMBA would like to be prepared to provide tools and labor. Will you help ROOMBA find the right tools for the job?

(Hint: The items requested are in Rosalie's Beach Tote which is available in the June Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: Beaches Are Like Deserts II
rewardItems: 1x Spades; 1x Thank You Card; 3x Bug Bag 01; 5x Void Bag 01; 3x Neigh; 3x Quandary Chowder
description: ROOMBA is unsure about the effectiveness of the tools you provided. Sandcastles are like castles, correct? Would you be willing to bring ROOMBA some tools that could handle a larger scale project, just in case?

name: Roots of Friendship
description:
“I’ve decided to build a house. It’s going to be right here on my campsite. I also bought some of the surrounding land so I can raise some goats.”

“I guess I’m also calling it quits as a mercenary. There’s just no time for that anymore. I’m down at the school every day, or I’m running down some treasure for Cecil. They want me to be the official dean of the school too.”

“I haven’t put down roots in a long time. It feels right though, you know? Redbrook just feels like home.”

name: Island of Friendship
description:
“Do you remember when I was trying to find news about my brother? He was lost at sea for a while. I finally got a clue about what happened when you brought that message in a bottle. It was from Norris. I recognized his sloppy scrawl immediately.”

“The storm that hit Redbrook was the same one that sunk the Feitserald and stranded her crew. Norris was among the fishing crew on the Feitserald. He was also one of the first to make it off the sinking ship and onto an empty island.”

“Funny enough, Norris threw that message in a bottle into the water shortly after he ended up on the island. Apparently, the island was littered with glass bottles and he always wanted to use one for a message. Following Norris, the whole crew took turns doing the same. They wrote messages, sealed them in the bottles, and lobbed them out to sea. They decided that every additional message in a bottle improved the likelihood of rescue. Who knows how many are still floating around out there. And it turned out they really only needed that one message.”

“Anyway, the important thing is that Norris made it home. After I got that message, I went straight to Captain Logan and he let me come along on the Zefurea to rescue the Feitserald crew.”

“The rescue was extremely unexciting. Captain Logan knew immediately where the Feitserald crew was. We got to the island without incident, and then ferried the stranded crew onto the Zefurea in a few trips. The only thing that made the rescue interesting was Norris giving me that mask he found on the island. Unfortunately, I dropped the mask and stepped on it as soon as we got back on board the Zefurea.”

“That’s what caused me all that trouble with trying to find the island again. Remember that adventure? Remember all the wild stuff that came after?”

“I’m glad that’s all behind us now. Wanna go fishing?”

name: Mysteries of Friendship
description:
“I’ve asked a lot of you since you came to Redbrook, haven’t I? I can’t explain why, but since you arrived a lot has happened. And you’re always there to help!”

“You know, it’s like some writers sat down and typed up these bonkers stories. Then, they woke Rys up, handed him the scripts, and, without consideration, Rys manifested them. And we’re being forced down this path of absolute ethereal chaos.”

“I know. I know. That’s highly improbable. But it sure feels that way!”

“Listen to me carrying on when I really just came by to say thanks.”

“I hope you like this bobblehead of yours truly. It was handcrafted in New England by a rabbit or hare of some sort. Honestly, I didn’t know they still made things in New England. Anyway, enjoy!”

name: Magic of Friendship
description:
“Promise me you’ll keep this a secret, ok? I discovered a new spell! I would call it a love spell, but it could very well be an anti-love spell in certain situations. Anyway, we’ll call it a love spell for now. Let me tell you how it works.”

“First, I have to focus my mind on something that I strongly and truly love. I usually think of grand parties, magic, or maybe Star (if he’s been very kind). Next, I attune the ether and the source materials. Then, I quietly whisper, ‘Clairamor’.”

“When the spell connects with the person that requested it, their mind calms and clears. Then, over the next several minutes thoughts bubble up. These thoughts are of those people, things, and places that the requester truly loves, even if it’s only the tiniest spark of love.”

“Now you can see how it might be an anti-love spell in certain situations. Clearly seeing those you truly love could really wreck a romance if someone isn’t there.”

“It was amazing discovering this spell! I hope you like it too. And I know why Star has never found it. It uses lemons as a source. Ha!”

name: Understanding of Friendship
description:
“ACCORDING TO MY LOGS AND MY EXPERIENCES IN CASTRUM ROMUSKA, ROBOTIC LIFEFORMS LIKE ME ARE NOT TYPICALLY CAPABLE OF CREATING AND MAINTAINING REAL FRIENDSHIPS. HOWEVER, IN THE ABSENCE OF OUR CREATORS AND MAINTAINERS, SOME OF US BEGAN TO TRY TO UNDERSTAND FRIENDSHIP. I WILL NOW LIST FOR YOU THE CRITERIA FOR FRIENDSHIP THAT I FOUND IN MY RESEARCH. ENGAGING PRESENTATION MODE…”

1. A friend enjoys spending time with you.
2. A friend listens to you.
3. A friend tries to understand you.
4. A friend helps you.
5. A friend doesn’t lie.
6. A friend cares about you.
7. A friend shares their life with you.

“YOU HAVE MET THE CRITERIA TO BE MY FRIEND AND I AM DOING MY BEST TO MEET THE CRITERIA TO BE YOUR FRIEND.”

name: Price of Friendship
description:
“Hello friend. Do you mind if I come in for a visit?”

…

“I’ve always been impressed by your efforts on this farm. This entire region is rather a humble plot of ground, but you’ve made the most of it.”

“Could I trouble you for a glass of milk?”

…

“That was a most excellent glass of milk. I could have easily mistaken it for some of the fine dairy of the western plains.”

“Why don’t you come sit with me while we talk? Make yourself at home.”

…

“That’s much nicer. Now we’re just old friends sitting and chatting.”

“I know you’re still helping that dragon... Don’t worry. I don’t hold it against you anymore. After some digging, I discovered that your dragon friend is not from any of the western dragon tribes that destroyed my village. Why should I spend my efforts on a cast off?”

“I was too zealous and hasty before. I made a mistake. I have a bigger plan now, and I’ll need your contributions to make it happen.”

name: Wrapped Up In Friendship
description:
Through groans and grunts, Mummy makes you understand that you are Mummy’s dearest friend.

Then, as you watch, Mummy slowly pulls something out from under layers and layers of wrap. At first, the object appears to be a small pile of mummy wrap, but as you look closer, you realize it’s a small bobblehead statue modeled after your friend Mummy. Through another series of groans and grunts, Mummy offers the bobblehead to you, to signify your eternal bond of friendship.

name: Ingredients of Friendship
description:
“My time in Redbrook has been so uplifting and rewarding. I’m glad I found this place. It has revived me. I didn’t know if I would ever feel whole again.”

“I also can’t thank you enough for all of your help and friendship. You are a friend like I’ve never found anywhere else.”

“Is Redbrook so wonderful because of you? Or is it you are wonderful because of Redbrook? Or, are the two of you ingredients in a perfect recipe working in harmony? It has to be the perfect recipe.”

“Now, I think I’m ready to go back to Ariathia, just for a visit. I need to resolve a few things that were boiling over when I left. Would you come with me? While I think I’m prepared, I would feel more assured with my best friend to support me.”

name: Words of Friendship
description:
“Where did the baby corn sleep?”

“…”

“In a corn crib! Ha!”

“I know. I know. That was a bit corny…”

“Don’t you love puns and classic jokes that play on words? I’ve always loved words and the power they possess. They can raise spirits as easily as they can destroy dreams. It’s all up to their master to decide how they will be employed.”

“I don’t know if I’ve ever told you about my aunt Lleue before, but she was a master wordsmith. She actually used to live here in Redbrook, before she passed. Throughout her life, she wrote poetry, music, and prose for all sorts of books, events, publications, and people. She was amazing. I miss her. Her wit and kindness were so refreshing.”

“After Lleue passed, a book was delivered to my house. It was written in my aunt’s hand! The book claims that there are all sorts of secrets underneath the Redbrook area. For years, I’ve searched to find some of those secrets. I found a few here and there. However, since you moved to the area, many more have been discovered, and you are often involved somehow. It’s strange. Maybe it’s a coincidence. Maybe there’s something special about you. Ha! I said maybe there’s something special about you. There’s no maybe about it. You certainly are someone special, my friend.”

“I look forward to many more of Redbrook’s secrets being revealed. Maybe you can help me sometime going through my aunt’s book of secrets.”

name: Kernel of Friendship
description:
“The other day I realized that my life has gotten better since you moved here. I was working so hard, for such a long time to be a farmer, even though I didn’t really want to be a farmer. Then, you came along and helped me meet my orders for various crops. You supplied me with more corn than I care to count. That has kept me afloat long enough to find my true passion. I just want to build extraordinary machines! And now I have! My farm almost runs itself these days.”

“I guess I did become a farmer after all. Ha!”

“You were also there when ROOMBA and FR4NK came into my life. We journeyed to Jundland Desert! I desperately want to go back there. I suspect there’s so much more for us to discover, and ROOMBA and FR4NK hint that there are new friends to make. ROOMBA and FR4NK have incredible tales.”

“You are always there for me.”

“If I plan a trip for all of us to Jundland, will you come with me?”

name: Cookies of Friendship
description:
“I’m pretty sure Borgen is leaving things out for me, when I break into his wagon now. It almost takes the fun out of breaking in and taking stuff. Like today, there was a cookie just sitting on a plate right by the door. Who puts a cookie on a plate on the floor right by the door? Now I feel like I need to get something for Borgen to say thanks. It was a really good cookie.”

“Speaking of that cookie, I almost brought it over for you. When I saw it, I immediately thought it would be something you might like. I even set it aside with the intent to bring it to your house on my way home. Then, I was finishing up taking a few odds and ends from Borgen’s pantry, and snacking on a few as I browsed. Without thinking, I grabbed the cookie as I was leaving and it sort of got caught up in my general snacking. Sorry about that. The next cookie Borgen leaves out for me is all yours.”

name: Music of Friendship
description:
“Thanks for coming to paint with me today. Before you go, would you like to hear a new song I wrote? I need your help with it. It needs something, but I can’t quite figure out what.”

In my dream last night
My friend stopped by a while
We laughed and talked and cried
Like nothing changed at all

I startled from my sleep
My mind knew it was false
My friend is lo-ong gone
And dreams are all I’ve got

I thought more on my dream
It wasn’t really wrong
Though my old friend is gone
I still have all I need

Friends will come and go
But friends are like a song
I may lose the tune
But I’ll still sing along

I’ll still sing along
I’ll still sing along
Oh oh oh ohhhh
I’ll still sing along

name: Dragon of Friendship
description:
“You are the first human, that is not Beatrix, to become such an integral part of my life. Though I often notice you look up at me in awe, it is I that am truly in awe of you. I am amazed at your willingness and ability to accept me. Most humans bear an almost innate distrust and dislike for any dragon. They are certainly afraid of us too. But you are not. Even from my first manifestation in your presence, you simply accepted what was happening and helped. I don’t quite understand how you do it.”

“I suppose that is a very loquacious way of saying thank you for being my friend.”

name: Comfort of Friendship
description:
*yawns*

“I forget sometimes that you can understand me with your ring. That’s very handy. Does it work with squirrels?”

*yaawwwns*

“Before I take my nap, I have to thank you for your help in my quest to eat better, and to take better care of health. It doesn’t come naturally to me.”

*yawwwwwns*

“I really couldn’t do it without your help. Now I think I’m in better shape today than I ever have been.”

*yawns*

“Thanks again…”

Zzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzz

name: GOAT of Friendship
description:
“you’re no woodland creature, my friend, but i think you’re the best human in and around Redbrook. you might even be better than some dragons, well, probably not Geist, but she’s one of the best. did you see her that time she and Bea were made queens over the human tribes? it was hilarious! those humans were so scared. i was just a kid back then, not a goat kid, a rabbit kid. some say I’ve always been the GOAT though.”

“anyway, do you think i could babysit your carrots while you’re at dancing lessons?”

name: Perils of Friendship
description:
My dearest {player},

I’m sorry that I could not deliver this letter and small gift directly to you. I expected to be home by now, but great obstacles currently stand in the way of my return. Hopefully, Rosalie was able to escape the guards, and, if you’re reading this, she has made it home to Redbrook.

I thank my great equine ancestors that Rosalie came with me. I could not have found the faerie cursebreaker without her. Even together, it took every bit of speed, wit, and magic the two of us could muster to get through Eebeeeebee’s labyrinth. As you can probably imagine, Eebeeeebee was exceptionally displeased by our success! All of the guards protecting the rest of Eebeeeebee’s treasures were immediately dispatched to stop us from escaping. Still, we almost made it clear of that great legion.

Alas, they will soon be upon us. In my estimation, we have one chance at getting the cursebreaker home. Rosalie has just enough feathers left to transport herself halfway home, if I can get her to the edge of Eebeeeebee’s power. Then, Rosalie can easily make her way to Redbrook. I will do my best to avoid capture and also make my way home, as quickly as I can. Don’t fret about me.

I do hope the cursebreaker works and Lucky Lady is completely recovered. However, if the cursebreaker fails, I must impose upon you to proceed with the fallback plan. Don’t waste any efforts to come find me, help my Lucky Lady. I beg you. I cannot bear for her to suffer anymore because of me.

I would have thoroughly enjoyed watching you open the small gift accompanying this letter. I do hope you love it!

Your faithful friend,

Charles Horsington III

name: History of Friendship
description:
“The Langstaff family has lived around this part of T’rah since before the Dragon War. Somehow, we have always survived. After the Dragon War, my ancestors hid their powers in an attempt to blend in and improve their chances of survival. They successfully continued this tactic for hundreds of years, right up through the destruction of Jundland. Then, I continued to try to hide my powers when I came to Redbrook as the last of the Langstaffs.”

“What was it all for? If the Langstaff family ends with me, what was the point of hiding our powers behind technology in Castrum Romuska, or joining the human alliance and fighting the dragons, or anything else the Langstaffs accomplished?”

“No. I will not be the end. I will be the bridge to a new day for the Langstaff family. I will no longer hide my powers or leave the care of Redbrook to others. You, my friends of Redbrook, will be my family now, and I will make the Langstaff name something you can be proud to always remember.”

name: Depths of Friendship
description:
”I’ve been a truly poor friend for all of my time in this Redbrook. There I go again. It should be my Redbrook too.”

“I just got so caught up in wanting to get home. It hurt. Actually, more than anything, I wanted to get back to Sarafina. I spiraled and spiraled downward and downward. I just couldn’t think about anything but getting back to her.”

“I appreciate that you never gave up on me when I was giving up on myself.”

“Then, I had a new hope with Thomas and the boat. But when Ragvin and his crew stranded us, I thought it was all over. I nearly spiraled again, but Thomas kept me going. And then you were there with our friends! You all came to rescue us!”

“Don’t fret that we didn’t end up needing the rescue. Your efforts are a credit to you anyway.”

“I know that my coming now, in the fair weather of life, may seem a bit hollow for a claim to true friendship. I assure you it’s not. I can finally breathe again. I can finally think clearly. Since Sarafina found me, I feel whole again. Now, I can really see all that you have done for me, and I thank you for all of it.”

name: Buddy of Friendship
description:
Friendship is distilled,
Concentrated in Buddy.
He is your best friend!

name: Value of Friendship
description:
“I’m sure you’ve wondered what I’m doing with all of these ancient coins. Eventually, everyone asks. My usual answer is that I have found value in them that other folks don’t see. That’s good enough for most people, but I’m sure you’re still curious.”

“I’m not prone to sharing this sort of information, usually, but I’ve come to trust you. Maybe I even rely on you a bit, especially for ancient coins. So, I guess you deserve to know a little of my dealings.”

“Most of my transactions are pretty mundane. I use the ancient coins to buy things in lands that remember their value. However, that’s also how I come by some of my more odd and wonderful items. Still, even with the strange and unusual, it’s all very safe and routine business.”

“Lately, a growing share of my coins are going to an odd project. The exchanges started simply. A professor in the west wanted ancient coins for a particular alloy they contain. I started supplying him. The transactions were quick with little to no chatter. Then, one day the professor lingered. He asked if I could get him other items along with the ancient coins. I assured him that I was very resourceful, if the price was right.”

“Now the professor has a new list of items every time I visit the west. He still wants ancient coins too. I love all of this business, but there’s something unsettling about it. Then, there’s the alloy he’s after. I’ve recently heard dangerous tales about it. I may need your assistance investigating what’s going on. Will you go with me the next time I go to the west?”

name: Queen Bea of Friendship
description:
“Did I ever tell you about the time that Geist and I ruled a kingdom?”

“After the Dragon War, Geist and I ran away for a long time. We lived a quiet life by the sea. We mourned. Our losses were so great. Everyone we ever knew was gone. They all destroyed each other. It was devastating, but as we mourned together, we found comfort. Our shared tears began to heal us. So, we cried a lot. We explored our new home, and we ate loads of fish. Our lives continued that way for many leaves and likely some branches.”

“Eventually, we both got curious to see what had become of the lands we once knew. Geist kindly flew us first to the land that was once my home. As we passed overhead, we saw groups of men fighting each other. Once more, war was raging here. But, as Geist descended from the clouds, the men stopped fighting and most of them ran away.”

“A few of the warriors, that were fighting moments before, were now frozen in awe of Geist’s majesty. They stared up at her until she suddenly relinquished the manifestation to me. When they saw me standing on the ground where a dragon was a moment before, they fell down on their knees and hid their faces in the grass. I was shocked and had no idea what to do. While I was conferring with Geist, some of the warriors that ran away returned and fell down with their comrades. The count of prostrate warriors continued to grow while Geist and I decided what to do.”

“We decided to speak to them. I spoke up in a commanding voice and said, ‘Who is in charge here?’ No one moved. I tried the same words twice more. Then, Geist used a little universal communication spell and I spoke again. This time, one of the warriors stood, but kept his head bowed.”

“I asked the standing warrior why they were fighting. He told me of the wrongs that were committed by the other groups of warriors that were still gathering and kneeling around me. I don’t know what came over me as I listened, but I suddenly told the man to stop. Then, I told all the men to stop fighting. ‘No more!’ I said, and Geist cast a great explosion in the sky.”

“Everyone was very still for a time. Then, the warrior that was standing said, ‘Yes, my queen.’ and put his hand on his heart. Another warrior rose and said the same and covered his heart. Then, another warrior did the same, and another and another, until they were all standing, heads bowed, hands over hearts.”

“Geist whispered to me, ‘Maybe we can help them.’”

“And we did, for a very long time, but I’ll save that story for your next visit. Now tell me about how you ended up in Redbrook…”

name: Cabbages of Friendship
description:
“I came up with the perfect idea! It’s the next great step for Cabbage Corporation! It’s a park with rides and food and fun, and it’s all cabbage and cantaloupe themed. I think I’m going to call it Cabbage and Cantaloupe Crossings. Doesn’t that sound exciting and adventurous?”

“If you’ll help me, I know we can make this the greatest attraction Redbrook has ever seen. Otherwise, I don’t know if Cabbage Corporation can do it without you. What do you say? Are you with me for another venture with my cabbages?”

name: Core of Friendship
description:
"Well, I’ll be! I’ve done found a path right to the core! This here’s gonna be the biggest dang minin’ project ever undertook, an' we’re gonna need a heapin' load o' explosives, I tell ya. Gonna need a brand-new kinda pickaxe too. This is some uncharted territory, ya hear? So… you ready fer this?

"Come find me when ya got yer wits about ya. I’ll go on an' get us a list of all the stuff we’re gonna need."

name: Baited And Outsmarted II
rewardItems: 150x Large Chest 02; 175x Treasure Key; 2x Lovely Cookies
description:
Captain Logan believes these are showing some significant promise in shipping and spoilage improvements, his fingers seem to be dripping some kind of half frozen gooey pine resin. Or do they seem burnt?

He suggests maybe something to do with the shape and flavor profile? Captain Logan isn't a man of science, but maybe a different frozen crop could help!

name: 750,000 Farmers I
description:
Rosalie can’t believe it. Redbrook has hit another enormous milestone! There are now over 750,000 farmers in the Redbrook area!

To celebrate, Rosalie is distributing celebration gifts. She hopes you like yours!

name: 750,000 Farmers II
rewardItems: 50x Fishing Net; 50x Apple Cider; 5x Void Bag 01; 50x Event Token
description: Rosalie is giving a few extra gifts to residents that have lived here a little longer. You’ve helped Redbrook grow! Thanks for being a part of our wonderful community!

name: 750,000 Farmers III
rewardItems: 50x Arnold Palmer; 50x Large Net; 10x Void Bag 01; 75x Event Token
description: You’ve probably been here long enough to see some of Redbrook’s growing pains. You deserve a little something extra!

name: 750,000 Farmers IV
rewardItems: 50x Grab Bag 07; 50x Large Chest 03; 15x Void Bag 01; 100x Event Token
description: Rosalie would like to give you a few more gifts. You’ve contributed a lot to the community, and still have a lot to give.

name: 750,000 Farmers V
rewardItems: 50x Fruit Punch; 5x Corn Prize Bag; 20x Void Bag 01; 125x Event Token
description: Rosalie wants you to have a few more gifts!

name: 750,000 Farmers VI
rewardItems: 50x Raptor Claw; 5x Lemon Cream Pie; 25x Void Bag 01; 150x Event Token
description: Redbrook wouldn’t be as great as it is without you! You need a few more gifts.

name: 750,000 Farmers VII
rewardItems: 1x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Borgen Buck; 1x Piece of Heart; 1x Crunchy Omelette; 1x Thank You Card; 1x Buddy Doll; 175x Event Token
description: You’re incredible! Do you feel like an old timer yet? Have some more gifts!

name: 750,000 Farmers VIII
rewardItems: 1x Friendship Bag 01; 200x Black Truffle; 1x Clawed Card; 1x Buddy Loves You Card; 1x You Rock Card; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 200x Event Token
description: Rosalie has a few last gifts for you. She appreciates you and all you’ve done to make Redbrook a wonderful home. Your hard work and dedication have brought you a long way. Here’s to even more success down the road!

name: Baited And Outsmarted I
rewardItems: 5x Void Bag 01; 50x Peach; 100x Orange Juice; 1x Prune Juice
description: The biggest problem with exporting goods has always been waste and spoilage.  Captain Logan heard about your amazing frozen crops and has an idea...

name: Baited And Outsmarted III
itemsRequired: 50x Frozen Pine; 100x Frozen Peas; 150x Frozen Corn
rewardItems: 2x Happy Cookies; 25x Void Bag 01; 200x Apple Cider; 200x Grapes; 1x Prune Juice
description: Okay.  The peas were far too small, but they radiated cold really well but left Captain Logan feeling unfulfilled.  Maybe a different frozen crop?

name: Baited And Outsmarted V
rewardItems: 32x Cabbage Stew; 250x Grab Bag 03; 400x Arnold Palmer
description: Oh my, these worked very well.  But they were just plain too round.  And delectable.  The crew ate them up entirely! Captain Logan suggests something with a larger form factor will do just the thing.

name: Baited And Outsmarted VI
itemsRequired: 50x Frozen Pine; 100x Frozen Peas; 150x Frozen Corn; 500x Frozen Tomato; 500x Frozen Radish
rewardItems: 2000x Large Net; 1x Cranberry Juice; 500x Apple Cider
description: Captain Logan looks at you very slyly, and you realize it looks like he's been sampling some of the food as you've served it.  He requests one last batch of items, and you notice he hasn't been going to the docks after each shipment, the snow tracks go in another direction...

name: Monster Hunter VII
description: As you leave, you see a strange glow on the ground.  You pocket it quickly, before Geist notices.  You're not sure why.

name: Baited And Outsmarted VII
itemsRequired: 10000x Potato; 25x Gold Potato; 250x Cooked Fish; 750x Frozen Radish; 500x Frozen Tomato
rewardItems: 10000x Pine Board; 10000x Apple Cider; 25x Lemon Cream Pie; 2x Prune Juice
description:
It was Holger all along! You should have known. Drat!

Well, sometimes a man's just gotta eat, you guess.

He thanks you for all the delicious frozen foods and asks for one last thing.

name: Red Diamond Three of a Kind I
rewardItems: 50x Arnold Palmer; 80x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 20x Piñata Whop Stick; 5x 4th Birthday Card; 2x Lemon Seltzer; 1x Diamonds
questline: Red Diamond Three of a Kind
description: After Holger finished smoking the red diamond fish for Cecil and himself, he ate his entire supply of smoked fish. He was very tempted to eat Cecil’s too, but he decided instead to see if you could bring him more red diamond fish to smoke. They’re tasty!

name: Red Diamond Three of a Kind II
rewardItems: 50x Arnold Palmer; 80x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 20x Piñata Whop Stick; 5x 4th Birthday Card; 2x Lemon Seltzer; 1x Diamonds; 3x Cutlass; 25x Grab Bag 07
questline: Red Diamond Three of a Kind
description: That was great, but Holger needs more!

name: Red Diamond Three of a Kind III
rewardItems: 50x Arnold Palmer; 80x Large Net; 100x Orange Juice; 20x Piñata Whop Stick; 5x 4th Birthday Card; 2x Lemon Seltzer; 1x Diamonds; 1x Egg of Chicken; 1x Raptor Egg
questline: Red Diamond Three of a Kind
description: Holger has really enjoyed these smoked fish, but he would like a few more. He promises that will be all for now. As usual, Holger deeply appreciates your assistance with filling his belly.

name: Red Diamond Two Pair I
rewardItems: 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Large Net; 250x Orange Juice; 40x Piñata Whop Stick; 10x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 5x Bug Bag 01; 1x Prune Juice; 5x Breakfast Boost
description: To celebrate the red diamond run, Thomas would like to gift a large haul of red diamond fish to Captain Thomas. He just has a feeling that Captain Thomas would love some red diamond fish. Will you help Thomas gather a large haul of fish?

name: Red Diamond Two Pair II
rewardItems: 100x Arnold Palmer; 100x Large Net; 250x Orange Juice; 40x Piñata Whop Stick; 10x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Lovely Cookies; 5x Breakfast Boost
description: To celebrate the red diamond run, Captain Thomas would like to gift a large haul of red diamond fish to Thomas. It’s customary on his world to catch a big haul for a friend in the middle of the red diamond run. Also, he just has a feeling that Thomas would love some red diamond fish. Unfortunately, Captain Thomas is stretched a little thin filling his regular orders of fish. Will you help Captain Thomas gather a large haul for Thomas?

name: Party Corn I
itemsRequired: 25x Strawberry Good Goods; 25x B for Buddies; 25x Beary Squishies; 25x Candy
description: ROOMBA would like to study a variety of different candies to see if it would be possible to make a sweetener from corn that could be used to make candy and other human-loved sweet treats. Will you provide ROOMBA with an assortment of candy to study?

name: Party Corn II
description: To help with the research, will you bring ROOMBA some corn for experimenting and for energy?

name: Red Diamond Full House I
rewardItems: 200x Apple Cider; 200x Large Net; 500x Orange Juice; 80x Piñata Whop Stick; 20x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1x Protein Bar; 50x Void Bag 01; 50x Cabbage Stew; 50x Sea Pincher Special
description: Beatrix knows that Geist is dying to eat some red diamond fish, but she’s afraid to ask for any because it’s such a large task. And Geist obviously can’t go and do it herself without stirring up a panic. Would you be willing to help? Geist will need a lot of red diamond fish.

name: Red Diamond Full House II
rewardItems: 200x Apple Cider; 200x Large Net; 500x Orange Juice; 80x Piñata Whop Stick; 20x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 50x Lemon Cream Pie; 100x Large Chest 01; 50x Fruit Punch; 50x Rubber Duckie
description:
Geist loved the red diamond fish you brought!

She hates to ask more of you, but would you be willing to bring her some more red diamond fish? Please!

name: Red Diamond Four of a Kind I
rewardItems: 400x Apple Cider; 400x Large Net; 1000x Orange Juice; 160x Piñata Whop Stick; 40x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1x Pumpkin Juice
questline: Red Diamond Four of a Kind
description: Holger is back and he’s still very, very hungry. He would appreciate more red diamond fish and wood for his smoker.

name: Red Diamond Four of a Kind II
itemsRequired: 600x Apple; 600x Bacon; 600x Beet; 600x Broccoli; 600x Butter; 600x Cabbage; 600x Carrot; 600x Cheese; 600x Corn; 600x Cucumber; 600x Eggplant; 600x Eggs; 600x Gold Peppers; 600x Grapes; 600x Herbs; 600x Leek; 600x Lemon; 600x Mayonnaise
rewardItems: 400x Apple Cider; 400x Large Net; 1000x Orange Juice; 160x Piñata Whop Stick; 40x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 100x Raptor Claw; 5x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Spooky Pie
questline: Red Diamond Four of a Kind
description: Do you know what would go really well with smoked red diamond fish? Whatever you can think of, Holger needs it. He’s still very, very, very hungry.

name: Red Diamond Four of a Kind III
rewardItems: 400x Apple Cider; 400x Large Net; 1000x Orange Juice; 160x Piñata Whop Stick; 40x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1x Pumpkin Juice
questline: Red Diamond Four of a Kind
description: This is great, but Holger needs more smoked red diamond fish, if you don’t mind.

name: Red Diamond Four of a Kind IV
itemsRequired: 600x Milk; 600x Mushroom; 600x Onion; 600x Peas; 600x Peppers; 600x Potato; 600x Pumpkin; 600x Radish; 600x Red Berries; 600x Rice; 600x Salt; 600x Shrimp; 600x Steak; 600x Tomato; 600x Wine
rewardItems: 400x Apple Cider; 400x Large Net; 1000x Orange Juice; 160x Piñata Whop Stick; 40x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 100x Raptor Claw; 5x Borgen Bag 01; 1x Spooky Pie
questline: Red Diamond Four of a Kind
description: Holger needs more things to eat with his smoked fish. He’s still very, very, very, very hungry.

name: Red Diamond Straight Flush I
rewardItems: 350x Apple Cider; 350x Large Net; 950x Orange Juice; 140x Piñata Whop Stick; 35x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1000x Small Screw
description: FR4NK would like to gather a large supply of red diamond fish and distribute some to everyone in town. This would be an excellent opportunity to make sure everyone is enjoying the celebration, even if they’re not very good at fishing. Will you help FR4NK with this project?

name: Red Diamond Straight Flush II
rewardItems: 350x Apple Cider; 350x Large Net; 950x Orange Juice; 140x Piñata Whop Stick; 35x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1000x Small Screw
description: FR4NK appreciates your generous help. If you keep bringing red diamond fish, FR4NK will keep distributing them.

name: Red Diamond Straight Flush III
rewardItems: 350x Apple Cider; 350x Large Net; 950x Orange Juice; 140x Piñata Whop Stick; 35x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1000x Small Screw
description: FR4NK is ready for the next load, as soon as you’re ready.

name: Red Diamond Straight Flush IV
rewardItems: 350x Apple Cider; 350x Large Net; 950x Orange Juice; 140x Piñata Whop Stick; 35x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1000x Small Screw
description: This is wonderful! FR4NK would like to keep going and share more red diamond fish.

name: Red Diamond Straight Flush V
rewardItems: 350x Apple Cider; 350x Large Net; 950x Orange Juice; 140x Piñata Whop Stick; 35x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1000x Small Screw; 1x Circuit Breaker Belt; 1x Refined Corn Quartz; 1x Mini Time Egg
description: FR4NK would very much appreciate your help with one more load of red diamond fish. There are still so many people that have not yet enjoyed the fruits of this celebration.

name: Red Diamond Royal Flush I
rewardItems: 700x Apple Cider; 200x Piñata Whop Stick; 50x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1000x White Truffle; 1000x Caterpillar; 1000x Acorn Butter; 100x Mushroom Stew
description: Captain Logan needs a hand, if you’re up for doing some fishing. He received an extremely large order for red diamond fish from a Mr. Gloher, via a messenger. Unfortunately, the order is too large for Captain Logan’s crew to fill with all of their other work going on right now. Will you help catch some red diamond fish to fill Mr. Gloher’s order? We’ll also need some glacierstones to keep these fish fresh until we get the entire order together.

name: Red Diamond Royal Flush II
rewardItems: 700x Apple Cider; 200x Piñata Whop Stick; 50x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1000x Black Truffle; 1000x Spider; 100x Breakfast Boost
description: Keep the fish coming! This order still has a long way to go.

name: Red Diamond Royal Flush III
rewardItems: 700x Apple Cider; 200x Piñata Whop Stick; 50x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1x Bananas; 100x Bag of Spring Seeds; 1x Buddy Doll; 2x Prune Juice
description: I received another message from Mr. Gloher asking if we could provide wood to smoke the fish from his order too. In my response, I politely informed Mr. Gloher that we would not be able to fill that request because we focus on fishing and transport. However, I also informed him that we are on track to get his fish to him soon. So, let’s finish this order as quickly as we can.

name: Red Diamond Royal Flush IV
rewardItems: 700x Apple Cider; 200x Piñata Whop Stick; 50x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1x Apple Pie; 100x Fruit Punch; 50x Cabbage Stew; 500x Popcorn; 1000x Rice; 100x Void Bag 01
description: We’re almost there! Thank you much for your help!

name: Red Diamond Royal Flush V
rewardItems: 700x Apple Cider; 200x Piñata Whop Stick; 50x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1000x Corn Oil; 4x Egg of Chicken
description: This is it. One more load of red diamond fish should do it! Thanks again for all the help.

name: Red Diamond Wild
rewardItems: 2000x Apple Cider; 200x Piñata Whop Stick; 50x 4th Birthday Card; 1x Diamonds; 1x Clubs; 1x Hearts; 1x Spades; 2x Cranberry Juice; 10000x Large Net
description: Mr. Hol-, er, actually Mr. Gloher needs more red diamond fish, as many as you can possibly find. He’s having a party…yeah, a big party. A huge party! Please help him prepare for his huge smoked red diamond fish party.

name: Buddy Doll Mixup
description: Lorn poured his coffee and went out to enjoy the morning. A box of Buddy Dolls sat on his porch, left by some mysterious benefactor. He’s not sure who left them, but he’s starting to suspect Buddy himself. He doesn’t need them, but maybe you do?

name: A Little Cheer III
description: For your generosity and kindness, Vincent wanted to give you one more gift. It’s a little something you can use to bring more cheer into the world. Enjoy!

name: Catch Them All II
description: Tracking the creature has been tough, but while searching the forest, you found a bunch of apples that had been burnt to a crisp, and realize it could be the creature. Maybe they like apples? Cecil is quite excited by this revelation.

name: Friday the 13th IV
itemsRequired: 77x Acorn; 77x Prickly Pear; 77x Salt; 77x Step Ladder
rewardItems: 77x 4-leaf Clover; 7x Acorn Pie; 7x Grab Bag 07; 7x Skull Coin; 7x Medium Chest 03
description: frank heard acorns were lucky.  and pears, strangely enough. he would feel a lot safer if you brought a few ladders too.  and some salt.  luck is weird.

name: Catch Them All I
description:
Cecil has loved collecting things for many years. Some might even say 30 years.

He heard about a creature that collects lightning by holding its tail in the air and desperately wants one. Will you help him be the very best?

name: Catch Them All III
description:
On your next trek to the forest, you find the creature in a clearing taking a nap. Your hair stands on end with the electrical energy in the area. As you take a step towards it, the creature jolts awake and yells

“CHAPIKUUUUU!”

Lightning strikes all around you, and after a brief moment it falls fast asleep again. Cecil mutters something behind you, and in his hand appears two perfect replicas of the creature. He hands one to you and says “It’s too cute and dangerous to be captive, but we may as well celebrate this unique creature anyways!”

name: Drink in the Green I
rewardItems: 5x Breakfast Boost; 5x Fruit Punch; 1x Gold Seed Bag 01; 5x Bag of Spring Seeds; 1x Apple Turnover
description: Mariya heard that you have started making shamrock milk. She would love to try it! Would you be interested in an exchange of foodstuffs?

name: Drink in the Green II
rewardItems: 10x Bag of Spring Seeds; 3x Fish and Chips; 3x Lemon Cream Pie; 25x Apple Cider; 1x Baba Cola
description:
The shamrock milk is surprisingly good! It has just the right sweetness and a delightful hint of legume. Mariya likes it!

Now, Mariya has some ideas for recipes she might try it in, especially to add some green in celebration of spring. Will you bring her some more shamrock milk to use in a few culinary experiments?

name: Drink in the Green III
rewardItems: 10x Bag of Spring Seeds; 50x Grab Bag 07; 2x Prune Juice; 5x Acorn Pie; 5x Hickory Omelette; 5x Mushroom Stew; 1x Borgen Buck; 3x Egg of Chicken
description: Mariya’s first experiments worked out pretty well, but she has some ideas that may be even better. Will you bring her some more shamrock milk and a few other ingredients she needs?

name: Drink in the Green IV
itemsRequired: 50x Shamrock Milk; 5x Brown Sugar; 50x Eggs; 100x Butter; 5x White Sugar; 10x Peach
rewardItems: 25x Bag of Spring Seeds; 10x Peach Juice; 9x Egg of Tree
description:
That turned out really well! Mariya made a variation on a red berry pie topped with a green whipped cream.

Now, Mariya would like to make a peach cobbler with some shamrock milk touches. Will you help her out with a few ingredients and some more shamrock milk?

name: Drink in the Green V
itemsRequired: 100x Shamrock Milk; 200x Eggs; 100x Butter; 5x White Sugar; 200x Flour
rewardItems: 25x Bag of Spring Seeds; 1x Happy Cookies; 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Pumpkin Juice
description: The peach cobbler was wonderful, but it felt more like summer than spring. Fortunately, Mariya has another idea that should taste like all the wonders of spring in one delicious dessert. Are you up for making more shamrock milk, and helping Mariya with a few other ingredients?

name: Drink in the Green VI
itemsRequired: 150x Shamrock Milk; 400x Eggs; 200x Butter; 10x White Sugar; 400x Flour
rewardItems: 25x Bag of Spring Seeds; 1x Gold Boot; 500x Gold Leaf; 50x Grab Bag 06; 1x Picnic Basket 01; 1x Protein Bar
description: Shamrock egg custard pie is perfect for spring! It tastes so fresh and sweet and there are wonderful floral and spice notes. Mariya can’t wait for everyone to try it. Will you help her make more pies to share?

name: Drink in the Green VII
itemsRequired: 200x Shamrock Milk; 800x Eggs; 400x Butter; 20x White Sugar; 800x Flour
rewardItems: 25x Bag of Spring Seeds; 1x Apple Pie; 10x Maverick Chip; 18x Egg of Tree; 1x Travel Voucher
description: Mariya needs more ingredients! The pies are going fast, and she sees Holger coming. Will you help her make one more batch of pies to share? Mariya really appreciates all of your help.

name: Probably Nothing to Worry About
description: Hey farmer.. uhhh.. some weird hole in the ground popped up.. here’s 100 corn. Can you go see if anything happens when you toss the corn in?

name: A Little Gardening III
description:
Thanks to your help, George’s sprouts are growing great!

However, yesterday George moved some of his seedlings to a larger raised garden box. While he was digging up a load of fill dirt for the raised box, he hit something with his shovel. Out of curiosity, he continued to dig around it until he could pull it free from the ground. It’s some sort of staff! And it looks pretty dangerous to George! Will you take it and keep it safe? Maybe you could even get someone to check it out and make sure it’s not dangerous.

name: Take a Day Off
description: Jill found these vouchers on the ground near her farm.  Since she never takes a day off, she has no need for these.  Take them and use them when you need a break.

name: Brawl All Day II
itemsRequired: 1x Steak; 10x Potato; 10x Peppers; 10x Trout; 10x Onion; 10x Watermelon; 10x Mushroom; 5x Bird Egg
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 1x Event Key; 50x Event Token; 1x Spades; 1x Buddy Doll; 3x Unknown(1455)
description:
Well, that packed a little more punch than Borgen expected…

Holger dodged the initial shot, but the explosion knocked him clean off his feet and shattered his shield. He seems to be ok, but Borgen feels terrible. That was a little too much.

Will you bring Borgen some of Holger’s favorite foods to help make it up to Holger for the big hit?

name: A Pinata Trouble II
rewardItems: 20x Large Net; 5x Piñata; 5x Mushroom Stew; 200x Orange Juice; 1x Protein Bar; 1x Unknown(1498); 1x Unknown(1492)
description: “Star asked me to lead a reconnaissance team to find out everything we can about the piñatas. We need to get a good picture of what they’re up to and what kind of numbers they’re working with. Will you help me arm my team?”

name: Bowling for Goldie VI
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Orb; 1x Seaweed; 10x Aquamarine; 10x Lemon Quartz; 20x Stone
description: Thank goodness! There was a mix-up at the ring toss and Borgen has Holger's goldfish. Can you make Borgen a bowl?

name: Crates Unlocked for Buddy's Enrichment II
itemsRequired: 250x Sturdy Box; 50x Purple Flower; 50x Bone; 50x Bucket; 50x Largemouth Bass; 50x Cucumber; 50x Peppers
description:
"Opening those crates was fun, but I really get more enjoyment out of finding things inside them..."

Can you make a few more crates and put some fun things inside them for Buddy to find?

name: Steam Powered 2: Episode 1
description:
"The steam machine has been successfully mounted, however, we require additional steam valves to ensure the pressure on the base mounting plate never exceeds 3.14159 PSI. The relation to the first digits of pi are purely coincidental. If I may—the pi is a lie."

"This seems like a good moment to engage in workplace small talk. Query: Did you know my magna core is based on a previous design involving multiple emotion cores? That design was scrapped after an unfortunate event involving my predecessor, her morality core, and an incinerator."

name: Steam Powered III
description:
“Now that my catalyst is in place, I need to move on to step two. Do you remember a few years ago when we opened up that apple store and apple farmers started moving in from all over? Turns out they were onto something. Apples contain exactly the right ratio of glucose and cellulose compounds I needed to stabilize the mounting platform. Can you bring me a few baskets?”

"The cake is starting to smell delicious!"

name: Hare Today, Gone Tomorrow
rewardItems: 3x Sea Pincher Special; 3x Shrimp-a-Plenty; 3x Cat's Meow; 3x Mushroom Stew; 1x Unknown(1443); 1x Diamonds
description:
The Emerald Beach is not very close to the Misty Forest. It would have been quicker to take a boat, but when have you ever done things the easy way?

frank is busy amusing himself by watching the sea turtles lay their eggs.

"you know, you could lay your eggs in literally any sand in the world. you have no reason to come back here every summer just for this."

The turtle nearest him ignores him.

"so here's the deal. first, i'm gonna need another bag of carrots. i don't make the rules, that's just how it is. second, we need to interrogate these turtles."

This is starting to sound oddly familiar... Didn't Rosalie just... Nevermind. You don't have time to think about it right now. You just start grabbing the nearest turtles you can get your hands on.

name: Crates Unlocked for Buddy's Enrichment IV
description:
Buddy comes up to you carrying a rather strange crate. It looks heavy and it has pink hearts on all sides. Strangely, you feel more peaceful when you're near it.

"Hey! Do you still have that old crowbar? I need it for something!"

name: Bowling for Goldie II
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Orb; 1x Seaweed; 10x Aquamarine; 10x Lemon Quartz; 20x Stone
description: Looks like Beatrix also won a goldfish at the school fair and the pet store is still sold out. Can you make another bowl for Beatrix?

name: Frankly Speaking
description:
"pssst!"

You look around, but don't see anything unusual.

"hey! you! down here! under the tree!"

You turn your head to the sound and see a familiar blue face and ears. Frank is sitt—"that's frank!"

...You're not quite sure how he knew you had capitalized his name in your own thoughts, but it's probably best not to think about it too hard. At any rate, frank is sitting at the base of an apple tree. A pile of carrot stems lays next to him. Something tells you they're from your own garden.

That something would be correct.

"hey. gotta question for you. have you seen star lately? or soonly, for that matter?"

Come to think of it, it has been a while since you've seen the resident wizard.

"yeah, me neither. care to help me find him? not really a question. come on!"

name: Bowling for Goldie XI
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Orb; 1x Seaweed; 10x Aquamarine; 10x Lemon Quartz; 20x Stone
description: Star Meerif walks up to you, muttering something about goldfish encabulation on a Sunday. He absently holds out his goldfish bag and waits expectantly. I guess even wizards are beholden to supply and demand. Can you make a fishbowl for Star?

name: Relaxing Refreshment Required I
description:
“Curse all dragons. Even in the simmering heat, I must endure this armor. I can’t, even for a moment, doff a single plate to cool down a bit. They would surely take the advantage in the very moment that I dared to let down my guard. What horrible beasts…”

“Oh. I didn’t notice you there. What an excellent day we’re having! It’s so bright and sunny and absolutely gorgeous. I think such a beautiful day calls for a little refreshment, don’t you? While I continue watching over the town’s defenses, why don’t you fetch me a drink? Make it a nice chilled coconut water.”

(Hint: The items requested are in the Traveler's Bag 01 which is available in the June Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: A Pinata Trouble V
rewardItems: 400x Large Net; 60x Piñata; 5x Unknown(1232); 1x Spooky Cookies; 1x Lovely Cookies; 1x Happy Cookies; 5x Unknown(1238); 1x Unknown(1498); 1x Unknown(1492)
description:
“WE HAVE MANY RESIDENTS STILL UNPREPARED TO MEET THE PINATA ARMY. WILL YOU PROVIDE MORE WHOPPING STICKS FOR THE TOWN DEFENSE?”

“I AM ALSO RUNNING LOW ON ENERGY. WILL YOU PROVIDE CORN TO HELP SUSTAIN ME?”

name: A Pinata Trouble VI
rewardItems: 800x Large Net; 120x Piñata; 15x Unknown(1455); 2x Unknown(1443); 100x White Truffle; 1x Apple Pie; 1x Unknown(1498); 1x Unknown(1492)
description:
“My reconnaissance team finished their mission. The piñata army is enormous! But, it’s strange. The piñatas are marching toward town, but they’re not using any strategy at all. They’re just coming in a straight line, 10 piñatas wide, toward the eastern edge of town. We should be able to easily attack them from the front and the sides. Honestly, the only real danger is wearing ourselves out and running out of sticks.”

“Will you continue to prepare sticks for our defense force and corn for Roomba? Roomba is the fastest way to distribute the sticks to where they’re needed.”

name: Relaxing Refreshment Required II
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Spades; 1x Event Key; 1x Buddy Doll; 1x Prune Juice; 1x Unknown(1481)
description: “That was extremely refreshing! You really outdid yourself with finding such an incredible drink. Perhaps I can find a few trinkets to compensate you. You do still have your receipt, correct? Actually, before I do that, how about a small donation to support the town defense?”

name: Bowling for Goldie X
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Orb; 1x Seaweed; 10x Aquamarine; 10x Lemon Quartz; 20x Stone; 1x Goldgill
description:
Buddy holds up his goldfish with the biggest grin you've ever seen and dances an excited jig, shaking the bag all around. It's hard to tell, but... Yep. Yep, his goldfish is definitely... wait!

No, yeah, it's dead. Looks like it's been dead for at least half an hour, but you don't have the heart to tell him. Though, he does start to look concerned that his fish isn't laughing at his jokes any more.

Can you make a bowl for Buddy? Also, throw in something a little extra. Maybe he won't notice that either.

name: A Pinata Trouble IV
rewardItems: 200x Large Net; 30x Piñata; 1x Cranberry Juice; 25x Void Bag 01; 250x Mega Cotton Seeds; 2x Unknown(1481); 1x Unknown(1498); 1x Unknown(1492)
description:
<font face = "courier new">“THAT WAS AN EXCELLENT START, BUT THE REPORTS FROM GEORGE’S TEAM WARN OF A SIGNIFICANTLY LARGER FORCE. WE WILL NEED MORE WHOPPING STICKS.”
</font>

name: Curious Postal Note III
description: 30 divided by 5 times 11?  Split it.

name: Following the Buzz
description:
"so, the last place I saw star was right... here!"

You have no idea why you're standing on top of Holger's chimney, but at this point, you've stopped asking questions as they relate to the affairs of wizards.

"on a saturday, meerif? what were you thinking?"

frank pulls out a carrot from his... pocket? You're not really certain you want to know for sure.

"well—" he smacks loudly on the carrot "—you hear that?"

The only thing you can hear is the smacking.

"the only sensible thing from here is that he went straight into misty forest. you hear those cicadas? star loves the darn things. says they could be the key to unlocking that 'non-matter energy' he's always on about. say, you got any more of those carrots? we've got a long walk ahead. well. you do, at least."

Without another word, frank disappears in a cloud of blue feathers. You sigh as you climb down from Holger's roof and prepare for the long walk to the Misty Forest.

name: When You Wish Upon A Well
description:
One day as you're walking through town, you notice Rosalie throwing random items down the well. Strangely, every time she throws something in, something different pops out!

"You try it! Throw these in and see what you get," she says, excitedly, and hands you an assortment of baubles.

"I've been taking notes on this magic well for almost a year now. It's got a bit of variation that I still haven't nailed down. And every now and then it's completely thrown off by the 13th, but only on Fridays. I wonder if Star... Never mind. Have fun with the well!"

[The Wishing Well is a great way to convert your excess uncommon items into different, random uncommon items. Find out more by visiting the Wishing Well in town. Be sure not to throw more than you can afford! There is a gold cost at a certain point every day.]

name: Bowling for Goldie IX
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Orb; 1x Seaweed; 10x Aquamarine; 10x Lemon Quartz; 20x Stone
description: Cecil seems more annoyed than anything at the hassle of the matter. No fishbowls at the pet store? Unbelievable! Regardless, he needs your help. Can you make Cecil a fishbowl?

name: A Pinata Trouble VII
rewardItems: 1600x Large Net; 240x Piñata; 15x Unknown(1455); 100x Black Truffle; 1x Pumpkin Juice; 1x Unknown(1498); 1x Unknown(1492)
description:
<font face = "courier new">“THE PIÑATAS ARE FALLING QUICKLY, BUT THERE ARE MANY MORE COMING. WE WILL NEED TO DISTRIBUTE MORE WHOPPING STICKS”
</font>

name: Steam Powered I
description:
“{player}, come quickly! I’m working on a new corn-powered steam machine to launch my farm into a new era. It really could put Redbrook on the map and bring in a whole new community of farmers!”

“The only problem is—I need a new steam valve. My last two were no good. Can you help me build a new steam valve? When we’re done, we’ll celebrate with some cake!”

name: Bowling for Goldie III
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Orb; 1x Seaweed; 10x Aquamarine; 10x Lemon Quartz; 20x Stone
description: Oh no. You see a line of townsfolk beginning to form. It looks like everyone is winning goldfish today. Can you spare the resources to help Thomas, now?

name: Crates Unlocked for Buddy's Enrichment III
description: "That was great! Really brings back memories. Why don't you take this crowbar and try it yourself? Crack one open! Feels good, doesn't it? Don't get too aggressive with it though. You have to strike counter to the grain. Counter strike, then GO! That's it! It's fun isn't it! Tell you what. You go ahead and keep that old crowbar. Use it to open any crates you come across. But if a man named Breen asks, you didn't get it from me!"

name: Crates Unlocked for Buddy's Enrichment VI
description:
"I've done it!" he yells from inside the workshop.

Buddy emerges soon after carrying what appears to be the same box from earlier, but now, for some reason, it has his face on the six sides instead of the hearts. Thankfully, though, the odd comforting sensation returns, almost stronger now. You want to be near the weighted cube.

"This is my gift to you, {player}. Thank you for being my friend. Buddy's buddy! I found this weird cube outside of some abandoned camera company or something and thought of the perfect gift for you after some modifications. Oh, and here's that crowbar back!"

name: Knowledge is Power I
description:
"Settling in?" You look up from your work to see Lorn.

"You know, if you really want to put down roots here, you should check out the local Library and look up some things about life in Redbrook and areas around. When you're finished with your chores, why don't you head up and check the archives? Who knows? Maybe you'll even want your own Library Card, eventually. We'd be happy to have a new permanent member!"

[The Library in town is a great place to learn about FarmRPG and the various aspects of life in T'rah, the world in which the game lives. Within, you'll find various guides and details, as well as some pages that are just for fun. The search feature can be especially handy.]

name: Steam Powered II
description:
“Thank you! Okay. I just got the cake in the oven. Now, I just need some basic materials. Believe it or not, the primary catalyst is web-based. You can actually just bring me a few spiders and I’ll gather the silk myself. I think the big ones from the Misty Forest work great!”

“Who knew something so important could be built on a web?”

name: Steam Powered IV
rewardItems: 10x Honey; 10x Orange Gecko; 10x Spiked Shell; 25x Large Net
description:
“It's a ton of work, but just remember! At the end, there will be cake!"

"Now this next part is tricky and we may need help from FR4NK, so we’ll need a little corn oil.
