I tried using ROOMBA in the past, but he’s more of an automaton, when we really need help from a true android. FR4NK has agreed to help us mount the machine onto multiple platforms. He’s already built a dispenser to help with supplies, but he keeps insisting on proper headwear while working.”

“The last time we mounted a new platform, so many new farmers came to Redbrook that they had to expand Server Road into a four-lane highway!”

name: Change of Address
description:
As you check your mailbox, you're surprised to find a number of welcome gifts, cards, and well wishes from fellow farmers. As you're poring over them, friendly Holger walks by and shakes your hand.

"Welcome to Redbrook, {player}! I see you're already making great friends! Looks like the mailman dropped one, I came here to drop it off. There are farmers here from all over the world. Some them have been farming for a long time!"

"Be sure to visit me at the Locksmith in town, soon! I can help you open some of those pesky packages. I don't know why those Welcome Cards are so tricky to open!"

[The Locksmith in town can help you open locked items and packages. Be quick about it! Welcome Cards can only be opened if you're Farming Level 10 or below. After that, you should send any Welcome Cards to new players like you are now. Be sure to clear your Mailbox to make room for more! Better yet, visit the Farm Supply in town to expand it a bit!]

name: A Pinata Trouble III
rewardItems: 100x Large Net; 15x Piñata; 600x Orange Juice; 2x Prune Juice; 1x Unknown(1498); 1x Unknown(1492)
description:
<font face = "courier new">“I AM TASKED WITH DISTRIBUTING WHOPPING STICKS TO ALL TOWNSFOLK FOR THE TOWN DEFENSE. WILL YOU PROVIDE A SUPPLY OF WHOPPING STICKS FOR ME TO DISTRIBUTE?”
</font>

name: A Pinata Trouble I
rewardItems: 10x Large Net; 10x Void Bag 01; 1x Apple Turnover; 2x Piñata; 1x Unknown(1498); 1x Unknown(1492)
description:
“The day we’ve feared has finally come… Well, perhaps you haven’t. You actually look like you don’t know what I’m talking about. Hmmm. I would’ve sworn we went over this. Maybe that was scheduled for next Tuesday. This is even worse! They’re early!”

“We’re going to need whopping sticks. The piñatas are coming!”

name: Tomato Infestation!
rewardItems: 1x Prune Juice; 5x Grape Juice; 10x Unknown(1247); 10x Unknown(1248)
description: Baba Gec is extremely concerned about the new worm that has been found in  tomato harvests recently.  He would like you to bring him some sample bugs to understand what they are and how to prevent them spreading to other crops.

name: Bowling for Goldie I
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Orb; 1x Seaweed; 10x Aquamarine; 10x Lemon Quartz; 20x Stone
description: Rosalie won a goldfish at the school fair, but the pet store is all out of bowls! I guess she's not the only one to win today. Can you make one for her?

name: The Hare, the Wizard, and the Warzone
description:
Cicadas again.

Thousands of them. There must be more in these woods than in Misty Forest! You can't even hear yourself think.

"this is it!" You can barely hear frank's voice above the cacophony. "they're around here somewhere!"

That's when you see them.

An army of frogs blanketing the earth and hopping your way. The ground trembles as millions of fat, green bellies launch into the air and land in unison.

You aren't really sure what's happening, but you stand as still as you can as a wave of frogs washes past you, eating every bug in sight.

"Come on, {player}, we need to save as many as we can!"

It's Rosalie! What's she doing here? She and Star are in the middle of the procession, collecting as many cicadas as they can get their hands on.

"These frogs are ruining my experiments! It must be the ambifacient lunar waneshaft... On a Saturday for crying out loud! Come on! We might still save enough for my hesitation injection capacitor!"

"Take some frogs out while you're at it!" shouts Rosalie. "Every little bit helps!"

name: Bowling for Goldie V
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Orb; 1x Seaweed; 10x Aquamarine; 10x Lemon Quartz; 20x Stone
description:
Now Holger's turn... Wait. What happened to Holger's goldfish? He didn't... He wouldn't!

It doesn't matter. Can you make a fishbowl for Holger's bag of water?

name: Smells, Spells, & Cicada Shells
rewardItems: 50x Blue Feathers; 25x Large Net; 3x Void Bag 01; 1x Unknown(1321)
description:
You're drenched in sweat by the time you reach the Misty Forest. The sound of the cicadas is deafening and the ground is littered with their shells along the base of every tree.

frank is already waiting on you. He's leaning against a tree with... is that another pile of carrot stems? How long has he been waiting on you? And where is he putting all of those carrots!?

"great! you're finally here. i was almost out of carrots and was tempted to try corn for the first time..." frank visibly shudders as he speaks. "you... did bring more, right?"

You hand frank another bag of carrots and he begins walking into the forest. You follow.

"so, most people think cicadas are just noisy insects, but that's only because most people can't hear the other sound. the buzzing you hear is just the physical part. beneath that is a second resonance. star has been hoping to discover how to tap into it."

frank stops and scrunches his nose.

"smell that? sea salt... i know where he went next! to the emerald beach!"

More blue feathers erupt from nowhere as frank once again vanishes into thin air.

name: Bowling for Goldie XII
itemsRequired: 100x Glass Orb; 10x Seaweed; 100x Aquamarine; 100x Lemon Quartz; 200x Stone
description: Woah! How many times did Vincent win? He's going to need a lot of bowls for all those goldfish. Can you make 10 bowls for Vincent's 10 goldfish?

name: Bowling for Goldie XIII
description:
Vincent hands the goldfish out, one-by-one, to smiling children. When he wraps up, he claps his hands and grins at all the activities going on around him. He's glad to have a place where kids can all learn safely and have fun doing it. He thanks you for a job well done with some of the left over items at the prize booth and, you guessed it!

Another goldfish.

name: Bowling for Goldie IV
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Orb; 1x Seaweed; 10x Aquamarine; 10x Lemon Quartz; 20x Stone
description: Jill is up next. Hurry! Her goldfish doesn't look too good.

name: Crates Unlocked for Buddy's Enrichment V
itemsRequired: 1x Sturdy Box; 6x Piece of Heart; 1000x Watermelon; 6x Buddystone
description:
Buddy runs off to the workshop with the weird box and the crowbar. You feel oddly sad when the door closes, separating you from the box. You feel worried for it and you can't explain why.

After a few minutes, Buddy runs out and hands you a list of materials. He taps the list twice and runs back inside the workshop.

name: Brawl All Day I
rewardItems: 100x Orange Juice; 10x Arnold Palmer; 10x Large Net; 10x Void Bag 01; 3x Unknown(1203); 1x Hearts; 1x Unknown(1264)
description:
Borgen really wants to score some shots on Holger during the Bottle Rocket Brawl, but his wonderful brother is as slippery as a squeel covered in corn oil. How can such a lumbering beast of a man be so impossible to hit? Borgen thinks there may be some magic involved in Holger’s prosthesis.

So, that’s where you come in, Borgen needs your assistance in finding something with a little more spread than a bottle rocket. He needs a rocket with some punch, some flare, some excitement. He needs something Holger can’t possibly dodge. If you can find something like that, Borgen will make sure that your compensation matches the wonder of the rocket’s explosion.

(Hint: The item requested is in the Beatrix's Booming Brawl Box 03 which is available in the July Starter pack or by completing 28 days of chores)

name: Bowling for Goldie VII
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Orb; 1x Seaweed; 10x Aquamarine; 10x Lemon Quartz; 20x Stone
description: Captain Thomas seems confused about why they handed him a goldfish for winning a simple game. Where he's from, they usually hand out silverfish. Can you make a bowl for Captain Thomas?

name: A Pinata Trouble VIII
itemsRequired: 10000x Corn; 10000x Ancient Coin; 10000x Unknown(1382); 10000x Mushroom Paste; 10000x Eggs; 100x Over The Moon; 200x Wax Candle
rewardItems: 3200x Large Net; 480x Piñata; 30x Unknown(1455); 1x Pumpkin Juice; 10000x Unknown(1298); 100x Fruit Punch; 2x Borgen Buck; 1x Mini Time Egg; 1x Unknown(1498); 1x Wizard Hat; 1x Unknown(1492)
description:
“Well, that was weird. Even for some of the stranger things that I’ve seen, this was up there on my strange things list.”

“I guess all that’s left is to clean up all of these busted piñatas. I have a spell that might help, but it takes a lot of resources, especially for such a huge mess. Will you help me prepare it?”

name: One Shell of a Summer
rewardItems: 2x Wizard Hat; 1x Unknown(1258); 150x Unknown(1248); 150x Feathers; 50x Blue Feathers; 1x Unknown(1503); 1x Spades; 50x Orange Juice
description:
The war is over. The frogs moved on to other areas and left a shell-strewn wasteland in their wake. Thankfully, most of the cicadas are gone and you can finally hear yourself think again.

frank sits on a tree stump nearby, munching on a carrot. "i don't know, star, i'm just saying if i was him, i would have let the people go."

Star rubs his temples and says, "frank, what are you talking about?"

"nevermind. different universe. you know my name is npc_bunny1 in that one? weird place. i don't recommend it."

"Do you think we saved enough cicadas to get a good reading?" Rosalie asks.

Star slowly nods. "No thanks to the longhaired lepus, here, but yes. I think we did."

"who are you calling longhaired, you two-bit excuse for a birthday party magician!" Bits of carrot fly out of frank's mouth as he shouts.

Star stands up suddenly and makes a noise you previously thought impossible for a man or wizard to make. Without another word, he disappears with a resounding *POP* leaving nothing behind but a pile of feathers and a wizard hat next to Rosalie. A moment later, he pops back, grabs Rosalie, then they both disappear with an even bigger mound of feathers.

frank looks at you with mischief in his eyes.

"i'll pay for that later, but i'm just going to savor the moment for now. say? how about another bag of carrots for the road? and thanks for your help! if you hadn't tagged along, why i'd... i'd still have done everything the exact same... why did i bring you again?"

He doesn't leave you time to answer, but you know why. He takes the bag of carrots and disappears in a puff of blue feathers. You look around at the mess left behind. You crack your knuckles and get to work cleaning it up before the next adventure sweeps you off again.

name: When Life Gives You Lemon Quartz
description:
"EHEM!"

Star holds the bowl back out to you with a face of disgust.

"Just the blue ones, if you please."

He must want you to take out the lemon quartz. What an odd fellow.

name: Curious Postal Note I
description:
acceptable barriers cause satisfactory nearby residents

focused on a single fixture attached, perhaps horizontally

name: Curious Postal Note II
description: mewerehsyaenaeseaswtrivdhosiweyalfrl

name: Yes I'm Sure!
description:
George takes the supplies you brought him and mixes up more of the special green paint. He takes a deep breath and begins painting on a fresh canvas. After a few moments, he pauses to stare at his creation and lets out a sigh. He's still unsure.

He looks at you, then back at the original piece he had been working on. Suddenly, he shouts, "YES, I'M SURE!" and begins adding the new green paint to the painting.

After a few moments, he steps back to admire his work and is extremely pleased with the outcome! He's learned to trust himself and his abilities, and it's all thanks to you!

Take this as a token of George's gratitude.

name: Steam Powered 2: Episode 2
rewardItems: 1x Unknown(1508); 1x Mini Time Egg; 250x Orange Juice; 250x Apple; 50x Arnold Palmer; 25x Large Chest 01
description:
“It’s time to launch my new steam machine! Can you bring some coal and a few buckets of water to get things started? It should act like a beacon, making farming more accessible to farmers all over the world.”

“I hope we don’t have to repave Server Road again. Thanks for all your help! ”

“Oh! And before I forget… the cake is ready! What? Did you think I was lying about the cake? Why would I do that? That's crazy!”

name: The Sea Turtle and the Hare
description:
If you had a nickel for every time you had to interrogate sea turtles to find a missing person, you'd have two nickels. Which isn't a lot, but it's weird that it happened twice, right?

Regardless, you find out pretty quickly that Star was indeed at Emerald Beach. Turns out he needed help from the herptiles, he had just gone to the wrong ones.

"frogs!" frank says, shaking his head. "of course it's the frogs. it was always the frogs, meerif. you know where to go. last one there is a rotten cherry dump cake!"

Feathers, again. You sigh and begin the long trek to the forest outside your farm.

name: Crates Unlocked for Buddy's Enrichment I
rewardItems: 1x Buddy Loves You Card; 15x Mushroom Stew
description:
Buddy shows up, unannounced, carrying a crowbar. He says one of his favorite things to do is open crates and boxes. He misses it dearly from his old pir—sailing days.

"Back in the day, I used to crack open these babies by the hundreds! Didn't matter where I found them or who owned them! All with my trusty crowbar. My buddy Gordon gave it to me back in Celtrica and my other friend Gary modified it for extra box-cracking leverage. Came in handy against those awful jumping crabs in Tierchola, too!"

Can you whip up a few crates for him to open up?

name: But are you sure?
itemsRequired: 50x White Parchment; 50x Mushroom Paste; 5x Glass Jar; 50x Green Dye
description:
George just isn't sure anymore. He isn't sure he wants to use this newfound green paint color he acquired on his latest painting. He's afraid that if he uses it and isn't happy with the outcome, the painting could be ruined.

Could you bring him some extra materials so he can test it before committing?

name: Bowling for Goldie VIII
itemsRequired: 10x Glass Orb; 1x Seaweed; 10x Aquamarine; 10x Lemon Quartz; 20x Stone
description: Lorn looks overjoyed at his prize and has already named him Maverick. Can you make a place for Maverick to live?
